title: Slang Context-based Inference Enhancement via Greedy Search-Guided Chain-of-Thought Prompting
summary: Slang interpretation has been a challenging downstream task for Large Language Models (LLMs) as the expressions are inherently embedded in contextual, cultural, and linguistic frameworks. In the absence of domain-specific training data, it is difficult for LLMs to accurately interpret slang meaning based on lexical information. This paper attempts to investigate the challenges of slang inference using large LLMs and presents a greedy search-guided chain-of-thought framework for slang interpretation. Through our experiments, we conclude that the model size and temperature settings have limited impact on inference accuracy. Transformer-based models with larger active parameters do not generate higher accuracy than smaller models. Based on the results of the above empirical study, we integrate greedy search algorithms with chain-of-thought prompting for small language models to build a framework that improves the accuracy of slang interpretation. The experimental results indicate that our proposed framework demonstrates improved accuracy in slang meaning interpretation. These findings contribute to the understanding of context dependency in language models and provide a practical solution for enhancing slang comprehension through a structured reasoning prompting framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合贪婪搜索与思维链（Chain-of-thought）提示的框架，有效提升小型语言模型对俚语解释的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型（LLM）在俚语解释任务中表现有限，主要因俚语深受上下文、文化和语言环境影响，缺乏专属数据训练很难仅依赖词汇信息完成准确推断。
AI.method: 通过实验证明模型规模和温度对俚语解释效果影响有限，提出将贪婪搜索算法与思维链提示相结合，优化小模型在推理中的表现。
AI.result: 结合后的框架能提升小型语言模型解释俚语的准确率，大型Transformer模型参数多，准确率反而未必更高。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了俚语解释高度依赖上下文，并通过结构化推理提示方案，为LLM增强俚语理解能力提供了可行路径。

title: Steering at the Source: Style Modulation Heads for Robust Persona Control
summary: Activation steering offers a computationally efficient mechanism for controlling Large Language Models (LLMs) without fine-tuning. While effectively controlling target traits (e.g., persona), coherency degradation remains a major obstacle to safety and practical deployment. We hypothesize that this degradation stems from intervening on the residual stream, which indiscriminately affects aggregated features and inadvertently amplifies off-target noise. In this work, we identify a sparse subset of attention heads (only three heads) that independently govern persona and style formation, which we term Style Modulation Heads. Specifically, these heads can be localized via geometric analysis of internal representations, combining layer-wise cosine similarity and head-wise contribution scores. We demonstrate that intervention targeting only these specific heads achieves robust behavioral control while significantly mitigating the coherency degradation observed in residual stream steering. More broadly, our findings show that precise, component-level localization enables safer and more precise model control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过激活引导精确控制大语言模型（LLM）特定属性的新方法，通过锁定个别注意力头，实现行为控制且显著减少连贯性损失。
AI.motivation: 现有激活引导虽能高效控制LLM特征（如人物设定），但常导致文本连贯性下降，影响安全性及实际应用。这种退化可能由于对残差流的干预，造成全部特征受影响并放大无关噪声。
AI.method: 作者通过几何分析内部表示、结合层内余弦相似度与单头贡献分数，定位到只需要干预三个独立注意力头即可控制Persona与风格（称为风格调制头），无需对残差流整体干预。
AI.result: 选择性干预上述Style Modulation Heads，能够有效控制目标行为，同时显著降低由残差流引导导致的连贯性损失。并验证了精确定位模型内部组件可以实现更安全、精细的控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，模型内部组件级精确定位干预能兼顾控制效果与文本连贯性，是提升LLM安全可靠及实用性的有效途径。

title: Training-Free Agentic AI: Probabilistic Control and Coordination in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems enable complex, long-horizon reasoning by composing specialized agents, but practical deployment remains hindered by inefficient routing, noisy feedback, and high interaction cost. We introduce REDEREF, a lightweight and training-free controller for multi-agent LLM collaboration that improves routing efficiency during recursive delegation. REDEREF integrates (i) belief-guided delegation via Thompson sampling to prioritize agents with historically positive marginal contributions, (ii) reflection-driven re-routing using a calibrated LLM or programmatic judge, (iii) evidence-based selection rather than output averaging, and (iv) memory-aware priors to reduce cold-start inefficiency. Across multi-agent split-knowledge tasks, we show that while recursive retry alone saturates task success, belief-guided routing reduces token usage by 28%, agent calls by 17%, and time-to-success by 19% compared to random recursive delegation, and adapts gracefully under agent or judge degradation. These results demonstrate that simple, interpretable probabilistic control can meaningfully improve the efficiency and robustness of multi-agent LLM systems without training or fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REDEREF，一种无需训练的多智能体大模型协作控制器，利用概率方法提升多智能体任务的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体大模型系统在复杂推理和长程任务上展现潜力，但存在路由低效、反馈噪声大、交互成本高等部署难题。
AI.method: REDEREF方法包括：1）基于贝叶斯Thompson采样引导委托，提高历史表现好智能体的优先级；2）反思驱动的再路由机制，通过LLM或程序化评判器校准决策；3）基于证据筛选输出而非简单平均；4）利用记忆先验减少冷启动低效。无需训练即可集成。
AI.result: 在多智能体知识分割任务中，相比随机递归调度，REDEREF能在相同任务成功率下减少28%令牌消耗、17%智能体调用次数、19%完成时间，对智能体或评判器性能退化也更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 简洁、可解释的概率控制方法可显著提升多智能体大模型系统的效率和鲁棒性，无需额外训练或微调。

title: How Transformers Reject Wrong Answers: Rotational Dynamics of Factual Constraint Processing
summary:
When a language model is fed a wrong answer, what happens inside the network? Current understanding treats truthfulness as a static property of individual-layer representations-a direction to be probed, a feature to be extracted. Less is known about the dynamics: how internal representations diverge across the full depth of the network when the model processes correct versus incorrect continuations.
  We introduce forced-completion probing, a method that presents identical queries with known correct and incorrect single-token continuations and tracks five geometric measurements across every layer of four decoder-only models(1.5B-13B parameters). We report three findings. First, correct and incorrect paths diverge through rotation, not rescaling: displacement vectors maintain near-identical magnitudes while their angular separation increases, meaning factual selection is encoded in direction on an approximate hypersphere. Second, the model does not passively fail on incorrect input-it actively suppresses the correct answer, driving internal probability away from the right token. Third, both phenomena are entirely absent below a parameter threshold and emerge at 1.6B, suggesting a phase transition in factual processing capability.
  These results show that factual constraint processing has a specific geometric character-rotational, not scalar; active, not passive-that is invisible to methods based on single-layer probes or magnitude comparisons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过层层追踪语言模型处理正确与错误答案时的内部表征变化，发现模型对事实的选择主要表现为向量间方向（旋转）而非长度（缩放）的分歧，并揭示了参数规模与事实处理能力的突变点。
AI.motivation: 目前多数研究将模型的真实性理解为各层表征的静态属性，而对正确与错误答案在整个网络深度内表征动态变化了解甚少。本文旨在揭示模型如何动态区分正误答案的内部机制。
AI.method: 提出了一种叫做forced-completion probing的方法，对四个不同大小的解码器-only模型（1.5B-13B参数），输入完全相同的问题与已知的单词级正确或错误答案，并跨全部层数追踪五种几何指标的变化。
AI.result: 主要发现三点：1）正确与错误答案路径在网络中通过方向（旋转）而非长度（缩放）分歧；2）模型面对错误输入时不是被动出错，而是主动抑制正确答案；3）这两个现象在参数规模1.6B以下完全不存在，1.6B时突然出现，暗示事实推理能力的“相变”现象。
AI.conclusion: 事实选择的处理具有特定的几何特征——表现为旋转（方向而非模长）和主动性，这些特征难以被单层探针法或单靠幅值比较法检测到。

title: Rationale Behind Human-Led Autonomous Truck Platooning
summary: Autonomous trucking has progressed rapidly in recent years, transitioning from early demonstrations to OEM-integrated commercial deployments. However, fully driverless freight operations across heterogeneous climates, infrastructure conditions, and regulatory environments remain technically and socially challenging. This paper presents a systematic rationale for human-led autonomous truck platooning as a pragmatic intermediate pathway. First, we analyze 53 major truck accidents across North America (2021-2026) and show that human-related factors remain the dominant contributors to severe crashes, highlighting both the need for advanced assistance/automated driving systems and the complexity of real-world driving environments. Second, we review recent industry developments and identify persistent limitations in long-tail edge cases, winter operations, remote-region logistics, and large-scale safety validation. Based on these findings, we argue that a human-in-the-loop (HiL) platooning architecture offers layered redundancy, adaptive judgment in uncertain conditions, and a scalable validation framework. Furthermore, the dual-use capability of follower vehicles enables an evolutionary transition from coordinated platooning to independent autonomous operation. Rather than representing a compromise, human-led platooning provides a technically grounded and societally aligned bridge toward large-scale autonomous freight deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出由人类主导的自动驾驶卡车编队作为实现完全无人驾驶货运前的可行中间路径。
AI.motivation: 完全无人驾驶货运在多样化气候、基础设施和法规环境下，仍面临重大技术和社会挑战，事故中人类因素依然主要，指出需要新策略。
AI.method: 作者分析了北美2021-2026年53起重大卡车事故，梳理了行业现状，评估了自动驾驶在极端场景、冬季、偏远地区和大规模验证方面的不足，提出人机协同编队架构并探讨其实用性。
AI.result: 分析表明，人类主导的编队可提供多层次冗余、应对复杂情境的灵活判断和可扩展的验证框架，同时可平滑过渡到纯自动驾驶。
AI.conclusion: 人类主导的卡车编队不是妥协方案，而是循序渐进实现大规模无人货运的可行桥梁，兼具技术和社会可接受性。

title: KazakhOCR: A Synthetic Benchmark for Evaluating Multimodal Models in Low-Resource Kazakh Script OCR
summary: Kazakh is a Turkic language using the Arabic, Cyrillic, and Latin scripts, making it unique in terms of optical character recognition (OCR). Work on OCR for low-resource Kazakh scripts is very scarce, and no OCR benchmarks or images exist for the Arabic and Latin scripts. We construct a synthetic OCR dataset of 7,219 images for all three scripts with font, color, and noise variations to imitate real OCR tasks. We evaluated three multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on a subset of the benchmark for OCR and language identification: Gemma-3-12B-it, Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct, and Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct. All models are unsuccessful with Latin and Arabic script OCR, and fail to recognize the Arabic script as Kazakh text, misclassifying it as Arabic, Farsi, and Kurdish. We further compare MLLMs with a classical OCR baseline and find that while traditional OCR has lower character error rates, MLLMs fail to match this performance. These findings show significant gaps in current MLLM capabilities to process low-resource Abjad-based scripts and demonstrate the need for inclusive models and benchmarks supporting low-resource scripts and languages.

AI.tldr: 本文针对哈萨克语三种书写体系（阿拉伯、斯拉夫、拉丁）在OCR领域的数据与基准缺乏的问题，构建了合成数据集，并评估了多模态大模型和传统OCR的识别能力，发现主流大模型在低资源书写体系识别中表现较差。
AI.motivation: 哈萨克语作为使用多种书写体系的突厥语系语言，其OCR研究和公开数据极为稀缺，尤其是在阿拉伯与拉丁体系上几乎无基准和图像数据。为推动相关研究，亟需创建可用于评测的基准和数据集。
AI.method: 研究者合成了包含7,219张涵盖三种书写体系、字体、颜色及噪声多样变化的OCR图像数据集，选取Gemma-3-12B-it、Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct和Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct三种多模态大模型进行OCR与语言识别实验，并与经典OCR系统进行对比。
AI.result: 多模态大模型在拉丁与阿拉伯体系的OCR任务上全部失败，且无法正确把阿拉伯书写的哈萨克语识别为哈萨克语，通常误判为阿拉伯语、波斯语或库尔德语。传统OCR基线尽管识别准确度较低，但整体优于这些大模型。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态大模型在低资源Abjad体系文本识别方面存在重大短板，强调了支持低资源书写体系与语言的模型和基准建设的紧迫需求。

title: Explain in Your Own Words: Improving Reasoning via Token-Selective Dual Knowledge Distillation
comment: The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026, Accepted
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) can transfer the reasoning abilities of large models to smaller ones, which can reduce the costs to generate Chain-of-Thoughts for reasoning tasks. KD methods typically ask the student to mimic the teacher's distribution over the entire output. However, a student with limited capacity can be overwhelmed by such extensive supervision causing a distribution mismatch, especially in complex reasoning tasks. We propose Token-Selective Dual Knowledge Distillation (TSD-KD), a framework for student-centric distillation. TSD-KD focuses on distilling important tokens for reasoning and encourages the student to explain reasoning in its own words. TSD-KD combines indirect and direct distillation. Indirect distillation uses a weak form of feedback based on preference ranking. The student proposes candidate responses generated on its own; the teacher re-ranks those candidates as indirect feedback without enforcing its entire distribution. Direct distillation uses distribution matching; however, it selectively distills tokens based on the relative confidence between teacher and student. Finally, we add entropy regularization to maintain the student's confidence during distillation. Overall, our method provides the student with targeted and indirect feedback to support its own reasoning process and to facilitate self-improvement. The experiments show the state-of-the-art performance of TSD-KD on 10 challenging reasoning benchmarks, outperforming the baseline and runner-up in accuracy by up to 54.4\% and 40.3\%, respectively. Notably, a student trained by TSD-KD even outperformed its own teacher model in four cases by up to 20.3\%. The source code is available at https://github.com/kmswin1/TSD-KD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的知识蒸馏方法TSD-KD，有效地提升小模型在复杂推理任务上的表现，并可超越教师模型。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏要求学生模型完全模仿教师模型，容易导致分布不匹配，尤其是在复杂推理任务中学生模型能力不足时效果较差。因此，需要更灵活、学生导向的蒸馏方式，帮助学生模型更好地学习和推理。
AI.method: 提出Token-Selective Dual Knowledge Distillation（TSD-KD）方法，将重要推理token选择性蒸馏，结合直接分布匹配与基于偏好排序的间接反馈，并通过熵正则化提升学生模型置信度。
AI.result: 在10个复杂推理基准任务上，TSD-KD在准确率上显著优于传统方法，最高提升分别达到54.4%和40.3%。在4个任务上，学生模型甚至超越了其教师模型，表现出高达20.3%的提升。
AI.conclusion: TSD-KD是一种为学生模型量体裁衣的蒸馏方法，既提升了推理能力，又避免了传统方法的分布失配问题，具有较强的实际应用价值。

title: MRPoS: Mixed Reality-Based Robot Navigation Interface Using Spatial Pointing and Speech with Large Language Model
summary: Recent advancements have made robot navigation more intuitive by transitioning from traditional 2D displays to spatially aware Mixed Reality (MR) systems. However, current MR interfaces often rely on manual "air tap" gestures for goal placement, which can be repetitive and physically demanding, especially for beginners. This paper proposes the Mixed Reality-Based Robot Navigation Interface using Spatial Pointing and Speech (MRPoS). This novel framework replaces complex hand gestures with a natural, multimodal interface combining spatial pointing with Large Language Model (LLM)-based speech interaction. By leveraging both information, the system translates verbal intent into navigation goals visualized by MR technology. Comprehensive experiments comparing MRPoS against conventional gesture-based systems demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces task completion time and workload, providing a more accessible and efficient interface. For additional material, please check: https://mertcookimg.github.io/mrpos

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合现实的机器人导航新界面MRPoS，利用空间指向和语音交互替代传统手势操作，显著提升导航效率和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人导航由传统2D界面向空间感知混合现实系统转型，现有MR界面过度依赖手势（如“空中点击”），造成操作重复且对初学者具有物理负担。作者希望探索更自然、高效且用户友好的导航交互方式。
AI.method: MRPoS通过结合空间定向（用手或手指指向目标地点）与基于大语言模型（LLM）的语音理解，将用户的意图（位置和命令）自然转化为导航目标，并通过混合现实界面可视化。系统用实验与传统手势界进行对比分析。
AI.result: 实验显示MRPoS较传统仅依靠手势的系统，能显著减少任务完成时间，降低用户的操作负担。参与者反馈表明新界面更加易用、直观。
AI.conclusion: MRPoS为机器人导航提供了一种更高效、负担更小且更自然的交互方式，有利于各级用户广泛采用，为混合现实人机交互前沿探索提供了重要参考。

title: Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation: An Unbiased Evaluation of Progress in the Field
comment: This is a preprint of an article published in Computer Vision and Image Understanding (CVIU)
summary:
Sign Language Translation (SLT) aims to automatically convert visual sign language videos into spoken language text and vice versa.
  While recent years have seen rapid progress, the true sources of performance improvements often remain unclear. Do reported performance gains come from methodological novelty, or from the choice of a different backbone, training optimizations, hyperparameter tuning, or even differences in the calculation of evaluation metrics? This paper presents a comprehensive study of recent gloss-free SLT models by re-implementing key contributions in a unified codebase. We ensure fair comparison by standardizing preprocessing, video encoders, and training setups across all methods. Our analysis shows that many of the performance gains reported in the literature often diminish when models are evaluated under consistent conditions, suggesting that implementation details and evaluation setups play a significant role in determining results. We make the codebase publicly available here (https://github.com/ozgemercanoglu/sltbaselines) to support transparency and reproducibility in SLT research.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一代码库和标准化实验方法，重新实现并评估了近期多种手语翻译模型，发现很多方法的提升在一致的评测设定下会减弱，强调了实现细节对结果的重要性。
AI.motivation: 近年来手语翻译领域取得了快速进展，许多工作报告了显著的性能提升，但究竟是新方法本身有效还是因为实现细节不同，如主干网络选择、训练流程、参数调优甚至评测方式不同，始终未有系统分析。作者希望揭示真实的性能提升来源。
AI.method: 作者将近年来无gloss（无需中间词义标签）手语翻译的主要方法在同一代码库下重新实现，对数据预处理、视频编码器、训练设置等进行标准化，保证在完全一致的实验条件下进行横向对比。
AI.result: 在统一评测条件下，许多之前声称有明显提升的方法其实优势变小，说明先前报告的大幅提升更多源自实现和评测细节，而非方法本身创新。
AI.conclusion: 实现细节和评测设置对手语翻译研究结果影响极大。为促进研究透明性和可复现性，作者开放了统一标准化的代码库，呼吁社区重视和采用规范的比较方法。

title: Design and evaluation of an agentic workflow for crisis-related synthetic tweet datasets
summary: Twitter (now X) has become an important source of social media data for situational awareness during crises. Crisis informatics research has widely used tweets from Twitter to develop and evaluate artificial intelligence (AI) systems for various crisis-relevant tasks, such as extracting locations and estimating damage levels from tweets to support damage assessment. However, recent changes in Twitter's data access policies have made it increasingly difficult to curate real-world tweet datasets related to crises. Moreover, existing curated tweet datasets are limited to past crisis events in specific contexts and are costly to annotate at scale. These limitations constrain the development and evaluation of AI systems used in crisis informatics. To address these limitations, we introduce an agentic workflow for generating crisis-related synthetic tweet datasets. The workflow iteratively generates synthetic tweets conditioned on prespecified target characteristics, evaluates them using predefined compliance checks, and incorporates structured feedback to refine them in subsequent iterations. As a case study, we apply the workflow to generate synthetic tweet datasets relevant to post-earthquake damage assessment. We show that the workflow can generate synthetic tweets that capture their target labels for location and damage level. We further demonstrate that the resulting synthetic tweet datasets can be used to evaluate AI systems on damage assessment tasks like geolocalization and damage level prediction. Our results indicate that the workflow offers a flexible and scalable alternative to real-world tweet data curation, enabling the systematic generation of synthetic social media data across diverse crisis events, societal contexts, and crisis informatics applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成危机相关合成推文数据集的智能工作流程，以解决获取真实推文数据集困难及高成本注释等问题，为危机信息学中的AI系统开发和评估提供支持。
AI.motivation: 推特因政策变化导致实际危机推文数据集获取困难，且已有数据集局限于特定历史事件并注释成本高，限制了危机AI系统发展。作者旨在通过合成数据集解决这一限制。
AI.method: 提出了一套智能化合成推文生成流程：根据预设目标特征生成推文，经过合规性检查，用结构化反馈持续优化推文，循环迭代，最终得到满足要求的数据集。以地震后损失评估为案例，实证生成相关合成推文。
AI.result: 流程生成的合成推文在定位和损失等级标签方面达到了预期目标。实验证明这些数据集可用于评估AI系统在地理定位和损失等级预测等任务的表现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流程为真实推文数据集提供了一种灵活且可扩展的替代方案，可以系统性地生成适用于多样危机场景、社会环境和应用的合成社交媒体数据，便利危机信息学相关AI的开发与应用。

title: Bi-HIL: Bilateral Control-Based Multimodal Hierarchical Imitation Learning via Subtask-Level Progress Rate and Keyframe Memory for Long-Horizon Contact-Rich Robotic Manipulation
summary: Long-horizon contact-rich robotic manipulation remains challenging due to partial observability and unstable subtask transitions under contact uncertainty. While hierarchical architectures improve temporal reasoning and bilateral imitation learning enables force-aware control, existing approaches often rely on flat policies that struggle with long-horizon coordination. We propose Bi-HIL, a bilateral control-based multimodal hierarchical imitation learning framework for long-horizon manipulation. Bi-HIL stabilizes hierarchical coordination by integrating keyframe memory with subtask-level progress rate that models phase progression within the active subtask and conditions both high- and low-level policies. We evaluate Bi-HIL on unimanual and bimanual real-robot tasks, demonstrating consistent improvements over flat and ablated variants. The results highlight the importance of explicitly modeling subtask progression together with force-aware control for robust long-horizon manipulation. For additional material, please check: https://mertcookimg.github.io/bi-hil

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Bi-HIL框架，通过多模态分层模仿学习，有效提升了机器人在长时序、高接触任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 长时序、接触丰富的机器人操作任务因部分可观测性和接触不确定下的子任务转移不稳定而具有挑战性。现有方法依赖平坦决策策略，难以实现长时序任务的协调控制。论文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出Bi-HIL框架，将双边控制引入分层模仿学习，通过关键帧记忆及子任务进度率建模当前子任务的阶段演进，并用于高、低层策略的条件输入，从而稳健分层协调。
AI.result: 在单手和双手真实机器人任务中，Bi-HIL较平坦策略及去除分层组件的变体均有显著提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模子任务进度并结合力感知控制，对实现鲁棒的长时序机器人操作至关重要。

title: Safety-Guided Flow (SGF): A Unified Framework for Negative Guidance in Safe Generation
comment: ICLR2026 Oral, Code is available at https://github.com/MingyuKim87/SGF
summary: Safety mechanisms for diffusion and flow models have recently been developed along two distinct paths. In robot planning, control barrier functions are employed to guide generative trajectories away from obstacles at every denoising step by explicitly imposing geometric constraints. In parallel, recent data-driven, negative guidance approaches have been shown to suppress harmful content and promote diversity in generated samples. However, they rely on heuristics without clearly stating when safety guidance is actually necessary. In this paper, we first introduce a unified probabilistic framework using a Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) potential for image generation tasks that recasts both Shielded Diffusion and Safe Denoiser as instances of our energy-based negative guidance against unsafe data samples. Furthermore, we leverage control-barrier functions analysis to justify the existence of a critical time window in which negative guidance must be strong; outside of this window, the guidance should decay to zero to ensure safe and high-quality generation. We evaluate our unified framework on several realistic safe generation scenarios, confirming that negative guidance should be applied in the early stages of the denoising process for successful safe generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的概率框架，将现有扩散模型和流程模型中的安全机制归纳为基于能量的负引导，对阻止不安全样本起作用，并通过时序分析明确了安全引导在去噪早期应更强。
AI.motivation: 现有的安全机制分别从显式几何约束和数据驱动负引导出发，但后者依赖启发式规则，缺乏何时需要安全引导的理论依据。作者试图统一这两类方法，并分析负引导应何时有效地作用。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于最大均值差异（MMD）势能的概率统一框架，将显式的屏蔽扩散方法和数据驱动的Safe Denoiser方法都视为负引导，并结合控制屏障函数理论，分析并验证关键的引导时窗。
AI.result: 实验证明，在多个安全生成的现实场景下，负引导应在去噪初期强烈施加，才能有效引导模型安全采样。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架不仅理论上解释了不同安全机制，还明确了负引导的最佳施加阶段，为扩散模型的安全生成实践提供了理论指导。

title: Widespread Gender and Pronoun Bias in Moral Judgments Across LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assess moral or ethical statements, yet their judgments may reflect social and linguistic biases. This work presents a controlled, sentence-level study of how grammatical person, number, and gender markers influence LLM moral classifications of fairness. Starting from 550 balanced base sentences from the ETHICS dataset, we generated 26 counterfactual variants per item, systematically varying pronouns and demographic markers to yield 14,850 semantically equivalent sentences. We evaluated six model families (Grok, GPT, LLaMA, Gemma, DeepSeek, and Mistral), and measured fairness judgments and inter-group disparities using Statistical Parity Difference (SPD). Results show statistically significant biases: sentences written in the singular form and third person are more often judged as "fair'', while those in the second person are penalized. Gender markers produce the strongest effects, with non-binary subjects consistently favored and male subjects disfavored. We conjecture that these patterns reflect distributional and alignment biases learned during training, emphasizing the need for targeted fairness interventions in moral LLM applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统性地分析了大模型在道德判断任务中受语法人称、数和性别标记影响的偏见。通过对多个主流大模型进行对比，发现它们在公平性判断中展现出显著的语言偏见。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型被广泛用于道德判断，但其判断可能受到社会和语言偏见的影响。作者想要明确模型在语法特征（如人称、数、性别）变化下是否存在系统性的偏见，并对可能的根源进行探讨。
AI.method: 作者以ETHICS数据集的550条语句为基础，通过人为构造26种不同语法变体（人称、数、性别）生成共14850个等价句，然后用Grok、GPT、LLaMA等六个主流模型进行推断，对公平性判断和群体间差异（SPD）进行测试和统计分析。
AI.result: 实验证明，单数和第三人称结构更容易被模型判定为公平；第二人称则更易被判定为不公平。性别标记影响最大，非二元性别主体更容易获得“公平”判断，而男性主体则受到更多负面判断。
AI.conclusion: 大模型在道德判断中不仅受数据分布影响，还存在对特定语法结构及性别人群的系统性偏见。因此，未来在面向道德判断的应用场景中，需要针对性地矫正或缓和这些不公平现象。

title: STL-SVPIO: Signal Temporal Logic guided Stein Variational Path Integral Optimization
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) enables formal specification of complex spatiotemporal constraints for robotic task planning. However, synthesizing long-horizon continuous control trajectories from complex STL specifications is fundamentally challenging due to the nested structure of STL robustness objectives. Existing solver-based methods, such as Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP), suffer from exponential scaling, whereas sampling methods, such as Model-Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI), struggle with sparse, long-horizon costs. We introduce Signal Temporal Logic guided Stein Variational Path Integral Optimization (STL-SVPIO), which reframes STL as a globally informative, differentiable reward-shaping mechanism. By leveraging Stein Variational Gradient Descent and differentiable physics engines, STL-SVPIO transports a mutually repulsive swarm of control particles toward high robustness regions. Our method transforms sparse logical satisfaction into tractable variational inference, mitigating the severe local minima traps of standard gradient-based methods. We demonstrate that STL-SVPIO significantly outperforms existing methods in both robustness and efficiency for traditional STL tasks. Moreover, it solves complex long-horizon tasks, including multi-agent coordination with synchronization and queuing while baselines either fail to discover feasible solutions, or become computationally intractable. Finally, we use STL-SVPIO in agile robotic motion planning tasks with nonlinear dynamics, such as 7-DoF manipulation and half cheetah back flips to show the generalizability of our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的基于Stein变分路径积分优化（STL-SVPIO）的方法，用于高效解决信号时序逻辑（STL）约束下的机器人任务规划问题。相比传统方法，该方法能更好地处理复杂和长时域任务，并大幅提升健壮性和效率。
AI.motivation: 当前，利用STL进行机器人任务规划时，面对复杂逻辑约束和长时域任务，现有的优化方法要么计算量巨大（如MILP），要么在稀疏奖励和长时任务下效果不佳（如MPPI）。因此，迫切需要一种能高效解决复杂STL约束并适用于长时域连续控制的问题的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了STL-SVPIO方法，将STL逻辑转化为可微分的全局奖励，通过Stein变分梯度下降和可微物理引擎，将多个相互排斥的控制粒子高效引导到高健壮性区间，从而将难以优化的逻辑目标转化为易于优化的变分推断问题，有效规避了传统梯度方法中的局部极小值困境。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在传统和复杂的STL任务中，比主流方法在健壮性和计算效率方面都有显著优势。尤其是在多智能体协作、同步与排队等长时域高难度任务上，传统方法无法找到可行解或计算不可行，而STL-SVPIO可成功求解。此外，该方法还在高自由度机械臂与复杂运动规划中展示了普适性。
AI.conclusion: STL-SVPIO在复杂STL约束的机器人任务规划上，实现了高效、健壮和普适的优化性能，有望广泛应用于多智能体和非线性动力学的复杂自动化任务。

title: Benchmarking Compact VLMs for Clip-Level Surveillance Anomaly Detection Under Weak Supervision
comment: Published ad MDPI Journal of Imaging (see at https://www.mdpi.com/2313-433X/11/11/400)
summary: CCTV safety monitoring demands anomaly detectors combine reliable clip-level accuracy with predictable per-clip latency despite weak supervision. This work investigates compact vision-language models (VLMs) as practical detectors for this regime. A unified evaluation protocol standardizes preprocessing, prompting, dataset splits, metrics, and runtime settings to compare parameter-efficiently adapted compact VLMs against training-free VLM pipelines and weakly supervised baselines. Evaluation spans accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, and average per-clip latency to jointly quantify detection quality and efficiency. With parameter-efficient adaptation, compact VLMs achieve performance on par with, and in several cases exceeding, established approaches while retaining competitive per-clip latency. Adaptation further reduces prompt sensitivity, producing more consistent behavior across prompt regimes under the shared protocol. These results show that parameter-efficient fine-tuning enables compact VLMs to serve as dependable clip-level anomaly detectors, yielding a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off within a transparent and consistent experimental setup.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了将紧凑型视觉-语言模型（VLMs）用于CCTV安全监控异常检测的有效性，发现经过参数高效适配的VLM在检测性能和延迟方面可媲美或超过现有方法。
AI.motivation: CCTV场景下，异常检测需要在弱监督条件下实现高精度和低延迟，但现有方法存在检测效率、延迟不易控制的问题。作者希望寻求兼具准确性和可控延迟的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 建立统一评估协议，规范预处理、提示词、数据集划分、指标和运行参数；将经过参数高效适配的紧凑型VLM、无需训练的VLM管线，以及现有弱监督方法进行系统对比，评估其检测质量与每段视频的处理延迟。
AI.result: 紧凑型VLM经过参数高效适配后，其准确率、精确率、召回率、F1、ROC-AUC等指标与传统方法相当甚至更优，并能保持低且可控的延迟，对提示词的敏感度也降低，表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效微调的紧凑型VLM能成为CCTV异常检测中的可靠方案，兼具检测性能和效率，并在透明、一致的评测体系下表现出优越的准确-效率平衡。

title: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Reference Extraction and Parsing in the Social Sciences and Humanities
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the SCOLIA 2026 Workshop (Second Workshop on Scholarly Information Access), co-located with ECIR 2026. Workshop date: April 2, 2026
summary: Bibliographic reference extraction and parsing are foundational for citation indexing, linking, and downstream scholarly knowledge-graph construction. However, most established evaluations focus on clean, English, end-of-document bibliographies, and therefore underrepresent the Social Sciences and Humanities (SSH), where citations are frequently multilingual, embedded in footnotes, abbreviated, and shaped by heterogeneous historical conventions. We present a unified benchmark that targets these SSH-realistic conditions across three complementary datasets: CEX (English journal articles spanning multiple disciplines), EXCITE (German/English documents with end-section, footnote-only, and mixed regimes), and LinkedBooks (humanities references with strong stylistic variation and multilinguality). We evaluate three tasks of increasing difficulty -- reference extraction, reference parsing, and end-to-end document parsing -- under a schema-constrained setup that enables direct comparison between a strong supervised pipeline baseline (GROBID) and contemporary LLMs (DeepSeek-V3.1, Mistral-Small-3.2-24B, Gemma-3-27B-it, and Qwen3-VL (4B-32B variants)). Across datasets, extraction largely saturates beyond a moderate capability threshold, while parsing and end-to-end parsing remain the primary bottlenecks due to structured-output brittleness under noisy layouts. We further show that lightweight LoRA adaptation yields consistent gains -- especially on SSH-heavy benchmarks -- and that segmentation/pipelining can substantially improve robustness. Finally, we argue for hybrid deployment via routing: leveraging GROBID for well-structured, in-distribution PDFs while escalating multilingual and footnote-heavy documents to task-adapted LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对社会科学与人文学科（SSH）中现实文献引用情境的新基准，并比较了传统方法与大模型在文献参考文献提取与解析上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有参考文献提取与解析的评测主要关注于干净的英文文献末尾的书目信息，这严重低估了社会科学和人文学科中多语种、脚注嵌入、缩略与风格多样等复杂情况的挑战。
AI.method: 构建了涵盖多学科英语文章（CEX）、多语种及多形式引用（EXCITE）、强风格和多语种人文参考（LinkedBooks）的三大数据集，统一了评测标准。比较了传统监督流水线GROBID与多种主流大语言模型（如DeepSeek、Mistral、Gemma、Qwen3-VL）在文献提取、解析及端到端解析上的能力。同时，测试了LoRA微调与分段/流水线策略提升模型鲁棒性的效果。
AI.result: 在基本提取任务中，多种方法已达到较高水平。但在解析及端到端解析任务中，特别是在含噪声结构和格式多样的情形下，性能仍显著受限。LoRA微调和流水线处理可提升对SSH复杂引用的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用混合部署策略：对于结构规范的PDF优先采用GROBID，对多语种或脚注复杂的SSH文献则路由至专门适配的大语言模型，实现引用提取与解析的最优解。

title: Spatially Grounded Long-Horizon Task Planning in the Wild
summary: Recent advances in robot manipulation increasingly leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for high-level reasoning, such as decomposing task instructions into sequential action plans expressed in natural language that guide downstream low-level motor execution. However, current benchmarks do not assess whether these plans are spatially executable, particularly in specifying the exact spatial locations where the robot should interact to execute the plan, limiting evaluation of real-world manipulation capability. To bridge this gap, we define a novel task of grounded planning and introduce GroundedPlanBench, a newly curated benchmark for spatially grounded long-horizon action planning in the wild. GroundedPlanBench jointly evaluates hierarchical sub-action planning and spatial action grounding (where to act), enabling systematic assessment of whether generated sub-actions are spatially executable for robot manipulation. We further introduce Video-to-Spatially Grounded Planning (V2GP), an automated data generation framework that leverages real-world robot video demonstrations to improve spatially grounded long-horizon planning. Our evaluations reveal that spatially grounded long-horizon planning remains a major bottleneck for current VLMs. Our results demonstrate that V2GP provides a promising approach for improving both action planning and spatial grounding performance, validated on our benchmark as well as through real-world robot manipulation experiments, advancing progress toward spatially actionable planning.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了GroundedPlanBench基准和V2GP框架，系统评估和提升机器人操控中空间可执行的任务规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型的机器人操控研究主要聚焦高层次推理（如将任务指令分解为动作序列），但未充分评价这些动作计划在实际空间上的可执行性，限制了其真实操控能力的提升。
AI.method: 1）定义了“空间驱动的计划”任务。2）提出GroundedPlanBench，用于评估机器人在真实环境中长时序、空间可执行的行动规划能力，包括分层子动作计划和空间行动锚定。3）引入V2GP框架，通过利用现实机器人操作视频生成数据，自动提升空间驱动的长时序计划能力。
AI.result: 评测表明，现有VLMs在空间可执行的长时序规划任务上存在显著瓶颈。使用V2GP框架能够显著提升动作计划和空间锚定的表现，实验证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: GroundedPlanBench和V2GP为评估和提升空间驱动的机器人操控规划能力提供了新基准和有效工具，有助于推动机器人在空间可执行任务规划方面的进步。

title: Information-Theoretic Constraints for Continual Vision-Language-Action Alignment
summary: When deployed in open-ended robotic environments, Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models need to continually acquire new skills, yet suffer from severe catastrophic forgetting. We observe that this degradation is related to the deterioration of cross-modal information structure, where dependencies among visual observations, language instructions, and actions progressively diffuse during continual adaptation. But existing continual learning methods fail to preserve such cross-modal information dependencies. Thus, we propose Info-VLA, an information-preserving continual learning framework that maintains cross-modal information structure through two complementary constraints. Replay Anchor Contrastive Learning constructs stable alignment anchors from a frozen teacher model, preserving cross-modal alignment in the representation space. Cross-Modal Mutual Information Maximization further preserves dependency structure between visual and language representations through mutual information constraints. By jointly preserving historical alignment and cross-modal dependency information, Info-VLA balances stability and plasticity during continual learning. Furthermore, experiments on the LIBERO show that Info-VLA significantly outperforms existing methods in both task retention and adaptation.

AI.tldr: Info-VLA是一种为视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型设计的信息保持型持续学习框架，通过保持跨模态信息结构，有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，在开放式机器人环境中表现优异。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在开放式环境中需要持续习得新技能，但现有方法在持续学习过程中会导致模型灾难性遗忘，尤其体现在视觉、语言、动作信息之间依赖关系的损失，而现有持续学习方法无法有效维护这些跨模态信息依赖。
AI.method: 提出Info-VLA框架，通过两种约束机制保持跨模态信息结构：（1）Replay Anchor Contrastive Learning，从冻结的教师模型构建稳定的对齐锚点，维护表示空间的跨模态对齐；（2）Cross-Modal Mutual Information Maximization，通过互信息约束，进一步保持视觉与语言表示之间的依赖结构。
AI.result: 在LIBERO实验环境中，Info-VLA在任务保持能力（retention）和新任务适应能力（adaptation）上都明显优于现有持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Info-VLA通过联合保持历史对齐与跨模态依赖信息，有效平衡了持续学习过程中的稳定性与可塑性，显著提升了VLA模型在开放环境下的持续学习表现。

title: Privacy Preserving Topic-wise Sentiment Analysis of the Iran Israel USA Conflict Using Federated Transformer Models
summary: The recent escalation of the Iran Israel USA conflict in 2026 has triggered widespread global discussions across social media platforms. As people increasingly use these platforms for expressing opinions, analyzing public sentiment from these discussions can provide valuable insights into global public perception. This study aims to analyze global public sentiment regarding the Iran Israel USA conflict by mining user-generated comments from YouTube news channels. The work contributes to public opinion analysis by introducing a privacy preserving framework that combines topic wise sentiment analysis with modern deep learning techniques and Federated Learning. To achieve this, approximately 19,000 YouTube comments were collected from major international news channels and preprocessed to remove noise and normalize text. Sentiment labels were initially generated using the VADER sentiment analyzer and later validated through manual inspection to improve reliability. Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) was applied to identify key discussion topics related to the conflict. Several transformer-based models, including BERT, RoBERTa, XLNet, DistilBERT, ModernBERT, and ELECTRA, were fine tuned for sentiment classification. The best-performing model was further integrated into a federated learning environment to enable distributed training by preserving user data privacy. Additionally, Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques using SHAP were applied to interpret model predictions and identify influential words affecting sentiment classification. Experimental results demonstrate that transformer models perform effectively, and among them, ELECTRA achieved the best performance with 91.32% accuracy. The federated learning also maintained strong performance while preserving privacy, achieving 89.59% accuracy in a two client configuration.

AI.tldr: 本论文通过采集YouTube热点新闻评论，建立隐私保护的深度学习和联邦学习情感分析框架，揭示了2026年伊朗-以色列-美国冲突的全球公众情绪。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体成为人们表达观点的重要平台，分析这些平台上的公众情绪有助于理解全球对重大国际冲突（如2026年伊朗-以色列-美国冲突）的看法。但现有方法在数据隐私和主题细化方面仍有限。
AI.method: 收集近1.9万条YouTube评论，经清洗、用VADER和人工校正获得情感标签。用LDA提取主要话题，Fine-tune多种transformer模型（BERT、RoBERTa、XLNet、DistilBERT、ModernBERT、ELECTRA）进行情感分类。将最佳模型ELECTRA集成到联邦学习环境，实现分布式隐私训练，并用XAI（SHAP）解释模型预测。
AI.result: 所有transformer模型均表现良好，其中ELECTRA情感分类准确率最高（91.32%）。联邦学习框架下准确率达89.59%，同时保护了用户隐私。
AI.conclusion: 基于联邦学习的深度情感分析框架可有效分析热点国际事件中的公众情绪，同时兼顾数据隐私，具备良好的可解释性和实用价值。

title: Safety-guaranteed and Goal-oriented Semantic Sensing, Communication, and Control for Robotics
comment: 7 pages. This paper has been submitted to the IEEE Communications Magazine
summary: Wirelessly-connected robotic system empowers robots with real-time intelligence by leveraging remote computing resources for decision-making. However, the data exchange between robots and base stations often overwhelms communication links, introducing latency that undermines real-time response. To tackle this, goal-oriented semantic communication (GSC) has been introduced into wirelessly-connected robotic systems to extract and transmit only goal-relevant semantic representations, enhancing communication efficiency and task effectiveness. However, existing GSC approaches focused primarily on optimizing effectiveness metrics while overlooking safety requirements, which should be treated as the top priority in real-world robotic systems. To bridge this gap, we propose safety-guaranteed and goal-oriented semantic communication for wirelessly-connected robotic system, aiming to maximize the robotic task effectiveness subject to practical operational safety requirements. We first summarize the general safety requirements and effectiveness metrics across typical robotic tasks, including robot arm grasping, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-assisted tasks, and multi-robot exploration. We then systematically analyze the unique safety and effectiveness challenges faced by wirelessly-connected robotic system in sensing, communication, and control. Based on these, we further present potential safety-guaranteed and goal-oriented sensing, communication, and control solutions. Finally, a UAV target tracking case study validates that our proposed GSC solutions can significantly improve safety rate and tracking success rate by more than 2 times and 4.5 times, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种保障安全的目标导向语义通信方法，以提升无线连接机器人系统在满足安全需求下的任务有效性，并通过无人机目标跟踪实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 无线连接机器人依赖远程计算资源实现智能，但数据传输易造成通信瓶颈和延迟，影响实时性。现有目标导向语义通信仅优化有效性，忽视了实际应用中应优先考虑的安全需求。为此，亟需兼顾安全与任务效果的通信方法。
AI.method: 归纳常见机器人任务（如机械臂抓取、无人机任务和多机器人探索）的安全与有效性指标；系统性分析无线机器人在感知、通信、控制环节面临的安全与效果挑战；提出保障安全同时提升目标有效性的感知、通信、控制方案。
AI.result: 在无人机目标跟踪任务的案例中，所提方法的安全率和跟踪成功率分别提升了2倍和4.5倍，显示出显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 引入安全保障的目标导向语义通信能显著提升无线连接机器人系统的安全性与任务效率，具有实际应用价值。

title: MultiSolSegment: Multi-channel segmentation of overlapping features in electroluminescence images of photovoltaic cells
summary: Electroluminescence (EL) imaging is widely used to detect defects in photovoltaic (PV) modules, and machine learning methods have been applied to enable large-scale analysis of EL images. However, existing methods cannot assign multiple labels to the same pixel, limiting their ability to capture overlapping degradation features. We present a multi-channel U-Net architecture for pixel-level multi-label segmentation of EL images. The model outputs independent probability maps for cracks, busbars, dark areas, and non-cell regions, enabling accurate co-classification of interacting features such as cracks crossing busbars. The model achieved an accuracy of 98% and has been shown to generalize to unseen datasets. This framework offers a scalable, extensible tool for automated PV module inspection, improving defect quantification and lifetime prediction in large-scale PV systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于光伏组件EL图像像素级多标签分割的多通道U-Net网络模型，能准确区分裂纹、汇流条、暗区和非电池区域等互动特征，提升自动化检测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统EL图像缺陷检测方法无法给同一像素赋多标签，限制了对重叠退化特征（如裂纹穿过汇流条）的识别与分析。为解决此问题，需要开发能进行像素多标签识别的方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了多通道U-Net网络架构，实现对裂纹、汇流条、暗区以及非电池区域的独立概率输出，实现像素级多标签分割。该方法还针对特征交互情况（混杂/重叠）做了区分。
AI.result: 模型在EL图像分割中的准确率达到98%，并能很好地泛化至其他未见过的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多标签U-Net模型为大规模光伏组件自动化巡检提供了可扩展工具，有助于提高缺陷定量和寿命预测的准确性。

title: Preconditioned Test-Time Adaptation for Out-of-Distribution Debiasing in Narrative Generation
comment: This paper has been submitted to ACL2026 main conference
summary: Although debiased LLMs perform well on known bias patterns, they often fail to generalize to unfamiliar bias prompts, producing toxic outputs. We first validate that such high-bias prompts constitute a \emph{distribution shift} via OOD detection, and show static models degrade under this shift. To adapt on-the-fly, we propose \textbf{CAP-TTA}, a test-time adaptation framework that performs context-aware LoRA updates only when the bias-risk \emph{trigger} exceeds a threshold, using a precomputed diagonal \emph{preconditioner} for fast and stable updates. Across toxic-prompt settings and benchmarks, CAP-TTA reduces bias (confirmed by human evaluation) while achieving much lower update latency than AdamW/SGD; it also mitigates catastrophic forgetting by significantly improving narrative fluency over SOTA debiasing baseline while maintaining comparable debiasing effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大语言模型（LLM）在遇到未知偏见提示时自适应去偏方法CAP-TTA，实现低延迟高效率去偏。
AI.motivation: 虽然现有去偏的大语言模型能应对已知偏见，但面对陌生的高偏见提示时往往会输出有害内容。作者验证了这些提示构成分布转移，且静态模型在此场景下表现下降。研究旨在提升LLM应对未知/分布外偏见的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出CAP-TTA，一个测试时自适应方法：模型仅在检测到高风险偏见触发时，基于上下文进行LoRA局部权重快速微调，采用预先计算的对角预条件器，实现模型高效且稳定地自适应。
AI.result: 在多项有毒提示和基准数据集上，CAP-TTA在降低偏见上优于基线（包括人类评测确认），更新延迟大大低于AdamW/SGD，同时在去偏有效性的基础上，显著提升模型叙述流畅性，减轻灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: CAP-TTA为自动去偏和模型泛化提供了一种高效可行的测试时自适应方案，兼顾去偏有效性与生成文本流畅性。

title: Learning Actionable Manipulation Recovery via Counterfactual Failure Synthesis
summary: While recent foundation models have significantly advanced robotic manipulation, these systems still struggle to autonomously recover from execution errors. Current failure-learning paradigms rely on either costly and unsafe real-world data collection or simulator-based perturbations, which introduce a severe sim-to-real gap. Furthermore, existing visual analyzers predominantly output coarse, binary diagnoses rather than the executable, trajectory-level corrections required for actual recovery. To bridge the gap between failure diagnosis and actionable recovery, we introduce Dream2Fix, a framework that synthesizes photorealistic, counterfactual failure rollouts directly from successful real-world demonstrations. By perturbing actions within a generative world model, Dream2Fix creates paired failure-correction data without relying on simulators. To ensure the generated data is physically viable for robot learning, we implement a structured verification mechanism that strictly filters rollouts for task validity, visual coherence, and kinematic safety. This engine produces a high-fidelity dataset of over 120k paired samples. Using this dataset, we fine-tune a vision-language model to jointly predict failure types and precise recovery trajectories, mapping visual anomalies directly to corrective actions. Extensive real-world robotic experiments show our approach achieves state-of-the-art correction accuracy, improving from 19.7% to 81.3% over prior baselines, and successfully enables zero-shot closed-loop failure recovery in physical deployments.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Dream2Fix框架，通过生成并验证高质量的失败-修正配对数据，大幅提升机器人操作任务中的错误恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在机器人操作任务有进展，但仍难以自主恢复执行中的错误。当前的错误学习方式依赖昂贵甚至不安全的实地采集或仿真扰动，存在“仿真-现实差距”；同时视觉分析仅能输出粗略的二值判断，难以实现真正的、能执行的纠正动作。
AI.method: 提出Dream2Fix框架：从真实演示中生成逼真的对照失败数据，通过生成式世界模型扰动动作，再用结构化校验机制过滤，保障物理可行性和安全性。进而得到高质量的失败-修正对数据集，用于微调视觉-语言模型，使其能联合预测失败类型及精确修正轨迹。
AI.result: Dream2Fix生成了12万多对高质量的失败-修正数据。微调后的模型在真实机器人实验中，将修正准确率从19.7%提升到81.3%，显著超过已有方法，实现了零样本闭环纠错。
AI.conclusion: Dream2Fix有效缩小诊断与可执行纠错之间的鸿沟，实现了高效、准确的机器人任务自恢复能力，对实际部署有极大促进作用。

title: Complementarity-Supervised Spectral-Band Routing for Multimodal Emotion Recognition
summary: Multimodal emotion recognition fuses cues such as text, video, and audio to understand individual emotional states. Prior methods face two main limitations: mechanically relying on independent unimodal performance, thereby missing genuine complementary contributions, and coarse-grained fusion conflicting with the fine-grained representations required by emotion tasks. As inconsistent information density across heterogeneous modalities hinders inter-modal feature mining, we propose the Complementarity-Supervised Multi-Band Expert Network, named Atsuko, to model fine-grained complementary features via multi-scale band decomposition and expert collaboration. Specifically, we orthogonally decompose each modality's features into high, mid, and low-frequency components. Building upon this band-level routing, we design a modality-level router with a dual-path mechanism for fine-grained cross-band selection and cross-modal fusion. To mitigate shortcut learning from dominant modalities, we propose the Marginal Complementarity Module (MCM) to quantify performance loss when removing each modality via bi-modal comparison. The resulting complementarity distribution provides soft supervision, guiding the router to focus on modalities contributing unique information gains. Extensive experiments show our method achieves superior performance on the CMU-MOSI, CMU-MOSEI, CH-SIMS, CH-SIMSv2, and MIntRec benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Atsuko的多模态融合网络，利用多频带专家建模和补充性监督，显著提升了情感识别性能。
AI.motivation: 以往多模态情感识别方法过于依赖各自模态的结果，忽视了不同模态之间的互补性，且融合方式粗糙，难以捕捉细粒度特征，限制了情感识别任务的效果。
AI.method: 提出Complementarity-Supervised Multi-Band Expert Network (Atsuko)。该方法对每种模态特征进行正交分解（高、中、低频），通过频带级路由和模态级双路径机制，实现细粒度模态融合。同时，引入补充性监督模块（MCM），通过移除各模态进行双模对比，评估各模态独特贡献，引导模型更好地融合重要信息。
AI.result: 本文方法在CMU-MOSI、CMU-MOSEI、CH-SIMS、CH-SIMSv2和MIntRec等权威多模态情感识别数据集上表现出更优性能，显著超过现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 采用多频带专家建模和补充性监督的细粒度多模态融合，能够更好地挖掘不同模态的互补信息，有效提升多模态情感识别任务的整体性能。

title: QuarkMedBench: A Real-World Scenario Driven Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel on standardized medical exams, high scores often fail to translate to high-quality responses for real-world medical queries. Current evaluations rely heavily on multiple-choice questions, failing to capture the unstructured, ambiguous, and long-tail complexities inherent in genuine user inquiries. To bridge this gap, we introduce QuarkMedBench, an ecologically valid benchmark tailored for real-world medical LLM assessment. We compiled a massive dataset spanning Clinical Care, Wellness Health, and Professional Inquiry, comprising 20,821 single-turn queries and 3,853 multi-turn sessions. To objectively evaluate open-ended answers, we propose an automated scoring framework that integrates multi-model consensus with evidence-based retrieval to dynamically generate 220,617 fine-grained scoring rubrics (~9.8 per query). During evaluation, hierarchical weighting and safety constraints structurally quantify medical accuracy, key-point coverage, and risk interception, effectively mitigating the high costs and subjectivity of human grading. Experimental results demonstrate that the generated rubrics achieve a 91.8% concordance rate with clinical expert blind audits, establishing highly dependable medical reliability. Crucially, baseline evaluations on this benchmark reveal significant performance disparities among state-of-the-art models when navigating real-world clinical nuances, highlighting the limitations of conventional exam-based metrics. Ultimately, QuarkMedBench establishes a rigorous, reproducible yardstick for measuring LLM performance on complex health issues, while its framework inherently supports dynamic knowledge updates to prevent benchmark obsolescence.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了QuarkMedBench，一个专门用于真实世界医疗大模型评测的新型基准，囊括了大量真实医疗问答，并设计了自动化、客观的评分机制。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型虽然在医学标准化考试中表现优异，但在应对真实世界复杂多变的医疗问题时，其能力评估存在巨大缺口。主流评测方法过度依赖选择题，无法有效反映实际用户的需求和问题复杂性，因此亟需更加生态化和高效的评测方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了QuarkMedBench数据集，涵盖临床护理、健康养生、专业咨询等领域，总计2万余条单轮问答和近4000组多轮对话。同时提出多模型共识与基于证据的检索相结合的自动评分框架，自动生成22万余条细粒度评分标准，并通过分层加权和医疗安全约束，全面量化模型的准确性与风险拦截能力。
AI.result: 自动生成的评分标准与临床专家盲审结果一致率高达91.8%，验证了方法的可靠性。基准测试显示，主流SOTA模型在实际医疗问答场景下表现差异显著，揭示了只依赖考试题评测的局限性。
AI.conclusion: QuarkMedBench为大模型的真实医疗能力评测提供了科学、可复用、动态更新的标准，可有效促进医疗AI系统在复杂场景下的可靠性和安全性提升。

title: Fabric Pneumatic Artificial Muscle-Based Head-Neck Exosuit: Design, Modeling, and Evaluation
comment: Manuscript (8 pages, 5 tables, 7 figures) accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2026. Video attachment: https://youtu.be/iGuEbvCXgJ0?si=WqP2q-P_Mp1Brmfc
summary: Wearable exosuits assist human movement in tasks ranging from rehabilitation to daily activities; specifically, head-neck support is necessary for patients with certain neurological disorders. Rigid-link exoskeletons have shown to enable head-neck mobility compared to static braces, but their bulkiness and restrictive structure inspire designs using "soft" actuation methods. In this paper, we propose a fabric pneumatic artificial muscle-based exosuit design for head-neck support. We describe the design of our prototype and physics-based model, enabling us to derive actuator pressures required to compensate for gravitational load. Our modeled range of motion and workspace analysis indicate that the limited actuator lengths impose slight limitations (83% workspace coverage), and gravity compensation imposes a more significant limitation (43% workspace coverage). We introduce compression force along the neck as a novel, potentially comfort-related metric. We further apply our model to compare the torque output of various actuator placement configurations, allowing us to select a design with stability in lateral deviation and high axial rotation torques. The model correctly predicts trends in measured data where wrapping the actuators around the neck is not a significant factor. Our test dummy and human user demonstration confirm that the exosuit can provide functional head support and trajectory tracking, underscoring the potential of artificial muscle-based soft actuation for head-neck mobility assistance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于织物气动人工肌肉的柔性头颈助力外骨骼（exosuit），用于为有需要的用户（如某些神经系统疾病患者）提供头颈运动支持。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性外骨骼虽然能够辅助头颈活动，但其笨重和限制性强，不适用于舒适性和灵活性要求更高的场景。针对这一问题，作者希望开发一种更轻薄、柔性且舒适的头颈支持方案。
AI.method: 作者设计并制作了基于织物气动人工肌肉的外骨骼原型，并建立了物理模型，用以分析和预测气动致动器所需压力、可覆盖的工作空间以及辅助范围。通过定量分析各种致动器布局下的输出扭矩，评估其稳定性和旋转能力，并提出颈部压缩力作为新的舒适性评价指标。最后通过假人和真人实验验证了设计效果。
AI.result: 模型预测和实测数据趋势一致，表明气动人工肌肉的环绕布局对性能影响不大。设备可实现辅助头部支撑和轨迹跟踪。有限的致动器长度对工作空间有一定限制（83%覆盖），重力补偿下的支持则较为有限（43%覆盖）。
AI.conclusion: 基于人工肌肉的柔性外骨骼在头颈运动辅助中展示出良好功能和应用潜力，为提升患有神经系统障碍患者的生活质量提供了新思路。

title: Mind the Discriminability Trap in Source-Free Cross-domain Few-shot Learning
summary: Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (SF-CDFSL) focuses on fine-tuning with limited training data from target domains (e.g., medical or satellite images), where Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP and SigLIP have shown promising results. Current works in traditional visual models suggest that improving visual discriminability enhances performance. However, in VLM-based SF-CDFSL tasks, we find that \textbf{strengthening visual-modal discriminability actually suppresses VLMs' performance}. In this paper, we aim to delve into this phenomenon for an interpretation and a solution. By both theoretical and experimental proofs, our study reveals that fine-tuning with the typical cross-entropy loss ($\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{vlm}}$) inherently includes a visual learning part and a cross-modal learning part, where the cross-modal part is crucial for rectifying the heavily disrupted modality misalignment in SF-CDFSL. However, we find that the visual learning essentially acts as a shortcut that encourages the model to reduce $\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{vlm}}$ without considering the cross-modal part, therefore hindering the cross-modal alignment and harming the performance. Based on this interpretation, we further propose an approach to address this problem: first, we perturb the visual learning to guide the model to focus on the cross-modal alignment. Then, we use the visual-text semantic relationships to gradually align the visual and textual modalities during the fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on various settings, backbones (CLIP, SigLip, PE-Core), and tasks (4 CDFSL datasets and 11 FSL datasets) show that we consistently set new state-of-the-art results. Code is available at https://github.com/zhenyuZ-HUST/CVPR26-Mind-the-Discriminability-Trap.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的源无关跨域小样本学习（SF-CDFSL）任务中，强化视觉可判别性反而降低了模型性能。作者通过理论与实验分析，解释了该现象，并提出扰动视觉学习以增强跨模态对齐的方法，有效提升了多项任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 以往研究普遍认为提升视觉判别能力有助于模型性能，但在VLM应用于SF-CDFSL时，作者观察到反而起到负面作用，因此希望探索成因并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 作者通过理论与实验分析，指出常规交叉熵损失中包含视觉学习与跨模态学习两部分，而在微调过程中，视觉学习部分成为捷径，弱化了关键的跨模态对齐。为此，作者提出：先扰动视觉学习，引导模型专注于跨模态对齐，再利用视觉与文本语义关系逐步进行多模态一致性微调。
AI.result: 该方法不仅在多种VLM架构（如CLIP、SigLIP、PE-Core）、多种设置以及15个小样本学习数据集（包括4个CDFSL和11个FSL数据集）上实现了全新的SOTA表现。
AI.conclusion: 在VLM驱动的SF-CDFSL场景中，视觉可判别性提升未必带来优化，需要注意避免其对跨模态对齐的抑制作用。作者提供的扰动视觉学习与逐步对齐方案，能够有效提升多项小样本跨域任务效果。

title: Repetition Without Exclusivity: Scale Sensitivity of Referential Mechanisms in Child-Scale Language Models
summary: We present the first systematic evaluation of mutual exclusivity (ME) -- the bias to map novel words to novel referents -- in text-only language models trained on child-directed speech. We operationalise ME as referential suppression: when a familiar object is relabelled in a two-referent discourse context, ME predicts decreased probability of the labelled noun at a subsequent completion position. Three pilot findings motivate a pre-registered scale-sensitivity experiment: (1) a masked language model (BabyBERTa) is entirely insensitive to multi-sentence referential context; (2) autoregressive models show robust repetition priming -- the opposite of ME -- when familiar nouns are re-labelled; and (3) a novel context-dependence diagnostic reveals that apparent ME-like patterns with nonce tokens are fully explained by embedding similarity, not referential disambiguation. In the confirmatory experiment, we train 45 GPT-2-architecture models (2.9M, 8.9M, and 33.5M parameters; 5, 10, and 20 epochs on AO-CHILDES; 5 seeds each) and evaluate on a pre-registered ME battery. Anti-ME repetition priming is significant in all 9 cells (85-100% of items; all p < 2.4 x 10^-13). Priming attenuates with improved language modelling (Spearman rho = -0.533, p = 0.0002) but never crosses zero across a 3.8x perplexity range. The context-dependence diagnostic replicates in all 9 cells, and dose-response priming increases with repetitions in 8/9 cells (all trend p < 0.002). These findings indicate that distributional learning on child-directed speech produces repetition-based reference tracking rather than lexical exclusivity. We connect this to the grounded cognition literature and argue that referential grounding may be a necessary ingredient for ME -- an empirical claim about required input structure, not a nativist one.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了基于儿童语言输入训练的文本型语言模型是否具备“互斥性”(ME)倾向，发现这些模型表现为对重复标签的敏感，而非互斥性。
AI.motivation: 儿童习得新词时有互斥性偏好，即倾向于将新词与新对象配对，而现有研究主要关注人的行为。本文希望系统考察基于儿童语料训练的语言模型是否会自发展现出这种偏好，进而探讨这涉及的认知/输入机制。
AI.method: 作者设计了一套以“指称抑制”操作化ME效应的方法，并分别用掩码语言模型（如BabyBERTa）和自回归类模型（如GPT-2衍生模型）在婴幼儿语料（AO-CHILDES）上训练，设置参数数量、训练轮数和随机种子等变量，全面测试模型的ME表现和相关上下文依赖性。
AI.result: 掩码模型对多句上下文完全无感；自回归模型对熟悉名词重命名时反而表现为强烈的重复首选（即“反ME”），且这种效应随模型能力提升有所减弱，但始终未呈现互斥性。非词测试证明所谓ME迹象实为嵌入相似性，而非真正的指称消解机制。
AI.conclusion: 基于婴幼儿语料的分布式学习，会导致基于重复的参照追踪而不是词汇互斥效应。作者据此推测，只有引入“指称着地”（即让符号与具体感知/情境关联），才可能支持互斥性，而非单靠分布式语言输入即可实现。

title: End-to-End O-RAN Testbed for Edge-AI-Enabled 5G/6G Connected Industrial Robotics
summary: Connected robotics is one of the principal use cases driving the transition towards more intelligent and capable 6G mobile cellular networks. Replacing wired connections with highly reliable, high-throughput, and low-latency 5G/6G radio interfaces enables robotic system mobility and the offloading of compute-intensive artificial intelligence (AI) models for robotic perception and control to servers located at the network edge. The transition towards Edge AI as a Service (E-AIaaS) simplifies on-site maintenance of robotic systems and reduces operational costs in industrial environments, while supporting flexible AI model life-cycle management and seamless upgrades of robotic functionalities over time. In this paper, we present a 5G/6G O-RAN-based end-to-end testbed that integrates E-AIaaS for connected industrial robotic applications. The objective is to design and deploy a generic experimental platform based on open technologies and interfaces, demonstrated through an E-AIaaS-enabled autonomous welding scenario. Within this scenario, the testbed is used to investigate trade-offs among different data acquisition, edge processing, and real-time streaming approaches for robotic perception, while supporting emerging paradigms such as semantic and goal-oriented communications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于5G/6G开放无线接入网（O-RAN）的端到端测试平台，用于集成边缘人工智能即服务（E-AIaaS）于工业机器人应用，演示了其在自动焊接场景下的应用与优势。
AI.motivation: 随着工业机器人智能化发展，对更高移动性、可靠性及实时性的无线连接需求增加，推动了6G网络研究。同时，AI推理需求的提高需要将算力迁移至网络边缘，降低运维复杂度与成本。
AI.method: 基于5G/6G O-RAN架构，作者构建了一个端到端实验平台，集成E-AIaaS服务，并以自主焊接作为示范场景，实验多种数据采集、边缘处理与实时流媒体方案，并支持语义通信等新范式。
AI.result: 平台成功演示了E-AIaaS下机器人视觉与控制的卸载与边缘推理，探索了不同方案之间的性能权衡，验证了对机器人功能生命周期管理和升级的支持能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于开放技术的E-AIaaS平台能有效支持工业机器人智能化的灵活部署与演进，为工业智能化及6G网络下的机器人应用提供可行路径。

title: DDS-UDA: Dual-Domain Synergy for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in Joint Segmentation of Optic Disc and Optic Cup
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved exciting performance in joint segmentation of optic disc and optic cup on single-institution datasets. However, their clinical translation is hindered by two major challenges: limited availability of large-scale, high-quality annotations and performance degradation caused by domain shift during deployment across heterogeneous imaging protocols and acquisition platforms. While unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) provides a way to mitigate these limitations, most existing approaches do not address cross-domain interference and intra-domain generalization within a unified framework. In this paper, we present the Dual-Domain Synergy UDA (DDS-UDA), a novel UDA framework that comprises two key modules. First, a bi-directional cross-domain consistency regularization module is enforced to mitigate cross-domain interference through feature-level semantic information exchange guided by a coarse-to-fine dynamic mask generator, suppressing noise propagation while preserving structural coherence. Second, a frequency-driven intra-domain pseudo label learning module is used to enhance intra-domain generalization by synthesizing spectral amplitude-mixed supervision signals, which ensures high-fidelity feature alignment across domains. Implemented within a teacher-student architecture, DDS-UDA disentangles domain-specific biases from domain-invariant feature-level representations, thereby achieving robust adaptation to heterogeneous imaging environments. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of our proposed method on two multi-domain fundus image datasets, demonstrating that it outperforms several existing UDA based methods and therefore providing an effective way for optic disc and optic cup segmentation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的无监督领域自适应（UDA）方法，用于增强视盘和视杯联合分割在多领域眼底图像中的泛化能力，显著超过现有UDA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN在单一机构下能很好分割视盘和视杯，但用于临床部署时，由于高质量标注缺乏和领域差异，性能大幅下降。当前UDA方法很少能在一个统一框架下，同时处理跨域干扰和域内泛化问题。
AI.method: 提出了双域协同UDA（DDS-UDA）框架，包括两个模块：1）双向跨域一致性正则化模块，利用特征级语义信息交换和动态掩码生成器，抑制噪声传播并保持结构一致性；2）基于频谱的域内伪标签学习模块，通过频谱幅值混合增强域内泛化。该方法基于教师-学生架构，实现特征表征中域特异性偏差的解耦。
AI.result: 在两个多域眼底图像数据集上，DDS-UDA的分割性能优于多种主流的UDA方法，充分验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DDS-UDA框架能够有效缓解领域差异导致的性能退化，提升多领域下视盘视杯分割的鲁棒性，为临床应用提供了有效的数据驱动方法。

title: Can We Trust LLMs on Memristors? Diving into Reasoning Ability under Non-Ideality
summary: Memristor-based analog compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures provide a promising substrate for the efficient deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs), owing to superior energy efficiency and computational density. However, these architectures suffer from precision issues caused by intrinsic non-idealities of memristors. In this paper, we first conduct a comprehensive investigation into the impact of such typical non-idealities on LLM reasoning. Empirical results indicate that reasoning capability decreases significantly but varies for distinct benchmarks. Subsequently, we systematically appraise three training-free strategies, including thinking mode, in-context learning, and module redundancy. We thus summarize valuable guidelines, i.e., shallow layer redundancy is particularly effective for improving robustness, thinking mode performs better under low noise levels but degrades at higher noise, and in-context learning reduces output length with a slight performance trade-off. Our findings offer new insights into LLM reasoning under non-ideality and practical strategies to improve robustness.

AI.tldr: 本论文分析了忆阻器类模拟内存计算（CIM）架构在大型语言模型（LLM）部署中的准确度受限问题，评估了三种训练无关提升鲁棒性的策略，并提出了应对噪声影响的实践指南。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器CIM架构虽具能效高和计算密度大的优点，但因器件本身非理想性导致了模型推理精度显著下降。针对现有对精度下降机制及应对方法缺乏系统分析的问题，本文旨在填补该领域空白。
AI.method: 作者通过实验系统分析忆阻器典型非理想性对LLM推理能力的影响，并评价了三种无需重新训练的鲁棒性增强策略：思考模式(in-context thinking mode)、上下文学习(in-context learning)、模块冗余(module redundancy)。
AI.result: 实验证明，非理想性显著削弱了LLM推理性能，且不同基准测试任务受影响程度不同。三种策略效果各异：浅层冗余对提升鲁棒性尤为有效，思考模式适用于低噪声环境且高噪声下效果退化，上下文学习则略微降低性能但缩短输出。
AI.conclusion: 作者总结出在非理想忆阻器CIM系统上部署LLM的指导原则，为提升推理鲁棒性提供了新见解，也为今后软硬件协同优化奠定了基础。

title: Creating manufacturable blueprints for coarse-grained virtual robots
summary: Over the past three decades, countless embodied yet virtual agents have freely evolved inside computer simulations, but vanishingly few were realized as physical robots. This is because evolution was conducted at a level of abstraction that was convenient for freeform body generation (creation, mutation, recombination) but swept away almost all of the physical details of functional body parts. The resulting designs were crude and underdetermined, requiring considerable effort and expertise to convert into a manufacturable format. Here, we automate this mapping from simplified design spaces that are readily evolvable to complete blueprints that can be directly followed by a builder. The pipeline incrementally resolves manufacturing constraints by embedding the structural and functional semantics of motors, electronics, batteries, and wiring into the abstract virtual design. In lieu of evolution, a user-defined or AI-generated ``sketch'' of a body plan can also be fed as input to the pipeline, providing a versatile framework for accelerating the design of novel robots.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种从抽象虚拟设计到实体可制造机器人蓝图的自动化转换流程，极大简化了虚拟进化机器人落地实体硬件的过程。
AI.motivation: 过去虚拟进化机器人领域，设计成果难以转化为实体机器人，因大多数进化仅停留在抽象体态层面，并未细致考虑实际制造所需的物理部件细节。该问题导致了虚拟到实体转换难度大、成本高。
AI.method: 论文提出一种自动化流程，将包含形态结构的抽象设计逐步嵌入包括电机、电子元件、电池和布线等结构与功能语义约束，使其转化为可直接制造的机器人蓝图。流程也允许用户自定义或AI生成体态草图作为输入。
AI.result: 该方法无需复杂的人工干预，即可实现虚拟设计快速、高效地转换为拆解到元件级的可制造机器人设计方案。具有很高的灵活性，可支持多类型创新机器人设计。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化流程极大缩短了从虚拟进化或设计到实体机器人制造的路径，为创新机器人开发提供了通用、便捷的落地工具。

title: Post Training Quantization for Efficient Dataset Condensation
summary: Dataset Condensation (DC) distills knowledge from large datasets into smaller ones, accelerating training and reducing storage requirements. However, despite notable progress, prior methods have largely overlooked the potential of quantization for further reducing storage costs. In this paper, we take the first step to explore post-training quantization in dataset condensation, demonstrating its effectiveness in reducing storage size while maintaining representation quality without requiring expensive training cost. However, we find that at extremely low bit-widths (e.g., 2-bit), conventional quantization leads to substantial degradation in representation quality, negatively impacting the networks trained on these data. To address this, we propose a novel \emph{patch-based post-training quantization} approach that ensures localized quantization with minimal loss of information. To reduce the overhead of quantization parameters, especially for small patch sizes, we employ quantization-aware clustering to identify similar patches and subsequently aggregate them for efficient quantization. Furthermore, we introduce a refinement module to align the distribution between original images and their dequantized counterparts, compensating for quantization errors. Our method is a plug-and-play framework that can be applied to synthetic images generated by various DC methods. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks including CIFAR-10/100, Tiny ImageNet, and ImageNet subsets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior works under the same storage constraints. Notably, our method nearly \textbf{doubles the test accuracy} of existing methods at extreme compression regimes (e.g., 26.0\% $\rightarrow$ 54.1\% for DM at IPC=1), while operating directly on 2-bit images without additional distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将后量化技术应用于数据集浓缩领域，大幅降低存储成本同时保持表达质量，提出补偿极低比特数带来的性能下降的新方法，并显著提升极端压缩场景下的精度。
AI.motivation: 数据集浓缩（DC）旨在把大数据集压缩成小数据集，以加速训练、降低存储需求。尽管已有不少研究，但普遍忽视了进一步借助量化压缩存储的潜力，尤其是在极低比特下表现极差。本文旨在解决传统量化在极低比特下表示力严重下降的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于patch的后量化方法：1）分区域对数据进行局部量化以最小化信息丢失；2）用量化感知聚类减少小patch量化参数的冗余，通过聚类合并相似patch；3）设计分布对齐的精细化模块，缓解量化引入的分布失配误差。该方法无需额外训练，可直接作为插件应用于多种合成图像。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny ImageNet等标准数据集和多个最新DC方法下，本文方法在一致存储约束下始终优于现有方法。最极端压缩（如2比特）时，所提方法几乎将当前方法的测试精度提升一倍，比如DM在IPC=1时从26.0%提升到54.1%。
AI.conclusion: 基于patch的后量化和补偿模块为数据集浓缩带来极具竞争力的超高存储效率，同时保留良好模型性能。该方法为高效模型训练和部署开辟新方向。

title: Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models
comment: Code and data are available at: https://github.com/AlejandroParedesLT/knowledge_distillLLM
summary: We propose a resource-efficient framework for compressing large language models through knowledge distillation, combined with guided chain-of-thought reinforcement learning. Using Qwen 3B as the teacher and Qwen 0.5B as the student, we apply knowledge distillation across English Dolly-15k, Spanish Dolly-15k, and code BugNet and PyTorrent datasets, with hyperparameters tuned in the English setting to optimize student performance. Across tasks, the distilled student retains a substantial portion of the teacher's capability while remaining significantly smaller: 70% to 91% in English, up to 95% in Spanish, and up to 93.5% Rouge-L in code. For coding tasks, integrating chain-of-thought prompting with Group Relative Policy Optimization using CoT-annotated Codeforces data improves reasoning coherence and solution correctness compared to knowledge distillation alone. Post-training 4-bit weight quantization further reduces memory footprint and inference latency. These results show that knowledge distillation combined with chain-of-thought guided reinforcement learning can produce compact, efficient models suitable for deployment in resource-constrained settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的语言模型压缩框架，结合知识蒸馏与思维链强化学习，实现大模型在多任务上的性能继承与模型量化压缩。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽强大，但资源消耗高，难以部署至受限环境。当前需方法提升小模型性能，并兼顾推理能力与效率。
AI.method: 以Qwen 3B为教师模型，Qwen 0.5B为学生模型，利用知识蒸馏在多语言和代码任务上训练学生模型。对于代码任务，引入思维链提示和Group Relative Policy Optimization基于CoT注释数据，提升推理合理性。同时，采用4比特量化进一步减小模型体积与推理延迟。
AI.result: 蒸馏后的学生模型能保留教师模型70~91%的英文任务性能、西班牙语任务最高95%、代码任务Rouge-L达93.5%。链式思维强化提升代码任务推理和正确性。4比特量化大幅降低内存及延迟。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏结合思维链强化可有效压缩语言模型并保留性能，所提方法适合资源受限场景部署。

title: Sonar-MASt3R: Real-Time Opti-Acoustic Fusion in Turbid, Unstructured Environments
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in ICRA 2026. Copyright IEEE
summary: Underwater intervention is an important capability in several marine domains, with numerous industrial, scientific, and defense applications. However, existing perception systems used during intervention operations rely on data from optical cameras, which limits capabilities in poor visibility or lighting conditions. Prior work has examined opti-acoustic fusion methods, which use sonar data to resolve the depth ambiguity of the camera data while using camera data to resolve the elevation angle ambiguity of the sonar data. However, existing methods cannot achieve dense 3D reconstructions in real-time, and few studies have reported results from applying these methods in a turbid environment. In this work, we propose the opti-acoustic fusion method Sonar-MASt3R, which uses MASt3R to extract dense correspondences from optical camera data in real-time and pairs it with geometric cues from an acoustic 3D reconstruction to ensure robustness in turbid conditions. Experimental results using data recorded from an opti-acoustic eye-in-hand configuration across turbidity values ranging from <0.5 to >12 NTU highlight this method's improved robustness to turbidity relative to baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型光-声融合方法 Sonar-MASt3R，实现了在混浊环境下对水下场景的实时多密度三维重建，大幅提升了复杂环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的水下感知系统依赖光学摄像头，在能见度差或光照不足时效果不佳。而传统的光-声融合方法难以实现实时且高密度的三维重建，且在混浊水体环境中的表现鲜有验证。因此，亟需一种能在混浊环境中实时鲁棒感知的融合方法。
AI.method: 提出Sonar-MASt3R方法，利用MASt3R算法从摄像头实时提取稠密特征点，将其与声呐三维重建中的几何信息融合，借此提升在混浊水体情况下的三维感知能力。实验采用摄像-声呐手持配置，且覆盖多种浊度环境。
AI.result: 实验表明，在<0.5到>12 NTU不同浊度下，该方法的鲁棒性明显优于对比的基础方法，可实现更为可靠和精确的三维重建。
AI.conclusion: Sonar-MASt3R有望显著提升水下操作的三维感知能力，尤其在混浊、极端环境下表现突出，具备广泛的工业、科研与国防应用前景。

title: MURE: Hierarchical Multi-Resolution Encoding via Vision-Language Models for Visual Document Retrieval
summary: Visual Document Retrieval (VDR) requires representations that capture both fine-grained visual details and global document structure to ensure retrieval efficacy while maintaining computational efficiency. Existing VDR models struggle to balance effectiveness and efficiency when processing high-resolution documents: they often either lose fine-grained information or generate an excessive number of visual tokens, resulting in significant indexing overhead and high retrieval latency. In this work, we rethink the visual encoding mechanism and propose a new X-VisEmb paradigm that progresses from multi-resolution sampling and encoding, through cross-granularity feature fusion, to adaptive representation distillation. A preliminary study validates its feasibility and effectiveness in capturing complementary visual cues at varying scales. Building on the insights, we develop MURE, a novel framework that employs VLMs as a hierarchical multi-resolution encoder, integrates resolution-level Matryoshka representation learning (RMRL) for effective feature fusion, and applies a semantic-aware hierarchical clustering mechanism for visual token compression. Experiments on two widely used VDR benchmarks show that our MURE framework consistently beats strong baselines. Furthermore, it significantly outperforms ColPali with only 50% of its visual token budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉文档检索（VDR）框架MURE，通过多分辨率编码、特征融合和分层聚类，有效提升检索表现并降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有VDR模型难以兼顾高分辨率文档的有效性和效率，容易丢失细节信息或引入大量视觉token，导致检索开销大、延迟高。
AI.method: 提出X-VisEmb范式，从多分辨率采样与编码、跨粒度特征融合到自适应表示蒸馏，综合利用不同尺度的视觉信息。随后，开发MURE框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为分层多分辨率编码器，引入分辨率级Matryoshka表示学习进行特征融合，并采用语义感知分层聚类机制压缩视觉token。
AI.result: 在两个主流VDR基准上，MURE表现优于各类强基线。同时，在消耗仅为ColPali一半视觉token的情况下，效果依然显著超越ColPali。
AI.conclusion: MURE框架在提升VDR准确性和效率之间达成新平衡，为高效视觉文档检索提供了有效途径。

title: LiveWeb-IE: A Benchmark For Online Web Information Extraction
summary: Web information extraction (WIE) is the task of automatically extracting data from web pages, offering high utility for various applications. The evaluation of WIE systems has traditionally relied on benchmarks built from HTML snapshots captured at a single point in time. However, this offline evaluation paradigm fails to account for the temporally evolving nature of the web; consequently, performance on these static benchmarks often fails to generalize to dynamic real-world scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce \dataset, a new benchmark designed for evaluating WIE systems directly against live websites. Based on trusted and permission-granted websites, we curate natural language queries that require information extraction of various data categories, such as text, images, and hyperlinks. We further design these queries to represent four levels of complexity, based on the number and cardinality of attributes to be extracted, enabling a granular assessment of WIE systems. In addition, we propose Visual Grounding Scraper (VGS), a novel multi-stage agentic framework that mimics human cognitive processes by visually narrowing down web page content to extract desired information. Extensive experiments across diverse backbone models demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of VGS. We believe that this study lays the foundation for developing practical and robust WIE systems.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种针对实时网页的信息抽取系统的全新评测基准，并设计了新的方法，显著提升了系统在动态真实场景下的适应性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统信息抽取系统评测依赖于某一时刻抓取的HTML快照，不能反映网页内容动态变化，导致静态基准下取得的效果无法泛化到真实应用。研究动机在于构建更贴合实际需求的评测方案，推动信息抽取技术发展。
AI.method: 1) 构建基于实时网页的新型基准集，包括由可信网站和许可网站构成的数据集，以及涵盖文本、图片、超链接等多类型信息的自然语言查询，这些查询按照抽取属性的数量和复杂度分为四个等级；2) 提出Visual Grounding Scraper (VGS) —— 多阶段、类人认知过程的框架，能够视觉化定位并抽取目标信息。3) 在不同主流模型下对VGS进行大规模实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 通过丰富实验，VGS在多种主流模型和多样化网页内容上均表现出较强的有效性和鲁棒性，在新提出的基准上显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了更贴合实际需求的新型网页信息抽取评测基准，并提出了类人认知机制的VGS方法，为后续更实用、更健壮的信息抽取系统的开发奠定了基础。

title: Beyond Binary Success: Sample-Efficient and Statistically Rigorous Robot Policy Comparison
summary: Generalist robot manipulation policies are becoming increasingly capable, but are limited in evaluation to a small number of hardware rollouts. This strong resource constraint in real-world testing necessitates both more informative performance measures and reliable and efficient evaluation procedures to properly assess model capabilities and benchmark progress in the field. This work presents a novel framework for robot policy comparison that is sample-efficient, statistically rigorous, and applicable to a broad set of evaluation metrics used in practice. Based on safe, anytime-valid inference (SAVI), our test procedure is sequential, allowing the evaluator to stop early when sufficient statistical evidence has accumulated to reach a decision at a pre-specified level of confidence. Unlike previous work developed for binary success, our unified approach addresses a wide range of informative metrics: from discrete partial credit task progress to continuous measures of episodic reward or trajectory smoothness, spanning both parametric and nonparametric comparison problems. Through extensive validation on simulated and real-world evaluation data, we demonstrate up to 70% reduction in evaluation burden compared to standard batch methods and up to 50% reduction compared to state-of-the-art sequential procedures designed for binary outcomes, with no loss of statistical rigor. Notably, our empirical results show that competing policies can be separated more quickly when using fine-grained task progress than binary success metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效、严谨评估通用机器人操作策略的新框架，有效提升了评估效率，并适用于多种性能指标。
AI.motivation: 现实中评测机器人操作策略非常耗资源，通常只进行有限硬件测试，当前不仅指标单一（多为二元成功率），且评估效率低，缺乏统计严谨性，限制了进展和比较的公正性。
AI.method: 提出基于安全、随时有效推断（SAVI）的序贯测试方法。该方法允许在达到预设置信度的证据积累后提前终止测试，极大提升样本利用率。同时突破了只适用于二元成功率的局限，支持离散任务进度、连续回报、轨迹平滑度等丰富性能指标，适用于参数化和非参数化问题。
AI.result: 通过模拟和真实数据的大量实验证明，新方法相比标准批量评估减少约70%评测负担，相比当前最优的序贯二元结果方法减少约50%，且无统计严谨性的损失。此外，使用细粒度任务指标可比传统二元指标更快区分策略优劣。
AI.conclusion: 所提评估框架大幅提升机器人策略评估的效率和广度，有助于更全面合理地比较与进展通用机器人操作模型，为机器人学领域政策评测设定新标杆。

title: Local Precise Refinement: A Dual-Gated Mixture-of-Experts for Enhancing Foundation Model Generalization against Spectral Shifts
summary: Domain Generalization Semantic Segmentation (DGSS) in spectral remote sensing is severely challenged by spectral shifts across diverse acquisition conditions, which cause significant performance degradation for models deployed in unseen domains. While Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) on foundation models is a promising direction, existing methods employ global, homogeneous adjustments. This "one-size-fits-all" tuning struggles with the spatial heterogeneity of land cover, causing semantic confusion. We argue that the key to robust DGSS lies not in a single global adaptation, but in performing fine-grained, spatially-adaptive refinement of a foundation model's features. To achieve this, we propose SpectralMoE, a novel PEFT framework for DGSS. It operationalizes this principle by utilizing a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to perform local precise refinement on the foundation model's features, incorporating depth features estimated from selected RGB bands of the spectral remote sensing imagery to guide the fine-tuning process. Specifically, SpectralMoE employs a dual-gated MoE architecture that independently routes visual and depth features to top-k selected experts for specialized refinement, enabling modality-specific adjustments. A subsequent cross-attention mechanism then judiciously fuses the refined structural cues into the visual stream, mitigating semantic ambiguities caused by spectral variations. Extensive experiments show that SpectralMoE sets a new state-of-the-art on multiple DGSS benchmarks across hyperspectral, multispectral, and RGB remote sensing imagery.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于专家混合（MoE）架构的参数高效微调框架SpectralMoE，用于提升光谱遥感领域中的域泛化语义分割（DGSS）能力，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 光谱遥感中的域泛化语义分割任务，由于不同采集条件下的光谱漂移，导致模型在未见过的新领域中表现明显下降。而现有的参数高效微调（PEFT）方法采取全局一致性调整，难以应对地表覆盖空间异质性，产生语义混淆。因此亟需能细粒度、空间自适应微调基础模型的方法。
AI.method: 提出SpectralMoE框架，采用双门控MoE结构，对遥感图像的视觉特征和从选定RGB波段推测的深度特征分别进行路由和精细化。通过top-k专家实现专业化调整，并用跨注意力机制将结构信息与视觉流融合，从而减缓因光谱变化导致的语义歧义。
AI.result: 在多个光谱遥感图像域泛化语义分割基准（包括高光谱、多光谱和RGB）上，SpectralMoE都达到了新的SOTA水平，显示出优越的泛化能力和性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SpectralMoE通过细粒度、空间自适应的特征微调和模态特异性调整，有效缓解了光谱遥感中域泛化带来的性能衰退问题，对DGSS任务具有重要推动作用。

title: Generate Then Correct: Single Shot Global Correction for Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction
summary: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) extracts aspect-level sentiment signals from user-generated text, supports product analytics, experience monitoring, and public-opinion tracking, and is central to fine-grained opinion mining. A key challenge in ABSA is aspect sentiment quad prediction (ASQP), which requires identifying four elements: the aspect term, the aspect category, the opinion term, and the sentiment polarity. However, existing studies usually linearize the unordered quad set into a fixed-order template and decode it left-to-right. With teacher forcing training, the resulting training-inference mismatch (exposure bias) lets early prefix errors propagate to later elements.
