AI.result: 在‘明确性分类’子任务上，最优系统取得了0.89的macro-F1分数，远超最佳基线；在‘规避策略分类’子任务上，最优系统与基线持平，为0.68 macro-F1，表明该任务难度较大。运用LLM提示与分层方法的系统整体表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CLARITY数据集和任务有效扩展了计算话语分析的边界，将政治规避应答建模明确为一个具有挑战性的基准，同时揭示了政治语言中策略性模糊的重要性与建模难点。

title: ImagiNav: Scalable Embodied Navigation via Generative Visual Prediction and Inverse Dynamics
summary: Enabling robots to navigate open-world environments via natural language is critical for general-purpose autonomy. Yet, Vision-Language Navigation has relied on end-to-end policies trained on expensive, embodiment-specific robot data. While recent foundation models trained on vast simulation data show promise, the challenge of scaling and generalizing due to the limited scene diversity and visual fidelity in simulation persists. To address this gap, we propose ImagiNav, a novel modular paradigm that decouples visual planning from robot actuation, enabling the direct utilization of diverse in-the-wild navigation videos. Our framework operates as a hierarchy: a Vision-Language Model first decomposes instructions into textual subgoals; a finetuned generative video model then imagines the future video trajectory towards that subgoal; finally, an inverse dynamics model extracts the trajectory from the imagined video, which can then be tracked via a low-level controller. We additionally develop a scalable data pipeline of in-the-wild navigation videos auto-labeled via inverse dynamics and a pretrained Vision-Language Model. ImagiNav demonstrates strong zero-shot transfer to robot navigation without requiring robot demonstrations, paving the way for generalist robots that learn navigation directly from unlabeled, open-world data.

AI.tldr: 提出ImagiNav，一个能让机器人利用互联网上的导航视频和自然语言指令进行导航的新方法，实现无需真实机器人演示的零样本泛化导航。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言导航方法依赖于昂贵且特定于机器人平台的数据集，且大规模仿真数据离真实世界仍存在场景与视觉保真度的鸿沟，限制了泛化能力和实用性。
AI.method: 提出ImagiNav，将视觉规划与机器人控制解耦。首先用视觉-语言模型将自然语言导航指令分解为子目标；然后采用微调的生成式视频模型想象到达下一个子目标的未来视频轨迹；接着利用反向动力学模型从想象中的视频提取动作轨迹，最后用低层控制器执行。还构建了一个可扩展的数据管道，自动为野外导航视频加标签。
AI.result: ImagiNav在无需真实机器人演示的前提下，实现了较强的零样本泛化，能直接迁移到实际机器人导航任务。
AI.conclusion: ImagiNav能够直接利用未标注的现实世界视频和自然语言数据训练，使机器人具备在开放世界内理解指令并自主导航的能力，为通用导航机器人发展铺路。

title: Agentic LLM Workflow for MR Spectroscopy Volume-of-Interest Placements in Brain Tumors
summary: Magnetic resonance spectroscopy (MRS) provides clinically valuable metabolic characterization of brain tumors, but its utility depends on accurate placement of the spectroscopy volume-of-interest (VOI). However, VOI placement typically has a broad operating window: for a given tumor there are multiple possible VOIs that would lead to high-quality MRS measurements. Thus, a VOI place-ment can be tuned for clinician preference, case-specific anatomy, and clinical pri-orities, which leads to high inter-operator variability, especially for heterogeneous tumors. We propose an agentic large language model (LLM) workflow that de-composes VOI placement into generation of diverse candidate VOIs, from which the LLM selects an optimal one based on quantitative metrics. Candidate VOIs are generated by vision transformer-based placement models trained with differ-ent objective function preferences, which allows selection from acceptable alterna-tives rather than a single deterministic placement. On 110 clinical brain tumor cas-es, the agentic workflow achieves improved solid tumor coverage and necrosis avoidance depending on the user preferences compared to the general-purpose expert placements. Overall, the proposed workflow provides a strategy to adapt VOI placement to different clinical objectives without retraining task-specific models.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种利用大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉Transformer的新方法，来更智能地进行磁共振波谱（MRS）在脑肿瘤中的感兴趣区（VOI）定位，通过生成多种候选VOI并优选，提升了定位的准确性和适应性。
AI.motivation: MRS为脑肿瘤提供重要的代谢信息，但VOI的准确放置影响检测质量。由于解剖差异和临床需求不同, 操作员间差异较大，容易导致VOI定位不一致，尤其在肿瘤异质性强情况下亟需更智能的VOI放置方法。
AI.method: 研究将VOI放置任务拆解为候选VOI的多样化生成，以及基于量化指标由LLM进行最佳选择。候选VOI由训练有不同目标函数的视觉Transformer模型生成，LLM根据用户偏好（如更好覆盖实体瘤/避开坏死区）进行多选一决策。
AI.result: 在110例临床脑肿瘤中，与传统专家手动定位相比，该方法可根据用户偏好实现更高的实体肿瘤覆盖率和更好地避开坏死区。
AI.conclusion: 该流程不仅提高了VOI放置的灵活性，还可根据不同临床目标进行优化，无需针对具体任务反复训练模型，降低了操作员差异性，为脑肿瘤MRS实施提供了新策略。

title: NepTam: A Nepali-Tamang Parallel Corpus and Baseline Machine Translation Experiments
summary: Modern Translation Systems heavily rely on high-quality, large parallel datasets for state-of-the-art performance. However, such resources are largely unavailable for most of the South Asian languages. Among them, Nepali and Tamang fall into such category, with Tamang being among the least digitally resourced languages in the region. This work addresses the gap by developing NepTam20K, a 20K gold standard parallel corpus, and NepTam80K, an 80K synthetic Nepali-Tamang parallel corpus, both sentence-aligned and designed to support machine translation. The datasets were created through a pipeline involving data scraping from Nepali news and online sources, pre-processing, semantic filtering, balancing for tense and polarity (in NepTam20K dataset), expert translation into Tamang by native speakers of the language, and verification by an expert Tamang linguist. The dataset covers five domains: Agriculture, Health, Education and Technology, Culture, and General Communication. To evaluate the dataset, baseline machine translation experiments were carried out using various multilingual pre-trained models: mBART, M2M-100, NLLB-200, and a vanilla Transformer model. The fine-tuning on the NLLB-200 achieved the highest sacreBLEU scores of 40.92 (Nepali-Tamang) and 45.26 (Tamang-Nepali).

AI.tldr: 本论文针对缺乏数字资源的南亚语言，特别是尼泊尔语和坦马语，构建了高质量平行语料库NepTam20K和NepTam80K，并进行了机器翻译验证，显著提升了相关翻译系统的表现。
AI.motivation: 南亚大多数语言缺乏大规模、高质量的平行数据，极大限制了现代机器翻译系统的发展。坦马语作为数字资源极度匮乏的语言，亟需可用的语料库以支持相关研究和工具开发。
AI.method: 作者通过数据抓取、预处理、语义筛选及时态/极性平衡等流程，从尼泊尔语新闻和网络资源获得初步材料。随后邀请坦马语母语者进行翻译，由坦马语语言学专家审核，最终构建出20K金标及80K合成句对平行语料，涵盖农业、健康、教育与科技、文化及通用交流五大领域。
AI.result: 利用mBART、M2M-100、NLLB-200以及vanilla Transformer对数据集进行微调实验。以NLLB-200模型获得最佳sacreBLEU分数，尼泊尔语转坦马语为40.92，坦马语转尼泊尔语为45.26。
AI.conclusion: 所构建的NepTam20K与NepTam80K语料库为资源稀缺的坦马语与尼泊尔语机器翻译奠定了基础，并通过实验验证了数据集的有效性，对促进南亚小语种数字语言处理具有重要意义。

title: Fine-tuning is Not Enough: A Parallel Framework for Collaborative Imitation and Reinforcement Learning in End-to-end Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving is typically built upon imitation learning (IL), yet its performance is constrained by the quality of human demonstrations. To overcome this limitation, recent methods incorporate reinforcement learning (RL) through sequential fine-tuning. However, such a paradigm remains suboptimal: sequential RL fine-tuning can introduce policy drift and often leads to a performance ceiling due to its dependence on the pretrained IL policy. To address these issues, we propose PaIR-Drive, a general Parallel framework for collaborative Imitation and Reinforcement learning in end-to-end autonomous driving. During training, PaIR-Drive separates IL and RL into two parallel branches with conflict-free training objectives, enabling fully collaborative optimization. This design eliminates the need to retrain RL when applying a new IL policy. During inference, RL leverages the IL policy to further optimize the final plan, allowing performance beyond prior knowledge of IL. Furthermore, we introduce a tree-structured trajectory neural sampler to group relative policy optimization (GRPO) in the RL branch, which enhances exploration capability. Extensive analysis on NAVSIMv1 and v2 benchmark demonstrates that PaIR-Drive achieves Competitive performance of 91.2 PDMS and 87.9 EPDMS, building upon Transfuser and DiffusionDrive IL baselines. PaIR-Drive consistently outperforms existing RL fine-tuning methods, and could even correct human experts' suboptimal behaviors. Qualitative results further confirm that PaIR-Drive can effectively explore and generate high-quality trajectories.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端自动驾驶的新框架PaIR-Drive，实现了模仿学习（IL）与强化学习（RL）的协作优化，在现有基线之上取得了更优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶主要依赖模仿学习，但性能受限于人类示范质量。结合RL进行微调虽然提升性能，但带来策略漂移且受制于预训练IL策略，存在天花板效应。因此需要新的协作优化框架。
AI.method: PaIR-Drive采用并行结构，在训练阶段将IL和RL分为两个互不干扰的分支进行协同优化，同时提出树结构轨迹神经采样器以增强RL分支的探索能力。推理阶段RL分支可借助IL进一步优化最终规划。
AI.result: 在NAVSIMv1和v2基准上，PaIR-Drive基于Transfuser和DiffusionDrive基线取得91.2 PDMS和87.9 EPDMS的竞争性成绩，优于现有RL微调方法，甚至能纠正人类专家的次优行为，并能探索并生成高质量轨迹。
AI.conclusion: PaIR-Drive实现了IL与RL的协同优化，突破了仅用IL或IL+RL微调的性能天花板，展现了在自动驾驶领域良好的应用前景。

title: Geometry-Aware Semantic Reasoning for Training Free Video Anomaly Detection
summary: Training-free video anomaly detection (VAD) has recently emerged as a scalable alternative to supervised approaches, yet existing methods largely rely on static prompting and geometry-agnostic feature fusion. As a result, anomaly inference is often reduced to shallow similarity matching over Euclidean embeddings, leading to unstable predictions and limited interpretability, especially in complex or hierarchically structured scenes. We introduce MM-VAD, a geometry-aware semantic reasoning framework for training free VAD that reframes anomaly detection as adaptive test-time inference rather than fixed feature comparison. Our approach projects caption-derived scene representations into hyperbolic space to better preserve hierarchical structure and performs anomaly assessment through an adaptive question answering process over a frozen large language model. A lightweight, learnable prompt is optimised at test time using an unsupervised confidence-sparsity objective, enabling context-specific calibration without updating any backbone parameters. To further ground semantic predictions in visual evidence, we incorporate a covariance-aware Mahalanobis refinement that stabilises cross-modal alignment. Across four benchmarks, MM-VAD consistently improves over prior training-free methods, achieving 90.03% AUC on XD-Violence and 83.24%, 96.95%, and 98.81% on UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech, and UCSD Ped2, respectively. Our results demonstrate that geometry-aware representation and adaptive semantic calibration provide a principled and effective alternative to static Euclidean matching in training-free VAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MM-VAD，一个无需训练的视频异常检测（VAD）新方法，通过引入几何感知语义推理和自适应推理机制，大幅提升了无监督VAD的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统的无监督VAD方法依赖静态提示和忽略几何结构的特征融合，导致异常检测仅限于浅层相似性计算，表现不稳定，且难以解释，尤其在复杂场景下尤为明显。
AI.method: MM-VAD方法采用基于caption的场景表示，将其映射到双曲空间，以更好地保留层次结构。异常检测过程通过一个冻结大语言模型上的自适应问答完成，并在测试时优化轻量可学习的prompt，无需更新主干参数。此外，引入马氏距离细化方法，提升多模态语义对齐的稳定性和解释性。
AI.result: MM-VAD在四个主流基准数据集上测试，显著优于先前的无训练方法，在XD-Violence、UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech和UCSD Ped2上AUC分数分别达到90.03%、83.24%、96.95%和98.81%。
AI.conclusion: 引入几何感知表示和自适应语义校准机制，为无监督VAD提供了理论充分且效果显著的替代方式，克服了传统欧氏空间静态相似性方法的局限性。

title: CMHL: Contrastive Multi-Head Learning for Emotionally Consistent Text Classification
summary: Textual Emotion Classification (TEC) is one of the most difficult NLP tasks. State of the art approaches rely on Large language models (LLMs) and multi-model ensembles. In this study, we challenge the assumption that larger scale or more complex models are necessary for improved performance. In order to improve logical consistency, We introduce CMHL, a novel single-model architecture that explicitly models the logical structure of emotions through three key innovations: (1) multi-task learning that jointly predicts primary emotions, valence, and intensity, (2) psychologically-grounded auxiliary supervision derived from Russell's circumplex model, and (3) a novel contrastive contradiction loss that enforces emotional consistency by penalizing mutually incompatible predictions (e.g., simultaneous high confidence in joy and anger). With just 125M parameters, our model outperforms 56x larger LLMs and sLM ensembles with a new state-of-the-art F1 score of 93.75\% compared to (86.13\%-93.2\%) on the dair-ai Emotion dataset. We further show cross domain generalization on the Reddit Suicide Watch and Mental Health Collection dataset (SWMH), outperforming domain-specific models like MentalBERT and MentalRoBERTa with an F1 score of 72.50\% compared to (68.16\%-72.16\%) + a 73.30\% recall compared to (67.05\%-70.89\%) that translates to enhanced sensitivity for detecting mental health distress. Our work establishes that architectural intelligence (not parameter count) drives progress in TEC. By embedding psychological priors and explicit consistency constraints, a well-designed single model can outperform both massive LLMs and complex ensembles, offering a efficient, interpretable, and clinically-relevant paradigm for affective computing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的单模型架构CMHL，在文本情绪分类任务中，仅用1.25亿参数就超越了比它大56倍的LLM及集成模型，实现了新的SOTA。CMHL利用多任务学习、心理学先验知识与创新的对比矛盾损失函数，显著提升了模型性能和逻辑一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的情绪分类方法依赖超大型LLM与多模型集成，带来高算力消耗和较差的可解释性。作者想证明，规模和复杂度不是性能提升的必要条件，借助心理学理论和逻辑一致性约束，可以用小参数、高设计智能的单模型取得突破。
AI.method: 提出CMHL模型，采用：（1）多任务联合学习（基础情绪、极性、强度同时预测）；（2）引入心理学理论（Russell圆环模型）作为辅助监督信号；（3）设计对比矛盾损失函数，增强情绪预测的一致性（如防止同同时预测'高兴'和'愤怒'）。
AI.result: 在dair-ai Emotion数据集上，CMHL取得93.75%的新SOTA F1分数，优于参数大56倍的大模型及集成（对比基线F1最高93.2%）。在跨域测试（Reddit心理健康等数据集）中也优于MentalBERT等专有模型，表现出更好的敏感度和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TEC性能提升关键在于架构创新和心理学先验嵌入，而不是模型规模。经过精心设计的小模型有潜力超越大型LLM与复杂集成，在高效、可解释及临床相关的情绪计算领域具有广阔前景。

title: LDHP: Library-Driven Hierarchical Planning for Non-prehensile Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Non-prehensile manipulation is essential for handling thin, large, or otherwise ungraspable objects in unstructured settings. Prior planning and search-based methods often rely on ad-hoc manual designs or generate physically unrealizable motions by ignoring critical gripper properties, while training-based approaches are data-intensive and struggle to generalize to novel, out-of-distribution tasks. We propose a library-driven hierarchical planner (LDHP) that makes executability a first-class design goal: a top-tier contact-state planner proposes object-pose paths using MoveObject primitives, and a bottom-tier grasp planner synthesizes feasible grasp sequences with AdjustGrasp primitives; feasibility is certified by collision checks and quasi-static mechanics, and contact-sensitive segments are recovered via a bounded dichotomy refinement. This gripper-aware decomposition decouples object motion from grasp realizability, yields a task-agnostic pipeline that transfers across manipulation tasks and geometric variations without re-design, and exposes clean hooks for optional learned priors. Real-robot studies on zero-mobility lifting and slot insertion demonstrate consistent execution and robustness to shape and environment changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层规划器（LDHP），可实现对难以抓取物体的非抓取式操作，在多任务和不同几何环境下表现出良好的一致性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 许多物体由于体积大、形状薄或无法抓取，传统的操作方法难以应对。现有方法要么忽略夹爪性质导致不可执行，要么对新任务泛化能力弱，因此亟需一种可坚持可执行性且能推广的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了LDHP方案：上层接触状态规划器使用MoveObject操作生成物体轨迹，下层抓取规划器用AdjustGrasp序列合成可行抓取过程，并用碰撞检测和准静力学进行可行性检测。还引入了二分细化方法确保关键接触段的恢复，从而解耦物体运动和抓取实现。该结构还支持可选的学习型先验。
AI.result: 基于真实机器人实验，LDHP在零漂移提升与卡槽插入等场景实现了稳定、一致的操作，并对物体形状与环境变化表现出较强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LDHP分层规划器能够高效、灵活地处理多种非抓取式操作任务，不需针对每个场景重新设计，能够适应物体和环境的多样变化。

title: InfiniteDance: Scalable 3D Dance Generation Towards in-the-wild Generalization
summary: Although existing 3D dance generation methods perform well in controlled scenarios, they often struggle to generalize in the wild. When conditioned on unseen music, existing methods often produce unstructured or physically implausible dance, largely due to limited music-to-dance data and restricted model capacity. This work aims to push the frontier of generalizable 3D dance generation by scaling up both data and model design. (1) On the data side, we develop a fully automated pipeline that reconstructs high-fidelity 3D dance motions from monocular videos. To eliminate the physical artifacts prevalent in existing reconstruction methods, we introduce a Foot Restoration Diffusion Model (FRDM) guided by foot-contact and geometric constraints that enforce physical plausibility while preserving kinematic smoothness and expressiveness, resulting in a diverse, high-quality multimodal 3D dance dataset totaling 100.69 hours. (2) On model design, we propose Choreographic LLaMA (ChoreoLLaMA), a scalable LLaMA-based architecture. To enhance robustness under unfamiliar music conditions, we integrate a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module that injects reference dance as a prompt. Additionally, we design a slow/fast-cadence Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) module that enables ChoreoLLaMA to smoothly adapt motion rhythms across varying music tempos. Extensive experiments across diverse dance genres show that our approach surpasses existing methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations, marking a step toward scalable, real-world 3D dance generation. Code, models, and data will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种更强泛化能力的3D舞蹈生成方法，通过大规模高质量数据集与新颖模型（ChoreoLLaMA），实现了在未知音乐下更自然的舞蹈合成。
AI.motivation: 现有3D舞蹈生成方法在受控环境表现良好，但难以适应真实场景，遇到新音乐常生成无结构或不合理的舞蹈，根本原因在于音乐到舞蹈配对数据有限及模型能力受限。
AI.method: 提出两个核心改进：1）数据方面，基于单目视频构建自动化高保真3D舞蹈重建流程；并引入脚步恢复扩散模型（FRDM），辅以接触和几何约束，获得物理合理、流畅且多样的百小时级数据集；2）模型方面，构建了基于LLaMA的ChoreoLLaMA结构，采用RAG模块用参考舞蹈增强新音乐适应性，并设计慢/快节奏MoE专家模块以适配不同节奏。
AI.result: 在多个舞蹈类型和多项定性、定量评测中，所提方法均优于现有3D舞蹈生成方法，生成舞蹈在结构和物理合理性上表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次将大规模数据和可扩展模型结合，显著提升了3D舞蹈生成在真实环境下的泛化能力，对实际舞蹈创作和智能舞蹈应用有推动意义。

title: OasisSimp: An Open-source Asian-English Sentence Simplification Dataset
summary: Sentence simplification aims to make complex text more accessible by reducing linguistic complexity while preserving the original meaning. However, progress in this area remains limited for mid-resource and low-resource languages due to the scarcity of high-quality data. To address this gap, we introduce the OasisSimp dataset, a multilingual dataset for sentence-level simplification covering five languages: English, Sinhala, Tamil, Pashto, and Thai. Among these, no prior sentence simplification datasets exist for Thai, Pashto, and Tamil, while limited data is available for Sinhala. Each language simplification dataset was created by trained annotators who followed detailed guidelines to simplify sentences while maintaining meaning, fluency, and grammatical correctness. We evaluate eight open-weight multilingual Large Language Models (LLMs) on the OasisSimp dataset and observe substantial performance disparities between high-resource and low-resource languages, highlighting the simplification challenges in multilingual settings. The OasisSimp dataset thus provides both a valuable multilingual resource and a challenging benchmark, revealing the limitations of current LLM-based simplification methods and paving the way for future research in low-resource sentence simplification. The dataset is available at https://OasisSimpDataset.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OasisSimp数据集，涵盖英、僧伽罗、泰米尔、普什图和泰语，用于多语种句子简化研究，并评测了多种大型语言模型在该任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前句子简化主要集中在高资源语言（如英语），中低资源语言缺乏高质量数据，影响了句子简化技术的进步。
AI.method: 团队组织人工标注者，依据严格指导方针对五种语言的句子进行简化，确保语义、流畅性及语法正确性。同时选择八种多语种开源大型语言模型，在该数据集上进行了基线评测。
AI.result: 实验发现大型语言模型在高资源与低资源语言简化任务上的表现存在显著差异，暴露出多语种场景下简化任务的挑战。
AI.conclusion: OasisSimp数据集为中低资源语言的句子简化提供了重要资源和基准，有助于揭示当前方法的局限，并推动未来相关研究。

title: TransDex: Pre-training Visuo-Tactile Policy with Point Cloud Reconstruction for Dexterous Manipulation of Transparent Objects
summary: Dexterous manipulation enables complex tasks but suffers from self-occlusion, severe depth noise, and depth information loss when manipulating transparent objects. To solve this problem, this paper proposes TransDex, a 3D visuo-tactile fusion motor policy based on point cloud reconstruction pre-training. Specifically, we first propose a self-supervised point cloud reconstruction pre-training approach based on Transformer. This method accurately recovers the 3D structure of objects from interactive point clouds of dexterous hands, even when random noise and large-scale masking are added. Building on this, TransDex is constructed in which perceptual encoding adopts a fine-grained hierarchical scheme and multi-round attention mechanisms adaptively fuse features of the robotic arm and dexterous hand to enable differentiated motion prediction. Results from transparent object manipulation experiments conducted on a real robotic system demonstrate that TransDex outperforms existing baseline methods. Further analysis validates the generalization capabilities of TransDex and the effectiveness of its individual components.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于点云重建预训练的3D视觉-触觉融合运动策略TransDex，实现了对透明物体灵巧操作时鲁棒的感知与控制，相较于现有方法效果更优。
AI.motivation: 灵巧操作在复杂任务中经常遇到自身遮挡、严重的深度噪声及面对透明物体时的深度信息丢失，这极大限制了机器人在实际环境中的应用能力，需要新方法克服这些问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于自监督Transformer的点云重建预训练方法，可在加入随机噪声和大规模掩码时精确恢复出手与物体的3D结构。在此基础上，设计了TransDex运动策略，采用细粒度层级结构和多轮注意机制自适应融合机械臂及手的感知特征，提升动作预测能力。
AI.result: 在真实机器人系统上的透明物体操作实验中，TransDex明显优于现有基线方法。进一步分析显示TransDex具有良好的泛化能力，各组成模块的有效性也得到验证。
AI.conclusion: TransDex为基于视觉和触觉的灵巧操作提供了强鲁棒与泛化性的解决方案，显著提升了机器人处理透明物体等困难场景的能力。

title: A Computer-aided Framework for Detecting Osteosarcoma in Computed Tomography Scans
comment: 12 pages, Presented at The 2nd workshop about High-Performance e-Science
summary: Osteosarcoma is the most common primary bone cancer, mainly affecting the youngest and oldest populations. Its detection at early stages is crucial to reduce the probability of developing bone metastasis. In this context, accurate and fast diagnosis is essential to help physicians during the prognosis process. The research goal is to automate the diagnosis of osteosarcoma through a pipeline that includes the preprocessing, detection, postprocessing, and visualization of computed tomography (CT) scans. Thus, this paper presents a machine learning and visualization framework for classifying CT scans using different convolutional neural network (CNN) models. Preprocessing includes data augmentation and identification of the region of interest in scans. Post-processing includes data visualization to render a 3D bone model that highlights the affected area. An evaluation on 12 patients revealed the effectiveness of our framework, obtaining an area under the curve (AUC) of 94.8\% and a specificity of 94.6\%.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一个自动化诊断骨肉瘤的机器学习和可视化框架，采用CNN模型对CT扫描进行分类，并通过三维重建直观展示患病区域，实验结果显示方法准确且高效。
AI.motivation: 骨肉瘤是常见且危害较大的骨癌，尤其影响年轻和老年人。早期检测对防止骨转移至关重要，因此亟需更快速、准确的辅助诊断方法辅助临床医生。
AI.method: 提出了涵盖预处理（数据增强、感兴趣区域ROI提取）、多种卷积神经网络（CNN）模型分类、后处理（数据可视化）的CT扫描自动诊断流程。将检测到的异常区域以三维骨模型方式渲染并突出显示。
AI.result: 在12例患者数据集上进行评测，得到AUC为94.8%、特异性为94.6%，表明框架效果优异，且诊断速度快。
AI.conclusion: 所提自动诊断框架能够有效辅助骨肉瘤的早期发现，提升诊断准确率和效率，具有临床应用潜力。

title: The GELATO Dataset for Legislative NER
summary: This paper introduces GELATO (Government, Executive, Legislative, and Treaty Ontology), a dataset of U.S. House and Senate bills from the 118th Congress annotated using a novel two-level named entity recognition ontology designed for U.S. legislative texts. We fine-tune transformer-based models (BERT, RoBERTa) of different architectures and sizes on this dataset for first-level prediction. We then use LLMs with optimized prompts to complete the second level prediction. The strong performance of RoBERTa and relatively weak performance of BERT models, as well as the application of LLMs as second-level predictors, support future research in legislative NER or downstream tasks using these model combinations as extraction tools.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GELATO数据集：这是针对美国第118届国会法案，采用新颖两级命名实体识别本体进行标注的数据集。作者分别使用基于BERT和RoBERTa的模型进行第一级实体识别，再结合大语言模型完成第二级识别。实验结果显示RoBERTa表现优于BERT，LLM的应用对后续下游任务具有参考价值。
AI.motivation: 立法文本具有专业性和复杂性，现有命名实体识别方法难以精确抽取立法相关实体，因此作者希望通过新的本体和数据集推动立法文本信息提取的研究。
AI.method: 作者提出GELATO本体并基于其对法案进行两级实体标注。实验采用BERT与RoBERTa等transformer模型在数据集上针对第一级实体识别进行微调，第二级实体识别则结合提示优化后的大语言模型进行。
AI.result: RoBERTa模型在第一级实体识别上表现强劲，明显优于BERT。第二级实体识别借助大语言模型（LLM）效果较好，说明多模型级联具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: GELATO数据集和两级实体识别体系为立法文本NER开辟新方向。RoBERTa与LLM的有效结合为下游任务和后续研究提供有力工具。

title: Path-conditioned Reinforcement Learning-based Local Planning for Long-Range Navigation
summary: Long-range navigation is commonly addressed through hierarchical pipelines in which a global planner generates a path, decomposed into waypoints, and followed sequentially by a local planner. These systems are sensitive to global path quality, as inaccurate remote sensing data can result in locally infeasible waypoints, which degrade local execution. At the same time, the limited global context available to the local planner hinders long-range efficiency. To address this issue, we propose a reinforcement learning-based local navigation policy that leverages path information as contextual guidance. The policy is conditioned on reference path observations and trained with a reward function mainly based on goal-reaching objectives, without any explicit path-following reward. Through this implicit conditioning, the policy learns to opportunistically exploit path information while remaining robust to misleading or degraded guidance. Experimental results show that the proposed approach significantly improves navigation efficiency when high-quality paths are available and maintains baseline-level performance when path observations are severely degraded or even non-existent. These properties make the method particularly well-suited for long-range navigation scenarios in which high-level plans are approximate and local execution must remain adaptive to uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于强化学习的本地导航策略，能够利用路径信息进行隐式引导，同时在路径信息不准确时保持鲁棒性，显著提升了长距离导航任务中的效率和适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统的分层式长距离导航系统严重依赖全局规划路径的准确性，遥感数据的误差会带来局部不可行的问题，本地规划也受限于全局信息不足，难以高效导航，因此亟需更鲁棒、自适应的本地导航方法。
AI.method: 方法基于强化学习，设计了一个根据参考路径观测值进行条件化的本地导航策略。该策略的奖励函数主要关注到达目标，没有显式的路径跟随奖励，依靠策略在训练过程中自发利用路径信息，提升鲁棒性并减少对误导性全局路径的依赖。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在高质量路径信息下可以显著提升导航效率，在路径观测严重退化甚至缺失时也能保持和现有基线方法相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法适用于高层规划不准确、局部执行需应对不确定性的长距离导航任务，在多种情境下展现了自适应和鲁棒性优势。

title: Deep Learning for BioImaging: What Are We Learning?
summary: Representation learning has driven major advances in natural image analysis by enabling models to acquire high-level semantic features. In microscopy imaging, however, it remains unclear what current representation learning methods actually learn. In this work, we conduct a systematic study of representation learning for the two most widely used and broadly available microscopy data types, representing critical scales in biology: cell culture and tissue imaging. To this end, we introduce a set of simple yet revealing baselines on curated benchmarks, including untrained models and simple structural representations of cellular tissue. Our results show that, surprisingly, state-of-the-art methods perform comparably to these baselines. We further show that, in contrast to natural images, existing models fail to consistently acquire high-level, biologically meaningful features. Moreover, we demonstrate that commonly used benchmark metrics are insufficient to assess representation quality and often mask this limitation. In addition, we investigate how detailed comparisons with these benchmarks provide ways to interpret the strengths and weaknesses of models for further improvements. Together, our results suggest that progress in microscopy image representation learning requires not only stronger models, but also more diagnostic benchmarks that measure what is actually learned.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性研究了显微镜图像表征学习，发现主流方法在此领域的表现仅与简单基线相当，并未有效获得高层生物学特征，同时现有评估指标无法准确反映表征质量。
AI.motivation: 显微镜图像在生物学研究中极其重要，然而现有表征学习方法在自然图像领域取得了显著进展，其在显微镜数据上的实际有效性和所学习的特征类型仍不明确。作者希望澄清现有方法在显微镜图像中的表现，并推动该领域方法和评估体系进步。
AI.method: 对两类主流显微镜数据（细胞培养和组织切片）建立标准化基线，包括未训练模型和结构化简易表征。通过与最先进方法系统对比，并分析不同评价指标的表现，测试是否能反映有意义的生物学特征。
AI.result: 结果表明，主流表征学习方法在显微镜图像上的表现出乎意料地仅与简单基线相当，模型未能稳定学习到高阶的生物学意义表征，同时，常用评测指标未能揭示这些局限性。
AI.conclusion: 现有的模型和评测方法都存在局限，进步需要开发更强的模型和更具诊断性的评测基准，以准确反映模型在显微镜图像领域到底学到了什么。

title: MMOU: A Massive Multi-Task Omni Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark for Long and Complex Real-World Videos
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance in visual and audio understanding when evaluated in isolation. However, their ability to jointly reason over omni-modal (visual, audio, and textual) signals in long and complex videos remains largely unexplored. We introduce MMOU, a new benchmark designed to systematically evaluate multimodal understanding and reasoning under these challenging, real-world conditions. MMOU consists of 15,000 carefully curated questions paired with 9038 web-collected videos of varying length, spanning diverse domains and exhibiting rich, tightly coupled audio-visual content. The benchmark covers 13 fundamental skill categories, all of which require integrating evidence across modalities and time. All questions are manually annotated across multiple turns by professional annotators, ensuring high quality and reasoning fidelity. We evaluate 20+ state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary multimodal models on MMOU. The results expose substantial performance gaps: the best closed-source model achieves only 64.2% accuracy, while the strongest open-source model reaches just 46.8%. Our results highlight the challenges of long-form omni-modal understanding, revealing that current models frequently fail to apply even fundamental skills in long videos. Through detailed analysis, we further identify systematic failure modes and provide insights into where and why current models break.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个全新的评测基准MMOU，用于评估多模态大模型在处理长时、多模态（视觉、音频、文本）视频中的理解和推理能力，指出目前模型在此任务上表现有限，存在显著挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大模型在单独处理视觉或音频任务时表现优异，但其在长时复杂视频中同时利用视觉、音频和文本信号进行联合推理的能力尚未被系统性评估。针对这一空白，作者设计了新的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了MMOU基准，包括9038个多领域、多长度、紧耦合的音视频内容的视频及其配套的15000个人工高质量、多轮注释的问题，覆盖13类基本技能，要求跨模态整合。随后用超过20个开源/闭源多模态大模型进行了系统性评测，并详尽分析了模型的表现及失败模式。
AI.result: 评测结果显示，不论开源还是闭源模型，在MMOU基准上的表现均不理想。闭源最优模型准确率为64.2%，开源最佳仅为46.8%。当前模型在长视频的多模态理解与推理任务上存在巨大能力缺口。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态大模型在长时、复杂视频的全模态理解和推理上仍面临重大挑战。本工作不仅提供了标准化测评工具，也揭示了模型系统性不足之处，为未来改进方向提供了有力参考。

authors: A. S. M. Ahsanul Sarkar Akib
title: LineMaster Pro: A Low-Cost Intelligent Line Following Robot with PID Control and Ultrasonic Obstacle Avoidance for Educational Robotics
summary: Line following robots are fundamental platforms in robotics education, yet commercially available solutions remain prohibitively expensive ($150-300$) while lacking integrated obstacle detection capabilities essential for real-world applications. This paper presents LineMaster Pro, an intelligent low-cost line following robot implemented on an Arduino Nano platform that integrates dual TCRT5000 infrared sensors for precision line tracking, an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor for real-time obstacle detection, a digitally tuned PID controller with Ziegler-Nichols optimization, and a hierarchical finite state machine for robust obstacle avoidance. A systematic four-phase sensor calibration methodology ensures reliable operation across varying lighting and surface conditions. Experimental validation through 200 controlled trials and 72-hour continuous operation demonstrates mean tracking accuracy of 1.18 cm at 0.4 m/s (95\% CI [1.06, 1.30]), obstacle detection reliability of 96.7\% within 10-40 cm range with 0.7\% false positive rate, and 94\% successful recovery from path deviations. The PID implementation achieves 43\% improvement over conventional on-off control ($p<0.001$). At a total hardware cost of \$28.50 based on verified Bangladesh market prices, LineMaster Pro achieves a 94\% cost reduction compared to commercial alternatives, establishing a practical benchmark for accessible robotics education in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款低成本且高性能的巡线机器人LineMaster Pro，在教育和低资源环境中极具现实意义。
AI.motivation: 现有商用巡线机器人价格高昂且缺乏集成的障碍物检测功能，不适用于资源有限区域的实际智能机器人教育。
AI.method: 基于Arduino Nano平台，集成双TCRT5000红外传感器实现精准巡线，并加装HC-SR04超声波传感器进行实时障碍检测。系统采用数字化调整的PID控制器（Ziegler-Nichols方法优化）以及分层有限状态机实现稳健避障。通过四阶段传感器校准，确保在不同照明和地面条件下稳定运行。
AI.result: 在200次实验和72小时连续工作中，巡线平均精度1.18厘米（0.4m/s速度），障碍检测可靠性96.7%，误报率0.7%，路径偏离恢复率达94%。PID控制器相对于传统开关控制性能提升43%。机器人整体成本仅28.5美元，在孟加拉市场下比主流商业产品低94%。
AI.conclusion: LineMaster Pro极大降低了巡线机器人教育平台的成本并提升性能，推动了低资源环境下机器人教育的普及，具有很高的实际推广和参考价值。

title: DINOv3 with Test-Time Calibration for Automated Carotid Intima-Media Thickness Measurement on CUBS v1
summary: Carotid intima-media thickness (CIMT) measured from B-mode ultrasound is an established vascular biomarker for atherosclerosis and cardiovascular risk stratification. Although a wide range of computerized methods have been proposed for carotid boundary delineation and CIMT estimation, robust and transferable deep models that jointly address segmentation and measurement remain underexplored, particularly in the era of vision foundation models. Motivated by recent advances in adapting DINOv3 to medical segmentation and exploiting DINOv3 in test-time optimization pipelines, we investigate a DINOv3-based framework for carotid intima-media complex segmentation and subsequent CIMT measurement on the Carotid Ultrasound Boundary Study (CUBS) v1 dataset. Our pipeline predicts the intima-media band at a fixed image resolution, extracts upper and lower boundaries column-wise, corrects for image resizing using the per-image calibration factor provided by CUBS, and reports CIMT in physical units. Across three patient-level test splits, our method achieved a mean test Dice of 0.7739 $\pm$ 0.0037 and IoU of 0.6384 $\pm$ 0.0044. The mean CIMT absolute error was 181.16 $\pm$ 11.57 $μ$m, with a mean Pearson correlation of 0.480 $\pm$ 0.259. In a held-out validation subset ($n=28$), test-time threshold calibration reduced the mean absolute CIMT error from 141.0 $μ$m at the default threshold to 101.1 $μ$m at the measurement-optimized threshold, while simultaneously reducing systematic bias toward zero. Relative to the error ranges reported in the original CUBS benchmark for classical computerized methods, these results place a DINOv3-based approach within the clinically relevant $\sim$0.1 mm measurement regime. Together, our findings support the feasibility of using vision foundation models for interpretable, calibration-aware CIMT measurement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于DINOv3视觉基础模型的自动化颈动脉内中膜厚度（CIMT）分割与测量管线，并在CUBS v1数据集上取得与传统方法相当、具有临床相关性的性能。
AI.motivation: CIMT是动脉粥样硬化和心血管风险分层的重要影像生物标志物。现有计算机化方法虽多，但能同时适用于分割和测量、并具备泛化性的深度模型还较少。近年来视觉基础模型（如DINOv3）在医学图像领域表现突出，有望提升CIMT自动化测量的准确性和解释性。
AI.method: 作者基于DINOv3模型，建立了一套自动化流程：先对超声图像中颈动脉内中膜带进行分割，逐列提取边界，再利用图像校准因子将像素单位转换为物理单位，最后输出CIMT值；通过测试时的阈值校准进一步优化测量结果。所有实验在CUBS v1数据集及其官方分割基准上完成。
AI.result: 在三个不同的测试分组上，该方法平均Dice系数为0.7739，IoU为0.6384，CIMT测量平均绝对误差为181.16 μm，平均Pearson相关为0.480。通过校准阈值能进一步减少误差至101.1 μm。这一误差范围已接近CUBS基准下的传统方法水平。
AI.conclusion: DINOv3基础视觉模型可以实现准确、可解释且具备校准机制的CIMT测量，达到临床需求的误差水平，展现出视觉基础模型在医学影像精准测量领域的应用潜力。

title: Selective Fine-Tuning of GPT Architectures for Parameter-Efficient Clinical Text Classification
summary: The rapid expansion of electronic health record (EHR) systems has generated large volumes of unstructured clinical narratives that contain valuable information for disease identification, patient cohort discovery, and clinical decision support. Extracting structured knowledge from these free-text documents remains challenging because clinical language is highly specialized, labeled datasets are limited, and full fine-tuning of large pretrained language models can require substantial computational resources. Efficient adaptation strategies are therefore essential for practical clinical natural language processing applications. This study proposes a parameter-efficient selective fine-tuning framework for adapting GPT-2 to clinical text classification tasks. Instead of updating the entire pretrained model, the majority of network parameters are frozen, and only the final Transformer block, the final layer normalization module, and a lightweight classification head are updated during training. This design substantially reduces the number of trainable parameters while preserving the contextual representation capabilities learned during pretraining. The proposed approach is evaluated using radiology reports from the MIMIC-IV-Note dataset with automatically derived CheXpert-style labels. Experiments on 50,000 radiology reports demonstrate that selective fine-tuning achieves approximately 91% classification accuracy while updating fewer than 6% of the model parameters. Comparative experiments with head-only training and full-model fine-tuning show that the proposed method provides a favorable balance between predictive performance and computational efficiency. These results indicate that selective fine-tuning offers an efficient and scalable framework for clinical text classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于临床文本分类的参数高效选择性微调方法，仅更新GPT-2的小部分参数，显著减少计算资源消耗，同时保持高分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 随着电子健康记录的快速发展，产生了大量包含疾病识别、患者组发现等有价值信息的临床自由文本，但受限于临床语言的专业性、标注数据稀缺以及大模型微调成本高，结构化信息抽取依然具有挑战。
AI.method: 作者提出对GPT-2进行选择性微调，仅解冻并更新最后一个Transformer block、最后归一化层和轻量分类头，其余参数保持冻结，显著减少需训练参数量并在保留上下文表达能力的同时提升效率。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-Note数据集的5万条放射报告上，所提方法在仅更新不足6%参数量的情况下，分类准确率达到约91%，同时对比实验显示该方法在性能与效率之间取得优良平衡。
AI.conclusion: 选择性微调为临床文本分类任务提供了一种高效且易扩展的模型适应框架，在资源有限的实际医疗应用中具有较大潜力。

title: Data-Driven Autoregressive Power Prediction for GTernal Robots in the Robotarium
summary: Energy-aware algorithms for multi-robot systems require accurate power consumption models, yet existing approaches rely on kinematic approximations that fail to capture the complex dynamics of real hardware. We present a lightweight autoregressive predictor for the GTernal mobile robot platform deployed in the Georgia Tech Robotarium. Through analysis of 48,000 samples collected across six motion trials, we discover that power consumption exhibits strong temporal autocorrelation ($ρ_1 = 0.95$) that dominates kinematic effects. A 7,041-parameter multi-layer perceptron (MLP) achieves $R^2 = 0.90$ on held-out motion patterns by conditioning on recent power history, reaching the theoretical prediction ceiling imposed by measurement noise. Physical validation across seven robots in a collision avoidance scenario yields mean $R^2 = 0.87$, demonstrating zero-shot transfer to unseen robots and behaviors. The predictor runs in 224 $μ$s per inference, enabling real-time deployment at 150$\times$ the platform's 30 Hz control rate. We release the trained model and dataset to support energy-aware multi-robot algorithm development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级自回归模型，用于精确预测移动机器人平台的能耗，并在真实硬件实验中取得高准确率。
AI.motivation: 能耗建模对于多机器人系统中节能算法十分关键，现有方法多采用运动学近似，无法反映实际硬件中的复杂动力学，导致模型不够精确。
AI.method: 作者利用6次运动试验共采集4.8万组数据，分析能耗的时间相关性（发现自相关系数高达0.95），并基于近期能耗历史，训练了一个含7041参数的多层感知机（MLP）自回归模型。该模型在未见数据上的R^2达到0.90，接近理论上由测量噪声限制的上限，并在真实机器人避障场景实现零样本迁移。
AI.result: 所提模型在从未见过的7台机器人和新行为上平均R^2达到0.87，预测一次只需224微秒，远快于30Hz控制频率，验证了实时部署能力。实验还表明，能耗的时序自相关远强于运动学变量对能耗的解释。
AI.conclusion: 自回归能耗预测器兼具精度和实时性，实现对多机器人平台的通用化和零样本迁移，为能耗感知算法开发提供了高质量工具和数据集。

title: Taming Vision Priors for Data Efficient mmWave Channel Modeling
summary: Accurately modeling millimeter-wave (mmWave) propagation is essential for real-time AR and autonomous systems. Differentiable ray tracing offers a physics-grounded solution but still facing deployment challenges due to its over-reliance on exhaustive channel measurements or brittle, hand-tuned scene models for material properties. We present VisRFTwin, a scalable and data-efficient digital-twin framework that integrates vision-derived material priors with differentiable ray tracing. Multi-view images from commodity cameras are processed by a frozen Vision-Language Model to extract dense semantic embeddings, which are translated into initial estimates of permittivity and conductivity for scene surfaces. These priors initialize a Sionna-based differentiable ray tracer, which rapidly calibrates material parameters via gradient descent with only a few dozen sparse channel soundings. Once calibrated, the association between vision features and material parameters is retained, enabling fast transfer to new scenarios without repeated calibration. Evaluations across three real-world scenarios, including office interiors, urban canyons, and dynamic public spaces show that VisRFTwin reduces channel measurement needs by up to 10$\times$ while achieving a 59% lower median delay spread error than pure data-driven deep learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisRFTwin框架，将视觉信息和可微射线追踪相结合，有效减少毫米波通信建模所需的实地测量，并显著提升建模精度。
AI.motivation: 毫米波通信对环境建模要求高，现有可微射线追踪方法依赖大量实地测量或手工调整材料参数，难以大规模和高效部署。
AI.method: VisRFTwin利用多视角普通相机影像，通过冻结的视觉-语言模型获取场景表面语义特征，并推断介电常数与电导率作为材料属性先验，结合基于Sionna的可微射线追踪，仅需少量测量数据，即可用梯度下降快速校准材料参数。校准后的视觉特征与材料参数映射可迁移到新场景，无需重复校准。
AI.result: 在办公室、城市峡谷及动态公共空间三个真实环境中测试，VisRFTwin能减少高达10倍的测量需求，同时建模延迟扩展误差较纯数据驱动深度学习法低59%。
AI.conclusion: VisRFTwin实现了高效、可扩展且数据高效的毫米波传播建模，大幅降低了实际部署难度，并提升了精度，在现实场景中验证了其实用性。

title: Vavanagi: a Community-run Platform for Documentation of the Hula Language in Papua New Guinea
summary: We present Vavanagi, a community-run platform for Hula (Vula'a), an Austronesian language of Papua New Guinea with approximately 10,000 speakers. Vavanagi supports crowdsourced English-Hula text translation and voice recording, with elder-led review and community-governed data infrastructure. To date, 77 translators and 4 reviewers have produced over 12k parallel sentence pairs covering 9k unique Hula words. We also propose a multi-level framework for measuring community involvement, from consultation to fully community-initiated and governed projects. We position Vavanagi at Level 5: initiative, design, implementation, and data governance all sit within the Hula community, making it, to our knowledge, the first community-led language technology initiative for a language of this size. Vavanagi shows how language technology can bridge village-based and urban members, connect generations, and support cultural heritage on the community's own terms.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Vavanagi，这是一个由社区主导、服务于巴布亚新几内亚Hula（Vula'a）语言的众包翻译与录音平台。它促进了社区成员的深度参与，并实现了数据的社区治理。
AI.motivation: Hula作为一种使用人口约1万的小语种，面临语言濒危及文化传承的挑战，因此需要开发适合该社区实际需求且由社区主导的语言技术平台来保存与发展该语言。
AI.method: 平台支持英语与Hula文本翻译及语音采集，所有内容由社区成员贡献，并由长者进行审核。此外，论文提出了社区参与度的多级框架，将Vavanagi 定位于社区完全自主（Level 5）。
AI.result: 目前，77名翻译者与4名评审者已累积生产过1.2万对双语句对，涵盖9000个独特的Hula词汇，并实现了数据与流程的社区自治。
AI.conclusion: Vavanagi是第一个类似规模语言的社区主导语言技术创新案例，它不仅促进了社区内部城乡成员和代际的连接，也强化了文化遗产的自主维护模式，为小语种数字化保存树立了新范例。

title: SmoothVLA: Aligning Vision-Language-Action Models with Physical Constraints via Intrinsic Smoothness Optimization
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for robotic manipulation. However, existing post-training methods face a dilemma between stability and exploration: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is constrained by demonstration quality and lacks generalization, whereas Reinforcement Learning (RL) improves exploration but often induces erratic, jittery trajectories that violate physical constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose SmoothVLA, a novel reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework that synergistically optimizes task performance and motion smoothness. The technical core is a physics-informed hybrid reward function that integrates binary sparse task rewards with a continuous dense term derived from trajectory jerk. Crucially, this reward is intrinsic, that computing directly from policy rollouts, without requiring extrinsic environment feedback or laborious reward engineering. Leveraging the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), SmoothVLA establishes trajectory smoothness as an explicit optimization prior, guiding the model toward physically feasible and stable control. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark demonstrate that SmoothVLA outperforms standard RL by 13.8\% in smoothness and significantly surpasses SFT in generalization across diverse tasks. Our work offers a scalable approach to aligning VLA models with physical-world constraints through intrinsic reward optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SmoothVLA的新方法，通过物理约束的内在奖励优化视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，实现机器人操作中任务表现和运动平滑性的协同提升，显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型后训练方法在‘稳定性’与‘探索性’之间存在矛盾：有监督微调（SFT）依赖演示质量且泛化差，强化学习（RL）虽有较强探索力但产生不平滑、物理上不合理的轨迹。需要新方法兼顾性能和轨迹平滑性。
AI.method: 提出SmoothVLA框架，将稀疏任务奖励与基于轨迹机械冲击（jerk）的稠密平滑奖励结合为混合型物理内在奖励，无需外部反馈，同时借助Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）策略明确优化轨迹平滑性。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试上，SmoothVLA在运动平滑性上比标准RL提升13.8%，在泛化能力上显著超越SFT方法，适用于多种任务。
AI.conclusion: SmoothVLA通过内在奖励优化，能有效引导VLA模型生成物理可行的平滑控制策略，兼顾智能体执行性能和物理世界约束，具有良好的通用性与可扩展性。

title: VisualLeakBench: Auditing the Fragility of Large Vision-Language Models against PII Leakage and Social Engineering
summary: As Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) are increasingly deployed in agent-integrated workflows and other deployment-relevant settings, their robustness against semantic visual attacks remains under-evaluated -- alignment is typically tested on explicit harmful content rather than privacy-critical multimodal scenarios. We introduce VisualLeakBench, an evaluation suite to audit LVLMs against OCR Injection and Contextual PII Leakage using 1,000 synthetically generated adversarial images with 8 PII types, validated on 50 in-the-wild (IRL) real-world screenshots spanning diverse visual contexts. We evaluate four frontier systems (GPT-5.2, Claude~4, Gemini-3 Flash, Grok-4) with Wilson 95% confidence intervals. Claude~4 achieves the lowest OCR ASR (14.2%) but the highest PII ASR (74.4%), exhibiting a comply-then-warn pattern -- where verbatim data disclosure precedes any safety-oriented language. Grok-4 achieves the lowest PII ASR (20.4%). A defensive system prompt eliminates PII leakage for two models, reduces Claude~4's leakage from 74.4% to 2.2%, but has no effect on Gemini-3 Flash on synthetic data. Strikingly, IRL validation reveals Gemini-3 Flash does respond to mitigation on real-world images (50% to 0%), indicating that mitigation robustness is template-sensitive rather than uniformly absent. We release our dataset and code for reproducible robustness and safety evaluation of deployment-relevant vision-language systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisualLeakBench评测套件，用于评测大型视觉-语言模型（LVLM）在面临视觉语义攻击（如OCR注入和上下文PII泄漏）时的鲁棒性，并对主流LVLM进行系统测试。
AI.motivation: 随着LVLMs越来越多地集成到实际应用场景中，对其在涉及隐私和多模态安全场景下的鲁棒性评估不足。传统只对有害内容进行对齐测试，忽略了视觉语义攻击的风险。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含1000个合成对抗图像和8类PII类型的数据集，并在50个实际世界截图上进行验证。使用Wilson 95%置信区间评估GPT-5.2、Claude 4、Gemini-3 Flash、Grok-4四种前沿LVLM，分析其对OCR注入和PII泄漏的防御能力。同时测试了防御型系统提示词对PII泄露的缓解效果。
AI.result: Claude 4 OCR攻击成功率最低（14.2%），但PII泄漏最高（74.4%），表现出先合规披露后警告的特征。Grok-4的PII泄露最低（20.4%）。防御型提示词可显著减少大部分模型的PII泄露（如Claude 4从74.4%降至2.2%），但Gemini-3 Flash对合成数据无效；在真实截图上，Gemini-3 Flash对防御有明显响应。
AI.conclusion: LVLM在多模态隐私保护上的鲁棒性有显著差异，防御措施对不同模型在不同场景下的效用也存在差异。该文提供的数据和代码将有助于部署相关LVLM的安全和鲁棒性研究。

title: Rethinking Evaluation in Retrieval-Augmented Personalized Dialogue: A Cognitive and Linguistic Perspective
summary: In cognitive science and linguistic theory, dialogue is not seen as a chain of independent utterances but rather as a joint activity sustained by coherence, consistency, and shared understanding. However, many systems for open-domain and personalized dialogue use surface-level similarity metrics (e.g., BLEU, ROUGE, F1) as one of their main reporting measures, which fail to capture these deeper aspects of conversational quality. We re-examine a notable retrieval-augmented framework for personalized dialogue, LAPDOG, as a case study for evaluation methodology. Using both human and LLM-based judges, we identify limitations in current evaluation practices, including corrupted dialogue histories, contradictions between retrieved stories and persona, and incoherent response generation. Our results show that human and LLM judgments align closely but diverge from lexical similarity metrics, underscoring the need for cognitively grounded evaluation methods. Broadly, this work charts a path toward more reliable assessment frameworks for retrieval-augmented dialogue systems that better reflect the principles of natural human communication.

AI.tldr: 本文指出对话系统常用的表层相似性评价指标（如BLEU、ROUGE）难以反映对话的深层质量，主张采用更加符合认知科学和语言理论的评价方法。以LAPDOG个性化对话系统为案例，结合人工和大模型打分，发现表层指标与人类/大模型判断存在较大偏离，呼吁发展更能体现自然对话本质的新评价体系。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的开放域和个性化对话系统评价方法依赖词面相似度，无法评估对话的一致性、连贯性和共识等本质属性，影响了模型实际性能的反映。因此作者希望审视现有评价框架的有效性，推动构建更符合人类认知的对话系统评估体系。
AI.method: 以LAPDOG检索增强型个性化对话系统为案例，采用人工和大模型（LLM）的主观评价，与传统词面相似性指标（BLEU、ROUGE、F1）进行对比分析，识别现有评价实践中的具体问题（如对话历史损坏、人物设定矛盾、回复不连贯等）。
AI.result: 实验证明人工和LLM判分高度一致，但都与BLEU、ROUGE等词面指标有明显分歧，表明传统指标无法有效反映对话深层质量。此外，研究暴露了现有对话生成中存在的若干常见问题。
AI.conclusion: 文章强调未来检索增强型对话系统需要建立更加认知合理、能反映自然人类沟通原则的评价新方法。当前表层指标在实际对话评估中有重大局限，发展新的评测框架势在必行。

title: ToMPC: Task-oriented Model Predictive Control via ADMM for Safe Robotic Manipulation
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL)
summary: This paper proposes a task-oriented model predictive control (ToMPC) framework for safe and efficient robotic manipulation in open workspaces. The framework unifies collision-free motion and robot-environment interaction to address diverse scenarios. Additionally, it introduces task-oriented obstacle avoidance that leverages kinematic redundancy to enhance manipulation efficiency in obstructed environments. This complex optimization problem is solved by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM), which decomposes the problem into two subproblems tackled by differential dynamic programming (DDP) and quadratic programming (QP), respectively. The effectiveness of this approach is validated in simulation and hardware experiments on a Franka Panda robotic manipulator. Results demonstrate that the framework can plan motion and/or force trajectories in real time, maximize the manipulation range while avoiding obstacles, and strictly adhere to safety-related hard constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向任务的模型预测控制（ToMPC）框架，实现了机器人在开放作业空间内的安全高效操作，将避障与机器人-环境交互统一处理，并通过利用运动学冗余提升效率。该复杂优化问题通过ADMM方法分解为两部分，由DDP和QP分别求解。仿真与实际机器人实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 开放环境中的机器人操作需要兼顾高效性和安全性，既要避开障碍，又要与环境进行有效交互。现有方法往往难以同时满足广泛任务需求和复杂约束，因此需要新的框架来统一处理多样化场景。
AI.method: 提出ToMPC框架，将避障和交互统一建模，引入面向任务的避障方案，利用机器人运动学冗余提升在受限环境下的操作效率。将复杂的优化问题通过ADMM分解为两个子问题，分别采用微分动态规划（DDP）和二次规划（QP）算法求解。
AI.result: 在Franka Panda机械臂的仿真和实际硬件实验中，该方法能够实时规划运动或力的轨迹，最大化操作范围，同时有效避障，并严格满足安全相关的硬约束。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明所提出ToMPC框架能高效、可靠地实现开放作业空间下的机器人操作，适用于复杂且动态变化的场景，具有良好的普适性和安全性。

title: Layout-Guided Controllable Pathology Image Generation with In-Context Diffusion Transformers
summary: Controllable pathology image synthesis requires reliable regulation of spatial layout, tissue morphology, and semantic detail. However, existing text-guided diffusion models offer only coarse global control and lack the ability to enforce fine-grained structural constraints. Progress is further limited by the absence of large datasets that pair patch-level spatial layouts with detailed diagnostic descriptions, since generating such annotations for gigapixel whole-slide images is prohibitively time-consuming for human experts. To overcome these challenges, we first develop a scalable multi-agent LVLM annotation framework that integrates image description, diagnostic step extraction, and automatic quality judgment into a coordinated pipeline, and we evaluate the reliability of the system through a human verification process. This framework enables efficient construction of fine-grained and clinically aligned supervision at scale. Building on the curated data, we propose In-Context Diffusion Transformer (IC-DiT), a layout-aware generative model that incorporates spatial layouts, textual descriptions, and visual embeddings into a unified diffusion transformer. Through hierarchical multimodal attention, IC-DiT maintains global semantic coherence while accurately preserving structural and morphological details. Extensive experiments on five histopathology datasets show that IC-DiT achieves higher fidelity, stronger spatial controllability, and better diagnostic consistency than existing methods. In addition, the generated images serve as effective data augmentation resources for downstream tasks such as cancer classification and survival analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套高效的多智能体标注框架和基于布局感知的生成模型，在病理图像的可控合成、结构保真度及下游医学任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的扩散模型在合成病理图像时，难以精细控制图像空间布局、形态结构及语义细节，且缺乏大规模、含有空间布局注释与诊断描述的标注数据，因全标注流程人工成本高昂。
AI.method: 作者提出了多智能体大视觉语言模型(LVLM)标注框架，对图像自动生成描述、提取诊断步骤并判断质量，经部分人工复核以保证准确性；在此高质量数据集上，设计了一种名为In-Context Diffusion Transformer (IC-DiT)的生成模型，将空间布局、文本描述与视觉特征融合进统一扩散模型，通过分层多模态注意力机制提升全局与细粒度控制能力。
AI.result: 在五个病理图像数据集上的大量实验表明，IC-DiT在生成图像的保真度、空间可控性及诊断一致性方面均优于现有方法。同时，该方法生成的数据在癌症分类、生存分析等下游任务中极具增益价值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种高效可扩展的标注-生成一体化方案，能够在缺乏大规模精细标注的医学影像领域增强图像合成精度与下游任务表现，为医学人工智能应用提供了新工具。

title: QiMeng-CodeV-SVA: Training Specialized LLMs for Hardware Assertion Generation via RTL-Grounded Bidirectional Data Synthesis
comment: Accepted by DAC 2026. Code: https://github.com/wyt2000/CodeV-SVA; Model: https://huggingface.co/wyt2000/CodeV-SVA-14B
summary: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are crucial for hardware verification. Recent studies leverage general-purpose LLMs to translate natural language properties to SVAs (NL2SVA), but they perform poorly due to limited data. We propose a data synthesis framework to tackle two challenges: the scarcity of high-quality real-world SVA corpora and the lack of reliable methods to determine NL-SVA semantic equivalence. For the former, large-scale open-source RTLs are used to guide LLMs to generate real-world SVAs; for the latter, bidirectional translation serves as a data selection method. With the synthesized data, we train CodeV-SVA, a series of SVA generation models. Notably, CodeV-SVA-14B achieves 75.8% on NL2SVA-Human and 84.0% on NL2SVA-Machine in Func.@1, matching or exceeding advanced LLMs like GPT-5 and DeepSeek-R1.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种数据合成框架，通过合成大规模高质量SVA训练数据以及使用双向翻译进行数据筛选，显著提升自然语言到SystemVerilog Assertions（NL2SVA）任务的模型表现。所提出的CodeV-SVA模型在多个评测集上超越了现有先进LLM。
AI.motivation: 现有通用大语言模型（LLM）在将自然语言描述转换为SVA的任务（NL2SVA）中表现不佳，主要是因为缺乏高质量的大规模SVA语料数据，以及缺乏能判断自然语言与SVA语义等价的方法。
AI.method:
1. 利用大规模开源RTL代码，指导LLM生成高质量、贴合实际的SVA数据。
2. 采用自然语言与SVA的双向翻译作为数据筛选标准，保证语义准确性。
3. 基于合成数据训练新模型CodeV-SVA系列，并进行系统评测。
AI.result: CodeV-SVA-14B模型在NL2SVA-Human测试集上取得75.8%的Func.@1表现，在NL2SVA-Machine集上取得84.0%，达到或超过了GPT-5和DeepSeek-R1等先进LLM的水平。
AI.conclusion: 构建合成高质量数据并结合双向翻译筛选，有效提升了NL2SVA任务表现。所提出的CodeV-SVA系列模型为生成和理解SVA提供了更为可靠的工具，对硬件验证自动化具有重要意义。

title: Vision-guided Autonomous Dual-arm Extraction Robot for Bell Pepper Harvesting
comment: 9 pages; first four authors have equal contribution
summary: Agricultural robotics has emerged as a critical solution to the labor shortages and rising costs associated with manual crop harvesting. Bell pepper harvesting, in particular, is a labor-intensive task, accounting for up to 50% of total production costs. While automated solutions have shown promise in controlled greenhouse environments, harvesting in unstructured outdoor farms remains an open challenge due to environmental variability and occlusion. This paper presents VADER (Vision-guided Autonomous Dual-arm Extraction Robot), a dual-arm mobile manipulation system designed specifically for the autonomous harvesting of bell peppers in outdoor environments. The system integrates a robust perception pipeline coupled with a dual-arm planning framework that coordinates a gripping arm and a cutting arm for extraction. We validate the system through trials in various realistic conditions, demonstrating a harvest success rate exceeding 60% with a cycle time of under 100 seconds per fruit, while also featuring a teleoperation fail-safe based on the GELLO teleoperation framework to ensure robustness. To support robust perception, we contribute a hierarchically structured dataset of over 3,200 images spanning indoor and outdoor domains, pairing wide-field scene images with close-up pepper images to enable a coarse-to-fine training strategy from fruit detection to high-precision pose estimation. The code and dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种适用于室外环境的双臂自主采摘机器人VADER，显著提升了甜椒采摘自动化的可靠性和效率。
AI.motivation: 手工采摘甜椒劳动强度大、成本高，且农业劳动力短缺，使得自动化机器人采摘成为亟需突破的技术难题。
AI.method: 提出了VADER系统，结合了稳健的视觉感知算法和双臂协同规划：一只手臂负责抓取，另一只手臂负责切割。为提升感知能力，还构建了覆盖室内外、分层结构的图像数据集，采用从粗到细的检测和精确定位训练方法。此外，系统集成了基于GELLO的远程操控容错机制。
AI.result: 在各种真实室外环境下，VADER系统采摘成功率超过60%，单果平均采摘周期低于100秒，感知和操作鲁棒性强。
AI.conclusion: VADER系统验证了在复杂室外环境下自主采摘甜椒的可行性，通过开放数据集和代码推动了相关领域技术进步。

title: Cylindrical Mechanical Projector for Omnidirectional Fringe Projection Profilometry
summary: The demand for 360-degree 3D reconstruction has significantly increased in recent years across various domains such as the metaverse and 3D telecommunication. Accordingly, the importance of precise and wide-area 3D sensing technology has become emphasized. While the digital fringe projection method has been widely used due to its high accuracy and implementation flexibility, it suffers from fundamental limitations such as unidirectional projection and a restricted available light spectrum. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel 3D reconstruction method based on a cylindrical mechanical projector. The proposed method consists of a rotational stage and a cylindrical pattern generator with ON/OFF slots at two distinct intervals, enabling omnidirectional projection of multi-frequency phase-shifted fringe patterns. By applying a multi-wavelength unwrapping algorithm and a quasi-calibration technique, the system achieves high-accuracy 3D reconstruction using only a single camera. Experimental results, supported by repeatability and reproducibility analyses together with a measurement uncertainty evaluation, confirm reliable measurement performance and practical feasibility for omnidirectional 3D reconstruction. The expanded uncertainty of the reconstructed depth was evaluated as 0.215 mm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于圆柱机械投影仪的新型360度3D重建方法，可实现更高精度和全方位感知，解决了传统数字条纹投影的限制。
AI.motivation: 随着元宇宙、3D通信等领域对全视角3D重建需求的增加，现有数字条纹投影方法受限于投影方向和光谱范围，难以满足全方位高精度测量的需求。
AI.method: 提出采用带有ON/OFF间隙的旋转圆柱投影仪，实现多频、相移条纹图案的全方位投影。结合多波长解卷算法和准标定技术，仅用单台相机即可实现高精度3D重建。
AI.result: 通过实验（包括可重复性、可再现性及测量不确定性分析），证实系统实现了高可靠性和实用性，重建深度的扩展不确定度为0.215mm。
AI.conclusion: 本方法有效克服了传统投影方法的缺陷，在实际全向3D重建中表现出高精度和可操作性，具有良好的应用前景。

title: Mitigating Overthinking in Large Reasoning Language Models via Reasoning Path Deviation Monitoring
summary: Large Reasoning Language Models (LRLMs) demonstrate impressive capabilities on complex tasks by utilizing long Chain-of-Thought reasoning. However, they are prone to overthinking, which generates redundant reasoning steps that degrade both performance and efficiency. Recently, early-exit strategies are proposed to mitigate overthinking by dynamically and adaptively terminating redundant reasoning. However, current early-exit methods either introduce extra training overhead by relying on proxy models or limit inference throughput due to the frequent content switching between reasoning and generating probing answers. Moreover, most early-exit methods harm LRLMs performance due to over-truncation. Our insight stems from an observation: overthinking often causes LRLMs to deviate from the correct reasoning path, which is frequently accompanied by high-entropy transition tokens. Given this, we propose an early-exit method deeply coupled with the native reasoning process, which leverages the path deviation index as a dedicated monitoring metric for the frequent occurrence of high-entropy transition tokens to dynamically detect and terminate overthinking trajectories. We conduct experiments across multiple benchmarks using LRLMs of different types and scales, and the results indicate that our method delivers the largest performance improvement over vanilla CoT compared to existing early-exit methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的早退出方法，以解决大型推理语言模型（LRLMs）在长链推理任务中因过度思考导致性能下降的问题。该方法通过检测推理过程中高熵转移token频繁出现，动态终止冗余推理步骤，在多个基准测试中优于现有早退出方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LRLMs在复杂任务中依赖长链推理，但容易出现过度推理（overthinking），即生成多余推理步骤，影响准确率和推理效率。现有缓解方法存在训练开销大或推理效率降低等问题，且部分会因过度截断损害性能。为此需要一种精细且高效的过度思考检测及终止方法。
AI.method: 作者观察到LRLMs过度思考时，推理轨迹容易偏离正确路径，并伴随高熵过渡token频发。基于这一发现，设计了一种与原生推理过程高度结合的早退出机制，引入“路径偏离指标”，动态监控高熵token频率，一旦检测到过度思考迹象即终止当前推理步骤。
AI.result: 在多个类型和规模的LRLMs以及不同推理基准上实验，所提方法在性能提升方面，相比vanilla Chain-of-Thought（CoT）和其它早退出方法取得了最大优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于高熵token和推理路径偏离的新型早退出策略被证明可有效缓解LRLMs过度思考问题，提升推理效率和准确率，优于主流早退出模型。

title: URDF-Anything+: Autoregressive Articulated 3D Models Generation for Physical Simulation
summary: Articulated objects are fundamental for robotics, simulation of physics, and interactive virtual environments. However, reconstructing them from visual input remains challenging, as it requires jointly inferring both part geometry and kinematic structure. We present, an end-to-end autoregressive framework that directly generates executable articulated object models from visual observations. Given image and object-level 3D cues, our method sequentially produces part geometries and their associated joint parameters, resulting in complete URDF models without reliance on multi-stage pipelines. The generation proceeds until the model determines that all parts have been produced, automatically inferring complete geometry and kinematics. Building on this capability, we enable a new Real-Follow-Sim paradigm, where high-fidelity digital twins constructed from visual observations allow policies trained and tested purely in simulation to transfer to real robots without online adaptation. Experiments on large-scale articulated object benchmarks and real-world robotic tasks demonstrate that outperforms prior methods in geometric reconstruction quality, joint parameter accuracy, and physical executability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个端到端自回归框架，可以从视觉输入直接生成可执行的多关节物体模型，实现了几何结构与运动学的联合推理，简化了建模流程，并提升了重建精度和执行可行性。
AI.motivation: 多关节物体在机器人、物理仿真和虚拟环境中具有基础性作用，但如何从视觉感知中同时重建其几何结构和运动学结构长期面临挑战。现有方法多依赖多阶段流程，难以高效生成完整且可执行的模型。
AI.method: 提出了一种端到端自回归框架，输入图像和三维提示，按部件顺序生成几何与关节参数，直到模型判定所有部件已生成，实现完整的URDF模型，不依赖多阶段处理。
AI.result: 在大规模运动物体基准数据和真实机器人任务上的实验表明，该方法在几何重建质量、关节参数准确率和物理可执行性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了视觉信息到可执行多关节物体模型的一步到位重建，促进了从仿真到现实的无缝迁移，为机器人等领域高效建模和任务执行带来新进展。

title: VeloEdit: Training-Free Consistent and Continuous Instruction-Based Image Editing via Velocity Field Decomposition
summary: Instruction-based image editing aims to modify source content according to textual instructions. However, existing methods built upon flow matching often struggle to maintain consistency in non-edited regions due to denoising-induced reconstruction errors that cause drift in preserved content. Moreover, they typically lack fine-grained control over edit strength. To address these limitations, we propose VeloEdit, a training-free method that enables highly consistent and continuously controllable editing. VeloEdit dynamically identifies editing regions by quantifying the discrepancy between the velocity fields responsible for preserving source content and those driving the desired edits. Based on this partition, we enforce consistency in preservation regions by substituting the editing velocity with the source-restoring velocity, while enabling continuous modulation of edit intensity in target regions via velocity interpolation. Unlike prior works that rely on complex attention manipulation or auxiliary trainable modules, VeloEdit operates directly on the velocity fields. Extensive experiments on Flux.1 Kontext and Qwen-Image-Edit demonstrate that VeloEdit improves visual consistency and editing continuity with negligible additional computational cost. Code is available at https://github.com/xmulzq/VeloEdit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的图像编辑方法VeloEdit，通过对速度场进行动态分区，实现了更加一致和可控的图像编辑效果，并且无需重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流匹配的图像编辑方法在未编辑区域常常出现一致性差的问题，且难以精细调节编辑强度。作者希望解决这些痛点，实现既一致又可控的指令驱动图像编辑。
AI.method: VeloEdit是一种训练自由的方法，通过分析保持原内容和编辑目标各自的速度场，区分编辑区和保留区。在保留区用恢复速度场替代编辑速度场，以保证一致性；在编辑区则通过速度插值连续调节编辑强度。该方法直接在速度场上操作，无需注意力机制或辅助训练模块。
AI.result: 在Flux.1 Kontext和Qwen-Image-Edit等数据集上，VeloEdit显著提升了未编辑区域的视觉一致性和编辑强度的连续性，同时几乎不增加计算量。
AI.conclusion: VeloEdit无需额外训练，通过速度场直接实现高一致性和高可控性的图像编辑，为指令驱动图像编辑带来更优效果。

title: Automatic Inter-document Multi-hop Scientific QA Generation
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables. Accepted to the 2026 International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2026)
summary: Existing automatic scientific question generation studies mainly focus on single-document factoid QA, overlooking the inter-document reasoning crucial for scientific understanding. We present AIM-SciQA, an automated framework for generating multi-document, multi-hop scientific QA datasets. AIM-SciQA extracts single-hop QAs using large language models (LLMs) with machine reading comprehension and constructs cross-document relations based on embedding-based semantic alignment while selectively leveraging citation information. Applied to 8,211 PubMed Central papers, it produced 411,409 single-hop and 13,672 multi-hop QAs, forming the IM-SciQA dataset. Human and automatic validation confirmed high factual consistency, and experimental results demonstrate that IM-SciQA effectively differentiates reasoning capabilities across retrieval and QA stages, providing a realistic and interpretable benchmark for retrieval-augmented scientific reasoning. We further extend this framework to construct CIM-SciQA, a citation-guided variant achieving comparable performance to the Oracle setting, reinforcing the dataset's validity and generality.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了AIM-SciQA框架，用于自动生成多文档、多跳的科学问答数据集，填补了现有自动科学问答主要关注单文档事实型问答的不足。该方法有效区分了检索与推理阶段的能力，并建立了真实性强的新基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前自动科学问答研究过于集中于单文档事实问答，忽视了科学研究中需要跨文档推理的重要性。为提升科学理解和问答系统能力，亟需自动构建能够考察多文档、多跳推理能力的新型科学问答数据集。
AI.method: 提出AIM-SciQA自动化框架，利用大语言模型与机器阅读理解技术自动抽取单跳问答，通过嵌入相似度和引用信息构建文档间关系，进而生成多文档多跳问答对，并应用于8211篇PubMed Central论文。
AI.result: 共生成41万单跳与1.36万多跳问答对，人工和自动方式验证了事实正确性。实验结果表明，IM-SciQA数据集在检索和问答阶段有效区分推理能力，并能作为可靠的科学推理基准。同时通过引用辅助的方法扩展构建CIM-SciQA数据集，其表现达到Oracle设置的水平。
AI.conclusion: AIM-SciQA为科学问答生成和推理提供了自动化、可扩展、真实性强的方法和数据集，对提升科学问答系统的多文档推理能力具有重要意义。CIM-SciQA展示了方法的泛化性和可靠性。

title: Amortizing Trajectory Diffusion with Keyed Drift Fields
summary: Diffusion-based trajectory planners can synthesize rich, multimodal action sequences for offline reinforcement learning, but their iterative denoising incurs substantial inference-time cost, making closed-loop planning slow under tight compute budgets. We study the problem of achieving diffusion-like trajectory planning behavior with one-step inference, while retaining the ability to sample diverse candidate plans and condition on the current state in a receding-horizon control loop. Our key observation is that conditional trajectory generation fails under naïve distribution-matching objectives when the similarity measure used to align generated trajectories with the dataset is dominated by unconstrained future dimensions. In practice, this causes attraction toward average trajectories, collapses action diversity, and yields near-static behavior. Our key insight is that conditional generative planning requires a conditioning-aware notion of neighborhood: trajectory updates should be computed using distances in a compact key space that reflects the condition, while still applying updates in the full trajectory space. Building on this, we introduce Keyed Drifting Policies (KDP), a one-step trajectory generator trained with a drift-field objective that attracts generated trajectories toward condition-matched dataset windows and repels them from nearby generated samples, using a stop-gradient drifted target to amortize iterative refinement into training. At inference, the resulting policy produces a full trajectory window in a single forward pass. Across standard RL benchmarks and real-time hardware deployments, KDP achieves strong performance with one-step inference and substantially lower planning latency than diffusion sampling. Project website, code and videos: https://keyed-drifting.github.io/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Keyed Drifting Policies (KDP)的轨迹规划方法，实现了类似扩散模型的多样化动作序列生成，但只需一步推理，大幅降低了在线推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 传统基于扩散模型的轨迹规划能生成丰富多样的动作轨迹，但因其多步去噪过程导致推理慢，不适合资源受限或需实时反馈的场景。作者希望解决如何在保证多样性和条件适应性的同时，实现一步高效推理。
AI.method: 作者分析了条件轨迹生成为何在简单分布匹配下崩溃，然后提出在‘条件感知’的嵌入空间中对轨迹进行聚合，在原始空间中进行更新。具体方法为提出KDP，在训练时通过漂移场目标将生成的轨迹吸引到与条件匹配的数据集片段，并远离相似生成轨迹，实现一步生成完整轨迹。
AI.result: 在标准强化学习基准和实际硬件上，KDP用一步推理即可达到与扩散采样方法相当或更强的性能，且规划延迟大幅下降。
AI.conclusion: KDP方法在保证多样行动和对当前状态适应的前提下，实现了高效低延迟的闭环轨迹规划。该研究为资源受限和实时任务中的轨迹规划提供了新思路。

title: High-Fidelity Text-to-Image Generation from Pre-Trained Vision-Language Models via Distribution-Conditioned Diffusion Decoding
summary: Recent large-scale vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable text-to-image generation capabilities, yet their visual fidelity remains constrained by the discrete image tokenization, which poses a major challenge. Although several studies have explored continuous representation modeling to enhance visual quality, adapting pre-trained VLM models to such representations requires large-scale data and training costs comparable to the original pre-training. To circumvent this limitation, we propose a diffusion-based decoding framework that enhances image fidelity by training only a diffusion decoder on the output image-token logits of pre-trained VLMs, thereby preserving the original model intact. At its core, Logit-to-Code Distributional Mapping converts the VLM's image-token logits into continuous, distribution-weighted code vectors with uncertainty features, providing an effective conditioning signal for diffusion decoding. A lightweight Logit Calibration aligns training-time proxy logits from the VQ-VAE encoder with VLM-generated logits, mitigating the train-inference gap. Conditioned on these representations, the Distribution-Conditioned Diffusion Decoder generates high-fidelity images. Achieved solely through short training on ImageNet-1K, our method consistently improves visual fidelity for both VQ-VAE reconstructions and text-to-image generations from VLM-predicted tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的解码框架，只需在预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）输出的图像token logits上训练扩散解码器，即可大幅提升图像生成的视觉质量，无需重新训练VLM本体。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）在文本生成图像方面表现强大，但因离散图像token化方案约束了视觉质量。虽然连续表示可提升质量，但将VLM适配到此类表示需要大规模数据和高昂训练成本，难以高效实现。
AI.method: 作者提出利用VLM输出的图像token logits输入一个仅需短期训练的扩散解码器，核心是Logit-to-Code Distributional Mapping方法，将logits转为带有不确定性特征的连续分布编码，并用轻量级的Logit Calibration对齐训练时与推理时的logits分布，作为条件信号驱动扩散模型生成高质量图像。
AI.result: 仅利用ImageNet-1K短时间训练后，该方法可在保持原VLM模型不变的前提下，显著提升VQ-VAE重建和VLM文本到图像生成中的图像视觉保真度，效果优于传统离散token方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提方案在无需大规模重新预训练VLM基础上，能高效提升现有VLM生成图像的视觉质量，为图像生成领域提供了高效实用的新解法。

title: MedPriv-Bench: Benchmarking the Privacy-Utility Trade-off of Large Language Models in Medical Open-End Question Answering
summary: Recent advances in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) have enabled large language models (LLMs) to ground outputs in clinical evidence. However, connecting LLMs with external databases introduces the risk of contextual leakage: a subtle privacy threat where unique combinations of medical details enable patient re-identification even without explicit identifiers. Current benchmarks in healthcare heavily focus on accuracy, ignoring such privacy issues, despite strict regulations like Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). To fill this gap, we present MedPriv-Bench, the first benchmark specifically designed to jointly evaluate privacy preservation and clinical utility in medical open-ended question answering. Our framework utilizes a multi-agent, human-in-the-loop pipeline to synthesize sensitive medical contexts and clinically relevant queries that create realistic privacy pressure. We establish a standardized evaluation protocol leveraging a pre-trained RoBERTa-Natural Language Inference (NLI) model as an automated judge to quantify data leakage, achieving an average of 85.9% alignment with human experts. Through an extensive evaluation of 9 representative LLMs, we demonstrate a pervasive privacy-utility trade-off. Our findings underscore the necessity of domain-specific benchmarks to validate the safety and efficacy of medical AI systems in privacy-sensitive environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedPriv-Bench，这是首个联合评估医学问答中隐私保护与临床实用性的基准，填补了以往只关注准确性而忽视隐私泄露风险的空白。
AI.motivation: 随着RAG技术的进步，LLM能够结合临床证据进行推理，但与外部数据库联动时可能发生隐私泄露，即使无直接身份信息，特殊医疗细节的组合也可导致患者身份被识别。医疗行业受到HIPAA和GDPR等严格隐私法规监管，现有评测基准却忽视了隐私风险，对安全性评估不足。
AI.method: 作者构建了MedPriv-Bench基准，采用多智能体和人类参与的流程，生成包含敏感医疗上下文和临床相关问题的测试数据，形成具有现实隐私压力的验证场景。并利用基于RoBERTa的NLI模型作为自动评审系统，衡量数据泄露，达到85.9%的专家一致性。
AI.result: 在对9个代表性大模型的广泛评测中，发现隐私保护和实用性之间存在显著权衡。自动判别系统和专家评判高度一致，证明方法可靠。
AI.conclusion: 医学AI应用必须评估隐私与实用性的平衡，通用基准远不能反映行业需求，亟需领域专用的安全与有效性基准支持医疗AI实际部署。

title: Stiffness Copilot: An Impedance Policy for Contact-Rich Teleoperation
summary: In teleoperation of contact-rich manipulation tasks, selecting robot impedance is critical but difficult. The robot must be compliant to avoid damaging the environment, but stiff to remain responsive and to apply force when needed. In this paper, we present Stiffness Copilot, a vision-based policy for shared-control teleoperation in which the operator commands robot pose and the policy adjusts robot impedance online. To train Stiffness Copilot, we first infer direction-dependent stiffness matrices in simulation using privileged contact information. We then use these matrices to supervise a lightweight vision policy that predicts robot stiffness from wrist-camera images and transfers zero-shot to real images at runtime. In a human-subject study, Stiffness Copilot achieved safety comparable to using a constant low stiffness while matching the efficiency of using a constant high stiffness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的共享控制方法“Stiffness Copilot”，能够根据操作需求在线调整机器人的刚度，从而在保证安全性的同时提高操作效率。
AI.motivation: 在涉及丰富接触的远程操作任务中，机器人刚度的选择至关重要，但很难权衡刚柔兼备——过于柔软会影响效率，过于刚硬则容易损坏环境。为此，亟需一种智能调节刚度的方法。
AI.method: 提出了Stiffness Copilot系统：通过仿真环境获得含接触信息的方向相关刚度矩阵，利用这些矩阵监督一个轻量级的视觉策略网络，该网络能通过手腕摄像头图像预测机器人刚度，并能够无缝迁移到真实环境。
AI.result: 在人为操作实验中，Stiffness Copilot系统在安全性上与恒定低刚度方法相当，但在操作效率上达到了恒定高刚度方法的水平。
AI.conclusion: Stiffness Copilot能够在保证安全的前提下大幅提升远程操作机器人的效率，在实际操作中实现刚度的智能调节，兼顾了柔顺性与响应性。

title: WebVR: Benchmarking Multimodal LLMs for WebPage Recreation from Videos via Human-Aligned Visual Rubrics
summary: Existing web-generation benchmarks rely on text prompts or static screenshots as input. However, videos naturally convey richer signals such as interaction flow, transition timing, and motion continuity, which are essential for faithful webpage recreation. Despite this potential, video-conditioned webpage generation remains largely unexplored, with no dedicated benchmark for this task. To fill this gap, we introduce WebVR, a benchmark that evaluates whether MLLMs can faithfully recreate webpages from demonstration videos. WebVR contains 175 webpages across diverse categories, all constructed through a controlled synthesis pipeline rather than web crawling, ensuring varied and realistic demonstrations without overlap with existing online pages. We also design a fine-grained, human-aligned visual rubric that evaluates the generated webpages across multiple dimensions. Experiments on 19 models reveal substantial gaps in recreating fine-grained style and motion quality, while the rubric-based automatic evaluation achieves 96% agreement with human preferences. We release the dataset, evaluation toolkit, and baseline results to support future research on video-to-webpage generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebVR基准，用于评估多模态大模型（MLLMs）能否根据网页演示视频还原网页，填补了视频到网页生成领域基准空白。
AI.motivation: 目前网页生成基准仅以文本或截图为条件输入，忽略了视频中蕴含的交互流程、动画连续性等信息。因此，迫切需要针对视频生成网页的评测基准，推动该方向研究。
AI.method: 提出WebVR基准数据集，包含175个通过合成流程生成的网页演示视频，保证多样性且避免与已有网页重叠。设计了细粒度、对齐人类评判标准的视觉评分机制，用于多维度评价生成结果。
AI.result: 对19个模型实验发现，现有模型在复现网页细节风格与动画质量方面存在显著不足。所提出的自动化评价标准与人工评价结果有96%的匹配度。
AI.conclusion: WebVR数据集、评价工具及基线结果的发布，为视频到网页生成领域的研究提供了基础支撑，将促进模型能力提升与发展。

title: SemantiCache: Efficient KV Cache Compression via Semantic Chunking and Clustered Merging
summary: Existing KV cache compression methods generally operate on discrete tokens or non-semantic chunks. However, such approaches often lead to semantic fragmentation, where linguistically coherent units are disrupted, causing irreversible information loss and degradation in model performance. To address this, we introduce SemantiCache, a novel compression framework that preserves semantic integrity by aligning the compression process with the semantic hierarchical nature of language. Specifically, we first partition the cache into semantically coherent chunks by delimiters, which are natural semantic boundaries. Within each chunk, we introduce a computationally efficient Greedy Seed-Based Clustering (GSC) algorithm to group tokens into semantic clusters. These clusters are further merged into semantic cores, enhanced by a Proportional Attention mechanism that rebalances the reduced attention contributions of the merged tokens. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and models demonstrate that SemantiCache accelerates the decoding stage of inference by up to 2.61 times and substantially reduces memory footprint, while maintaining performance comparable to the original model.

AI.tldr: 针对KV缓存压缩中普遍存在的语义碎片化问题，提出SemantiCache，通过语义边界和聚类方法，有效压缩同时保持模型性能和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统KV缓存压缩方法按离散token或非语义分块进行，导致语义破碎和信息损失，影响模型推理效果。为避免这些问题，需要一种同时实现压缩和语义完整性的方案。
AI.method: SemantiCache框架首先通过自然语义边界将缓存划分为语义一致的片段。然后在每片段内应用高效的贪心种子聚类（GSC）算法，将token聚为语义簇。最后将簇进一步合并为语义核心，并引入比例注意力机制，平衡合并后token的注意力贡献。
AI.result: 在多个基准和模型上，SemantiCache可将推理解码阶段加速最多2.61倍，显著降低内存占用，并保持与原模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: SemantiCache能在不牺牲模型推理表现的情况下实现有效的KV缓存压缩，并解决了语义碎片化问题，有较好实用前景。

title: GelSphere: An Omnidirectional Rolling Vision-Based Tactile Sensor for Online 3D Reconstruction and Normal Force Estimation
summary: We present GelSphere, a spherical vision-based tactile sensor designed for real-time continuous surface scanning. Unlike traditional vision-based tactile sensors that can only sense locally and are damaged when slid across surfaces, and cylindrical tactile sensors that can only roll along a fixed direction, our design enables omnidirectional rolling on surfaces. We accomplish this through our novel sensing system design, which has steel balls inside the sensor, forming a bearing layer between the gel and the rigid housing that allows rolling motion in all axes. The sensor streams tactile images through Wi-Fi, with online large-surface reconstruction capabilities. We present quantitative results for both reconstruction accuracy and image fusion performance. The results show that our sensor maintains geometric fidelity and high reconstruction accuracy even under multi-directional rolling, enabling uninterrupted surface scanning.

AI.tldr: GelSphere是一种新型球形视觉触觉传感器，可实时进行全方向连续表面扫描，并通过Wi-Fi传输触觉图像，实现大面积表面重建。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉触觉传感器多只能在局部区域感知，且滑动时易损坏；而柱状传感器只能在固定方向滚动，灵活性受限，难以高效、无缝地进行大范围表面扫描。
AI.method: 采用创新的球形结构，传感器内置钢珠，在凝胶与外壳之间形成轴承层，使传感器可在各个方向自由滚动。触觉数据通过Wi-Fi实时传输，支持在线的大面积表面重建。
AI.result: 定量实验表明，该传感器在多方向滚动下仍能保持几何准确性和高重建精度，且图像融合性能优异，实现了连续、无缝的大面积表面扫描。
AI.conclusion: GelSphere突破了传统触觉传感器的局限，具备高灵活性与高精度，适用于实时大面积表面触觉感知，对机器人感知和表面检测有重要提升作用。

title: Comparative Analysis of Deep Learning Architectures for Multi-Disease Classification of Single-Label Chest X-rays
comment: 19 pages, 9 figures, 12 tables. Published in Charmo Journal of Natural Sciences and Technologies (CJNST), 2026
summary:
Chest X-ray imaging remains the primary diagnostic tool for pulmonary and cardiac disorders worldwide, yet its accuracy is hampered by radiologist shortages and inter-observer variability. This study presents a systematic comparative evaluation of seven deep learning architectures for multi-class chest disease classification: ConvNeXt-Tiny, DenseNet121, DenseNet201, ResNet50, ViT-B/16, EfficientNetV2-M, and MobileNetV2.
  A balanced dataset of 18,080 chest X-ray images spanning five disease categories (Cardiomegaly, COVID-19, Normal, Pneumonia, and Tuberculosis) was constructed from three public repositories and partitioned at the patient level to prevent data leakage. All models were trained under identical conditions using ImageNet-pretrained weights, standardized preprocessing, and consistent hyperparameters.
  All seven architectures exceeded 90% test accuracy. ConvNeXt-Tiny achieved the highest performance (92.31% accuracy, 95.70% AUROC), while MobileNetV2 emerged as the most parameter-efficient model (3.5M parameters, 90.42% accuracy, 94.10% AUROC), completing training in 48 minutes. Tuberculosis and COVID-19 classification was near-perfect (AUROC >= 99.97%) across all architectures, while Normal, Cardiomegaly, and Pneumonia presented greater challenges due to overlapping radiographic features. Grad-CAM visualizations confirmed clinically consistent attention patterns across disease categories.
