  These findings demonstrate that high-accuracy multi-disease chest X-ray classification is achievable without excessive computational resources, with important implications for AI-assisted diagnosis in both resource-rich and resource-constrained healthcare settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了七种深度学习网络在多类别肺部疾病X光片分类中的表现，发现高精度分类可在不依赖大量计算资源的情况下实现。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光是全球主要的肺部和心脏疾病诊断工具，但由于放射科医生短缺及判读一致性差，准确性受到限制。该研究旨在评估多种深度学习架构对提高X光片自动分类诊断能力的作用。
AI.method: 研究构建了包含18,080张X光图像的均衡数据集，涵盖心脏扩大、COVID-19、正常、肺炎和结核五类疾病，数据来自三个公开库。数据按患者分割，避免泄漏。所有模型均使用ImageNet预训练权重、标准化预处理和一致的超参数进行训练，对比了ConvNeXt-Tiny、DenseNet121、DenseNet201、ResNet50、ViT-B/16、EfficientNetV2-M和MobileNetV2七种架构。
AI.result: 所有模型测试准确率均超过90%。ConvNeXt-Tiny表现最佳（92.31%准确率，95.70% AUROC），MobileNetV2参数最少（3.5M，90.42%准确率，94.10% AUROC，48分钟训练完成）。结核和新冠分类表现几乎完美（AUROC ≥ 99.97%），而正常、心脏扩大和肺炎因影像表征重叠较难区分。Grad-CAM可视化显示模型关注区域与临床一致。
AI.conclusion: 多类胸部疾病X光智能分类在不同计算资源条件下均可获得较高准确性，对推动AI辅助诊断在全球不同医疗环境下应用具有重要意义。

title: Mind the Shift: Decoding Monetary Policy Stance from FOMC Statements with Large Language Models
summary: Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) statements are a major source of monetary-policy information, and even subtle changes in their wording can move global financial markets. A central task is therefore to measure the hawkish--dovish stance conveyed in these texts. Existing approaches typically treat stance detection as a standard classification problem, labeling each statement in isolation. However, the interpretation of monetary-policy communication is inherently relative: market reactions depend not only on the tone of a statement, but also on how that tone shifts across meetings. We introduce Delta-Consistent Scoring (DCS), an annotation-free framework that maps frozen large language model (LLM) representations to continuous stance scores by jointly modeling absolute stance and relative inter-meeting shifts. Rather than relying on manual hawkish--dovish labels, DCS uses consecutive meetings as a source of self-supervision. It learns an absolute stance score for each statement and a relative shift score between consecutive statements. A delta-consistency objective encourages changes in absolute scores to align with the relative shifts. This allows DCS to recover a temporally coherent stance trajectory without manual labels. Across four LLM backbones, DCS consistently outperforms supervised probes and LLM-as-judge baselines, achieving up to 71.1% accuracy on sentence-level hawkish--dovish classification. The resulting meeting-level scores are also economically meaningful: they correlate strongly with inflation indicators and are significantly associated with Treasury yield movements. Overall, the results suggest that LLM representations encode monetary-policy signals that can be recovered through relative temporal structure.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的无监督方法来测量美联储FOMC声明的鹰派与鸽派立场变化，无需手动标注，通过连续会议之间的相对变化自监督学习，大幅优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统鹰派-鸽派表态识别方法需对每份FOMC声明进行单独分类，但实际市场对声明的反应不仅受其本身态度影响，还取决于声明之间的相对变化。因此，需要一种能捕捉绝对与相对变化、且无需人工标注的方法。
AI.method: 提出Delta-Consistent Scoring (DCS) 框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）冻结表征，通过自监督学习同时建模每次声明的绝对立场得分与连续声明间的相对变化。DCS的核心是delta-consistency目标函数，鼓励绝对分数变化与相对变化一致，从而无需人工标签即可获得时序连贯的政策立场轨迹。
AI.result: DCS在四个不同的LLM基础上，鹰派-鸽派分类准确率最高达71.1%，显著优于传统的有监督探测和LLM-as-judge基线。最终分数与通胀指标、美国国债收益率变动等经济现实高度相关。
AI.conclusion: DCS框架可通过连续性结构有效挖掘LLM表征中的货币政策信号，为无监督金融文本分析提供新思路，显示出极大的实用价值。

title: H-RINS: Hierarchical Tightly-coupled Radar-Inertial Navigation via Smoothing and Mapping
summary: Millimeter-wave radar provides robust perception in visually degraded environments. However, radar-inertial state estimation is inherently susceptible to drift. Because radar yields only sparse, body-frame velocity measurements, it provides weak constraints on absolute orientation. Consequently, IMU biases remain poorly observable over the short time horizons typical of sliding-window filters. To address this fundamental observability challenge, we propose a tightly coupled, hierarchical radar-inertial factor graph framework. Our architecture decouples the estimation problem into a high-rate resetting graph and a persistent global graph. The resetting graph fuses IMU preintegration, radar velocities, and adaptive Zero-Velocity Updates (ZUPT) to generate the smooth, low-latency odometry required for real-time control. Concurrently, the persistent graph is a full-state factor graph maintaining the complete information of poses, velocities, and biases by fusing inertial data with keyframe-based geometric mapping and loop closures. Leveraging Incremental Smoothing and Mapping, the persistent graph can operate without explicit marginalization of variables, preserving their information while ensuring long-term bias observability. The cornerstone of our approach is a probabilistic tight-coupling mechanism: fully observable, optimized biases and their exact covariances are continuously injected from the persistent graph into the resetting graph's prior, effectively anchoring the high-rate estimator against integration drift. Extensive evaluations demonstrate our system achieves high accuracy with drift-reduced estimation at 27x real-time execution speeds. We release the implementation code and datasets upon the acceptance of the paper.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种分层紧耦合雷达-惯导因子图框架，用于提升毫米波雷达-惯导状态估计的准确性和抗漂移能力，通过高效的分层估计实现了低延迟、高精度与长期可观测性兼具的状态估计系统。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达在低能见度环境下有可靠感知能力，但与惯性测量单元（IMU）结合时，由于雷达只提供稀疏的自身体坐标速度，导致对绝对姿态的约束较弱，IMU偏置在短时滑动窗口中难以观测并校正，容易造成估计漂移，因此亟需解决惯导偏置的长期可观测性问题。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个分层的、紧耦合的因子图架构，包括高频重置图（融合IMU预积分、雷达速度与自适应高频零速度更新，用于生成平滑低延迟的里程计）与持久全局图（融合惯导与关键帧几何建图、回环检测，完整管理位姿、速度和偏置信息，并利用增量平滑与建图保证变量信息不丢失）。两层图通过概率化紧耦合，将全局图优化过的偏置及精确协方差作为先验不断反馈给高频重置图，有效抑制积分漂移。
AI.result: 系统能够实现27倍实时速度下的高精度、低漂移状态估计。大量实验显示该方案在精度和鲁棒性上具备显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 分层紧耦合因子图能够同时满足机器人实时控制的低延迟需求和长期运行的高精度需求，有效解决了雷达-惯性状态估计系统中的漂移与偏置观测难题。相关代码和数据集将在论文录用后公开。

authors: Bas H. M. van der Velden
title: Colony Grounded SAM2: Zero-shot detection and segmentation of bacterial colonies using foundation models
summary: The detection and classification of bacterial colonies in images of agar-plates is important in microbiology, but is hindered by the lack of labeled datasets. Therefore, we propose Colony Grounded SAM2, a zero-shot inference pipeline to detect and segment bacterial colonies in multiple settings without any further training. By utilizing the pre-trained foundation models Grounding DINO and Segment Anything Model 2, fine-tuned to the microbiological domain, we developed a model that is robust to data changes. Results showed a mean Average Precision of 93.1\% and a $Dice@detection$ score of 0.85, showing excellent detection and segmentation capabilities on out-of-distribution datasets. The entire pipeline with model weights are shared open access to aid with annotation- and classification purposes in microbiology.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了Colony Grounded SAM2，一个可以在零样本条件下检测和分割琼脂平板细菌菌落的推理流程，并取得了优异的效果。
AI.motivation: 细菌菌落图像的自动检测和分类对微生物学有重要意义，但由于缺乏标注数据，目前研究受到限制。
AI.method: 该方法利用预训练的基础模型Grounding DINO和Segment Anything Model 2，并在微生物领域进行微调，开发出对数据变化具有鲁棒性的零样本推断模型，无需进一步训练即可在多种场景下使用。
AI.result: 模型在不同数据集上的平均准确率达到93.1%，Dice@detection得分为0.85，显示出优异的检测和分割性能，尤其是在分布外（OOD）数据集上。
AI.conclusion: Colony Grounded SAM2能够高效、准确地检测和分割细菌菌落，并且全部流程及模型权重开放共享，助力微生物学领域的标注与分类工作。

title: Motivation in Large Language Models
summary: Motivation is a central driver of human behavior, shaping decisions, goals, and task performance. As large language models (LLMs) become increasingly aligned with human preferences, we ask whether they exhibit something akin to motivation. We examine whether LLMs "report" varying levels of motivation, how these reports relate to their behavior, and whether external factors can influence them. Our experiments reveal consistent and structured patterns that echo human psychology: self-reported motivation aligns with different behavioral signatures, varies across task types, and can be modulated by external manipulations. These findings demonstrate that motivation is a coherent organizing construct for LLM behavior, systematically linking reports, choices, effort, and performance, and revealing motivational dynamics that resemble those documented in human psychology. This perspective deepens our understanding of model behavior and its connection to human-inspired concepts.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）是否表现出类似人类的“动机”。通过实验发现，LLM在动机自报告、行为表现和外部影响下展示出类似人类心理的有组织性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 动机是影响人类行为的重要因素，随着LLM在人类偏好对齐方面表现提升，研究者希望了解LLM是否也表现出某种“动机”。
AI.method: 通过实验分析LLM在不同任务下的动机自报告与其行为表现（选择、努力、绩效等）的关联，同时考察外部操作对LLM动机的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，LLM在自报告的动机与行为表现之间存在结构化和一致性的模式，这些模式可被外部操作调节，且不同任务类型的动机表现有所差异。
AI.conclusion: LLM的行为能够系统化地用动机这一心理学概念来组织和解释，其动机制具有类似于人类心理学的动力学特征，这为理解模型行为及其与人类概念的联系提供了新视角。

title: TransCurriculum: Multi-Dimensional Curriculum Learning for Fast & Stable Locomotion
summary: High-speed legged locomotion struggles with stability and transfer losses at higher command velocities during deployment. One reason is that most curricula vary difficulty along single axis, for example increase the range of command velocities, terrain difficulty, or domain parameters (e.g. friction or payload mass) using either fixed update rule or instantaneous rewards while ignoring how the history of robot training has evolved. We propose TransCurriculum, a transformer-based multi-dimensional curriculum learning approach for agile quadrupedal locomotion. TransCurriculum adapts to 3 axes, velocity command targets, terrain difficulty, and domain randomization parameters (friction and payload mass). Rather than feeding task reward history directly into the low-level control policy, our formulation exploits it at the curriculum level. A transformer-based teacher retrieves the sequence of rewards and uses it to predict future rewards, success rate, and learning progress to guide expansion of this multidimensional curriculum towards high performing task bins. Finally we validate our approach on the Unitree Go1 robot in simulation (Isaac Gym) and deploy it zero-shot on Go1 hardware. Our TransCurriculum policy achieves a maximum velocity of 6.3 m/s in simulation and outperforms prior curriculum baselines. We tested our TransCurriculum trained policy on terrains (carpets, slopes, tiles, concrete), achieving a forward velocity of 4.1 m/s on carpet surpassing the fastest curriculum methods by 18.8% and achieves maximum zero-shot value among all tested methods. Our multi-dimensional curriculum also reduces the transfer loss to 18% from 27% for command only curriculum, demonstrating the benefits of joint training over velocity, terrain and domain randomization dimension while keeping the task success rate of 80-90% on rigid indoor and outdoor surfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransCurriculum，一种基于transformer的多维课程学习方法，显著提升了四足机器人在高速行走任务中的表现和泛化能力。通过多维训练（速度、地形、参数扰动），实现了更高的速度和更低的迁移损失。
AI.motivation: 高速度下四足机器人的稳定性和迁移性能受限，主要原因是传统课程学习仅单维度调整任务难度，忽略历史训练过程信息及多维度组合。为此，急需方法能更全面、动态地适应多维训练参数，提高泛化与实际部署性能。
AI.method: 提出TransCurriculum，通过transformer架构，把机器人训练过程中的奖励序列输入教师网络，预测未来表现以动态扩展多维课程（速度、地形、域参数如摩擦和载重），指导智能体跨多任务高效学习。训练在Isaac Gym仿真环境，零样本部署在Unitree Go1机器人上。
AI.result: TransCurriculum在仿真中达6.3m/s最高速度，实地部署于多种地形，地毯上前进速度达4.1m/s，较最佳课程基线快18.8%。多维课程法迁移损失从27%降至18%，在各类地形80-90%任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 多维课程结合transformer显著提升四足机器人对任务的泛化与高速行走能力，优于现有单一课程基线，为多环境高性能机器人部署奠定基础。

title: Language-Guided Token Compression with Reinforcement Learning in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial inference costs due to the processing of a vast number of visual tokens. Existing methods typically struggle to model progressive visual token reduction as a multi-step decision process with sequential dependencies and often rely on hand-engineered scoring rules that lack adaptive optimization for complex reasoning trajectories. To overcome these limitations, we propose TPRL, a reinforcement learning framework that learns adaptive pruning trajectories through language-guided sequential optimization tied directly to end-task performance. We formulate visual token pruning as a sequential decision process with explicit state transitions and employ a self-supervised autoencoder to compress visual tokens into a compact state representation for efficient policy learning. The pruning policy is initialized through learning from demonstrations and subsequently fine-tuned using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to jointly optimize task accuracy and computational efficiency. Our experimental results demonstrate that TPRL removes up to 66.7\% of visual tokens and achieves up to a 54.2\% reduction in FLOPs during inference while maintaining a near-lossless average accuracy drop of only 0.7\%. Code is released at \href{https://github.com/MagicVicCoder/TPRL}{\textcolor{mypink}{https://github.com/MagicVicCoder/TPRL}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TPRL，一种通过强化学习自适应剪枝视觉token的方法，有效降低大规模视觉语言模型（LVLMs）推理成本，同时维持准确率基本不变。
AI.motivation: LVLMs推理成本高，原因在于处理大量视觉token。现有剪枝方法难以建模逐步的token减少过程，并且大多依赖人工经验，优化不足。作者希望寻找一种既高效又自适应的剪枝策略。
AI.method: 作者将视觉token剪枝建模为有序决策过程。首先用自监督自编码器将视觉token压缩为紧凑的状态表达，便于高效policy学习。通过示范学习初始化剪枝策略，再通过PPO强化学习优化，使其在准确性和计算量两方面均表现优异，剪枝过程由语言引导优化。
AI.result: TPRL最多可剪除66.7%的visual token，FLOPs最多降低54.2%，平均准确率只下降0.7%。
AI.conclusion: TPRL能够大幅降低LVLMs的计算量，实现几乎无损的准确率，在实际推理中具有广阔应用前景。

title: Exposing Long-Tail Safety Failures in Large Language Models through Efficient Diverse Response Sampling
summary: Safety tuning through supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning from human feedback has substantially improved the robustness of large language models (LLMs). However, it often suppresses rather than eliminates unsafe behaviors, leaving rare but critical failures hidden in the long tail of the output distribution. While most red-teaming work emphasizes adversarial prompt search (input-space optimization), we show that safety failures can also be systematically exposed through diverse response generation (output-space exploration) for a fixed safety-critical prompt, where increasing the number and diversity of sampled responses can drive jailbreak success rates close to unity. To efficiently uncover such failures, we propose Progressive Diverse Population Sampling (PDPS), which combines stochastic token-level sampling with diversity-aware selection to explore a large candidate pool of responses and retain a compact, semantically diverse subset. Across multiple jailbreak benchmarks and open-source LLMs, PDPS achieves attack success rates comparable to large-scale IID sampling while using only 8% to 29% of the computational cost. Under limited-response settings, it improves success rates by 26% to 40% over IID sampling and Diverse Beam Search. Furthermore, responses generated by PDPS exhibit both a higher number and greater diversity of unsafe outputs, demonstrating its effectiveness in uncovering a broader range of failures.

AI.tldr: 现有的安全性微调和人类反馈强化学习虽提升了大模型鲁棒性，但无法彻底消除长尾的安全隐患。本文提出了一种新方法，通过多样化回答采样显著揭示这些隐患，并提出高效采样方法PDPS大幅提升检测成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前安全优化往往只能减少、不能完全消除LLM的不安全行为，尤其是罕见但影响重大的长尾失败。传统方法侧重在输入端做对抗性测试，而对输出空间的广泛探索不足。本文试图解决如何更有效地发现和揭露这些被隐藏的不安全输出。
AI.method: 作者分别从不同固定敏感提示出发，通过多样化输出采样，系统性探索LLM的输出空间。提出Progressive Diverse Population Sampling（PDPS）方法，结合随机采样与多样性筛选，构建并保留一组语义丰富且多样的输出，用以高效发现不安全响应。
AI.result: PDPS在多个破解基准测试及开源LLM上，达到类似大规模独立同分布采样的破解成功率，仅消耗8%-29%的计算资源。在受限响应量设置下，比IID采样和Diverse Beam Search提升破解成功率26%-40%。PDPS生成的不安全响应不仅数量更多，类型也更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 输出空间的多样性采样是揭示LLM长尾安全风险的有效工具。PDPS可高效且大幅提升不安全输出检测率，为大模型安全性评估和改进提供了更优策略。

title: See, Learn, Assist: Safe and Self-Paced Robotic Rehabilitation via Video-Based Learning from Demonstration
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel framework that allows therapists to teach robot-assisted rehabilitation exercises remotely via RGB-D video. Our system encodes demonstrations as 6-DoF body-centric trajectories using Cartesian Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs), ensuring accurate posture-independent spatial generalization across diverse patient anatomies. Crucially, we execute these trajectories through a decoupled hybrid control architecture that constructs a spatially compliant virtual tunnel, paired with an effort-based temporal dilation mechanism. This architecture is applied to three distinct rehabilitation modalities: Passive, Active-Assisted, and Active-Resistive, by dynamically linking the exercise's execution phase to the patient's tangential force contribution. To guarantee safety, a Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR) model is learned on-the-fly from the patient's own limb. This allows the detection of abnormal interaction forces and, if necessary, reverses the trajectory to prevent injury. Experimental validation demonstrates the system's precision, achieving an average trajectory reproduction error of 3.7cm and a range of motion (ROM) error of 5.5 degrees. Furthermore, dynamic interaction trials confirm that the controller successfully enforces effort-based progression while maintaining strict spatial path adherence against human disturbances.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于RGB-D视频的远程机器人辅助康复训练框架，实现治疗师远程教学和安全、精确的运动指导。
AI.motivation: 远程康复训练需求与日俱增，如何让治疗师有效引导患者且保证运动的个性化和安全性，是提升机器人辅助康复服务质量的关键。
AI.method: 使用RGB-D视频采集演示动作，通过笛卡尔动态运动基元（DMPs）编码为6自由度轨迹，结合虚拟通道与时域拉伸的混合控制架构，适应不同康复模式（被动、主动辅助、主动抗阻），并利用高斯混合回归对患者实施力反馈安全监测。
AI.result: 实验显示系统轨迹重现误差平均3.7厘米，关节活动范围误差5.5度，动态互动试验下实现了力主导的个性化训练和精确路线追踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了远程机器人辅助康复训练中的个性化、安全性和精确性，验证了其在多种康复模式中的有效性和临床应用潜力。

title: COT-FM: Cluster-wise Optimal Transport Flow Matching
summary: We introduce COT-FM, a general framework that reshapes the probability path in Flow Matching (FM) to achieve faster and more reliable generation. FM models often produce curved trajectories due to random or batchwise couplings, which increase discretization error and reduce sample quality. COT-FM fixes this by clustering target samples and assigning each cluster a dedicated source distribution obtained by reversing pretrained FM models. This divide-and-conquer strategy yields more accurate local transport and significantly straighter vector fields, all without changing the model architecture. As a plug-and-play approach, COT-FM consistently accelerates sampling and improves generation quality across 2D datasets, image generation benchmarks, and robotic manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: COT-FM是一种用于加快生成速度和提高生成质量的通用框架，通过对流匹配（FM）中的概率路径进行重塑，实现更高效、可靠的采样和生成。
AI.motivation: 现有FM模型经常因为轨迹弯曲（通常由随机或批处理耦合造成）导致离散化误差增大和样本质量下降。
AI.method: COT-FM通过聚类目标样本，并为每个聚类分配一个专属源分布（通过逆转预训练FM模型得到），采用分而治之的策略来实现更准确的局部传输和更直的向量场，不需要更改模型结构，可直接集成到现有流程中。
AI.result: COT-FM在2D数据集、图像生成测试以及机器人操作等任务中，明显加速采样过程并且提升生成质量。
AI.conclusion: COT-FM作为即插即用的方法，为FM生成模型提供了速度和质量上的显著提升，具有通用性和实用价值。

title: Extending Minimal Pairs with Ordinal Surprisal Curves and Entropy Across Applied Domains
summary: The minimal pairs paradigm of comparing model probabilities for contrasting completions has proven useful for evaluating linguistic knowledge in language models, yet its application has largely been confined to binary grammaticality judgments over syntactic phenomena. Additionally, standard prompting-based evaluation requires expensive text generation, may elicit post-hoc rationalizations rather than model judgments, and discards information about model uncertainty. We address both limitations by extending surprisal-based evaluation from binary grammaticality contrasts to ordinal-scaled classification and scoring tasks across multiple domains. Rather than asking models to generate answers, we measure the information-theoretic "surprise" (negative log probability) they assign to each position on rating scales (e.g., 1-5 or 1-9), yielding full surprisal curves that reveal both the model's preferred response and its uncertainty via entropy. We explore this framework across four domains: social-ecological-technological systems classification, causal statement identification (binary and scaled), figurative language detection, and deductive qualitative coding. Across these domains, surprisal curves produce interpretable classification signals with clear minima near expected ordinal scale positions, and entropy over the completion tended to distinguish genuinely ambiguous items from easier items.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将最小对比范式中的'惊讶度'(surprisal)评估方法拓展至序数分级任务，通过对各类评分尺度位置的负对数概率进行分析，以取代传统的生成式判断方法，实现对多领域任务的高效、直观模型评估。
AI.motivation: 最小对比范式多被用于句法二分类的判断任务，且传统基于生成的评测方式成本高、评估结果易受启发性响应影响，并忽略了不确定性信息。因此，有必要发展一种能在多领域、序数类任务中高效利用语言模型概率分布、不依赖生成拼接的评测框架。
AI.method: 作者提出基于'惊讶度'(surprisal)的原理，对模型在不同评分尺度（如1-5、1-9）上各选项的概率取负对数，形成完整的概率-评分曲线（surprisal curve）。通过这种信息论度量，不用让模型生成答案，而是通过概率分布直接评估模型对答案的偏好及不确定性。该方法在四个多样任务领域进行了实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证明，在社会-生态-技术系统分类、因果语句识别、修辞语言判别及定性编码等任务中，'惊讶度曲线'显示了模型的明确偏好（曲线极小值靠近正确答案），并且熵指标反映了模型对模糊/简单样例的区分能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过量化序数评分每类位置的惊讶度和不确定性，展现了模型在各种评分类任务中的表现与信心，弥补了传统二元判别和生成评测的不足，为多领域模型能力评估提供了更直观高效的新途径。

title: Towards Equitable Robotic Furnishing Agents for Aging-in-Place: ADL-Grounded Design Exploration
comment: Accepted at the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) 2026 Workshop: Equitable Robotics for Wellbeing (Eq-RW)
summary: In aging-in-place contexts, small difficulties in Activities of Daily Living (ADL) can accumulate, affecting well-being through fatigue, anxiety, reduced autonomy, and safety risks. This position paper argues that robotics for older adult wellbeing must move beyond "convenience features" and centre equity, justice, and responsibility. We conducted ADL-grounded semi-structured interviews with four adults in their 70s-80s, identifying recurrent challenges (finding/ organising items, taking medication, and transporting objects) and deriving requirements to reduce compounded cognitive-physical burden. Based on these insights, we propose an in-home robotic furnishing-agent concept leveraging computer vision and generative AI and LLMs for natural-language interaction, context-aware reminders, safe actuation, and user-centred transparency. We then report video-stimulated follow-up interviews with the same participants, highlighting preferences for confirmation before actuation, predictability, adjustable speed/autonomy, and multimodal feedback, as well as equity-related concerns. We conclude with open questions on evaluating and deploying equitable robotic wellbeing systems in real homes.

AI.tldr: 本文关注如何利用机器人技术帮助老年人在家自主生活，强调技术开发须考虑公平、正义与责任。通过对高龄老人进行访谈，总结出日常困难，并据此提出基于AI与自然语言交互的家用机器人概念。
AI.motivation: 老年人在日常生活中常因小困难积累而影响身心健康和安全。目前机器人产品多侧重“便捷性”，忽视了脆弱群体实际需求与社会公平问题，亟需转变技术研发视角。
AI.method: 作者进行以日常生活活动为基础的半结构化访谈，发现老人频繁遇到物品查找、吃药和搬运困难。随后采集需求，设计AI驱动的家用机器人家具原型，并通过视频刺激法回访受访者，收集其对机器人交互细节和公平性的反馈。
AI.result: 发现老人对操作可控性、可预测性、多模态反馈以及隐私与公平的担忧尤为关注。机器人需在感知、提醒和执行动作过程中，提供清晰透明的交互与保障机制。
AI.conclusion: 文章呼吁未来助老机器人系统在设计和部署时更注重公平性、责任和平等参与，并提出相关公开研究问题。

title: SERUM: Simple, Efficient, Robust, and Unifying Marking for Diffusion-based Image Generation
summary: We propose SERUM: an intriguingly simple yet highly effective method for marking images generated by diffusion models (DMs). We only add a unique watermark noise to the initial diffusion generation noise and train a lightweight detector to identify watermarked images, simplifying and unifying the strengths of prior approaches. SERUM provides robustness against any image augmentations or watermark removal attacks and is extremely efficient, all while maintaining negligible impact on image quality. In contrast to prior approaches, which are often only resilient to limited perturbations and incur significant training, injection, and detection costs, our SERUM achieves remarkable performance, with the highest true positive rate (TPR) at a 1% false positive rate (FPR) in most scenarios, along with fast injection and detection and low detector training overhead. Its decoupled architecture also seamlessly supports multiple users by embedding individualized watermarks with little interference between the marks. Overall, our method provides a practical solution to mark outputs from DMs and to reliably distinguish generated from natural images.

AI.tldr: SERUM是一种为扩散模型生成的图像打水印的高效方法，仅需在初始噪声中嵌入水印并用一个轻量级检测器识别，兼具强鲁棒性与极低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型生成图像难以与真实图像区分，目前现有水印方法要么效果有限、易受扰动，要么成本高昂，亟需一种高效、可靠且实用的新方法。
AI.method: SERUM方法在扩散模型生成的初始噪声中加入特定水印噪声，并训练一个轻量级检测器用于检测带有水印的图片，其结构解耦支持多用户各自水印且互不干扰。
AI.result: SERUM方法在绝大多数场景下以1%误报率下获得最高的真实检测率，且耐受任何图像增强与水印去除攻击，水印注入和检测速度快，检测器训练负担低，对图像质量影响极小。
AI.conclusion: SERUM能够实用地对扩散模型输出打标记，高效区分生成图像和自然图像，为现有方法提供高鲁棒性与低代价的优异替代解决方案。

title: BiT-MCTS: A Theme-based Bidirectional MCTS Approach to Chinese Fiction Generation
summary: Generating long-form linear fiction from open-ended themes remains a major challenge for large language models, which frequently fail to guarantee global structure and narrative diversity when using premise-based or linear outlining approaches. We present BiT-MCTS, a theme-driven framework that operationalizes a "climax-first, bidirectional expansion" strategy motivated by Freytag's Pyramid. Given a theme, our method extracts a core dramatic conflict and generates an explicit climax, then employs a bidirectional Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to expand the plot backward (rising action, exposition) and forward (falling action, resolution) to produce a structured outline. A final generation stage realizes a complete narrative from the refined outline. We construct a Chinese theme corpus for evaluation and conduct extensive experiments across three contemporary LLM backbones. Results show that BiT-MCTS improves narrative coherence, plot structure, and thematic depth relative to strong baselines, while enabling substantially longer, more coherent stories according to automatic metrics and human judgments.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种生成长篇线性小说的新方法BiT-MCTS，以解决大模型小说生成中结构松散和情节单一的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有主题驱动或线性结构的文本生成方法，难以保障小说的整体结构性和叙事多样性，尤其在生成长篇小说时这一问题突出。
AI.method: 提出BiT-MCTS框架，受到Freytag戏剧五段式结构启发。该方法首先根据主题提取核心冲突并生成高潮节点，然后利用双向蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）向前与向后扩展（包括起、承、转、合的各阶段），最后基于完善提纲生成完整小说。
AI.result: 基于自建中文主题语料和多个大语言模型，实验证明BiT-MCTS在自动评价与人工评价中，在叙事连贯性、情节结构与主题深度方面均优于现有主流基线方法，并能有效生成更长、更具结构感的故事。
AI.conclusion: BiT-MCTS为主题驱动的长篇小说自动生成提供了一种有效新途径，改善了内容连贯性与结构性，有望推动大模型叙事能力的进一步提升。

title: Navigation beyond Wayfinding: Robots Collaborating with Visually Impaired Users for Environmental Interactions
comment: Accepted to ACM/IEEE HRI 2026, 10 pages, 6 figures
summary: Robotic guidance systems have shown promise in supporting blind and visually impaired (BVI) individuals with wayfinding and obstacle avoidance. However, most existing systems assume a clear path and do not support a critical aspect of navigation - environmental interactions that require manipulating objects to enable movement. These interactions are challenging for a human-robot pair because they demand (i) precise localization and manipulation of interaction targets (e.g., pressing elevator buttons) and (ii) dynamic coordination between the user's and robot's movements (e.g., pulling out a chair to sit). We present a collaborative human-robot approach that combines our robotic guide dog's precise sensing and localization capabilities with the user's ability to perform physical manipulation. The system alternates between two modes: lead mode, where the robot detects and guides the user to the target, and adaptation mode, where the robot adjusts its motion as the user interacts with the environment (e.g., opening a door). Evaluation results show that our system enables navigation that is safer, smoother, and more efficient than both a traditional white cane and a non-adaptive guiding system, with the performance gap widening as tasks demand higher precision in locating interaction targets. These findings highlight the promise of human-robot collaboration in advancing assistive technologies toward more generalizable and realistic navigation support.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合机器人引导犬与用户协作的辅助系统，不仅能引导盲人和视障者导航，还能辅助环境交互（如按电梯按钮、拉椅子），显著提升导航安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人导航系统，多数仅关注引导用户通过无障碍路径，忽略了对实际需要操作物体（如开门、按键等交互）的支持，而这些是真实导航情境下的关键需求。
AI.method: 设计了一套协作系统：机器人犬负责环境感知及定位引导，用户专注于实际物理操作。系统动态切换两种模式：引导（lead）模式下，机器人定位目标并带领用户接近；适应（adaptation）模式下，机器人配合用户的环境交互动作调整自身运动。
AI.result: 实验证明，该系统在导航安全性、平顺性、效率等方面，均优于传统白手杖及普通（不可自适应）导航系统，尤其是在高精度定位目标任务中优势更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作的导航和环境交互方式，为辅助技术的发展提供了更为通用且贴合实际需求的解决思路，有助于实际提升视障者的独立出行能力。

title: TennisExpert: Towards Expert-Level Analytical Sports Video Understanding
summary: Tennis is one of the most widely followed sports, generating extensive broadcast footage with strong potential for professional analysis, automated coaching, and real-time commentary. However, automatic tennis understanding remains underexplored due to two key challenges: (1) the lack of large-scale benchmarks with fine-grained annotations and expert-level commentary, and (2) the difficulty of building accurate yet efficient multimodal systems suitable for real-time deployment. To address these challenges, we introduce TennisVL, a large-scale tennis benchmark comprising over 200 professional matches (471.9 hours) and 40,000+ rally-level clips. Unlike existing commentary datasets that focus on descriptive play-by-play narration, TennisVL emphasizes expert analytical commentary capturing tactical reasoning, player decisions, and match momentum. Furthermore, we propose TennisExpert, a multimodal tennis understanding framework that integrates a video semantic parser with a memory-augmented model built on Qwen3-VL-8B. The parser extracts key match elements (e.g., scores, shot sequences, ball bounces, and player locations), while hierarchical memory modules capture both short- and long-term temporal context. Experiments show that TennisExpert consistently outperforms strong proprietary baselines, including GPT-5, Gemini, and Claude, and demonstrates improved ability to capture tactical context and match dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TennisVL大规模网球数据集和TennisExpert多模态网球理解系统，显著提升了比赛战术和动态分析能力，超越了多种主流大模型。
AI.motivation: 网球赛事分析有非常高的专业及市场价值，但现有自动化分析系统受限于缺乏大规模细粒度标注数据集和难以高效实时理解多模态比赛数据。
AI.method: 作者构建了TennisVL数据集，涵盖200多场职业比赛和4万多段回合级裁剪，注重专家式战术解说标注。同时，提出TennisExpert框架，结合视频语义解析器和Qwen3-VL-8B基础的带分层记忆的多模态模型，用于提取比赛关键要素（如比分、击球序列、球落点和球员位置）并建模短/长期时序上下文。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，TennisExpert在网球战术和比赛动态理解上，一致优于GPT-5、Gemini和Claude等强大专有模型，尤其在捕捉战术语境和比赛进程方面表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为网球自动化理解提供了高质量基准和高效解决方案，为智能分析、自动教学和赛事解说等应用奠定了基础，也推进了多模态体育理解技术的发展。

title: Creative Convergence or Imitation? Genre-Specific Homogeneity in LLM-Generated Chinese Literature
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in narrative generation. However, they often produce structurally homogenized stories, frequently following repetitive arrangements and combinations of plot events along with stereotypical resolutions. In this paper, we propose a novel theoretical framework for analysis by incorporating Proppian narratology and narrative functions. This framework is used to analyze the composition of narrative texts generated by LLMs to uncover their underlying narrative logic. Taking Chinese web literature as our research focus, we extend Propp's narrative theory, defining 34 narrative functions suited to modern web narrative structures. We further construct a human-annotated corpus to support the analysis of narrative structures within LLM-generated text. Experiments reveal that the primary reasons for the singular narrative logic and severe homogenization in generated texts are that current LLMs are unable to correctly comprehend the meanings of narrative functions and instead adhere to rigid narrative generation paradigms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用扩展的Propp叙事理论分析LLM生成文本的叙事结构，发现LLM生成的故事结构同质化严重，主因在于其无法理解叙事功能的深层含义。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在叙事生成上能力突出，但其生成的故事往往结构单一、情节套路化，缺乏多样性和创新。为此，作者希望揭示这种同质化的根源并分析其机制。
AI.method: 作者提出一个结合Propp叙事学和叙事功能的分析理论框架，针对中文网络文学拓展了Propp理论，定义了34个适用于当代网络文学的叙事功能，并构建人工标注的语料库，对LLM生成文本进行叙事结构分析。
AI.result: 实验揭示，LLM生成文本的叙事单一和严重同质化，主要原因是LLM无法正确理解和灵活运用叙事功能，只能机械地套用现有叙事范式。
AI.conclusion: 要提升LLM的故事生成能力，需增强其对于叙事功能的理解，而非单纯优化生成流程，否则将持续面临结构同质化问题。

title: A Real-Time Neuro-Symbolic Ethical Governor for Safe Decision Control in Autonomous Robotic Manipulation
summary: Ethical decision governance has become a critical requirement for autonomous robotic systems operating in human-centered and safety-sensitive environments. This paper presents a real-time neuro-symbolic ethical governor designed to enable risk-aware supervisory control in autonomous robotic manipulation tasks. The proposed framework integrates transformer-based ethical reasoning with a probabilistic ethical risk field formulation and a threshold-based override control mechanism. language-grounded ethical intent inference capability is learned from natural language task descriptions using a fine-tuned DistilBERT model trained on the ETHICS commonsense dataset. A continuous ethical risk metric is subsequently derived from predicted unsafe action probability, confidence uncertainty, and probabilistic variance to support adaptive decision filtering. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated through simulated autonomous robot-arm task scenarios involving varying levels of human proximity and operational hazard. Experimental results demonstrate stable model convergence, reliable ethical risk discrimination, and improved safety-aware decision outcomes without significant degradation of task execution efficiency. The proposed neuro-symbolic architecture further provides enhanced interpretability compared with purely data-driven safety filters, enabling transparent ethical reasoning in real-time control loops. The findings suggest that ethical decision governance can be effectively modeled as a dynamic supervisory risk layer for autonomous robotic systems, with potential applicability to broader cyber-physical and assistive robotics domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时神经符号伦理治理体系，实现自主机器人操作时具备风险感知和伦理监督能力。通过集成Transformer伦理推理、概率伦理风险场和基于阈值的控制机制，使机器人任务更安全可靠。
AI.motivation: 随着自主机器人在以人为中心和高安全敏感领域的广泛应用，伦理决策治理成为关键需求。现有纯数据驱动方法缺乏可解释性和实时性，难以应对复杂伦理情境，迫切需要融合推理与概率风险建模的解决方案。
AI.method: 该方法将Transformer基础的伦理推理与概率性伦理风险场及阈值覆盖控制相结合。采用基于ETHICS常识数据集微调的DistilBERT模型，从自然语言任务描述中推断伦理意图，并结合置信度和不确定性的概率性度量，得出连续伦理风险指标，实现自适应决策过滤。
AI.result: 通过人机距离和风险水平不同的机器人臂模拟任务实验，验证该方法在模型收敛、伦理风险判别和安全感知决策效果上的优越性，且对任务效率影响有限。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号伦理治理框架能为自主机器人系统实现动态监管层，提升伦理决策可解释性与安全性，具备向更广泛自动化和助理机器人领域扩展的潜力。

title: Qianfan-OCR: A Unified End-to-End Model for Document Intelligence
summary: We present Qianfan-OCR, a 4B-parameter end-to-end vision-language model that unifies document parsing, layout analysis, and document understanding within a single architecture. It performs direct image-to-Markdown conversion and supports diverse prompt-driven tasks including table extraction, chart understanding, document QA, and key information extraction. To address the loss of explicit layout analysis in end-to-end OCR, we propose Layout-as-Thought, an optional thinking phase triggered by special think tokens that generates structured layout representations -- bounding boxes, element types, and reading order -- before producing final outputs, recovering layout grounding capabilities while improving accuracy on complex layouts. Qianfan-OCR ranks first among end-to-end models on OmniDocBench v1.5 (93.12) and OlmOCR Bench (79.8), achieves competitive results on OCRBench, CCOCR, DocVQA, and ChartQA against general VLMs of comparable scale, and attains the highest average score on public key information extraction benchmarks, surpassing Gemini-3.1-Pro, Seed-2.0, and Qwen3-VL-235B. The model is publicly accessible via the Baidu AI Cloud Qianfan platform.

AI.tldr: Qianfan-OCR是一个端到端视觉-语言模型，支持从图像直接生成Markdown，统一实现文档解析、布局分析和理解，并在多个国际评测中取得领先成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR模型通常依赖分步处理，缺乏对复杂文档布局的有效分析与统一处理能力，特别是在端到端建模中，显式布局信息很容易丢失，影响整体性能。
AI.method: 提出Qianfan-OCR，一个拥有40亿参数的端到端视觉-语言模型，支持多样化的文档理解任务。创新性地引入了'Layout-as-Thought'机制，在生成最终输出前，通过特殊think tokens显式推理文档结构（如边界框、元素类型和阅读顺序），从而兼顾布局分析与下游任务精度。
AI.result: Qianfan-OCR在OmniDocBench v1.5（93.12分）和OlmOCR Bench（79.8分）等主流评测中取得端到端模型第一；在OCRBench、CCOCR、DocVQA和ChartQA等任务上表现优异；在关键信息抽取基准总体成绩领先Gemini-3.1-Pro、Seed-2.0和Qwen3-VL-235B等大规模VLM。
AI.conclusion: Qianfan-OCR有效统一了文档解析、布局分析与理解，并通过创新的布局思考机制提升了复杂文档场景下的精度，在多项国际评测中表现突出，具有良好的实用和研究价值。

title: Echoes Across Centuries: Phonetic Signatures of Persian Poets
summary:
This study examines phonetic texture in Persian poetry as a literary-historical phenomenon rather than a by-product of meter or a feature used only for classification. The analysis draws on a large corpus of 1,116,306 mesras from 31,988 poems written by 83 poets, restricted to five major classical meters to enable controlled comparison. Each line is converted into a grapheme-to-phoneme representation and analyzed using six phonetic metrics: hardness, sonority, sibilance, vowel ratio, phoneme entropy, and consonant-cluster ratio.
  Statistical models estimate poet-level differences while controlling for meter, poetic form, and line length. The results show that although meter and form explain a substantial portion of phonetic variation, they do not eliminate systematic differences between poets. Persian poetic sound therefore appears as conditioned variation within shared prosodic structures rather than as either purely individual style or simple metrical residue.
  A multidimensional stylistic map reveals several recurrent phonetic profiles, including high-sonority lyric styles, hardness-driven rhetorical or epic styles, sibilant mystical contours, and high-entropy complex textures. Historical analysis indicates that phonetic distributions shift across centuries, reflecting changes in genre prominence, literary institutions, and performance contexts rather than abrupt stylistic breaks.
  The study establishes a corpus-scale framework for phonetic analysis in Persian poetry and demonstrates how computational phonetics can contribute to literary-historical interpretation while remaining attentive to the formal structures that shape Persian verse.

AI.tldr: 本文大规模量化分析了波斯诗歌的音系特征，发现音韵并非单纯由格律或形式决定，而是诗人风格与历史变迁的重要组成。
AI.motivation: 此前对波斯诗歌中的音韵特质，多被视为格律副产品或风格分类工具，缺乏系统性和历史性的大规模量化分析。本文希望通过数据驱动的方法，揭示音韵特征在诗歌中的实际分布及其历史演变意义。
AI.method: 收集83位诗人共31988首诗、1116306行诗歌，限定在五种主要格律中用于可控比较。将诗句转写为音素序列，并用六个音系指标（硬度、响度、咝音、元音比、音素熵、辅音群比）进行分析，采用统计模型控制格律、诗体和行长评估诗人间的音韵差异。再用多维风格图谱和历史分析，刻画音韵风格的发展和变迁。
AI.result: 结果发现，格律和形式虽解释了大量音韵变异，但无法消除诗人之间的系统差异。不同诗人和历史时期展现出高响度抒情、高硬度史诗、咝音神秘以及高熵复杂等多种音韵风格。历史分布显示音韵风格随体裁、文学机构和演出环境渐变而非突变。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了波斯诗歌大规模音系分析框架，证明了计算音系学对文学史解读的价值，同时强调需兼顾波斯诗歌形式结构的影响。

title: AeroGen: Agentic Drone Autonomy through Single-Shot Structured Prompting & Drone SDK
summary: Designing correct UAV autonomy programs is challenging due to joint navigation, sensing and analytics requirements. While LLMs can generate code, their reliability for safety-critical UAVs remains uncertain. This paper presents AeroGen, an open-loop framework that enables consistently correct single-shot AI-generated drone control programs through structured guardrail prompting and integration with the AeroDaaS drone SDK. AeroGen encodes API descriptions, flight constraints and operational world rules directly into the system context prompt, enabling generic LLMs to produce constraint-aware code from user prompts, with minimal example code. We evaluate AeroGen across a diverse benchmark of 20 navigation tasks and 5 drone missions on urban, farm and inspection environments, using both imperative and declarative user prompts. AeroGen generates about 40 lines of AeroDaaS Python code in about 20s per mission, in both real-world and simulations, showing that structured prompting with a well-defined SDK improves robustness, correctness and deployability of LLM-generated drone autonomy programs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AeroGen框架，通过结构化提示和与AeroDaaS SDK集成，实现了高可靠性的AI自动生成无人机控制程序。实验表明该方法能生成符合约束的代码，提升无人机自主程序的健壮性和部署性。
AI.motivation: 无人机自主控制程序开发难度大，涉及导航、感知和分析等多重复杂需求，而当前大模型自动生成的代码在安全关键场景下可靠性不足。
AI.method: 设计了AeroGen框架：将API描述、飞行约束和作业规则编码到系统上下文提示中，指导大模型从用户需求直接生成受约束的无人机代码，并与AeroDaaS SDK配合，实现了结构化护栏提示。通过不同环境、任务和输入风格（命令式、声明式）进行基准测试。
AI.result: AeroGen能在约20秒内为单项任务生成约40行高质量Python控制代码，适用于现实和仿真环境中的20种导航任务和5种无人机具体任务，表现出良好的稳健性和代码正确率。
AI.conclusion: 结构化提示结合高质量SDK能够显著提升大模型生成无人机自主控制代码的可靠性、正确性与易用性，为无人机高可信自主系统代码生成提供了可行方案。

title: FlowAD: Ego-Scene Interactive Modeling for Autonomous Driving
summary: Effective environment modeling is the foundation for autonomous driving, underpinning tasks from perception to planning. However, current paradigms often inadequately consider the feedback of ego motion to the observation, which leads to an incomplete understanding of the driving process and consequently limits the planning capability. To address this issue, we introduce a novel ego-scene interactive modeling paradigm. Inspired by human recognition, the paradigm represents ego-scene interaction as the scene flow relative to the ego-vehicle. This conceptualization allows for modeling ego-motion feedback within a feature learning pattern, advantageously utilizing existing log-replay datasets rather than relying on scenario simulations. We specifically propose FlowAD, a general flow-based framework for autonomous driving. Within it, an ego-guided scene partition first constructs basic flow units to quantify scene flow. The ego-vehicle's forward direction and steering velocity directly shape the partition, which reflects ego motion. Then, based on flow units, spatial and temporal flow predictions are performed to model dynamics of scene flow, encompassing both spatial displacement and temporal variation. The final task-aware enhancement exploits learned spatio-temporal flow dynamics to benefit diverse tasks through object and region-level strategies. We also propose a novel Frames before Correct Planning (FCP) metric to assess the scene understanding capability. Experiments in both open and closed-loop evaluations demonstrate FlowAD's generality and effectiveness across perception, end-to-end planning, and VLM analysis. Notably, FlowAD reduces 19% collision rate over SparseDrive with FCP improvements of 1.39 frames (60%) on nuScenes, and achieves an impressive driving score of 51.77 on Bench2Drive, proving the superiority. Code, model, and configurations will be released here.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于流的自动驾驶环境建模方法——FlowAD，能够有效地建模自车与场景的交互，并提升自动驾驶的感知与规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶环境建模方法难以充分捕捉自车运动对观察结果的反馈，导致对驾驶过程理解不全，影响后续的规划决策能力。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的自车-场景交互建模范式，核心思想是以自车为基准，将场景流建模为自车相关的流量（scene flow）。主要包括：（1）基于自车前进方向和转向速度进行场景空间划分，并构造基本流单元；（2）在此基础上进行空间和时序流预测，建模场景流的动态变化；（3）结合对象与区域级别的增强策略，将所学流动态用于提升下游任务表现。引入了新的评测指标FCP，评价场景理解能力。
AI.result: 在开放及闭环场景实验中，FlowAD在感知、端到端规划和VLM分析任务上均表现优异。比如在nuScenes数据集上，相较SparseDrive碰撞率降低19%，FCP提升1.39帧（60%）；在Bench2Drive测试集上获得51.77的高分，显示了其方法的通用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: FlowAD成功建模了自车与环境动态交互，充分利用已有log-replay数据集，无需复杂仿真，显著提升了自动驾驶系统的感知和规划性能。

title: PARSA-Bench: A Comprehensive Persian Audio-Language Model Benchmark
summary: Persian poses unique audio understanding challenges through its classical poetry, traditional music, and pervasive code-switching - none captured by existing benchmarks. We introduce PARSA-Bench (Persian Audio Reasoning and Speech Assessment Benchmark), the first benchmark for evaluating large audio-language models on Persian language and culture, comprising 16 tasks and over 8,000 samples across speech understanding, paralinguistic analysis, and cultural audio understanding. Ten tasks are newly introduced, including poetry meter and style detection, traditional Persian music understanding, and code-switching detection. Text-only baselines consistently outperform audio counterparts, suggesting models may not leverage audio-specific information beyond what transcription alone provides. Culturally-grounded tasks expose a qualitatively distinct failure mode: all models perform near random chance on vazn detection regardless of scale, suggesting prosodic perception remains beyond the reach of current models. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/MohammadJRanjbar/PARSA-Bench

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PARSA-Bench，这是首个针对波斯语音与文化多模态任务的大型基准数据集，涵盖16个任务，超过8000个样本，用于评估主流大模型在波斯语言音频理解上的能力。基准测试揭示当前模型无法充分利用音频特征，在特定文化任务（如诗歌韵律识别）上几乎无效。数据集已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有语音多模态大模型评测基准，未覆盖波斯语独特的文化特点，包括古典诗歌、传统音乐和高频混语等，导致模型在该语境下的能力无法衡量和提升。需要针对波斯语言与文化定制的新评测套件。
AI.method: 作者构建了PARSA-Bench，涵盖16个多样化任务，包括10个新设计任务，如诗歌韵律检测、传统波斯音乐理解、代码切换检测等，样本总量超8000。对比评测文本输入和音频输入基线模型，揭示各自表现及存在问题。
AI.result: 文本基线（仅用转录内容）普遍优于依赖完整音频输入的模型，说明主流模型未能有效利用音频特征。面对文化相关性强的任务（如诗歌韵律识别），所有模型表现接近随机水平，规模提升无显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 当前大模型不具备对波斯语文化特有音频信息的感知能力，需发展能处理高阶韵律、音乐等复杂音频理解的新方法。PARSA-Bench为促进该领域研究提供了首个标准数据集和评测框架。

title: Design of a Bio-Inspired Miniature Submarine for Low-Cost Water Quality Monitoring
summary: Water quality monitoring is essential for protecting aquatic ecosystems and detecting environmental pollution. This paper presents the design and experimental validation of a bio-inspired miniature submarine for low-cost water quality monitoring. Inspired by the jet propulsion mechanism of squids, the proposed system employs pump-driven water jets for propulsion and steering, combined with a pump-based buoyancy control mechanism that enables both depth regulation and water sampling. The vehicle integrates low-cost, commercially available components including an ESP32 microcontroller, IMU, pressure sensor, GPS receiver, and LoRa communication module. The complete system can be constructed at a hardware cost of approximately $122.5, making it suitable for educational and environmental monitoring applications. Experimental validation was conducted through pool tests and field trials in a lake. During a 360 degrees rotation test, roll and pitch deviations remained within +/-2 degrees and +/-1.5 degrees, respectively, demonstrating stable attitude control. Steering experiments showed a heading step response with approximately 2 s rise time and 5 s settling time. Depth control experiments achieved a target depth of 2.5 m with steady-state error within +/-0.1 m. Field experiments further demonstrated reliable navigation and successful water sampling operations. The results confirm that the proposed platform provides a compact, stable, and cost-effective solution for small-scale aquatic environmental monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文设计并验证了一种仿生迷你潜艇，利用鱿鱼喷射原理，实现水质监测，成本低、操作稳定。
AI.motivation: 当前水域水质监测亟需低成本、高效、便于部署的自动化设备，且传统方案常因价格、体积等问题受限。
AI.method: 设计了一种以鱿鱼为灵感的微型潜艇，采用喷射泵驱动推进与转向，同时通过泵控浮力实现深度调节和采样；系统硬件采用ESP32微控器、IMU、压力传感器、GPS和LoRa通信，拆装便捷且成本仅约122.5美元。
AI.result: 实验包括泳池与湖泊实测。360°旋转时滚转与俯仰误差分别控制在±2和±1.5度，舵向响应上升时间2秒，稳定时间5秒。深度控制2.5米时稳态误差±0.1米。野外采集实验展现良好导航与采样能力。
AI.conclusion: 该平台结构紧凑、姿态稳定且成本低廉，适合小规模环境监测和教育应用。

title: Combining Microscopy Data and Metadata for Reconstruction of Cellular Traction Forces Using a Hybrid Vision Transformer-U-Net
summary: Traction force microscopy (TFM) is a widely used technique for quantifying the forces that cells exert on their surrounding extracellular matrix. Although deep learning methods have recently been applied to TFM data analysis, several challenges remain-particularly achieving reliable inference across multiple spatial scales and integrating additional contextual information such as cell type to improve accuracy. In this study, we propose ViT+UNet, a robust deep learning architecture that integrates a U-Net with a Vision Transformer. Our results demonstrate that this hybrid model outperforms both standalone U-Net and Vision Transformer architectures in predicting traction force fields. Furthermore, ViT+UNet exhibits superior generalization across diverse spatial scales and varying noise levels, enabling its application to TFM datasets obtained from different experimental setups and imaging systems. By appropriately structuring the input data, our approach also allows the inclusion of metadata, in our case cell-type information, to enhance prediction specificity and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合U-Net和Vision Transformer（ViT）的深度学习架构（称为ViT+UNet），用于更高效准确地预测细胞的牵引力场，并能整合包括细胞类型在内的上下文信息，提高了TFM（牵引力显微技术）分析的泛化性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习已开始应用于牵引力显微技术（TFM）数据分析，但在跨空间尺度、复杂背景、以及集成如细胞类型等上下文信息来提升准确性方面，仍面临可靠性与泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出ViT+UNet混合神经网络架构，将U-Net与Vision Transformer（ViT）结合，用于处理和预测TFM数据，同时通过设计输入结构的方式，集成细胞类型等元数据用于增强模型表现。
AI.result: ViT+UNet在预测牵引力场方面表现优于单独的U-Net或Vision Transformer模型，尤其在不同空间尺度和噪声环境下具有更好的泛化能力。此外，整合元数据后能够进一步提升预测的专一性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: ViT+UNet是一种强健、广泛适用的深度学习框架，不仅提升了TFM数据分析的准确性和鲁棒性，还能支持整合多种上下文信息，对多样实验环境和成像系统下的TFM应用具有重要价值。

title: Distilling Reasoning Without Knowledge: A Framework for Reliable LLMs
summary: Fact-seeking question answering with large language models (LLMs) remains unreliable when answers depend on up-to-date or conflicting information. Although retrieval-augmented and tool-using LLMs reduce hallucinations, they often rely on implicit planning, leading to inefficient tool usage. We propose a modular framework that explicitly separates planning from factual retrieval and answer synthesis. A lightweight student planner is trained via a teacher-student framework to generate structured decompositions consisting of abstract reasoning steps and searchable fact requests. The supervision signals contain only planning traces and fact requests, without providing factual answers or retrieved evidence. At inference, the planner produces plans, while prompt-engineered modules perform retrieval and response synthesis. We evaluate the proposed framework on SEAL-0, an extremely challenging benchmark for search-augmented LLMs. Results show that supervised planning improves both accuracy and latency compared to monolithic reasoning models and prompt-based tool-augmented frameworks, demonstrating that explicitly learned planning structures are essential for reliable fact-seeking LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模块化的LLM问答框架，将规划与事实检索、答案生成显式分离，通过学生-教师机制训练计划生成器，并在SEAL-0基准上验证效果。该方法优于传统模型，提高了准确率和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在涉及时效性强或信息冲突的事实问答任务时，存在生成不可靠答案的问题。虽然检索增强与工具辅助可以减少幻觉，但由于依赖隐式规划，导致工具使用效率低。
AI.method: 提出了一种模块化框架，显式将问题分解为规划、事实检索和答案生成三个阶段。通过教师-学生机制训练一个轻量级规划模块，只用规划轨迹和事实请求信号进行监督训练。推理时，规划器生成结构化方案，由其他模块完成检索和答复。
AI.result: 在高难度的SEAL-0搜索增强LLM基准测试中，该框架在准确率与响应延迟方面均优于一体化推理模型及基于提示的工具增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式监督式规划结构对于提升LLM事实性问答的可靠性至关重要，这一新框架在实际应用中表现更优。

title: Load-Aware Locomotion Control for Humanoid Robots in Industrial Transportation Tasks
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics for possible publication
summary: Humanoid robots deployed in industrial environments are required to perform load-carrying transportation tasks that tightly couple locomotion and manipulation. However, achieving stable and robust locomotion under varying payloads and upper-body motions is challenging due to dynamic coupling and partial observability. This paper presents a load-aware locomotion framework for industrial humanoids based on a decoupled yet coordinated loco-manipulation architecture. Lower-body locomotion is controlled via a reinforcement learning policy producing residual joint actions on kinematically derived nominal configurations. A kinematics-based locomotion reference with a height-conditioned joint-space offset guides learning, while a history-based state estimator infers base linear velocity and height and encodes residual load- and manipulation-induced disturbances in a compact latent representation. The framework is trained entirely in simulation and deployed on a full-size humanoid robot without fine-tuning. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate faster training, accurate height tracking, and stable loco-manipulation. Project page: https://lequn-f.github.io/LALO/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向工业人形机器人、具备负载自适应能力的新型行走与操控集成框架。通过解耦但协调的结构，显著提升了在变量负载和上肢动态动作下的稳定行走能力。方法验证于仿真与实机实验，展现了高效训练和稳定操控表现。
AI.motivation: 工业人形机器人常需携带货物，在移动和操控高度耦合的环境下工作。由于负载变化及部分状态不可观测，实现稳定、鲁棒的行走非常困难。该论文旨在解决复杂环境下负载带来的动力学耦合与观测受限问题。
AI.method: 框架将上下肢任务解耦协调：下肢行走采用强化学习生成余量动作叠加于基于运动学的名义关节配置；结合身高调节的关节空间偏移作为参考，激励有效学习。通过历史信息估算线速度和本体高度，并将负载及操控造成的扰动编码入紧凑潜变量。训练全在仿真环境进行，无需实机微调。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人上的实验表明，该方法能实现更快的训练速度、精确的高度跟踪和稳定的行走-操控一体化表现。展示了方法的有效性和较强的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的负载自适应步态框架能显著提升工业人形机器人在复杂动态任务下的运动与操控稳定性，为实际部署提供了切实可行的技术路径。

title: MAD: Microenvironment-Aware Distillation -- A Pretraining Strategy for Virtual Spatial Omics from Microscopy
summary: Bridging microscopy and omics would allow us to read molecular states from images-at single-cell resolution and tissue scale-without the cost and throughput limits of omics technologies. Self-supervised pretraining offers a scalable approach with minimal labels, yet how to encode single-cell identity within tissue environments-and the extent of biological information such models can capture-remains an open question. Here, we introduce MAD (microenvironment-aware distillation), a pretraining strategy that learns cell-centric embeddings by jointly self-distilling the morphology view and the microenvironment view of the same indexed cell into a unified embedding space. Across diverse tissues and imaging modalities, MAD achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance on downstream tasks including cell subtyping, transcriptomic prediction, and bioinformatic inference. MAD even outperforms foundation models with a similar number of model parameters that have been trained on substantially larger datasets. These results demonstrate that MAD's dual-view joint self-distillation effectively captures the complexity and diversity of cells within tissues. Together, this establishes MAD as a general tool for representation learning in microscopy, enabling virtual spatial omics and biological insights from vast microscopy datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的自监督预训练方法MAD，可以在显微镜图像中学习细胞级别的嵌入表示，实现无需昂贵组学实验的分子状态预测，推动虚拟空间组学的发展。
AI.motivation: 传统组学技术在分子层面解析细胞状态时，成本高且通量受限，而显微镜图像包含丰富的细胞形态和组织环境信息。如果能从图像直接推断分子状态，将大幅降低成本并提升效率。但如何在组织环境中准确编码单细胞特征，以及自监督模型能捕获多少生物学信息仍未明确。
AI.method: 作者提出MAD（microenvironment-aware distillation），一种自监督预训练方法。MAD以单个细胞为中心，同时考虑其形态（morphology view）和所在微环境（microenvironment view），通过双视角的自蒸馏学习将两者整合到统一的嵌入空间，以此学习能够泛化的细胞表示。
AI.result: MAD在不同组织和成像模式下，在细胞亚型识别、转录组预测及生物信息学推断等任务中，表现优于现有模型，甚至超过了一些在更大数据集上训练的基础模型。
AI.conclusion: MAD通过双视角自蒸馏，有效捕获了组织中细胞的复杂性和多样性，是显微镜领域具备通用性的表示学习工具，有望推动虚拟空间组学和大规模生物学信息获取。

title: An Industrial-Scale Insurance LLM Achieving Verifiable Domain Mastery and Hallucination Control without Competence Trade-offs
summary: Adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) to high-stakes vertical domains like insurance presents a significant challenge: scenarios demand strict adherence to complex regulations and business logic with zero tolerance for hallucinations. Existing approaches often suffer from a Competency Trade-off - sacrificing general intelligence for domain expertise - or rely heavily on RAG without intrinsic reasoning. To bridge this gap, we present INS-S1, an insurance-specific LLM family trained via a novel end-to-end alignment paradigm. Our approach features two methodological innovations: (1) A Verifiable Data Synthesis System that constructs hierarchical datasets for actuarial reasoning and compliance; and (2) A Progressive SFT-RL Curriculum Framework that integrates dynamic data annealing with a synergistic mix of Verified Reasoning (RLVR) and AI Feedback (RLAIF). By optimizing data ratios and reward signals, this framework enforces domain constraints while preventing catastrophic forgetting. Additionally, we release INSEva, the most comprehensive insurance benchmark to date (39k+ samples). Extensive experiments show that INS-S1 achieves SOTA performance on domain tasks, significantly outperforming DeepSeek-R1 and Gemini-2.5-Pro. Crucially, it maintains top-tier general capabilities and achieves a record-low 0.6% hallucination rate (HHEM). Our results demonstrate that rigorous domain specialization can be achieved without compromising general intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对保险行业的专用大模型INS-S1，通过创新性的对齐方法，实现了在高要求领域内的严格合规和低幻觉率，并兼顾了通用智能。
AI.motivation: LLM在保险等高风险垂直行业应用面临严格合规和业务复杂性约束，常因追求专业性牺牲通用能力，或依赖RAG但缺乏自身推理能力，因此亟需能在合规、推理和智能间平衡的行业专用模型。
AI.method: 1）设计可验证数据合成系统，层次化生成精确的保司数据集用于精算推理和合规性训练；2）采用渐进式SFT-RL课程框架，融合动态数据退火、verified reasoning（RLVR）与AI反馈（RLAIF），优化数据配比和奖励信号以巩固领域能力、避免遗忘。并发布了覆盖面最广的保险基准INSEva（3.9万+样本）。
AI.result: INS-S1在保险领域任务上取得SOTA表现，显著超越DeepSeek-R1与Gemini-2.5-Pro；维持了顶尖的通用能力，并将幻觉率降至业界最低的0.6%。
AI.conclusion: 论文证明在保险等高合规要求行业，能够实现领域专精和通用智能的兼得，INS-S1为高风险行业大模型落地提供了有力方案。

title: OmniClone: Engineering a Robust, All-Rounder Whole-Body Humanoid Teleoperation System
summary: Whole-body humanoid teleoperation enables humans to remotely control humanoid robots, serving as both a real-time operational tool and a scalable engine for collecting demonstrations for autonomous learning. Despite recent advances, existing systems are validated using aggregate metrics that conflate distinct motion regimes, masking critical failure modes. This lack of diagnostic granularity, compounded by tightly coupled and labor-intensive system configurations, hinders robust real-world deployment. A key open challenge is building a teleoperation system that is simultaneously robust, versatile, and affordable for practical use. Here we present OmniClone, a whole-body humanoid teleoperation system that achieves high-fidelity, multi-skill control on a single consumer GPU with modest data requirements. Central to our approach is OmniBench, a diagnostic benchmark that evaluates policies across stratified motion categories and difficulty levels on unseen motions, exposing the narrow specialization of prior systems. Guided by these diagnostics, we identify an optimized training data recipe and integrate system-level improvements: subject-agnostic retargeting and robust communication, that collectively reduce Mean Per-Joint Position Error (MPJPE) by over 66% while requiring orders-of-magnitude fewer computational resources than comparable methods. Crucially, OmniClone is control-source-agnostic: a single unified policy supports real-time teleoperation, generated motion playback, and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, while generalizing across operators of vastly different body proportions. By uniting diagnostic evaluation with practical engineering, OmniClone provides an accessible foundation for scalable humanoid teleoperation and autonomous learning.

AI.tldr: OmniClone是一套高保真、低成本且通用的人形机器人全身遥操作系统，能在单张消费级GPU上实现多技能实时控制，并提出了精细诊断基准OmniBench，推动遥操作的可扩展性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有全身人形机器人遥操作系统评估维度粗糙，难以暴露关键失败模式，且配置复杂、资源消耗大，影响实际部署。因此亟需开发一种健壮、通用且经济适用的遥操作系统。
AI.method: 提出了OmniClone系统，通过OmniBench基准细致评估和指导系统改进，包括多类别动作与难度分层、优化训练数据、与人无关的动作重定向及鲁棒通信；同时强调单一统一策略支持多操作源，并可广泛泛化不同操作者。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，OmniClone在显著降低66%以上位置误差的同时，大幅减少算力需求；能在单卡、多种体型操作者间实现高保真人体遥操作，支持实时、回放及VLA模型。
AI.conclusion: OmniClone结合细化诊断评估与工程优化，为可扩展人形机器人遥操作与自主学习提供了高效、经济且易用的基础。

title: Event-Driven Video Generation
summary: State-of-the-art text-to-video models often look realistic frame-by-frame yet fail on simple interactions: motion starts before contact, actions are not realized, objects drift after placement, and support relations break. We argue this stems from frame-first denoising, which updates latent state everywhere at every step without an explicit notion of when and where an interaction is active. We introduce Event-Driven Video Generation (EVD), a minimal DiT-compatible framework that makes sampling event-grounded: a lightweight event head predicts token-aligned event activity, event-grounded losses couple activity to state change during training, and event-gated sampling (with hysteresis and early-step scheduling) suppresses spurious updates while concentrating updates during interactions. On EVD-Bench, EVD consistently improves human preference and VBench dynamics, substantially reducing failure modes in state persistence, spatial accuracy, support relations, and contact stability without sacrificing appearance. These results indicate that explicit event grounding is a practical abstraction for reducing interaction hallucinations in video generation.

AI.tldr: 现有的文生视频模型在单帧上很真实，但在交互细节上经常出错。该文提出了一种事件驱动的视频生成方法，通过对事件进行建模来提升视频交互的合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有的text-to-video模型虽然在视觉效果上已经很优秀，但常常在表现动作的时序与物体的交互上出错，例如物体还未接触就开始运动、物体被放置后继续漂移等。这反映出模型对于“事件何时何地发生”没有显式建模。作者希望通过引入事件驱动的方法，纠正这些基础交互失效。
AI.method: 提出了EVD（Event-Driven Video Generation）框架，兼容扩散模型DiT，在采样过程中通过一个轻量事件头预测每步token是否处于事件激活状态；加入基于事件的损失，使事件与状态变化紧密结合；采样时对非事件阶段进行更新抑制，在事件发生时集中状态更新。
AI.result: 在EVD-Bench上，EVD显著提高了生成视频的动态一致性和视觉质量，特别是在状态持续性、空间精度、支撑关系和接触稳定性上大幅减少了生成失误，并获得了更高的用户偏好评价。
AI.conclusion: 明确的事件建模能有效减少文生视频中的不合理交互现象，是构建高质量视频生成模型的有效抽象方法。

title: AI Can Learn Scientific Taste
summary: Great scientists have strong judgement and foresight, closely tied to what we call scientific taste. Here, we use the term to refer to the capacity to judge and propose research ideas with high potential impact. However, most relative research focuses on improving an AI scientist's executive capability, while enhancing an AI's scientific taste remains underexplored. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Learning from Community Feedback (RLCF), a training paradigm that uses large-scale community signals as supervision, and formulate scientific taste learning as a preference modeling and alignment problem. For preference modeling, we train Scientific Judge on 700K field- and time-matched pairs of high- vs. low-citation papers to judge ideas. For preference alignment, using Scientific Judge as a reward model, we train a policy model, Scientific Thinker, to propose research ideas with high potential impact. Experiments show Scientific Judge outperforms SOTA LLMs (e.g., GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro) and generalizes to future-year test, unseen fields, and peer-review preference. Furthermore, Scientific Thinker proposes research ideas with higher potential impact than baselines. Our findings show that AI can learn scientific taste, marking a key step toward reaching human-level AI scientists.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种提升AI科研判断力（科学品味）的方法，通过社区反馈强化学习（RLCF），使AI能够提出更具高潜力影响力的科研创意。
AI.motivation: 当前AI科学家主要研究如何提升执行能力，而对提升AI的科学品味关注较少。科学品味是指判断和提出高影响力研究想法的能力，这对推动科学进步至关重要，因此作者希望填补AI在科学品味学习方面的空白。
AI.method: 论文提出了社区反馈强化学习（RLCF）训练范式，将科学品味学习建模为偏好建模和偏好对齐问题。首先，通过70万对高低引用论文进行偏好训练，训练出Scientific Judge模型进行判断。然后以Scientific Judge为奖励模型，训练Scientific Thinker模型来提出高影响力的研究创新点。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，Scientific Judge在判断高影响力创意上优于现有主流大模型（如GPT-5.2，Gemini 3 Pro），并且可以泛化到未来年份、新领域以及同行评审偏好。Scientific Thinker能提出较基线更高潜力的科研想法。
AI.conclusion: AI能够通过RLCF有效学习科学品味，这为实现具有人类水平判断与创新力的AI科学家迈出重要一步。

title: Data-Driven Physics Embedded Dynamics with Predictive Control and Reinforcement Learning for Quadrupeds
summary: State of the art quadrupedal locomotion approaches integrate Model Predictive Control (MPC) with Reinforcement Learning (RL), enabling complex motion capabilities with planning and terrain adaptive behaviors. However, they often face compounding errors over long horizons and have limited interpretability due to the absence of physical inductive biases. We address these issues by integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks (LNNs) into an RL MPC framework, enabling physically consistent dynamics learning. At deployment, our inverse dynamics infinite horizon MPC scheme avoids costly matrix inversions, improving computational efficiency by up to 4x with minimal loss of task performance. We validate our framework through multiple ablations of the proposed LNN and its variants. We show improved sample efficiency, reduced long-horizon error, and faster real time planning compared to unstructured neural dynamics. Lastly, we also test our framework on the Unitree Go1 robot to show real world viability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出在四足机器人运动控制中，将拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）集成到强化学习与模型预测控制（MPC）框架中，实现物理一致性的动力学学习，并显著提升了效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人运动方案虽然结合了MPC与RL，具备复杂动作和地形适应能力，但因缺乏物理归纳偏置，长时间积累误差大且可解释性差。
AI.method: 作者将LNN引入RL-MPC框架，在推理时采用逆动力学无限时域MPC，避免了高成本的矩阵求逆操作；通过多种LNN变体消融实验评估其有效性。
AI.result: 方法在样本效率、长时域误差控制和实时规划速度上优于无结构神经动力学方法，实现了依赖矩阵求逆之外的约4倍计算效率提升，且在Unitree Go1机器人上实证其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 引入LNN的RL-MPC框架能以物理一致方式提升四足机器人运动控制系统的效率与可靠性，兼顾解释性和实际应用价值。

title: Diabetic Retinopathy Grading with CLIP-based Ranking-Aware Adaptation:A Comparative Study on Fundus Image
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness, and automated fundus image grading can play an important role in large-scale screening. In this work, we investigate three CLIP-based approaches for five-class DR severity grading: (1) a zero-shot baseline using prompt engineering, (2) a hybrid FCN-CLIP model augmented with CBAM attention, and (3) a ranking-aware prompting model that encodes the ordinal structure of DR progression. We train and evaluate on a combined dataset of APTOS 2019 and Messidor-2 (n=5,406), addressing class imbalance through resampling and class-specific optimal thresholding. Our experiments show that the ranking-aware model achieves the highest overall accuracy (93.42%, AUROC 0.9845) and strong recall on clinically critical severe cases, while the hybrid FCN-CLIP model (92.49%, AUROC 0.99) excels at detecting proliferative DR. Both substantially outperform the zero-shot baseline (55.17%, AUROC 0.75). We analyze the complementary strengths of each approach and discuss their practical implications for screening contexts.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了三种基于CLIP的方法在五级糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）严重程度分级任务中的表现，为大规模自动筛查提供了更高效的算法。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是可预防致盲的重要原因，自动眼底图像分级对于大规模筛查意义重大。当前方法在精度与临床应用上仍有提升空间，因此作者提出探索CLIP相关新模型以提升分级效果。
AI.method: 作者提出并比较了三种方法：（1）基于提示工程的零样本CLIP基线方法；（2）结合CBAM注意力机制的混合FCN-CLIP模型；（3）能够编码DR分级顺序结构的ranking-aware提示模型。作者使用APTOS 2019和Messidor-2合并数据集（共5406例），采用重采样和类别特异性阈值优化解决类别不平衡。
AI.result: ranking-aware模型准确率和AUROC均最高（93.42%、0.9845），且在严重病例召回表现突出；混合FCN-CLIP模型在增殖期DR检测最优（92.49%、0.99）；均远超零样本基线（55.17%、0.75）。
AI.conclusion: ranking-aware提示模型和混合FCN-CLIP模型均能有效提升DR严重程度分级准确性，各有补充优势，为实际临床筛查应用带来更好前景。

title: Infinite Problem Generator: Verifiably Scaling Physics Reasoning Data with Agentic Workflows
summary: Training large language models for complex reasoning is bottlenecked by the scarcity of verifiable, high-quality data. In domains like physics, standard text augmentation often introduces hallucinations, while static benchmarks lack the reasoning traces required for fine-tuning. We introduce the Infinite Problem Generator (IPG), an agentic framework that synthesizes physics problems with guaranteed solvability through a Formula-as-Code paradigm. Unlike probabilistic text generation, IPG constructs solutions as executable Python programs, enforcing strict mathematical consistency. As a proof-of-concept, we release ClassicalMechanicsV1, a high-fidelity corpus of 1,335 classical mechanics problems expanded from 165 expert seeds. The corpus demonstrates high structural diversity, spanning 102 unique physical formulas with an average complexity of 3.05 formulas per problem. Furthermore, we identify a Complexity Blueprint, demonstrating a strong linear correlation ($R^2 \approx 0.95$) between formula count and verification code length. This relationship establishes code complexity as a precise, proxy-free metric for problem difficulty, enabling controllable curriculum generation. We release the full IPG pipeline, the ClassicalMechanicsV1 dataset, and our evaluation report to support reproducible research in reasoning-intensive domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了无限问题生成器（IPG），通过公式即代码的方式自动合成可验证的物理题目，并公开了高质量经典力学题库。
AI.motivation: 训练大型语言模型进行复杂推理受限于高质量、可验证数据的稀缺，尤其在物理等领域，现有数据扩充方式易带来幻觉，缺乏可用的推理轨迹。研究者希望解决数据稀缺及标注代价高昂的问题。
AI.method: 作者设计了IPG框架，通过将物理题解构建为可执行的Python代码，确保数学和逻辑完全一致。作为实例，基于165道专家题目种子，生成了1335道多样化、复杂度高的经典力学问题，并用代码复杂度量化难度。
AI.result: 构建并公开了ClassicalMechanicsV1数据集，包含1335道涵盖102个独特公式的经典力学题，每题平均涉及3.05个公式。发现了配方数与验证代码长度之间强线性关系，可用代码复杂度精确衡量问题难度。
AI.conclusion: IPG为推理密集型领域提供了可控且可扩展的数据生成方法，有助于复杂推理任务的数据瓶颈突破，支持后续可复现性研究。

title: VIP-Loco: A Visually Guided Infinite Horizon Planning Framework for Legged Locomotion
summary: Perceptive locomotion for legged robots requires anticipating and adapting to complex, dynamic environments. Model Predictive Control (MPC) serves as a strong baseline, providing interpretable motion planning with constraint enforcement, but struggles with high-dimensional perceptual inputs and rapidly changing terrain. In contrast, model-free Reinforcement Learning (RL) adapts well across visually challenging scenarios but lacks planning. To bridge this gap, we propose VIP-Loco, a framework that integrates vision-based scene understanding with RL and planning. During training, an internal model maps proprioceptive states and depth images into compact kinodynamic features used by the RL policy. At deployment, the learned models are used within an infinite-horizon MPC formulation, combining adaptability with structured planning. We validate VIP-Loco in simulation on challenging locomotion tasks, including slopes, stairs, crawling, tilting, gap jumping, and climbing, across three robot morphologies: a quadruped (Unitree Go1), a biped (Cassie), and a wheeled-biped (TronA1-W). Through ablations and comparisons with state-of-the-art methods, we show that VIP-Loco unifies planning and perception, enabling robust, interpretable locomotion in diverse environments.

AI.tldr: VIP-Loco是一种结合视觉感知、强化学习和规划的腿式机器人运动控制框架，实现了在复杂动态环境中的稳健行走能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的MPC适合可解释的运动规划但难以处理高维感知输入和快速变化地形；而无模型的强化学习虽然适应性强但缺乏规划能力。为解决这一平衡感知、适应与规划的问题，需要将两者优势结合。
AI.method: 提出VIP-Loco框架，在训练阶段将机器人自身状态和深度图像编码为紧凑的动力学特征供RL使用；在部署阶段，将学习到的模型集成到无限时域的MPC中，实现感知驱动下的适应性与规划结合。
AI.result: 在仿真中，VIP-Loco在斜坡、楼梯、匍匐前进、倾斜、跳跃和攀爬等任务上，通过对比消融实验和最先进方法，验证了其在三种机器人形态上的优越性和稳健性。
AI.conclusion: VIP-Loco有效融合了感知与规划，能在多样化环境下实现可解释、稳健的腿式机器人运动。

title: Anchor Forcing: Anchor Memory and Tri-Region RoPE for Interactive Streaming Video Diffusion
summary: Interactive long video generation requires prompt switching to introduce new subjects or events, while maintaining perceptual fidelity and coherent motion over extended horizons. Recent distilled streaming video diffusion models reuse a rolling KV cache for long-range generation, enabling prompt-switch interaction through re-cache at each switch. However, existing streaming methods still exhibit progressive quality degradation and weakened motion dynamics. We identify two failure modes specific to interactive streaming generation: (i) at each prompt switch, current cache maintenance cannot simultaneously retain KV-based semantic context and recent latent cues, resulting in weak boundary conditioning and reduced perceptual quality; and (ii) during distillation, unbounded time indexing induces a positional distribution shift from the pretrained backbone's bounded RoPE regime, weakening pretrained motion priors and long-horizon motion retention. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{Anchor Forcing}, a cache-centric framework with two designs. First, an anchor-guided re-cache mechanism stores KV states in anchor caches and warm-starts re-cache from these anchors at each prompt switch, reducing post-switch evidence loss and stabilizing perceptual quality. Second, a tri-region RoPE with region-specific reference origins, together with RoPE re-alignment distillation, reconciles unbounded streaming indices with the pretrained RoPE regime to better retain motion priors. Experiments on long videos show that our method improves perceptual quality and motion metrics over prior streaming baselines in interactive settings. Project page: https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/Anchor-Forcing

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于交互式长视频生成的新框架Anchor Forcing，通过改进缓存管理和位置编码方法，在多次提示切换下提升视频的感知质量和运动连贯性。
AI.motivation: 交互式长视频生成需要频繁切换提示，引入新事件或主体，同时还要保持视频质量和动作连贯性。当前的流式生成方法在长时生成中容易出现质量逐步下降和运动动态削弱的问题，急需解决缓存维护不足和位置编码分布偏移带来的退化。
AI.method: 该方法提出Anchor Forcing，包括两大设计：（1）锚点引导的缓存机制，在每次提示切换时从锚点缓存中恢复KV状态，减缓切换后的信息丢失；（2）三区域RoPE位置编码及RoPE对齐蒸馏方法，协调无限时间索引和预训练位置编码，保留运动先验。
AI.result: 在长视频生成实验中，该方法在感知质量和运动评测指标上优于现有流式生成方法，尤其在多次交互切换场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Anchor Forcing 框架有效提升了交互式长视频生成的质量与连贯性，为流式生成领域提供了新的思路和实证方法。

title: MALicious INTent Dataset and Inoculating LLMs for Enhanced Disinformation Detection
comment: Paper accepted to EACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: The intentional creation and spread of disinformation poses a significant threat to public discourse. However, existing English datasets and research rarely address the intentionality behind the disinformation. This work presents MALINT, the first human-annotated English corpus developed in collaboration with expert fact-checkers to capture disinformation and its malicious intent. We utilize our novel corpus to benchmark 12 language models, including small language models (SLMs) such as BERT and large language models (LLMs) like Llama 3.3, on binary and multilabel intent classification tasks. Moreover, inspired by inoculation theory from psychology and communication studies, we investigate whether incorporating knowledge of malicious intent can improve disinformation detection. To this end, we propose intent-based inoculation, an intent-augmented reasoning for LLMs that integrates intent analysis to mitigate the persuasive impact of disinformation. Analysis on six disinformation datasets, five LLMs, and seven languages shows that intent-augmented reasoning improves zero-shot disinformation detection. To support research in intent-aware disinformation detection, we release the MALINT dataset with annotations from each annotation step.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出并发布了首个包含恶意意图标注的英语虚假信息数据集MALINT，基于该数据集评估并提升了各类语言模型的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 当前关于虚假信息的数据集和研究，极少关注其背后的“恶意意图”，而这种意图对于理解和防范虚假信息至关重要。
AI.method: 与专业事实核查人员协作，人工标注并建立了MALINT语料库；在此基础上对12种语言模型（包括BERT、Llama 3等）进行二分类和多标签意图识别任务测试；受免疫理论启发，提出意图增强推理方法，将意图分析结合至LLMs以提升虚假信息检测能力。
AI.result: 意图增强推理在英、六种其他语言及多种主流检测模型上的评测显示，显著提升了零样本虚假信息检测效果。同时发布了包含完整标注步骤的MALINT数据集，便于进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 系统性地将“恶意意图”作为特征标注和建模对象，不仅弥补了数据集空白，还证实了意图信息对提升虚假信息检测的积极作用，为后续相关研究提供了数据和方法支撑。

title: OxyGen: Unified KV Cache Management for Vision-Language-Action Models under Multi-Task Parallelism
summary: Embodied AI agents increasingly require parallel execution of multiple tasks, such as manipulation, conversation, and memory construction, from shared observations under distinct time constraints. Recent Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) architecturally support such heterogeneous outputs, yet existing inference systems fail to achieve efficient multi-task parallelism for on-device deployment due to redundant computation and resource contention. We identify isolated KV cache management as the root cause. To address this, we propose unified KV cache management, an inference paradigm that treats KV cache as a first-class shared resource across tasks and over time. This abstraction enables two key optimizations: cross-task KV sharing eliminates redundant prefill of shared observations, while cross-frame continuous batching decouples variable-length language decoding from fixed-rate action generation across control cycles. We implement this paradigm for $π_{0.5}$, the most popular MoT VLA, and evaluate under representative robotic configurations. OxyGen achieves up to 3.7$\times$ speedup over isolated execution, delivering over 200 tokens/s language throughput and 70 Hz action frequency simultaneously without action quality degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于多任务实时推理的高效KV缓存管理机制，大幅提升了Vision-Language-Action (VLA)模型的并行性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型架构虽支持异质多任务输出，但设备端推理系统在多任务并行执行时，因KV缓存孤立管理而面临资源争用及冗余计算，难以高效部署。
AI.method: 作者提出将KV缓存作为多任务间和时序上的共享资源，统一管理，并在此基础上实现跨任务KV共享和跨帧连续批处理，消除重复预填、解耦变长语言与定频动作的生成。并在主流MoT VLA模型$π_{0.5}$上实现此推理范式。
AI.result: 实验显示，在典型机器人配置下，该方法OxyGen能实现最高3.7倍加速，同时支持每秒200 tokens语言生成和70 Hz动作生成频率，且不影响动作质量。
AI.conclusion: 统一KV缓存管理极大提升了多任务VLA模型的设备端推理效率，为多任务机器人智能体系统部署提供了新范式。

title: Nuanced Emotion Recognition Based on a Segment-based MLLM Framework Leveraging Qwen3-Omni for AH Detection
summary: Emotion recognition in videos is a pivotal task in affective computing, where identifying subtle psychological states such as Ambivalence and Hesitancy holds significant value for behavioral intervention and digital health. Ambivalence and Hesitancy states often manifest through cross-modal inconsistencies such as discrepancies between facial expressions, vocal tones, and textual semantics, posing a substantial challenge for automated recognition. This paper proposes a recognition framework that integrates temporal segment modeling with Multimodal Large Language Models. To address computational efficiency and token constraints in long video processing, we employ a segment-based strategy, partitioning videos into short clips with a maximum duration of 5 seconds. We leverage the Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B model, fine-tuned on the BAH dataset using LoRA and full-parameter strategies via the MS-Swift framework, enabling the model to synergistically analyze visual and auditory signals. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an accuracy of 85.1% on the test set, significantly outperforming existing benchmarks and validating the superior capability of Multimodal Large Language Models in capturing complex and nuanced emotional conflicts. The code is released at https://github.com/dlnn123/A-H-Detection-with-Qwen-Omni.git.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合多模态大语言模型和时序分段的情绪识别方法，有效识别视频中的“矛盾”和“犹豫”等细腻心理状态，显著提升了识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 矛盾和犹豫等复杂情绪状态在面部表情、语音语调和文本语义之间常常不一致，现有自动化识别方法难以有效检测，对行为干预和数字健康应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 将视频按最长5秒分段，分别建模短时段的视觉和听觉信号，基于Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B模态大模型，并利用LoRA和全参数微调方法进行优化，提升多模态信息整合能力。
AI.result: 在BAH数据集测试集上取得了85.1%的准确率，明显优于现有基线方法，验证了多模态大语言模型对复杂情绪识别的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法高效准确地捕捉到了复杂和细腻的人类心理冲突及其跨模态表现方式，为视频情绪识别和相关应用提供了有力支持。

title: Multilingual TinyStories: A Synthetic Combinatorial Corpus of Indic Children's Stories for Training Small Language Models
summary: The development of robust language models for low-resource languages is frequently bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality, coherent, and domain-appropriate training corpora. In this paper, we introduce the Multilingual TinyStories dataset, a large-scale, synthetically generated collection of children's stories encompassing 17 Indian languages. Designed specifically for the training and evaluation of Small Language Models (SLMs), the corpus provides simple, narrative-driven text strictly localized to native scripts. We detail our hybrid curation pipeline, which leverages the Sarvam-M language model and a novel combinatorial prompt engineering framework for native generation, coupled with the Google Translate API for large-scale cross-lingual expansion. Through strict programmatic filtering, we compiled 132,942 stories and over 93.9 million tokens in our release, serving as a foundational resource for multilingual language modeling and transfer learning in the Indic linguistic sphere.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一个支持17种印度语言的大规模多语种儿童故事数据集Multilingual TinyStories，主要用于训练和评估小型语言模型。数据集通过混合自动生成和跨语种扩展，包含13万多个故事。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏高质量、连贯、符合领域需求的语料库，严重限制了其语言模型的发展。本研究旨在为印度多语种环境提供合适的训练资源，促进小型语言模型的研究。
AI.method: 设计了混合数据生成流程：首先结合Sarvam-M语言模型与新颖的组合式提示工程生成本地语故事；然后用Google Translate API扩展为多语种语料，最后通过程序化手段严格筛选，确保文本质量。
AI.result: 成功汇编了支持17种印度语言、共132,942个儿童故事、总计近9400万字的高质量训练数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为印度语系小型语言模型的多语种训练和迁移学习提供了基础性资源，将促进相关自然语言处理研究与应用的发展。

title: From Scanning Guidelines to Action: A Robotic Ultrasound Agent with LLM-Based Reasoning
summary: Robotic ultrasound offers advantages over free-hand scanning, including improved reproducibility and reduced operator dependency. In clinical practice, US acquisition relies heavily on the sonographer's experience and situational judgment. When transferring this process to robotic systems, such expertise is often encoded explicitly through fixed procedures and task-specific models, yielding pipelines that can be difficult to adapt to new scanning tasks. In this work, we propose a unified framework for autonomous robotic US scanning that leverages a LLM-based agent to interpret US scanning guidelines and execute scans by dynamically invoking a set of provided software tools. Instead of encoding fixed scanning procedures, the LLM agent retrieves and reasons over guideline steps from scanning handbooks and adapts its planning decisions based on observations and the current scanning state. This enables the system to handle variable and decision-dependent workflows, such as adjusting scanning strategies, repeating steps, or selecting the appropriate next tool call in response to image quality or anatomical findings. Because the reasoning underlying tool selection is also critical for transparent and trustworthy planning, we further fine tune the LLM agent using a RL based strategy to improve both its reasoning quality and the correctness of tool selection and parameterization, while maintaining robust generalization to unseen guidelines and related tasks. We first validate the approach via verbal execution on 10 US scanning guidelines, assessing reasoning as well as tool selection and parameterization, and showing the benefit of RL fine tuning.
