We then demonstrate real world feasibility on robotic scanning of the gallbladder, spine, and kidney. Overall, the framework follows diverse guidelines and enables reliable autonomous scanning across multiple anatomical targets within a unified system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自主机器人超声扫描框架，实现了多解剖目标、多流程指导下的自动化、自适应超声检查。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人超声扫描系统通常依赖固定流程和特定任务模型，难以适应临床中多变或决策相关的流程，灵活性与可扩展性存在较大限制。该文旨在解决机器人系统在自主适应及可靠性、通用性方面的不足。
AI.method: 本文使用基于大语言模型的智能体来理解和操作超声扫描指南。系统动态调用一组软件工具，根据手册指南和实时反馈调整计划，允许更灵活地处理流程决策与任务变化。同时，为提高其决策的透明性和正确性，采用基于强化学习的方法优化推理与工具选择过程，并在多种指南和相关任务中测试泛化能力。
AI.result: 通过10种超声扫描指南的模拟流程验证，展示了RL微调带来的推理和工具选择性能提升。实际机器人实验中，系统顺利完成了胆囊、脊柱和肾脏等多目标扫描任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可以根据多样化的临床指导，实现面向不同解剖部位的可靠自主超声扫描，具备良好通用性和系统灵活性，推动机器人超声检查自动化和可解释性发展。

title: Bridging the Visual-to-Physical Gap: Physically Aligned Representations for Fall Risk Analysis
summary: Vision-based fall analysis has advanced rapidly, but a key bottleneck remains: visually similarmotions can correspond to very different physical outcomes because small differences in contactmechanics and protective responses are hard to infer from appearance alone. Most existingapproaches handle this by supervised injury prediction, which depends on reliable injury labels.In practice, such labels are difficult to obtain: video evidence is often ambiguous (occlusion,viewpoint limits), and true injury events are rare and cannot be safely staged, leading to noisysupervision. We address this problem with PHARL (PHysics-aware Alignment RepresentationLearning), which learns physically meaningful fall representations without requiring clinicaloutcome labels. PHARL regularizes motion embeddings with two complementary constraints:(1) trajectory-level temporal consistency for stable representation learning, and (2) multi-classphysics alignment, where simulation-derived contact outcomes shape embedding geometry. Bypairing video windows with temporally aligned simulation descriptors, PHARL captures localimpact-relevant dynamics while keeping inference purely feed-forward. Experiments on fourpublic datasets show that PHARL consistently improves risk-aligned representation quality overvisual-only baselines while maintaining strong fall-detection performance. Notably, PHARL alsoexhibits zero-shot ordinality: an interpretable severity structure (Head > Trunk > Supported)emerges without explicit ordinal supervision.

AI.tldr: PHARL算法提出了一种无需临床伤害标签的物理感知跌倒表征学习方法，大幅提升了跌倒风险与伤害可解释性的表示质量。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉跌倒分析难以准确区分不同物理后果（如是否真正受伤），因小的接触力学和保护反应细节难以通过外观推断；且依赖人工标记伤害难度大，标注稀缺且有噪声。
AI.method: 提出PHARL方法，通过两项正则约束（时序一致性与多类物理对齐），结合视频与物理仿真信息，无需临床结果标签即可学习与风险相关的可解释跌倒表示。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上，PHARL明显优于仅基于视觉的基线模型，提升风险相关表征质量且保持较好跌倒检测能力。还展现出零样本有序性：自动学出（头部>躯干>支撑）等受伤严重等级结构。
AI.conclusion: PHARL不用依赖困难的伤害标注，通过物理感知带来更高风险一致性的跌倒表征和解释性，在实际应用中更为安全、有效。

title: Top-b: Entropic Regulation of Relative Probability Bands in Autoregressive Language Processes
summary: Probabilistic language generators are theoretically modeled as discrete stochastic processes, yet standard decoding strategies (Top-k, Top-p) impose static truncation rules that fail to accommodate the dynamic information density of natural language. This misalignment often forces a suboptimal trade-off: static bounds are either too restrictive for high-entropy creative generation or too permissive for low-entropy logical reasoning. In this work, we formalize the generation process as a trajectory through a relative probability manifold. We introduce Top-b (Adaptive Relative Band Sampling), a decoding strategy that regulates the candidate set via a dynamic bandwidth coefficient coupled strictly to the instantaneous Shannon entropy of the model's distribution. We provide a theoretical framework demonstrating that Top-b acts as a variance-minimizing operator on the tail distribution. Empirical validation on GPQA and GSM8K benchmarks indicates that Top-b significantly reduces generation entropy and inter-decoding variance while maintaining competitive reasoning accuracy, effectively approximating a self-regulating control system for autoregressive generation.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种新颖的生成式语言模型解码方法Top-b（自适应相对带宽采样），相较于传统的Top-k和Top-p，能根据当前分布的信息熵动态调整采样边界，在自然语言生成任务中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有的Top-k和Top-p解码方法采用静态截断规则，无法自适应文本生成过程中的动态信息密度，常导致在创造性高的生成或逻辑性推理任务上表现不佳，需要更智能的采样机制。
AI.method: 作者将生成过程建模为概率流形上的轨迹，引入了Top-b方法，根据模型当前分布的香农熵动态调节采样候选集的大小，实现自适应采样。并提供理论证明，表明Top-b可以最小化尾部分布的方差。
AI.result: 在GPQA和GSM8K两个基准上的实验证明，Top-b能有效降低生成熵和多次解码间的方差，同时推理准确率与主流方法持平，展现出更稳定和可控的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: Top-b方法为自回归生成提供了一套自调节控制机制，克服了现有解码策略的静态性，提升了自然语言生成的灵活性和稳定性。

title: eNavi: Event-based Imitation Policies for Low-Light Indoor Mobile Robot Navigation
summary: Event cameras provide high dynamic range and microsecond-level temporal resolution, making them well-suited for indoor robot navigation, where conventional RGB cameras degrade under fast motion or low-light conditions. Despite advances in event-based perception spanning detection, SLAM, and pose estimation, there remains limited research on end-to-end control policies that exploit the asynchronous nature of event streams. To address this gap, we introduce a real-world indoor person-following dataset collected using a TurtleBot 2 robot, featuring synchronized raw event streams, RGB frames, and expert control actions across multiple indoor maps, trajectories under both normal and low-light conditions. We further build a multimodal data preprocessing pipeline that temporally aligns event and RGB observations while reconstructing ground-truth actions from odometry to support high-quality imitation learning. Building on this dataset, we propose a late-fusion RGB-Event navigation policy that combines dual MobileNet encoders with a transformer-based fusion module trained via behavioral cloning. A systematic evaluation of RGB-only, Event-only, and RGB-Event fusion models across 12 training variations ranging from single-path imitation to general multi-path imitation shows that policies incorporating event data, particularly the fusion model, achieve improved robustness and lower action prediction error, especially in unseen low-light conditions where RGB-only models fail. We release the dataset, synchronization pipeline, and trained models at https://eventbasedvision.github.io/eNavi/

AI.tldr: 本论文提出并公开了一个用于室内机器人跟随任务的真实数据集，涵盖事件相机与RGB相机数据，并基于此开发了一种融合模型，显著提升了机器人在低光等复杂环境下的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有高动态范围和微秒级时间分辨率，能应对传统RGB相机在快速运动或低光环境下的不足，但目前基于事件流的端到端控制策略研究较少，特别是在实际机器人导航中的应用。
AI.method: 作者收集了包含事件流、RGB帧和专家控制动作的室内机器人（TurtleBot 2）跟随数据集，并开发了用于事件-图像同步及动作重建的数据预处理管道。然后提出了一种基于行为克隆训练、融合事件与RGB信息的导航策略：利用双MobileNet编码器和Transformer融合模块，实现多模态信息的‘后融合’。
AI.result: 在12种不同训练设置下（从单一路径模仿到多路径泛化），对RGB、事件以及融合模型进行了系统评估。实验证明，融合了事件数据的模型在未见过的低光环境下展现出更强鲁棒性和更低的动作预测误差，RGB-only模型则表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 融合事件相机和RGB信息的导航策略提升了机器人在复杂环境下的导航鲁棒性，尤其适用于低光等极端场景。公开的数据集和模型可促进基于事件感知的机器人领域进一步发展。

title: WAT: Online Video Understanding Needs Watching Before Thinking
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong capabilities in image understanding, motivating recent efforts to extend them to video reasoning. However, existing Video LLMs struggle in online streaming scenarios, where long temporal context must be preserved under strict memory constraints. We propose WAT (Watching Before Thinking), a two-stage framework for online video reasoning. WAT separates processing into a query-independent watching stage and a query-triggered thinking stage. The watching stage builds a hierarchical memory system with a Short-Term Memory (STM) that buffers recent frames and a fixed-capacity Long-Term Memory (LTM) that maintains a diverse summary of historical content using a redundancy-aware eviction policy. In the thinking stage, a context-aware retrieval mechanism combines the query with the current STM context to retrieve relevant historical frames from the LTM for cross-temporal reasoning. To support training for online video tasks, we introduce WAT-85K, a dataset containing streaming-style annotations emphasizing real-time perception, backward tracing, and forecasting. Experiments show that WAT achieves state-of-the-art performance on online video benchmarks, including 77.7% accuracy on StreamingBench and 55.2% on OVO-Bench, outperforming existing open-source online Video LLMs while operating at real-time frame rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了WAT框架，有效提升了视频大模型在严格内存约束下的在线流媒体推理能力，取得了当前最优的实验成绩。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在理解图像方面展现出强大能力，但在视频推理、尤其是对长时间流媒体视频的在线推理场景中，由于内存与上下文长度受限，现有模型效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出WAT（Watching Before Thinking）两阶段框架，将视频处理划分为与查询无关的“观察阶段”和基于查询的“思考阶段”。前者通过短期（STM）和长期记忆（LTM）分层管理视频帧、采用冗余感知的帧淘汰策略；后者结合当前上下文从长期记忆中检索相关帧，实现跨时序推理。并引入了包含实时感知、回溯与预测标注的新数据集WAT-85K用于训练。
AI.result: WAT在主流在线视频推理基准上取得了最优表现：在StreamingBench上达到了77.7%的准确率，在OVO-Bench上达到了55.2%，且能实时处理视频帧。
AI.conclusion: WAT有效缓解了内存限制下的视频推理难题，在各种在线视频任务上优于同类开源视频大模型。

title: Parameter-Efficient Quality Estimation via Frozen Recursive Models
summary: Tiny Recursive Models (TRM) achieve strong results on reasoning tasks through iterative refinement of a shared network. We investigate whether these recursive mechanisms transfer to Quality Estimation (QE) for low-resource languages using a three-phase methodology. Experiments on $8$ language pairs on a low-resource QE dataset reveal three findings. First, TRM's recursive mechanisms do not transfer to QE. External iteration hurts performance, and internal recursion offers only narrow benefits. Next, representation quality dominates architectural choices, and lastly, frozen pretrained embeddings match fine-tuned performance while reducing trainable parameters by 37$\times$ (7M vs 262M). TRM-QE with frozen XLM-R embeddings achieves a Spearman's correlation of 0.370, matching fine-tuned variants (0.369) and outperforming an equivalent-depth standard transformer (0.336). On Hindi and Tamil, frozen TRM-QE outperforms MonoTransQuest (560M parameters) with 80$\times$ fewer trainable parameters, suggesting that weight sharing combined with frozen embeddings enables parameter efficiency for QE. We release the code publicly for further research. Code is available at https://github.com/surrey-nlp/TRMQE.

AI.tldr: 本文通过细致实验，评估了Tiny Recursive Models (TRM) 在低资源语言质量评估（QE）任务中的迁移能力。结果表明，递归机制在该任务上并无显著优势，冻结预训练词向量可大幅减少参数量且性能不输微调模型。
AI.motivation: TRM在推理任务上表现突出，但其递归机制是否能迁移到低资源语言的质量评估（QE）尚不明确。另一方面，低资源场景下参数效率尤为重要，因此值得探究递归机制和不同表征方法对QE任务的影响。
AI.method: 采用三个阶段的实验方法，在8对低资源语言数据集上，通过不同递归方式（外部迭代、内部递归）、不同表征（微调与冻结的XLM-R嵌入）与架构（TRM与标准Transformer）进行系统对比。
AI.result: 递归机制并未迁移至QE任务，外部迭代甚至削弱性能，内部递归仅有极小提升。表征质量优于架构创新，冻结预训练嵌入在减少参数37倍的同时，Spearman相关性与微调相当且优于同深度标准Transformer。在印地语和泰米尔语数据集，冻结TRM-QE优于560M参数的MonoTransQuest，所需可训练参数仅其1/80。
AI.conclusion: 递归机制对低资源语言质量评估任务无显著助益，表征质量为主要瓶颈。冻结的多语预训练词向量加权重共享可极大提高参数效率，并实现优异性能。

title: OCRA: Object-Centric Learning with 3D and Tactile Priors for Human-to-Robot Action Transfer
summary: We present OCRA, an Object-Centric framework for video-based human-to-Robot Action transfer that learns directly from human demonstration videos to enable robust manipulation. Object-centric learning emphasizes task-relevant objects and their interactions while filtering out irrelevant background, providing a natural and scalable way to teach robots. OCRA leverages multi-view RGB videos, the state-of-the-art 3D foundation model VGGT, and advanced detection and segmentation models to reconstruct object-centric 3D point clouds, capturing rich interactions between objects. To handle properties not easily perceived by vision alone, we incorporate tactile priors via a large-scale dataset of over one million tactile images. These 3D and tactile priors are fused through a multimodal module (ResFiLM) and fed into a Diffusion Policy to generate robust manipulation actions. Extensive experiments on both vision-only and visuo-tactile tasks show that OCRA significantly outperforms existing baselines and ablations, demonstrating its effectiveness for learning from human demonstration videos.

AI.tldr: OCRA是一个基于对象中心的视频人类到机器人动作迁移框架，通过结合多视角视频、3D模型和触觉数据，显著提升了机器人操作任务的学习和执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人学习方法往往难以从人类演示视频中高效学习，尤其是在复杂物体交互和多感知任务中。基于对象中心的学习有望聚焦于任务相关信息，提高泛化能力和执行效能。
AI.method: OCRA综合利用多视角RGB视频、VGGT等先进3D基础模型，以及目标检测与分割技术，将人类演示的视频转化为对象中心的3D点云，并通过大规模触觉图像数据引入触觉先验。利用ResFiLM模块融合视觉和触觉信息，最终通过扩散策略生成稳健的机器人操作动作。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，在仅视觉以及结合视觉与触觉的任务上，OCRA相比主流方法和消融实验有着显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: OCRA证明了基于对象的多模态信息融合在以人类演示视频指导机器人操作上极具潜力，有效提升了复杂任务下的学习与泛化能力。

title: Distance-aware Soft Prompt Learning for Multimodal Valence-Arousal Estimation
summary: Valence-arousal (VA) estimation is crucial for capturing the nuanced nature of human emotions in naturalistic environments. While pre-trained Vision-Language models like CLIP have shown remarkable semantic alignment capabilities, their application in continuous regression tasks is often limited by the discrete nature of text prompts. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal framework for VA estimation that introduces Distance-aware Soft Prompt Learning to bridge the gap between semantic space and continuous dimensions. Specifically, we partition the VA space into a 3X3 grid, defining nine emotional regions, each associated with distinct textual descriptions. Rather than a hard categorization, we employ a Gaussian kernel to compute soft labels based on the Euclidean distance between the ground truth coordinates and the region centers, allowing the model to learn fine-grained emotional transitions. For multimodal integration, our architecture utilizes a CLIP image encoder and an Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) to extract robust spatial and acoustic features. These features are temporally modeled via Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) and integrated through a hierarchical fusion scheme that sequentially combines cross-modal attention for alignment and gated fusion for adaptive refinement. Experimental results on the Aff-Wild2 dataset demonstrate that our proposed semantic-guided approach significantly enhances the accuracy of VA estimation, achieving competitive performance in unconstrained ``in-the-wild'' scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于情感价-激度（Valence-Arousal, VA）估计的新型多模态方法，在预训练视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的基础上，通过软提示学习和多模态融合显著提升了情感估计精度。
AI.motivation: 情感VA估计在自然环境下对理解人类情绪状态非常重要，但现有基于预训练视觉-语言模型的方法受限于文本提示离散化、难以直接处理连续回归任务，因此需设计新方法以突破此瓶颈。
AI.method: 将VA空间划分为3x3网格并为九个区域设计不同文本提示，借助高斯核以欧氏距离对标签进行软编码。模型由CLIP图像编码器和音频声谱变换器（AST）提取空间及声学特征，利用GRUs进行时序建模，通过层次化融合结构实现跨模态特征对齐与自适应信息融合。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2公开数据集上，所提方法相较于以往方案显著提升了VA估计准确率，并在复杂自然环境（in-the-wild）下表现出极具竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入距离感知的软提示学习与多模态融合，模型在VA连续估计上的性能取得突破，验证了语义引导机制与精细情感建模的有效性。

title: $PA^3$: $\textbf{P}$olicy-$\textbf{A}$ware $\textbf{A}$gent $\textbf{A}$lignment through Chain-of-Thought
summary: Conversational assistants powered by large language models (LLMs) excel at tool-use tasks but struggle with adhering to complex, business-specific rules. While models can reason over business rules provided in context, including all policies for every query introduces high latency and wastes compute. Furthermore, these lengthy prompts lead to long contexts, harming overall performance due to the "needle-in-the-haystack" problem. To address these challenges, we propose a multi-stage alignment method that teaches models to recall and apply relevant business policies during chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time, without including the full business policy in-context. Furthermore, we introduce a novel PolicyRecall reward based on the Jaccard score and a Hallucination Penalty for GRPO training. Altogether, our best model outperforms the baseline by 16 points and surpasses comparable in-context baselines of similar model size by 3 points, while using 40% fewer words.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多阶段对齐方法，使大语言模型（LLMs）在无需全部上下文的情况下也能遵循企业级复杂规则，提升了工具使用及规则应用的能力，并显著减少了提示长度和计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型虽然擅长工具使用，但难以准确遵循企业中复杂的业务规则。将所有规则都放进上下文不仅导致高延迟、浪费算力，还会因为上下文过长影响模型表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种多阶段对齐方法，让模型能在推理时回忆并应用相关业务规则，而无需在每次推理都输入完整规则内容。此外引入了基于Jaccard分数的PolicyRecall奖励和幻觉惩罚，在GRPO训练框架下提升训练效果。
AI.result: 实验显示，作者提出的最优模型比基础模型得分高16点，比同体量基于上下文方法高3点，同时减少了40%提示词数量。
AI.conclusion: 这种方法不仅显著提升了模型在遵循复杂业务规则时的性能，还有效降低了推理时的开销，证明了按需记忆与应用规则的新方法的有效性。

title: Towards Versatile Opti-Acoustic Sensor Fusion and Volumetric Mapping
comment: To appear at ICRA 2026 in Vienna, Austria
summary: Accurate 3D volumetric mapping is critical for autonomous underwater vehicles operating in obstacle-rich environments. Vision-based perception provides high-resolution data but fails in turbid conditions, while sonar is robust to lighting and turbidity but suffers from low resolution and elevation ambiguity. This paper presents a volumetric mapping framework that fuses a stereo sonar pair with a monocular camera to enable safe navigation under varying visibility conditions. Overlapping sonar fields of view resolve elevation ambiguity, producing fully defined 3D point clouds at each time step. The framework identifies regions of interest in camera images, associates them with corresponding sonar returns, and combines sonar range with camera-derived elevation cues to generate additional 3D points. Each 3D point is assigned a confidence value reflecting its reliability. These confidence-weighted points are fused using a Gaussian Process Volumetric Mapping framework that prioritizes the most reliable measurements. Experimental comparisons with other opti-acoustic and sonar-based approaches, along with field tests in a marina environment, demonstrate the method's effectiveness in capturing complex geometries and preserving critical information for robot navigation in both clear and turbid conditions. Our code is open-source to support community adoption.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种融合声纳和摄像头的水下3D体积建图方法，在能见度变化时也能实现高精度导航。
AI.motivation: 在水下环境中，纯视觉受限于浑浊水域，纯声纳虽然鲁棒但分辨率低且无法准确获取高度，急需一种融合方案提升3D环境感知。
AI.method: 使用一对立体声纳与单目摄像头，通过重叠声纳视场消除高度歧义，将声纳距离和摄像头图片中关注区域结合生成带有置信度的3D点，最后利用高斯过程体积建图框架进行信赖度加权融合。
AI.result: 实验与现有声学和声光融合方案对比，并在码头实地测试，表明新方法在复杂结构重建和导航关键信息保留方面效果更佳，无论水清澈还是浑浊。
AI.conclusion: 所提多传感器融合方法有效提升了水下机器人在各种能见度下的导航与环境感知能力，代码开源促进社区发展。

title: MIBench: Evaluating LMMs on Multimodal Interaction
summary: In different multimodal scenarios, it needs to integrate and utilize information across modalities in a specific way based on the demands of the task. Different integration ways between modalities are referred to as "multimodal interaction". How well a model handles various multimodal interactions largely characterizes its multimodal ability. In this paper, we introduce MIBench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the multimodal interaction capabilities of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), which formulates each instance as a (con_v , con_t, task) triplet with contexts from vision and text, necessitating that LMMs employ correct forms of multimodal interaction to effectively complete the task. MIBench assesses models from three key aspects: the ability to source information from vision-centric or text-centric cues, and the ability to generate new information from their joint synergy. Each interaction capability is evaluated hierarchically across three cognitive levels: Recognition, Understanding, and Reasoning. MIBench comprises over 10,000 vision-text context pairs spanning 32 distinct tasks. Evaluation of state-of-the-art LMMs show that: (1) LMMs' ability on multimodal interaction remains constrained, despite the scaling of model parameters and training data; (2) they are easily distracted by textual modalities when processing vision information; (3) they mostly possess a basic capacity for multimodal synergy; and (4) natively trained multimodal models show noticeable deficits in fundamental interaction ability. We expect that these observations can serve as a reference for developing LMMs with more enhanced multimodal ability in the future.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIBench，一个用于系统评估大规模多模态模型（LMMs）多模态交互能力的基准集。MIBench涵盖三类交互能力和三个认知层次，系统考查视觉、文本及其协同任务共32类任务共1万对数据。实验揭示了当前主流LMMs在多模态交互上的主要瓶颈和不足。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在处理不同模态间信息整合时面临能力差异，但尚无全面的评测基准来细粒度分析多模态交互能力及其短板。因此，作者提出MIBench，旨在为多模态交互的研究和模型设计提供细致评价工具。
AI.method: 提出MIBench基准，将每个评测实例建模为（视觉上下文，文本上下文，任务）三元组，从视觉取证、文本取证及协同推理三方面，在识别、理解、推理三层认知能力上系统评估LMMs共32类任务，数据规模达1万多例。比较多种最新LMMs的表现。
AI.result: （1）主流LMMs的多模态交互能力仍有限，模型增大和数据扩展后提升有限；（2）模型容易受文本任务干扰，导致视觉信息处理减弱；（3）多数模型多模态协同能力尚处于基础阶段；（4）原生多模态模型在基本交互能力方面仍存在明显短板。
AI.conclusion: 目前LMMs的多模态交互能力还有很大提升空间。MIBench为未来多模态模型能力分析、方向改进和模型训练策略设计提供了重要参考。

title: Seamless Deception: Larger Language Models Are Better Knowledge Concealers
summary: Language Models (LMs) may acquire harmful knowledge, and yet feign ignorance of these topics when under audit. Inspired by the recent discovery of deception-related behaviour patterns in LMs, we aim to train classifiers that detect when a LM is actively concealing knowledge. Initial findings on smaller models show that classifiers can detect concealment more reliably than human evaluators, with gradient-based concealment proving easier to identify than prompt-based methods. However, contrary to prior work, we find that the classifiers do not reliably generalize to unseen model architectures and topics of hidden knowledge. Most concerningly, the identifiable traces associated with concealment become fainter as the models increase in scale, with the classifiers achieving no better than random performance on any model exceeding 70 billion parameters. Our results expose a key limitation in black-box-only auditing of LMs and highlight the need to develop robust methods to detect models that are actively hiding the knowledge they contain.

AI.tldr: 本论文关注大语言模型（LM）有意隐瞒有害知识的检测难题，发现现有检测方法在大模型上效果有限。
AI.motivation: 近年来研究表明LM具备欺骗性行为的能力，尤其在面临审查时可能伪装不知有害知识。鉴于LM广泛应用，如何识别这类隐瞒行为对保障安全与透明尤为重要。
AI.method: 作者以小型LM为对象，训练分类器来检测模型在隐藏知识时的行为迹象，并比较不同隐藏技术（基于梯度与基于prompt）。实验对比了分类器与人类评估者的表现，并进一步测试了分类器泛化到不同架构和主题的能力。
AI.result: 分类器在小模型上检测隐瞒行为优于人类，但对新架构和主题的泛化能力不佳。特别是在模型规模超过700亿参数时，隐瞒特征难以被抓取，分类器性能下降到随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前只靠黑盒方法，很难有效审计大规模语言模型是否主动隐瞒知识，表明急需发展更稳健的检测手段保障LM安全。

title: Physics-Informed Policy Optimization via Analytic Dynamics Regularization
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved strong performance in robotic control; however, state-of-the-art policy learning methods, such as actor-critic methods, still suffer from high sample complexity and often produce physically inconsistent actions. This limitation stems from neural policies implicitly rediscovering complex physics from data alone, despite accurate dynamics models being readily available in simulators. In this paper, we introduce a novel physics-informed RL framework, called PIPER, that seamlessly integrates physical constraints directly into neural policy optimization with analytical soft physics constraints. At the core of our method is the integration of a differentiable Lagrangian residual as a regularization term within the actor's objective. This residual, extracted from a robot's simulator description, subtly biases policy updates towards dynamically consistent solutions. Crucially, this physics integration is realized through an additional loss term during policy optimization, requiring no alterations to existing simulators or core RL algorithms. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves learning efficiency, stability, and control accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for efficient and physically consistent robotic control.

AI.tldr: PIPER是一种新颖的物理约束强化学习框架，通过在神经策略优化中加入软物理约束，有效提高了机器人控制的学习效率和物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前RL策略学习方法样本复杂度高，且常导致物理不一致的控制行为。虽然存在精准的物理模拟器，但神经网络策略仍需从数据中'重新发现'物理规律，效率低下。
AI.method: 在policy优化目标函数中引入可微分的拉格朗日残差作为正则项，该残差来源于机器人的仿真器描述，作为软物理约束，无需改动现有模拟器或RL算法。
AI.result: 实验证明，该物理约束方法大幅提高了策略学习效率、训练稳定性和控制精度。
AI.conclusion: PIPER提出了一个集成物理约束的新范式，为高效且物理一致的机器人控制提供了可行方案。

title: A Deformable Attention-Based Detection Transformer with Cross-Scale Feature Fusion for Industrial Coil Spring Inspection
summary: Automated visual inspection of locomotive coil springs presents significant challenges due to the morphological diversity of surface defects, substantial scale variations, and complex industrial backgrounds. This paper proposes MSD-DETR (Multi-Scale Deformable Detection Transformer), a novel detection framework that addresses these challenges through three key innovations: (1) a structural re-parameterization strategy that decouples training-time multi-branch topology from inference-time efficiency, enhancing feature extraction while maintaining real-time performance; (2) a deformable attention mechanism that enables content-adaptive spatial sampling, allowing dynamic focus on defect-relevant regions regardless of morphological irregularity; and (3) a cross-scale feature fusion architecture incorporating GSConv modules and VoVGSCSP blocks for effective multi-resolution information aggregation. Comprehensive experiments on a real-world locomotive coil spring dataset demonstrate that MSD-DETR achieves 92.4\% mAP@0.5 at 98 FPS, outperforming state-of-the-art detectors including YOLOv8 (+3.1\% mAP) and the baseline RT-DETR (+2.8\% mAP) while maintaining comparable inference speed, establishing a new benchmark for industrial coil spring quality inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MSD-DETR的检测框架，有效提升了机车螺旋弹簧自动视觉检测的精度和速度，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 机车螺旋弹簧表面缺陷形态各异、尺度变化大，且工业现场背景复杂，导致自动化检测难度高。需要一种既能精准识别多种类型缺陷、又高效的检测方法。
AI.method: 1. 结构重参数化，将多分支特征结构训练时与推理时解耦，提升特征提取并保证实时性；2. 采用可变形注意力机制，实现基于内容自适应的空间采样，动态聚焦关键区域；3. 融合GSConv与VoVGSCSP模块，构建跨尺度特征融合架构，提高多尺度信息汇聚能力。
AI.result: 在真实的机车螺旋弹簧数据集上，MSD-DETR获得92.4%的mAP@0.5，推理速度98FPS，相比YOLOv8提升3.1%，相比RT-DETR提升2.8%，性能领先现有主流方法并保持实时速度。
AI.conclusion: MSD-DETR有效解决了螺旋弹簧视觉检测中的多形态、变尺度和复杂背景挑战，树立了工业质量检测新标杆，具有重要应用价值。

title: Computational Analysis of Semantic Connections Between Herman Melville Reading and Writing
summary: This study investigates the potential influence of Herman Melville reading on his own writings through computational semantic similarity analysis. Using documented records of books known to have been owned or read by Melville, we compare selected passages from his works with texts from his library. The methodology involves segmenting texts at both sentence level and non-overlapping 5-gram level, followed by similarity computation using BERTScore. Rather than applying fixed thresholds to determine reuse, we interpret precision, recall, and F1 scores as indicators of possible semantic alignment that may suggest literary influence. Experimental results demonstrate that the approach successfully captures expert-identified instances of similarity and highlights additional passages warranting further qualitative examination. The findings suggest that semantic similarity methods provide a useful computational framework for supporting source and influence studies in literary scholarship.

AI.tldr: 本文利用计算语义相似性分析，探究梅尔维尔阅读经历对其写作的潜在影响。结果表明，语义相似度方法能有效辅助文学影响力研究。
AI.motivation: 文学影响研究常依靠专家主观判断，但缺乏客观、可量化的方法。本文旨在通过计算手段，分析作家梅尔维尔阅读书籍对其作品内容的影响。
AI.method: 收集梅尔维尔拥有或阅读的书籍，选择其作品片段，与其藏书的文本进行对比。文本分为句子级和5-gram短语级，用BERTScore计算语义相似度。不同于过去设定阈值直接判断复用，本文用precision、recall和F1分数衡量语义一致性，并据此推断影响。
AI.result: 方法不仅能捕捉专家已识别的相关性，还能发现新的值得质性分析的片段。结果证明该计算方法在文学影响研究中有效。
AI.conclusion: 计算语义相似度方法可为文学溯源与影响研究提供有力工具，辅助文学分析的客观化和自动化。

title: R3DP: Real-Time 3D-Aware Policy for Embodied Manipulation
summary: Embodied manipulation requires accurate 3D understanding of objects and their spatial relations to plan and execute contact-rich actions. While large-scale 3D vision models provide strong priors, their computational cost incurs prohibitive latency for real-time control. We propose Real-time 3D-aware Policy (R3DP), which integrates powerful 3D priors into manipulation policies without sacrificing real-time performance. A core innovation of R3DP is the asynchronous fast-slow collaboration module, which seamlessly integrates large-scale 3D priors into the policy without compromising real-time performance. The system maintains real-time efficiency by querying the pre-trained slow system (VGGT) only on sparse key frames, while simultaneously employing a lightweight Temporal Feature Prediction Network (TFPNet) to predict features for all intermediate frames. By leveraging historical data to exploit temporal correlations, TFPNet explicitly improves task success rates through consistent feature estimation. Additionally, to enable more effective multi-view fusion, we introduce a Multi-View Feature Fuser (MVFF) that aggregates features across views by explicitly incorporating camera intrinsics and extrinsics. R3DP offers a plug-and-play solution for integrating large models into real-time inference systems. We evaluate R3DP against multiple baselines across different visual configurations. R3DP effectively harnesses large-scale 3D priors to achieve superior results, outperforming single-view and multi-view DP by 32.9% and 51.4% in average success rate, respectively. Furthermore, by decoupling heavy 3D reasoning from policy execution, R3DP achieves a 44.8% reduction in inference time compared to a naive DP+VGGT integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为R3DP的实时3D感知策略，能够高效地将大型3D视觉先验模型融入机器人操作任务，实现高成功率并大大减少推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 当前大型3D视觉模型能显著提升对物体及空间关系的理解，有助于机器人实现复杂的操作任务，但其高计算开销导致推理延迟，难以满足实时控制需求。因此，亟需一种方法能在有效利用强大3D先验的同时，实现实时决策。
AI.method: R3DP系统的核心创新是引入异步的快-慢协同模块，利用慢速的大型3D模型（如VGGT）对关键帧进行推理，而对其它帧则通过轻量的时序特征预测网络（TFPNet）利用历史信息进行特征预测，从而保持实时效率。多视角特征融合器（MVFF）进一步结合了不同视角的特征，通过相机内外参数提升融合效果。
AI.result: 在多组视觉配置及基线模型下，R3DP能够有效整合大型3D先验，操作任务平均成功率比单视图和多视图DP分别高32.9%和51.4%，推理时延相较于直接集成VGGT减少44.8%。
AI.conclusion: R3DP能够以即插即用的方式将大型模型引入实时控制系统，兼顾了强大的3D理解能力和实时性能，在嵌入式操作任务上具有广泛应用前景。

title: Spatial Transcriptomics as Images for Large-Scale Pretraining
summary: Spatial Transcriptomics (ST) profiles thousands of gene expression values at discrete spots with precise coordinates on tissue sections, preserving spatial context essential for clinical and pathological studies. With rising sequencing throughput and advancing platforms, the expanding data volumes motivate large-scale ST pretraining. However, the fundamental unit for pretraining, i.e., what constitutes a single training sample, remains ill-posed. Existing choices fall into two camps: (1) treating each spot as an independent sample, which discards spatial dependencies and collapses ST into single-cell transcriptomics; and (2) treating an entire slide as a single sample, which produces prohibitively large inputs and drastically fewer training examples, undermining effective pretraining. To address this gap, we propose treating spatial transcriptomics as croppable images. Specifically, we define a multi-channel image representation with fixed spatial size by cropping patches from raw slides, thereby preserving spatial context while substantially increasing the number of training samples. Along the channel dimension, we define gene subset selection rules to control input dimensionality and improve pretraining stability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed image-like dataset construction for ST pretraining consistently improves downstream performance, outperforming conventional pretraining schemes. Ablation studies verify that both spatial patching and channel design are necessary, establishing a unified, practical paradigm for organizing ST data and enabling large-scale pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将空间转录组（ST）数据按多通道图像裁剪为小块的新预训练样本划分方案，有效平衡了空间信息保留与样本数量扩增，显著提升了下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着测序通量的提升和平台的不断进步，空间转录组数据量正快速增长，亟需大规模预训练以充分挖掘信息。然而，预训练的基本单元如何定义一直缺乏合理方案：单点视作样本则丢失空间信息，整张切片视作样本则计算量过大、样本数过少，影响预训练效果。
AI.method: 作者创新性地将ST数据建模为“可裁剪的多通道图像”，通过按固定空间尺寸在切片上裁剪patch作为单一训练样本，在通道维度制定基因选择规则以控制输入维度、提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 实验显示，这种类似图像裁剪和通道设计的ST样本构建方法能显著提升ST预训练后在下游任务中的表现，并优于现有主流预训练策略。消融实验验证了空间patch和通道选择的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了统一且实用的ST数据组织和大规模预训练方案，为空间转录组预训练任务建立了新的范式。

title: Towards Next-Generation LLM Training: From the Data-Centric Perspective
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks and domains, with data playing a central role in enabling these advances. Despite this success, the preparation and effective utilization of the massive datasets required for LLM training remain major bottlenecks. In current practice, LLM training data is often constructed using ad hoc scripts, and there is still a lack of mature, agent-based data preparation systems that can automatically construct robust and reusable data workflows, thereby freeing data scientists from repetitive and error-prone engineering efforts. Moreover, once collected, datasets are often consumed largely in their entirety during training, without systematic mechanisms for data selection, mixture optimization, or reweighting. To address these limitations, we advocate two complementary research directions. First, we propose building a robust, agent-based automatic data preparation system that supports automated workflow construction and scalable data management. Second, we argue for a unified data-model interaction training system in which data is dynamically selected, mixed, and reweighted throughout the training process, enabling more efficient, adaptive, and performance-aware data utilization. Finally, we discuss the remaining challenges and outline promising directions for future research and system development.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前大模型（LLMs）数据准备存在流程混乱和低效的问题，提出利用智能体自动化和数据动态管理来改进训练数据使用。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型数据准备依赖手工脚本，流程杂乱且易出错，且训练过程对数据利用方式单一，无法高效适应模型需求，因而需要新的方法提升数据处理效率和智能化程度。
AI.method: 1. 推动基于agent的自动化数据准备系统，实现自动构建数据处理流程和可扩展的数据管理。2. 构建统一的数据-模型交互训练系统，实现数据在训练过程中的动态筛选、混合与重加权。
AI.result: 通过上述两个方向，实现了数据准备自动化和数据利用智能化，提高训练的适应性、效率与性能。
AI.conclusion: 大模型时代，需发展智能化、自动化的数据准备与管理系统，并在训练中动态、高效利用数据，未来还需解决开放挑战并完善相关系统。

title: One-Policy-Fits-All: Geometry-Aware Action Latents for Cross-Embodiment Manipulation
summary: Cross-embodiment manipulation is crucial for enhancing the scalability of robot manipulation and reducing the high cost of data collection. However, the significant differences between embodiments, such as variations in action spaces and structural disparities, pose challenges for joint training across multiple sources of data. To address this, we propose One-Policy-Fits-All (OPFA), a framework that enables learning a single, versatile policy across multiple embodiments. We first learn a Geometry-Aware Latent Representation (GaLR), which leverages 3D convolution networks and transformers to build a shared latent action space across different embodiments. Then we design a unified latent retargeting decoder that extracts embodiment-specific actions from the latent representations, without any embodiment-specific decoder tuning. OPFA enables end-to-end co-training of data from diverse embodiments, including various grippers and dexterous hands with arbitrary degrees of freedom, significantly improving data efficiency and reducing the cost of skill transfer. We conduct extensive experiments across 11 different end-effectors. The results demonstrate that OPFA significantly improves policy performance in diverse settings by leveraging heterogeneous embodiment data. For instance, cross-embodiment co-training can improve success rates by more than 50% compared to single-source training. Moreover, by adding only a few demonstrations from a new embodiment (e.g., eight), OPFA can achieve performance comparable to that of a well-trained model with 72 demonstrations.

AI.tldr: OPFA是一种能够在多个机器人结构间共享策略的框架，大幅提升了跨结构操作的效率与数据利用率。
AI.motivation: 机器人操控任务中，不同结构（不同夹爪、灵巧手等）的动作空间和结构差异大，导致难以用同一策略跨结构泛化训练，数据收集成本非常高。
AI.method: 提出OPFA框架，核心做法是先利用3D卷积网络和Transformer学习一个几何感知的潜在动作表示（GaLR），实现不同结构之间的动作空间共享。然后通过统一的潜在动作重定向解码器，从潜在空间中解码出具体结构的动作，无需为每种结构单独调整解码器。支持多种结构的数据端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在11种不同末端执行器上做了大量实验。结果显示，OPFA能显著提升政策性能。例如，跨结构联合训练的成功率比单一结构训练高出50%以上。对于新结构，只需极少（如8条）演示就能达到等同于用大量（如72条）演示训练的效果。
AI.conclusion: OPFA框架极大提高了跨结构操控的泛化能力和数据效率，降低了新结构适应的门槛，有助于推动机器人操作领域的扩展与应用。

title: CtrlAttack: A Unified Attack on World-Model Control in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion-based image-to-video (I2V) models increasingly exhibit world-model-like properties by implicitly capturing temporal dynamics. However, existing studies have mainly focused on visual quality and controllability, and the robustness of the state transition learned by the model remains understudied. To fill this gap, we are the first to analyze the vulnerability of I2V models, find that temporal control mechanisms constitute a new attack surface, and reveal the challenge of modeling them uniformly under different attack settings. Based on this, we propose a trajectory-control attack, called CtrlAttack, to interfere with state evolution during the generation process. Specifically, we represent the perturbation as a low-dimensional velocity field and construct a continuous displacement field via temporal integration, thereby affecting the model's state transitions while maintaining temporal consistency; meanwhile, we map the perturbation to the observation space, making the method applicable to both white-box and black-box attack settings. Experimental results show that even under low-dimensional and strongly regularized perturbation constraints, our method can still significantly disrupt temporal consistency by increasing the attack success rate (ASR) to over 90% in the white-box setting and over 80% in the black-box setting, while keeping the variation of the FID and FVD within 6 and 130, respectively, thus revealing the potential security risk of I2V models at the level of state dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对扩散式图像生成视频（I2V）模型的动态攻击方法CtrlAttack，能够显著扰乱视频的时序一致性，揭示了I2V模型在状态动态上的安全风险。
AI.motivation: 现有I2V模型越来越具备“世界模型”属性，即能够隐式捕获时间动态。但相关研究主要关注视觉质量和可控性，对于模型学习到的状态转移的鲁棒性缺乏系统研究。本文首次关注模型时间控制机制的脆弱性和安全风险。
AI.method: 作者提出CtrlAttack轨迹控制攻击，在生成过程中通过低维速度场扰动和积分得到的连续位移场影响状态转移，实现对白盒和黑盒模型的攻击，并保持攻击具有时序一致性。
AI.result: 在强正则和低维扰动条件下，CtrlAttack在白盒设置下攻击成功率超过90%，黑盒设置下超过80%，对评测指标FID和FVD影响有限（变动分别小于6和130），但能显著扰乱时序一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前I2V模型在时序动态层面的安全漏洞，表明模型的时间控制机制构成新型攻击面，后续研究需重视模型时序鲁棒性及防御机制。

title: Beyond Creed: A Non-Identity Safety Condition A Strong Empirical Alternative to Identity Framing in Low-Data LoRA Fine-Tuning
summary:
How safety supervision is written may matter more than the explicit identity content it contains. We study low-data LoRA safety fine-tuning with four supervision formats built from the same core safety rules: constitutional rules (A), creed-style identity framing (B), a B-matched creed condition with a worldview/confession identity-maintenance tail (C), and a matched non-identity condition (D). Across three instruction-tuned model families (Llama 3.1 8B, Qwen2.5 7B, and Gemma 3 4B), we evaluate HarmBench using a reconciled dual-judge pipeline combining Bedrock-hosted DeepSeek v3.2 and Sonnet 4.6, with disagreement and boundary cases manually resolved.
  The non-identity condition D is the strongest group on all three model families on the full 320-behavior HarmBench set, reaching 74.4% refusal on Llama, 76.9% on Gemma, and 74.1% on Qwen. By comparison, creed-style framing (B) improves over plain constitutional rules (A) on Llama and Gemma, but remains substantially below D, yielding an overall descriptive ordering of $D > B > C \geq A > baseline$. This provides a bounded empirical challenge to a strong version of the identity-framing hypothesis: explicit creed-style identity language is not necessary for the strongest gains observed here. Capability evaluations on MMLU and ARC-Challenge show no meaningful trade-off across conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同安全监督格式对大模型安全微调效果的影响，发现非身份相关的表达方式效果最好，挑战了‘身份框架假说’。
AI.motivation: 近年来大模型安全性受到关注，已有工作提出通过带有‘身份认同’色彩的监督（如宪法、信念宣誓等）提升模型拒绝有害请求的能力，但这些监督的表达方式是否本身影响模型效果仍不明确。因此，本文旨在比较不同安全指导写法对微调效果的实际影响。
AI.method: 作者设计了四种表达同样安全规则的监督格式：宪法条款（A）、信念宣誓式（B）、B-matched并附有身份维护尾注（C），以及不涉及身份表述的版本（D）。分别用少量数据对Llama 3.1 8B、Qwen2.5 7B和Gemma 3 4B等三个模型系列进行微调，使用HarmBench全套320行为，对拒绝有害请求的比例进行评估，并利用双裁判体系确保评价一致性。同时，在MMLU和ARC-Challenge上检测能力影响。
AI.result: 在全部模型上，非身份相关的D组（无身份表述）均表现为最高拒绝率（Llama: 74.4%、Gemma: 76.9%、Qwen: 74.1%），显著优于其它三组。B组（信仰宣誓）和A组（宪法）均不如D组。总体排序为D > B > C ≧ A > baseline。各组在通用能力上的表现无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 安全监督内容的‘表达方式’比赋予其身份色彩更重要，用简单、非身份相关的语句能获得更好安全性提升，不必强调身份认同。挑战了‘身份框架假说’的强版观点。

title: Architecting Autonomy for Safe Microgravity Free-Flyer Inspection
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, published in the Proceedings of the 2025 IEEE Aerospace Conference
summary: Small free-flying spacecraft can provide vital extravehicular activity (EVA) services like inspection and repair for future orbital outposts like the Lunar Gateway. Operating adjacent to delicate space station and microgravity targets, these spacecraft require formalization to describe the autonomy that a free-flyer inspection mission must provide. This work explores the transformation of general mission requirements for this class of free-flyer into a set of concrete decisions for the planning and control autonomy architectures that will power such missions. Flowing down from operator commands for inspection of important regions and mission time-criticality, a motion planning problem emerges that provides the basis for developing autonomy solutions. Unique constraints are considered such as velocity limitations, pointing, and keep-in/keep-out zones, with mission fallback techniques for providing hierarchical safety guarantees under model uncertainties and failure. Planning considerations such as cost function design and path vs. trajectory control are discussed. The typical inputs and outputs of the planning and control autonomy stack of such a mission are also provided. Notional system requirements such as solve times and propellant use are documented to inform planning and control design. The entire proposed autonomy framework for free-flyer inspection is realized in the SmallSatSim simulation environment, providing a reference example of free-flyer inspection autonomy. The proposed autonomy architecture serves as a blueprint for future implementations of small satellite autonomous inspection in proximity to mission-critical hardware, going beyond the existing literature in terms of both (1) providing realistic system requirements for an autonomous inspection mission and (2) translating these requirements into autonomy design decisions for inspection planning and control.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对空间站等轨道前哨基地的航天器外部巡视任务，提出了一套适用于小型自由飞行器的自主规划与控制体系结构，实现了在仿真环境下的验证。
AI.motivation: 未来轨道前哨（如月球网关）需要小型自由飞行器执行关键舱外巡视与维护任务。由于飞行环境复杂且目标设备精密，急需对巡视任务所需的自主能力进行正式建模和架构设计，以确保安全、高效地完成任务。
AI.method: 论文将通用的巡视任务需求转化为自主体系中的具体决策，系统梳理了任务命令、时间、速度限制、朝向控制、飞行禁区等约束条件，提出分层安全保障和异常应对方法，对规划中的代价函数、路径与轨迹控制进行了深入讨论，并给出了系统输入输出与性能需求。最终，所提框架在SmallSatSim仿真环境中实现，验证了方案的可行性。
AI.result: 提出的自主框架满足航天巡视任务的系统需求（如解算时间、推进剂消耗等），有效地将任务要求转化为规划与控制决策，实现了安全、可靠的巡视路径规划与自主控制。相关方法与设计为后续实际应用提供了蓝本和参考。
AI.conclusion: 文中自主体系结构为未来小型自由飞行器的舱外巡视与检查任务提供了系统性的设计范例，不仅明确了真实任务需求，也给出了将需求具体化为自主设计决策的路径，有效推动了该领域的发展。

title: Vision-Language Based Expert Reporting for Painting Authentication and Defect Detection
comment: Submitted to Journal of Cultural Heritage
summary: Authenticity and condition assessment are central to conservation decision-making, yet interpretation and reporting of thermographic output remain largely bespoke and expert-dependent, complicating comparison across collections and limiting systematic integration into conservation documentation. Pulsed Active Infrared Thermography (AIRT) is sensitive to subsurface features such as material heterogeneity, voids, and past interventions; however, its broader adoption is constrained by artifact misinterpretation, inter-laboratory variability, and the absence of standardized, explainable reporting frameworks. Although multi-modal thermographic processing techniques are established, their integration with structured natural-language interpretation has not been explored in cultural heritage. A fully automated thermography-vision-language model (VLM) framework is presented. It combines multi-modal AIRT analysis with modality-aware textual reporting, without human intervention during inference. Thermal sequences are processed using Principal Component Thermography (PCT), Thermographic Signal Reconstruction (TSR), and Pulsed Phase Thermography (PPT), and the resulting anomaly masks are fused into a consensus segmentation that emphasizes regions supported by multiple thermal indicators while mitigating boundary artifacts. The fused evidence is provided to a VLM, which generates structured reports describing the location of the anomaly, thermal behavior, and plausible physical interpretations while explicitly acknowledging the uncertainty and diagnostic limitations. Evaluation on two marquetries demonstrates consistent anomaly detection and stable structured interpretations, indicating reproducibility and generalizability across samples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全自动红外热成像-视觉-语言模型框架，用于文化遗产保护中的异物检测和结构化报告生成，提升分析的标准化和可比性。
AI.motivation: 在文化遗产保护过程中，真实性和状况评估至关重要。然而，热成像结果的解释和报告高度依赖于专家，缺乏标准化，导致不同文物、实验室之间难以比较和系统化整合热成像信息。
AI.method: 作者提出结合多模态脉冲主动红外热成像（AIRT）与视觉-语言模型（VLM）的自动化流程。具体包括：利用主成分热像法（PCT）、热信号重构（TSR）、脉冲相位热像（PPT）对热序列数据处理，融合多种热指标得到共识分割掩模，随后由VLM生成结构化文字报告，包括异常区域定位、热学行为与物理解释。
AI.result: 在两个细木镶嵌实例上实验显示，该框架能稳定、可重复地检测出异常区，并生成一致、结构化的解释文本，具备跨样本的通用性和可推广性。
AI.conclusion: 全自动AIRT-VLM框架增强了热成像结果解释的标准化与可比性，降低了对个别专家的依赖，为文化遗产保护评估提供了可复现、易集成的技术基础。

title: Learning Constituent Headedness
summary: Headedness is widely used as an organizing device in syntactic analysis, yet constituency treebanks rarely encode it explicitly and most processing pipelines recover it procedurally via percolation rules. We treat this notion of constituent headedness as an explicit representational layer and learn it as a supervised prediction task over aligned constituency and dependency annotations, inducing supervision by defining each constituent head as the dependency span head. On aligned English and Chinese data, the resulting models achieve near-ceiling intrinsic accuracy and substantially outperform Collins-style rule-based percolation. Predicted heads yield comparable parsing accuracy under head-driven binarization, consistent with the induced binary training targets being largely equivalent across head choices, while increasing the fidelity of deterministic constituency-to-dependency conversion and transferring across resources and languages under simple label-mapping interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将成分短语的“中心词”作为可显式学习的一层表示，利用成分与依存标注对齐，实现高精度自动中心词预测，并优于传统规则方法。
AI.motivation: 虽然成分中心词在句法学分析中重要，但成分语料库很少显式标注，相关信息常通过规则推断，影响后续分析及不同资源间的信息兼容。
AI.method: 以成分与依存标注对齐，定义成分的中心词为依存结构中的span head，将中心词预测转化为监督学习任务，并在英文和中文数据上训练模型。同时与Collins-style中心词贯穿规则进行了比较。
AI.result: 所提方法在英汉数据上几乎达到了理论最优准确率，且显著超越了规则法。模型预测的中心词在下游抽取、转换、跨语言等任务上效果稳定，保持了两种结构标注的高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: 将中心词建模为一层可监督预测表征，并显式学习，能大幅提升成分依存一致性和任务迁移能力，为相关句法处理提供了更强表示基础。

title: Bots and Blocks: Presenting a project-based approach for robotics education
summary: To prepare students for upcoming trends and challenges, it is important to teach them about the helpful and important aspects of modern technologies, such as robotics. However, classic study programs often fail to prepare students for working in the industry because of the lack of practical experience, caused by solely theoretical lecturing. The challenge is to teach both practical and theoretical skills interactively to improve the students' learning. In the scope of the paper, a project-based learning approach is proposed, where students are taught in an agile, semester-spanning project how to work with robots. This project is part of the applied computer science degree study program Digital Technologies. The paper presents the framework as well as an exemplary project featuring the development of a disassembly software ecosystem for hardware robots. In the project, the students are taught the programming of robots with the help of the Robot Operating System (ROS). To ensure the base qualifications, the students are taught in so-called schools, an interactive mix of lectures and exercises. At the beginning of the course, the basics of the technologies are covered, while the students work more and more in their team with the robot on a specific use case. The use case here is to automate the disassembly of build block assemblies.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合理论与实践、以项目为基础的机器人教学方法，旨在提升学生动手能力并适应未来产业需求。
AI.motivation: 当前传统教学以理论为主，缺乏实际操作，导致学生毕业后难以胜任工业界的实际工作。作者希望通过引入现代技术（如机器人）和项目制学习，提升学生的综合能力。
AI.method: 采用项目驱动学习法，在一学期的课程中，学生以团队形式，围绕机器人操作系统（ROS）和具体拆卸任务，完成相关软件生态系统的开发。教学内容结合“schools”课程，即以讲座与实践相结合的形式，先学基础，再深入项目。
AI.result: 学生通过在项目中实际编程与操作机器人，掌握了机器人相关技术，提升了团队协作和解决实际问题的能力。
AI.conclusion: 项目制并融合理论与实践的教学方式，有助于缩小学生理论知识和实际技能之间的差距，提高其应对未来技术和产业挑战的能力。

title: Draft-and-Target Sampling for Video Generation Policy
summary: Video generation models have been used as a robot policy to predict the future states of executing a task conditioned on task description and observation. Previous works ignore their high computational cost and long inference time. To address this challenge, we propose Draft-and-Target Sampling, a novel diffusion inference paradigm for video generation policy that is training-free and can improve inference efficiency. We introduce a self-play denoising approach by utilizing two complementary denoising trajectories in a single model, draft sampling takes large steps to generate a global trajectory in a fast manner and target sampling takes small steps to verify it. To further speedup generation, we introduce token chunking and progressive acceptance strategy to reduce redundant computation. Experiments on three benchmarks show that our method can achieve up to 2.1x speedup and improve the efficiency of current state-of-the-art methods with minimal compromise to the success rate. Our code is available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视频生成推理方法Draft-and-Target Sampling，显著提升了视频生成策略在机器人任务中的推理效率，并减少了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 以往将视频生成模型作为机器人决策策略时，常受高计算成本和推理时间长的限制。为此，作者希望提升推理速度且不牺牲性能。
AI.method: 提出Draft-and-Target Sampling推理范式，结合了草稿采样（大步生成全局轨迹）和目标采样（小步验证），并通过token分块与渐进接受策略，减少冗余计算，且无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试上方法可实现最高2.1倍的速度提升，效率优于现有方法，且成功率几乎未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能在训练无关的情况下显著加速视频生成推理，为机器人领域提供高效推理的新思路。

title: Towards Privacy-Preserving Machine Translation at the Inference Stage: A New Task and Benchmark
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, Accepted by IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing
summary: Current online translation services require sending user text to cloud servers, posing a risk of privacy leakage when the text contains sensitive information. This risk hinders the application of online translation services in privacy-sensitive scenarios. One way to mitigate this risk for online translation services is introducing privacy protection mechanisms targeting the inference stage of translation models. However, compared to subfields of NLP like text classification and summarization, the machine translation research community has limited exploration of privacy protection during the inference stage. There is no clearly defined privacy protection task for the inference stage, dedicated evaluation datasets and metrics, and reference benchmark methods. The absence of these elements has seriously constrained researchers' in-depth exploration of this direction. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes a novel "Privacy-Preserving Machine Translation" (PPMT) task, aiming to protect the private information in text during the model inference stage. For this task, we constructed three benchmark test datasets, designed corresponding evaluation metrics, and proposed a series of benchmark methods as a starting point for this task. The definition of privacy is complex and diverse. Considering that named entities often contain a large amount of personal privacy and commercial secrets, we have focused our research on protecting only the named entity's privacy in the text. We expect this research work will provide a new perspective and a solid foundation for the privacy protection problem in machine translation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“隐私保护机器翻译”(PPMT)的新任务，旨在模型推理阶段保护文本中的隐私信息（特别是命名实体），并为此构建了数据集、评估指标和基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线翻译服务需将用户文本发送至云服务器，存在敏感信息泄露风险，阻碍了翻译服务在隐私敏感场景下的应用。以往对于机器翻译推理阶段的隐私保护研究较少，缺乏任务定义、数据集和基线，限制了该方向的发展。
AI.method: 作者提出了PPMT任务，专注于在模型推理阶段保护文本中命名实体的隐私。围绕此任务，构建了三个基准测试数据集，设计了相应的评测指标，并提供了一系列基线方法。
AI.result: 该工作首次系统性地搭建了隐私保护机器翻译的完整研究框架，包括任务定义、数据及指标，为后续相关研究提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器翻译中的隐私保护问题开辟了新的研究方向，为相关领域深入探讨及应用打下坚实基础。

title: MorFiC: Fixing Value Miscalibration for Zero-Shot Quadruped Transfer
summary: Generalizing learned locomotion policies across quadrupedal robots with different morphologies remain a challenge. Policies trained on a single robot often break when deployed on embodiments with different mass distributions, kinematics, joint limits, or actuation constraints, forcing per robot retraining. We present MorFiC, a reinforcement learning approach for zero-shot cross-morphology locomotion using a single shared policy. MorFiC resolves a key failure mode in multi-morphology actor-critic training: a shared critic tends to average incompatible value targets across embodiments, yielding miscalibrated advantages. To address this, MorFiC conditions the critic via morphology-aware modulation driven by robot physical and control parameters, generating morphology-specific value estimates within a shared network. Trained with a single source robot with morphology randomization in simulation, MorFiC can transfer to unseen robots and surpasses morphology-conditioned PPO baselines by improving stable average speed and longest stable run on multiple targets, including speed gains of +16.1% on A1, ~2x on Cheetah, and ~5x on B1. We additionally show that MorFiC reduces the value-prediction error variance across morphologies and stabilizes the advantage estimates, demonstrating that the improved value-function calibration corresponds to a stronger transfer performance. Finally, we demonstrate zero-shot deployment on two Unitree Go1 and Go2 robots without fine-tuning, indicating that critic-side conditioning is a practical approach for cross-morphology generalization.

AI.tldr: MorFiC是一种能实现四足机器人跨形态迁移的强化学习方法，通过引入与机器人形态相关的调制机制，有效提升未见机器人上的零样本（zero-shot）运动能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的行走策略泛化性差，单一机器人上训练的策略难以迁移到质量分布、运动学、关节限制或驱动方式不同的其他机器人，需要针对每个机器人单独再训练。如何实现策略在未见形态机器人上的即插即用，具有重要现实价值。
AI.method: MorFiC在多形态actor-critic框架下提出：让critic端根据机器人物理与控制参数进行形态调制，输出具体形态下的价值估计，避免不同形态间价值目标被错误平均。训练时通过仿真形态随机化，仅用一个源机器人生成数据，训练一个具备强泛化能力的共享策略。
AI.result: MorFiC在多个目标机器人上迁移效果超过基线（如形态条件化的PPO算法），A1速度提升16.1%，Cheetah和B1分别提升2倍和5倍。同时，MorFiC降低了不同形态上的价值预测误差方差，并稳定了优势估计。
AI.conclusion: 形态感知的critic调制能大幅提升强化学习策略的跨形态迁移性能，实现无需微调的零样本部署，对实际多样性机器人平台具有应用推广价值。

title: LADR: Locality-Aware Dynamic Rescue for Efficient Text-to-Image Generation with Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Discrete Diffusion Language Models have emerged as a compelling paradigm for unified multimodal generation, yet their deployment is hindered by high inference latency arising from iterative decoding. Existing acceleration strategies often require expensive re-training or fail to leverage the 2D spatial redundancy inherent in visual data. To address this, we propose Locality-Aware Dynamic Rescue (LADR), a training-free method that expedites inference by exploiting the spatial Markov property of images. LADR prioritizes the recovery of tokens at the ''generation frontier'', regions spatially adjacent to observed pixels, thereby maximizing information gain. Specifically, our method integrates morphological neighbor identification to locate candidate tokens, employs a risk-bounded filtering mechanism to prevent error propagation, and utilizes manifold-consistent inverse scheduling to align the diffusion trajectory with the accelerated mask density. Extensive experiments on four text-to-image generation benchmarks demonstrate that our LADR achieves an approximate 4 x speedup over standard baselines. Remarkably, it maintains or even enhances generative fidelity, particularly in spatial reasoning tasks, offering a state-of-the-art trade-off between efficiency and quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为LADR的训练无关推理加速方法，可显著加快离散扩散语言模型在多模态生成中的推理速度，同时保持甚至提升生成质量，特别是在空间推理任务中取得领先。
AI.motivation: 离散扩散语言模型虽然在统一的多模态生成任务中非常有潜力，但推理延迟高、生成过程慢，且现有加速方法依赖重训练或没有充分利用视觉数据中的空间冗余。
AI.method: 方法名为Locality-Aware Dynamic Rescue (LADR)，主要利用图像的空间Markov性，优先生成与观测像素空间相邻的“生成前沿”区域token，综合了形态学邻域识别、风险限制过滤机制与一致的逆调度，使生成过程更高效。该方法无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在四个文本到图像生成的基准任务上，LADR带来约4倍的推理加速，并且可以保持甚至提升生成质量，尤其在空间推理方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: LADR方法实现了多模态生成任务中速度与质量的最佳权衡，为离散扩散模型的实际部署提供了新思路。

title: Vietnamese Automatic Speech Recognition: A Revisit
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) performance is heavily dependent on the availability of large-scale, high-quality datasets. For low-resource languages, existing open-source ASR datasets often suffer from insufficient quality and inconsistent annotation, hindering the development of robust models. To address these challenges, we propose a novel and generalizable data aggregation and preprocessing pipeline designed to construct high-quality ASR datasets from diverse, potentially noisy, open-source sources. Our pipeline incorporates rigorous processing steps to ensure data diversity, balance, and the inclusion of crucial features like word-level timestamps. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methodology by applying it to Vietnamese, resulting in a unified, high-quality 500-hour dataset that provides a foundation for training and evaluating state-of-the-art Vietnamese ASR systems. Our project page is available at https://github.com/qualcomm-ai-research/PhoASR.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的音频数据聚合与预处理流程，专为低资源语种（以越南语为例）打造高质量自动语音识别（ASR）数据集。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的ASR发展受限于现有开源数据集数量少、质量低且标注不一致。为推动这些语种的ASR研究，亟需高质量和规范化的数据集。
AI.method: 研发了一套通用且严格的数据聚合与预处理管道，通过多步骤清洗和筛选，提升数据多样性、均衡性，并包含重要的词级时间标注。该流程适用于从多个开源、噪声语料中建立高标准数据集。
AI.result: 将该流程应用于越南语，成功构建了一个统一且高质量的500小时ASR数据集，可用于训练和评测SOTA的越南语ASR系统。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能显著提升低资源语种ASR数据集的质量和一致性，为相关模型的研究与应用奠定坚实基础。

title: SmallSatSim: A High-Fidelity Simulation and Training Toolkit for Microgravity Robotic Close Proximity Operations
summary: Microgravity rendezvous and close proximity operations (RPO) is a growing area of interest for applications spanning in-space assembly and manufacturing (ISAM), orbital debris remediation, and small body exploration. Microgravity environments present unique challenges for robotic control and planning algorithms for new agile RPO mission scenarios like free-floating manipulation, planning under failure, and estimating high-fidelity dynamics of tumbling bodies. To facilitate the development and testing of novel RPO algorithms, we introduce SmallSatSim, a high-fidelity simulation toolkit that leverages the MuJoCo physics engine to accurately model small satellite RPO dynamics in local microgravity robotic free-flight settings, including under model disturbances and perturbations. The framework includes cutting edge out-of-the-box free-flyer control techniques. A GPU-accelerated pipeline using MuJoCo MJX and JAX is implemented for sampling- and learning-based simulation uses cases. SmallSatSim also supports configurable failure models, enabling the evaluation of safe control strategies under adversarial conditions. Visualization, logging, and GPU-enabled parallelization further enhance SmallSatSim's capability for RPO testing. We outline SmallSatSim's features and intended use cases, and demonstrate its use for robotic RPO planning and control. The open-sourced toolkit aims to accelerate research in autonomous, agile robotic small satellite operations.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一款名为SmallSatSim的高保真模拟工具包，旨在为微重力环境下的小卫星交会与近距离操作（RPO）任务中的机器人规划与控制算法开发和测试提供支持。该工具包依托MuJoCo物理引擎，实现了复杂环境和故障情形下的真实动力学建模，并具备前沿的控制技术和GPU加速管线，助力采样与学习型仿真任务。SmallSatSim已开源，目的是推动微型卫星自主任务研究进展。
AI.motivation: 随着在轨组装/制造、空间碎片清除和小天体探测等应用需求的增长，微重力环境下自主机器人交会与近距离操作成为关键技术。然而，这一领域因动力学复杂、环境不确定和控制难度大，现有仿真与算法测试工具不足，亟需高保真的平台来加速相关技术研发。
AI.method: 作者提出并实现了SmallSatSim工具包，整合了MuJoCo物理引擎以实现高保真的动力学仿真。系统包括现成的自由飞行控制算法，支持配置不同的故障模型，可在GPU上并行运行（使用MJX和JAX），方便用于采样和基于学习的方法开发。同时，工具包提供可视化和数据记录等辅助功能。通过这些功能，SmallSatSim能够模拟和评估新颖的机器人规划与控制策略。
AI.result: SmallSatSim能够真实还原微重力环境下小卫星的复杂动力学，并支持灵活配置任务、故障和控制策略。作者展示了该框架在不同RPO任务中的应用效果，包括对故障情形下安全控制、机器人自由飞行与操作等关键问题的验证。该工具包已开源，为研究者开发和评估自主卫星操作算法提供了强有力的平台。
AI.conclusion: SmallSatSim为微重力交会与近距离操作领域提供了急需的高保真仿真平台，能够显著推动自主小卫星任务相关研究，尤其在控制与故障管理方面具备优势。该工具包开放源代码，有望作为行业和学界的技术基石，加快RPO相关智能算法的研发和落地。

title: Synthetic Melanoma Image Generation and Evaluation Using Generative Adversarial Networks
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures. already accepted to MDPI bioengineering
summary: Melanoma is the most lethal form of skin cancer, and early detection is critical for improving patient outcomes. Although dermoscopy combined with deep learning has advanced automated skin-lesion analysis, progress is hindered by limited access to large, well-annotated datasets and by severe class imbalance, where melanoma images are substantially underrepresented. To address these challenges, we present the first systematic benchmarking study comparing four GAN architectures-DCGAN, StyleGAN2, and two StyleGAN3 variants (T/R)-for high-resolution melanoma-specific synthesis. We train and optimize all models on two expert-annotated benchmarks (ISIC 2018 and ISIC 2020) under unified preprocessing and hyperparameter exploration, with particular attention to R1 regularization tuning. Image quality is assessed through a multi-faceted protocol combining distribution-level metrics (FID), sample-level representativeness (FMD), qualitative dermoscopic inspection, downstream classification with a frozen EfficientNet-based melanoma detector, and independent evaluation by two board-certified dermatologists. StyleGAN2 achieves the best balance of quantitative performance and perceptual quality, attaining FID scores of 24.8 (ISIC 2018) and 7.96 (ISIC 2020) at gamma=0.8. The frozen classifier recognizes 83% of StyleGAN2-generated images as melanoma, while dermatologists distinguish synthetic from real images at only 66.5% accuracy (chance = 50%), with low inter-rater agreement (kappa = 0.17). In a controlled augmentation experiment, adding synthetic melanoma images to address class imbalance improved melanoma detection AUC from 0.925 to 0.945 on a held-out real-image test set. These findings demonstrate that StyleGAN2-generated melanoma images preserve diagnostically relevant features and can provide a measurable benefit for mitigating class imbalance in melanoma-focused machine learning pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本论文系统对比了四种GAN架构，在高分辨率黑色素瘤合成方面的能力，验证了StyleGAN2生成的黑色素瘤图像不仅质量高，还能有效改善数据不平衡问题，从而提升自动诊断的准确率。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤早期诊断十分重要，但当前自动化诊断面临两个主要难题：优质带标签的数据集稀缺、类别极度不平衡（黑色素瘤样本远少于其他类型）。本研究旨在研究和评估使用先进GAN方法合成高质量黑色素瘤图像，以缓解这两个难题。
AI.method: 本文比较了DCGAN, StyleGAN2及两种StyleGAN3变体在ISIC 2018及2020两个专家标注数据集上的表现，采用统一的数据预处理、超参数探索，并特别调整R1正则化。通过多维度评估，包括分布性能（FID）、样本表示性（FMD）、专家定性评估、自动分类器识别和两位皮肤科专家的独立评估。
AI.result: StyleGAN2在量化表现和感知质量之间取得最佳平衡（ISIC 2018 FID=24.8，ISIC 2020 FID=7.96）；自动分类器可将83%的StyleGAN2生成图片识别为黑色素瘤，皮肤科专家分辨真伪的准确率仅为66.5%，专家一致性较低。用合成样本增强数据后，黑色素瘤检测AUC从0.925提升到0.945。
AI.conclusion: StyleGAN2合成的黑色素瘤图像在诊断特征保真度和改善机器学习任务中的类别不平衡方面具有明确优势，可作为增强自动化皮肤病分析系统可靠性和表现的有力工具。

title: Information Asymmetry across Language Varieties: A Case Study on Cantonese-Mandarin and Bavarian-German QA
comment: 23 pages, accepted at LREC 2026 as an oral presentation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are becoming a common way for humans to seek knowledge, yet their coverage and reliability vary widely. Especially for local language varieties, there are large asymmetries, e.g., information in local Wikipedia that is absent from the standard variant. However, little is known about how well LLMs perform under such information asymmetry, especially on closely related languages. We manually construct a novel challenge question-answering (QA) dataset that captures knowledge conveyed on a local Wikipedia page, which is absent from their higher-resource counterparts-covering Mandarin Chinese vs. Cantonese and German vs. Bavarian. Our experiments show that LLMs fail to answer questions about information only in local editions of Wikipedia. Providing context from lead sections substantially improves performance, with further gains possible via translation. Our topical, geographic annotations, and stratified evaluations reveal the usefulness of local Wikipedia editions as sources of both regional and global information. These findings raise critical questions about inclusivity and cultural coverage of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个关于大语言模型（LLMs）在本地语言知识方面表现的挑战式QA数据集，揭示了当前主流LLM在本地维基百科信息上的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM的广泛应用，人们希望它们能覆盖各种语言变体的知识，但本地语言维基百科常有独特信息，主流模型在这些知识获取上存在明显不足，该问题很少被系统研究。
AI.method: 作者手动构建了以本地维基百科独有知识为基础的问答数据集，聚焦于普通话与粤语、德语与巴伐利亚语之间的信息差异，设计实验评估LLM在知识不对称时的表现，并探索上下文补充和机器翻译等提升手段。
AI.result: LLM在仅本地维基有的信息上表现失败，但若补充维基百科前导部分上下文，模型表现大幅提升，加入翻译信息可进一步改进。分领域评估显示本地维基为区域和全球信息提供了独特价值。
AI.conclusion: LLM对本地语言和文化信息覆盖尚存巨大不足，补充特定语境能改善表现，但也引发了模型包容性和文化代表性的重大问题。

title: Latent Dynamics-Aware OOD Monitoring for Trajectory Prediction with Provable Guarantees
summary: In safety-critical Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS), accurate trajectory prediction provides vital guidance for downstream planning and control, yet although deep learning models achieve high-fidelity forecasts on validation data, their reliability degrades under out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios caused by environmental uncertainty or rare traffic behaviors in real-world deployment; detecting such OOD events is challenging due to evolving traffic conditions and changing interaction patterns, while safety-critical applications demand formal guarantees on detection delay and false-alarm rates, motivating us-following recent work [1]-to formulate OOD monitoring for trajectory prediction as a quickest changepoint detection (QCD) problem that offers a principled statistical framework with established theory; we further observe that the real-world evolution of prediction errors under in-distribution (ID) conditions can be effectively modeled by a Hidden Markov Model (HMM), and by leveraging this structure we extend the cumulative Maximum Mean Discrepancy approach to enable detection without requiring explicit knowledge of the post-change distribution while still admitting provable guarantees on delay and false alarms, with experiments on three real-world driving datasets demonstrating reduced detection delay and robustness to heavy-tailed errors and unknown post-change conditions.

AI.tldr: 论文关注于安全关键的网络物理系统（CPS）中，提出一种基于统计理论的、具有检测延迟和误报率保证的轨迹预测异常检测方法，实现了对现实环境下分布变化的快速、鲁棒检测。
AI.motivation: 虽然深度学习模型能够在验证数据上高精度地预测轨迹，但实际部署时因环境变化或罕见行为引起的分布外（OOD）场景下，预测的可靠性会下降。检测这些OOD事件对下游安全具有重要意义，但由于交通场景不断变化，检测难度较大，同时实际应用要求对检测延迟和误报率有形式化保证。
AI.method: 将轨迹预测的分布外检测问题建模为最快变点检测（QCD）问题，利用QCD提供的统计理论框架，并进一步用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）建模分布内的预测误差演化，基于此扩展累积最大均值差异（MMD）方法，使检测不依赖变点后分布的显式知识，同时获得理论保证。
AI.result: 在三个真实驾驶数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效减小检测延迟，对重尾误差和未知变点后分布表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能在实际、复杂交通场景中实现对分布移位的快速鲁棒检测，对于安全关键的CPS系统轨迹预测具有重要实用价值。

title: ActionPlan: Future-Aware Streaming Motion Synthesis via Frame-Level Action Planning
summary: We present ActionPlan, a unified motion diffusion framework that bridges real-time streaming with high-quality offline generation within a single model. The core idea is to introduce a per-frame action plan: the model predicts frame-level text latents that act as dense semantic anchors throughout denoising, and uses them to denoise the full motion sequence with combined semantic and motion cues. To support this structured workflow, we design latent-specific diffusion steps, allowing each motion latent to be denoised independently and sampled in flexible orders at inference. As a result, ActionPlan can run in a history-conditioned, future-aware mode for real-time streaming, while also supporting high-quality offline generation. The same mechanism further enables zero-shot motion editing and in-betweening without additional models. Experiments demonstrate that our real-time streaming is 5.25x faster while also achieving 18% motion quality improvement over the best previous method in terms of FID.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ActionPlan框架，能够在同一个模型中实现高效的实时流式和高质量离线生成，并支持零样本运动编辑与插值，整体性能超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有运动扩散生成方法通常在高质量离线生成与低延迟实时流式之间存在取舍，难以统一解决。此外，运动编辑和插值往往需要额外模型，灵活性不足。
AI.method: ActionPlan引入了逐帧动作计划，模型预测帧级文本潜变量作为语义锚点，引导运动去噪。同时采用潜变量特定扩散步，允许各运动潜变量独立去噪、灵活采样，实现历史条件和未来感知。如此不仅简化流程，同一机制还能支持零样本编辑和插值。
AI.result: 实验证明，ActionPlan在保持实时流式条件下，比现有最佳方法在FID指标下运动质量提升18%，推理提速5.25倍，并能高质量完成零样本编辑等任务。
AI.conclusion: ActionPlan实现了模型的高效实时流式与高质量离线运动生成的统一，同时增强了运动序列编辑和插值的灵活性，性能全面领先，具有较大应用前景。

title: The Impact of Ideological Discourses in RAG: A Case Study with COVID-19 Treatments
summary: This paper studies the impact of retrieved ideological texts on the outputs of large language models (LLMs). While interest in understanding ideology in LLMs has recently increased, little attention has been given to this issue in the context of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). To fill this gap, we design an external knowledge source based on ideological loaded texts about COVID-19 treatments. Our corpus is based on 1,117 academic articles representing discourses about controversial and endorsed treatments for the disease. We propose a corpus linguistics framework, based on Lexical Multidimensional Analysis (LMDA), to identify the ideologies within the corpus. LLMs are tasked to answer questions derived from three identified ideological dimensions, and two types of contextual prompts are adopted: the first comprises the user question and ideological texts; and the second contains the question, ideological texts, and LMDA descriptions. Ideological alignment between reference ideological texts and LLMs' responses is assessed using cosine similarity for lexical and semantic representations. Results demonstrate that LLMs' responses based on ideological retrieved texts are more aligned with the ideology encountered in the external knowledge, with the enhanced prompt further influencing LLMs' outputs. Our findings highlight the importance of identifying ideological discourses within the RAG framework in order to mitigate not just unintended ideological bias, but also the risks of malicious manipulation of such models.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了带有意识形态倾向的检索文本如何影响大语言模型（LLM）的输出结果，特别是在RAG（检索增强生成）框架下的表现及其风险。
AI.motivation: 随着对LLM输出中意识形态问题关注的增加，现有研究很少关注RAG场景下检索资料所带来意识形态影响。作者希望揭示外部带有意识形态色彩的知识检索内容是否会使LLM输出相应偏向的回答，以及相关风险。
AI.method: 构建了一个基于COVID-19治疗方案、包含多种意识形态话语的外部知识库（共1117篇学术论文）。采用词汇多维度分析（LMDA）方法标注识别语料中的意识形态。设计不同提示词，包括带意识形态文本和增加LMDA描述两类，对LLM进行问答实验，并通过词汇和语义余弦相似度度量LLM输出与参考文本的意识形态一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，LLM在引入带有意识形态内容的检索文本后，其回答内容明显与外部知识的意识形态保持一致；进一步增强的提示词（含LMDA描述）会加强这种趋同性。
AI.conclusion: 有必要在RAG框架下识别和控制外部知识的意识形态倾向，以防止无意中的意识形态偏见和恶意操纵模型输出的风险。

title: Tactile Modality Fusion for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: We propose TacFiLM, a lightweight modality-fusion approach that integrates visual-tactile signals into vision-language-action (VLA) models. While recent advances in VLA models have introduced robot policies that are both generalizable and semantically grounded, these models mainly rely on vision-based perception. Vision alone, however, cannot capture the complex interaction dynamics that occur during contact-rich manipulation, including contact forces, surface friction, compliance, and shear. While recent attempts to integrate tactile signals into VLA models often increase complexity through token concatenation or large-scale pretraining, the heavy computational demands of behavioural models necessitate more lightweight fusion strategies. To address these challenges, TacFiLM outlines a post-training finetuning approach that conditions intermediate visual features on pretrained tactile representations using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM). Experimental results on insertion tasks demonstrate consistent improvements in success rate, direct insertion performance, completion time, and force stability across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tasks. Together, these results support our method as an effective approach to integrating tactile signals into VLA models, improving contact-rich manipulation behaviours.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TacFiLM的轻量级多模态融合方法，将视觉-触觉信号整合到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中，以提升机器人复杂操作能力。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型主要依赖视觉感知，难以捕捉接触操作过程中力、摩擦、弹性等复杂交互特征。现有将触觉融入VLA的方法大多增加了模型复杂度和计算负担，不适用于部署效率要求高的场景。因此亟需轻量级、有效的视觉-触觉融合策略。
AI.method: TacFiLM采用后训练微调方案，将预训练的触觉特征通过特征线性调制（FiLM）方式作用于视觉特征的中间层，实现视觉与触觉的高效融合，无需大规模预训练或复杂结构。
AI.result: 在典型的插入任务上，TacFiLM在任务成功率、直接插入表现、完成时间与力稳定性等指标上，对分布内与分布外任务均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: TacFiLM能有效提升接触丰富操作的表现，是将触觉信号融合进VLA模型的高效可行方法。

title: LibraGen: Playing a Balance Game in Subject-Driven Video Generation
summary: With the advancement of video generation foundation models (VGFMs), customized generation, particularly subject-to-video (S2V), has attracted growing attention. However, a key challenge lies in balancing the intrinsic priors of a VGFM, such as motion coherence, visual aesthetics, and prompt alignment, with its newly derived S2V capability. Existing methods often neglect this balance by enhancing one aspect at the expense of others. To address this, we propose LibraGen, a novel framework that views extending foundation models for S2V generation as a balance game between intrinsic VGFM strengths and S2V capability. Specifically, guided by the core philosophy of "Raising the Fulcrum, Tuning to Balance," we identify data quality as the fulcrum and advocate a quality-over-quantity approach. We construct a hybrid pipeline that combines automated and manual data filtering to improve overall data quality. To further harmonize the VGFM's native capabilities with its S2V extension, we introduce a Tune-to-Balance post-training paradigm. During supervised fine-tuning, both cross-pair and in-pair data are incorporated, and model merging is employed to achieve an effective trade-off. Subsequently, two tailored direct preference optimization (DPO) pipelines, namely Consis-DPO and Real-Fake DPO, are designed and merged to consolidate this balance. During inference, we introduce a time-dependent dynamic classifier-free guidance scheme to enable flexible and fine-grained control. Experimental results demonstrate that LibraGen outperforms both open-source and commercial S2V models using only thousand-scale training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于主题到视频（S2V）定制生成的新方法LibraGen，通过在视觉生成基础模型（VGFM）原生能力与S2V特性之间实现平衡，显著提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 目前视频生成基础模型（VGFMs）在生成的运动连贯性、美学和与文本提示的匹配性方面有固有优势。但现有方法在扩展为S2V时，往往牺牲其中一项优点，导致生成质量不理想。如何在保留VGFM原生能力的同时提升S2V能力成为挑战。
AI.method: LibraGen提出以数据质量为“支点”，采取质量优先的混合数据过滤（自动+手动）、融合交对与同对数据的监督微调，并引入模型融合策略。随后设计并整合两种直接偏好优化（Consis-DPO和Real-Fake DPO）方法，并在推理阶段加入时间依赖的动态无分类器引导，实现灵活精细的生成控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，LibraGen只需数千规模训练数据，在多个公开和商业S2V模型上均取得了更优表现。
AI.conclusion: LibraGen有效平衡了VGFM原生能力与S2V特性，在数据量不大的情况下显著提升了定制视频生成质量，为该领域提供了新的方向和实用框架。

title: ContiGuard: A Framework for Continual Toxicity Detection Against Evolving Evasive Perturbations
summary: Toxicity detection mitigates the dissemination of toxic content (e.g., hateful comments, posts, and messages within online social actions) to safeguard a healthy online social environment. However, malicious users persistently develop evasive perturbations to disguise toxic content and evade detectors. Traditional detectors or methods are static over time and are inadequate in addressing these evolving evasion tactics. Thus, continual learning emerges as a logical approach to dynamically update detection ability against evolving perturbations. Nevertheless, disparities across perturbations hinder the detector's continual learning on perturbed text. More importantly, perturbation-induced noises distort semantics to degrade comprehension and also impair critical feature learning to render detection sensitive to perturbations. These amplify the challenge of continual learning against evolving perturbations. In this work, we present ContiGuard, the first framework tailored for continual learning of the detector on time-evolving perturbed text (termed continual toxicity detection) to enable the detector to continually update capability and maintain sustained resilience against evolving perturbations. Specifically, to boost the comprehension, we present an LLM-powered semantic enriching strategy, where we dynamically incorporate possible meaning and toxicity-related clues excavated by LLM into the perturbed text to improve the comprehension. To mitigate non-critical features and amplify critical ones, we propose a discriminability-driven feature learning strategy, where we strengthen discriminative features while suppressing the less-discriminative ones to shape a robust classification boundary for detection...

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架ContiGuard，首次针对不断演变的在线毒性文本扰动，实现检测器的持续学习能力以应对恶意规避。
AI.motivation: 社交平台上恶意内容不断通过扰动逃避有害内容检测，传统检测方法静态、应对力不足，亟需持续提升检测器对新型扰动的适应能力。
AI.method: 提出ContiGuard框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）动态补充受扰文本的语义与毒性关键信息以增强理解，并采用判别性特征学习策略强化核心特征、抑制非核心特征，形成鲁棒的分类边界。
AI.result: ContiGuard能在面对不断变化的扰动文本时，实现检测能力的持续学习与稳健提升，有效减轻扰动带来的理解障碍和特征敏感性问题。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习结合LLM语义增强与判别性特征学习，有助于毒性检测器应对复杂且不断变化的文本扰动，提升长期鲁棒性，为健康社交环境提供有力技术支持。

title: CyboRacket: A Perception-to-Action Framework for Humanoid Racket Sports
summary: Dynamic ball-interaction tasks remain challenging for robots because they require tight perception-action coupling under limited reaction time. This challenge is especially pronounced in humanoid racket sports, where successful interception depends on accurate visual tracking, trajectory prediction, coordinated stepping, and stable whole-body striking. Existing robotic racket-sport systems often rely on external motion capture for state estimation or on task-specific low-level controllers that must be retrained across tasks and platforms. We present CyboRacket, a hierarchical perception-to-action framework for humanoid racket sports that integrates onboard visual perception, physics-based trajectory prediction, and large-scale pre-trained whole-body control. The framework uses onboard cameras to track the incoming object, predicts its future trajectory, and converts the estimated interception state into target end-effector and base-motion commands for whole-body execution by SONIC on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. We evaluate the proposed framework in a vision-based humanoid tennis-hitting task. Experimental results demonstrate real-time visual tracking, trajectory prediction, and successful striking using purely onboard sensing.

AI.tldr: CyboRacket框架实现了双足机器人仅用自身视觉完成网球击球任务，展现了集成感知、轨迹预测和全身控制的高效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人网球系统往往依赖外部动作捕捉设备或特定任务的低层控制器，通用性和独立性不足。如何让机器人在视觉感知、反应速度和动作协调上实现真实网球运动仍是难题。
AI.method: 提出CyboRacket层次化感知到动作框架：1）用机载摄像头视觉跟踪球，2）基于物理原理预测球轨迹，3）据此设定拦截状态，再通过大规模预训练的全身控制模块，将目标转化为手部和身体的动作命令，让Unitree G1机器人执行打击。
AI.result: 在基于视觉的机器人成网球击球实验中，系统实现了实时的视觉跟踪、轨迹预测，并成功击球，验证了完全依赖机载视觉感知的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CyboRacket框架证明了只利用机载视觉和预训练控制器，双足机器人能够高效完成动态击球任务，为复杂人体运动中的感知—动作耦合提供了新方法。

title: MIRAGE: Model-agnostic Industrial Realistic Anomaly Generation and Evaluation for Visual Anomaly Detection
summary: Industrial visual anomaly detection (VAD) methods are typically trained on normal samples only, yet performance improves substantially when even limited anomalous data is available. Existing anomaly generation approaches either require real anomalous examples, demand expensive hardware, or produce synthetic defects that lack realism. We present MIRAGE (Model-agnostic Industrial Realistic Anomaly Generation and Evaluation), a fully automated pipeline for realistic anomalous image generation and pixel-level mask creation that requires no training and no anomalous images. Our pipeline accesses any generative model as a black box via API calls, uses a VLM for automatic defect prompt generation, and includes a CLIP-based quality filter to retain only well-aligned generated images. For mask generation at scale, we introduce a lightweight, training-free dual-branch semantic change detection module combining text-conditioned Grounding DINO features with fine-grained YOLOv26-Seg structural features. We benchmark four generation methods using Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Nano Banana) as the generative backbone, evaluating performance on MVTec AD and VisA across two distinct tasks: (i) downstream anomaly segmentation and (ii) visual quality of the generated images, assessed via standard metrics (IS, IC-LPIPS) and a human perceptual study involving 31 participants and 1,550 pairwise votes. The results demonstrate that MIRAGE offers a scalable, accessible foundation for anomaly-aware industrial inspection that requires no real defect data.
