As a final contribution, we publicly release a large-scale dataset comprising 500 image-mask pairs per category for every MVTec AD and VisA class, over 13,000 pairs in total, alongside all generation prompts and pipeline code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIRAGE，一种无需异常样本、自动化生成工业视觉异常图像和对应像素级掩码的新方法。该方法基于现成生成模型，通过API调用实现异常图像生成，并结合VLM和CLIP实现自动化和高质量筛选，还提出了训练无关的掩码生成模块。实验证明该方法可大幅提升异常检测算法性能，并公开了大规模合成异常数据集。
AI.motivation: 工业视觉异常检测（VAD）多仅用正常样本训练，若有少量异常样本则性能显著提升，但真实异常数据较难获取。现有异常生成方法往往受限于真实异常样本、昂贵硬件或者缺乏真实感，急需一种无需异常样本也能高效生成高质量合成异常数据的新方案。
AI.method: MIRAGE为无需训练和异常样本的工业异常图像及掩码自动生成流水线：(1)以黑盒方式调用任意生成模型API生成异常图像；(2)用VLM自动构建异常描述词并生成图像；(3)用CLIP对齐与筛选高质量合成图像；(4)提出融合Grounding DINO与YOLOv26-Seg特征的无训练掩码生成分支。最后，评测表明MIRAGE可替代真实异常成为异常检测的优质数据来源。
AI.result: 基于Gemini 2.5 Flash Image作为生成主干，MIRAGE在MVTec AD与VisA两个工业视觉数据集上，通过异常分割与图像视觉质量（IS、IC-LPIPS指标及大规模人工感知投票）取得优异表现。公开13,000+合成异常图像与掩码数据集。
AI.conclusion: MIRAGE为工业视觉领域提供了一种无须异常数据、可扩展且无需训练的异常样本生成方法，有力提升异常检测算法表现，并通过数据与代码开放，推动领域发展。

title: Shopping Companion: A Memory-Augmented LLM Agent for Real-World E-Commerce Tasks
summary: In e-commerce, LLM agents show promise for shopping tasks such as recommendations, budgeting, and bundle deals, where accurately capturing user preferences from long-term conversations is critical. However, two challenges hinder realizing this potential: (1) the absence of benchmarks for evaluating long-term preference-aware shopping tasks, and (2) the lack of end-to-end optimization due to existing designs that treat preference identification and shopping assistance as separate components. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark with a long-term memory setup, spanning two shopping tasks over 1.2 million real-world products, and propose Shopping Companion, a unified framework that jointly tackles memory retrieval and shopping assistance while supporting user intervention. To train such capabilities, we develop a dual-reward reinforcement learning strategy with tool-wise rewards to handle the sparse and discontinuous rewards inherent in multi-turn interactions. Experimental results demonstrate that even state-of-the-art models (such as GPT-5) achieve success rates under 70% on our benchmark, highlighting the significant challenges in this domain. Notably, our lightweight LLM, trained with Shopping Companion, consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving better preference capture and task performance, which validates the effectiveness of our unified design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的电商长时偏好购物基准和统一的Shopping Companion框架，能更好地帮助LLM理解用户购物偏好，实验中其轻量模型优于现有强基线。
AI.motivation: 长对话中理解用户偏好对电商LLM代理至关重要，但现实中缺乏相应的评测基准，且以往系统将偏好识别和购物助理割裂，阻碍端到端优化。
AI.method: 作者开发了一个带有长时记忆的新电商基准，包含120万真实商品、支持两类购物任务，并提出了Shopping Companion框架，将记忆检索和购物助理功能融合，加入用户可介入。为优化模型，使用了基于工具的双奖励强化学习，适配多轮对话中的稀疏奖励。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，即使是如GPT-5这类SOTA模型在新基准上的成功率也低于70%，显示任务难度大。作者研发的轻量LLM用Shopping Companion训练后，在偏好捕获与任务完成功能上优于强基线。
AI.conclusion: 统一偏好建模与购物助理、引入用户介入、端到端训练能显著提升LLM的电商场景表现，该基准能促进相关技术进步。

title: Physically Accurate Rigid-Body Dynamics in Particle-Based Simulation
summary: Robotics demands simulation that can reason about the diversity of real-world physical interactions, from rigid to deformable objects and fluids. Current simulators address this by stitching together multiple subsolvers for different material types, resulting in a compositional architecture that complicates physical reasoning. Particle-based simulators offer a compelling alternative, representing all materials through a single unified formulation that enables seamless cross-material interactions. Among particle-based simulators, position-based dynamics (PBD) is a popular solver known for its computational efficiency and visual plausibility. However, its lack of physical accuracy has limited its adoption in robotics. To leverage the benefits of particle-based solvers while meeting the physical fidelity demands of robotics, we introduce PBD-R, a revised PBD formulation that enforces physically accurate rigid-body dynamics through a novel momentum-conservation constraint and a modified velocity update. Additionally, we introduce a solver-agnostic benchmark with analytical solutions to evaluate physical accuracy. Using this benchmark, we show that PBD-R significantly outperforms PBD and achieves competitive accuracy with MuJoCo while requiring less computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的基于粒子的动力学模拟方法PBD-R，针对机器人仿真对物理真实度的需求，在保持高效计算的基础上，大幅提升了仿真的物理准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人仿真在处理刚体、可变形体和流体等多材料交互时，需要拼接多种子求解器，导致物理推理复杂。基于粒子的统一方法虽然具有效率优势，但主流的PBD方法物理精度不足，限制了其在机器人领域的应用。
AI.method: 提出PBD-R算法，引入新的动量守恒约束和速度更新方式，确保刚体动力学的物理准确性。同时设计了不依赖求解器的基准测试，并具备解析解，用于评估物理准确度。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，PBD-R比原始PBD拥有显著更高的物理准确性，且在保证计算效率的同时，能达到与MuJoCo等高精度仿真器竞争的精度。
AI.conclusion: PBD-R作为一种新的基于粒子的仿真方法，在不牺牲效率的情况下，显著提升了物理真实性，为机器人仿真提供了更优的统一解决方案。

title: A Systematic Benchmark of GAN Architectures for MRI-to-CT Synthesis
summary: The translation from Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to Computed tomography (CT) has been proposed as an effective solution to facilitate MRI-only clinical workflows while limiting exposure to ionizing radiation. Although numerous Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architectures have been proposed for MRI-to-CT translation, systematic and fair comparisons across heterogeneous models remain limited. We present a comprehensive benchmark of ten GAN architectures evaluated on the SynthRAD2025 dataset across three anatomical districts (abdomen, thorax, head-and-neck). All models were trained under a unified validation protocol with identical preprocessing and optimization settings. Performance was assessed using complementary metrics capturing voxel-wise accuracy, structural fidelity, perceptual quality, and distribution-level realism, alongside an analysis of computational complexity. Supervised Paired models consistently outperformed Unpaired approaches, confirming the importance of voxel-wise supervision. Pix2Pix achieved the most balanced performance across districts while maintaining a favorable quality-to-complexity trade-off. Multi-district training improved structural robustness, whereas intra-district training maximized voxel-wise fidelity. This benchmark provides quantitative and computational guidance for model selection in MRI-only radiotherapy workflows and establishes a reproducible framework for future comparative studies. To ensure the reproducibility of our experiments we make our code public, together with the overall results, at the following link:https://github.com/arco-group/MRI_TO_CT.git

AI.tldr: 本文系统地对10种MRI到CT影像转换的GAN模型进行了综合评测，为放疗流程中MRI-only临床应用中的模型选择提供量化与计算指导。
AI.motivation: 虽然MRI到CT的转换能减少放疗中的辐射暴露，但现有各种GAN方法在不同数据集和条件下横向比较不足，难以公正评估各自优劣。
AI.method: 作者基于SynthRAD2025数据集，涵盖腹部、胸部及头颈三种解剖区域，用统一的数据预处理与优化方案训练10种GAN架构，采用多元指标（体素精度、结构保真、感知质量、分布级真实性及计算复杂度）系统评估算法表现。
AI.result: 有监督对齐（Paired）模型整体优于无监督（Unpaired）模型，强调体素级配准的重要性。Pix2Pix模型在各解剖区表现更均衡，在质量与计算复杂度间达到良好平衡。多区联合训练提升结构稳健性，单区训练则优化体素精度。
AI.conclusion: 本基准为MRI-only放疗工作流中的模型挑选和今后GAN模型对比研究提供了定量、可复现的指导，代码和结果已开放，便于后续参考与扩展。

title: Developing an English-Efik Corpus and Machine Translation System for Digitization Inclusion
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, accepted at AfricaNLP 2026 (co-located with EACL)
summary: Low-resource languages serve as invaluable repositories of human history, preserving cultural and intellectual diversity. Despite their significance, they remain largely absent from modern natural language processing systems. While progress has been made for widely spoken African languages such as Swahili, Yoruba, and Amharic, smaller indigenous languages like Efik continue to be underrepresented in machine translation research. This study evaluates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art multilingual neural machine translation models for English-Efik translation, leveraging a small-scale, community-curated parallel corpus of 13,865 sentence pairs. We fine-tuned both the mT5 multilingual model and the NLLB200 model on this dataset. NLLB-200 outperformed mT5, achieving BLEU scores of 26.64 for English-Efik and 31.21 for Efik-English, with corresponding chrF scores of 51.04 and 47.92, indicating improved fluency and semantic fidelity. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of developing practical machine translation tools for low-resource languages and highlight the importance of inclusive data practices and culturally grounded evaluation in advancing equitable NLP.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了当前先进多语种神经机器翻译模型在英语-埃菲克语（Efik）低资源语言上的表现，发现NLLB-200模型优于mT5，验证了低资源语言开发实用翻译工具的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管低资源语言在保存人类历史和文化多样性中极为重要，但现代NLP系统对其支持极为有限，尤其是在机器翻译领域。此研究旨在推动对如Efik这样的小语种开展机器翻译研究。
AI.method: 利用社区整理的13865对英语-埃菲克语平行语料，对mT5和NLLB-200多语种神经机器翻译模型进行微调，然后评估它们英-埃互译能力。
AI.result: NLLB-200模型在英译埃BLEU得分26.64，埃译英BLEU得分31.21，chrF得分分别为51.04和47.92，均优于mT5，展现更高流畅性与语义忠实度。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，在低资源语言上开发高质量机器翻译工具是可行的，强调包容性数据和文化相关性评估对推进公平NLP至关重要。

title: Seeing Where to Deploy: Metric RGB-Based Traversability Analysis for Aerial-to-Ground Hidden Space Inspection
summary: Inspection of confined infrastructure such as culverts often requires accessing hidden spaces whose entrances are reachable primarily from elevated viewpoints. Aerial-ground cooperation enables a UAV to deploy a compact UGV for interior exploration, but selecting a suitable deployment region from aerial observations requires metric terrain reasoning involving scale ambiguity, reconstruction uncertainty, and terrain semantics. We present a metric RGB-based geometric-semantic reconstruction and traversability analysis framework for aerial-to-ground hidden space inspection. A feed-forward multi-view RGB reconstruction backbone produces dense geometry, while temporally consistent semantic segmentation yields a 3D semantic map. To enable deployment-relevant measurements without LiDAR-based dense mapping, we introduce an embodied motion prior that recovers metric scale by enforcing consistency between predicted camera motion and onboard platform egomotion. From the metrically grounded reconstruction, we construct a confidence-aware geometric-semantic traversability map and evaluate candidate deployment zones under explicit reachability constraints. Experiments on a tethered UAV-UGV platform demonstrate reliable deployment-zone identification in hidden space scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套基于RGB图像的几何-语义重建与可通行性分析框架，实现无人机（UAV）辅助无人地面车辆（UGV）部署于隐匿空间的自动检测。该框架不用LiDAR即可获取空间度量信息，并能准确确定部署区。
AI.motivation: 传统基础设施如涵洞等隐蔽空间检测困难，尤其是入口高耸或难以接近，需要结合空地协作技术。然而，利用无人机进行部署时，受限于尺度歧义及重建不确定性，难以基于航拍图像精准选择UGV投放区。
AI.method: 该方法采用前馈多视角RGB重建网络提取稠密几何信息，同时结合时序一致的语义分割生成三维语义图，通过引入一种具有实体运动先验的方法，实现由无人机自身运动估算相机运动，进而解决度量尺度问题，完成无LiDAR条件下的高精度地图重建。
AI.result: 实验基于带绳的UAV-UGV平台，能在实际隐匿环境中稳定识别出可行的部署区域，并生成带置信度的几何-语义可通行性地图，显著提升部署可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 所提RGB几何-语义重建与可通行性分析方法为无人机-UGV协作提供了高效、无需LiDAR的隐匿空间自动检测方案，有望推广于复杂基础设施的智能监测中。

title: Eleven Primitives and Three Gates: The Universal Structure of Computational Imaging
comment: 39 pages, 5 figures, 2 extended data tables, supplementary information
summary:
Computational imaging systems -- from coded-aperture cameras to cryo-electron microscopes -- span five carrier families yet share a hidden structural simplicity. We prove that every imaging forward model decomposes into a directed acyclic graph over exactly 11 physically typed primitives (Finite Primitive Basis Theorem) -- a sufficient and minimal basis that provides a compositional language for designing any imaging modality. We further prove that every reconstruction failure has exactly three independent root causes: information deficiency, carrier noise, and operator mismatch (Triad
  Decomposition). The three gates map to the system lifecycle: Gates 1 and 2 guide design (sampling geometry, carrier
  selection); Gate 3 governs deployment-stage calibration and drift correction. Validation across 12 modalities and all
  five carrier families confirms both results, with +0.8 to +13.9 dB recovery on deployed instruments. Together, the 11
  primitives and 3 gates establish the first universal grammar for designing, diagnosing, and correcting computational
  imaging systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出，所有计算成像系统可以基于11个物理原语分解，并证明所有重建失败仅有三大根本原因。这为成像系统的设计与诊断建立了通用语法。
AI.motivation: 尽管计算成像系统形式复杂、载体多样，但它们可能拥有潜在的统一结构规律。论文试图寻找并证明这种统一性，从而为成像领域提供一种通用理论与方法。
AI.method: 作者提出“有限原语基定理”，证明所有成像前向模型都能由11种物理原语组成的有向无环图表示。同时引入“三元分解”，指出所有成像失败都归结于信息不足、噪声、算子失配三种独立原因。并在12种成像模态与5类载体中验证了理论。
AI.result: 理论获得实验证实，在实际仪器部署中，使用该方法可提升恢复质量0.8至13.9 dB，覆盖12种模型和所有5种载体类型。
AI.conclusion: 论文首次提出了普适成像系统的语法，包括11种原语和3个诊断门，为系统的设计、诊断与校正提供了理论依据和方法框架。

title: Decision-Level Ordinal Modeling for Multimodal Essay Scoring with Large Language Models
summary: Automated essay scoring (AES) predicts multiple rubric-defined trait scores for each essay, where each trait follows an ordered discrete rating scale. Most LLM-based AES methods cast scoring as autoregressive token generation and obtain the final score via decoding and parsing, making the decision implicit. This formulation is particularly sensitive in multimodal AES, where the usefulness of visual inputs varies across essays and traits. To address these limitations, we propose Decision-Level Ordinal Modeling (DLOM), which makes scoring an explicit ordinal decision by reusing the language model head to extract score-wise logits on predefined score tokens, enabling direct optimization and analysis in the score space. For multimodal AES, DLOM-GF introduces a gated fusion module that adaptively combines textual and multimodal score logits. For text-only AES, DLOM-DA adds a distance-aware regularization term to better reflect ordinal distances. Experiments on the multimodal EssayJudge dataset show that DLOM improves over a generation-based SFT baseline across scoring traits, and DLOM-GF yields further gains when modality relevance is heterogeneous. On the text-only ASAP/ASAP++ benchmarks, DLOM remains effective without visual inputs, and DLOM-DA further improves performance and outperforms strong representative baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自动作文评分（AES）方法DLOM，通过将分数判定转化为显式的有序决策，并针对多模态和文本场景设计了相应模块，在多个数据集上取得超过现有强基线的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于大模型的AES方法大多依赖自回归生成方式，分数判定过程隐性且对输入模态相关性敏感，尤其是在图文或多模态作文评分时，视觉信息的作用随作文和评分项不同而变化，导致效果不稳定和优化困难。
AI.method: 1）提出Decision-Level Ordinal Modeling（DLOM）方法，利用LLM的输出头直接对预定义分数token计算logit，实现分数判定的显式有序建模，使得优化和分析更直观。2）DLOM-GF模块通过门控融合自适应结合文本和多模态的分数输出，应对多模态作文评分。3）针对文本作文，DLOM-DA引入距离感知正则项，更好刻画分数间的有序关系。
AI.result: 在EssayJudge多模态数据集上，DLOM整体优于基于生成的软参SFT基线，DLOM-GF对于异质模态相关性场景提升更明显；在ASAP/ASAP++文本数据集上，DLOM及DLOM-DA同样有效，并超越了当前主流代表性基线。
AI.conclusion: DLOM方法能够更高效、显式、直观地进行有序作文评分，在多模态和文本场景下均取得了领先效果，为作文自动评分提供了新范式。

title: Coordinate-Independent Robot Model Identification
summary: Robot model identification is commonly performed by least-squares regression on inverse dynamics, but existing formulations measure residuals directly in coordinate force space and therefore depend on the chosen coordinate chart, units, and scaling. This paper proposes a coordinate-independent identification method that weights inverse-dynamics residuals by the dual metric induced by the system Riemannian metric. Using the force--velocity vector--covector duality, the dual metric provides a physically meaningful normalization of generalized forces, pulling coordinate residuals back into the ambient mechanical space and eliminating coordinate-induced bias. The resulting objective remains convex through an affine-metric and Schur-complement reformulation, and is compatible with physical-consistency constraints and geometric regularization. Experiments on an inertia-dominated Crazyflie--pendulum system and a drag-dominated LandSalp robot show improved identification accuracy, especially on shape coordinates, in both low-data and high-data settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的机器人动力学模型辨识方法，利用系统的黎曼度量诱导的对偶度量，实现坐标无关的辨识。通过实验证明了在不同实验环境下的准确性提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于逆动力学最小二乘拟合的机器人模型辨识方法在残差度量时受限于坐标系选择、单位与缩放，容易引入偏差，影响识别精度。
AI.method: 提出将逆动力学残差通过系统黎曼度量诱导的对偶度量加权，实现对广义力的物理意义归一化，将坐标残差回归到机械空间，避免坐标引起的偏差。该目标函数通过仿射度量和Schur补重构后保持凸性，并支持物理一致性约束和几何正则化。
AI.result: 在惯性为主的Crazyflie-摆系统和阻力为主的LandSalp机器人上实验，显示新方法在低数据量和高数据量下均提高了模型辨识的准确性，尤其是在形状坐标方面效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于对偶度量的无坐标偏置方法在动力学模型辨识中有效提升了准确性，并具有良好的物理一致性和通用性，适用于不同类型及数据规模的机器人系统。

title: Hide and Seek: Investigating Redundancy in Earth Observation Imagery
summary: The growing availability of Earth Observation (EO) data and recent advances in Computer Vision have driven rapid progress in machine learning for EO, producing domain-specific models at ever-increasing scales. Yet this progress risks overlooking fundamental properties of EO data that distinguish it from other domains. We argue that EO data exhibit a multidimensional redundancy (spectral, temporal, spatial, and semantic) which has a more pronounced impact on the domain and its applications than what current literature reflects. To validate this hypothesis, we conduct a systematic domain-specific investigation examining the existence, consistency, and practical implications of this phenomenon across key dimensions of EO variability. Our findings confirm that redundancy in EO data is both substantial and pervasive: exploiting it yields comparable performance ($\approx98.5\%$ of baseline) at a fraction of the computational cost ($\approx4\times$ fewer GFLOPs), at both training and inference. Crucially, these gains are consistent across tasks, geospatial locations, sensors, ground sampling distances, and architectural designs; suggesting that multi-faceted redundancy is a structural property of EO data rather than an artifact of specific experimental choices. These results lay the groundwork for more efficient, scalable, and accessible large-scale EO models.

AI.tldr: 地球观测（EO）数据具有多维冗余特性，合理利用这些冗余能大幅减少计算成本且保持模型表现，助力更高效的大规模EO模型发展。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习和计算机视觉在地球观测领域迅速进步，但主流研究往往忽视了EO数据独特的多维冗余（光谱、时间、空间、语义），此特性对任务和应用有重大影响。作者希望系统性探索和验证这一特性，并揭示其实际意义。
AI.method: 作者系统性地从关键的EO数据变异性维度，检验冗余的存在性、一致性及其实用影响，通过实验对比冗余利用前后的模型性能和计算成本，在多任务、多地理区域、不同传感器和不同模型架构下进行验证。
AI.result: 实验证明，EO数据的多维冗余广泛存在，合理利用冗余能大幅降低计算成本（约4倍减少GFLOPs）且基本不损失模型性能（约达baseline的98.5%），且这一现象在不同任务、区域、传感器、分辨率和结构下均成立。
AI.conclusion: EO数据的多维冗余是其结构性属性，充分挖掘这些冗余将使大规模EO模型变得更加高效、可扩展和易于获取。

title: LLMs as Signal Detectors: Sensitivity, Bias, and the Temperature-Criterion Analogy
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are evaluated for calibration using metrics such as Expected Calibration Error that conflate two distinct components: the model's ability to discriminate correct from incorrect answers (sensitivity) and its tendency toward confident or cautious responding (bias). Signal Detection Theory (SDT) decomposes these components. While SDT-derived metrics such as AUROC are increasingly used, the full parametric framework - unequal-variance model fitting, criterion estimation, z-ROC analysis - has not been applied to LLMs as signal detectors. In this pre-registered study, we treat three LLMs as observers performing factual discrimination across 168,000 trials and test whether temperature functions as a criterion shift analogous to payoff manipulations in human psychophysics. Critically, this analogy may break down because temperature changes the generated answer itself, not only the confidence assigned to it. Our results confirm the breakdown with temperature simultaneously increasing sensitivity (AUC) and shifting criterion. All models exhibited unequal-variance evidence distributions (z-ROC slopes 0.52-0.84), with instruct models showing more extreme asymmetry (0.52-0.63) than the base model (0.77-0.87) or human recognition memory (~0.80). The SDT decomposition revealed that models occupying distinct positions in sensitivity-bias space could not be distinguished by calibration metrics alone, demonstrating that the full parametric framework provides diagnostic information unavailable from existing metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文将信号检测理论（SDT）完整参数框架用于大型语言模型（LLM）的校准及敏感性分析，发现温度不仅影响信心，还改变答案本身，标准校准指标难以分辨模型表现。
AI.motivation: 常用的LLM校准评估指标（如期望校准误差）混合了模型对正确与错误答案的判别能力（敏感性）和模型倾向于自信或谨慎作答的偏差，导致结果难以解释。亟需更细致的分析工具。
AI.method: 作者将3个LLM在168,000个事实判别测试中，作为信号检测理论意义上的“观察者”，并系统分析温度参数如何影响其作答的判别敏感性（AUC）和判别标准（criterion）。通过不等方差SDT参数拟合，提取z-ROC等诊断指标进行综合分析。
AI.result: 通过实验，发现温度参数既提升了模型判别能力（AUC），又显著改变了判别标准（criterion）。所有模型的证据分布都呈现出不等方差特征（z-ROC斜率0.52-0.84），且不同类型的模型（如instruct模型和base模型）表现出不同的分布非对称性。
AI.conclusion: 校准指标在实际结果上无法区分模型的重要敏感性与作答偏差。信号检测理论的完整参数框架为LLM校准和性能测评提供了更具诊断性的信息，应作为LLM评价的重要补充。

title: A Dual Quaternion Framework for Collision Recovery of Quadrotor
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating in cluttered environments require accurate impact modeling to maintain stability. However, conventional contact models decouple linear and angular impulses, risking manifold inconsistency during rapid state transitions. This article presents a dual quaternion reset map that resolves rigid-body impacts directly on the SE(3) manifold. By operating on the unified spatial twist (linear and angular velocities as a single dual entity), our formulation is algebraically equivalent to the classical Newton impulse model while preserving manifold consistency during discrete state jumps. Building on this framework, we design a hybrid recovery controller that couples linear and angular momentum to ensure strict energy dissipation across impacts. Hardware-in-the-loop benchmarks demonstrate a 24% reduction in execution latency compared to an optimized matrix-based implementation. High-fidelity MuJoCo simulations validate the controller's robustness to complex contact dynamics, showing a 56.6% reduction in post-impact root-mean-square error (RMSE) and a 41.2% decrease in peak kinetic energy compared to decoupled recovery methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于双四元数的碰撞建模和恢复控制方法，使无人机在复杂环境中应对碰撞更稳定、高效。
AI.motivation: 现有的无人机碰撞模型将线性与角速度冲量解耦，导致状态跃迁时易出现不一致，降低了系统稳定性和性能。
AI.method: 本文利用双四元数reset映射和SE(3)流形上的统一空间twist向量，对刚体碰撞进行整体求解，实现动量的耦合。同时，在此基础上设计了混合恢复控制器，确保碰撞能量严格耗散。
AI.result: 与传统方法相比，所提方法让硬件运行延迟降低24%，在高保真模拟中，碰撞后RMSE降低56.6%，峰值动能下降41.2%。
AI.conclusion: 基于双四元数reset映射和动量耦合恢复控制器可显著提高无人机在复杂环境中碰撞后的稳定性与控制精度。

title: SAIF: A Stability-Aware Inference Framework for Medical Image Segmentation with Segment Anything Model
summary: Segment Anything Model (SAM) enable scalable medical image segmentation but suffer from inference-time instability when deployed as a frozen backbone. In practice, bounding-box prompts often contain localization errors, and fixed threshold binarization introduces additional decision uncertainty. These factors jointly cause high prediction variance, especially near object boundaries, degrading reliability. We propose the Stability-Aware Inference Framework (SAIF), a training-free and plug-and-play inference framework that improves robustness by explicitly modeling prompt and threshold uncertainty. SAIF constructs a joint uncertainty space via structured box perturbations and threshold variations, evaluates each hypothesis using decision stability and boundary consistency, and introduces a stability-consistency score to filter unstable candidates and perform stability-weighted fusion in probability space. Experiments on Synapse, CVC-ClinicDB, Kvasir-SEG, and CVC-300 demonstrate that SAIF consistently improves segmentation accuracy and robustness, achieving state-of-the-art performance without retraining or architectural modification. Our anonymous code is released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SAIF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SAIF，一种可在无需重新训练或修改架构的情况下提升SAM医学图像分割推理稳健性的推理框架。
AI.motivation: SAM在医学图像分割中极具扩展性，但作为冻结主干网络部署时，在推理过程中易受定位误差、固定阈值等问题影响，导致边界附近的不稳定性及结果可靠性降低。
AI.method: 提出了无需训练、即插即用的Stability-Aware Inference Framework (SAIF)。该方法通过对box和阈值进行结构化扰动，构造联合不确定性空间，用决策稳定性和边界一致性评估候选，基于稳定性-一致性分数进行不稳定候选过滤和概率空间加权融合。
AI.result: 在Synapse、CVC-ClinicDB、Kvasir-SEG和CVC-300数据集上的实验表明，SAIF无须重新训练即能稳定提升分割准确性和鲁棒性，达到了新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SAIF通过建模提示和阈值不确定性，有效提升了SAM模型的推理鲁棒性，为医学图像自动分割提供了更可靠的解决方案，且适用性强，易于集成。

title: ExPosST: Explicit Positioning with Adaptive Masking for LLM-Based Simultaneous Machine Translation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated promising performance in simultaneous machine translation (SimulMT). However, applying decoder-only LLMs to SimulMT introduces a positional mismatch, which leads to a dilemma between decoding efficiency and positional consistency. Existing approaches often rely on specific positional encodings or carefully designed prompting schemes, and thus fail to simultaneously achieve inference efficiency, positional consistency, and broad model compatibility. In this work, we propose ExPosST, a general framework that resolves this dilemma through explicit position allocation. ExPosST reserves fixed positional slots for incoming source tokens, enabling efficient decoding with KV cache across different positional encoding methods. To further bridge the gap between fine-tuning and inference, we introduce a policy-consistent fine-tuning strategy that aligns training with inference-time decoding behavior. Experiments across multiple language pairs demonstrate that ExPosST effectively supports simultaneous translation under diverse policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ExPosST的新框架，通过显式位置分配，解决了解码器仅模式下SimulMT中的位置错配难题，实现了解码效率、位置一致性和模型兼容性的统一。
AI.motivation: 在同时机器翻译（SimulMT）中，大型语言模型显示出良好表现，但解码器仅结构引入了位置错配，造成了解码效率和位置一致性之间的矛盾。现有方法多依赖特殊的位置编码或精心设计的提示模板，无法三方面兼顾。
AI.method: 提出ExPosST，通过为新输入的源语言token保留固定位置槽，结合KV cache提升解码效率，并适用于不同位置编码方案。同时，引入了与策略一致的微调方法，使训练和推理过程更加一致。
AI.result: 在多组语言对实验证明，ExPosST能在多种策略下有效支持高效且一致的同时翻译。
AI.conclusion: ExPosST为SimulMT中的位置分配、效率与模型兼容性提供了统一解决方案，有望推动大语言模型在同时翻译任务上的实际应用。

title: LiDAR-EVS: Enhance Extrapolated View Synthesis for 3D Gaussian Splatting with Pseudo-LiDAR Supervision
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for real-time LiDAR and camera synthesis in autonomous driving simulation. However, simulating LiDAR with 3DGS remains challenging for extrapolated views beyond the training trajectory, as existing methods are typically trained on single-traversal sensor scans, suffer from severe overfitting and poor generalization to novel ego-vehicle paths. To enable reliable simulation of LiDAR along unseen driving trajectories without external multi-pass data, we present LiDAR-EVS, a lightweight framework for robust extrapolated-view LiDAR simulation in autonomous driving. Designed to be plug-and-play, LiDAR-EVS readily extends to diverse LiDAR sensors and neural rendering baselines with minimal modification. Our framework comprises two key components: (1) pseudo extrapolated-view point cloud supervision with multi-frame LiDAR fusion, view transformation, occlusion curling, and intensity adjustment; (2) spatially-constrained dropout regularization that promotes robustness to diverse trajectory variations encountered in real-world driving. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiDAR-EVS achieves SOTA performance on extrapolated-view LiDAR synthesis across three datasets, making it a promising tool for data-driven simulation, closed-loop evaluation, and synthetic data generation in autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了LiDAR-EVS，一种可拓展、轻量级的框架，用于提升3D高斯投影技术在自动驾驶仿真中对新轨迹下LiDAR合成的泛化和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在自动驾驶仿真中可实现实时LiDAR和相机合成，但对超出训练轨迹的新视角仍过度拟合、泛化性差，限制了真实驾驶多样性的仿真能力，亟需解决。
AI.method: 提出LiDAR-EVS框架，包括：(1) 伪外推视角点云监督，结合多帧点云融合、视角变换、遮挡处理和强度调整；(2) 空间约束dropout正则化，以增强对不同轨迹的鲁棒性。该方法无需额外多遍采集数据，且可轻松适配不同LiDAR传感器和神经渲染基线。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，LiDAR-EVS在外推视角LiDAR合成任务中取得了目前最优性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LiDAR-EVS方法有效提升了3DGS在异轨迹自动驾驶仿真情境下的泛化能力和稳定性，适用于仿真评测和大规模合成数据生成，对自动驾驶系统开发有重要意义。

title: NumColor: Precise Numeric Color Control in Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models excel at generating images from natural language descriptions, yet fail to interpret numerical colors such as hex codes (#FF5733) and RGB values (rgb(255,87,51)). This limitation stems from subword tokenization, which fragments color codes into semantically meaningless tokens that text encoders cannot map to coherent color representations. We present NumColor, that enables precise numerical color control across multiple diffusion architectures. NumColor comprises two components: a Color Token Aggregator that detects color specifications regardless of tokenization, and a ColorBook containing 6,707 learnable embeddings that map colors to embedding space of text encoder in perceptually uniform CIE Lab space. We introduce two auxiliary losses, directional alignment and interpolation consistency, to enforce geometric correspondence between Lab and embedding spaces, enabling smooth color interpolation. To train the ColorBook, we construct NumColor-Data, a synthetic dataset of 500K rendered images with unambiguous color-to-pixel correspondence, eliminating the annotation ambiguity inherent in photographic datasets. Although trained solely on FLUX, NumColor transfers zero-shot to SD3, SD3.5, PixArt-α, and PixArt-Σ without model-specific adaptation. NumColor improves numerical color accuracy by 4-9x across five models, while simultaneously improving color harmony scores by 10-30x on GenColorBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NumColor的方法，实现了对扩散模型中数值颜色（如hex和RGB）精确的控制。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像的扩散模型难以理解和处理像hex代码或RGB值这样的数值颜色描述，导致生成图像颜色不准确。主要原因是现有的分词方式将颜色代码分割成没有语义意义的tokens，文本编码器不能将其映射为连贯的颜色向量。
AI.method: NumColor包含两个核心组件：1）颜色Token聚合器（Color Token Aggregator），能在分词方式下正确识别颜色描述；2）ColorBook，是一个包含6707个可学习embedding的词表，用于将颜色映射到文本编码器的embedding空间，并在CIE Lab空间中保持感知上均匀。同时，定义了方向对齐和插值一致两个辅助损失函数，使Lab空间与embedding空间几何对齐，实现平滑插值分布。为训练ColorBook，作者构造了NumColor-Data合成数据集，包含50万张颜色与像素无歧义对应的渲染图片，消除了真实数据的不确定性。
AI.result: NumColor无需针对性适配，就能将已训练好的FLUX权重迁移到SD3、SD3.5、PixArt-α和PixArt-Σ等多个主流扩散模型上。实验表明，其数值色彩准确率在五种模型上提升4-9倍，GenColorBench基准上的色彩协调性分数提升10-30倍。
AI.conclusion: NumColor显著提升了不同扩散架构对数值颜色的理解和控制能力，兼顾颜色准确性与协调性，在数值性颜色描述生成任务中具有广泛适用性和优越表现。

title: Beyond Benchmark Islands: Toward Representative Trustworthiness Evaluation for Agentic AI
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure. Submitted to KDD 2026 Blue Sky Track
summary: As agentic AI systems move beyond static question answering into open-ended, tool-augmented, and multi-step real-world workflows, their increased authority poses greater risks of system misuse and operational failures. However, current evaluation practices remain fragmented, measuring isolated capabilities such as coding, hallucination, jailbreak resistance, or tool use in narrowly defined settings. We argue that the central limitation is not merely insufficient coverage of evaluation dimensions, but the lack of a principled notion of representativeness: an agent's trustworthiness should be assessed over a representative socio-technical scenario distribution rather than a collection of disconnected benchmark instances. To this end, we propose the Holographic Agent Assessment Framework (HAAF), a systematic evaluation paradigm that characterizes agent trustworthiness over a scenario manifold spanning task types, tool interfaces, interaction dynamics, social contexts, and risk levels. The framework integrates four complementary components: (i) static cognitive and policy analysis, (ii) interactive sandbox simulation, (iii) social-ethical alignment assessment, and (iv) a distribution-aware representative sampling engine that jointly optimizes coverage and risk sensitivity -- particularly for rare but high-consequence tail risks that conventional benchmarks systematically overlook. These components are connected through an iterative Trustworthy Optimization Factory. Through cycles of red-team probing and blue-team hardening, this paradigm progressively narrows the vulnerabilities to meet deployment standards, shifting agent evaluation from benchmark islands toward representative, real-world trustworthiness. Code and data for the illustrative instantiation are available at https://github.com/TonyQJH/haaf-pilot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HAAF框架，一种系统性、多维度的AI代理可行性和可信度评估方法，克服了传统评估孤立、割裂的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理逐步应用于多步、复杂的现实任务，简单的静态能力评估远不能反映其实用和风险，当前评估手段碎片化且难以覆盖整个真实风险分布。研究动机在于构建一种能更全面、代表性地评估AI可信度的新范式。
AI.method: 作者提出Holographic Agent Assessment Framework (HAAF)，包含：静态认知与策略分析、交互式仿真、社会伦理一致性评估、覆盖与风险敏感度并重的代表性采样引擎。通过红蓝对抗循环不断优化AI代理的脆弱环节。
AI.result: HAAF使AI评估流程更贴合真实部署需求，能够发现和缩小此前评测方法容易忽略的高风险、小概率漏洞，展示出比传统基准更强的安全性和可信性提升。
AI.conclusion: HAAF开创了从“基准孤岛”到“代表性真实可信度”演进的新方向，有望成为面向复杂现实场景AI可信评测的主流方案。

title: CORAL: COntextual Reasoning And Local Planning in A Hierarchical VLM Framework for Underwater Monitoring
summary: Oyster reefs are critical ecosystem species that sustain biodiversity, filter water, and protect coastlines, yet they continue to decline globally. Restoring these ecosystems requires regular underwater monitoring to assess reef health, a task that remains costly, hazardous, and limited when performed by human divers. Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) offer a promising alternative, but existing AUVs rely on geometry-based navigation that cannot interpret scene semantics. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable semantic reasoning for intelligent exploration, but existing VLM-driven systems adopt an end-to-end paradigm, introducing three key limitations. First, these systems require the VLM to generate every navigation decision, forcing frequent waits for inference. Second, VLMs cannot model robot dynamics, causing collisions in cluttered environments. Third, limited self-correction allows small deviations to accumulate into large path errors. To address these limitations, we propose CORAL, a framework that decouples high-level semantic reasoning from low-level reactive control. The VLM provides high-level exploration guidance by selecting waypoints, while a dynamics-based planner handles low-level collision-free execution. A geometric verification module validates waypoints and triggers replanning when needed. Compared with the previous state-of-the-art, CORAL improves coverage by 14.28% percentage points, or 17.85% relatively, reduces collisions by 100%, and requires 57% fewer VLM calls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架CORAL，通过结合视觉语言模型（VLM）与动态规划，实现对牡蛎礁生态系统更高效、安全的自主水下监测。该框架提升了覆盖率、避免了碰撞，并减少了算力消耗。
AI.motivation: 全球牡蛎礁正在衰退，人工潜水监测成本高且有风险。现有自主水下机器人主要依赖几何导航，缺乏对环境语义的理解，限制了它们在复杂环境下的应用，因此需要更加智能且安全的自动化监测方法。
AI.method: 提出了CORAL框架，将高层语义决策与低层动态控制解耦。VLM负责高阶探索，选择下一个关键点；动态规划器负责无碰撞路径执行；再辅以几何校验模块对关键点进行验证并触发重规划。
AI.result: 与之前最先进方法相比，CORAL在覆盖率上提升了14.28个百分点（相对提升17.85%），完全避免了碰撞，且VLM调用次数减少57%。
AI.conclusion: CORAL框架有效融合了语义推理、动态执行和几何验证，提高了地下机器人在复杂场景中的监测能力和安全性，为生态系统保护等任务提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Semantic Aware Feature Extraction for Enhanced 3D Reconstruction
summary: Feature matching is a fundamental problem in computer vision with wide-ranging applications, including simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), image stitching, and 3D reconstruction. While recent advances in deep learning have improved keypoint detection and description, most approaches focus primarily on geometric attributes and often neglect higher-level semantic information. This work proposes a semantic-aware feature extraction framework that employs multi-task learning to jointly train keypoint detection, keypoint description, and semantic segmentation. The method is benchmarked against standard feature matching techniques and evaluated in the context of 3D reconstruction. To enhance feature correspondence, a deep matching module is integrated. The system is tested using input from a single monocular fisheye camera mounted on a vehicle and evaluated within a multi-floor parking structure. The proposed approach supports semantic 3D reconstruction with altitude estimation, capturing elevation changes and enabling multi-level mapping. Experimental results demonstrate that the method produces semantically annotated 3D point clouds with improved structural detail and elevation information, underscoring the effectiveness of joint training with semantic cues for more consistent feature matching and enhanced 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合语义信息的特征提取框架，通过多任务学习联合训练关键点检测、描述及语义分割，有效提升3D重建的精度，尤其适用于单目鱼眼相机在多层停车场环境中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统的特征匹配方法多关注几何属性，忽视了场景中的高级语义信息，导致匹配稳定性和3D重建一致性不足。为提升特征描述的丰富性和匹配准确性，作者引入语义信息辅助特征学习。
AI.method: 提出利用多任务学习框架，将关键点检测、描述与语义分割联合训练。同时引入深度匹配模块提升特征对应。系统在单目鱼眼摄像头的数据上实现，并针对多层停车场环境进行车载测试。
AI.result: 方法在标准特征匹配与3D重建任务上进行评测，能有效支持包含标注语义与高程信息的3D重建，生成结构细节更丰富的点云。
AI.conclusion: 联合语义信息的特征提取与匹配可显著提升3D重建结果的结构与高程一致性，验证了在多层复杂环境重建的有效性和应用潜力。

title: OrgForge: A Multi-Agent Simulation Framework for Verifiable Synthetic Corporate Corpora
summary: Evaluating retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines requires corpora where ground truth is knowable, temporally structured, and cross-artifact properties that real-world datasets rarely provide cleanly. Existing resources such as the Enron corpus carry legal ambiguity, demographic skew, and no structured ground truth. Purely LLM-generated synthetic data solves the legal problem but introduces a subtler one: the generating model cannot be prevented from hallucinating facts that contradict themselves across documents.We present OrgForge, an open-source multi-agent simulation framework that enforces a strict physics-cognition boundary: a deterministic Python engine maintains a SimEvent ground truth bus; large language models generate only surface prose, constrained by validated proposals. An actor-local clock enforces causal timestamp correctness across all artifact types, eliminating the class of timeline inconsistencies that arise when timestamps are sampled independently per document. We formalize three graph-dynamic subsystems stress propagation via betweenness centrality, temporal edge-weight decay, and Dijkstra escalation routing that govern organizational behavior independently of any LLM. Running a configurable N-day simulation, OrgForge produces interleaved Slack threads, JIRA tickets, Confluence pages, Git pull requests, and emails, all traceable to a shared, immutable event log. We additionally describe a causal chain tracking subsystem that accumulates cross-artifact evidence graphs per incident, a hybrid reciprocal-rank-fusion recurrence detector for identifying repeated failure classes, and an inbound/outbound email engine that routes vendor alerts, customer complaints, and HR correspondence through gated causal chains with probabilistic drop simulation. OrgForge is available under the MIT license.

AI.tldr: OrgForge是一个开源多智能体仿真框架，能够生成带有严格事件因果结构且可追溯的多种组织内部工件（如Slack、JIRA、Confluence、Git、邮件等），以便更真实和精准地评估RAG系统。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的数据集因法律限制、真实标签不明确、时间结构混乱等原因，不适合用作RAG（检索增强生成）模型评价。LLM自动生成数据虽规避了法律问题，但易发生跨文档自相矛盾的事实幻觉。
AI.method: 提出OrgForge框架：1）用Python引擎维护事件总线做事件地面真实标签；2）LLM只负责生成表层文本，而且文本必须基于被验证的提案；3）本地时钟约束所有工件的时间戳保持因果一致性；4）引入图动力学子系统，利用中心性传播、边权衰减、最短路径上升等机制再现组织行为，并设计因果链追踪、事件复现检测和进/出邮件仿真等模块。
AI.result: OrgForge可以生成带有完备因果链、严格时间结构、多样的工件集合，每个事件都可追溯，有助于评估RAG管道模型的跨工件与时序表现。
AI.conclusion: OrgForge有效解决了RAG评测中数据集缺乏结构化、可验证因果关系和时间一致性的问题，为研究提供了高质量、公开可用的仿真基准。

title: Exploring the dynamic properties and motion reproducibility of a small upper-body humanoid robot with 13-DOF pneumatic actuation for data-driven control
comment: 24 pages, 21 figures. Submitted to Advanced Robotics
summary: Pneumatically-actuated anthropomorphic robots with high degrees of freedom (DOF) offer significant potential for physical human-robot interaction. However, precise control of pneumatic actuators is challenging due to their inherent nonlinearities. This paper presents the development of a compact 13-DOF upper-body humanoid robot. To assess the feasibility of an effective controller, we first investigate its key dynamic properties, such as actuation time delays, and confirm that the system exhibits highly reproducible behavior. Leveraging this reproducibility, we implement a preliminary data-driven controller for a 4-DOF arm subsystem based on a multilayer perceptron with explicit time delay compensation. The network was trained on random movement data to generate pressure commands for tracking arbitrary trajectories. Comparative evaluations with a traditional PID controller demonstrate superior trajectory tracking performance, highlighting the potential of data-driven approaches for controlling complex, high-DOF pneumatic robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于多层感知器（MLP）神经网络的数据驱动控制方法，显著提升了13自由度气动仿人上半身机器人亚系统的轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 高自由度气动人形机器人在与人类物理交互中有广阔前景，但气动执行器控制的非线性和时延性难以实现高精度控制。本文旨在验证数据驱动方法解决此问题的可行性。
AI.method: 开发了一台13自由度上半身人形机器人，研究并量化系统动态特性（如气动时延），确认重复性。针对一个4自由度手臂子系统，用含时延补偿的MLP网络作为控制器，网络经随机运动数据训练，实现压力指令输出。与传统PID控制器做了轨迹跟踪对比实验。
AI.result: MLP数据驱动控制器表现出比传统PID更优的轨迹跟踪效果，有效应对非线性和时延问题。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法（如MLP神经网络）适合高自由度气动机器人控制，可超越传统PID算法，为复杂机器人精准控制提供新思路。

title: Performance evaluation of deep learning models for image analysis: considerations for visual control and statistical metrics
summary: Deep learning-based automated image analysis (DL-AIA) has been shown to outperform trained pathologists in tasks related to feature quantification. Related to these capacities the use of DL-AIA tools is currently extending from proof-of-principle studies to routine applications such as patient samples (diagnostic pathology), regulatory safety assessment (toxicologic pathology), and recurrent research tasks. To ensure that DL-AIA applications are safe and reliable, it is critical to conduct a thorough and objective generalization performance assessment (i.e., the ability of the algorithm to accurately predict patterns of interest) and possibly evaluate model robustness (i.e., the algorithm's capacity to maintain predictive accuracy on images from different sources). In this article, we review the practices for performance assessment in veterinary pathology publications by which two approaches were identified: 1) Exclusive visual performance control (i.e. eyeballing of algorithmic predictions) plus validation of the models application utilizing secondary performance indices, and 2) Statistical performance control (alongside the other methods), which requires a dataset creation and separation of an hold-out test set prior to model training. This article compares the strengths and weaknesses of statistical and visual performance control methods. Furthermore, we discuss relevant considerations for rigorous statistical performance evaluation including metric selection, test dataset image composition, ground truth label quality, resampling methods such as bootstrapping, statistical comparison of multiple models, and evaluation of model stability. It is our conclusion that visual and statistical evaluation have complementary strength and a combination of both provides the greatest insight into the DL model's performance and sources of error.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习自动化图像分析（DL-AIA）在兽医病理学中的性能评估方法，比较了统计与视觉评估的优劣，并建议两者结合以获得最佳分析效果。
AI.motivation: 随着DL-AIA工具在病理学各领域由实验性研究逐步扩展到实际应用，确保其安全性和可靠性变得尤为重要。因此，需要对模型的泛化性能和鲁棒性进行全面客观的评估。
AI.method: 本文回顾了兽医病理学研究中DL-AIA性能评估的两种主流方法：1）纯视觉评估（人工观测与次级性能指标验证）；2）统计性能评估（需数据集划分、测试集设立等），并详细讨论了统计评估的各项细节及相关方法。
AI.result: 通过对比发现，视觉评估和统计评估各有优劣，视觉评估更侧重直观理解，统计评估能提供更客观、量化的性能指标。两者结合能更全面揭示模型表现及潜在误差。
AI.conclusion: 单一方法难以全面反映DL模型实际能力，视觉与统计评估具有互补性，一体化运用能获得对DL-AIA模型性能及其误差来源的最佳洞见。

title: Pretraining and Benchmarking Modern Encoders for Latvian
summary: Encoder-only transformers remain essential for practical NLP tasks. While recent advances in multilingual models have improved cross-lingual capabilities, low-resource languages such as Latvian remain underrepresented in pretraining corpora, and few monolingual Latvian encoders currently exist. We address this gap by pretraining a suite of Latvian-specific encoders based on RoBERTa, DeBERTaV3, and ModernBERT architectures, including long-context variants, and evaluating them across a diverse set of Latvian diagnostic and linguistic benchmarks. Our models are competitive with existing monolingual and multilingual encoders while benefiting from recent architectural and efficiency advances. Our best model, lv-deberta-base (111M parameters), achieves the strongest overall performance, outperforming larger multilingual baselines and prior Latvian-specific encoders. We release all pretrained models and evaluation resources to support further research and practical applications in Latvian NLP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并训练了多种拉脱维亚语专用的编码器（基于RoBERTa、DeBERTaV3和ModernBERT），并在多项拉脱维亚语基准上进行了评测，取得了优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 多语种模型对低资源语言（如拉脱维亚语）的支持有限，且拉脱维亚语专用的单语编码器稀缺，需要弥补这一空白。
AI.method: 以RoBERTa、DeBERTaV3和ModernBERT等主流架构为基础，预训练了针对拉脱维亚语的编码器（含长文本变体），并在多种拉脱维亚语基准测试集上评估性能。
AI.result: 提出的模型达到或超过了现有单语和多语种编码器的水平，特别是“lv-deberta-base”模型（1.11亿参数）取得了最优整体表现，超越以往拉脱维亚语模型和多语种大规模模型。
AI.conclusion: 拉脱维亚语专用编码器能在多项任务上取得更好表现，推动了该语言NLP研究发展；全部模型和评测资源已开放，便于后续研究和应用。

title: GraspALL: Adaptive Structural Compensation from Illumination Variation for Robotic Garment Grasping in Any Low-Light Conditions
summary: Achieving accurate garment grasping under dynamically changing illumination is crucial for all-day operation of service robots.However, the reduced illumination in low-light scenes severely degrades garment structural features, leading to a significant drop in grasping robustness.Existing methods typically enhance RGB features by exploiting the illumination-invariant properties of non-RGB modalities, yet they overlook the varying dependence on non-RGB features under varying lighting conditions, which can introduce misaligned non-RGB cues and thereby weaken the model's adaptability to illumination changes when utilizing multimodal information.To address this problem, we propose GraspALL, an illumination-structure interactive compensation model.The innovation of GraspALL lies in encoding continuous illumination changes into quantitative references to guide adaptive feature fusion between RGB and non-RGB modalities according to varying lighting intensities, thereby generating illumination-consistent grasping representations.Experiments on the self-built garment grasping dataset demonstrate that GraspALL improves grasping accuracy by 32-44% over baselines under diverse illumination conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新模型GraspALL，通过自适应融合RGB与非RGB特征，实现了服务机器人在不同光照条件下衣物抓取的高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 不同光照条件下，衣物的结构特征会因为光照减弱而丢失，导致机器人抓取准确率下降。目前方法利用非RGB模态的光照不变性提升表现，但没考虑对非RGB特征的依赖会随光照变化而波动，因此多模态融合在光照变化时适应性不足。
AI.method: 提出GraspALL模型，创新点在于将连续变化的光照强度编码为定量参考，引导RGB与非RGB特征的自适应融合，实现针对光照强度自适应的特征融合，得到光照一致的抓取表示。
AI.result: 在自建的衣物抓取数据集上，GraspALL在多种光照条件下将抓取准确率提升了32-44%，明显优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GraspALL模型能有效提升机器人在动态光照环境中的衣物抓取能力，表明基于光照引导的多模态特征融合策略具备广泛应用前景。

title: DiveUp: Learning Feature Upsampling from Diverse Vision Foundation Models
summary: Recently, feature upsampling has gained increasing attention owing to its effectiveness in enhancing vision foundation models (VFMs) for pixel-level understanding tasks. Existing methods typically rely on high-resolution features from the same foundation model to achieve upsampling via self-reconstruction. However, relying solely on intra-model features forces the upsampler to overfit to the source model's inherent location misalignment and high-norm artifacts. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose DiveUp, a novel framework that breaks away from single-model dependency by introducing multi-VFM relational guidance. Instead of naive feature fusion, DiveUp leverages diverse VFMs as a panel of experts, utilizing their structural consensus to regularize the upsampler's learning process, effectively preventing the propagation of inaccurate spatial structures from the source model. To reconcile the unaligned feature spaces across different VFMs, we propose a universal relational feature representation, formulated as a local center-of-mass (COM) field, that extracts intrinsic geometric structures, enabling seamless cross-model interaction. Furthermore, we introduce a spikiness-aware selection strategy that evaluates the spatial reliability of each VFM, effectively filtering out high-norm artifacts to aggregate guidance from only the most reliable expert at each local region. DiveUp is a unified, encoder-agnostic framework; a jointly-trained model can universally upsample features from diverse VFMs without requiring per-model retraining. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiveUp achieves state-of-the-art performance across various downstream dense prediction tasks, validating the efficacy of multi-expert relational guidance. Our code and models are available at: https://github.com/Xiaoqiong-Liu/DiveUp

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DiveUp框架，通过多基础视觉模型(VFM)的关系引导来提升特征上采样效果，显著减少空间结构误差，并在多项密集预测任务上取得了最新的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有特征上采样方法依赖于单一视觉基础模型输出，受制于该模型固有的空间不对齐和高范数伪影，导致上采样器过拟合，影响下游任务性能。
AI.method: DiveUp通过引入多VFM的专家结构，利用不同模型在局部几何结构上的共识关系引导特征上采样。设计了普适的局部质心(COM)特征表述，实现跨模型对齐与信息交互。此外，使用尖峰感知选择策略，在每个区域筛选最可靠的专家，过滤噪声伪影，保证引导质量。该方法无需针对每个模型专门训练，具备普适性和灵活性。
AI.result: DiveUp在多领域密集预测任务上进行了大量实验，实现了比单一模型自重建方法更优的性能，且能够在各种VFM间通用，高效提升像素级理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 多模型关系引导能有效抑制单模型空间误差，DiveUp框架通用性强、表现优越，为特征上采样方法带来新思路，具有重要实际应用价值。

title: Attention Residuals
summary:
Residual connections with PreNorm are standard in modern LLMs, yet they accumulate all layer outputs with fixed unit weights. This uniform aggregation causes uncontrolled hidden-state growth with depth, progressively diluting each layer's contribution. We propose Attention Residuals (AttnRes), which replaces this fixed accumulation with softmax attention over preceding layer outputs, allowing each layer to selectively aggregate earlier representations with learned, input-dependent weights. To address the memory and communication overhead of attending over all preceding layer outputs for large-scale model training, we introduce Block AttnRes, which partitions layers into blocks and attends over block-level representations, reducing the memory footprint while preserving most of the gains of full AttnRes. Combined with cache-based pipeline communication and a two-phase computation strategy, Block AttnRes becomes a practical drop-in replacement for standard residual connections with minimal overhead.
  Scaling law experiments confirm that the improvement is consistent across model sizes, and ablations validate the benefit of content-dependent depth-wise selection. We further integrate AttnRes into the Kimi Linear architecture (48B total / 3B activated parameters) and pre-train on 1.4T tokens, where AttnRes mitigates PreNorm dilution, yielding more uniform output magnitudes and gradient distribution across depth, and improves downstream performance across all evaluated tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Attention Residuals（AttnRes）机制，用软性注意力权重替代传统LLM残差连接中的固定加权，实现对历史层输出的内容自适应聚合，并通过Block AttnRes优化计算与内存瓶颈。实验显示新方法在不同规模模型上均带来一致提升，且优化了模型深度下的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型使用PreNorm残差结构，将所有层输出以等权重累加，导致深层网络时状态值过大且各层信息稀释严重，影响深度学习效果。需要一种方法让残差连接能够自适应选择并加权聚合历史层输出，以提升信息流动与性能。
AI.method: 作者提出AttnRes机制，用softmax注意力聚合所有前序层输出，使每层可以根据实际输入自适应选择性累加信息。为减少大模型训练中的内存与通信压力，进一步提出Block AttnRes，将层分块仅聚合块级特征，并结合缓存和两阶段计算，有效降低成本，支持落地。
AI.result: 规模化实验表明AttnRes在所有模型规模下均有稳定收益，消融实验验证了深度自适应关键性。在Kimi Linear架构与1.4T token预训练中，AttnRes显著缓解PreNorm的信息稀释问题，提高了输出与梯度在深度上的均匀性，且下游任务性能全面提升。
AI.conclusion: AttnRes及Block AttnRes是一种高效且可实际部署的残差连接改进方案，并可用于大型模型训练，显著改善深层网络的信息表达能力和性能，推动LLM架构进一步发展。

title: A Unified Calibration Framework for Coordinate and Kinematic Parameters in Dual-Arm Robots
summary: Precise collaboration in vision-based dual-arm robot systems requires accurate system calibration. Recent dual-robot calibration methods have achieved strong performance by simultaneously solving multiple coordinate transformations. However, these methods either treat kinematic errors as implicit noise or handle them through separated error modeling, resulting in non-negligible accumulated errors. In this paper, we present a novel framework for unified calibration of the coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters in both robot arms. Our key idea is to unify all the tightly coupled parameters within a single Lie-algebraic formulation. To this end, we construct a consolidated error model grounded in the product-of-exponentials formula, which naturally integrates the coordinate and kinematic parameters in twist forms. Our model introduces no artificial error separation and thus greatly mitigates the error propagation. In addition, we derive a closed-form analytical Jacobian from this model using Lie derivatives. By exploring the Jacobian rank property, we analyze the identifiability of all calibration parameters and show that our joint optimization is well-posed under mild conditions. This enables off-the-shelf iterative solvers to stably optimize these parameters on the manifold space. Besides, to ensure robust convergence of our joint optimization, we develop a certifiably correct algorithm for initializing the unknown coordinates. Relying on semidefinite relaxation, our algorithm can yield a reliable estimate whose near-global optimality can be verified a posteriori. Extensive experiments validate the superior accuracy of our approach over previous baselines under identical visual measurements. Meanwhile, our certifiable initialization consistently outperforms several coordinate-only baselines, proving its reliability as a starting point for joint optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李代数统一建模和优化的双臂机器人视觉系统标定框架，可同时精确标定坐标变换和运动学参数，有效抑制累计误差，并通过半正定松弛实现鲁棒初始化，实验验证方法精度优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有双臂机器人系统的标定方法在处理运动学误差时，往往采用隐式噪声建模或分离误差处理，导致累计误差不可忽略，影响协作精度。如何将所有耦合参数统一建模，并实现误差最小化，是提升系统标定精度和可靠性的关键。
AI.method: 作者提出以李代数为基础的统一参数建模方法，将所有坐标变换和运动学参数通过乘指数公式整合为一个整体误差模型，避免人工区分误差。同时推导出解析雅可比矩阵，用于分析参数可辨识性，并确保优化问题在温和条件下良定。此外，提出基于半正定松弛的初始化算法，可获得可验证近全局最优的参数初值，增强优化收敛鲁棒性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，在相同的视觉测量条件下，本文方法在标定精度上全面优于以往主流方法。提出的初始化算法在不同测试下均优于现有坐标初始化方法，为后续的联合优化提供更优初始点。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次统一双臂机器人视觉系统中坐标和运动学参数的标定问题，有效降低误差传播风险，在准确性和鲁棒性上显著优于现有方法，为相关机器人应用提供了更可靠的基础。

title: Analytical Logit Scaling for High-Resolution Sea Ice Topology Retrieval from Weakly Labeled SAR Imagery
summary: High-resolution sea ice mapping using Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is crucial for Arctic navigation and climate monitoring. However, operational ice charts provide only coarse, region-level polygons (weak labels), forcing automated segmentation models to struggle with pixel-level accuracy and often yielding under-confident, blurred concentration maps. In this paper, we propose a weakly supervised deep learning pipeline that fuses Sentinel-1 SAR and AMSR-2 radiometry data using a U-Net architecture trained with a region-based loss. To overcome the severe under-confidence caused by weak labels, we introduce an Analytical Logit Scaling method applied post-inference. By dynamically calculating the temperature and bias based on the latent space percentiles (2\% and 98\%) of each scene, we force a physical binarization of the predictions. This adaptive scaling acts as a topological extractor, successfully revealing fine-grained sea ice fractures (leads) at a 40-meter resolution without requiring any manual pixel-level annotations. Our approach not only resolves local topology but also perfectly preserves regional macroscopic concentrations, achieving a 78\% accuracy on highly fragmented summer scenes, thereby bridging the gap between weakly supervised learning and high-resolution physical segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种融合SAR和微波辐射计数据的新方法，实现了无需像素级标注的高分辨率海冰分割。
AI.motivation: 目前海冰制图只提供粗略的区域级标注，无法满足导航和气候监测对高分辨率、精确分割的需求。传统模型易出现信心不足和模糊结果。
AI.method: 利用融合Sentinel-1 SAR与AMSR-2辐射计数据的U-Net架构，采用区域性损失进行弱监督训练。创新性地提出分析性logit缩放技术，在推理后动态调整输出，强制物理二值化，提高分割精度。
AI.result: 新方法能在无需像素级人工标注的情况下，成功识别40米精度的海冰结构，特别是细小断裂带，且还能准确还原大尺度冰浓度。夏季碎片化场景下分割准确率达78%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了弱监督下的高分辨率海冰分割问题，兼顾局部结构与整体浓度估计，为实际应用和相关研究带来了重要突破。

title: Interpretable Predictability-Based AI Text Detection: A Replication Study
summary: This paper replicates and extends the system used in the AuTexTification 2023 shared task for authorship attribution of machine-generated texts. First, we tried to reproduce the original results. Exact replication was not possible because of differences in data splits, model availability, and implementation details. Next, we tested newer multilingual language models and added 26 document-level stylometric features. We also applied SHAP analysis to examine which features influence the model's decisions. We replaced the original GPT-2 models with newer generative models such as Qwen and mGPT for computing probabilistic features. For contextual representations, we used mDeBERTa-v3-base and applied the same configuration to both English and Spanish. This allowed us to use one shared configuration for Subtask 1 and Subtask 2. Our experiments show that the additional stylometric features improve performance in both tasks and both languages. The multilingual configuration achieves the results that are comparable to or better than language-specific models. The study also shows that clear documentation is important for reliable replication and fair comparison of systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究复现并扩展了AuTexTification 2023竞赛的文本作者归属系统，比较多种模型和特征搭配，并分析特征贡献，结果表明多语言模型和新增风格特征提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在验证及提升作者归属系统的有效性，特别是在区分机器生成文本时，希望通过复现与改进，推动相关方法的可复现性和性能提升。
AI.method: 先尝试严格复现原方法（因数据、模型可用性等无法完全同等），后引入了多语言预训练语言模型，增加了26项文档层级的文体特征，用SHAP分析特征重要性，主生成模型换为更先进的Qwen和mGPT，语境表征则用mDeBERTa-v3-base。
AI.result: 实验显示，无论英文或西班牙文，额外的文体特征均带来性能提升，多语言配置效果与单语模型相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: 多语言系统和文体特征对作者归属任务有效，系统复现需要清晰文档，才能确保可公正、可靠对比。

title: Ego to World: Collaborative Spatial Reasoning in Embodied Systems via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Understanding the world from distributed, partial viewpoints is a fundamental challenge for embodied multi-agent systems. Each agent perceives the environment through an ego-centric view that is often limited by occlusion and ambiguity. To study this problem, we introduce the Ego-to-World (E2W) benchmark, which evaluates a vision-language model's ability to fuse heterogeneous viewpoints across three tasks: (i) global counting, (ii) relational location reasoning, and (iii) action-oriented grasping that requires predicting view-specific image coordinates. To address this setting, we propose CoRL, a two-stage framework that combines Chain-of-Thought supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning using Group-Relative Policy Optimization. Its core component, the Cross-View Spatial Reward (CVSR), provides dense task-aligned feedback by linking reasoning steps to visual evidence, ensuring coherent cross-view entity resolution, and guiding the model toward correct final predictions. Experiments on E2W show that CoRL consistently surpasses strong proprietary and open-source baselines on both reasoning and perception-grounding metrics, while ablations further confirm the necessity of each CVSR component. Beyond that, CoRL generalizes to external spatial reasoning benchmarks and enables effective real-world multi-robot manipulation with calibrated multi-camera rigs, demonstrating cross-view localization and successful grasp-and-place execution. Together, E2W and CoRL provide a principled foundation for learning world-centric scene understanding from distributed, ego-centric observations, advancing collaborative embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 提出Ego-to-World (E2W)基准和CoRL方法，提升多视角、多智能体环境下的视觉-语言场景理解能力，并在任务测试和实际操作中取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中，每个智能体仅通过本地视角（ego-centric）感知环境，因视野受限与信息片面，难以实现全面世界理解。为推动分布式、多视角情境下的场景理解，需有新的基准与高效算法。
AI.method: 开发E2W基准，涵盖全局计数、关系推理和动作定位等三类典型任务。提出CoRL方法：分两阶段，先用“思维链”（Chain-of-Thought）监督微调，再通过“组相对策略优化”强化学习。引入Cross-View Spatial Reward（CVSR）机制，提供密集、与任务相关的空间反馈，强化视觉证据与推理步骤关联，解决跨视角实体一致性引导。
AI.result: 在E2W各项任务上，CoRL在推理和感知度量指标上均显著优于多种开源及专有方法。消融实验证明CVSR各环节不可或缺。CoRL还具有良好泛化性，可迁移至外部空间推理任务，并在真实多机器人系统中实现有效协作和操作。
AI.conclusion: E2W基准和CoRL方法为多视角、多智能体的世界感知和推理提供新范式，推进协作式具身人工智能研究落地实际应用。

title: LingoMotion: An Interpretable and Unambiguous Symbolic Representation for Human Motion
summary: Existing representations for human motion, such as MotionGPT, often operate as black-box latent vectors with limited interpretability and build on joint positions which can cause ambiguity. Inspired by the hierarchical structure of natural languages - from letters to words, phrases, and sentences - we propose LingoMotion, a motion language that facilitates interpretable and unambiguous symbolic representation for both simple and complex human motion. In this paper, we introduce the concept design of LingoMotion, including the definitions of motion alphabet based on joint angles, the morphology for forming words and phrases to describe simple actions like walking and their attributes like speed and scale, as well as the syntax for describing more complex human activities with sequences of words and phrases. The preliminary results, including the implementation and evaluation of motion alphabet using a large-scale motion dataset Motion-X, demonstrate the high fidelity of motion representation.

AI.tldr: LingoMotion提出了一种层级化、可解释的运动语言，用符号化方法来表示人体动作，解决了现有方法的模糊和不可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有如MotionGPT等人体动作表示方法存在解释性差和容易产生歧义的问题，主要因其采用关节点位置的黑盒潜变量。受自然语言层级结构启发，作者希望提升动作表示的清晰度和可解释性。
AI.method: 作者设计了LingoMotion动作语言：定义了基于关节角度的“动作字母”，通过构词和造句规则组合出简单及复杂动作，采用词语和短语描述动作类型及属性（如速度、尺度），并用“句法”串联描述复杂动作。初步实现结合Motion-X数据集进行了动作字母的效果验证。
AI.result: 初步结果显示，LingoMotion基于运动字母的方案在Motion-X大规模动作数据集上展现出高度保真的动作表示能力。
AI.conclusion: LingoMotion作为一种可解释、符号化的人体动作语言，有望在简单及复杂动作的无歧义描述领域带来突破。

title: Thinking in Latents: Adaptive Anchor Refinement for Implicit Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Token-level Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has become a standard way to elicit multi-step reasoning in large language models (LLMs), especially for mathematical word problems. However, generating long intermediate traces increases output length and inference cost, and can be inefficient when the model could arrive at the correct answer without extensive verbalization. This has motivated latent-space reasoning approaches that shift computation into hidden representations and only emit a final answer. Yet, many latent reasoning methods depend on a fixed number of latent refinement steps at inference, adding another hyperparameter that must be tuned across models and datasets to balance accuracy and efficiency. We introduce AdaAnchor, a latent reasoning framework that performs silent iterative computation by refining a set of latent anchor vectors attached to the input. AdaAnchor further incorporates an adaptive halting mechanism that monitors anchor stability across iterations and terminates refinement once the anchor dynamics converge, allocating fewer steps to easier instances while reserving additional refinement steps for harder ones under a shared maximum-step budget. Our empirical evaluation across three mathematical word-problem benchmarks shows that AdaAnchor with adaptive halting yields accuracy gains of up to 5% over fixed-step latent refinement while reducing average latent refinement steps by 48-60% under the same maximum-step budget. Compared to standard reasoning baselines, AdaAnchor achieves large reductions in generated tokens (92-93%) by moving computation into silent latent refinement, offering a different accuracy-efficiency trade-off with substantially lower output-token usage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaAnchor，一种结合自适应迭代与主动终止机制的隐空间推理框架，有效提升大模型在数学文字题推理的准确性与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统Token-level Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理虽然效果好，但由于推理链条过长，导致输出冗长、推理成本高。为提升效率，隐空间推理通过隐藏层内部计算，避免多余输出，但现有方法多依赖于固定推理步数，需要额外调参来权衡准确率和效率。因此，亟需一种能根据样本难度自适应推理步数的机制。
AI.method: 提出AdaAnchor框架：利用一组依附于输入的“锚向量”进行 silent（静默）隐空间迭代细化，并集成“自适应终止”机制，根据锚向量收敛动态自动判断何时终止推理。这样，简单样本会自动分配较少的迭代步数，难题则可分配更多推理资源，但总步数不超过统一上限。
AI.result: 在三个数学文字题基准上实验显示：在相同最大步数预算下，AdaAnchor自适应终止比定步隐空间推理提升最多5%准确率，平均减少48-60%隐空间推理步数；与传统Token输出推理对比，生成token数量减少92-93%。
AI.conclusion: AdaAnchor大幅降低输出token数量与推理成本，并在保持或提升推理准确率的同时，实现了更优的准确率-效率权衡，尤其适用于需要低输出开销的推理任务。

title: Surgical Robot, Path Planning, Joint Space, Riemannian Manifolds
summary: Robotic surgery for minimally invasive surgery can reduce the surgeon's workload by autonomously guiding robotic forceps. Movement of the robot is restricted around a fixed insertion port. The robot often encounters angle limitations during operation. Also, the surface of the abdominal cavity is non-concave, making it computationally expensive to find the desired path.In this work, to solve these problems, we propose a method for path planning in joint space by transforming the position into a Riemannian manifold. An edge cost function is defined to search for a desired path in the joint space and reduce the range of motion of the joints. We found that the organ is mostly non-concave, making it easy to find the optimal path using gradient descent method. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method reduces the range of joint angle movement compared to calculations in position space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将机器人手术关节空间中的路径规划问题转化为黎曼流形上优化的新方法，通过改进的边界代价函数和梯度下降算法，降低了机器人关节运动范围，提高了手术操作的精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 机器人微创手术虽然能减轻外科医生的负担，但由于插入点固定、机器人运动受限以及腹腔表面结构复杂，导致路径规划难度大、计算代价高，急需有效的新方法优化路径规划。
AI.method: 将机器人末端位姿问题转化为关节空间的黎曼流形表示，引入边界代价函数，通过梯度下降寻找最优运动路径，以缩小关节运动范围并提升路径规划效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法比传统位置空间计算显著减少了机器人关节角度的运动范围，路径更优，计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效改善机器人手术中的路径规划问题，有望进一步减轻医生负担和提高手术可靠性，对微创手术机器人系统具有重要应用价值。

title: Opportunistic Cardiac Health Assessment: Estimating Phenotypes from Localizer MRI through Multi-Modal Representations
summary: Cardiovascular diseases are the leading cause of death. Cardiac phenotypes (CPs), e.g., ejection fraction, are the gold standard for assessing cardiac health, but they are derived from cine cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR), which is costly and requires high spatio-temporal resolution. Every magnetic resonance (MR) examination begins with rapid and coarse localizers for scan planning, which are discarded thereafter. Despite non-diagnostic image quality and lack of temporal information, localizers can provide valuable structural information rapidly. In addition to imaging, patient-level information, including demographics and lifestyle, influence the cardiac health assessment. Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are inexpensive, routinely ordered in clinical practice, and capture the temporal activity of the heart. Here, we introduce C-TRIP (Cardiac Tri-modal Representations for Imaging Phenotypes), a multi-modal framework that aligns localizer MRI, ECG signals, and tabular metadata to learn a robust latent space and predict CPs using localizer images as an opportunistic alternative to CMR. By combining these three modalities, we leverage cheap spatial and temporal information from localizers, and ECG, respectively while benefiting from patient-specific context provided by tabular data. Our pipeline consists of three stages. First, encoders are trained independently to learn uni-modal representations. The second stage fuses the pre-trained encoders to unify the latent space. The final stage uses the enriched representation space for CP prediction, with inference performed exclusively on localizer MRI. Proposed C-TRIP yields accurate functional CPs, and high correlations for structural CPs. Since localizers are inherently rapid and low-cost, our C-TRIP framework could enable better accessibility for CP estimation.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种利用常规被抛弃的局部扫描MRI（localizer MRI）、心电图（ECG）以及患者表格信息的多模态框架C-TRIP，以预测心脏表型，作为传统高成本CMR影像的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 心血管疾病是主要死亡原因，检测心脏健康依赖于高成本且复杂的动态心脏MRI扫描。但常规每次MRI检查都会产生局部扫描（localizer），这些图像虽然分辨率低但获取成本低且被频繁丢弃，如何充分利用这些低成本数据成为现实需求。
AI.method: 提出C-TRIP多模态框架，整合局部MRI、心电图信号及患者人口和生活方式等表格信息。三阶段流程：分别训练单模态特征编码器、融合已训练编码器打通潜空间、利用融合后的高维表示空间通过局部MRI预测心脏表型。
AI.result: C-TRIP能够准确预测功能性心脏表型指标，并对结构性表型指标获得较高相关性。结果提示低成本和快速获取的localizer MRI加上其他模态信息可用于可靠的心脏健康评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过充分利用原本被忽略的局部MRI和常规心电、人口信息，显著降低了心脏健康评估的门槛和成本，对心血管疾病管理与筛查具有实际意义。

title: Writer-R1: Enhancing Generative Writing in LLMs via Memory-augmented Replay Policy Optimization
summary: As a typical open-ended generation task, creative writing lacks verifiable reference answers, which has long constrained reward modeling and automatic evaluation due to high human annotation costs, evaluative bias, and coarse feedback signals. To address these challenges, this paper first designs a multi-agent collaborative workflow based on Grounded Theory, performing dimensional decomposition and hierarchical induction of the problem to dynamically produce interpretable and reusable fine-grained criteria. Furthermore, we propose the Memory-augmented Replay Policy Optimization (MRPO) algorithm: on the one hand, without additional training, MRPO guides models to engage in self-reflection based on dynamic criteria, enabling controlled iterative improvement; on the other hand, we adopt the training paradigm that combines supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning to convert evaluation criteria into reward signals, achieving end-to-end optimization. Experimental results demonstrate that the automatically constructed criteria achieve performance gains comparable to human annotations. Writer-R1-4B models trained with this approach outperform baselines across multiple creative writing tasks and surpass some 100B+ parameter open-source models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体协作流程和基于记忆增强的重放策略优化（MRPO）算法，用于解决创意写作自动评价中的标准构建和奖励建模难题，并取得了优于现有方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 创意写作任务缺少可验证的标准参考答案，导致自动评价和奖励建模难度大，人工标注成本高且评价偏差大，反馈信号粗糙。需要新的方法来自动、精细地评估和优化模型输出。
AI.method: 首先，基于扎根理论设计多智能体协作流程，对创意写作问题进行维度分解和分层归纳，动态生成可解释且可复用的细粒度评价标准。其次，提出MRPO算法，引导模型利用动态标准进行自我反思和受控迭代增强，并结合有监督微调和强化学习，将评价标准转化为奖励信号，实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，自动构建的评价标准在表现上可与人工标注媲美。使用该方法训练的Writer-R1-4B模型在多个创意写作任务上均优于基线模型，甚至超过部分100B+参数的开源大模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能够有效降低创意写作自动评价和奖励建模的难度，实现模型输出的细致可控优化，推动该领域自动化技术发展。

title: ViSA: Visited-State Augmentation for Generalized Goal-Space Contrastive Reinforcement Learning
summary: Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (GCRL) is a framework for learning a policy that can reach arbitrarily given goals. In particular, Contrastive Reinforcement Learning (CRL) provides a framework for policy updates using an approximation of the value function estimated via contrastive learning, achieving higher sample efficiency compared to conventional methods. However, since CRL treats the visited state as a pseudo-goal during learning, it can accurately estimate the value function only for limited goals. To address this issue, we propose a novel data augmentation approach for CRL called ViSA (Visited-State Augmentation). ViSA consists of two components: 1) generating augmented state samples, with the aim of augmenting hard-to-visit state samples during on-policy exploration, and 2) learning consistent embedding space, which uses an augmented state as auxiliary information to regularize the embedding space by reformulating the objective function of the embedding space based on mutual information. We evaluate ViSA in simulation and real-world robotic tasks and show improved goal-space generalization, which permits accurate value estimation for hard-to-visit goals. Further details can be found on the project page: \href{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage_ViSA/}{\texttt{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage\_ViSA/}}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的用于对比强化学习（CRL）的数据增强方法——ViSA（Visited-State Augmentation），旨在提升对难以到达目标的泛化能力和价值估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有对比强化学习（CRL）在以访问状态作为伪目标进行学习时，对价值函数的估计仅对有限目标准确，限制了目标泛化能力。如何扩展对未访问或难以到达状态的泛化，成为提升GCRL实用性的关键问题。
AI.method: ViSA包含两部分：1）生成增强的状态样本，重点在于增强探索过程中难以访问的状态，2）学习一致的嵌入空间，通过将增强状态作为辅助信息，基于互信息调整嵌入空间的目标函数，以约束表示空间的一致性。
AI.result: ViSA方法在仿真和真实机器人任务中进行了评估，结果表明其能显著提升对难以访问目标的泛化能力，并提升目标空间的价值估计准确性。
AI.conclusion: ViSA为对比强化学习中的目标泛化与价值估计带来提升，尤其适用于难以访问目标，对GCRL在实际机器人任务中的应用有积极意义。

title: A Grid-Based Framework for E-Scooter Demand Representation and Temporal Input Design for Deep Learning: Evidence from Austin, Texas
summary: Despite progress in deep learning for shared micromobility demand prediction, the systematic design and statistical validation of temporal input structures remain underexplored. Temporal features are often selected heuristically, even though historical demand strongly affects model performance and generalizability. This paper introduces a reproducible data-processing pipeline and a statistically grounded method for designing temporal input structures for image-to-image demand prediction. Using large-scale e-scooter data from Austin, Texas, we build a grid-based spatiotemporal dataset by converting trip records into hourly pickup and dropoff demand images. The pipeline includes trip filtering, mapping Census Tracts to spatial locations, grid construction, demand aggregation, and creation of a global activity mask that limits evaluation to historically active areas. This representation supports consistent spatial learning while preserving demand patterns. We then introduce a combined correlation- and error-based procedure to identify informative historical inputs. Optimal temporal depth is selected through an ablation study using a baseline UNET model with paired non-parametric tests and Holm correction. The resulting temporal structures capture short-term persistence as well as daily and weekly cycles. Compared with adjacent-hour and fixed-period baselines, the proposed design reduces mean squared error by up to 37 percent for next-hour prediction and 35 percent for next-24-hour prediction. These results highlight the value of principled dataset construction and statistically validated temporal input design for spatiotemporal micromobility demand prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种系统且可复现的数据处理管道和统计方法，用于深度学习中时空需求预测的时序输入设计。
AI.motivation: 虽然深度学习在共享微出行需求预测领域取得进展，但对输入时间结构的系统设计和统计验证还很少，时序特征常常凭经验选取，影响模型泛化和精度。
AI.method: 利用奥斯汀市大规模电动滑板车数据，将行程记录转化为网格化的时空需求图片。数据处理管道包括行程过滤、区块到空间位置的映射、网格化、需求聚合和全局活跃区域掩码。通过结合相关性和误差分析，统计识别最有信息量的历史时间输入，并通过消融实验和非参数检验确定最佳时间深度。
AI.result: 相比使用临近时段或固定周期的基线方法，提出的时序输入设计让下一小时和未来24小时的预测均方误差分别降低了37%和35%。
AI.conclusion: 经过统计验证的输入设计和合理数据集构建，对提升时空微出行需求预测的精度有显著价值。

title: Bridging National and International Legal Data: Two Projects Based on the Japanese Legal Standard XML Schema for Comparative Law Studies
summary: This paper presents an integrated framework for computational comparative law by connecting two consecutive research projects based on the Japanese Legal Standard (JLS) XML schema. The first project establishes structural interoperability by developing a conversion pipeline from JLS to the Akoma Ntoso (AKN) standard, enabling Japanese statutes to be integrated into international LegalDocML-based legislative databases. Building on this foundation, the second project applies multilingual embedding models and semantic textual similarity techniques to identify corresponding provisions across national legal systems. A prototype system combining multilingual embeddings, FAISS retrieval, and Cross-Encoder reranking generates candidate correspondences and visualizes them as cross-jurisdictional networks for exploratory comparative analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个综合性框架，将日本法律标准（JLS）XML和国际标准（Akoma Ntoso，AKN）互通，并利用多语言语义模型实现跨国法律条文比对。
AI.motivation: 现有不同国家法律文档格式和语言壁垒，限制了法学领域的跨国比较和知识整合。因此，研究者希望建立结构和语义兼容的法律信息处理体系。
AI.method: 分为两步：第一，通过开发转换管道，实现JLS到AKN标准的结构互操作性，方便法律数据国际集成；第二，应用多语言嵌入模型与语义文本相似度算法，利用FAISS检索与Cross-Encoder重排序，自动寻找和可视化国家间对应的法律条文。
AI.result: 原型系统能自动挖掘和展示不同国家法律之间的对应条文网络，支持探索性比较法律分析。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实现跨国法律信息互联和自动化法条对比提供了切实技术路径，对比较法学研究具有重要意义。

title: From Folding Mechanics to Robotic Function: A Unified Modeling Framework for Compliant Origami
summary: Origami inspired architectures offer a powerful route toward lightweight, reconfigurable, and programmable robotic systems. Yet, a unified mechanics framework capable of seamlessly bridging rigid folding, elastic deformation, and stability driven transitions in compliant origami remains lacking. Here, we introduce a geometry consistent modeling framework based on discrete differential geometry (DDG) that unifies panel elasticity and crease rotation within a single variational formulation. By embedding crease panel coupling directly into a mid edge geometric discretization, the framework naturally captures rigid folding limits, distributed bending, multistability, and nonlinear dynamic snap through within one mechanically consistent structure. This unified description enables programmable control of stability and deformation across rigid and compliant regimes, allowing origami structures to transition from static folding mechanisms to active robotic modules. An implicit dynamic formulation incorporating gravity, contact, friction, and magnetic actuation further supports strongly coupled multiphysics simulations. Through representative examples spanning single fold bifurcation, deployable Miura membranes, bistable Waterbomb modules, and Kresling based crawling robots, we demonstrate how geometry driven mechanics directly informs robotic functionality. This work establishes discrete differential geometry as a foundational design language for intelligent origami robotics, enabling predictive modeling, stability programming, and mechanics guided robotic actuation within a unified computational platform.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于离散微分几何(DDG)的统一建模方法，能够同时模拟刚性折叠、弹性变形和稳定性驱动的转变，显著提升了可编程折纸机器人系统的设计和仿真能力。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏一种能够统一描述刚性折叠、弹性变形及稳定性变化（如多稳态和瞬时跳跃等）的理论和工具，这限制了可编程、可重构折纸结构在机器人中的设计、控制和应用。
AI.method: 本文采用离散微分几何(DDG)为基础，提出将面板弹性和折痕转动耦合于一种中边离散化的几何建模框架，并在其中融合了重力、接触、摩擦和磁力驱动，实现了多物理场的隐式动力学模拟。
AI.result: 该方法不仅可以准确模拟各种典型折纸结构（如单折分叉、Miura膜、水炸弹双稳态模块和Kresling爬行机器人）的力学行为和多稳态，还能实现其稳定性和变形的可编程控制。
AI.conclusion: 离散微分几何为智能折纸机器人提供了一个基础性设计语言，实现了统一的预测建模、稳定性编程与面向力学的机器人驱动，为相关领域提供了强有力的理论和计算工具。

title: Egocentric World Model for Photorealistic Hand-Object Interaction Synthesis
summary: To serve as a scalable data source for embodied AI, world models should act as true simulators that infer interaction dynamics strictly from user actions, rather than mere conditional video generators relying on privileged future object states. In this context, egocentric Human-Object Interaction (HOI) world models are critical for predicting physically grounded first-person rollouts. However, building such models is profoundly challenging due to rapid head motions, severe occlusions, and high-DoF hand articulations that abruptly alter contact topologies. Consequently, existing approaches often circumvent these physics challenges by resorting to conditional video generation with access to known future object trajectories. We introduce EgoHOI, an egocentric HOI world model that breaks away from this shortcut to simulate photorealistic, contact-consistent interactions from action signals alone. To ensure physical accuracy without future-state inputs, EgoHOI distills geometric and kinematic priors from 3D estimates into physics-informed embeddings. These embeddings regularize the egocentric rollouts toward physically valid dynamics. Experiments on the HOT3D dataset demonstrate consistent gains over strong baselines, and ablations validate the effectiveness of our physics-informed design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的以第一人称视角为基础的人-物交互世界模型EgoHOI，能根据动作信号以物理一致性进行仿真，而无需已知未来状态。实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型依赖未来物体轨迹信息，缺乏真实物理互动能力，不适合作为具身智能数据源。因此急需能仅凭用户动作推断互动动力学的高保真物理仿真模型。
AI.method: 提出EgoHOI模型，用动作信号驱动第一人称、物理一致的人-物交互仿真。不依赖未来状态信息，而是从3D几何和运动估计中蒸馏物理信息，作为物理约束嵌入，提升仿真物理合理性。
AI.result: 在HOT3D真实数据集上，EgoHOI在多项物理一致性和仿真质量指标上均超越主流基线模型，并通过消融实验验证物理嵌入和整体设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: EgoHOI摆脱了传统依赖未来状态的限制，实现了基于动作信号的物理一致、真实感的第一人称人-物交互仿真，为具身AI提供了可拓展且高质量的数据来源。

title: MMKU-Bench: A Multimodal Update Benchmark for Diverse Visual Knowledge
summary: As real-world knowledge continues to evolve, the parametric knowledge acquired by multimodal models during pretraining becomes increasingly difficult to remain consistent with real-world knowledge. Existing research on multimodal knowledge updating focuses only on learning previously unknown knowledge, while overlooking the need to update knowledge that the model has already mastered but that later changes; moreover, evaluation is limited to the same modality, lacking a systematic analysis of cross-modal consistency. To address these issues, this paper proposes MMKU-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal knowledge updating, which contains over 25k knowledge instances and more than 49k images, covering two scenarios, updated knowledge and unknown knowledge, thereby enabling comparative analysis of learning across different knowledge types. On this benchmark, we evaluate a variety of representative approaches, including supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), and knowledge editing (KE). Experimental results show that SFT and RLHF are prone to catastrophic forgetting, while KE better preserve general capabilities but exhibit clear limitations in continual updating. Overall, MMKU-Bench provides a reliable and comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal knowledge updating, advancing progress in this field.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MMKU-Bench，这是一个用于多模态知识更新的全面评测基准，覆盖更新知识与未知知识两大场景，实验比较了多种主流方法并讨论了其优缺点。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型在预训练期间获得的参数化知识难以随现实世界知识变化保持一致。当前研究只关注学习未知新知识，忽视了对已掌握但后续被更新知识的替换，同时评测缺乏跨模态一致性分析。
