AI.method: 提出MMKU-Bench评测基准，包含25k+知识实例和49k+图片，涵盖知识更新和未知知识两大场景。基于该基准，系统评测了SFT（有监督微调）、RLHF（人类反馈强化学习）、KE（知识编辑）等多种代表性方法。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，SFT和RLHF在知识更新时容易发生灾难性遗忘，虽然KE能较好保留模型通用能力，但在持续更新能力方面存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: MMKU-Bench为多模态知识更新提供了全面可靠的评测工具，有助于推动该领域的发展和进步。

title: PerlAD: Towards Enhanced Closed-loop End-to-end Autonomous Driving with Pseudo-simulation-based Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted by IEEE RA-L. Submitted: 2025.12.2; Revised: 2026.2.4; Accepeted: 2026.3.7
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving policies based on Imitation Learning (IL) often struggle in closed-loop execution due to the misalignment between inadequate open-loop training objectives and real driving requirements. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a solution by directly optimizing driving goals via reward signals, the rendering-based training environments introduce the rendering gap and are inefficient due to high computational costs. To overcome these challenges, we present a novel Pseudo-simulation-based RL method for closed-loop end-to-end autonomous driving, PerlAD. Based on offline datasets, PerlAD constructs a pseudo-simulation that operates in vector space, enabling efficient, rendering-free trial-and-error training. To bridge the gap between static datasets and dynamic closed-loop environments, PerlAD introduces a prediction world model that generates reactive agent trajectories conditioned on the ego vehicle's plan. Furthermore, to facilitate efficient planning, PerlAD utilizes a hierarchical decoupled planner that combines IL for lateral path generation and RL for longitudinal speed optimization. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that PerlAD achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Bench2Drive benchmark, surpassing the previous E2E RL method by 10.29% in Driving Score without requiring expensive online interactions. Additional evaluations on the DOS benchmark further confirm its reliability in handling safety-critical occlusion scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于伪仿真（pseudo-simulation）的端到端自动驾驶强化学习方法PerlAD，能高效且无需渲染提高闭环性能，并取得了显著实验效果。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶中，基于模仿学习的方法在闭环执行中效果有限，因训练目标与实际驾驶需求不符；强化学习虽直接优化驾驶目标，但高效在线交互和高昂渲染代价成为障碍。因此，亟需一种高效、经济、能更好适应闭环驾驶的学习方法。
AI.method: PerlAD主要通过离线数据集构建无需渲染的向量化伪仿真训练环境，并引入预测世界模型，生成响应式的agent轨迹以模拟动态驾驶环境。同时，采用层次化解耦规划器，将模仿学习用于横向路径生成，强化学习用于纵向速度优化。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准测试上，PerlAD达到最优表现，Driving Score较上一最佳端到端强化学习方法提升10.29%；在DOS基准上的额外评估显示其在安全关键的遮挡场景下同样表现可靠。
AI.conclusion: PerlAD无需昂贵的在线交互和渲染，能高效提升端到端自动驾驶的闭环性能，在多个基准任务上展现出先进水平与可靠性。

title: Locatability-Guided Adaptive Reasoning for Image Geo-Localization with Vision-Language Models
summary: The emergence of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has introduced new paradigms for global image geo-localization through retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and reasoning-driven inference. However, RAG methods are constrained by retrieval database quality, while reasoning-driven approaches fail to internalize image locatability, relying on inefficient, fixed-depth reasoning paths that increase hallucinations and degrade accuracy. To overcome these limitations, we introduce an Optimized Locatability Score that quantifies an image's suitability for deep reasoning in geo-localization. Using this metric, we curate Geo-ADAPT-51K, a locatability-stratified reasoning dataset enriched with augmented reasoning trajectories for complex visual scenes. Building on this foundation, we propose a two-stage Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) curriculum with customized reward functions that regulate adaptive reasoning depth, visual grounding, and hierarchical geographical accuracy. Our framework, Geo-ADAPT, learns an adaptive reasoning policy, achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple geo-localization benchmarks, and substantially reduces hallucinations by reasoning both adaptively and efficiently.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新方法，解决视觉-语言模型在图片地理定位中的局限性，并显著提升准确率与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检索增强生成（RAG）和推理驱动方法在全球图片地理定位任务中各有不足：RAG受限于数据库质量，推理驱动方法推理路径固定，易产生幻觉且准确性降低。作者希望突破现有限制，提高模型的推理有效性和定位准确率。
AI.method: 提出“优化可定位性分数”，衡量图片适合深度推理的程度。基于此构建Geo-ADAPT-51K数据集，并设计两阶段的Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)训练流程，自定义奖励函数，实现自适应推理深度和分层地理准确率。最终提出了Geo-ADAPT框架。
AI.result: Geo-ADAPT框架在多个地理定位基准测试中表现优异，实现新的最佳性能，并大幅减少推理幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应、有效的推理策略，Geo-ADAPT不仅提升了地理定位准确率，还提升了模型的推理可信度和效率，对行业具有重要参考价值。

title: Indirect Question Answering in English, German and Bavarian: A Challenging Task for High- and Low-Resource Languages Alike
summary: Indirectness is a common feature of daily communication, yet is underexplored in NLP research for both low-resource as well as high-resource languages. Indirect Question Answering (IQA) aims at classifying the polarity of indirect answers. In this paper, we present two multilingual corpora for IQA of varying quality that both cover English, Standard German and Bavarian, a German dialect without standard orthography: InQA+, a small high-quality evaluation dataset with hand-annotated labels, and GenIQA, a larger training dataset, that contains artificial data generated by GPT-4o-mini. We find that IQA is a pragmatically hard task that comes with various challenges, based on several experiment variations with multilingual transformer models (mBERT, XLM-R and mDeBERTa). We suggest and employ recommendations to tackle these challenges. Our results reveal low performance, even for English, and severe overfitting. We analyse various factors that influence these results, including label ambiguity, label set and dataset size. We find that the IQA performance is poor in high- (English, German) and low-resource languages (Bavarian) and that it is beneficial to have a large amount of training data. Further, GPT-4o-mini does not possess enough pragmatic understanding to generate high-quality IQA data in any of our tested languages.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出并分析了多语种间接问答（IQA）任务，结果显示该任务难度高，现有方法在高、低资源语言上表现均不理想。
AI.motivation: 间接表达是日常交流常见现象，但在高、低资源语言的自然语言处理研究中都鲜有涉猎，特别是在识别和分类间接回答的极性（如肯定、否定）方面。
AI.method: 作者构建了两个多语种数据集：InQA+（小规模、高质量、人工标注）和GenIQA（大规模、由GPT-4o-mini自动生成）。实验采用mBERT、XLM-R和mDeBERTa等多语种Transformer模型，在英语、标准德语和巴伐利亚方言数据上进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 实验发现IQA任务非常具有挑战性，模型在英语、德语（高资源）和巴伐利亚方言（低资源）上的表现均较差，并存在严重的过拟合问题。影响因素包括标签歧义、标签集合设计和数据量。此外，GPT-4o-mini生成的人工数据质量不足，不能很好反映实际间接问答的语用理解。
AI.conclusion: 间接问答是高度语用性的复杂任务，现有多语种模型难以有效处理，尤其在训练数据有限和人工数据质量不高时，性能更受限。增加训练数据量有益于模型提升，但自动生成数据存在语用理解不足的问题。

title: Learning from Mistakes: Post-Training for Driving VLA with Takeover Data
summary: Current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) paradigms in end-to-end autonomous driving rely on offline training from static datasets, leaving them vulnerable to distribution shift. Recent post-training methods use takeover data to mitigate this by augmenting the dataset with high-quality expert takeover samples, yet they suffer from two key limitations: supervision restricted to the period after the takeover moments leads to policies with limited safety margins, and passive preference optimization lacks active exploration for optimal performance. In this paper, we propose TakeVLA, a novel VLA post-training framework that overcomes these shortcomings through two complementary innovations. First, we introduce pre-takeover language supervision, which allows the VLA to learn from mistakes proactively. By explicitly teaching the model about what to do in error-prone situations, we cultivate a precautionary mindset that anticipates hazards early and substantially enlarges safety margins. Second, we propose Scenario Dreaming, a reinforcement fine-tuning paradigm that operates in reconstruceted takeover scenarios, encouraging active exploration beyond mere preference fitting. Experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark demonstrate that TakeVLA achieves state-of-the-art closed-loop performance, surpassing the strong VLA baseline SimLingo by 4.93 in driving score, with an enhanced safety margin as evidenced by an 11.76% increase in average TTC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TakeVLA，一种改进后的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）后训练框架，通过创新性的主动预防监督和主动探索方法，显著提升了自动驾驶系统的安全性和性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶中的VLA范式主要通过静态数据集进行离线训练，难以应对分布漂移问题。现有后训练方法虽利用专家接管数据进行补充，但仅关注接管后的数据，安全余度较低，且仅被动偏好优化，缺少主动探索，导致性能提升有限。
AI.method: TakeVLA方法包括两大创新：1）引入接管前的语言监督，让模型主动学习潜在错误情境下的正确反应，提高提前预警能力和安全余度；2）提出Scenario Dreaming法，在重建的接管场景中进行强化微调，推动模型进行主动探索，超越简单偏好拟合。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准测试中，TakeVLA在封闭环的驾驶表现取得了最优结果，驾驶得分比强基线SimLingo提高4.93分，安全余度（以平均TTC衡量）提升了11.76%。
AI.conclusion: TakeVLA突破了现有VLA自动驾驶后训练的两大局限，通过错误预防性监督和主动探索，有效提升了驾驶安全性和决策能力，为高可靠自动驾驶提供了新方向。

title: Causal Attribution via Activation Patching
summary: Attribution methods for Vision Transformers (ViTs) aim to identify image regions that influence model predictions, but producing faithful and well-localized attributions remains challenging. Existing gradient-based and perturbation-based techniques often fail to isolate the causal contribution of internal representations associated with individual image patches. The key challenge is that class-relevant evidence is formed through interactions between patch tokens across layers, and input-level perturbations can be poor proxies for patch importance, since they may fail to reconstruct the internal evidence actually used by the model. We propose Causal Attribution via Activation Patching (CAAP), which estimates the contribution of individual image patches to the ViT's prediction by directly intervening on internal activations rather than using learned masks or synthetic perturbation patterns. For each patch, CAAP inserts the corresponding source-image activations into a neutral target context over an intermediate range of layers and uses the resulting target-class score as the attribution signal. The resulting attribution map reflects the causal effect of patch-associated internal representations on the model's prediction. The causal intervention serves as a principled measure of patch influence by capturing class-relevant evidence after initial representation formation, while avoiding late-layer global mixing that can reduce spatial specificity. Across multiple ViT backbones and standard metrics, CAAP significantly outperforms existing methods and produces more faithful and localized attributions.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的视觉Transformer归因方法（CAAP），能更准确地找出影响模型预测的图像区域，且性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对ViT的归因方法（如梯度法、扰动法）难以同时实现归因的真实性和空间定位准确性，原因在于ViT内部patch之间复杂的层内交互。依赖输入层面 perturbation 的传统方法无法准确反映模型实际使用的证据。
AI.method: 提出Causal Attribution via Activation Patching（CAAP）方法：直接对ViT中间激活进行干预。具体做法为：将待归因patch的中间层激活替换到其它中性上下文中，通过对比目标类别分数变化评估该patch贡献，形成归因图。
AI.result: 在多种ViT骨干网络和标准评价指标下，CAAP相较于现有归因方法表现更好，生成的归因图既忠实于模型决策，又具有更高的空间定位性。
AI.conclusion: CAAP能够真实反映图像patch内部表征对ViT预测的因果影响，克服了现有方法的局限性，有助于可解释性分析和视觉理解。

title: HindSight: Evaluating Research Idea Generation via Future Impact
summary: Evaluating AI-generated research ideas typically relies on LLM judges or human panels -- both subjective and disconnected from actual research impact. We introduce \hs{}, a time-split evaluation framework that measures idea quality by matching generated ideas against real future publications and scoring them by citation impact and venue acceptance. Using a temporal cutoff~$T$, we restrict an idea generation system to pre-$T$ literature, then evaluate its outputs against papers published in the subsequent 30 months. Experiments across 10 AI/ML research topics reveal a striking disconnect: LLM-as-Judge finds no significant difference between retrieval-augmented and vanilla idea generation ($p{=}0.584$), while \hs{} shows the retrieval-augmented system produces 2.5$\times$ higher-scoring ideas ($p{<}0.001$). Moreover, \hs{} scores are \emph{negatively} correlated with LLM-judged novelty ($ρ{=}{-}0.29$, $p{<}0.01$), suggesting that LLMs systematically overvalue novel-sounding ideas that never materialize in real research.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于实际发表数据评估AI生成研究想法的新框架，发现传统由LLM或人类评委主导的评价与实际研究影响之间存在明显脱节。
AI.motivation: 目前AI生成研究想法的评估主要依赖于LLM（大型语言模型）或人类评审，但这种方式主观且与真实科研影响脱节，缺乏对生成想法实际有效性的量化判断。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种名为\hs{}的时间分割评估框架，通过划定一个时间点T，仅允许系统利用T之前的文献生成研究想法，然后将其与T之后30个月内真实发表的论文进行比对，通过引用和会议接收情况打分，从而量化想法的实际研究影响。
AI.result: 在10个AI/ML主题实验中，发现传统LLM-as-Judge方法无法区分检索增强系统和普通生成系统（p=0.584），但\hs{}框架显示检索增强系统有2.5倍高分（p<0.001）。此外，\hs{}分数与LLM判断的新颖性呈负相关（ρ=-0.29），说明LLM易高估不切实际的新颖想法。
AI.conclusion: \hs{}框架更贴合实际科研影响，可补足现有评估方法的不足。检索增强的生成系统效果显著优于纯生成系统，且仅依赖LLM评审的新颖性指标可能误导研究方向。

title: ReMAP-DP: Reprojected Multi-view Aligned PointMaps for Diffusion Policy
summary: Generalist robot policies built upon 2D visual representations excel at semantic reasoning but inherently lack the explicit 3D spatial awareness required for high-precision tasks. Existing 3D integration methods struggle to bridge this gap due to the structural irregularity of sparse point clouds and the geometric distortion introduced by multi-view orthographic rendering. To overcome these barriers, we present ReMAP-DP, a novel framework synergizing standardized perspective reprojection with a structure-aware dual-stream diffusion policy. By coupling the re-projected views with pixel-aligned PointMaps, our dual-stream architecture leverages learnable modality embeddings to fuse frozen semantic features and explicit geometric descriptors, ensuring precise implicit patch-level alignment. Extensive experiments across simulation and real-world environments demonstrate ReMAP-DP's superior performance in diverse manipulation tasks. On RoboTwin 2.0, it attains a 59.3% average success rate, outperforming the DP3 baseline by +6.6%. On ManiSkill 3, our method yields a 28% improvement over DP3 on the geometrically challenging Stack Cube task. Furthermore, ReMAP-DP exhibits remarkable real-world robustness, executing high-precision and dynamic manipulations with superior data efficiency from only a handful of demonstrations. Project page is available at: https://icr-lab.github.io/ReMAP-DP/

AI.tldr: ReMAP-DP是一种针对机器人高精度操作任务的新型通用策略框架，通过结合视角重投影和结构感知的双流扩散策略，打破现有视觉模型在空间感知和三维理解方面的瓶颈，显著提升了机器人在仿真和现实环境中的操作表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D视觉的机器人通用策略在理解语义信息上表现优秀，但对高精度任务所需的三维空间感知能力有天然缺陷。传统3D方法受限于稀疏点云结构不规则性和多视角正交渲染带来的几何失真，难以有效弥补这一短板。
AI.method: 提出ReMAP-DP框架，将标准化的视角重投影与结构感知的双流扩散策略结合。具体实现包括：用重投影视图和点云像素对齐的PointMaps构建双流网络，通过可学习的模态嵌入融合冻结的语义特征以及显式几何信息，实现补丁级别的对齐。
AI.result: 在仿真平台RoboTwin 2.0上，ReMAP-DP平均成功率达59.3%，比DP3基线高6.6%；在ManiSkill 3平台的Stack Cube任务上提升28%；在现实世界中也表现出优异的数据效率和动态高精度操作能力，仅需少量演示即可训练。
AI.conclusion: ReMAP-DP有效弥补了基于2D视觉方法在三维空间理解上的不足，实现了更高精度和通用性的机器人操作策略，尤其在高精度动态操作和数据效率方面表现突出。

title: FMS$^2$: Unified Flow Matching for Segmentation and Synthesis of Thin Structures
summary: Segmenting thin structures like infrastructure cracks and anatomical vessels is a task hampered by topology-sensitive geometry, high annotation costs, and poor generalization across domains. Existing methods address these challenges in isolation. We propose FMS$^2$, a flow-matching framework with two modules. (1) SegFlow is a 2.96M-parameter segmentation model built on a standard encoder-decoder backbone that recasts prediction as continuous image $\rightarrow$ mask transport. It learns a time-indexed velocity field with a flow-matching regression loss and outputs the mask via ODE integration, rather than supervising only end-state logits. This trajectory-level supervision improves thin-structure continuity and sharpness, compared with tuned topology-aware loss baselines, without auxiliary topology heads, post-processing, or multi-term loss engineering. (2) SynFlow is a mask-conditioned mask $\rightarrow$ image generator that produces pixel-aligned synthetic image-mask pairs. It injects mask geometry at multiple scales and emphasizes boundary bands via edge-aware gating, while a controllable mask generator expands sparsity, width, and branching regimes. On five crack and vessel benchmarks, SegFlow alone outperforms strong CNN, Transformer, Mamba, and generative baselines, improving the volumetric metric (mean IoU) from 0.511 to 0.599 (+17.2%) and reducing the topological metric (Betti matching error) from 82.145 to 51.524 (-37.3%). When training with limited labels, augmenting SegFlow with SynFlow-generated pairs recovers near-full performance using 25% of real annotations and improves cross-domain IoU by 0.11 on average. Unlike classical data augmentation that promotes invariance via label-preserving transforms, SynFlow provides pixel-aligned paired supervision with controllable structural shifts (e.g., sparsity, width, branching), which is particularly effective under domain shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对细薄结构（如裂缝和血管）分割的新框架FMS$^2$，包含SegFlow（连续流动监督的分割网络）和SynFlow（可控合成数据增强生成器）。该方法在准确性、拓扑保持和小样本泛化能力上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以兼顾细结构的连贯性、注释开销高、跨域泛化差等难题，而多数工作仅解决了其中某一方面，难以获得全面提升。
AI.method: FMS$^2$包括：1）SegFlow，提出基于流动匹配的分割模型，通过时间序列速度场学习，实现端到端的mask预测，提高了拓扑连通和边界锐利度，无需复杂损失设计与辅助任务；2）SynFlow，基于掩码条件的图像生成器，可生成结构噪声可控的合成训练对（例如稀疏度、宽度、分支数可控），用于有效增强及提升少量标注下的性能和跨域鲁棒性。
AI.result: SegFlow在五个裂缝和血管分割基准上均优于CNN、Transformer、Mamba等主流方法，IoU由0.511提升至0.599（+17.2%），Betti匹配error从82.145降至51.524（-37.3%）。配合SynFlow合成样本，在仅用25%真实标签时性能接近全量监督，提升跨域IoU约0.11。
AI.conclusion: FMS$^2$框架无需顶层拓扑损失、多损失工程等复杂设计，能显著提升细结构分割的连通性和跨域鲁棒性，特别适合高标注成本、异构域存在的应用场景。

title: The Hrunting of AI: Where and How to Improve English Dialectal Fairness
summary: It is known that large language models (LLMs) underperform in English dialects, and that improving them is difficult due to data scarcity. In this work we investigate how quality and availability impact the feasibility of improving LLMs in this context. For this, we evaluate three rarely-studied English dialects (Yorkshire, Geordie, and Cornish), plus African-American Vernacular English, and West Frisian as control. We find that human-human agreement when determining LLM generation quality directly impacts LLM-as-a-judge performance. That is, LLM-human agreement mimics the human-human agreement pattern, and so do metrics such as accuracy. It is an issue because LLM-human agreement measures an LLM's alignment with the human consensus; and hence raises questions about the feasibility of improving LLM performance in locales where low populations induce low agreement. We also note that fine-tuning does not eradicate, and might amplify, this pattern in English dialects. But also find encouraging signals, such as some LLMs' ability to generate high-quality data, thus enabling scalability. We argue that data must be carefully evaluated to ensure fair and inclusive LLM improvement; and, in the presence of scarcity, new tools are needed to handle the pattern found.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）在英语方言上的表现，发现由于数据稀缺，提升效果受限，并且模型与人类的判断一致性受到方言人口数量的影响。微调难以根本解决该现象，但某些LLM能生成高质量数据为改进提供了希望。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明LLM在处理多种英语方言时表现较差，原因在于相关数据稀缺。作者希望系统性分析在数据有限、质量不一的情况下，提升LLM对不同英语方言表现的可行性及其挑战。
AI.method: 作者选择了三种较少被研究的英语方言（Yorkshire、Geordie、Cornish），外加非裔美国英语（AAVE）和西弗里斯兰语作为对照，实验考察人类之间以及LLM与人类在生成文本评价时的一致性，并探索微调等改进措施的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，人类对LLM生成内容的质量判定一致性直接影响LLM与人类的一致性，以及相应准确度等指标。数据稀缺导致一致性进一步下降，微调不能根本消除甚至可能加重这一现象。但同时，一些LLM能生成高质量的方言数据，为数据扩增和改进泛化能力提供了可能。
AI.conclusion: LLM提升面临人口稀少方言中低一致性的难题，现有方法有限，提升LLM的公平性和包容性必须谨慎评估数据质量。在数据稀缺情境下，需要新的工具来处理一致性低这一新发现的模式。

title: CycleRL: Sim-to-Real Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robust Autonomous Bicycle Control
summary: Autonomous bicycles offer a promising agile solution for urban mobility and last-mile logistics, however, conventional control strategies often struggle with their underactuated nonlinear dynamics, suffering from sensitivity to model mismatches and limited adaptability to real-world uncertainties. To address this, this paper presents CycleRL, the first sim-to-real deep reinforcement learning framework designed for robust autonomous bicycle control. Our approach trains an end-to-end neural control policy within the high-fidelity NVIDIA Isaac Sim environment, leveraging Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to circumvent the need for an explicit dynamics model. The framework features a composite reward function tailored for concurrent balance maintenance, velocity tracking, and steering control. Crucially, systematic domain randomization is employed to bridge the simulation-to-reality gap and facilitate direct transfer. In simulation, CycleRL achieves considerable performance, including a 99.90% balance success rate, a low steering tracking error of 1.15°, and a velocity tracking error of 0.18 m/s. These quantitative results, coupled with successful hardware transfer, validate DRL as an effective paradigm for autonomous bicycle control, offering superior adaptability over traditional methods. Video demonstrations are available at https://anony6f05.github.io/CycleRL/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的自动驾驶自行车控制框架CycleRL，能够提升自动驾驶自行车在实际环境中的适应性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶自行车因其运动的非线性和欠驱动特性，传统控制方法对模型不匹配和现实噪声较为敏感，导致实际应用受限。为解决适应性和鲁棒性不足的问题，亟需新的智能控制方法。
AI.method: 作者提出CycleRL框架，在高保真仿真环境（NVIDIA Isaac Sim）中，使用增强版PPO（近端策略优化）训练端到端神经网络控制器，通过组合奖励函数平衡多目标（如平衡、速率与转向）。为实现仿真到现实的无缝迁移，采用系统性的域随机化方法。
AI.result: 在仿真测试中，CycleRL平衡保持成功率达99.90%，转向误差仅1.15°，速度跟踪误差仅0.18 m/s。方法经过实物平台验证，成功迁移至真实硬件。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为自动驾驶自行车控制带来可行且更具适应性的解决方案，在现实场景中的效果显著优于传统控制方法。

title: Learning Generalizable 3D Medical Image Representations from Mask-Guided Self-Supervision
summary: Foundation models have transformed vision and language by learning general-purpose representations from large-scale unlabeled data, yet 3D medical imaging lacks analogous approaches. Existing self-supervised methods rely on low-level reconstruction or contrastive objectives that fail to capture the anatomical semantics critical for medical image analysis, limiting transfer to downstream tasks. We present MASS (MAsk-guided Self-Supervised learning), which treats in-context segmentation as the pretext task for learning general-purpose medical imaging representations. MASS's key insight is that automatically generated class-agnostic masks provide sufficient structural supervision for learning semantically rich representations. By training on thousands of diverse mask proposals spanning anatomical structures and pathological findings, MASS learns what semantically defines medical structures: the holistic combination of appearance, shape, spatial context, and anatomical relationships. We demonstrate effectiveness across data regimes: from small-scale pretraining on individual datasets (20-200 scans) to large-scale multi-modal pretraining on 5K CT, MRI, and PET volumes, all without annotations. MASS demonstrates: (i) few-shot segmentation on novel structures, (ii) matching full supervision with only 20-40\% labeled data while outperforming self-supervised baselines by over 20 in Dice score in low-data regimes, and (iii) frozen-encoder classification on unseen pathologies that matches full supervised training with thousands of samples. Mask-guided self-supervised pretraining captures broadly generalizable knowledge, opening a path toward 3D medical imaging foundation models without expert annotations. Code is available: https://github.com/Stanford-AIMI/MASS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MASS（MAsk-guided Self-Supervised learning）的自监督学习方法，利用生成的无关类别的遮罩作为掩码指导医学三维图像领域的通用特征预训练，显著提升少量标注或无标注情况下的下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型在视觉和语言领域取得了巨大进展，但三维医学影像领域缺乏类似方法。已有的自监督方法大多侧重于低级重建或对比目标，难以捕获医学图像分析所需的解剖学语义信息，因而限制了在下游任务中的迁移能力。
AI.method: MASS把“局部分割”作为预训练任务，自动生成与类别无关的掩码，覆盖不同解剖结构和病理特征，引导模型学习丰富的结构与语义特征。该方法无需人工注释，在不同规模的数据集和多模态影像（CT、MRI、PET）上进行预训练。
AI.result: （1）少样本分割新结构表现突出；（2）只用20-40%带标注数据时可达到全监督的分割水平，在低数据情形下Dice分数超过其他自监督基线20以上；（3）冻结编码器做新疾病分类，其效果可匹配大规模全监督训练。
AI.conclusion: 基于mask的自监督预训练能够捕捉广泛可迁移的医学知识，为无需专家标注的三维医学影像基础模型铺平了道路。代码已开源。

title: Efficient Document Parsing via Parallel Token Prediction
summary: Document parsing, as a fundamental yet crucial vision task, is being revolutionized by vision-language models (VLMs). However, the autoregressive (AR) decoding inherent to VLMs creates a significant bottleneck, severely limiting parsing speed. In this paper, we propose Parallel-Token Prediction (PTP), a plugable, model-agnostic and simple-yet-effective method that enables VLMs to generate multiple future tokens in parallel with improved sample efficiency. Specifically, we insert some learnable tokens into the input sequence and design corresponding training objectives to equip the model with parallel decoding capabilities for document parsing. Furthermore, to support effective training, we develop a comprehensive data generation pipeline that efficiently produces large-scale, high-quality document parsing training data for VLMs. Extensive experiments on OmniDocBench and olmOCR-bench demonstrate that our method not only significantly improves decoding speed (1.6x-2.2x) but also reduces model hallucinations and exhibits strong generalization abilities.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种加速视觉语言模型（VLM）文档解析的新方法PTP，实现了解码提速和泛化能力提升。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉语言模型(VLM)由于其自回归解码机制，文档解析速度慢，成为应用瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了Parallel-Token Prediction（PTP）方法，在输入序列中插入可学习token，改进解码训练目标，使模型能并行预测多个未来token，并开发了高效率的数据生成流程来提供大量高质量训练数据。
AI.result: 在OmniDocBench和olmOCR-bench上实验表明，PTP方法的解码速度提升1.6-2.2倍，显著减少模型幻觉，并展现了良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PTP是一种简单有效且可插拔的方法，能加速VLM文档解析，提升效率和准确性，具有广泛应用前景。

title: AnoleVLA: Lightweight Vision-Language-Action Model with Deep State Space Models for Mobile Manipulation
summary: In this study, we address the problem of language-guided robotic manipulation, where a robot is required to manipulate a wide range of objects based on visual observations and natural language instructions. This task is essential for service robots that operate in human environments, and requires safety, efficiency, and task-level generality. Although Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong performance for this task, their deployment in resource-constrained environments remains challenging because of the computational cost of standard transformer backbones. To overcome this limitation, we propose AnoleVLA, a lightweight VLA that uses a deep state space model to process multimodal sequences efficiently. The model leverages its lightweight and fast sequential state modeling to process visual and textual inputs, which allows the robot to generate trajectories efficiently. We evaluated the proposed method in both simulation and physical experiments. Notably, in real-world evaluations, AnoleVLA outperformed a representative large-scale VLA by 21 points for the task success rate while achieving an inference speed approximately three times faster.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效轻量的视觉-语言-动作模型AnoleVLA，能够使机器人根据视觉和自然语言指导进行操作，在保持较低计算量的同时，显著提升操作成功率和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型虽然表现优秀，但在计算资源受限的环境下应用受限，尤其是服务机器人需要在保证安全、效率和广泛任务泛化能力的同时，提升部署性能。
AI.method: 提出AnoleVLA模型，采用深度状态空间模型作为主干，对多模态序列（视觉、文本输入）进行高效处理。模型通过状态建模，实现对输入的快速高效解释，从而生成高效的操作轨迹。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中进行了实验。AnoleVLA在真实环境中的任务成功率比代表性的大型VLA高21个百分点，推理速度也提升约3倍。
AI.conclusion: AnoleVLA能够在资源受限环境下，实现更快且更高成功率的机器人视觉-语言操作任务，为服务机器人广泛应用提供了新的解决思路。

title: TSDCRF: Balancing Privacy and Multi-Object Tracking via Time-Series CRF and Normalized Control Penalty
summary: Multi-object tracking in video often requires appearance or location cues that can reveal sensitive identity information, while adding privacy-preserving noise typically disrupts cross-frame association and causes ID switches or target loss. We propose TSDCRF, a plug-in refinement framework that balances privacy and tracking by combining three components: (i) $(\varepsilon,δ)$-differential privacy via calibrated Gaussian noise on sensitive regions under a configurable privacy budget; (ii) a Normalized Control Penalty (NCP) that down-weights unstable or conflicting class predictions before noise injection to stabilize association; and (iii) a time-series dynamic conditional random field (DCRF) that enforces temporal consistency and corrects trajectory deviation after noise, mitigating ID switches and resilience to trajectory hijacking. The pipeline is agnostic to the choice of detector and tracker (e.g., YOLOv4 and DeepSORT). We evaluate on MOT16, MOT17, Cityscapes, and KITTI. Results show that TSDCRF achieves a better privacy--utility trade-off than white noise and prior methods (NTPD, PPDTSA): lower KL-divergence shift, lower tracking RMSE, and improved robustness under trajectory hijacking while preserving privacy. Source code in https://github.com/mabo1215/TSDCRF.git

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在视频多目标跟踪中平衡隐私和追踪性能的插件式框架TSDCRF，既保隐私又保证跟踪效果，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标跟踪常依赖暴露敏感身份的外观或位置信息，简单加噪声保护隐私又严重扰乱跨帧关联，导致ID切换、目标丢失。如何高效兼容隐私保护和跟踪性能，是该领域的核心挑战。
AI.method: TSDCRF包含三大模块：(1)对敏感区域注入经过校准高斯噪声的(ε,δ)-差分隐私机制，支持灵活隐私预算调整；(2)噪声注入前用归一化控制惩罚（NCP）方法下调不稳定或冲突的目标预测，稳固关联关系；(3)引入时序动态条件随机场（DCRF），在加噪噪声后恢复轨迹的时间一致性、修正轨迹偏移，从而减少ID切换、抵抗轨迹劫持。该方案与具体的检测器、追踪器无关。
AI.result: 在MOT16、MOT17、Cityscapes、KITTI等数据集上，TSDCRF相较白噪声及已有隐私跟踪方法（如NTPD、PPDTSA）达到更优的隐私-可用性折中：KL散度更小、跟踪均方根误差更低，对轨迹劫持攻击更具鲁棒性、同时有效保护隐私。
AI.conclusion: TSDCRF能够在多目标跟踪任务中显著提升隐私保护的同时，最大限度保障跟踪质量，具备良好通用性和实用性。

title: Bidirectional Chinese and English Passive Sentences Dataset for Machine Translation
comment: 11 pages,1 figures, Language Resources and Evaluation Conference 2026
summary: Machine Translation (MT) evaluation has gone beyond metrics, towards more specific linguistic phenomena. Regarding English-Chinese language pairs, passive sentences are constructed and distributed differently due to language variation, thus need special attention in MT. This paper proposes a bidirectional multi-domain dataset of passive sentences, extracted from five Chinese-English parallel corpora and annotated automatically with structure labels according to human translation, and a test set with manually verified annotation. The dataset consists of 73,965 parallel sentence pairs (2,358,731 English words, 3,498,229 Chinese characters). We evaluate two state-of-the-art open-source MT systems with our dataset, and four commercial models with the test set. The results show that, unlike humans, models are more influenced by the voice of the source text rather than the general voice usage of the source language, and therefore tend to maintain the passive voice when translating a passive in either direction. However, models demonstrate some knowledge of the low frequency and predominantly negative context of Chinese passives, leading to higher voice consistency with human translators in English-to-Chinese translation than in Chinese-to-English translation. Commercial NMT models scored higher in metric evaluations, but LLMs showed a better ability to use diverse alternative translations. Datasets and annotation script will be shared upon request.

AI.tldr: 本文针对英中机器翻译评测中特定语言现象——被动句，提出一个双向多领域被动句数据集，并对主流MT系统进行了评估分析。
AI.motivation: 英语和汉语的被动句结构和分布有显著差异，在机器翻译中往往被忽视，需要针对性评测工具和数据集，以客观衡量不同系统处理该现象的能力。
AI.method: 作者从五个中英平行语料中自动抽取并标注了被动句，构建了包含73,965对句子的双向多领域数据集，以及经过人工校验的测试集，并用它评测了两款开源MT系统和四种商业模型。
AI.result: 实验发现，MT模型比人类译员更受原文语态影响，倾向直接保留原文被动结构，尤其在中译英时表现突出，但在英译中时，模型能部分掌握“汉语被动句较为罕见，且多用于否定语境”的规律，因此英译中时与人工译文的语态保持一致性更高。商业NMT模型在常规指标得分较高，而LLM模型则在译文多样性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MT系统在被动句翻译策略方面与人类译者存在差异，研究提出的数据集及评测框架可更细致地揭示和指导系统改进。数据及标注脚本可请求获取。

title: Multi-Mode Pneumatic Artificial Muscles Driven by Hybrid Positive-Negative Pressure
comment: 20 pages, 17 figures. Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
summary: Artificial muscles embody human aspirations for engineering lifelike robotic movements. This paper introduces an architecture for Inflatable Fluid-Driven Origami-Inspired Artificial Muscles (IN-FOAMs). A typical IN-FOAM consists of an inflatable skeleton enclosed within an outer skin, which can be driven using a combination of positive and negative pressures (e.g., compressed air and vacuum). IN-FOAMs are manufactured using low-cost heat-sealable sheet materials through heat-pressing and heat-sealing processes. Thus, they can be ultra-thin when not actuated, making them flexible, lightweight, and portable. The skeleton patterns are programmable, enabling a variety of motions, including contracting, bending, twisting, and rotating, based on specific skeleton designs. We conducted comprehensive experimental, theoretical, and numerical studies to investigate IN-FOAM's basic mechanical behavior and properties. The results show that IN-FOAM's output force and contraction can be tuned through multiple operation modes with the applied hybrid positive-negative pressure. Additionally, we propose multilayer skeleton structures to enhance the contraction ratio further, and we demonstrate a multi-channel skeleton approach that allows the integration of multiple motion modes into a single IN-FOAM. These findings indicate that IN-FOAMs hold great potential for future applications in flexible wearable devices and compact soft robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的可充气流体驱动折纸仿生人工肌肉（IN-FOAMs），具有轻便、柔性和多功能运动模式。
AI.motivation: 仿生人工肌肉一直是实现类人生动机器人动作的重要方向，但现有方案往往存在成本高、结构复杂或运动模式有限等问题。作者旨在开发一种简单、低成本、结构灵活、运动多样的人工肌肉，用于提升软体机器人和可穿戴设备的性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种由可充气骨架与外皮组成的IN-FOAMs，通过正负压（正压与真空结合）驱动。制造过程采用热压和热封工艺，骨架图案可编程以产生多样动作。并通过实验、理论和数值模拟系统评估其力学行为。还提出了多层骨架结构和多通道结构，进一步提升收缩比与集成多运动模式能力。
AI.result: 实验和理论结果表明，IN-FOAMs的输出力和收缩量可通过混合正负压多模式调控，多层骨架可提升收缩比，多通道骨架可集成多种运动方式。
AI.conclusion: IN-FOAMs表现出高度柔性、轻量化和可编程运动能力，有望广泛应用于柔性可穿戴设备和小型软体机器人系统。

title: SHAMISA: SHAped Modeling of Implicit Structural Associations for Self-supervised No-Reference Image Quality Assessment
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
summary: No-Reference Image Quality Assessment (NR-IQA) aims to estimate perceptual quality without access to a reference image of pristine quality. Learning an NR-IQA model faces a fundamental bottleneck: its need for a large number of costly human perceptual labels. We propose SHAMISA, a non-contrastive self-supervised framework that learns from unlabeled distorted images by leveraging explicitly structured relational supervision. Unlike prior methods that impose rigid, binary similarity constraints, SHAMISA introduces implicit structural associations, defined as soft, controllable relations that are both distortion-aware and content-sensitive, inferred from synthetic metadata and intrinsic feature structure. A key innovation is our compositional distortion engine, which generates an uncountable family of degradations from continuous parameter spaces, grouped so that only one distortion factor varies at a time. This enables fine-grained control over representational similarity during training: images with shared distortion patterns are pulled together in the embedding space, while severity variations produce structured, predictable shifts. We integrate these insights via dual-source relation graphs that encode both known degradation profiles and emergent structural affinities to guide the learning process throughout training. A convolutional encoder is trained under this supervision and then frozen for inference, with quality prediction performed by a linear regressor on its features. Extensive experiments on synthetic, authentic, and cross-dataset NR-IQA benchmarks demonstrate that SHAMISA achieves strong overall performance with improved cross-dataset generalization and robustness, all without human quality annotations or contrastive losses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHAMISA，一种无参考图像质量评估的自监督方法，无需人工标注也无需对比损失，通过结构化关系监督学习鲁棒的质量表示，在多项数据集上实现优异泛化。
AI.motivation: 当前NR-IQA方法依赖大量人工打分，数据收集成本极高。缺乏标签促使探索能自监督学习图像质量的方案。
AI.method: SHAMISA采用非对比自监督框架：利用合成失真和元数据来引导特征学习，通过组合失真引擎细致控制训练样本的失真程度，仅改变单一失真因素，并借助关系图同时建模已知失真和隐式结构关联，最终训练卷积编码器，冻结后用线性回归预测图像质量。
AI.result: SHAMISA在多个合成、真实及跨数据集NR-IQA基准上均取得优越性能，泛化及鲁棒性显著提升，实现无人工标注的图像质量评估。
AI.conclusion: SHAMISA证明了在无人工标签及无对比损失场景下，通过高效结构化自监督关系建模也能实现优质、泛化能力强的NR-IQA系统，推动该领域数据标注壁垒的突破。

title: Practicing with Language Models Cultivates Human Empathic Communication
summary: Empathy is central to human connection, yet people often struggle to express it effectively. In blinded evaluations, large language models (LLMs) generate responses that are often judged more empathic than human-written ones. Yet when a response is attributed to AI, recipients feel less heard and validated than when comparable responses are attributed to a human. To probe and address this gap in empathic communication skill, we built Lend an Ear, an experimental conversation platform in which participants are asked to offer empathic support to an LLM role-playing personal and workplace troubles. From 33,938 messages spanning 2,904 text-based conversations between 968 participants and their LLM conversational partners, we derive a data-driven taxonomy of idiomatic empathic expressions in naturalistic dialogue. Based on a pre-registered randomized experiment, we present evidence that a brief LLM coaching intervention offering personalized feedback on how to effectively communicate empathy significantly boosts alignment of participants' communication patterns with normative empathic communication patterns relative to both a control group and a group that received video-based but non-personalized feedback. Moreover, we find evidence for a silent empathy effect that people feel empathy but systematically fail to express it. Nonetheless, participants reliably identify responses aligned with normative empathic communication criteria as more expressive of empathy. Together, these results advance the scientific understanding of how empathy is expressed and valued and demonstrate a scalable, AI-based intervention for scaffolding and cultivating it.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验平台收集对话，提出了一种数据驱动的共情表达分类方法，并展示了基于大模型的个性化反馈可以显著提升共情沟通能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大模型生成的共情回复常被评为比人类更具同理心，但当回复被归因于AI时，用户感受到共情和被认可的程度较低。为探究和弥补这一共情表达的差距，作者设计了相关实验。
AI.method: 搭建名为Lend an Ear的平台，让参与者与扮演困扰角色的大模型对话，收集了成千上万条对话数据；利用随机对照实验，比较了大模型个性化反馈、视频非个性化反馈及对照组的干预效果。
AI.result: 基于大规模对话数据，提出了自然语言共情表达的分类法。实验数据表明，个性化模型反馈大幅提升了参与者共情沟通模式的规范性。一些参与者虽能感知共情，但表达能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 本研究深化了对共情表达与评估的理解，证明了基于AI的个性化共情表达训练可规模化提升人们的共情能力，并有助于在实际沟通中更好地表达和传递同理心。

title: HALO:Closing Sim-to-Real Gap for Heavy-loaded Humanoid Agile Motion Skills via Differentiable Simulation
summary: Humanoid robots deployed in real-world scenarios often need to carry unknown payloads, which introduce significant mismatch and degrade the effectiveness of simulation-to-reality reinforcement learning methods. To address this challenge, we propose a two-stage gradient-based system identification framework built on the differentiable simulator MuJoCo XLA. The first stage calibrates the nominal robot model using real-world data to reduce intrinsic sim-to-real discrepancies, while the second stage further identifies the mass distribution of the unknown payload. By explicitly reducing structured model bias prior to policy training, our approach enables zero-shot transfer of reinforcement learning policies to hardware under heavy-load conditions. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate more precise parameter identification, improved motion tracking accuracy, and substantially enhanced agility and robustness compared to existing baselines. Project Page: https://mwondering.github.io/halo-humanoid/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于应对人形机器人在携带未知载重时仿真到现实强化学习迁移失效问题的两阶段可微分系统辨识方法，有效提升了模型准确性和策略零样本迁移的表现。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中的人形机器人常常需要搬运未知物体，这会导致机械参数与仿真模型严重不匹配，使使用仿真到现实的强化学习方法效果大大降低。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于MuJoCo XLA可微仿真器的两阶段梯度型系统辨识框架：第一阶段用现实数据校准机器人本体模型参数，第二阶段进一步辨识未知载重的质量分布，显式减少结构性模型偏差。
AI.result: 大量仿真和现实实验表明，所提方法相较于已有基线，能更精确地辨识参数，运动跟踪更精确，机器人在重载下的灵活性和鲁棒性均大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 对模型参数的精细辨识和偏差修正可显著增强强化学习策略在现实硬件（尤其是高负载工况）下的无缝迁移能力，为机器人实用化带来积极进展。

title: Every Error has Its Magnitude: Asymmetric Mistake Severity Training for Multiclass Multiple Instance Learning
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Whole Slide Image (WSI) diagnosis, offering effective learning with limited annotations. However, existing MIL frameworks overlook diagnostic priorities and fail to differentiate the severity of misclassifications in multiclass, leaving clinically critical errors unaddressed. We propose a mistake-severity-aware training strategy that organizes diagnostic classes into a hierarchical structure, with each level optimized using a severity-weighted cross-entropy loss that penalizes high-severity misclassifications more strongly. Additionally, hierarchical consistency is enforced through probabilistic alignment, a semantic feature remix applied to the instance bag to robustly train class priority and accommodate clinical cases involving multiple symptoms. An asymmetric Mikel's Wheel-based metric is also introduced to quantify the severity of errors specific to medical fields. Experiments on challenging public and real-world in-house datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly mitigates critical errors in MIL diagnosis compared to existing methods. We present additional experimental results on natural domain data to demonstrate the generalizability of our proposed method beyond medical contexts.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的多实例学习（MIL）方法，能显著减少医学影像诊断中关键性错误，并验证了其在医疗及自然场景数据上的有效和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法在多类别任务中未考虑诊断优先级，且无法区分不同错误的严重性，导致在医学诊断中对重要、致命的误判处理不当，影响临床应用安全性。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于错误严重度的训练策略：用层级化结构组织诊断类别，对不同级别使用严重度加权交叉熵损失函数（对高严重性误分加大惩罚）；通过概率对齐和语义特征重混，增强实例包训练的类别优先感并适应多症状病例。此外，提出了基于Mikel's Wheel的非对称新指标，量化医学场景下误判严重度。
AI.result: 在多个公开和真实医疗影像数据集上，该方法较现有MIL技术显著减少了关键诊断错误；也在自然域数据集上验证了其效果与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 针对多类别医学诊断任务，该方法有效降低误判严重度，提升临床数据集的诊断安全性和准确性，同时具有跨领域的泛化潜力。

title: From Documents to Spans: Code-Centric Learning for LLM-based ICD Coding
summary: ICD coding is a critical yet challenging task in healthcare. Recently, LLM-based methods demonstrate stronger generalization than discriminative methods in ICD coding. However, fine-tuning LLMs for ICD coding faces three major challenges. First, existing public ICD coding datasets provide limited coverage of the ICD code space, restricting a model's ability to generalize to unseen codes. Second, naive fine-tuning diminishes the interpretability of LLMs, as few public datasets contain explicit supporting evidence for assigned codes. Third, ICD coding typically involves long clinical documents, making fine-tuning LLMs computationally expensive. To address these issues, we propose Code-Centric Learning, a training framework that shifts supervision from full clinical documents to scalable, short evidence spans. The key idea of this framework is that span-level learning improves LLMs' ability to perform document-level ICD coding. Our proposed framework consists of a mixed training strategy and code-centric data expansion, which substantially reduces training cost, improves accuracy on unseen ICD codes and preserves interpretability. Under the same LLM backbone, our method substantially outperforms strong baselines. Notably, our method enables small-scale LLMs to achieve performance comparable to much larger proprietary models, demonstrating its effectiveness and potential for fully automated ICD coding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Code-Centric Learning的新型ICD编码训练框架，提升了大模型和小模型在ICD自动编码任务中的准确性、泛化能力和可解释性，并降低了训练成本。
AI.motivation: ICD编码作为医疗中的关键任务，面临如下三个挑战：1）现有ICD公开数据集覆盖的编码类别有限，导致模型泛化性受限；2）常规微调方式降低了模型的可解释性；3）面对长文本的病历，微调大模型成本高昂。因此，需要一种更高效且可扩展的ICD编码训练方法。
AI.method: 提出Code-Centric Learning框架，将训练监督从完整临床文档转移至更短、可扩展的证据片段级别。该方法包括混合训练策略和基于编码的数据扩充，通过片段级别学习提升模型整体文档级ICD编码能力。
AI.result: 本方法在相同大模型骨干基础上，显著优于已有强基线。尤其使得小规模大模型也可达到可比甚至超越大规模专有模型的效果，准确率、对不见新码的泛化能力和可解释性均有提升。
AI.conclusion: Code-Centric Learning显著提升了LLM在ICD自动编码任务中的表现，兼顾泛化性、可解释性和训练效率，为全面自动化的ICD编码提供了有效思路和实践价值。

title: AeroGrab: A Unified Framework for Aerial Grasping in Cluttered Environments
summary: Reliable aerial grasping in cluttered environments remains challenging due to occlusions and collision risks. Existing aerial manipulation pipelines largely rely on centroid-based grasping and lack integration between the grasp pose generation models, active exploration, and language-level task specification, resulting in the absence of a complete end-to-end system. In this work, we present an integrated pipeline for reliable aerial grasping in cluttered environments. Given a scene and a language instruction, the system identifies the target object and actively explores it to gain better views of the object. During exploration, a grasp generation network predicts multiple 6-DoF grasp candidates for each view. Each candidate is evaluated using a collision-aware feasibility framework, and the overall best grasp is selected and executed using standard trajectory generation and control methods. Experiments in cluttered real-world scenarios demonstrate robust and reliable grasp execution, highlighting the effectiveness of combining active perception with feasibility-aware grasp selection for aerial manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个集成化的空中抓取系统，实现了在复杂、遮挡环境下的鲁棒抓取任务。该系统结合了语言指令识别、主动视觉探索、碰撞感知抓取候选评估，显著提升了无人机抓取的成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统的空中操作方法主要采用质心抓取，并且抓取姿态生成、主动探索及任务描述之间缺乏有机集成，难以应对遮挡、碰撞等复杂场景，更无法进行端到端式自动空中抓取。因此，亟需开发一个全流程集成，包括目标识别、有效感知、碰撞检测与抓取执行的新系统。
AI.method: 系统输入为场景和自然语言指令。首先识别目标物体，然后利用无人机主动探索，获取多个视角。每个视角下利用抓取生成网络预测多个6自由度抓取候选，通过碰撞感知可行性机制筛选最佳抓取方案，最终用标准轨迹生成与控制方法完成执行。
AI.result: 在真实复杂环境实验中，方案表现出较强的鲁棒性和可靠性，能够有效地完成空中抓取，相比传统方案在遮挡和碰撞场景下有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 将主动感知与可行性感知的抓取候选筛选结合，实现了效率与稳定性的提升，证明了端到端集成系统在复杂场景下进行空中操作的有效性。

title: RSEdit: Text-Guided Image Editing for Remote Sensing
summary: General-domain text-guided image editors achieve strong photorealism but introduce artifacts, hallucinate objects, and break the orthographic constraints of remote sensing (RS) imagery. We trace this gap to two high-level causes: (i) limited RS world knowledge in pre-trained models, and (ii) conditioning schemes that misalign with the bi-temporal structure and spatial priors of Earth observation data. We present RSEdit, a unified framework that adapts pretrained text-to-image diffusion models - both U-Net and DiT - into instruction-following RS editors via channel concatenation and in-context token concatenation. Trained on over 60,000 semantically rich bi-temporal remote sensing image pairs, RSEdit learns precise, physically coherent edits while preserving geospatial content. Experiments show clear gains over general and commercial baselines, demonstrating strong generalizability across diverse scenarios including disaster impacts, urban growth, and seasonal shifts, positioning RSEdit as a robust data engine for downstream analysis. We will release code, pretrained models, evaluation protocols, training logs, and generated results for full reproducibility. Code: https://github.com/Bili-Sakura/RSEdit-Preview

AI.tldr: RSEdit是一个面向遥感图像的文本引导编辑框架，在物理一致性和地理内容保持上优于通用图像编辑工具。
AI.motivation: 通用的文本图像编辑器在遥感图像上的表现不理想，会引入伪影、产生幻觉对象，且破坏正交约束，主要原因在于预训练模型缺乏遥感世界知识和不适合遥感数据结构的条件方式。
AI.method: 该方法提出RSEdit框架，将通用文本到图像扩散模型（U-Net和DiT）通过通道拼接和上下文Token拼接方式，调整为适合遥感图像的文本指令编辑器。模型在6万对高语义双时相遥感图像上训练，实现物理一致且精准的图像编辑，同时保持地理空间内容。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，RSEdit在灾害影响、城市扩展、季节变化等多样场景下，均明显优于通用及商业基线模型，展现出很强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RSEdit成为具备稳健泛化性能、适用于下游分析的数据引擎，相关代码、模型、评估协议和实验日志将全部开放以实现可复现性。

title: Datasets for Verb Alternations across Languages: BLM Templates and Data Augmentation Strategies
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable performance across various sentence-based linguistic phenomena, yet their ability to capture cross-sentence paradigmatic patterns, such as verb alternations, remains underexplored. In this work, we present curated paradigm-based datasets for four languages, designed to probe systematic cross-sentence knowledge of verb alternations (change-of-state and object-drop constructions in English, German and Italian, and Hebrew binyanim). The datasets comprise thousands of the Blackbird Language Matrices (BLMs) problems. The BLM task -- an RPM/ARC-like task devised specifically for language -- is a controlled linguistic puzzle where models must select the sentence that completes a pattern according to syntactic and semantic rules. We introduce three types of templates varying in complexity and apply linguistically-informed data augmentation strategies across synthetic and natural data. We provide simple baseline performance results across English, Italian, German, and Hebrew, that demonstrate the diagnostic usefulness of the datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于检测大语言模型（LLMs）跨句子范式模式（如动词交替）的新型多语言数据集，并在四种语言上进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在句子层面的任务中表现优异，但其对包括动词交替在内的跨句子系统性语言现象的建模能力尚不清楚。为评估和推动LLM在该方向的能力，作者开发了专门的数据集。
AI.method: 作者构建了基于黑鸟语言矩阵（Blackbird Language Matrices, BLMs）任务的跨句子动词交替测试集，覆盖英文、德文、意大利文和希伯来文。BLM任务仿照Raven进阶矩阵/ARC，要求模型根据语言规则选择合适的句子来完成范式。数据集模板具有不同复杂度，并结合了语言学特征的数据增强策略，涵盖合成与真实数据。
AI.result: 作者在上述四国语言上给出了简单基线测试结果，验证了数据集对模型相关能力的诊断价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文所提出的数据集和任务为衡量和提升语言模型在系统性、跨句子语法-语义现象上的能力提供了有力工具，并揭示了这一领域尚有待突破的空间。

title: BodyGuards: Escorting by Multiple Robots in Unknown Environment under Limited Communication
summary: Multi-robot systems are increasingly deployed in high-risk missions such as reconnaissance, disaster response, and subterranean operations. Protecting a human operator while navigating unknown and adversarial environments remains a critical challenge, especially when the communication among the operator and robots is restricted. Unlike existing collaborative exploration methods that aim for complete coverage, this work focuses on task-oriented exploration to minimize the navigation time of the operator to reach its goal while ensuring safety under adversarial threats. A novel escorting framework BodyGuards, is proposed to explicitly integrate seamlessly collaborative exploration, inter-robot-operator communication and escorting. The framework consists of three core components: (I) a dynamic movement strategy for the operator that maintains a local map with risk zones for proactive path planning; (II) a dual-mode robotic strategy combining frontier based exploration with optimized return events to balance exploration, threat detection, and intermittent communication; and (III) multi-robot coordination protocols that jointly plan exploration and information sharing for efficient escorting. Extensive human-in-the-loop simulations and hardware experiments demonstrate that the method significantly reduces operator risk and mission time, outperforming baselines in adversarial and constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多机器人护卫系统BodyGuards，能在高风险、通信受限的环境中高效护送人类操作员安全到达目标点，显著降低了风险和任务时间。
AI.motivation: 在侦察、救灾和地下作业等高风险任务中，多机器人系统越来越常用。然而如何在敌对、不明和通信受限环境下，保障人类操作员安全、高效地导航至目标，仍是关键难题。现有探索方法大多追求全覆盖，忽视了任务导向的护送和安全问题。
AI.method: 提出了BodyGuards护送框架，包含三大创新组件：(1) 人操作员动态运动策略，通过本地地图和风险区实现主动路径规划；(2) 机器人采用双模策略，结合前沿探索与最优返航，平衡探索、威胁检测和间歇通信；(3) 多机器人间通过协同协议联合规划探索与信息共享，提升整体护送效率。
AI.result: 在大量包含人类参与的仿真和真实机器人实验中，该方法在敌对和受限环境下，相比现有方法显著降低了操作员风险和任务完成时间。
AI.conclusion: 所提BodyGuards框架能更好地应对高风险、通信受限环境下的人机协作护送任务，提升了操作员安全与任务效率，具有重要应用前景。

title: Sparse-Dense Mixture of Experts Adapter for Multi-Modal Tracking
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques, such as prompts and adapters, are widely used in multi-modal tracking because they alleviate issues of full-model fine-tuning, including time inefficiency, high resource consumption, parameter storage burden, and catastrophic forgetting. However, due to cross-modal heterogeneity, most existing PEFT-based methods struggle to effectively represent multi-modal features within a unified framework with shared parameters. To address this problem, we propose a novel Sparse-Dense Mixture of Experts Adapter (SDMoEA) framework for PEFT-based multi-modal tracking under a unified model structure. Specifically, we design an SDMoE module as the multi-modal adapter to model modality-specific and shared information efficiently. SDMoE consists of a sparse MoE and a dense-shared MoE: the former captures modality-specific information, while the latter models shared cross-modal information. Furthermore, to overcome limitations of existing tracking methods in modeling high-order correlations during multi-level multi-modal fusion, we introduce a Gram-based Semantic Alignment Hypergraph Fusion (GSAHF) module. It first employs Gram matrices for cross-modal semantic alignment, ensuring that the constructed hypergraph accurately reflects semantic similarity and high-order dependencies between modalities. The aligned features are then integrated into the hypergraph structure to exploit its ability to model high-order relationships, enabling deep fusion of multi-level multi-modal information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance compared with other PEFT approaches on several multi-modal tracking benchmarks, including LasHeR, RGBT234, VTUAV, VisEvent, COESOT, DepthTrack, and VOT-RGBD2022.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的稀疏-稠密混合专家适配器（SDMoEA）框架和基于Gram矩阵的高阶语义对齐超图融合（GSAHF）模块，有效提升了多模态跟踪的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法（如prompts和adapters）在多模态跟踪中面临跨模态异构性挑战，难以在统一框架下高效表达多模态特征。
AI.method: 1. 设计SDMoEA模块，包括稀疏专家网络（建模模态特有信息）和稠密共享专家网络（建模跨模态共享信息）。2. 提出GSAHF模块，利用Gram矩阵对多模态特征进行语义对齐，并构建超图以建模高阶依赖，促进多级深度融合。
AI.result: 在LasHeR、RGBT234、VTUAV、VisEvent、COESOT、DepthTrack和VOT-RGBD2022等多个多模态跟踪数据集上，提出的方法较现有PEFT方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提SDMoEA与GSAHF模块能够在统一模型下高效融合多模态特征，并显著提升多模态跟踪性能。

title: CCTU: A Benchmark for Tool Use under Complex Constraints
summary: Solving problems through tool use under explicit constraints constitutes a highly challenging yet unavoidable scenario for large language models (LLMs), requiring capabilities such as function calling, instruction following, and self-refinement. However, progress has been hindered by the absence of dedicated evaluations. To address this, we introduce CCTU, a benchmark for evaluating LLM tool use under complex constraints. CCTU is grounded in a taxonomy of 12 constraint categories spanning four dimensions (i.e., resource, behavior, toolset, and response). The benchmark comprises 200 carefully curated and challenging test cases across diverse tool-use scenarios, each involving an average of seven constraint types and an average prompt length exceeding 4,700 tokens. To enable reliable evaluation, we develop an executable constraint validation module that performs step-level validation and enforces compliance during multi-turn interactions between models and their environments. We evaluate nine state-of-the-art LLMs in both thinking and non-thinking modes. Results indicate that when strict adherence to all constraints is required, no model achieves a task completion rate above 20%. Further analysis reveals that models violate constraints in over 50% of cases, particularly in the resource and response dimensions. Moreover, LLMs demonstrate limited capacity for self-refinement even after receiving detailed feedback on constraint violations, highlighting a critical bottleneck in the development of robust tool-use agents. To facilitate future research, we release the data and code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CCTU基准，用于评估在复杂约束下大语言模型（LLM）使用工具的能力，并发现现有主流模型在满足所有约束条件下的任务完成率低于20%。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，LLM常常需要在多种显式约束条件下使用工具，但现有缺乏专门对此进行评估的基准，限制了模型能力的提升与研究进展。
AI.method: 作者构建了CCTU基准，包括12类约束、4个维度（资源、行为、工具集、响应）与200个高难度测试案例，并开发了可执行的约束验证模块，实现多轮交互中的逐步合规性检测。同时，评测了九个SOTA模型在不同思考模式下的表现。
AI.result: 严格要求遵守所有约束时，九个主流LLM的任务完成率均低于20%；在50%以上案例中突破约束，尤以资源和响应类约束最难满足。模型对约束违规的反馈后的自我改进能力也较差。
AI.conclusion: 目前LLM在复杂约束下的工具使用场景中表现有限，自我修正能力弱，成为发展鲁棒智能体的重要瓶颈。研究团队公开数据与代码助力未来相关研究。

title: A Novel Camera-to-Robot Calibration Method for Vision-Based Floor Measurements
comment: 8 pages; accepted for publication in the ISPRS Annals of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences
summary: A novel hand-eye calibration method for ground-observing mobile robots is proposed. While cameras on mobile robots are com- mon, they are rarely used for ground-observing measurement tasks. Laser trackers are increasingly used in robotics for precise localization. A referencing plate is designed to combine the two measurement modalities of laser-tracker 3D metrology and camera- based 2D imaging. It incorporates reflector nests for pose acquisition using a laser tracker and a camera calibration target that is observed by the robot-mounted camera. The procedure comprises estimating the plate pose, the plate-camera pose, and the robot pose, followed by computing the robot-camera transformation. Experiments indicate sub-millimeter repeatability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于地面观测移动机器人的新型手眼标定方法，通过结合激光跟踪仪与摄像头提升了机器人的精确定位和测量能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管移动机器人常配备摄像头，但因其测量精度有限，鲜用于地面观测任务。近年来激光跟踪仪因高精度定位在机器人领域应用增多。为将两种测量手段结合，提升地面移动机器人的测量能力，亟需新的手眼标定方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种参考板，使激光跟踪仪与机器人摄像头可同时对其进行测量。参考板集成反射球用于激光跟踪仪获取位姿，同时包含供机器人摄像头观测的标定靶。整个流程包括估算参考板位姿、参考板与摄像头位姿以及机器人本体位姿，进而推算机器人与摄像头的空间变换关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法标定重复性达到亚毫米级别，精度优异。
AI.conclusion: 新方法可实现高精度手眼标定，适用于需要高精准地面观测和测量的移动机器人，且实验验证了其实用性和高重复精度。

title: Bodhi VLM: Privacy-Alignment Modeling for Hierarchical Visual Representations in Vision Backbones and VLM Encoders via Bottom-Up and Top-Down Feature Search
summary: Learning systems that preserve privacy often inject noise into hierarchical visual representations; a central challenge is to \emph{model} how such perturbations align with a declared privacy budget in a way that is interpretable and applicable across vision backbones and vision--language models (VLMs). We propose \emph{Bodhi VLM}, a \emph{privacy-alignment modeling} framework for \emph{hierarchical neural representations}: it (1) links sensitive concepts to layer-wise grouping via NCP and MDAV-based clustering; (2) locates sensitive feature regions using bottom-up (BUA) and top-down (TDA) strategies over multi-scale representations (e.g., feature pyramids or vision-encoder layers); and (3) uses an Expectation-Maximization Privacy Assessment (EMPA) module to produce an interpretable \emph{budget-alignment signal} by comparing the fitted sensitive-feature distribution to an evaluator-specified reference (e.g., Laplace or Gaussian with scale $c/ε$). The output is reference-relative and is \emph{not} a formal differential-privacy estimator. We formalize BUA/TDA over hierarchical feature structures and validate the framework on object detectors (YOLO, PPDPTS, DETR) and on the \emph{visual encoders} of VLMs (CLIP, LLaVA, BLIP). BUA and TDA yield comparable deviation trends; EMPA provides a stable alignment signal under the reported setups. We compare with generic discrepancy baselines (Chi-square, K-L, MMD) and with task-relevant baselines (MomentReg, NoiseMLE, Wass-1). Results are reported as mean$\pm$std over multiple seeds with confidence intervals in the supplementary materials. This work contributes a learnable, interpretable modeling perspective for privacy-aligned hierarchical representations rather than a post hoc audit only. Source code: \href{https://github.com/mabo1215/bodhi-vlm.git}{Bodhi-VLM GitHub repository}

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Bodhi VLM框架，实现了面向层次化神经表示的隐私对齐建模，为视觉主干和视觉-语言模型提供了可解释的隐私预算对齐信号。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习系统中，为了保护隐私，常对视觉模型的层次表示注入噪声。但如何将扰动与隐私预算进行有效、可解释、通用的对齐建模，仍是难题。
AI.method: 作者提出Bodhi VLM：1）用NCP和MDAV聚类，将敏感概念映射到各层；2）基于多尺度表示，用自底向上（BUA）和自顶向下（TDA）两种策略定位敏感特征区域；3）基于EMPA模块，通过对比敏感特征分布和参考分布（如Laplace或Gaussian），输出可解释的预算对齐信号。
AI.result: 该方法在YOLO、PPDPTS、DETR等目标检测器以及CLIP、LLaVA、BLIP等视觉-语言模型编码器上验证，BUA和TDA趋势一致，EMPA提供了稳定的对齐信号。并与多种基线（Chi-square、K-L、MMD等）进行对比，实验结果有统计学置信区间。
AI.conclusion: 论文贡献了一种面向隐私对齐的可学习、可解释建模方法，超越传统事后审计，为层次化神经表示下的隐私保护提供了新的理论和实践思路。

title: PYTHEN: A Flexible Framework for Legal Reasoning in Python
summary: This paper introduces PYTHEN, a novel Python-based framework for defeasible legal reasoning. PYTHEN is designed to model the inherently defeasible nature of legal argumentation, providing a flexible and intuitive syntax for representing legal rules, conditions, and exceptions. Inspired by PROLEG (PROlog-based LEGal reasoning support system) and guided by the philosophy of The Zen of Python, PYTHEN leverages Python's built-in any() and all() functions to offer enhanced flexibility by natively supporting both conjunctive (ALL) and disjunctive (ANY) conditions within a single rule, as well as a more expressive exception-handling mechanism. This paper details the architecture of PYTHEN, provides a comparative analysis with PROLEG, and discusses its potential applications in autoformalization and the development of next-generation legal AI systems. By bridging the gap between symbolic reasoning and the accessibility of Python, PYTHEN aims to democratize formal legal reasoning for young researchers, legal tech developers, and professionals without extensive logic programming expertise. We position PYTHEN as a practical bridge between the powerful symbolic reasoning capabilities of logic programming and the rich, ubiquitous ecosystem of Python, making formal legal reasoning accessible to a broader range of developers and legal professionals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PYTHEN：一种基于Python的新型可撤销法律推理框架，提供更灵活、直观的法律规则与例外表达方式，力求让法律推理普及化。
AI.motivation: 现有法律推理系统（如PROLEG）基于Prolog，灵活性和上手门槛有限，难以被非专业逻辑编程人员广泛使用。需要一种更易用、表达力更强的工具支持各类用户便捷地进行形式化法律推理和开发法律AI。
AI.method: PYTHEN受The Zen of Python哲学影响，利用Python自带的any()和all()函数，实现单规则下联合与可选条件、复杂例外机制。兼容Python生态，提供直观语法，将符号逻辑推理同Python结合，并与传统系统如PROLEG进行对比分析。
AI.result: PYTHEN架构更直观、易于扩展，支持复杂的条件与例外处理，比PROLEG更适合新一代法律AI与面向普及的法律形式化工具。
AI.conclusion: PYTHEN实现了符号推理与主流编程语言（Python）的结合，大幅降低法律推理系统的开发门槛，有望推动法律科技和形式化工具的普及，尤其适用于年轻研究者和非编程专家。

title: Confusion-Aware In-Context-Learning for Vision-Language Models in Robotic Manipulation
comment: Accepted by the 29th International Conference on Computer Supported Cooperative Work in Design (CSCWD 2026)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved the generalization capabilities of robotic manipulation. However, VLM-based systems often suffer from a lack of robustness, leading to unpredictable errors, particularly in scenarios involving confusable objects. Our preliminary analysis reveals that these failures are mainly caused by shortcut learning problem inherently in VLMs, limiting their ability to accurately distinguish between confusable features. To this end, we propose Confusion-Aware In-Context Learning (CAICL), a method that enhances VLM performance in confusable scenarios for robotic manipulation. The approach begins with confusion localization and analysis, identifying potential sources of confusion. This information is then used as a prompt for the VLM to focus on features most likely to cause misidentification. Extensive experiments on the VIMA-Bench show that CAICL effectively addresses the shortcut learning issue, achieving a 85.5\% success rate and showing good stability across tasks with different degrees of generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向混淆场景的视觉-语言模型增强方法（CAICL），显著提升了机器人操控任务中对易混淆物体的辨识能力。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉-语言模型的机器人操控系统在遇到易混淆物体时鲁棒性较差，经常因为模型捷径学习（shortcut learning）而出错，缺乏对混淆特征的区分能力。
AI.method: 提出了Confusion-Aware In-Context Learning（CAICL）方法，首先定位和分析混淆源，再将此信息作为提示输入到VLM，引导模型关注容易导致识别错误的特征。
AI.result: 在VIMA-Bench实验中，CAICL解决了捷径学习问题，并在不同泛化程度的任务上取得了85.5%的成功率，表现出良好的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: CAICL能够有效提升VLM在机器人操控中处理混淆场景的能力，为实际应用中提升安全性和鲁棒性提供了新途径。

title: UniVid: Pyramid Diffusion Model for High Quality Video Generation
summary: Diffusion-based text-to-video generation (T2V) or image-to-video (I2V) generation have emerged as a prominent research focus. However, there exists a challenge in integrating the two generative paradigms into a unified model. In this paper, we present a unified video generation model (UniVid) with hybrid conditions of the text prompt and reference image. Given these two available controls, our model can extract objects' appearance and their motion descriptions from textual prompts, while obtaining texture details and structural information from image clues to guide the video generation process. Specifically, we scale up the pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model for generating temporally coherent frames via introducing our temporal-pyramid cross-frame spatial-temporal attention modules and convolutions. To support bimodal control, we introduce a dual-stream cross-attention mechanism, whose attention scores can be freely re-weighted for interpolation of between single and two modalities controls during inference. Extensive experiments showcase that our UniVid achieves superior temporal coherence on T2V, I2V and (T+I)2V tasks.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种统一的视频生成模型UniVid，可以同时支持文本与图像双模态条件，能实现更优的跨模态视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散式生成方法通常分别针对文本生成视频（T2V）或图像生成视频（I2V），而难以融合文本和图像这两种条件，缺少统一的框架。同时，提升生成视频的时间连贯性也是一大挑战。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种统一模型UniVid，结合了文本提示和参考图像作为输入，通过引入时间金字塔的跨帧时空注意力模块和卷积，提升帧间一致性。同时，设计了双流交叉注意力机制，使推理阶段可以灵活调节文本与图像的关注度，实现单/双模态平滑过渡控制。
AI.result: 实验结果表明UniVid在文本生成视频、图像生成视频以及文本+图像生成视频等任务上，产生了更优的视频时间连贯性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: UniVid实现了文本与图像条件的统一视频生成，在多种生成任务中表现出色，是跨模态视频生成领域的重要进展。

title: Tagarela - A Portuguese speech dataset from podcasts
summary: Despite significant advances in speech processing, Portuguese remains under-resourced due to the scarcity of public, large-scale, and high-quality datasets. To address this gap, we present a new dataset, named TAGARELA, composed of over 8,972 hours of podcast audio, specifically curated for training automatic speech recognition (ASR) and text-to-speech (TTS) models. Notably, its scale rivals English's GigaSpeech (10kh), enabling state-of-the-art Portuguese models. To ensure data quality, the corpus was subjected to an audio pre-processing pipeline and subsequently transcribed using a mixed strategy: we applied ASR models that were previously trained on high-fidelity transcriptions generated by proprietary APIs, ensuring a high level of initial accuracy. Finally, to validate the effectiveness of this new resource, we present ASR and TTS models trained exclusively on our dataset and evaluate their performance, demonstrating its potential to drive the development of more robust and natural speech technologies for Portuguese. The dataset is released publicly, available at https://freds0.github.io/TAGARELA/, to foster the development of robust speech technologies.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了一个大型葡萄牙语播客音频数据集（TAGARELA），大幅提升了葡萄牙语语音处理的资源基础。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语当前缺少高质量、大规模的公开语音数据集，严重制约了ASR和TTS技术的发展。作者希望填补这一空白，推动葡萄牙语相关技术的进步。
AI.method: 收集8,972小时播客音频，依次进行音频预处理及自动混合转录（ASR模型+高质量API转录），保证音频与文本的高质量对齐，之后训练并测试ASR与TTS模型以验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: ASR与TTS模型仅基于该数据集训练，实验结果展示了其卓越效果，显示了数据集推动葡萄牙语语音技术发展的潜力。
AI.conclusion: TAGARELA数据集的公开发布为葡萄牙语语音处理提供了强大资源基础，有望促进更健壮、自然的葡萄牙语语音相关技术的研发。

title: Master Micro Residual Correction with Adaptive Tactile Fusion and Force-Mixed Control for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Robotic contact-rich and fine-grained manipulation remains a significant challenge due to complex interaction dynamics and the competing requirements of multi-timescale control. While current visual imitation learning methods excel at long-horizon planning, they often fail to perceive critical interaction cues like friction variations or incipient slip, and struggle to balance global task coherence with local reactive feedback. To address these challenges, we propose M2-ResiPolicy, a novel Master-Micro residual control architecture that synergizes high-level action guidance with low-level correction. The framework consists of a Master-Guidance Policy (MGP) operating at 10 Hz, which generates temporally consistent action chunks via a diffusion-based backbone and employs a tactile-intensity-driven adaptive fusion mechanism to dynamically modulate perceptual weights between vision and touch. Simultaneously, a high-frequency (60 Hz) Micro-Residual Corrector (MRC) utilizes a lightweight GRU to provide real-time action compensation based on TCP wrench feedback. This policy is further integrated with a force-mixed PBIC execution layer, effectively regulating contact forces to ensure interaction safety. Experiments across several demanding tasks including fragile object grasping and precision insertion, demonstrate that M2-ResiPolicy significantly outperforms standard Diffusion Policy (DP) and state-of-the-art Reactive Diffusion Policy (RDP), achieving a 93\% damage-free success rate in chip grasping and superior force regulation stability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为M2-ResiPolicy的主-辅残差控制架构，显著提升了机器人复杂接触操作任务中的安全性与精度。
AI.motivation: 复杂动态交互和多时域控制需求使机器人精细接触操作任务极具挑战，目前视觉模仿学习方法难以感知摩擦变化、滑移等关键触觉反馈，也难以平衡全局规划与局部反馈。为此，需要一种能有效结合视觉与触觉并在多时域操作的控制方法。
AI.method: 提出了M2-ResiPolicy架构，包含低频（10Hz）主策略（MGP）负责高层时序动作计划，采用基于扩散的骨架与感知自适应融合权重机制实现视觉-触觉协同。同时，高频（60Hz）微残差修正模块（MRC）利用轻量GRU根据力反馈进行实时动作补偿，并集成力混合PBIC执行层调节接触力，保证交互安全。
AI.result: 在易碎物体抓取及高精插入等任务中，M2-ResiPolicy在无损抓取成功率、力调节稳定性等指标上显著优于标准Diffusion Policy（DP）和最新Reactive Diffusion Policy（RDP），芯片抓取任务达93%无损成功率。
AI.conclusion: M2-ResiPolicy有效整合高低层动作指导与实时力反馈修正，提升了机器人复杂、接触丰富任务中的安全性与成功率，对高精度机器人操作具有重要意义。

title: Sky2Ground: A Benchmark for Site Modeling under Varying Altitude
summary: We introduce Sky2Ground, a three-view dataset designed for varying altitude camera localization, correspondence learning, and reconstruction. The dataset combines structured synthetic imagery with real, in-the-wild images, providing both controlled multi-view geometry and realistic scene noise. Each of the 51 sites contains thousands of satellite, aerial, and ground images spanning wide altitude ranges and nearly orthogonal viewing angles, enabling rigorous evaluation across global-to-local contexts. We benchmark state of the art pose estimation models, including MASt3R, DUSt3R, Map Anything, and VGGT, and observe that the use of satellite imagery often degrades performance, highlighting the challenges under large altitude variations. We also examine reconstruction methods, highlighting the challenges introduced by sparse geometric overlap, varying perspectives, and the use of real imagery, which often introduces noise and reduces rendering quality. To address some of these challenges, we propose SkyNet, a model which enhances cross-view consistency when incorporating satellite imagery with a curriculum-based training strategy to progressively incorporate more satellite views. SkyNet significantly strengthens multi-view alignment and outperforms existing methods by 9.6% on RRA@5 and 18.1% on RTA@5 in terms of absolute performance. Sky2Ground and SkyNet together establish a comprehensive testbed and baseline for advancing large-scale, multi-altitude 3D perception and generalizable camera localization. Code and models will be released publicly for future research.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Sky2Ground数据集和SkyNet模型，用于大尺度多视图、多高度相机定位及三维感知，显著提升了跨视图一致性。
AI.motivation: 随着三维感知和相机定位任务规模扩大，现有数据集大多聚焦于单类视角或高度，无法全面评估不同高度和视角下的方法性能，尤其是卫星、航空和地面图像的结合带来的挑战。
AI.method: 1. 构建Sky2Ground三视图数据集，涵盖卫星、航空和地面图像，且既有合成也有真实数据。2. 基准测试MASt3R、DUSt3R等现有定位方法。3. 提出SkyNet模型，采用逐步引入卫星视角的课程式训练策略，提升多视图一致性和性能。
AI.result: 发现现有方法在大高度变化和引入卫星图像后表现变差，尤其受稀疏几何重叠和噪声影响较大。SkyNet方法显著改善了多视图一致性，在RRA@5提升9.6%，RTA@5提升18.1%。
AI.conclusion: Sky2Ground数据集和SkyNet模型为多高度三维感知和通用化相机定位研究提供了标准测试平台和强基线，为后续相关研究奠定了基础。

title: DOS: Dependency-Oriented Sampler for Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) have recently emerged as a new paradigm in language modeling, offering flexible generation dynamics and enabling efficient parallel decoding. However, existing decoding strategies for pre-trained MDLMs predominantly rely on token-level uncertainty criteria, while largely overlooking sequence-level information and inter-token dependencies. To address this limitation, we propose Dependency-Oriented Sampler (DOS), a training-free decoding strategy that leverages inter-token dependencies to inform token updates during generation. Specifically, DOS exploits attention matrices from transformer blocks to approximate inter-token dependencies, emphasizing information from unmasked tokens when updating masked positions. Empirical results demonstrate that DOS consistently achieves superior performance on both code generation and mathematical reasoning tasks. Moreover, DOS can be seamlessly integrated with existing parallel sampling methods, leading to improved generation efficiency without sacrificing generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的去掩码采样方法（DOS），提升了基于掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）在生成任务中的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的MDLM解码策略主要依赖于逐token的不确定性判断，忽略了序列整体信息和token间的依赖关系，导致生成质量受限。
AI.method: 作者提出了无须额外训练的Dependency-Oriented Sampler（DOS），利用transformer内的注意力矩阵估算token间依赖，在生成时根据未掩码token的信息来优化被掩码token的更新。DOS可以无缝结合现有的并行采样方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，DOS在代码生成和数学推理任务上显著优于以往方法。结合并行采样策略后，进一步提升了生成速度，同时保证了生成质量。
AI.conclusion: DOS有效利用了token间的依赖关系，提升了MDLM的生成效率和质量，为相关任务提供了更优的解码方案。

title: ForceVLA2: Unleashing Hybrid Force-Position Control with Force Awareness for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Embodied intelligence for contact-rich manipulation has predominantly relied on position control, while explicit awareness and regulation of interaction forces remain under-explored, limiting stability, precision, and robustness in real-world tasks. We propose ForceVLA2, an end-to-end vision-language-action framework that equips robots with hybrid force-position control and explicit force awareness. ForceVLA2 introduces force-based prompts into the VLM expert to construct force-aware task concepts across stages, and employs a Cross-Scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) in the action expert to adaptively fuse these concepts with real-time interaction forces for closed-loop hybrid force-position regulation. To support learning and evaluation, we construct ForceVLA2-Dataset, containing 1,000 trajectories over 5 contact-rich tasks, including wiping, pressing, and assembling, with multi-view images, task prompts, proprioceptive state, and force signals. Extensive experiments show that ForceVLA2 substantially improves success rates and reliability in contact-rich manipulation, outperforming pi0 and pi0.5 by 48.0% and 35.0%, respectively, across the 5 tasks, and mitigating common failure modes such as arm overload and unstable contact, thereby actively advancing force-aware interactive physical intelligence in VLAs. The project page is available at https://sites.google.com/view/force-vla2/home.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ForceVLA2，一个结合视觉、语言和动作的机器人混合力-位置控制框架，实现了更高效和可靠的接触密集型操作。
AI.motivation: 现有的嵌入式智能机器人在复杂接触操作中多采用位置控制，缺乏对交互力的感知与调控，导致在稳定性、精度和鲁棒性方面表现不足。
AI.method: 提出ForceVLA2框架，引入力感知提示词，利用视觉-语言混合专家系统形成对任务的力 aware 概念。通过Cross-Scale混合专家模块，将实时力信号与多尺度任务概念融合，实现闭环力-位置混合控制。此外，构建ForceVLA2数据集，涵盖5类接触密集型任务的1000个轨迹。
AI.result: ForceVLA2在5项任务上，成功率显著高于对比算法pi0和pi0.5，分别高出48.0%和35.0%。同时有效缓解了如机器人手臂过载和接触不稳定等常见不足。
AI.conclusion: ForceVLA2大幅提升了机器人对接触力的感知和控制能力，增强了在物理交互任务中的智能与可靠性，推动了力感知交互型机器智能的发展。

title: Ego-1K -- A Large-Scale Multiview Video Dataset for Egocentric Vision
summary: We present Ego-1K, a large-scale collection of time-synchronized egocentric multiview videos designed to advance neural 3D video synthesis and dynamic scene understanding. The dataset contains nearly 1,000 short egocentric videos captured with a custom rig with 12 synchronized cameras surrounding a 4-camera VR headset worn by the user. Scene content focuses on hand motions and hand-object interactions in different settings. We describe rig design, data processing, and calibration. Our dataset enables new ways to benchmark egocentric scene reconstruction methods, an important research area as smart glasses with multiple cameras become omnipresent. Our experiments demonstrate that our dataset presents unique challenges for existing 3D and 4D novel view synthesis methods due to large disparities and image motion caused by close dynamic objects and rig egomotion. Our dataset supports future research in this challenging domain. It is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/facebook/ego-1k.

AI.tldr: Ego-1K是一个大规模、同步多视角的第一视角视频数据集，旨在推动神经3D视频合成和动态场景理解研究。
AI.motivation: 由于多摄像头智能眼镜正变得普及，理解和重建由头戴设备采集的动态、近距离第一视角场景已成为重要且有挑战性的研究领域。目前缺乏针对这类动态场景的、同步多视角的公开高质量数据集。
AI.method: 研究团队自定义设计了一套包含12个同步摄像头的头戴设备，并在此基础上采集了近1000段聚焦于手势和手部物体交互的多场景视频。视频经过数据处理与精确标定，以确保数据质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，Ego-1K在大视差、快速运动等方面为现有的3D和4D新视角合成方法带来了独特且较高的挑战。
AI.conclusion: Ego-1K数据集为动态场景下的第一视角重建与理解提供了新的基准和研究方向，有助于推动相关领域发展，适用于未来多摄像头智能设备的数据需求。

title: When Does Sparsity Mitigate the Curse of Depth in LLMs
summary: Recent work has demonstrated the curse of depth in large language models (LLMs), where later layers contribute less to learning and representation than earlier layers. Such under-utilization is linked to the accumulated growth of variance in Pre-Layer Normalization, which can push deep blocks toward near-identity behavior. In this paper, we demonstrate that, sparsity, beyond enabling efficiency, acts as a regulator of variance propagation and thereby improves depth utilization. Our investigation covers two sources of sparsity: (i) implicit sparsity, which emerges from training and data conditions, including weight sparsity induced by weight decay and attention sparsity induced by long context inputs; and (ii) explicit sparsity, which is enforced by architectural design, including key/value-sharing sparsity in Grouped-Query Attention and expert-activation sparsity in Mixtureof-Experts. Our claim is thoroughly supported by controlled depth-scaling experiments and targeted layer effectiveness interventions. Across settings, we observe a consistent relationship: sparsity improves layer utilization by reducing output variance and promoting functional differentiation. We eventually distill our findings into a practical rule-of-thumb recipe for training deptheffective LLMs, yielding a notable 4.6% accuracy improvement on downstream tasks. Our results reveal sparsity, arising naturally from standard design choices, as a key yet previously overlooked mechanism for effective depth scaling in LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/pUmpKin-Co/SparsityAndCoD.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了稀疏性（sparsity）不仅提升大模型效率，还能够作为调节方差传播、改善深度利用的关键机制，从而提升大语言模型（LLM）性能。
AI.motivation: 已有研究显示，LLM在加深层数时容易出现“深度诅咒”问题，即后层学习与表示能力下降，部分原因是Pre-Layer Normalization导致的方差累积。这种现象限制了更深层模型的有效性。作者旨在探索稀疏性是否能够缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 研究覆盖两类稀疏性：(1) 隐式稀疏性（训练与数据条件自发产生，如权重稀疏和注意力稀疏）；(2) 显式稀疏性（通过模型架构强制，如Grouped-Query Attention的key/value-sharing稀疏和Mixture-of-Experts中的专家激活稀疏）。通过受控的深度缩放实验和有针对性的层有效性干预，系统分析了稀疏性对深度利用及方差传播的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，不论隐式还是显式稀疏性，都能稳定降低输出方差、促进层间功能差异化，从而提升每一层的利用率。总结得出，稀疏性可有效改善深层LLM的表现。
AI.conclusion: 作者最终提炼出实用的训练深层LLM经验法则，通过提升深度利用度在下游任务中带来4.6%的准确率提升。稀疏性是深层LLM有效扩展的关键但此前被忽视的机制。论文公开了相关代码以便进一步研究。

title: KiRAS: Keyframe Guided Self-Imitation for Robust and Adaptive Skill Learning in Quadruped Robots
comment: Received by 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
summary: With advances in reinforcement learning and imitation learning, quadruped robots can acquire diverse skills within a single policy by imitating multiple skill-specific datasets. However, the lack of datasets on complex terrains limits the ability of such multi-skill policies to generalize effectively in unstructured environments. Inspired by animation, we adopt keyframes as minimal and universal skill representations, relaxing dataset constraints and enabling the integration of terrain adaptability with skill diversity. We propose Keyframe Guided Self-Imitation for Robust and Adaptive Skill Learning (KiRAS), an end-to-end framework for acquiring and transitioning between diverse skill primitives on complex terrains. KiRAS first learns diverse skills on flat terrain through keyframe-guided self-imitation, eliminating the need for expert datasets; then continues training the same policy network on rough terrains to enhance robustness. To eliminate catastrophic forgetting, a proficiency-based Skill Initialization Technique is introduced. Experiments on Solo-8 and Unitree Go1 robots show that KiRAS enables robust skill acquisition and smooth transitions across challenging terrains. This framework demonstrates its potential as a lightweight platform for multi-skill generation and dataset collection. It further enables flexible skill transitions that enhance locomotion on challenging terrains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于关键帧引导自我模仿（KiRAS）的四足机器人多技能学习框架，实现了在复杂地形上的鲁棒、多样技能生成和平滑切换。
AI.motivation: 现有多技能学习依赖于特定数据集，缺乏复杂地形数据，导致政策泛化能力不足，难以适应非结构化环境。
AI.method: 1. 以动画中的关键帧为技能表征，通过自我模仿学习多种技能，无需专家数据集。2. 首先在平地进行技能学习，再迁移到复杂地形上继续训练，提高鲁棒性。3. 引入按熟练度初始化技能（Skill Initialization）技术，防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在Solo-8和Unitree Go1两种四足机器人上验证，框架实现了在复杂地形上的鲁棒技能获取以及技能间的平滑切换。
AI.conclusion: 该框架作为轻量级多技能生成和数据采集平台具有应用前景，并提升了复杂地形下机器人的灵活运动能力。

title: Multi-Object Advertisement Creative Generation
summary: Lifestyle images are photographs that capture environments and objects in everyday settings. In furniture product marketing, advertisers often create lifestyle images containing products to resonate with potential buyers, allowing buyers to visualize how the products fit into their daily lives. While recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) have given rise to realistic image content creation, their application in e-commerce advertising is challenging because high-quality ads must authentically representing the products in realistic scearios. Therefore, manual intervention is usually required for individual generations, making it difficult to scale to larger product catalogs.
