To understand the challenges faced by advertisers using GenAI to create lifestyle images at scale, we conducted evaluations on ad images generated using state-of-the-art image generation models and identified the major challenges. Based on our findings, we present CreativeAds, a multi-product ad creation system that supports scalable automated generation with customized parameter adjustment for individual generation. To ensure automated high-quality ad generation, CreativeAds innovates a pipeline that consists of three modules to address challenges in product pairing, layout generation, and background generation separately. Furthermore, CreativeAds contains an intuitive user interface to allow users to oversee generation at scale, and it also supports detailed controls on individual generation for user customized adjustments. We performed a user study on CreativeAds and extensive evaluations of the generated images, demonstrating CreativeAds's ability to create large number of high-quality images at scale for advertisers without requiring expertise in GenAI tools.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CreativeAds系统，实现了家具产品广告生活方式图像的高质量、可扩展自动生成，降低了对人工干预和GenAI专业知识的依赖。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI在图像内容创作上的进步，电商广告商希望用GenAI高效制作能真实还原产品、具生活氛围的广告图片。但目前生成结果往往需人工干预，难以大规模生成高质量生活方式图片。作者旨在分析这些挑战，并提出解决方法。
AI.method: 作者调研了主流图像生成模型在生活方式广告图像上的表现，总结出三大难点。随后提出CreativeAds系统，包含产品配对、布局生成与背景生成三大模块，形成创新的自动化图像生成流程。系统还提供可视化和细致参数调控，使用户可批量或逐一调整生成结果。
AI.result: 通过用户研究和值得信赖的定量实验，CreativeAds系统在无需GenAI专业技术的前提下，实现了广告主可轻松大批量生成高质量生活方式广告图片的目标。
AI.conclusion: CreativeAds为电商广告主带来了可扩展、自动化且可控的生活方式广告图片生成方案，显著降低了人工参与门槛，有助于广告规模化生产与效率提升。

title: A Closer Look into LLMs for Table Understanding
summary: Despite the success of Large Language Models (LLMs) in table understanding, their internal mechanisms remain unclear. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study on 16 LLMs, covering general LLMs, specialist tabular LLMs, and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, to explore how LLMs understand tabular data and perform downstream tasks. Our analysis focus on 4 dimensions including the attention dynamics, the effective layer depth, the expert activation, and the impacts of input designs. Key findings include: (1) LLMs follow a three-phase attention pattern -- early layers scan the table broadly, middle layers localize relevant cells, and late layers amplify their contributions; (2) tabular tasks require deeper layers than math reasoning to reach stable predictions; (3) MoE models activate table-specific experts in middle layers, with early and late layers sharing general-purpose experts; (4) Chain-of-Thought prompting increases table attention, further enhanced by table-tuning. We hope these findings and insights can facilitate interpretability and future research on table-related tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文对16种大型语言模型进行实证研究，揭示它们在理解表格数据和下游任务时的内部机制，包括注意力动态、层深度、专家激活等方面。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在表格理解任务上表现优异，但其内部是怎样处理和理解表格数据的机制仍然不清楚。本文旨在揭示这些机制，促进解释性和相关研究。
AI.method: 研究针对通用LLM、专用表格LLM及MoE模型，共4类维度进行系统性实证分析：1)注意力动态；2)有效层深度；3)专家激活模式；4)输入设计的影响。
AI.result: （1）LLM注意力有三阶段：早期广泛扫描表格，中期聚焦相关单元格，后期加强贡献。（2）表格任务比数学推理需要更深层次达到稳定预测。（3）MoE在中间层激活专用专家，前后层使用通用专家。（4）链式思维(CoT)提示和表格微调都能提升模型对表格的关注。
AI.conclusion: 本文的发现解释了LLM处理表格任务的内部机制，为提升模型可解释性和未来表格相关任务研究提供了有价值的参考。

title: What Matters for Scalable and Robust Learning in End-to-End Driving Planners?
comment: To be published in CVPR Findings 2026
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving has gained significant attention for its potential to learn robust behavior in interactive scenarios and scale with data. Popular architectures often build on separate modules for perception and planning connected through latent representations, such as bird's eye view feature grids, to maintain end-to-end differentiability. This paradigm emerged mostly on open-loop datasets, with evaluation focusing not only on driving performance, but also intermediate perception tasks. Unfortunately, architectural advances that excel in open-loop often fail to translate to scalable learning of robust closed-loop driving. In this paper, we systematically re-examine the impact of common architectural patterns on closed-loop performance: (1) high-resolution perceptual representations, (2) disentangled trajectory representations, and (3) generative planning. Crucially, our analysis evaluates the combined impact of these patterns, revealing both unexpected limitations as well as underexplored synergies. Building on these insights, we introduce BevAD, a novel lightweight and highly scalable end-to-end driving architecture. BevAD achieves 72.7% success rate on the Bench2Drive benchmark and demonstrates strong data-scaling behavior using pure imitation learning. Our code and models are publicly available here: https://dmholtz.github.io/bevad/

AI.tldr: 本文重新系统性分析了端到端自动驾驶体系结构在闭环驾驶场景下的表现，揭示了常用设计模式的局限与协同作用，并提出了高效可扩展的新架构BevAD，显著提升了驾驶任务的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统大多在开放环数据集上开发与评测，但在实际闭环驾驶中的表现常常不能等效迁移，尤其是常见的高分辨率感知表示、解耦轨迹表示、生成式规划等模块。作者希望系统性地研究这些设计在闭环任务中的真实影响并寻找更优的架构。
AI.method: 作者从三个典型架构设计（高分辨率感知表示、解耦轨迹表示、生成式规划）出发，结合分析实验，量化它们对闭环驱动表现的单独与组合影响。基于分析结论，设计了新轻量端到端架构BevAD，并在Bench2Drive基准上验证其性能与可扩展性。
AI.result: BevAD模型仅依赖模仿学习，无需额外辅助任务，获得了Bench2Drive基准上72.7%的成功率，并在数据规模增大时依然展现出强劲的性能提升趋势。还公开了全部代码和模型。
AI.conclusion: 单一架构创新（如高分辨率感知等）并不能保证闭环自动驾驶的性能，必须系统性地评估与优化其组合。提出的BevAD架构兼具高效、可扩展与强性能，有助于推动端到端自动驾驶落地。

title: QTrack: Query-Driven Reasoning for Multi-modal MOT
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) has traditionally focused on estimating trajectories of all objects in a video, without selectively reasoning about user-specified targets under semantic instructions. In this work, we introduce a query-driven tracking paradigm that formulates tracking as a spatiotemporal reasoning problem conditioned on natural language queries. Given a reference frame, a video sequence, and a textual query, the goal is to localize and track only the target(s) specified in the query while maintaining temporal coherence and identity consistency. To support this setting, we construct RMOT26, a large-scale benchmark with grounded queries and sequence-level splits to prevent identity leakage and enable robust evaluation of generalization. We further present QTrack, an end-to-end vision-language model that integrates multimodal reasoning with tracking-oriented localization. Additionally, we introduce a Temporal Perception-Aware Policy Optimization strategy with structured rewards to encourage motion-aware reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for reasoning-centric, language-guided tracking. Code and data are available at https://github.com/gaash-lab/QTrack

AI.tldr: 本文引入了一种基于自然语言查询的多目标跟踪（MOT）新范式，并提出了QTrack模型和新的RMOT26数据集，有效提升了对查询目标的时空一致跟踪能力。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪只关注视频中所有目标的轨迹，缺乏对用户指定语义目标的选择性跟踪和推理机制。实际应用中，用户通常只关心特定对象。
AI.method: 提出基于查询的跟踪框架，将跟踪过程转化为自然语言语义条件下的时空推理任务。提供RMOT26数据集以及支持多模态推理和跟踪定向定位的QTrack模型，并结合了时序感知奖励优化策略提升模型表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在语义引导和推理能力要求高的跟踪任务上，QTrack模型在RMOT26数据集上展现了优异的性能，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究拓展了多目标跟踪的应用边界，使系统能依据自然语言查询实现更具选择性和智能性的跟踪，推动了视觉与语言结合的目标跟踪发展。

title: Fusian: Multi-LoRA Fusion for Fine-Grained Continuous MBTI Personality Control in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in simulating diverse human behaviors and personalities. However, existing methods for personality control, which include prompt engineering and standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), typically treat personality traits as discrete categories (e.g., "Extroverted" vs. "Introverted"), lacking the ability to precisely control the intensity of a trait on a continuous spectrum. In this paper, we introduce Fusian, a novel framework for fine-grained, continuous personality control in LLMs. Fusian operates in two stages: (1) Trajectory Collection, where we capture the dynamic evolution of personality adoption during SFT by saving a sequence of LoRA adapters, effectively mapping the continuous manifold of a trait; and (2) RL-based Dynamic Fusion, where we train a policy network using Reinforcement Learning to dynamically compute mixing weights for these frozen adapters. By sampling from a Dirichlet distribution parameterized by the policy network, Fusian fuses multiple adapters to align the model's output with a specific numerical target intensity. Experiments on the Qwen3-14B model demonstrate that Fusian achieves high precision in personality control, significantly outperforming baseline methods in aligning with user-specified trait intensities.

AI.tldr: 提出了Fusian框架，实现了大语言模型（LLM）性格特质强度的连续、精细控制，比已有方法表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只能对性格进行离散分类（如外向/内向），缺乏对特质强度进行连续、精确调节的能力，满足不了复杂应用需求。
AI.method: Fusian包含两个阶段：1）轨迹采集：在监督微调（SFT）过程中，保存一系列LoRA适配器，捕捉性格变化轨迹；2）基于强化学习的动态融合：利用策略网络动态计算这些适配器的融合权重，并通过参数化Dirichlet分布采样来达到目标强度。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-14B上实验，Fusian能够高精度地对性格强度进行调控，且控制表现显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Fusian实现了对大模型性格特质连续强度的精准调控，在相关应用中具备更强能力。

title: NavGSim: High-Fidelity Gaussian Splatting Simulator for Large-Scale Navigation
summary: Simulating realistic environments for robots is widely recognized as a critical challenge in robot learning, particularly in terms of rendering and physical simulation. This challenge becomes even more pronounced in navigation tasks, where trajectories often extend across multiple rooms or entire floors. In this work, we present NavGSim, a Gaussian Splatting-based simulator designed to generate high-fidelity, large-scale navigation environments. Built upon a hierarchical 3D Gaussian Splatting framework, NavGSim enables photorealistic rendering in expansive scenes spanning hundreds of square meters. To simulate navigation collisions, we introduce a Gaussian Splatting-based slice technique that directly extracts navigable areas from reconstructed Gaussians. Additionally, for ease of use, we provide comprehensive NavGSim APIs supporting multi-GPU development, including tools for custom scene reconstruction, robot configuration, policy training, and evaluation. To evaluate NavGSim's effectiveness, we train a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model using trajectories collected from NavGSim and assess its performance in both simulated and real-world environments. Our results demonstrate that NavGSim significantly enhances the VLA model's scene understanding, enabling the policy to handle diverse navigation queries effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型高保真导航模拟器NavGSim，可高效逼真地模拟大规模机器人导航环境，并提升智能体理解与导航能力。
AI.motivation: 在机器人学习，尤其是导航任务中，真实场景的高效渲染和物理仿真始终是难题，现有方法难以在大规模、复杂空间下实现高保真度与有效碰撞模拟。
AI.method: 提出NavGSim，一种基于层次化3D高斯Splatting的模拟器。通过高斯Splatting切片直接从重建的高斯中提取可导航区域，借助多GPU API支持场景重建、机器人配置、策略训练与评估。
AI.result: 用NavGSim收集轨迹并训练Vision-Language-Action模型，实验显示NavGSim极大提升了模型对环境的理解力，使策略具备高效应对多样导航指令的能力。
AI.conclusion: NavGSim为机器人导航任务提供了高质量、大规模仿真环境，提升了基于视觉和语言的导航模型性能，对机器人学习具有重要意义。

title: PhysAlign: Physics-Coherent Image-to-Video Generation through Feature and 3D Representation Alignment
summary: Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) offer a promising approach for simulating dynamic scenes and environments, with broad applications in robotics and media generation. However, existing models often generate temporally incoherent content that violates basic physical intuition, significantly limiting their practical applicability. We propose PhysAlign, an efficient framework for physics-coherent image-to-video (I2V) generation that explicitly addresses this limitation. To overcome the critical scarcity of physics-annotated videos, we first construct a fully controllable synthetic data generation pipeline based on rigid-body simulation, yielding a highly-curated dataset with accurate, fine-grained physics and 3D annotations. Leveraging this data, PhysAlign constructs a unified physical latent space by coupling explicit 3D geometry constraints with a Gram-based spatio-temporal relational alignment that extracts kinematic priors from video foundation models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PhysAlign significantly outperforms existing VDMs on tasks requiring complex physical reasoning and temporal stability, without compromising zero-shot visual quality. PhysAlign shows the potential to bridge the gap between raw visual synthesis and rigid-body kinematics, establishing a practical paradigm for genuinely physics-grounded video generation. The project page is available at https://physalign.github.io/PhysAlign.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PhysAlign框架，以提升视频扩散模型（VDM）在物理一致性方面的表现，通过结合3D物理约束和关系对齐，实现更加物理合理和时序连贯的视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型生成的内容在时间上缺乏连贯性，容易出现违反物理规律的现象，严重影响实际应用效果。缺乏带有物理注释的视频数据进一步加剧了该问题。
AI.method:
1. 构建基于刚体仿真的合成数据管道，获得高质量、可控的带物理和三维注释的数据集。
2. 在此数据基础上，PhysAlign将显式3D几何约束与基于Gram矩阵的时空关系对齐结合起来，从视频基础模型中提取动力学先验，统一建立物理潜变量空间。
AI.result: 大量实验证明，PhysAlign在需要复杂物理推理和时间一致性的任务上远超现有VDM，且在零样本视觉质量上没有损失。
AI.conclusion: PhysAlign契合刚体运动学的物理规律，提升了视频扩散模型生成物理一致性内容的能力，为物理驱动的视频生成奠定了新的实用范式。

title: SEA-Vision: A Multilingual Benchmark for Comprehensive Document and Scene Text Understanding in Southeast Asia
summary: Multilingual document and scene text understanding plays an important role in applications such as search, finance, and public services. However, most existing benchmarks focus on high-resource languages and fail to evaluate models in realistic multilingual environments. In Southeast Asia, the diversity of languages, complex writing systems, and highly varied document types make this challenge even greater. We introduce SEA-Vision, a benchmark that jointly evaluates Document Parsing and Text-Centric Visual Question Answering (TEC-VQA) across 11 Southeast Asian languages. SEA-Vision contains 15,234 document parsing pages from nine representative document types, annotated with hierarchical page-, block-, and line-level labels. It also provides 7,496 TEC-VQA question-answer pairs that probe text recognition, numerical calculation, comparative analysis, logical reasoning, and spatial understanding. To make such multilingual, multi-task annotation feasible, we design a hybrid pipeline for Document Parsing and TEC-VQA. It combines automated filtering and scoring with MLLM-assisted labeling and lightweight native-speaker verification, greatly reducing manual labeling while maintaining high quality. We evaluate several leading multimodal models and observe pronounced performance degradation on low-resource Southeast Asian languages, highlighting substantial remaining gaps in multilingual document and scene text understanding. We believe SEA-Vision will help drive global progress in document and scene text understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文发布了SEA-Vision基准数据集，覆盖11种东南亚语言，用于文档解析与视觉问答任务，强调多语言环境下模型存在显著性能短板。
AI.motivation: 现有文档与场景文本理解基准主要集中在高资源语言，忽略了多语言和复杂环境下的评测，尤其是东南亚区域多样性强，任务难度大，亟需有针对性的基准促进研究进步。
AI.method: 构建SEA-Vision基准，包含15,234页多文档类型文档解析数据及7,496个视觉文本问答数据，涵盖层级化标注。采用自动筛选、机器学习模型辅助标注结合母语者轻量验证的混合流程，提升多语言多任务标注效率和质量。
AI.result: 对现有主流多模态模型进行评估，发现它们在东南亚低资源语言上的表现显著下降，暴露出当前多语言文本理解的明显短板。
AI.conclusion: SEA-Vision数据集揭示了多模态模型在多语言环境下的实际弱点，将促进跨语言文本理解技术的研究进步，有助于推动全球范围文档与场景文本理解的发展。

title: Coupled Particle Filters for Robust Affordance Estimation
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: Robotic affordance estimation is challenging due to visual, geometric, and semantic ambiguities in sensory input. We propose a method that disambiguates these signals using two coupled recursive estimators for sub-aspects of affordances: graspable and movable regions. Each estimator encodes property-specific regularities to reduce uncertainty, while their coupling enables bidirectional information exchange that focuses attention on regions where both agree, i.e., affordances. Evaluated on a real-world dataset, our method outperforms three recent affordance estimators (Where2Act, Hands-as-Probes, and HRP) by 308%, 245%, and 257% in precision, and remains robust under challenging conditions such as low light or cluttered environments. Furthermore, our method achieves a 70% success rate in our real-world evaluation. These results demonstrate that coupling complementary estimators yields precise, robust, and embodiment-appropriate affordance predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过耦合递归估计器进行机器人可供性（affordance）估计的方法，大幅提升了视觉、几何与语义信号下的可抓取与可移动区域判断的准确性，并在实际环境中表现稳健。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人在面对视觉、几何与语义含糊的感知输入时，难以准确估计物体哪些区域可以抓取或移动，导致操作不稳定或失败，因此需要更高效、可靠的可供性估计方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了两个针对可抓取区域（graspable）与可移动区域（movable）的耦合递归估计器。各自利用特定属性的规律性降低不确定性，同时允许双方信息双向交流，从而突出两者判断一致的区域。这些区域即为更有把握的可供性区域。方法在真实世界数据集上与现有方法进行了对比评估。
AI.result: 方法相比Where2Act、Hands-as-Probes和HRP三种近期方法，在可供性估计精度上分别提升了308%、245%和257%。并且在低光和复杂环境下表现出良好的鲁棒性。在真实场景实验中可供性任务成功率达70%。
AI.conclusion: 通过耦合互补的递归估计器，能够实现高精度、强鲁棒性、适用于具体机器人体现（embodiment）的可供性预测，显著优于当前主流方法。

title: Brain Tumor Classification from 3D MRI Using Persistent Homology and Betti Features: A Topological Data Analysis Approach on BraTS2020
summary:
Accurate and interpretable brain tumor classification from medical imaging remains a challenging problem due to the high dimensionality and complex structural patterns present in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). In this study, we propose a topology-driven framework for brain tumor classification based on Topological Data Analysis (TDA) applied directly to three-dimensional (3D) MRI volumes. Specifically, we analyze 3D Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR) images from the BraTS 2020 dataset and extract interpretable topological descriptors using persistent homology.
  Persistent homology captures intrinsic geometric and structural characteristics of the data through Betti numbers, which describe connected components (Betti-0), loops (Betti-1), and voids (Betti-2). From the 3D MRI volumes, we derive a compact set of 100 topological features that summarize the underlying topology of brain tumor structures. These descriptors represent complex 3D tumor morphology while significantly reducing data dimensionality.
  Unlike many deep learning approaches that require large-scale training data or complex architectures, the proposed framework relies on computationally efficient topological features extracted directly from the images. These features are used to train classical machine learning classifiers, including Random Forest and XGBoost, for binary classification of high-grade glioma (HGG) and low-grade glioma (LGG). Experimental results on the BraTS 2020 dataset show that the Random Forest classifier combined with selected Betti features achieves an accuracy of 89.19%. These findings highlight the potential of persistent homology as an effective and interpretable approach for analyzing complex 3D medical images and performing brain tumor classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析（TDA）的三维脑肿瘤MRI影像分类方法，通过持久同调提取可解释拓扑特征，实现高低级胶质母细胞瘤二分类，准确率达89.19%。
AI.motivation: MRI影像中脑肿瘤分类因高维度和复杂结构难以准确和可解释。很多深度学习方法需要大规模数据和复杂模型，且难以解释分类结果。因此，作者希望开发一种既高效又可解释的分类方法。
AI.method: 直接在BraTS 2020数据集的3D FLAIR MRI影像上应用TDA，利用持久同调提取Betti数等100个紧凑拓扑特征，代表肿瘤的复杂3D形态，并用这些特征训练传统机器学习分类器（如Random Forest、XGBoost）进行高低级胶质瘤分类。
AI.result: 使用Random Forest和选择的Betti特征，二分类模型在BraTS 2020数据集上达到89.19%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于持久同调提取的拓扑特征不仅能反映复杂3D医学影像中的结构信息，还能大幅降维，且易于解释，能够有效支持脑肿瘤的分类任务。

title: CLAG: Adaptive Memory Organization via Agent-Driven Clustering for Small Language Model Agents
summary: Large language model agents heavily rely on external memory to support knowledge reuse and complex reasoning tasks. Yet most memory systems store experiences in a single global retrieval pool which can gradually dilute or corrupt stored knowledge. This problem is especially pronounced for small language models (SLMs), which are highly vulnerable to irrelevant context. We introduce CLAG, a CLustering-based AGentic memory framework where an SLM agent actively organizes memory by clustering. CLAG employs an SLM-driven router to assign incoming memories to semantically coherent clusters and autonomously generates cluster-specific profiles, including topic summaries and descriptive tags, to establish each cluster as a self-contained functional unit. By performing localized evolution within these structured neighborhoods, CLAG effectively reduces cross-topic interference and enhances internal memory density. During retrieval, the framework utilizes a two-stage process that first filters relevant clusters via their profiles, thereby excluding distractors and reducing the search space. Experiments on multiple QA datasets with three SLM backbones show that CLAG consistently improves answer quality and robustness over prior memory systems for agents, remaining lightweight and efficient.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于聚类的代理记忆框架CLAG，通过给小型语言模型智能分组记忆，提升了问答表现和健壮性。
AI.motivation: 当前的大模型代理系统往往将所有经验存在一个全局池中，容易导致知识污染，尤其小型语言模型对此更为敏感。因此需要一种能更好组织和利用记忆的机制。
AI.method: 该方法称为CLAG，通过让小模型代理主动对记忆内容进行语义聚类，并为每个聚类生成特定简介和标签。检索时，先筛选相关聚类，再在聚类内部查找，从而排除无关信息并聚焦搜索范围。
AI.result: 在多个问答数据集和三种小型语言模型上实验，CLAG在答案质量和系统健壮性上均优于已有的记忆系统，同时保持轻量和高效。
AI.conclusion: CLAG有效减少了主题间干扰，提高了小模型的知识利用效率和推理能力，适合作为小型语言模型代理的增强记忆模块。

title: A Methodology for Dynamic Parameters Identification of 3-DOF Parallel Robots in Terms of Relevant Parameters
summary: The identification of dynamic parameters in mechanical systems is important for improving model-based control as well as for performing realistic dynamic simulations. Generally, when identification techniques are applied only a subset of so-called base parameters can be identified. More even, some of these parameters cannot be identified properly given that they have a small contribution to the robot dynamics and hence in the presence of noise in measurements and discrepancy in modeling, their quality of being identifiable decreases. For this reason, a strategy for dynamic parameter identification of fully parallel robots in terms of a subset called relevant parameters is put forward. The objective of the proposed methodology is to start from a full dynamic model, then simplification concerning the geometry of each link and, the symmetry due to legs of fully parallel robots, are carried out. After that, the identification is done by Weighted Least Squares. Then, with statistical considerations the model is reduced until the physical feasibility conditions are met. The application of the propose strategy has been experimentally tested on two difierent configurations of actual 3-DOF parallel robots. The response of the inverse and forward dynamics of the identified models agrees with experiments. In order to evaluate the forward dynamics response, an approach for obtaining the forward dynamics in terms of the relevant parameters is also proposed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对全并联机器人动力学参数的识别策略，通过关注少量“相关参数”替代全部基参数，提高参数辨识的准确性和物理合理性，实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 动力学参数的精确识别对基于模型的控制和动态仿真至关重要，但在传统方法下，由于噪声和建模误差，一些贡献较小的参数往往难以被可靠识别。为解决这一问题，本文关注如何有效识别对机器人动力学影响显著的相关参数，从而提升模型的实用性。
AI.method: 从完整的动力学模型出发，结合连杆几何及时并联机器人腿的对称性简化模型；采用加权最小二乘法进行参数识别；随后借助统计方法逐步删减参数，直至兼顾物理可行性。针对正向动力学模型，还提出了基于相关参数的推导方法。
AI.result: 该策略在两种实际3自由度并联机器人结构上进行了实验。所识别模型的逆动力学和正向动力学响应均与实验数据高度一致，证明了方法的准确性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过仅关注对动力学影响显著的相关参数，所提出方法提升了全并联机器人动力学建模与参数辨识的精度，并兼顾了模型的物理意义和可用性。

title: AD-Copilot: A Vision-Language Assistant for Industrial Anomaly Detection via Visual In-context Comparison
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive success in natural visual understanding, yet they consistently underperform in industrial anomaly detection (IAD). This is because MLLMs trained mostly on general web data differ significantly from industrial images. Moreover, they encode each image independently and can only compare images in the language space, making them insensitive to subtle visual differences that are key to IAD. To tackle these issues, we present AD-Copilot, an interactive MLLM specialized for IAD via visual in-context comparison. We first design a novel data curation pipeline to mine inspection knowledge from sparsely labeled industrial images and generate precise samples for captioning, VQA, and defect localization, yielding a large-scale multimodal dataset Chat-AD rich in semantic signals for IAD. On this foundation, AD-Copilot incorporates a novel Comparison Encoder that employs cross-attention between paired image features to enhance multi-image fine-grained perception, and is trained with a multi-stage strategy that incorporates domain knowledge and gradually enhances IAD skills. In addition, we introduce MMAD-BBox, an extended benchmark for anomaly localization with bounding-box-based evaluation. The experiments show that AD-Copilot achieves 82.3% accuracy on the MMAD benchmark, outperforming all other models without any data leakage. In the MMAD-BBox test, it achieves a maximum improvement of $3.35\times$ over the baseline. AD-Copilot also exhibits excellent generalization of its performance gains across other specialized and general-purpose benchmarks. Remarkably, AD-Copilot surpasses human expert-level performance on several IAD tasks, demonstrating its potential as a reliable assistant for real-world industrial inspection. All datasets and models will be released for the broader benefit of the community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对工业异常检测（IAD）的多模态大模型AD-Copilot，显著提升了对微小缺陷的检测能力，在公开基准上优于现有方法，并具备超越专家的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型擅长自然视觉任务，但因训练数据与工业场景差异大，且对微小视觉差异敏感度低，导致在工业异常检测（IAD）任务中效果有限。作者旨在解决此应用差距。
AI.method: 1. 设计了自动化数据管道，从稀疏标签工业图像中挖掘检测知识，生成高质量多模态数据集Chat-AD。2. 提出一种Comparison Encoder，用跨注意力机制提升多图像细粒度对比感知能力。3. 采用多阶段训练策略，融入领域知识，逐步增强异常检测能力。4. 推出MMAD-BBox基准，用于异常定位评估。
AI.result: AD-Copilot在MMAD基准上准确率达82.3%，领先所有对比模型；在MMAD-BBox异常定位任务上最大提升基线3.35倍；在多个基准上表现出良好泛化能力，并在若干任务上超过人类专家水平。
AI.conclusion: AD-Copilot有效提升了工业异常检测的智能化水平，在多个基准和应用中展现出强大能力，并具备实际工业应用价值。所有模型和数据集将会开源，助力社区发展。

title: Invisible failures in human-AI interactions
summary: AI systems fail silently far more often than they fail visibly. In a large-scale quantitative analysis of human-AI interactions from the WildChat dataset, we find that 78% of AI failures are invisible: something went wrong but the user gave no overt indication that there was a problem. These invisible failures cluster into eight archetypes that help us characterize where and how AI systems are failing to meet users' needs. In addition, the archetypes show systematic co-occurrence patterns indicating higher-level failure types. To address the question of whether these archetypes will remain relevant as AI systems become more capable, we also assess failures for whether they are primarily interactional or capability-driven, finding that 91% involve interactional dynamics, and we estimate that 94% of such failures would persist even with a more capable model. Finally, we illustrate how the archetypes help us to identify systematic and variable AI limitations across different usage domains. Overall, we argue that our invisible failure taxonomy can be a key component in reliable failure monitoring for product developers, scientists, and policy makers. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/bigspinai/bigspin-invisible-failure-archetypes

AI.tldr: 本文分析了AI系统失败的不可察觉性，发现大部分失败未被用户显性反馈，提出了八类“隐形失败”原型，并评估其普遍性和持续性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI越来越广泛应用，了解其失败模式对提高AI系统可靠性和用户体验至关重要。过去研究多集中于可见失败，本研究聚焦于更常见但更难检测的“隐形失败”。
AI.method: 作者利用WildChat大规模人类与AI交互数据集，系统分析了AI失败案例，将失败分为八大原型，并研究失败类型的系统性共现和原因。此外，区分失误是交互导致还是能力不足导致，并估算其未来持续性。
AI.result: 发现78%的AI失败用户未显式反馈问题，绝大多数失败(91%)与交互动态相关，并估算即便AI模型能力提高，94%的隐形失败仍将持续。归纳出八种失败原型，可跨不同使用领域揭示AI局限性差异。
AI.conclusion: 不可见失败构成AI系统可靠性的重要挑战。作者提出的隐形失败分类法为产品开发、科学研究及政策制定提供了监测和改进AI系统的关键工具。

title: HapticVLA: Contact-Rich Manipulation via Vision-Language-Action Model without Inference-Time Tactile Sensing
summary: Tactile sensing is a crucial capability for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) architectures, as it enables dexterous and safe manipulation in contact-rich tasks. However, reliance on dedicated tactile hardware increases cost and reduces reproducibility across robotic platforms. We argue that tactile-aware manipulation can be learned offline and deployed without direct haptic feedback at inference. To this end, we present HapticVLA, which proceeds in two tightly coupled stages: Safety-Aware Reward-Weighted Flow Matching (SA-RWFM) and Tactile Distillation (TD). SA-RWFM trains a flow-matching action expert that incorporates precomputed, safety-aware tactile rewards penalizing excessive grasping force and suboptimal grasping trajectories. TD further transfers this tactile-aware capability into a conventional VLA: we distill a compact tactile token from the SA-RWFM teacher and train a student VLA to predict that token from vision and state modalities, enabling tactile-aware action generation at inference without requiring on-board tactile sensors. This design preserves contact-rich tactile-aware reasoning within VLA while removing the need for on-board tactile sensors during deployment. On real-world experiments, HapticVLA achieves a mean success rate of 86.7%, consistently outperforming baseline VLAs - including versions provided with direct tactile feedback during inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法，能让机器人在不依赖实时触觉传感器的情况下，依然具备触觉感知能力，实现安全灵巧的操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA体系依赖专用触觉硬件，导致成本高且难以在不同平台复现。因此作者尝试以视觉和状态信息替代实时触觉输入，实现低成本且高效的触觉感知。
AI.method: 提出HapticVLA，分为两个阶段：1）SA-RWFM，通过引入安全相关的触觉奖励，训练动作专家；2）TD，将动作专家中触觉经验蒸馏为紧凑触觉token，并让学生VLA网络通过视觉和状态预测该token，实现无需实时触觉传感器的部署。
AI.result: 在真实机器人实验中，HapticVLA平均成功率达86.7%，且优于所有基线VLA方法，包括推理阶段使用实时触觉输入的版本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明无需部署阶段触觉传感器，依然可以在高接触操作任务中实现触觉感知，降低了系统成本并提升了可复现性。

title: RetimeGS: Continuous-Time Reconstruction of 4D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Temporal retiming, the ability to reconstruct and render dynamic scenes at arbitrary timestamps, is crucial for applications such as slow-motion playback, temporal editing, and post-production. However, most existing 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) methods overfit at discrete frame indices but struggle to represent continuous-time frames, leading to ghosting artifacts when interpolating between timestamps. We identify this limitation as a form of temporal aliasing and propose RetimeGS, a simple yet effective 4DGS representation that explicitly defines the temporal behavior of the 3D Gaussian and mitigates temporal aliasing. To achieve smooth and consistent interpolation, we incorporate optical flow-guided initialization and supervision, triple-rendering supervision, and other targeted strategies. Together, these components enable ghost-free, temporally coherent rendering even under large motions. Experiments on datasets featuring fast motion, non-rigid deformation, and severe occlusions demonstrate that RetimeGS achieves superior quality and coherence over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RetimeGS方法，解决了4D高斯投影在时间连续帧渲染时出现的鬼影和时间混叠问题，实现了高质量、时间连贯的动态场景渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有4D Gaussian Splatting方法只能在离散时刻表现良好，难以处理帧间插值时的时间连续性，导致出现鬼影等时间混叠问题。这限制了慢动作回放、时间编辑等实际应用效果。
AI.method: 作者提出RetimeGS方法，通过明确建模3D高斯在时间轴上的变化方式，结合光流引导的初始化与监督、三重渲染监督以及定向优化策略，提升了时间插值帧的平滑性和一致性，减少了鬼影现象。
AI.result: 实验证明，在快速运动、非刚性变形和严重遮挡等复杂动态场景下，RetimeGS能够实现优于主流方法的插值帧画质和时间一致性。
AI.conclusion: RetimeGS有效缓解了4DGS在连续时间重建任务中的时间混叠和鬼影问题，提升了动态场景的渲染效果，在需要高时间精度的应用中具有较高的实用价值。

title: ViX-Ray: A Vietnamese Chest X-Ray Dataset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vietnamese medical research has become an increasingly vital domain, particularly with the rise of intelligent technologies aimed at reducing time and resource burdens in clinical diagnosis. Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs), such as Gemini and GPT-4V, have sparked a growing interest in applying AI to healthcare. However, most existing VLMs lack exposure to Vietnamese medical data, limiting their ability to generate accurate and contextually appropriate diagnostic outputs for Vietnamese patients. To address this challenge, we introduce ViX-Ray, a novel dataset comprising 5,400 Vietnamese chest X-ray images annotated with expert-written findings and impressions from physicians at a major Vietnamese hospital. We analyze linguistic patterns within the dataset, including the frequency of mentioned body parts and diagnoses, to identify domain-specific linguistic characteristics of Vietnamese radiology reports. Furthermore, we fine-tune five state-of-the-art open-source VLMs on ViX-Ray and compare their performance to leading proprietary models, GPT-4V and Gemini. Our results show that while several models generate outputs partially aligned with clinical ground truths, they often suffer from low precision and excessive hallucination, especially in impression generation. These findings not only demonstrate the complexity and challenge of our dataset but also establish ViX-Ray as a valuable benchmark for evaluating and advancing vision-language models in the Vietnamese clinical domain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ViX-Ray数据集，专注于越南胸部X光影像及其医生注释，以推动视觉语言模型（VLM）在越南医疗领域的应用和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 近年来视觉语言模型（如Gemini和GPT-4V）在医疗智能诊断领域备受关注，但由于缺乏包含越南医学数据的训练语料，现有模型难以针对越南场景生成准确的诊断结果。因此需要有本地化的医学影像数据集促进研究。
AI.method: 作者构建了ViX-Ray数据集，含有5400张经医生注释的越南胸部X光片，并分析报告的语言模式。随后，作者对五种主流开源视觉语言模型用ViX-Ray进行了微调，并与GPT-4V及Gemini等主流专有模型做对比评价。
AI.result: 虽然部分模型与真实诊断结果有一定一致性，但整体表现存在精度偏低和生成虚假（hallucination）内容多的现象，尤其是在整体印象的输出上。
AI.conclusion: ViX-Ray数据集不但体现了越南临床视觉语言建模的挑战性和复杂性，还为评价和提升该领域模型能力提供了宝贵基准。

title: MoE-ACT: Scaling Multi-Task Bimanual Manipulation with Sparse Language-Conditioned Mixture-of-Experts Transformers
summary: The ability of robots to handle multiple tasks under a unified policy is critical for deploying embodied intelligence in real-world household and industrial applications. However, out-of-distribution variation across tasks often causes severe task interference and negative transfer when training general robotic policies. To address this challenge, we propose a lightweight multi-task imitation learning framework for bimanual manipulation, termed Mixture-of-Experts-Enhanced Action Chunking Transformer (MoE-ACT), which integrates sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) modules into the Transformer encoder of ACT. The MoE layer decomposes a unified task policy into independently invoked expert components. Through adaptive activation, it naturally decouples multi-task action distributions in latent space. During decoding, Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) dynamically modulates action tokens to improve consistency between action generation and task instructions. In parallel, multi-scale cross-attention enables the policy to simultaneously focus on both low-level and high-level semantic features, providing rich visual information for robotic manipulation. We further incorporate textual information, transitioning the framework from a purely vision-based model to a vision-centric, language-conditioned action generation system. Experimental validation in both simulation and a real-world dual-arm setup shows that MoE-ACT substantially improves multi-task performance. Specifically, MoE-ACT outperforms vanilla ACT by an average of 33% in success rate. These results indicate that MoE-ACT provides stronger robustness and generalization in complex multi-task bimanual manipulation environments. Our open-source project page can be found at https://j3k7.github.io/MoE-ACT/.

AI.tldr: MoE-ACT将Mixture-of-Experts方法与Transformer结合，实现了适用于双臂机器人多任务操作的高效模仿学习框架，大幅提升多任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 在现实生活与工业环境中，同一机器人往往需完成多种任务，然而跨任务分布差异极大，导致单一策略模型出现任务间干扰与负迁移，限制了多任务泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出MoE-ACT框架，在Transformer的编码器中引入稀疏Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）模块，将统一任务策略分解为多个专家子模块，通过自适应激活在潜在空间实现多任务解耦，并利用FiLM动态调制动作token以及多尺度交叉注意力获取丰富视觉语义信息。此外，将语言条件引入模型，实现视觉-语言联合驱动。
AI.result: 在模拟和实际双臂机器人平台上验证，MoE-ACT在多任务操作中的成功率较基础ACT提升33%以上，表现出更强的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MoE-ACT通过专家解耦和多模态调制，有效缓解了多任务学习中的任务干扰与负迁移，显著增强了机器人复杂多任务环境下的泛化与稳健性，有利于实际落地应用。

title: Advancing Cancer Prognosis with Hierarchical Fusion of Genomic, Proteomic and Pathology Imaging Data from a Systems Biology Perspective
summary: To enhance the precision of cancer prognosis, recent research has increasingly focused on multimodal survival methods by integrating genomic data and histology images. However, current approaches overlook the fact that the proteome serves as an intermediate layer bridging genomic alterations and histopathological features while providing complementary biological information essential for survival prediction. This biological reality exposes another architectural limitation: existing integrative analysis studies fuse these heterogeneous data sources in a flat manner that fails to capture their inherent biological hierarchy. To address these limitations, we propose HFGPI, a hierarchical fusion framework that models the biological progression from genes to proteins to histology images from a systems biology perspective. Specifically, we introduce Molecular Tokenizer, a molecular encoding strategy that integrates identity embeddings with expression profiles to construct biologically informed representations for genes and proteins. We then develop Gene-Regulated Protein Fusion (GRPF), which employs graph-aware cross-attention with structure-preserving alignment to explicitly model gene-protein regulatory relationships and generate gene-regulated protein representations. Additionally, we propose Protein-Guided Hypergraph Learning (PGHL), which establishes associations between proteins and image patches, leveraging hypergraph convolution to capture higher-order protein-morphology relationships. The final features are progressively fused across hierarchical layers to achieve precise survival outcome prediction. Extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of HFGPI over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态生存预测框架HFGPI，融合了基因、蛋白组和病理图像，实现了更精准的癌症预后预测，并在五个基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态生存分析主要整合基因组和病理图像，但忽略了蛋白组作为基因与表型之间重要桥梁的作用，且现有方法未能反映生物数据的层级结构。本文旨在弥补这两方面的不足。
AI.method: 提出HFGPI分层融合框架，从分子到形态分为基因-蛋白质-病理图像三个层级。具体包括：1）Molecular Tokenizer结合分子身份和表达信息构建基因、蛋白质的表征；2）Gene-Regulated Protein Fusion利用图结构感知交叉注意力，模拟基因调控蛋白关系；3）Protein-Guided Hypergraph Learning用超图卷积刻画蛋白和图像片段的高阶关系。最后多模态层级融合实现生存预测。
AI.result: 在五个主流数据集上，HFGPI方法相较现有最先进方案表现出更优的生存预测精度。
AI.conclusion: HFGPI更有效地模拟了实际生物分层关系，将蛋白组信息引入多模态生存预测，在肿瘤预后领域具备潜在应用价值。

title: Beyond the Covariance Trap: Unlocking Generalization in Same-Subject Knowledge Editing for Large Language Models
summary: While locate-then-edit knowledge editing efficiently updates knowledge encoded within Large Language Models (LLMs), a critical generalization failure mode emerges in the practical same-subject knowledge editing scenario: models fail to recall the updated knowledge when following user instructions, despite successfully recalling it in the original edited form. This paper identifies the geometric root of this generalization collapse as a fundamental conflict where the inner activation drifts induced by prompt variations exceed the model's geometric tolerance for generalization after editing. We attribute this instability to a dual pathology: (1) The joint optimization with orthogonal gradients collapses solutions into sharp minima with narrow stability, and (2) the standard covariance constraint paradoxically acts as a Covariance Trap that amplifies input perturbations. To resolve this, we introduce RoSE (Robust Same-subject Editing), which employs Isotropic Geometric Alignment to minimize representational deviation and Hierarchical Knowledge Integration to smooth the optimization landscape. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoSE significantly improves instruction-following capabilities, laying the foundation for robust interactive parametric memory of LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 本文发现主流大模型知识编辑方法在同主体不同表达下常出现泛化失败，并提出RoSE方法，有效提升了模型在遵循用户指令时对新知识的回忆能力。
AI.motivation: 现有定位-编辑法虽可更新大模型中的知识，但在实际应用中，当对同一主体以不同表达方式提问时，模型常无法回忆出编辑过的新知识。作者旨在揭示和解决这种泛化失败。
AI.method: 作者分析了泛化崩溃的几何根源，并发现内激活漂移和优化方式导致稳定性问题。提出RoSE方法：一是通过各向同性几何对齐减少表征偏移；二是通过分层知识整合优化损失曲面，从而提升泛化和稳定性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，RoSE方法能显著提升模型对编辑知识的指令跟随能力，即使输入表达变化也能稳定回忆知识。
AI.conclusion: RoSE方法为大模型知识编辑中的同主体鲁棒泛化问题提供了解决思路，有望推动大模型作为智能体的稳健交互与知识记忆能力。

title: GNIO: Gated Neural Inertial Odometry
comment: Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
summary: Inertial navigation using low-cost MEMS sensors is plagued by rapid drift due to sensor noise and bias instability. While recent data-driven approaches have made significant strides, they often struggle with micro-drifts during stationarity and mode fusion during complex motion transitions due to their reliance on fixed-window regression. In this work, we introduce Gated Neural Inertial Odometry (GNIO), a novel learning-based framework that explicitly models motion validity and context. We propose two key architectural innovations: \ding{182} a learnable Motion Bank that queries a global dictionary of motion patterns to provide semantic context beyond the local receptive field, and \ding{183} a Gated Prediction Head that decomposes displacement into magnitude and direction. This gating mechanism acts as a soft, differentiable Zero-Velocity Update (ZUPT), dynamically suppressing sensor noise during stationary periods while scaling predictions during dynamic motion. Extensive experiments across four public benchmarks demonstrate that GNIO significantly reduces position drift compared to state-of-the-art CNN and Transformer-based baselines. Notably, GNIO achieves a $60.21\%$ reduction in trajectory error on the OxIOD dataset and exhibits superior generalization in challenging scenarios involving frequent stops and irregular motion speeds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的惯性测程（GNIO）方法，通过引入两个关键网络结构，有效地减少了由低成本MEMS惯性传感器带来的积累漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 低成本MEMS惯性导航由于传感器噪声和偏置不稳定导致漂移严重。当前数据驱动方法常用固定窗口回归，无法同时兼顾静止时微漂移抑制与复杂运动的准确模式识别，影响导航精度。
AI.method: 提出Gated Neural Inertial Odometry（GNIO）架构，包含可学习的Motion Bank用于语义上下文获取，以及用于分解和动态调整位移预测的Gated Prediction Head。该Head机制类似软零速更新，可根据运动状态自适应处理噪声及信号。
AI.result: 在四个公开基准测试中，GNIO的轨迹漂移显著低于当前最优的CNN和Transformer方法。在OxIOD数据集上，相较基线方法轨迹误差下降了60.21%，对频繁静止和变化速度场景具有更强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GNIO通过建模运动有效性和上下文，显著增强了基于惯性的低成本导航方法的鲁棒性与准确性，对实际复杂环境具有良好适应性和应用前景。

title: Beyond Medical Diagnostics: How Medical Multimodal Large Language Models Think in Space
summary: Visual spatial intelligence is critical for medical image interpretation, yet remains largely unexplored in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for 3D imaging. This gap persists due to a systemic lack of datasets featuring structured 3D spatial annotations beyond basic labels. In this study, we introduce an agentic pipeline that autonomously synthesizes spatial visual question-answering (VQA) data by orchestrating computational tools such as volume and distance calculators with multi-agent collaboration and expert radiologist validation. We present SpatialMed, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating 3D spatial intelligence in medical MLLMs, comprising nearly 10K question-answer pairs across multiple organs and tumor types. Our evaluations on 14 state-of-the-art MLLMs and extensive analyses reveal that current models lack robust spatial reasoning capabilities for medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SpatialMed，这是首个用于评估医学多模态大模型（MLLM）三维空间智能的基准，显式针对医学影像中的空间推理能力。通过自主合成空间VQA数据并结合多代理与专家验证，填补了相关数据集空白。实验显示目前主流MLLM在三维空间推理上表现不足。
AI.motivation: 虽然空间视觉智能对于医学影像判读至关重要，但多模态大模型在三维医学影像上的空间推理能力鲜有探索，原因在于缺乏相关标签丰富的数据集。为促进模型空间智能能力发展，作者决定构建标准化评测和数据生成流程。
AI.method: 作者提出一种自主的生成流程（agentic pipeline），通过整合体积、距离计算工具、多智能体协作和放射科专家验证，自动合成医学三维空间VQA问答数据。并构建SpatialMed基准，涵盖多个器官和肿瘤类型，共近万条QA对。
AI.result: 在14个主流多模态大模型上进行了评测，分析表明这些模型在三维空间推理方面均表现不佳，显示其空间推理能力的普遍薄弱。
AI.conclusion: 当前医学多模态大模型在三维影像上的空间智能有明显短板，SpatialMed为该领域提供了首个标准化评测基准，有望促进相关研究和模型进步。

title: SlovKE: A Large-Scale Dataset and LLM Evaluation for Slovak Keyphrase Extraction
summary: Keyphrase extraction for morphologically rich, low-resource languages remains understudied, largely due to the scarcity of suitable evaluation datasets. We address this gap for Slovak by constructing a dataset of 227,432 scientific abstracts with author-assigned keyphrases -- scraped and systematically cleaned from the Slovak Central Register of Theses -- representing a 25-fold increase over the largest prior Slovak resource and approaching the scale of established English benchmarks such as KP20K. Using this dataset, we benchmark three unsupervised baselines (YAKE, TextRank, KeyBERT with SlovakBERT embeddings) and evaluate KeyLLM, an LLM-based extraction method using GPT-3.5-turbo. Unsupervised baselines achieve at most 11.6\% exact-match $F1@6$, with a large gap to partial matching (up to 51.5\%), reflecting the difficulty of matching inflected surface forms to author-assigned keyphrases. KeyLLM narrows this exact--partial gap, producing keyphrases closer to the canonical forms assigned by authors, while manual evaluation on 100 documents ($κ= 0.61$) confirms that KeyLLM captures relevant concepts that automated exact matching underestimates. Our analysis identifies morphological mismatch as the dominant failure mode for statistical methods -- a finding relevant to other inflected languages. The dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/NaiveNeuron/SlovKE) and evaluation code (https://github.com/NaiveNeuron/SlovKE) are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文首次构建了斯洛伐克语大规模科学文摘关键词数据集，并基于该数据集评估多种关键词抽取方法。
AI.motivation: 面对斯洛伐克语等低资源、富形态变化的语言关键词抽取研究不足且缺乏大规模评价数据集的问题。
AI.method: 从斯洛伐克学位论文中央注册库清洗爬取22万多篇科学文摘，构建带有作者指定关键词的数据集，并在此基础上测试三种无监督方法（YAKE、TextRank、KeyBERT）及一种基于GPT-3.5-turbo的大模型方法KeyLLM，采用精确匹配与部分匹配指标评估表现。
AI.result: 无监督方法精确匹配F1@6最高仅11.6%，而部分匹配高达51.5%，反映出斯洛伐克语形态变化带来的难度。KeyLLM方法能缩小精确和部分匹配的差距，生成的关键词更贴近作者指定的标准形式。人工标注实验也证实KeyLLM识别出许多自动匹配方法忽略的有效关键词。
AI.conclusion: 统计类算法容易受到形态不匹配影响（尤其在曲折语中），而大模型方法表现更优。文中数据集与评测代码公开，有助于推动低资源富形态语言的关键词抽取研究。

title: User-Tailored Learning to Forecast Walking Modes for Exosuits
summary: Assistive robotic devices, like soft lower-limb exoskeletons or exosuits, are widely spreading with the promise of helping people in everyday life. To make such systems adaptive to the variety of users wearing them, it is desirable to endow exosuits with advanced perception systems. However, exosuits have little sensory equipment because they need to be light and easy to wear. This paper presents a perception module based on machine learning that aims at estimating 3 walking modes (i.e., ascending or descending stairs and walking on level ground) of users wearing an exosuit. We tackle this perception problem using only inertial data from two sensors. Our approach provides an estimate for both future and past timesteps that supports control and enables a self-labeling procedure for online model adaptation. Indeed, we show that our estimate can label data acquired online and refine the model for new users. A thorough analysis carried out on real-life datasets shows the effectiveness of our user-tailored perception module. Finally, we integrate our system with the exosuit in a closed-loop controller, validating its performance in an online single-subject experiment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的感知模块，仅使用两个惯性传感器数据即可识别穿戴软外骨骼用户的三种步态（上楼梯、下楼梯、平地行走），并可自适应不同用户，实现在线自标注和模型优化。
AI.motivation: 软体外骨骼可辅助日常行走，但为保持轻便，传感器数量有限，这限制了其感知和自适应能力。因此，开发既轻便又智能的步态感知系统对提升用户体验非常重要。
AI.method: 利用两个惯性传感器采集数据，通过机器学习算法对用户步态（上楼梯、下楼梯、平地行走）进行推断。系统不仅能预测未来步态，还能回溯判别过去步态，并支持自标注以适应新用户，实现在线模型自适应。
AI.result: 实验在实际数据集上验证了方法的有效性，用户特异性的感知模块拥有良好的表现。系统进一步被集成到软外骨骼闭环控制器中，并在在线单受试者实验中进行性能验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法可在仅使用极少传感器的条件下，实现对不同用户的步态精准识别，并支持在线自适应，适用于实际穿戴式软外骨骼的应用。

title: ALTIS: Automated Loss Triage and Impact Scoring from Sentinel-1 SAR for Property-Level Flood Damage Assessment
comment: 27 pages, 9 figures. Preliminary results; full end-to-end validation ongoing
summary: Floods are among the costliest natural catastrophes globally, yet the property and casualty insurance industry's post-event response remains heavily reliant on manual field inspection: slow, expensive, and geographically constrained. Satellite Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) offers cloud-penetrating, all-weather imaging uniquely suited to rapid post-flood assessment, but existing research evaluates SAR flood detection against academic benchmarks such as IoU and F1-score that do not capture insurance-workflow requirements. We present ALTIS: a five-stage pipeline transforming raw Sentinel-1 GRD and SLC imagery into property-level impact scores within 24-48 hours of flood peak. Unlike prior approaches producing pixel-level maps or binary outputs, ALTIS delivers a ranked, confidence-scored triage list consumable by claims platforms, integrating (i) multi-temporal SAR change detection using dual-polarization VV/VH intensity and InSAR coherence, (ii) physics-informed depth estimation fusing flood extent with high-resolution DEMs, (iii) property-level zonal statistics from parcel footprints, (iv) depth-damage calibration against NFIP claims, and (v) confidence-scored triage ranking. We formally define Insurance-Grade Flood Triage (IGFT) and introduce the Inspection Reduction Rate (IRR) and Triage Efficiency Score (TES). Using Hurricane Harvey (2017) across Harris County, Texas, we present preliminary analysis grounded in validated sub-components suggesting ALTIS is designed to achieve an IRR of approximately 0.52 at 90% recall of high-severity claims, potentially eliminating over half of unnecessary dispatches. By blending SAR flood intelligence with the realities of claims management, ALTIS establishes a methodological baseline for translating earth observation research into measurable insurance outcomes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了ALTIS系统，可在洪灾后24-48小时内利用卫星雷达数据对房产受灾程度进行评分，帮助保险业高效应对灾害。该方法为保险业量身打造，显著提升了查勘效率。
AI.motivation: 目前洪灾后的保险查勘主要依赖人工实地勘察，速度慢、成本高、覆盖有限。尽管合成孔径雷达（SAR）在洪灾检测上具有优势，但现有方法往往只关注学术指标，与保险行业实际需求脱节。作者希望开发一种能够直接服务于保险理赔流程的自动化评估工具。
AI.method: 提出了五阶段ALTIS流程，利用Sentinel-1卫星多时相SAR数据，结合双极化强度和干涉相干性，开展洪水变化检测和基于物理信息的深度估算。然后，将洪水深度与高分辨率地形数据融合，在房产级别提取洪水统计特征，并与历史理赔数据进行损失标定，最终生成带有置信度的分级查勘列表，便于快速理赔决策。
AI.result: 在2017年哈维飓风案例中，ALTIS系统的子模块经过验证分析显示，可在高召回率（90%）下，实现约0.52的查勘减少率，即有望减少一半以上不必要的实地查勘。
AI.conclusion: ALTIS为将遥感洪灾数据转化为保险理赔可用成果提供了标准化方法，通过引入保险级洪灾查勘（IGFT）及相关评估指标，实现遥感信息与实际理赔工作的有效对接，推动保险业自动化和智能化进程。

title: Can LLMs Model Incorrect Student Reasoning? A Case Study on Distractor Generation
summary: Modeling plausible student misconceptions is critical for AI in education. In this work, we examine how large language models (LLMs) reason about misconceptions when generating multiple-choice distractors, a task that requires modeling incorrect yet plausible answers by coordinating solution knowledge, simulating student misconceptions, and evaluating plausibility. We introduce a taxonomy for analyzing the strategies used by state-of-the-art LLMs, examining their reasoning procedures and comparing them to established best practices in the learning sciences. Our structured analysis reveals a surprising alignment between their processes and best practices: the models typically solve the problem correctly first, then articulate and simulate multiple potential misconceptions, and finally select a set of distractors. An analysis of failure modes reveals that errors arise primarily from failures in recovering the correct solution and selecting among response candidates, rather than simulating errors or structuring the process. Consistent with these results, we find that providing the correct solution in the prompt improves alignment with human-authored distractors by 8%, highlighting the critical role of anchoring to the correct solution when generating plausible incorrect student reasoning. Overall, our analysis offers a structured and interpretable lens into LLMs' ability to model incorrect student reasoning and produce high-quality distractors.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成多项选择题干扰项时，模拟学生错误认知（misconceptions）的能力，并提出了一套分析其策略的分类法。结果显示，LLM模拟学生错误推理的流程与学习科学的最佳实践高度一致，且提供正确答案能提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 生成具有迷惑性的干扰项对于教育领域AI十分重要，因为这些干扰项需要模拟学生可能的认知错误。但我们目前还不清楚LLMs在执行这一任务时的推理流程与人类最佳实践的匹配程度，以及常见失败的原因。
AI.method: 作者提出一种分类体系，对现有最先进LLMs在生成干扰项时的推理过程进行剖析，包括其如何协调知识、模拟学生错误并评估答案的合理性，还分析了模型出现错误的主要模式。
AI.result: 分析发现，LLMs一般先正确解决问题，再模拟和表达多种学生可能的错误，最后从中挑选干扰项。大部分错误并非源于模拟错误或推理流程本身，而是出在正确解答的检索与选项筛选阶段。此外，在提示中直接给出正确答案，可以使模型生成的干扰项与人类更为一致，提升8%。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在模拟学生错误认知与生成高质量干扰项的推理流程，与教育领域人工最佳实践高度吻合，且锚定正确答案对结果质量至关重要。这一结构化分析为理解与提升LLMs在教育场景中的应用提供了新视角。

title: NavThinker: Action-Conditioned World Models for Coupled Prediction and Planning in Social Navigation
summary: Social navigation requires robots to act safely in dynamic human environments. Effective behavior demands thinking ahead: reasoning about how the scene and pedestrians evolve under different robot actions rather than reacting to current observations alone. This creates a coupled prediction-planning challenge, where robot actions and human motion mutually influence each other. To address this challenge, we propose NavThinker, a future-aware framework that couples an action-conditioned world model with on-policy reinforcement learning. The world model operates in the Depth Anything V2 patch feature space and performs autoregressive prediction of future scene geometry and human motion; multi-head decoders then produce future depth maps and human trajectories, yielding a future-aware state aligned with traversability and interaction risk. Crucially, we train the policy with DD-PPO while injecting world-model think-ahead signals via: (i) action-conditioned future features fused into the current observation embedding and (ii) social reward shaping from predicted human trajectories. Experiments on single- and multi-robot Social-HM3D show state-of-the-art navigation success, with zero-shot transfer to Social-MP3D and real-world deployment on a Unitree Go2, validating generalization and practical applicability. Webpage: https://github.com/hutslib/NavThinker.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为NavThinker的未来感知社交导航框架，通过在视觉特征空间下进行场景和行人运动的前瞻预测，结合强化学习，实现机器人在动态人类环境中的安全高效导航。
AI.motivation: 机器人在复杂的动态人类环境中导航时需要考虑与人的交互及场景未来变化，单靠对当前观察的反应式方法难以保证安全和效率。因此，急需能预测和推理未来场景与人类行为变化的导航方法。
AI.method: NavThinker框架结合了动作条件的世界模型与强化学习。该模型在Depth Anything V2的特征空间中，自回归地预测未来场景几何和行人运动，通过多头解码器生成未来深度图和人类轨迹。其强化学习策略采用DD-PPO训练，并结合两种前瞻信号：一是将动作条件下的未来特征融合进当前观测嵌入，二是基于预测行人轨迹的社会奖励塑造。
AI.result: NavThinker在Social-HM3D单/多机器人场景中取得了最前沿的导航成功率，并实现了零样本迁移到Social-MP3D及Unitree Go2机器人实地部署，验证了框架的泛化与实际应用能力。
AI.conclusion: NavThinker展现了通过耦合世界模型预测和强化学习实现机器人对未来场景与交互风险的有效感知和规避能力，为社交导航领域提供了强有力的解决方案，具备良好的泛化和现实部署价值。

title: Efficient Semi-Automated Material Microstructure Analysis Using Deep Learning: A Case Study in Additive Manufacturing
summary: Image segmentation is fundamental to microstructural analysis for defect identification and structure-property correlation, yet remains challenging due to pronounced heterogeneity in materials images arising from varied processing and testing conditions. Conventional image processing techniques often fail to capture such complex features rendering them ineffective for large-scale analysis. Even deep learning approaches struggle to generalize across heterogeneous datasets due to scarcity of high-quality labeled data. Consequently, segmentation workflows often rely on manual expert-driven annotations which are labor intensive and difficult to scale. Using an additive manufacturing (AM) dataset as a case study, we present a semi-automated active learning based segmentation pipeline that integrates a U-Net based convolutional neural network with an interactive user annotation and correction interface and a representative core-set image selection strategy. The active learning workflow iteratively updates the model by incorporating user corrected segmentations into the training pool while the core-set strategy identifies representative images for annotation. Three subset selection strategies, manual selection, uncertainty driven sampling and proposed maximin Latin hypercube sampling from embeddings (SMILE) method were evaluated over six refinement rounds. The SMILE strategy consistently outperformed other approaches, improving the macro F1 score from 0.74 to 0.93 while reducing manual annotation time by about 65 percent. The segmented defect regions were further analyzed using a coupled classification model to categorize defects based on microstructural characteristics and map them to corresponding AM process parameters. The proposed framework reduces labeling effort while maintaining scalability and robustness and is broadly applicable to image based analysis across diverse materials systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种集成主动学习与用户交互的半自动图像分割流程，并在增材制造数据集上验证，有效提升分割性能并减少人工标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 材料显微图像结构高度异质，传统和现有深度学习分割难以泛化，依赖人工标注效率低，难以扩展，因此需开发高效的自动/半自动分割方案。
AI.method: 提出基于U-Net的卷积神经网络，配合用户交互纠正及核心集选择机制的主动学习框架。核心集用手动选择、不确定性采样及SMILE (maximin Latin hypercube sampling)三种策略评估。每轮迭代将用户修正标注加入训练集。分割缺陷区域后，进一步使用分类模型对缺陷类型进行分析，并与工艺参数关联。
AI.result: SMILE核心集选择法在六轮迭代中表现最佳，F1值由0.74提升到0.93，人工标注时间减少约65%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了分割效果，显著降低了人工标注负担，具备良好的扩展性与鲁棒性，适用于不同材料体系的显微图像分析。

title: Code-A1: Adversarial Evolving of Code LLM and Test LLM via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning for code generation relies on verifiable rewards from unit test pass rates. Yet high-quality test suites are scarce, existing datasets offer limited coverage, and static rewards fail to adapt as models improve. Recent self-play methods unify code and test generation in a single model, but face a inherent dilemma: white-box access leads to self-collusion where the model produces trivial tests for easy rewards, yet black-box restriction yields generic tests that miss implementation-specific bugs. We introduce Code-A1, an adversarial co-evolution framework that jointly optimizes a Code LLM and a Test LLM with opposing objectives. The Code LLM is rewarded for passing more tests, while the Test LLM is rewarded for exposing more defects. This architectural separation eliminates self-collusion risks and safely enables white-box test generation, where the Test LLM can inspect candidate code to craft targeted adversarial tests. We further introduce a Mistake Book mechanism for experience replay and a composite reward balancing test validity with adversarial difficulty. Experiments on Qwen2.5-Coder models demonstrate that Code-A1 achieves code generation performance matching or exceeding models trained on human-annotated tests, while significantly improving test generation capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Code-A1框架，通过对抗共进化方法同时优化代码生成模型和测试生成模型，显著提升了代码与测试的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的代码生成强化学习依赖于高质量的测试套件作为奖励信号，但测试集不足且静态奖励无法适应模型提升，同时自博弈方法面临自串通与泛化测试不足的两难。
AI.method: 本文将代码LLM与测试LLM分离，采用对抗目标分别优化：代码LLM以通过更多测试为奖励，测试LLM以发现更多缺陷为目标。测试LLM可白盒访问代码，生成针对性强的对抗测试。引入Mistake Book机制进行经验回放，并设计综合奖励函数，平衡测试有效性与对抗难度。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Coder等模型上的实验显示，Code-A1在代码生成方面达到甚至超过基于人工标注测试训练的模型，并大幅提升了测试生成能力。
AI.conclusion: Code-A1架构通过对抗共进化、安全的白盒评测及经验回放机制，有效消除自串通风险，提升代码生成和测试生成整体质量。

title: End-to-End Dexterous Grasp Learning from Single-View Point Clouds via a Multi-Object Scene Dataset
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering (T-ASE)
summary: Dexterous grasping in multi-object scene constitutes a fundamental challenge in robotic manipulation. Current mainstream grasping datasets predominantly focus on single-object scenarios and predefined grasp configurations, often neglecting environmental interference and the modeling of dexterous pre-grasp gesture, thereby limiting their generalizability in real-world applications. To address this, we propose DGS-Net, an end-to-end grasp prediction network capable of learning dense grasp configurations from single-view point clouds in multi-object scene. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage grasp data generation strategy that progresses from dense single-object grasp synthesis to dense scene-level grasp generation. Our dataset comprises 307 objects, 240 multi-object scenes, and over 350k validated grasps. By explicitly modeling grasp offsets and pre-grasp configurations, the dataset provides more robust and accurate supervision for dexterous grasp learning. Experimental results show that DGS-Net achieves grasp success rates of 88.63\% in simulation and 78.98\% on a real robotic platform, while exhibiting lower penetration with a mean penetration depth of 0.375 mm and penetration volume of 559.45 mm^3, outperforming existing methods and demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization capability. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/4taotao8/DGS-Net.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DGS-Net，一个能在多物体场景中基于单视点云预测稠密抓取的算法，并发布了配套大规模抓取数据集，实验效果优异。
AI.motivation: 现有主流抓取数据集多聚焦于单物体与预设抓取方式，缺乏对复杂多物体场景与灵巧抓取手势的刻画，降低了实际应用的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出端到端的DGS-Net网络，可从单视点云中预测多物体场景下的稠密抓取，并设计了两阶段抓取数据生成策略：先对单物体进行抓取合成，再扩展到场景级抓取。数据集明确建模了抓取偏移和预抓取配置。
AI.result: 构建了包含307类物体、240个多物体场景、35万抓取的稠密数据集。DGS-Net在仿真抓取成功率为88.63%，真实机器人平台为78.98%，穿透深度和体积优于现有方法，表现出更强的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DGS-Net及其数据集为多物体场景中的灵巧抓取学习提供了更强的支持，明显提升了抓取性能，并验证了实际部署能力。

title: MOGeo: Beyond One-to-One Cross-View Object Geo-localization
summary: Cross-View Object Geo-Localization (CVOGL) aims to locate an object of interest in a query image within a corresponding satellite image. Existing methods typically assume that the query image contains only a single object, which does not align with the complex, multi-object geo-localization requirements in real-world applications, making them unsuitable for practical scenarios. To bridge the gap between the realistic setting and existing task, we propose a new task, called Cross-View Multi-Object Geo-Localization (CVMOGL). To advance the CVMOGL task, we first construct a benchmark, CMLocation, which includes two datasets: CMLocation-V1 and CMLocation-V2. Furthermore, we propose a novel cross-view multi-object geo-localization method, MOGeo, and benchmark it against existing state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments are conducted under various application scenarios to validate the effectiveness of our method. The results demonstrate that cross-view object geo-localization in the more realistic setting remains a challenging problem, encouraging further research in this area.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了跨视角多目标地理定位（CVMOGL）新任务，搭建了相应基准数据集，并提出新方法MOGeo，对比现有方法验证其有效性。结果显示多目标场景下的地理定位仍具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法假设每个查询图像只包含一个目标，但现实场景中常常为多目标，现有方法难以满足实际需求，因此需提出支持多目标的新方法和任务。
AI.method: 构建了包含多目标的新基准数据集CMLocation（包含CMLocation-V1和V2）；创新性提出了多目标跨视角地理定位算法MOGeo，并与当前主流方法做了系统性对比实验验证。
AI.result: 大规模实验表明，MOGeo在现实应用场景下优于或接近现有方法，但整体来看，多目标跨视角地理定位仍然具有高度挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的任务和数据集有效推动了领域发展，所提方法虽有进展，但多目标地理定位问题仍需进一步研究。

title: Mechanistic Origin of Moral Indifference in Language Models
summary: Existing behavioral alignment techniques for Large Language Models (LLMs) often neglect the discrepancy between surface compliance and internal unaligned representations, leaving LLMs vulnerable to long-tail risks. More crucially, we posit that LLMs possess an inherent state of moral indifference due to compressing distinct moral concepts into uniform probability distributions. We verify and remedy this indifference in LLMs' latent representations, utilizing 251k moral vectors constructed upon Prototype Theory and the Social-Chemistry-101 dataset. Firstly, our analysis across 23 models reveals that current LLMs fail to represent the distinction between opposed moral categories and fine-grained typicality gradients within these categories; notably, neither model scaling, architecture, nor explicit alignment reshapes this indifference. We then employ Sparse Autoencoders on Qwen3-8B, isolate mono-semantic moral features, and targetedly reconstruct their topological relationships to align with ground-truth moral vectors. This representational alignment naturally improves moral reasoning and granularity, achieving a 75% pairwise win-rate on the independent adversarial Flames benchmark. Finally, we elaborate on the remedial nature of current intervention methods from an experientialist philosophy, arguing that endogenously aligned AI might require a transformation from post-hoc corrections to proactive cultivation.

AI.tldr: 本文指出大型语言模型（LLM）行为对齐技术未能解决模型内部对道德概念的冷漠（moral indifference），提出用原型理论和Social-Chemistry-101数据集构建的25.1万条道德向量，分析模型表征并通过稀疏自编码器重构道德特征的拓扑关系，实现表征对齐并提升道德推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM常仅关注模型输出的表面对齐，忽视了内部表征的偏差，存在表面符合但潜在不对齐的问题，容易带来道德长尾风险。作者认为LLM因道德表示被压缩，天然缺乏道德区分能力，因此迫切需要提升其对道德概念的表征力与区分力。
AI.method: 1）基于原型理论和Social-Chemistry-101构建25.1万道德向量。2）对23个LLM分析其在相反道德范畴及细粒度道德典型性分布上的表征力，发现无论规模、架构还是传统对齐方法都不能有效改善道德冷漠。3）对Qwen3-8B应用稀疏自编码器，分离出单语义道德特征，重塑特征之间的拓扑关系，使表征与真实道德向量一致。
AI.result: 经过表征对齐处理后的LLM在独立道德推理对抗测试集（Flames benchmark）上实现了75%的配对胜率，显著提升了道德推理的准确性及粒度表现。
AI.conclusion: 仅做输出对齐无法根治LLM的道德冷漠，只有端到端优化模型内在道德表征及其拓扑结构才能提升AI的道德推理能力。论文主张LMM对齐应从事后修正转向主动培养内生价值表示。

title: MA-VLCM: A Vision Language Critic Model for Value Estimation of Policies in Multi-Agent Team Settings
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) commonly relies on a centralized critic to estimate the value function. However, learning such a critic from scratch is highly sample-inefficient and often lacks generalization across environments. At the same time, large vision-language-action models (VLAs) trained on internet-scale data exhibit strong multimodal reasoning and zero-shot generalization capabilities, yet directly deploying them for robotic execution remains computationally prohibitive, particularly in heterogeneous multi-robot systems with diverse embodiments and resource constraints. To address these challenges, we propose Multi-Agent Vision-Language-Critic Models (MA-VLCM), a framework that replaces the learned centralized critic in MARL with a pretrained vision-language model fine-tuned to evaluate multi-agent behavior. MA-VLCM acts as a centralized critic conditioned on natural language task descriptions, visual trajectory observations, and structured multi-agent state information. By eliminating critic learning during policy optimization, our approach significantly improves sample efficiency while producing compact execution policies suitable for deployment on resource-constrained robots. Results show good zero-shot return estimation on models with differing VLM backbones on in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios in multi-agent team settings

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体领域的新方法，使用预训练的大型视觉-语言模型（VLM）作为中心化评论者，替代传统强化学习（MARL）中的从零学起的评论者，提高了训练效率和泛化能力，并在多机器人系统中能高效运行。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体强化学习依靠从零训练的中心评论者来估计价值函数，这样的方法样本效率低、泛化能力差。同时，虽然大型视觉-语言-动作模型在泛化性和推理能力方面强大，但直接部署在资源受限、异构多机器人系统中计算成本太高。因此，亟需一种高效、通用、低消耗的新型评论者方案。
AI.method: 作者提出MA-VLCM框架，用预训练视觉-语言模型作为中心化评论者，结合自然语言任务描述、视觉轨迹和多智能体状态，进行调优以适配多智能体行为评价。这样无需在策略优化阶段训练评论者，直接利用大模型的能力提升效率和泛化性，同时压缩执行策略以便部署在弱算力机器人上。
AI.result: MA-VLCM能在各种VLM模型下，不论是在分布内还是分布外的多智能体任务中，都能实现良好的零样本回报估计，提升样本效率，并生成适合落地的紧凑执行策略。
AI.conclusion: 用预训练视觉-语言模型取代传统MARL中的评论者，可以极大提升多智能体系统中的样本利用率与泛化能力，使强化学习更快迁移到现实、多样、低资源机器人团队。

title: VFM-Loc: Zero-Shot Cross-View Geo-Localization via Aligning Discriminative Visual Hierarchies
summary: Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL) in remote sensing aims to locate a drone-view query by matching it to geo-tagged satellite images. Although supervised methods have achieved strong results on closeset benchmarks, they often fail to generalize to unconstrained, real-world scenarios due to severe viewpoint differences and dataset bias. To overcome these limitations, we present VFM-Loc, a training-free framework for zero-shot CVGL that leverages the generalizable visual representations from vision foundational models (VFMs). VFM-Loc identifies and matches discriminative visual clues across different viewpoints through a progressive alignment strategy. First, we design a hierarchical clue extraction mechanism using Generalized Mean pooling and Scale-Weighted RMAC to preserve distinctive visual clues across scales while maintaining hierarchical confidence. Second, we introduce a statistical manifold alignment pipeline based on domain-wise PCA and Orthogonal Procrustes analysis, linearly aligning heterogeneous feature distributions in a shared metric space. Experiments demonstrate that VFM-Loc exhibits strong zero-shot accuracy on standard benchmarks and surpasses supervised methods by over 20% in Recall@1 on the challenging LO-UCV dataset with large oblique angles. This work highlights that principled alignment of pre-trained features can effectively bridge the cross-view gap, establishing a robust and training-free paradigm for real-world CVGL. The relevant code is made available at: https://github.com/DingLei14/VFM-Loc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的跨视角地理定位（CVGL）新方法VFM-Loc，在多项基准测试中表现优异，尤其在复杂场景下显著超越以往监督方法。
AI.motivation: 目前CVGL方法虽然在封闭数据集上效果较好，但难以适应真实世界中不同视角和数据分布，导致泛化性差，因此亟需一种无需大量标注和训练的新方案以提升实际应用的鲁棒性和广泛性。
AI.method: VFM-Loc基于视觉基础模型，通过层次化线索提取（利用广义均值池化和加权RMAC保持多尺度关键信息）以及统计流形对齐（基于PCA和正交Procrustes分析）实现特征空间的自适应对齐，无需训练即可完成跨视角图像的精确匹配。
AI.result: 在标准CVGL数据集上，VFM-Loc展现强大的零样本准确率，特别是在视角差异极大的LO-UCV数据集上Recall@1性能较最佳的监督方法高出20%以上。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明通过合理对齐预训练视觉特征可突破跨视角匹配难题，提出了高效、稳健且无需训练参数的新范式，对实际CVGL应用具有重要意义。

title: Mixture-of-Depths Attention
summary: Scaling depth is a key driver for large language models (LLMs). Yet, as LLMs become deeper, they often suffer from signal degradation: informative features formed in shallow layers are gradually diluted by repeated residual updates, making them harder to recover in deeper layers. We introduce mixture-of-depths attention (MoDA), a mechanism that allows each attention head to attend to sequence KV pairs at the current layer and depth KV pairs from preceding layers. We further describe a hardware-efficient algorithm for MoDA that resolves non-contiguous memory-access patterns, achieving 97.3% of FlashAttention-2's efficiency at a sequence length of 64K. Experiments on 1.5B-parameter models demonstrate that MoDA consistently outperforms strong baselines. Notably, it improves average perplexity by 0.2 across 10 validation benchmarks and increases average performance by 2.11% on 10 downstream tasks, with a negligible 3.7% FLOPs computational overhead. We also find that combining MoDA with post-norm yields better performance than using it with pre-norm. These results suggest that MoDA is a promising primitive for depth scaling. Code is released at https://github.com/hustvl/MoDA .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的注意力机制MoDA（混合深度注意力），通过使每个注意力头能够利用当前层及前层的信息，有效缓解了大模型加深后信号退化问题，并提升了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型（LLM）深度的增加，残差更新导致浅层形成的有用特征在深层中被稀释，难以恢复，影响模型训练效率和效果。作者希望解决深度扩展带来的信号退化问题，提高深层模型的信息保留能力和最终表现。
AI.method: 作者提出MoDA机制，使每个注意力头可以同时关注当前层和之前多层的KV对，并设计了硬件高效的MoDA实现算法，可达到FlashAttention-2 97.3%的效率。同时，将MoDA与预层归一化和后层归一化方式结合进行实验对比。
AI.result: 在1.5B参数规模模型上的实验表明MoDA始终优于强基线，10个基准集上的平均困惑度降低0.2，在10个下游任务上性能提升2.11%，仅增加3.7%算力开销。后归一化方式结合MoDA优于前归一化。
AI.conclusion: MoDA能够有效缓解深度扩展引起的特征信号退化，提升大模型性能，是未来大语言模型扩展深度的重要结构原语。

title: Zero-Shot Generalization from Motion Demonstrations to New Tasks
summary: Learning motion policies from expert demonstrations is an essential paradigm in modern robotics. While end-to-end models aim for broad generalization, they require large datasets and computationally heavy inference. Conversely, learning dynamical systems (DS) provides fast, reactive, and provably stable control from very few demonstrations. However, existing DS learning methods typically model isolated tasks and struggle to reuse demonstrations for novel behaviors. In this work, we formalize the problem of combining isolated demonstrations within a shared workspace to enable generalization to unseen tasks. The Gaussian Graph is introduced, which reinterprets spatial components of learned motion primitives as discrete vertices with connections to one another. This formulation allows us to bridge continuous control with discrete graph search. We propose two frameworks leveraging this graph: Stitching, for constructing time-invariant DSs, and Chaining, giving a sequence-based DS for complex motions while retaining convergence guarantees. Simulations and real-robot experiments show that these methods successfully generalize to new tasks where baseline methods fail.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过高斯图（Gaussian Graph）结合分离演示实现运动策略泛化的方法，能够提升DS方法在新任务中的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有DS学习方法难以将孤立任务的演示整合并泛化到新任务中，因此需要一种更高效通用的运动策略学习方式。
AI.method: 作者提出用高斯图，将演示学习得到的空间运动基元用离散顶点和连接建模，并提出Stitching与Chaining两种利用该图的框架，实现运动控制策略间的高效组合与切换。
AI.result: 通过仿真和真实机器人实验表明，新方法能在基线方法失败的任务上成功泛化并完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 高斯图及衍生的两个框架有效提升了DS方法的泛化能力，为通过少量演示实现复杂运动组合提供了新思路。

title: Learning through Creation: A Hash-Free Framework for On-the-Fly Category Discovery
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Findings. Code available at https://github.com/brandinzhang/LTC
summary: On-the-Fly Category Discovery (OCD) aims to recognize known classes while simultaneously discovering emerging novel categories during inference, using supervision only from known classes during offline training. Existing approaches rely either on fixed label supervision or on diffusion-based augmentations to enhance the backbone, yet none of them explicitly train the model to perform the discovery task required at test time. It is fundamentally unreasonable to expect a model optimized on limited labeled data to carry out a qualitatively different discovery objective during inference. This mismatch creates a clear optimization misalignment between the offline learning stage and the online discovery stage. In addition, prior methods often depend on hash-based encodings or severe feature compression, which further limits representational capacity. To address these issues, we propose Learning through Creation (LTC), a fully feature-based and hash-free framework that injects novel-category awareness directly into offline learning. At its core is a lightweight, online pseudo-unknown generator driven by kernel-energy minimization and entropy maximization (MKEE). Unlike previous methods that generate synthetic samples once before training, our generator evolves jointly with the model dynamics and synthesizes pseudo-novel instances on the fly at negligible cost. These samples are incorporated through a dual max-margin objective with adaptive thresholding, strengthening the model's ability to delineate and detect unknown regions through explicit creation. Extensive experiments across seven benchmarks show that LTC consistently outperforms prior work, achieving improvements ranging from 1.5 percent to 13.1 percent in all-class accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/brandinzhang/LTC

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的范畴发现方法LTC，通过在训练阶段主动创造伪新类别样本，提高模型在线上识别新类别的能力，并在七个基准测试上取得了1.5%-13.1%的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有OCD方法在训练阶段仅用已知类别监督，但在测试时被要求发现新类别，训练目标与测试任务不匹配，导致模型泛化到新类别的能力受限。同时，现有方法普遍使用哈希或特征压缩，进一步限制了表现力。作者提出LTC，解决这些优化不对齐与能力受损问题。
AI.method: LTC方法采用完全基于特征、无哈希的框架，并引入了轻量级、在线的伪未知样本生成器。该生成器利用核能量最小化和熵最大化联合驱动，与模型动态协同进化，并在训练过程中持续创造新的伪新类别样本。通过自适应阈值的双最大间隔目标，将这些样本纳入优化，显式增强模型辨别未知类别的能力。
AI.result: 在七个公开基准数据集上，LTC方法在总类别识别准确率上比现有方法最高提升了13.1%，最小提升1.5%，均显著优于同类最优基线。
AI.conclusion: LTC通过训练期主动创造新类别实例，显著提升了OCD任务下的泛化与新类别发现能力，不依赖哈希/特征压缩，具备较好的实用性。代码已开源，促进后续研究。

title: RoCo Challenge at AAAI 2026: Benchmarking Robotic Collaborative Manipulation for Assembly Towards Industrial Automation
summary: Embodied Artificial Intelligence (EAI) is rapidly developing, gradually subverting previous autonomous systems' paradigms from isolated perception to integrated, continuous action. This transition is highly significant for industrial robotic manipulation, promising to free human workers from repetitive, dangerous daily labor. To benchmark and advance this capability, we introduce the Robotic Collaborative Assembly Assistance (RoCo) Challenge with a dataset towards simulation and real-world assembly manipulation. Set against the backdrop of human-centered manufacturing, this challenge focuses on a high-precision planetary gearbox assembly task, a demanding yet highly representative operation in modern industry. Built upon a self-developed data collection, training, and evaluation system in Isaac Sim, and utilizing a dual-arm robot for real-world deployment, the challenge operates in two phases. The Simulation Round defines fine-grained task phases for step-wise scoring to handle the long-horizon nature of the assembly. The Real-World Round mirrors this evaluation with physical gearbox components and high-quality teleoperated datasets. The core tasks require assembling an epicyclic gearbox from scratch, including mounting three planet gears, a sun gear, and a ring gear. Attracting over 60 teams and 170+ participants from more than 10 countries, the challenge yielded highly effective solutions, most notably ARC-VLA and RoboCola. Results demonstrate that a dual-model framework for long-horizon multi-task learning is highly effective, and the strategic utilization of recovery-from-failure curriculum data is a critical insight for successful deployment. This report outlines the competition setup, evaluation approach, key findings, and future directions for industrial EAI. Our dataset, CAD files, code, and evaluation results can be found at: https://rocochallenge.github.io/RoCo2026/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoCo挑战赛，推动工业中机器人协作装配智能的发展，针对复杂的行星齿轮箱组装任务，开发数据集和评估体系以促进仿真与实际应用。
AI.motivation: 现有自主系统在工业机器人操作领域仍受限于感知与执行的割裂，缺乏流畅连续行动能力。释放人类工人免于重复、危险劳动需要更智能一体化的解决方案，因此亟需通过典型高精度装配任务推动检验和提升机器人本体AI水平。
AI.method: 作者提出了RoCo挑战，包含仿真与真实环境两轮，聚焦于行星齿轮箱的复杂组装。采用自主开发的数据采集、训练和评测系统（基于Isaac Sim仿真及双臂机器人实际操作）。任务细分为多个阶段、分步评分，同时结合高质量遥操作数据和恢复失败的训练策略。
AI.result: 大赛吸引了全球60余队参加，最佳方案如ARC-VLA与RoboCola体现了长时序多任务学习的双模型框架极具优势，同时展示恢复失败经验数据对真实部署至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛有效推动了工业领域机器人装配智能的发展，验证了新方法的优越性，并为后续研究提供了丰富数据资源和研究方向。

title: Geo-ID: Test-Time Geometric Consensus for Cross-View Consistent Intrinsics
summary: Intrinsic image decomposition aims to estimate physically based rendering (PBR) parameters such as albedo, roughness, and metallicity from images. While recent methods achieve strong single-view predictions, applying them independently to multiple views of the same scene often yields inconsistent estimates, limiting their use in downstream applications such as editable neural scenes and 3D reconstruction. Video-based models can improve cross-frame consistency but require dense, ordered sequences and substantial compute, limiting their applicability to sparse, unordered image collections. We propose Geo-ID, a novel test-time framework that repurposes pretrained single-view intrinsic predictors to produce cross-view consistent decompositions by coupling independent per-view predictions through sparse geometric correspondences that form uncertainty-aware consensus targets. Geo-ID is model-agnostic, requires no retraining or inverse rendering, and applies directly to off-the-shelf intrinsic predictors. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and real-world scenes demonstrate substantial improvements in cross-view intrinsic consistency as the number of views increases, while maintaining comparable single-view decomposition performance. We further show that the resulting consistent intrinsics enable coherent appearance editing and relighting in downstream neural scene representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Geo-ID框架，将单张图像固有属性预测器进行跨视角一致性优化，实现从多幅不同视角图片获得一致的固有图像分解结果，同时无需重新训练或反向渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有的固有图像分解方法虽然对单张图片表现良好，但多视角下一致性差，影响3D重建和可编辑神经场等应用。视频方法虽然提升一致性，但依赖密集和有序帧列，无法应用于稀疏、无序图片集合。
AI.method: 提出Geo-ID框架。在测试阶段，通过稀疏几何对应关系，将每个视角的预测与其他视角进行耦合，并利用不确定性感知的共识目标进行优化。该方法无需对原有模型重新训练，对现有的固有图像预测器通用（可直接应用）。
AI.result: 在合成基准和真实场景中，Geo-ID显著提升不同视角下的固有参数一致性，且随着视角数量增加一致性持续提升，同时维持了原始单视角的分解性能。
AI.conclusion: Geo-ID为多视角下固有图像分解带来一致性提升，同时兼容现有预测器且无需额外训练，进一步提升了神经场景编辑和重光照等下游任务的效果。

title: On the Derivation of Tightly-Coupled LiDAR-Inertial Odometry with VoxelMap
summary: This note presents a concise mathematical formulation of tightly-coupled LiDAR-Inertial Odometry within an iterated error-state Kalman filter framework using a VoxelMap representation. Rather than proposing a new algorithm, it provides a clear and self-contained derivation that unifies the geometric modeling and probabilistic state estimation through consistent notation and explicit formulations. The document is intended to serve both as a technical reference and as an accessible entry point for a foundational understanding of the system architecture and estimation principles.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于迭代误差状态卡尔曼滤波器（Iterated Error-State Kalman Filter, IESKF）框架下，结合了LiDAR和惯性测量的里程计（Odometry）系统进行了简明的数学推导，并采用VoxelMap进行环境表达。其主要贡献是通过一致的记号和明确的公式，将几何建模与概率状态估计统一起来。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-IMU紧耦合方法理论推导复杂、记号不统一，对初学者入门和从业者参考有一定门槛，缺乏清晰、自洽的数学推导和系统性理解。本工作旨在填补该空白。
AI.method: 采用IESKF作为滤波框架，在State和Measurement层面基于VoxelMap对环境进行表达和建模，统一描述了系统建模和状态估计过程，并通过清晰的数学公式进行推导说明。强调了严格的记号体系和公式表述，兼顾技术可参考性和入门可读性。
AI.result: 得到了一套自成体系、清晰明了的LiDAR-IMU紧耦合系统推导公式。明确了几何建模和状态估计的统一流程，并通过一致的符号与明确定义便于读者快速理解和实现参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文为LiDAR-IMU紧耦合惯导视觉里程计的理论理解和实用开发提供了清晰的数学基础和参考体系，适合相关领域初学者和开发者作为技术手册和学习入门材料。

title: Zero-Forgetting CISS via Dual-Phase Cognitive Cascades
summary: Continual semantic segmentation (CSS) is a cornerstone task in computer vision that enables a large number of downstream applications, but faces the catastrophic forgetting challenge.
