In conventional class-incremental semantic segmentation (CISS) frameworks using Softmax-based classification heads, catastrophic forgetting originates from Catastrophic forgetting and task affiliation probability. We formulate these problems and provide a theoretical analysis to more deeply understand the limitations in existing CISS methods, particularly Strict Parameter Isolation (SPI). To address these challenges, we follow a dual-phase intuition from human annotators, and introduce Cognitive Cascade Segmentation (CogCaS), a novel dual-phase cascade formulation for CSS tasks in the CISS setting. By decoupling the task into class-existence detection and class-specific segmentation, CogCaS enables more effective continual learning, preserving previously learned knowledge while incorporating new classes. Using two benchmark datasets PASCAL VOC 2012 and ADE20K, we have shown significant improvements in a variety of challenging scenarios, particularly those with long sequence of incremental tasks, when compared to exsiting state-of-the-art methods. Our code will be made publicly available upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的持续语义分割方法CogCaS，有效缓解了增量学习中的遗忘问题，并在主流数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 持续语义分割（CSS）在计算机视觉中的重要作用日益凸显，但增量学习中模型往往会遗忘旧知识（灾难性遗忘）。现有基于Softmax分类头的CISS方法，即便采用严格参数隔离，仍无法解决遗忘和任务归属概率带来的限制。作者希望深入剖析这些问题并提出改进方法。
AI.method: 作者理论分析了当前CISS方法（尤其是严格参数隔离SPI方案）的局限，并借鉴人工标注的“双阶段”直觉，提出CogCaS框架，将学习任务拆分为“类别存在性检测”和“类别特异分割”两个阶段，从而在持续学习中更好地兼顾旧知识和新知识。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和ADE20K两个主流数据集的多个具有挑战性的增量任务场景下，CogCaS展现出显著优于主流SOTA方法的性能提升，尤其是在任务序列较长时表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: CogCaS通过双阶段级联解耦方式，有效缓解了增量分割中的灾难性遗忘、提升了持续学习能力，为持续分割提供了新的理论和实践路径。

title: Optimal control of differentially flat underactuated planar robots in the perspective of oscillation mitigation
summary: Underactuated robots are characterized by a larger number of degrees of freedom than actuators and if they are designed with a specific mass distribution, they can be controlled by means of differential flatness theory. This structural property enables the development of lightweight and cost-effective robotic systems with enhanced dexterity. However, a key challenge lies in managing the passive joints, whose control demands precise and comprehensive dynamic modeling of the system. To simplify dynamic models, particularly for low-speed trajectories, friction is often neglected. While this assumption simplifies analysis and control design, it introduces residual oscillations of the end-effector about the target position. In this paper, the possibility of using optimal control along with differential flatness control is investigated to improve the tracking of the planned trajectories. First, the study was carried out through formal analysis, and then, it was validated by means of numerical simulations. Results highlight that optimal control can be used to plan the flat variables considering different (quadratic) performance indices: control effort, i.e. motor torque, and potential energy of the considered underactuated joint. Moreover, the minimization of potential energy can be used to design motion laws that are robust against variation of the stiffness and damping of the underactuated joint, thus reducing oscillations in the case of stiffness/damping mismatch.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了欠驱动机器人中，通过结合微分平坦性理论与最优控制方法，提升末端执行器轨迹跟踪精度、降低残余振荡的可能性。通过形式化分析与数值仿真验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 欠驱动机器人凭借结构优势（如轻量化和灵活性）在多领域应用广泛，但由于被动关节的控制依赖于复杂的动力学建模，尤其是在忽略摩擦简化建模时，常导致末端轨迹附近产生残余振荡。因此，亟需一种更优的控制方法，解决轨迹跟踪精度与残余振荡问题。
AI.method: 文章结合微分平坦性理论与最优控制方法。首先通过形式化分析，对不同性能指标（如控制能耗、潜能能量）设计平坦变量的轨迹规划；随后利用数值仿真，验证了最优控制对不同参数（刚度、阻尼）变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 仿真结果证明，最优控制能有效优化平坦变量轨迹，平衡控制力矩与被动关节的潜能能量。尤其是最小化潜能能量的方法，对刚度/阻尼匹配误差下的振荡具有良好抑制作用，提高了系统对物理参数变化的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合微分平坦性和最优控制可提升欠驱动机器人轨迹跟踪精度，降低因建模简化带来的残余振荡。通过合理设计性能指标，可以获得对物理参数不确定性具有鲁棒性的运动规律。

title: Step-CoT: Stepwise Visual Chain-of-Thought for Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has advanced medical visual question answering (VQA), yet most existing CoT rationales are free-form and fail to capture the structured reasoning process clinicians actually follow. This work asks: Can traceable, multi-step reasoning supervision improve reasoning accuracy and the interpretability of Medical VQA? To this end, we introduce Step-CoT, a large-scale medical reasoning dataset with expert-curated, structured multi-step CoT aligned to clinical diagnostic workflows, implicitly grounding the model's reasoning in radiographic evidence. Step-CoT comprises more than 10K real clinical cases and 70K VQA pairs organized around diagnostic workflows, providing supervised intermediate steps that guide models to follow valid reasoning trajectories. To effectively learn from Step-CoT, we further introduce a teacher-student framework with a dynamic graph-structured focusing mechanism that prioritizes diagnostically informative steps while filtering out less relevant contexts. Our experiments show that using Step-CoT can improve reasoning accuracy and interpretability. Benchmark: github.com/hahaha111111/Step-CoT. Dataset Card: huggingface.co/datasets/fl-15o/Step-CoT

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Step-CoT医疗推理数据集和配套的模型框架，通过高质量、多步结构化推理监督显著提升了医疗图像问答的推理准确率及可解释性。
AI.motivation: 目前医疗视觉问答（VQA）领域虽然引入了Chain-of-thought（CoT）推理提升模型表现，但大多数CoT理由是自由叙述，未能体现出临床实际进行结构化推理的过程，因而欠缺可追踪性和解释性。
AI.method: 作者构建了Step-CoT数据集，包含1万多个真实临床病例和7万个VQA对，基于诊断流程由专业人士结构化分步标注推理链，并提出教师-学生框架和动态图结构聚焦机制，从而有效学习关键诊断步骤，过滤无关上下文。
AI.result: 实验表明，利用Step-CoT数据集及其方法能够显著提升模型的推理准确率和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、多步的推理监督结合创新的学习机制，有助于实现更准确、可解释的医疗VQA，为医学AI推理的临床落地提供了坚实基础。

title: From Passive Observer to Active Critic: Reinforcement Learning Elicits Process Reasoning for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Accurate process supervision remains a critical challenge for long-horizon robotic manipulation. A primary bottleneck is that current video MLLMs, trained primarily under a Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) paradigm, function as passive "Observers" that recognize ongoing events rather than evaluating the current state relative to the final task goal. In this paper, we introduce PRIMO R1 (Process Reasoning Induced Monitoring), a 7B framework that transforms video MLLMs into active "Critics". We leverage outcome-based Reinforcement Learning to incentivize explicit Chain-of-Thought generation for progress estimation. Furthermore, our architecture constructs a structured temporal input by explicitly anchoring the video sequence between initial and current state images. Supported by the proposed PRIMO Dataset and Benchmark, extensive experiments across diverse in-domain environments and out-of-domain real-world humanoid scenarios demonstrate that PRIMO R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance. Quantitatively, our 7B model achieves a 50% reduction in the mean absolute error of specialized reasoning baselines, demonstrating significant relative accuracy improvements over 72B-scale general MLLMs. Furthermore, PRIMO R1 exhibits strong zero-shot generalization on difficult failure detection tasks. We establish state-of-the-art performance on RoboFail benchmark with 67.0% accuracy, surpassing closed-source models like OpenAI o1 by 6.0%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频多模态大模型PRIMO R1，使其能够主动评估机器人长时操作过程中的任务进展，相比传统模型显著提升了过程监督的精度和通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频多模态大模型（MLLMs）多作为“观察者”，只能被动识别事件，难以评估当前状态距离最终任务目标的进展，这对长时序机器人操作过程监督提出了挑战。
AI.method: 提出PRIMO R1（Process Reasoning Induced Monitoring），基于7B参数的视频MLLM架构。创新方式包括：（1）通过结果驱动的强化学习激发模型生成明确的思维链来估算进展；（2）输入结构上，显式加入初始状态与当前状态图像作为锚定，突出时序变化；（3）配套PRIMO数据集与基准测试体系。
AI.result: 在多种领域内外的实验环境中，PRIMO R1显著优于现有方法：在专用推理基线下，7B模型平均绝对误差降低50%，远优于72B通用MLLMs；在RoboFail基准上零样本条件下达到67.0%准确率，较OpenAI o1闭源模型高6.0%。
AI.conclusion: PRIMO R1不仅在特定任务和通用任务中都获得了最先进性能，还展现出强大的泛化和故障检测能力，为机器人长时序任务过程监督提供了有力工具。

title: Dual-Strategy Improvement of YOLOv11n for Multi-Scale Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
summary: Satellite remote sensing images pose significant challenges for object detection due to their high resolution, complex scenes, and large variations in target scales. To address the insufficient detection accuracy of the YOLOv11n model in remote sensing imagery, this paper proposes two improvement strategies. Method 1: (a) a Large Separable Kernel Attention (LSKA) mechanism is introduced into the backbone network to enhance feature extraction for small objects; (b) a Gold-YOLO structure is incorporated into the neck network to achieve multi-scale feature fusion, thereby improving the detection performance of objects at different scales. Method 2: (a) the Gold-YOLO structure is also integrated into the neck network; (b) a MultiSEAMHead detection head is combined to further strengthen the representation and detection capability for small and multi-scale objects. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed improvements, experiments are conducted on the DOTAv1 dataset. The results show that, while maintaining the lightweight advantage of the model, the proposed methods improve detection accuracy (mAP@0.5) by 1.3% and 1.8%, respectively, compared with the baseline YOLOv11n, demonstrating the effectiveness and practical value of the proposed approaches for object detection in remote sensing images.

AI.tldr: 本文针对YOLOv11n模型在遥感图像上的检测表现较差问题，提出了两种改进策略，通过引入大可分离卷积注意力机制和Gold-YOLO结构等提升小目标及多尺度目标检测能力，实验结果显示新方法在保持轻量化的同时取得了更高的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中目标检测面临高分辨率、复杂场景及目标尺度变化大的挑战，现有轻量级YOLOv11n模型检测精度不佳，存在改进需求。
AI.method: 方法一：在主干网络中引入大可分离卷积注意力（LSKA）机制提升小目标特征提取，同时在颈部网络中加入Gold-YOLO结构实现多尺度特征融合；方法二：同样在颈部网络集成Gold-YOLO结构，并结合MultiSEAMHead检测头进一步增强小目标与多尺度目标的检测能力。
AI.result: 在DOTAv1数据集上实验，改进后的模型在参数量保持较小的情况下，mAP@0.5相较于原始YOLOv11n分别提升了1.3%和1.8%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了YOLOv11n模型在遥感图像目标检测的准确率，兼具轻量化和实用性。

title: Fine-tuning MLLMs Without Forgetting Is Easier Than You Think
summary: The paper demonstrate that simple adjustments of the fine-tuning recipes of multimodal large language models (MLLM) are sufficient to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. On visual question answering, we design a 2x2 experimental framework to assess model performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution image and text inputs. Our results show that appropriate regularization, such as constraining the number of trainable parameters or adopting a low learning rate, effectively prevents forgetting when dealing with out-of-distribution images. However, we uncover a distinct form of forgetting in settings with in-distribution images and out-of-distribution text. We attribute this forgetting as task-specific overfitting and address this issue by introducing a data-hybrid training strategy that combines datasets and tasks. Finally, we demonstrate that this approach naturally extends to continual learning, outperforming existing methods with complex auxiliary mechanisms. In general, our findings challenge the prevailing assumptions by highlighting the inherent robustness of MLLMs and providing practical guidelines for adapting them while preserving their general capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过简单调整多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的微调方式，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘现象，并提出了一种数据混合训练策略解决特定任务过拟合问题，挑战了目前对MLLM韧性的认知。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在微调后常出现灾难性遗忘问题，导致模型在分布外任务上性能骤降。本文希望探索更简明、有效的微调配方，以降低遗忘，并提出应对任务过拟合的新策略。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个2x2实验框架，评估模型在分布内/外图片和文本下的表现。通过实验比较了不同正则化策略(如限制可训练参数，降低学习率)对遗忘的影响，并提出数据混合训练法，结合不同数据集和任务，对抗分布内图片、分布外文本情境下过拟合。
AI.result: 结果显示，适当的正则化有效防止了灾难性遗忘，尤其在应对分布外图片时。对于分布内图片和分布外文本，作者发现为特定任务过拟合的新型遗忘现象，数据混合训练有效提升了泛化能力。此外，该方法可简单拓展至持续性学习任务并优于复杂辅助机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文挑战了MLLM易遗忘的固有观点，证明其在合理微调下具备很强韧性，并为实用微调提供了简明建议，有助于模型能力的长期保留和广泛应用。

title: EAAE: Energy-Aware Autonomous Exploration for UAVs in Unknown 3D Environments
summary: Battery-powered multirotor unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can rapidly map unknown environments, but mission performance is often limited by energy rather than geometry alone. Standard exploration policies that optimise for coverage or time can therefore waste energy through manoeuvre-heavy trajectories. In this paper, we address energy-aware autonomous 3D exploration for multirotor UAVs in initially unknown environments. We propose Energy-Aware Autonomous Exploration (EAAE), a modular frontier-based framework that makes energy an explicit decision variable during frontier selection. EAAE clusters frontiers into view-consistent regions, plans dynamically feasible candidate trajectories to the most informative clusters, and predicts their execution energy using an offline power estimation loop. The next target is then selected by minimising predicted trajectory energy while preserving exploration progress through a dual-layer planning architecture for safe execution. We evaluate EAAE in a full exploration pipeline with a rotor-speed-based power model across simulated 3D environments of increasing complexity. Compared to representative distance-based and information gain-based frontier baselines, EAAE consistently reduces total energy consumption while maintaining competitive exploration time and comparable map quality, providing a practical drop-in energy-aware layer for frontier exploration.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法EAAE，通过将能耗纳入自主多旋翼无人机三维探索决策过程，实现了在保证探索效率的同时有效降低总能耗。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机自主探索方法多以覆盖率或时间为目标，忽略了能量受限这一实际瓶颈，导致能源浪费，降低实用性。因此，急需发展基于能量的自主探索策略。
AI.method: 提出面向能量的自主探索(EAAE)框架。在前沿点选择时将能耗作为显式决策变量。具体做法为：1）将前沿点聚成视角一致区域；2）为最具信息量的区域规划动态可行性候选轨迹；3）基于离线功耗估算预测执行能耗；4）采用双层规划架构选择能耗最优且推进探索的下一个目标，确保执行安全。
AI.result: 在复杂度递增的模拟3D环境全流程验证中，采用基于旋翼转速的功率模型，EAAE与传统基于距离和信息增益的前沿探索基线方法相比，显著降低了总能耗，同时保持了相似的探索时间和地图质量。
AI.conclusion: EAAE可作为前沿探索任务中的能量优化层，能在不影响效率和效果的前提下大幅度降低能耗，具有实际应用价值。

title: SCoCCA: Multi-modal Sparse Concept Decomposition via Canonical Correlation Analysis
summary: Interpreting the internal reasoning of vision-language models is essential for deploying AI in safety-critical domains. Concept-based explainability provides a human-aligned lens by representing a model's behavior through semantically meaningful components. However, existing methods are largely restricted to images and overlook the cross-modal interactions. Text-image embeddings, such as those produced by CLIP, suffer from a modality gap, where visual and textual features follow distinct distributions, limiting interpretability. Canonical Correlation Analysis (CCA) offers a principled way to align features from different distributions, but has not been leveraged for multi-modal concept-level analysis. We show that the objectives of CCA and InfoNCE are closely related, such that optimizing CCA implicitly optimizes InfoNCE, providing a simple, training-free mechanism to enhance cross-modal alignment without affecting the pre-trained InfoNCE objective. Motivated by this observation, we couple concept-based explainability with CCA, introducing Concept CCA (CoCCA), a framework that aligns cross-modal embeddings while enabling interpretable concept decomposition. We further extend it and propose Sparse Concept CCA (SCoCCA), which enforces sparsity to produce more disentangled and discriminative concepts, facilitating improved activation, ablation, and semantic manipulation. Our approach generalizes concept-based explanations to multi-modal embeddings and achieves state-of-the-art performance in concept discovery, evidenced by reconstruction and manipulation tasks such as concept ablation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于CCA的新方法用于提升视觉-语言模型的可解释性，并实现了跨模态的可解释概念分解。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型缺乏跨模态的概念可解释性；现有技术多局限于图像，且不能很好反映文本和图像间的特征交互。CLIP等模型存在模态鸿沟，影响对内部推理的理解与可解释性。
AI.method: 提出将典型相关分析（CCA）与概念可解释性结合，发展出Concept CCA（CoCCA）方法，无需重新训练即可对齐文本和图像特征，实现可解释的概念分解，并进一步扩展为Sparse Concept CCA（SCoCCA），通过稀疏化获得更具判别性和解耦性的概念。
AI.result: 方法能有效将多模态嵌入对齐，实现更具可解释性的概念分解，并在概念发现、重构、消融等下游任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法填补了多模态概念可解释性的空白，让视觉-语言模型在内部推理和安全关键场景下的应用更具透明性和可控性。

title: Visual Confused Deputy: Exploiting and Defending Perception Failures in Computer-Using Agents
summary: Computer-using agents (CUAs) act directly on graphical user interfaces, yet their perception of the screen is often unreliable. Existing work largely treats these failures as performance limitations, asking whether an action succeeds, rather than whether the agent is acting on the correct object at all. We argue that this is fundamentally a security problem. We formalize the visual confused deputy: a failure mode in which an agent authorizes an action based on a misperceived screen state, due to grounding errors, adversarial screenshot manipulation, or time-of-check-to-time-of-use (TOCTOU) races. This gap is practically exploitable: even simple screen-level manipulations can redirect routine clicks into privileged actions while remaining indistinguishable from ordinary agent mistakes. To mitigate this threat, we propose the first guardrail that operates outside the agent's perceptual loop. Our method, dual-channel contrastive classification, independently evaluates (1) the visual click target and (2) the agent's reasoning about the action against deployment-specific knowledge bases, and blocks execution if either channel indicates risk. The key insight is that these two channels capture complementary failure modes: visual evidence detects target-level mismatches, while textual reasoning reveals dangerous intent behind visually innocuous controls. Across controlled attacks, real GUI screenshots, and agent traces, the combined guardrail consistently outperforms either channel alone. Our results suggest that CUA safety requires not only better action generation, but independent verification of what the agent believes it is clicking and why. Materials are provided\footnote{Model, benchmark, and code: https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router}.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有的计算机代理（CUA）在与图形界面交互时存在安全隐患，并提出一种基于双通道对比分类的防护机制，从视觉和推理两方面独立把关，大幅提升了自动化操作的安全性。
AI.motivation: 当前CUA依赖屏幕感知来完成操作，但其对屏幕状态的理解常常出错，这不仅影响性能，更带来安全威胁。作者发现过去只关注操作是否成功，而未关注是否作用在正确对象上，忽视了更本质的安全隐患，因此提出将其系统化为视觉混淆副手（visual confused deputy）问题，并针对现实中的可被攻击场景设计安全防护。
AI.method: 作者提出首个位于代理感知回路之外的防护法则——双通道对比分类方法。它分别独立评估（1）视觉点击目标和（2）代理对操作理由的推理结果，并与实际部署知识库比对，如果任何一项有风险则拦截动作。该策略将视觉证据与文本推理结合，互补捕捉不同的失效模式。
AI.result: 通过模拟攻击、真实GUI截屏以及实际代理运行轨迹实验，结果显示双通道方法对安全威胁的防护远优于单一通道方案，在多类场景下均显著提升误点击和恶意操作的识别能力。
AI.conclusion: CUA的安全不应仅依赖更好的动作生成算法，还必须引入独立验证机制，确保代理“点击”的内容和其背后动机均被有效审核。双通道对比分类是一种通用且有效的补充防护方法，可明显提升自动化操作系统的安全性。

title: Perception-Aware Autonomous Exploration in Feature-Limited Environments
summary: Autonomous exploration in unknown environments typically relies on onboard state estimation for localisation and mapping. Existing exploration methods primarily maximise coverage efficiency, but often overlook that visual-inertial odometry (VIO) performance strongly depends on the availability of robust visual features. As a result, exploration policies can drive a robot into feature-sparse regions where tracking degrades, leading to odometry drift, corrupted maps, and mission failure. We propose a hierarchical perception-aware exploration framework for a stereo-equipped unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that explicitly couples exploration progress with feature observability. Our approach (i) associates each candidate frontier with an expected feature quality using a global feature map, and prioritises visually informative subgoals, and (ii) optimises a continuous yaw trajectory along the planned motion to maintain stable feature tracks. We evaluate our method in simulation across environments with varying texture levels and in real-world indoor experiments with largely textureless walls. Compared to baselines that ignore feature quality and/or do not optimise continuous yaw, our method maintains more reliable feature tracking, reduces odometry drift, and achieves on average 30\% higher coverage before the odometry error exceeds specified thresholds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向立体视觉无人机的分层感知-探索框架，将特征可观测性与探索进度结合，实现更鲁棒的自主探索和定位。
AI.motivation: 现有自主探索方法注重覆盖率而忽略了VIO对视觉特征的依赖，导致机器人易进入特征稀疏区，从而出现定位漂移甚至任务失败。
AI.method: 方法包含两大创新：(1) 利用全局特征地图为探索前沿点赋予预期特征质量，优先选择信息量丰富的子目标；(2) 在规划路径上优化连续偏航角轨迹，以维持稳定的特征跟踪。
AI.result: 在不同纹理环境的仿真以及真实室内低纹理环境中测试，结果显示——与未考虑特征质量或未优化偏航的基线方法相比，该方法能更可靠地跟踪特征，减小里程计漂移，平均在容许误差阈值内探索面积提升30%。
AI.conclusion: 将特征可观测性纳入决策能显著提升自主无人机探索与定位鲁棒性，为实际任务成功率提供保障。

title: Multi-Modal Character Localization and Extraction for Chinese Text Recognition
comment: On January 08th, 2026, this paper has been accepted by the IEEE Transactions on Multimedia journal. To appear
summary: Scene text recognition (STR) methods have demonstrated their excellent capability in English text images. However, due to the complex inner structures of Chinese and the extensive character categories, it poses challenges for recognizing Chinese text in images. Recently, studies have shown that the methods designed for English text recognition encounter an accuracy bottleneck when recognizing Chinese text images. This raises the question: Is it appropriate to apply the model developed for English to the Chinese STR task? To explore this issue, we propose a novel method named LER, which explicitly decouples each character and independently recognizes characters while taking into account the complex inner structures of Chinese. LER consists of three modules: Localization, Extraction, and Recognition. Firstly, the localization module utilizes multimodal information to determine the character's position precisely. Then, the extraction module dissociates all characters in parallel. Finally, the recognition module considers the unique inner structures of Chinese to provide the text prediction results. Extensive experiments conducted on large-scale Chinese benchmarks indicate that our method significantly outperforms existing methods. Furthermore, extensive experiments conducted on six English benchmarks and the Union14M benchmark show impressive results in English text recognition by LER. Code is available at https://github.com/Pandarenlql/LER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的中文场景文本识别方法LER，通过分离每个字符并独立识别，显著提升了中文文本图像的识别准确率，同时在英文任务上也表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的场景文本识别方法在英文上表现良好，但在中文场景文本识别中受限于字符结构复杂和字符类别庞大，识别精度遇到瓶颈。因此，研究者提出专门面向中文特点的新方法，以提升识别效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了LER方法，包含定位、特征提取和识别三个模块。定位模块结合多模态信息精准定位字符位置，特征提取模块并行分离所有字符，识别模块结合中文独特的内部结构进行字符判断。该方法显式解耦字符处理，针对中文复杂性优化。
AI.result: 在大规模中文场景文本基准上，LER显著优于现有方法。在六个英文基准和Union14M数据集上，LER也表现出令人满意的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: LER方法有效解决了英文方法在中文场景文本识别上的准确率瓶颈，实现了对中文和英文场景文本的高效识别。

title: MER-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multimodal Meme Reappraisal
summary: Memes represent a tightly coupled, multimodal form of social expression, in which visual context and overlaid text jointly convey nuanced affect and commentary. Inspired by cognitive reappraisal in psychology, we introduce Meme Reappraisal, a novel multimodal generation task that aims to transform negatively framed memes into constructive ones while preserving their underlying scenario, entities, and structural layout. Unlike prior works on meme understanding or generation, Meme Reappraisal requires emotion-controllable, structure-preserving multimodal transformation under multiple semantic and stylistic constraints. To support this task, we construct MER-Bench, a benchmark of real-world memes with fine-grained multimodal annotations, including source and target emotions, positively rewritten meme text, visual editing specifications, and taxonomy labels covering visual type, sentiment polarity, and layout structure. We further propose a structured evaluation framework based on a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-as-a-Judge paradigm, decomposing performance into modality-level generation quality, affect controllability, structural fidelity, and global affective alignment. Extensive experiments across representative image-editing and multimodal-generation systems reveal substantial gaps in satisfying the constraints of structural preservation, semantic consistency, and affective transformation. We believe MER-Bench establishes a foundation for research on controllable meme editing and emotion-aware multimodal generation. Our code is available at: https://github.com/one-seven17/MER-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一项新任务Meme Reappraisal，用于将负面语境下的meme（表情包）转换为积极、建设性的版本，并保持结构和语境不变。为推动该任务，作者构建了带有细致标注的数据集MER-Bench，并提出了结构化评估体系。实验发现现有系统在结构保持和情感转换上存在显著差距，MER-Bench为后续相关研究奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 现有meme生成与理解主要关注语义本体和图文结合，但对情感调控及结构保持关注不足。日常网络交流中，消极/攻击性meme很多，如何自动调整其为更积极内容，具有社会价值和研究意义。
AI.method: 1）提出Meme Reappraisal任务，即在保持图片内容、结构和基本语境不变前提下，将负面meme转为正面；2）构建MER-Bench数据集，包含双语情感、重写文字、视觉编辑、结构等多模态细粒度标注；3）设计基于多模态大语言模型的结构化评估框架，从生成质量、情感可控性、结构一致性和整体情感对齐四维度系统评测。
AI.result: 通过对多类代表性图像编辑和多模态生成系统的实验，发现这些系统对结构保持、语义一致和情感转换任务存在较大短板，难以全面满足Meme Reappraisal的多重约束。
AI.conclusion: MER-Bench数据集及任务为可控情感转换、多模态编辑等方向提供了标准和评测工具，实验揭示当前方法的不足，为后续改进和相关研究指明方向。

title: CT-Conditioned Diffusion Prior with Physics-Constrained Sampling for PET Super-Resolution
summary: PET super-resolution is highly under-constrained because paired multi-resolution scans from the same subject are rarely available, and effective resolution is determined by scanner-specific physics (e.g., PSF, detector geometry, and acquisition settings). This limits supervised end-to-end training and makes purely image-domain generative restoration prone to hallucinated structures when anatomical and physical constraints are weak. We formulate PET super-resolution as posterior inference under heterogeneous system configurations and propose a CT-conditioned diffusion framework with physics-constrained sampling. During training, a conditional diffusion prior is learned from high-quality PET/CT pairs using cross-attention for anatomical guidance, without requiring paired LR--HR PET data. During inference, measurement consistency is enforced through a scanner-aware forward model with explicit PSF effects and gradient-based data-consistency refinement. Under both standard and OOD settings, the proposed method consistently improves experimental metrics and lesion-level clinical relevance indicators over strong baselines, while reducing hallucination artifacts and improving structural fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合CT条件和物理约束的扩散模型，用于提升PET图像的超分辨率，能有效减少幻觉结构并提升结构保真度。
AI.motivation: 当前PET图像超分辨率面临严重的受限问题，因为很难获得同一受试者的多分辨率配对扫描数据，并且分辨率主要受扫描仪的物理特性影响，这极大限制了监督式训练，并使仅基于图像的重建方法易产生幻觉结构。
AI.method: 作者把PET超分辨率问题建模为异构系统下的后验推断，提出了一种CT条件扩散框架，加上物理约束采样。在训练时，利用高质量的PET/CT配对数据，通过交叉注意力获得解剖引导，无需成对低高分PET数据；推理时，通过考虑PSF效应的扫描仪感知前向模型和基于梯度的数据一致性修正来强化观测一致性。
AI.result: 无论是在标准还是OOD（分布外）设置下，该方法在各项实验指标和病灶级临床相关评价上均优于多个强基线方法，有效减少了幻觉伪影并提升了结构保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该CT条件扩散物理约束方法能更好地提升PET图像的分辨率和结构真实性，具有良好的泛化能力和临床应用前景。

title: Pixel-level Scene Understanding in One Token: Visual States Need What-is-Where Composition
summary: For robotic agents operating in dynamic environments, learning visual state representations from streaming video observations is essential for sequential decision making. Recent self-supervised learning methods have shown strong transferability across vision tasks, but they do not explicitly address what a good visual state should encode. We argue that effective visual states must capture what-is-where by jointly encoding the semantic identities of scene elements and their spatial locations, enabling reliable detection of subtle dynamics across observations. To this end, we propose CroBo, a visual state representation learning framework based on a global-to-local reconstruction objective. Given a reference observation compressed into a compact bottleneck token, CroBo learns to reconstruct heavily masked patches in a local target crop from sparse visible cues, using the global bottleneck token as context. This learning objective encourages the bottleneck token to encode a fine-grained representation of scene-wide semantic entities, including their identities, spatial locations, and configurations. As a result, the learned visual states reveal how scene elements move and interact over time, supporting sequential decision making. We evaluate CroBo on diverse vision-based robot policy learning benchmarks, where it achieves state-of-the-art performance. Reconstruction analyses and perceptual straightness experiments further show that the learned representations preserve pixel-level scene composition and encode what-moves-where across observations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CroBo的视觉状态表示学习框架，强调同时编码场景元素的语义和空间信息，以提升机器人在动态环境中的顺序决策能力，并验证了其优越表现。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视觉表示学习方法虽然具备较强的泛化能力，但未明确规定表示应包含哪些关键信息。作者认为高效的视觉状态表示应能明确地编码场景中“什么东西在哪里（what-is-where）”，以便于检测场景中细微动态的变化。
AI.method: 提出的CroBo方法以全局到局部重建为目标，通过将参考观测压缩为紧凑的全局瓶颈token，并利用该token作为上下文，重建目标局部裁剪图像中被大面积遮挡的像素块。该设计促使瓶颈token学到场景语义实体的身份、空间位置和配置。
AI.result: 在多个基于视觉的机器人策略学习基准上，CroBo取得了最先进的表现。重建分析与感知一致性实验表明，所学表示能保留像素级的场景组成信息，同时清晰编码观测中“什么在移动、在哪里”的动态。
AI.conclusion: CroBo能够更好地捕捉场景元素的语义与空间细节，增强了视觉状态对动态场景理解和机器人决策的支持，优于现有自监督视觉表示方法。

title: Scene Generation at Absolute Scale: Utilizing Semantic and Geometric Guidance From Text for Accurate and Interpretable 3D Indoor Scene Generation
summary: We present GuidedSceneGen, a text-to-3D generation framework that produces metrically accurate, globally consistent, and semantically interpretable indoor scenes. Unlike prior text-driven methods that often suffer from geometric drift or scale ambiguity, our approach maintains an absolute world coordinate frame throughout the entire generation process. Starting from a textual scene description, we predict a global 3D layout encoding both semantic and geometric structure, which serves as a guiding proxy for downstream stages. A semantics- and depth-conditioned panoramic diffusion model then synthesizes 360° imagery aligned with the global layout, substantially improving spatial coherence. To explore unobserved regions, we employ a video diffusion model guided by optimized camera trajectories that balances coverage and collision avoidance, achieving up to 10x faster sampling compared to exhaustive path exploration. The generated views are fused using 3D Gaussian Splatting, yielding a consistent and fully navigable 3D scene in absolute scale. GuidedSceneGen enables accurate transfer of object poses and semantic labels from layout to reconstruction, and supports progressive scene expansion without re-alignment. Quantitative results and a user study demonstrate greater 3D consistency and layout plausibility compared to recent panoramic text-to-3D baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了GuidedSceneGen，一个文本驱动的3D室内场景生成框架，实现了度量精确、全局一致、语义可解释的3D场景生成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的3D生成方法常常出现几何漂移和尺度不确定性，难以生成空间一致、可导航的真实场景。因此，作者试图解决空间几何和语义一致性的难题，提升3D场景生成的精度与实用性。
AI.method: 1）始于文本描述，推理得到包含语义和几何信息的全局3D布局；2）利用语义和深度条件的全景扩散模型合成360°影像，增强空间一致性；3）采用视频扩散模型和优化摄像机轨迹快速探索场景未见区域，采样速度提升约10倍；4）使用3D高斯点云融合方法，获得一致且可导航的绝对尺度3D场景。
AI.result: 生成场景在空间一致性、度量准确性以及布局合理性上，优于现有的主流文本-3D生成框架。用户研究和定量评估均显示出有更强的一致性和合理性。
AI.conclusion: GuidedSceneGen有效地克服了现有方法的几何漂移与尺度模糊问题，可实现高质量、绝对尺度的3D室内场景生成，支持语义标签转移和渐进式扩展，具有实用前景。

title: Towards Stable Self-Supervised Object Representations in Unconstrained Egocentric Video
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Humans develop visual intelligence through perceiving and interacting with their environment - a self-supervised learning process grounded in egocentric experience. Inspired by this, we ask how can artificial systems learn stable object representations from continuous, uncurated first-person videos without relying on manual annotations. This setting poses challenges of separating, recognizing, and persistently tracking objects amid clutter, occlusion, and ego-motion. We propose EgoViT, a unified vision Transformer framework designed to learn stable object representations from unlabeled egocentric video. EgoViT bootstraps this learning process by jointly discovering and stabilizing "proto-objects" through three synergistic mechanisms: (1) Proto-object Learning, which uses intra-frame distillation to form discriminative representations; (2) Depth Regularization, which grounds these representations in geometric structure; and (3) Teacher-Filtered Temporal Consistency, which enforces identity over time. This creates a virtuous cycle where initial object hypotheses are progressively refined into stable, persistent representations. The framework is trained end-to-end on unlabeled first-person videos and exhibits robustness to geometric priors of varied origin and quality. On standard benchmarks, EgoViT achieves +8.0% CorLoc improvement in unsupervised object discovery and +4.8% mIoU improvement in semantic segmentation, demonstrating its potential to lay a foundation for robust visual abstraction in embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoViT，一种无监督的端到端视觉Transformer框架，从未标注的第一人称视频中学习稳定的物体表示，并显著提升了物体发现与语义分割任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 人类通过与环境的自监督互动逐步学习视觉智能，人工系统如何无需手动标注、直接从连续的第一人称视频中学习稳定的物体表征，是提升机器人泛化能力和视觉理解的关键科学问题。
AI.method: EgoViT通过三个协同机制实现无监督物体表示学习：(1)“原型物体”学习模块，利用帧内蒸馏得到判别性表征；(2)深度正则化模块，用几何结构为表征提供约束；(3)教师过滤的时间一致性模块，强化物体在时序视频中的身份持续性。整体方法端到端训练于未标注的第一人称视频。
AI.result: EgoViT在公开基准上表现优异，无监督物体发现任务提升8.0%的CorLoc指标，语义分割任务提升4.8%的mIoU指标，并对不同来源和质量的几何先验具较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EgoViT为具身智能的发展提供了坚实的视觉抽象基础，有望推进无监督视觉学习方向与机器人视觉应用。

title: Seeking Physics in Diffusion Noise
summary: Do video diffusion models encode signals predictive of physical plausibility? We probe intermediate denoising representations of a pretrained Diffusion Transformer (DiT) and find that physically plausible and implausible videos are partially separable in mid-layer feature space across noise levels. This separability cannot be fully attributed to visual quality or generator identity, suggesting recoverable physics-related cues in frozen DiT features. Leveraging this observation, we introduce progressive trajectory selection, an inference-time strategy that scores parallel denoising trajectories at a few intermediate checkpoints using a lightweight physics verifier trained on frozen features, and prunes low-scoring candidates early. Extensive experiments on PhyGenBench demonstrate that our method improves physical consistency while reducing inference cost, achieving comparable results to Best-of-K sampling with substantially fewer denoising steps.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了视频扩散模型是否隐含可预测物理合理性的信号，并提出了一种推断时利用中间特征提升物理一致性和推理效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成模型虽然生成画面真实，但可能缺乏物理合理性。论文旨在探索扩散模型内部是否蕴含关于运动物理的可恢复线索，并利用这些线索提升生成视频的物理一致性。
AI.method: 作者分析了已有扩散Transformer模型在不同噪声层中的中间特征，发现物理合理与不合理视频在特征空间部分可分。基于此，提出了一种进阶轨迹选择方法：在去噪过程中引入训练在冻结特征上的轻量级物理验证器，在推断阶段对多条去噪路径打分，及早淘汰低分支路。
AI.result: 实验基于PhyGenBench数据集，表明该方法在提升生成视频物理一致性的同时，能显著减少去噪步数，达到与Best-of-K采样相当的物理效果，但推理成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 冻结扩散模型中间特征蕴含可恢复的物理线索。结合有效的推理策略，可在不显著增加计算成本的情况下提升生成视频的物理合理性。

title: Evaluation of Visual Place Recognition Methods for Image Pair Retrieval in 3D Vision and Robotics
comment: Accepted at the XXV ISPRS Congress 2026; to appear in the ISPRS Annals
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is a core component in computer vision, typically formulated as an image retrieval task for localization, mapping, and navigation. In this work, we instead study VPR as an image pair retrieval front-end for registration pipelines, where the goal is to find top-matching image pairs between two disjoint image sets for downstream tasks such as scene registration, SLAM, and Structure-from-Motion. We comparatively evaluate state-of-the-art VPR families - NetVLAD-style baselines, classification-based global descriptors (CosPlace, EigenPlaces), feature-mixing (MixVPR), and foundation-model-driven methods (AnyLoc, SALAD, MegaLoc) - on three challenging datasets: object-centric outdoor scenes (Tanks and Temples), indoor RGB-D scans (ScanNet-GS), and autonomous-driving sequences (KITTI). We show that modern global descriptor approaches are increasingly suitable as off-the-shelf image pair retrieval modules in challenging scenarios including perceptual aliasing and incomplete sequences, while exhibiting clear, domain-dependent strengths and weaknesses that are critical when choosing VPR components for robust mapping and registration.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文将视觉地点识别(VPR)作为图像对检索问题，系统对比了多种主流VPR方法在多个复杂场景下的性能，指出了不同方法的优势与适用场景。
AI.motivation: 传统VPR多被看作单幅图像的检索任务，但在实际应用中，如场景配准、SLAM等需要识别图像对。不同VPR模型在这些任务中的适用性、鲁棒性及局限性尚缺系统研究。
AI.method: 作者将VPR作为图像对检索前端，测试了多类VPR模型(NetVLAD、CosPlace、MixVPR、AnyLoc等)在三个典型数据集(Tanks and Temples、ScanNet-GS、KITTI)上的表现，对比其在不同应用场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示，现代全局描述子方法越来越适合作为即插即用的图像对检索模块，能在异构、复杂场景下保持良好表现，但其优势和短板随场景领域明显变化。
AI.conclusion: 选择VPR方法时应考虑具体场景下的特点和需求，不同方法间存在权衡，合理选型对高鲁棒性的映射和配准任务至关重要。

title: AerialVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model for UAV Navigation via Minimalist End-to-End Control
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. Code and demo videos will be available at: https://github.com/XuPeng23/AerialVLA
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) demands complex visual interpretation and continuous control in dynamic 3D environments. Existing hierarchical approaches rely on dense oracle guidance or auxiliary object detectors, creating semantic gaps and limiting genuine autonomy. We propose AerialVLA, a minimalist end-to-end Vision-Language-Action framework mapping raw visual observations and fuzzy linguistic instructions directly to continuous physical control signals. First, we introduce a streamlined dual-view perception strategy that reduces visual redundancy while preserving essential cues for forward navigation and precise grounding, which additionally facilitates future simulation-to-reality transfer. To reclaim genuine autonomy, we deploy a fuzzy directional prompting mechanism derived solely from onboard sensors, completely eliminating the dependency on dense oracle guidance. Ultimately, we formulate a unified control space that integrates continuous 3-Degree-of-Freedom (3-DoF) kinematic commands with an intrinsic landing signal, freeing the agent from external object detectors for precision landing. Extensive experiments on the TravelUAV benchmark demonstrate that AerialVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance in seen environments. Furthermore, it exhibits superior generalization in unseen scenarios by achieving nearly three times the success rate of leading baselines, validating that a minimalist, autonomy-centric paradigm captures more robust visual-motor representations than complex modular systems.

AI.tldr: AerialVLA提出了一种端到端的视觉-语言-动作框架，实现了无人机在动态3D环境中的自主导航，无需依赖外部辅助模块，在实验证明具备优越性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有UAV视觉-语言导航方法过度依赖外部指导或物体检测器，导致语义鸿沟及自主性不足，因此需要更纯粹且独立的导航框架。
AI.method: AerialVLA采用极简端到端设计，利用原始视觉输入和模糊的语言指令直接映射到UAV的物理控制信号。提出双视角感知减少冗余，利用机载传感器模糊方向提示替代稠密引导，实现连续3-DoF运动与自主着陆的统一控制。
AI.result: 在TravelUAV基准测试中，AerialVLA在已见环境下表现优越，在未见环境下成功率为主流方法近三倍，展示了强大的泛化与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AerialVLA以极简和自主为核心设计，优于依赖多模块的复杂系统，是实现UAV视觉-语言导航的更健壮选择。

title: OpenCOOD-Air: Prompting Heterogeneous Ground-Air Collaborative Perception with Spatial Conversion and Offset Prediction
summary: While Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) collaboration extends sensing ranges through multi-agent data sharing, its reliability remains severely constrained by ground-level occlusions and the limited perspective of chassis-mounted sensors, which often result in critical perception blind spots. We propose OpenCOOD-Air, a novel framework that integrates UAVs as extensible platforms into V2V collaborative perception to overcome these constraints. To mitigate gradient interference from ground-air domain gaps and data sparsity, we adopt a transfer learning strategy to fine-tune UAV weights from pre-trained V2V models. To prevent the spatial information loss inherent in this transition, we formulate ground-air collaborative perception as a heterogeneous integration task with explicit altitude supervision and introduce a Cross-Domain Spatial Converter (CDSC) and a Spatial Offset Prediction Transformer (SOPT). Furthermore, we present the OPV2V-Air benchmark to validate the transition from V2V to Vehicle-to-Vehicle-to-UAV. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our approach improves 2D and 3D AP@0.7 by 4% and 7%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OpenCOOD-Air框架，把无人机（UAV）集成进V2V协同感知系统，以克服传统地面传感器的感知盲区。通过迁移学习和空间域转换，有效提升了V2V到V2V-UAV协同的感知精度。
AI.motivation: 现有V2V协同感知受限于车辆传感器的低视角以及地面遮挡，导致存在感知死角，影响协同感知的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 1）将无人机作为V2V的感知扩展平台，提升整体视野。2）采用迁移学习，将地面模型权重微调到无人机模型，缓解地-空域差异和数据稀疏问题。3）提出跨域空间转换器（CDSC）和空间偏移预测Transformer（SOPT），联合显式海拔监督，防止空间信息损失。4）建立OPV2V-Air基准，验证方案有效性。
AI.result: 与目前最先进的方法相比，所提方法在2D AP@0.7和3D AP@0.7指标上分别提升了4%和7%。
AI.conclusion: OpenCOOD-Air框架能显著提升多智能体协同感知的完整性和准确性，为V2V与无人机协同感知领域提供了新方向。

title: WorldVLM: Combining World Model Forecasting and Vision-Language Reasoning
summary: Autonomous driving systems depend on on models that can reason about high-level scene contexts and accurately predict the dynamics of their surrounding environment. Vision- Language Models (VLMs) have recently emerged as promising tools for decision-making and scene understanding, offering strong capabilities in contextual reasoning. However, their limited spatial comprehension constrains their effectiveness as end-to-end driving models. World Models (WM) internalize environmental dynamics to predict future scene evolution. Recently explored as ego-motion predictors and foundation models for autonomous driving, they represent a promising direction for addressing key challenges in the field, particularly enhancing generalization while maintaining dynamic prediction. To leverage the complementary strengths of context-based decision making and prediction, we propose WorldVLM: A hybrid architecture that unifies VLMs and WMs. In our design, the high-level VLM generates behavior commands to guide the driving WM, enabling interpretable and context-aware actions. We evaluate conditioning strategies and provide insights into the hybrid design challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉-语言模型（VLM）和世界模型（WM）的混合架构WorldVLM，用于提升自动驾驶系统在场景理解和环境动态预测方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要模型既能理解高层次场景语境，又能精准预测周围环境的动态变化。现有VLM在语境推理表现出色，但空间理解有限，难以胜任端到端驾驶任务。WM虽能建模环境动态，但亟需提升通用性和可解释性。两者各有优劣，因此有结合的需求。
AI.method: 作者提出WorldVLM架构，将VLM用于生成高层次行为指令，并用这些指令指导世界模型，进而实现可解释、具备语境感知能力的自动驾驶决策与预测。论文还探讨了不同的条件输入策略以及混合设计中的技术挑战。
AI.result: 通过实验证明，WorldVLM能够有效结合VLM和WM的优点，提升了自动驾驶系统在复杂语境下的推理和动态环境的预测能力。具体实验细节和指标在文中进行了分析和讨论。
AI.conclusion: WorldVLM混合架构为自动驾驶提供了一种新思路，能够在保证可解释性和动态预测能力的同时提升系统的泛化能力，对于决策和场景理解具有积极意义。

title: Discriminative Flow Matching Via Local Generative Predictors
summary: Traditional discriminative computer vision relies predominantly on static projections, mapping input features to outputs in a single computational step. Although efficient, this paradigm lacks the iterative refinement and robustness inherent in biological vision and modern generative modelling. In this paper, we propose Discriminative Flow Matching, a framework that reformulates classification and object detection as a conditional transport process. By learning a vector field that continuously transports samples from a simple noise distribution toward a task-aligned target manifold -- such as class embeddings or bounding box coordinates -- we are at the interface between generative and discriminative learning. Our method attaches multiple independent flow predictors to a shared backbone. These predictors are trained using local flow matching objectives, where gradients are computed independently for each block. We formulate this approach for standard image classification and extend it to the complex task of object detection, where targets are high-dimensional and spatially distributed. This architecture provides the flexibility to update blocks either sequentially to minimise activation memory or in parallel to suit different hardware constraints. By aggregating the predictions from these independent flow predictors, our framework enables robust, generative-inspired inference across diverse architectures, including CNNs and vision transformers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Discriminative Flow Matching（判别流匹配）的新方法，将分类和目标检测任务重构为条件传输过程，通过多个独立的流预测器对输入样本进行逐步、连续的调整，提升判别任务的鲁棒性和生成式特征。
AI.motivation: 传统判别视觉方法通常依赖于一次性静态映射，高效但缺乏类似生物视觉和生成模型的迭代自我修正能力。因此，亟需一种结合判别式判定与生成式逐步优化的新机制，增强视觉系统的鲁棒性和灵活性。
AI.method: 作者通过学习一个向量场，把样本从简单噪声分布逐步传输到目标流形上（如类别嵌入或目标框坐标），实现了生成和判别学习的结合。具体地，利用共享主干网络连接多个独立子模块，每个模块局部计算梯度并进行流匹配训练，支持顺序或并行更新以适配硬件需求。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于图像分类与高维目标检测任务，表现了较传统判别方法更强的鲁棒性与灵活性，在多种架构（CNN、ViT等）上均能实现生成式启发的推断效果。
AI.conclusion: Discriminative Flow Matching框架为视觉系统提供了新的思路，实现判别与生成式推断的结合，提升了现有方法在鲁棒性与通用性方面的能力，同时提供了更灵活的硬件适配方案。

title: VLA-Thinker: Boosting Vision-Language-Action Models through Thinking-with-Image Reasoning
comment: We introduce VLA-Thinker, the first VLA model capable of thinking-with-image reasoning, which models visual perception as a dynamically invocable reasoning action, enabling Multimodal Embodied Chain-of-Thought
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promising capabilities for embodied intelligence, but most existing approaches rely on text-based chain-of-thought reasoning where visual inputs are treated as static context. This limits the ability of the model to actively revisit the environment and resolve ambiguities during long-horizon tasks. We propose VLA-Thinker, a thinking-with-image reasoning framework that models perception as a dynamically invocable reasoning action. To train such a system, we introduce a two-stage training pipeline consisting of (1) an SFT cold-start phase with curated visual Chain-of-Thought data to activate structured reasoning and tool-use behaviors, and (2) GRPO-based reinforcement learning to align complete reasoning-action trajectories with task-level success. Extensive experiments on LIBERO and RoboTwin 2.0 benchmarks demonstrate that VLA-Thinker significantly improves manipulation performance, achieving 97.5% success rate on LIBERO and strong gains across long-horizon robotic tasks. Project and Codes: https://cywang735.github.io/VLA-Thinker/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VLA-Thinker的视觉-语言-动作推理框架，在操作任务上取得了显著进展。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型普遍采用文本链式推理，将视觉信息视为静态背景，无法在长期任务中主动感知与消除歧义，限制了智能体的灵活性与表现能力。
AI.method: 该框架将感知过程建模为可动态调用的推理动作，采用两阶段训练流程：首先利用专门构建的视觉思维链数据进行有监督微调启动有结构化推理与工具使用行为，然后通过GRPO强化学习使推理-动作轨迹与任务成功更好对齐。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和RoboTwin 2.0基准上，VLA-Thinker系统在操作性能上大幅提升，对应LIBERO数据集获得97.5%的成功率，并在多种长时序任务上取得明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 主动、动态利用视觉信息进行推理的思想极大提升了机器人智能体处理复杂场景和长期任务的能力。

title: Bidirectional Cross-Attention Fusion of High-Res RGB and Low-Res HSI for Multimodal Automated Waste Sorting
comment: Submitted to Information Fusion (Elsevier). 23 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables
summary: Growing waste streams and the transition to a circular economy require efficient automated waste sorting. In industrial settings, materials move on fast conveyor belts, where reliable identification and ejection demand pixel-accurate segmentation. RGB imaging delivers high-resolution spatial detail, which is essential for accurate segmentation, but it confuses materials that look similar in the visible spectrum. Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) provides spectral signatures that separate such materials, yet its lower spatial resolution limits detail. Effective waste sorting therefore needs methods that fuse both modalities to exploit their complementary strengths. We present Bidirectional Cross-Attention Fusion (BCAF), which aligns high-resolution RGB with low-resolution HSI at their native grids via localized, bidirectional cross-attention, avoiding pre-upsampling or early spectral collapse. BCAF uses two independent backbones: a standard Swin Transformer for RGB and an HSI-adapted Swin backbone that preserves spectral structure through 3D tokenization with spectral self-attention. We also analyze trade-offs between RGB input resolution and the number of HSI spectral slices. Although our evaluation targets RGB-HSI fusion, BCAF is modality-agnostic and applies to co-registered RGB with lower-resolution, high-channel auxiliary sensors. On the benchmark SpectralWaste dataset, BCAF achieves state-of-the-art performance of 76.4% mIoU at 31 images/s and 75.4% mIoU at 55 images/s. We further evaluate a novel industrial dataset: K3I-Cycling (first RGB subset already released on Fordatis). On this dataset, BCAF reaches 62.3% mIoU for material segmentation (paper, metal, plastic, etc.) and 66.2% mIoU for plastic-type segmentation (PET, PP, HDPE, LDPE, PS, etc.).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种称为双向交叉注意力融合（BCAF）的多模态融合方法，从而提升了工业环境中垃圾分拣的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 推动向循环经济转型和应对不断增长的垃圾流，需要高效、自动化的垃圾分拣技术。传统的RGB成像虽然分辨率高，但对外观相似的材料区分有限；而高光谱成像（HSI）虽然有独特的光谱信息，但空间分辨率较低。因此，融合两种传感器的信息显得尤为关键。
AI.method: 该方法采用了两个独立的Swin Transformer主干：一个用于高分辨率RGB图像，另一个为保留光谱结构、经3D分块和光谱自注意力处理的HSI图像。利用局部、双向的交叉注意力机制在各自原生分辨率下对齐和融合两种数据，无需先上采样或早期降维。该框架也可扩展用于其它高通道低分辨率的辅助传感器。
AI.result: 在SpectralWaste数据集上，BCAF方法达到了76.4% mIoU（31张图像/秒）和75.4% mIoU（55张图像/秒），创下新纪录；在新的工业数据集K3I-Cycling上，材料分割达到62.3% mIoU，塑料类型分割为66.2% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: BCAF实现了高精度、高效率的多模态垃圾分割，在工业应用场景下具备良好泛化能力和强大实用价值，也为多模态信息融合带来了新的技术路线。

title: Interp3R: Continuous-time 3D Geometry Estimation with Frames and Events
summary: In recent years, 3D visual foundation models pioneered by pointmap-based approaches such as DUSt3R have attracted a lot of interest, achieving impressive accuracy and strong generalization across diverse scenes. However, these methods are inherently limited to recovering scene geometry only at the discrete time instants when images are captured, leaving the scene evolution during the blind time between consecutive frames largely unexplored. We introduce Interp3R, to the best of our knowledge the first method that enhances pointmap-based models to estimate depth and camera poses at arbitrary time instants. Interp3R leverages asynchronous event data to interpolate pointmaps produced by frame-based models, enabling temporally continuous geometric representations. Depth and camera poses are then jointly recovered by aligning the interpolated pointmaps together with those predicted by the underlying frame-based models into a consistent spatial framework. We train Interp3R exclusively on a synthetic dataset, yet demonstrate strong generalization across a wide range of synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Extensive experiments show that Interp3R outperforms by a considerable margin state-of-the-art baselines that follow a two-stage pipeline of 2D video frame interpolation followed by 3D geometry estimation.

AI.tldr: Interp3R提出了一种新方法，通过异步事件数据插值点云，实现任意时刻的深度和相机姿态估计，显著提升了场景几何的时序连续性和精度，并优于现有两步法。
AI.motivation: 当前3D视觉基础模型（如DUSt3R等点云方法）只能在拍照时刻离散地恢复场景几何，忽略了帧与帧之间的场景演化，存在时间连续信息断层的问题。
AI.method: Interp3R首次将事件相机数据与点云插值结合，通过插值补全传统帧间点云，实现了时序连续的几何表征。方法联合估计插值得到的点云与传统帧获取的点云深度和相机姿态，并统一到一致的空间框架中。整个方法仅通过合成数据集训练。
AI.result: 在大量实验中，Interp3R在合成及真实数据上泛化能力强，并且显著优于基于2D视频插值再3D重建的主流两步法。
AI.conclusion: Interp3R突破了帧间场景几何演化无法建模的极限，实现了任意时刻的高精度时序连续3D重建，对3D视觉基础模型具有创新性和实用性价值。

title: Sat-JEPA-Diff: Bridging Self-Supervised Learning and Generative Diffusion for Remote Sensing
summary: Predicting satellite imagery requires a balance between structural accuracy and textural detail. Standard deterministic methods like PredRNN or SimVP minimize pixel-based errors but suffer from the "regression to the mean" problem, producing blurry outputs that obscure subtle geographic-spatial features. Generative models provide realistic textures but often misleadingly reveal structural anomalies. To bridge this gap, we introduce Sat-JEPA-Diff, which combines Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) with Hidden Diffusion Models (LDM). An IJEPA module predicts stable semantic representations, which then route a frozen Stable Diffusion backbone via a lightweight cross-attention adapter. This ensures that the synthesized high-accuracy textures are based on absolutely accurate structural predictions. Evaluated on a global Sentinel-2 dataset, Sat-JEPA-Diff excels at resolving sharp boundaries. It achieves leading perceptual scores (GSSIM: 0.8984, FID: 0.1475) and significantly outperforms deterministic baselines, despite standard autoregressive stability limits. The code and dataset are publicly available on https://github.com/VU-AIML/SAT-JEPA-DIFF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Sat-JEPA-Diff模型，实现了对卫星遥感影像的精确结构与高质量纹理预测，克服传统与生成方法各自的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统预测方法（如PredRNN、SimVP）只是最小化像素误差，导致生成的图像模糊，难以捕捉地理空间细节；而生成模型虽然纹理真实，但经常引入结构异常。因此迫切需要兼顾结构与纹理精度的创新方法。
AI.method: 提出将自监督学习（SSL）和隐扩散模型（LDM）结合：IJEPA模块先预测结构稳定的语义特征，再通过轻量化的cross-attention适配器，引导冻结的Stable Diffusion模型，保证生成结果纹理细致、结构精确。
AI.result: 在Sentinel-2全球数据集上，该方法有效捕捉到图像锐利边界，取得领先的感知分数（GSSIM: 0.8984，FID: 0.1475），并显著超越前沿的确定性基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Sat-JEPA-Diff能够同时实现高结构准确率与高质量纹理，是卫星图像预测任务中兼顾两者的有效方案。代码和数据集已公开。

title: Efficient Event Camera Volume System
summary: Event cameras promise low latency and high dynamic range, yet their sparse output challenges integration into standard robotic pipelines. We introduce \nameframew (Efficient Event Camera Volume System), a novel framework that models event streams as continuous-time Dirac impulse trains, enabling artifact-free compression through direct transform evaluation at event timestamps. Our key innovation combines density-driven adaptive selection among DCT, DTFT, and DWT transforms with transform-specific coefficient pruning strategies tailored to each domain's sparsity characteristics. The framework eliminates temporal binning artifacts while automatically adapting compression strategies based on real-time event density analysis. On EHPT-XC and MVSEC datasets, our framework achieves superior reconstruction fidelity with DTFT delivering the lowest earth mover distance. In downstream segmentation tasks, EECVS demonstrates robust generalization. Notably, our approach demonstrates exceptional cross-dataset generalization: when evaluated with EventSAM segmentation, EECVS achieves mean IoU 0.87 on MVSEC versus 0.44 for voxel grids at 24 channels, while remaining competitive on EHPT-XC. Our ROS2 implementation provides real-time deployment with DCT processing achieving 1.5 ms latency and 2.7X higher throughput than alternative transforms, establishing the first adaptive event compression framework that maintains both computational efficiency and superior generalization across diverse robotic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的事件相机体积系统（EECVS），通过自适应变换实现高质量、低延迟、无伪影的事件数据压缩，并在多个数据集和下游语义分割任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 事件相机虽然具有低延迟和高动态范围优势，但其稀疏的输出形式使其难以直接整合进传统机器人算法。现有的事件数据压缩方法常引入时间分箱（temporal binning）带来的伪影，且缺少能够自适应不同信号密度并高效泛化的压缩系统。
AI.method: 提出了一种将事件流表示为连续时间的狄拉克脉冲序列，并在事件时间戳直接进行数值变换，无需分箱。创新性地结合了基于密度驱动的自适应DCT、DTFT和DWT三种变换方法，并针对不同变换域设计了剪枝策略，实现高效压缩和降维。该方法能根据实时事件密度自动优化变换与压缩策略。
AI.result: 在EHPT-XC与MVSEC数据集上，EECVS实现了较以往方法更高的事件还原质量（DTFT变换下地球搬运者距离最小）。在下游分割任务中，EECVS泛化能力强，EventSAM分割中，在MVSEC上取得0.87的IoU，而体素分箱仅为0.44。DCT处理在ROS2下可实时运行，仅1.5ms延迟，吞吐量为其它变换2.7倍。
AI.conclusion: EECVS首次实现了可自适应、无伪影、兼具高效与优异泛化能力的事件相机数据压缩框架，适用于多种机器人场景和下游任务。

title: DCP-CLIP:A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation with Dual Interaction
summary: The recent years have witnessed the remarkable development for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) using visual-language foundation models, yet still suffer from following fundamental challenges: (1) insufficient cross-modal communications between textual and visual spaces, and (2) significant computational costs from the interactions with massive number of categories. To address these issues, this paper describes a novel coarse-to-fine framework, called DCP-CLIP, for OVSS. Unlike prior efforts that mainly relied on pre-established category content and the inherent spatial-class interaction capability of CLIP, we dynamic constructing category-relevant textual features and explicitly models dual interactions between spatial image features and textual class semantics. Specifically, we first leverage CLIP's open-vocabulary recognition capability to identify semantic categories relevant to the image context, upon which we dynamically generate corresponding textual features to serve as initial textual guidance. Subsequently, we conduct a coarse segmentation by cross-modally integrating semantic information from textual guidance into the visual representations and achieve refined segmentation by integrating spatially enriched features from the encoder to recover fine-grained details and enhance spatial resolution. In final, we leverage spatial information from the segmentation side to refine category predictions for each mask, facilitating more precise semantic labeling. Experiments on multiple OVSS benchmarks demonstrate that DCP-CLIP outperforms existing methods by delivering both higher accuracy and greater efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCP-CLIP的开集语义分割（OVSS）新方法，通过分阶段处理和动态特征构建，有效提升了分割精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有开集语义分割方法面临文本与视觉特征融合不足以及大类别数量带来的高计算开销等问题。
AI.method: 该方法创新性地使用了粗到细的分割框架，首先利用CLIP识别与图像相关的类别，并动态生成相关文本特征作为引导。接着跨模态整合文本语义与视觉特征，实现初步粗分割；再结合丰富的空间特征进行细化，提升分辨率和细节；最后通过分割结果的空间信息进一步优化类别预测。
AI.result: 在多个OVSS基准测试中，DCP-CLIP在分割精度和计算效率方面均优于当前主流方法。
AI.conclusion: DCP-CLIP通过动态特征构建和空间语义双向互动，显著提升了开集语义分割的准确性和效率，对相关任务具有实际推广价值。

title: Global Truncated Loss Minimization for Robust and Threshold-Resilient Geometric Estimation
summary: To achieve outlier-robust geometric estimation, robust objective functions are generally employed to mitigate the influence of outliers. The widely used consensus maximization(CM) is highly robust when paired with global branch-and-bound(BnB) search. However, CM relies solely on inlier counts and is sensitive to the inlier threshold. Besides, the discrete nature of CM leads to loose bounds, necessitating extensive BnB iterations and computation cost. Truncated losses(TL), another continuous alternative, leverage residual information more effectively and could potentially overcome these issues. But to our knowledge, no prior work has systematically explored globally minimizing TL with BnB and its potential for enhanced threshold resilience or search efficiency. In this work, we propose GTM, the first unified BnB-based framework for globally-optimal TL loss minimization across diverse geometric problems. GTM involves a hybrid solving design: given an n-dimensional problem, it performs BnB search over an (n-1)-dimensional subspace while the remaining 1D variable is solved by bounding the objective function. Our hybrid design not only reduces the search space, but also enables us to derive Lipschitz-continuous bounding functions that are general, tight, and can be efficiently solved by a classic global Lipschitz solver named DIRECT, which brings further acceleration. We conduct a systematic evaluation on various BnB-based methods for CM and TL on the robust linear regression problem, showing that GTM enjoys remarkable threshold resilience and the highest efficiency compared to baseline methods. Furthermore, we apply GTM on different geometric estimation problems with diverse residual forms. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GTM achieves state-of-the-art outlier-robustness and threshold-resilience while maintaining high efficiency across these estimation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且稳健的几何估计新方法GTM，在多个任务上表现出色，特别是在抗离群和阈值鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统几何估计方法如共识最大化（CM）虽然具备很强的抗离群能力，但对阈值敏感且计算代价高，连续型的截断损失（TL）虽有潜力但缺乏系统性全局最优化研究。作者希望开发一种既高效又具阈值鲁棒性的通用框架。
AI.method: 提出了基于全局分支定界（BnB）的GTM框架，对不同的几何任务统一进行截断损失全局最小化。GTM采用混合求解思路，将n维问题降为(n-1)维BnB搜索，剩余1维用目标函数有界法求解，并引入Lipschitz连续的紧致上界函数，提升了定界效率。
AI.result: 在鲁棒线性回归等多个基准任务上，GTM在搜索效率和阈值的稳健性方面均优于基于CM和TL的其他分支定界方法；在多种几何估计问题中持续展现出最好的抗离群和阈值鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GTM作为第一个支持多任务、截断损失的全局最优化分支定界框架，在效率、鲁棒性和通用性方面均达到了当前最佳水平，对实际几何估计任务具有广泛和重要的应用前景。

title: IMS3: Breaking Distributional Aggregation in Diffusion-Based Dataset Distillation
summary: Dataset Distillation aims to synthesize compact datasets that can approximate the training efficacy of large-scale real datasets, offering an efficient solution to the increasing computational demands of modern deep learning. Recently, diffusion-based dataset distillation methods have shown great promise by leveraging the strong generative capacity of diffusion models to produce diverse and structurally consistent samples. However, a fundamental goal misalignment persists: diffusion models are optimized for generative likelihood rather than discriminative utility, resulting in over-concentration in high-density regions and inadequate coverage of boundary samples crucial for classification. To address this issue, we propose two complementary strategies. Inversion-Matching (IM) introduces an inversion-guided fine-tuning process that aligns denoising trajectories with their inversion counterparts, broadening distributional coverage and enhancing diversity. Selective Subgroup Sampling(S^3) is a training-free sampling mechanism that improves inter-class separability by selecting synthetic subsets that are both representative and distinctive. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances the discriminative quality and generalization of distilled datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance among diffusion-based methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了改进扩散模型用于数据集蒸馏的方法，通过增强数据集判别性和泛化性，显著提升了小规模合成数据集在分类任务上的效能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在数据集蒸馏时仅优化生成概率而非判别性能，导致生成数据过于集中于高密度区域，无法覆盖分类决策边界的样本，影响数据集判别效用。
AI.method: 提出两种互补策略：(1) 反演匹配（IM）：利用反演引导对生成轨迹进行微调以提升合成样本多样性并覆盖更广泛分布；(2) 选择性子群采样（S^3）：训练时无须额外优化，通过挑选更具代表性和可区分性的合成子集提升类别间区分度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法大幅提升了蒸馏数据集的判别能力和泛化性，在扩散模型范式下取得了当前最优的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了扩散模型用于数据集蒸馏时的目标错位问题，能够生成高判别性、强泛化能力的紧凑型合成数据集，对后续相关研究具有重要参考价值。

title: HiMemVLN: Enhancing Reliability of Open-Source Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation with Hierarchical Memory System
summary: LLM-based agents have demonstrated impressive zero-shot performance in vision-language navigation (VLN) tasks. However, most zero-shot methods primarily rely on closed-source LLMs as navigators, which face challenges related to high token costs and potential data leakage risks. Recent efforts have attempted to address this by using open-source LLMs combined with a spatiotemporal CoT framework, but they still fall far short compared to closed-source models. In this work, we identify a critical issue, Navigation Amnesia, through a detailed analysis of the navigation process. This issue leads to navigation failures and amplifies the gap between open-source and closed-source methods. To address this, we propose HiMemVLN, which incorporates a Hierarchical Memory System into a multimodal large model to enhance visual perception recall and long-term localization, mitigating the amnesia issue and improving the agent's navigation performance. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that HiMemVLN achieves nearly twice the performance of the open-source state-of-the-art method. The code is available at https://github.com/lvkailin0118/HiMemVLN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiMemVLN方法，通过引入分层记忆系统，显著提升了开源LLM在视觉-语言导航任务中的性能，有效缓解了导航遗忘问题，表现优于现有开源方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航任务中，开源LLM性能远不及闭源LLM，主要受限于高token成本和数据泄露风险。进一步分析发现，导航过程中存在"导航遗忘"问题，导致导航失败并加剧开闭源差距。
AI.method: 作者提出了HiMemVLN，将分层记忆系统集成到多模态大模型中，加强了视觉感知回忆和长期定位能力，有效缓解了导航遗忘问题。
AI.result: 在模拟和现实环境中的大量实验表明，HiMemVLN的导航性能几乎达到了现有开源SOTA方法的两倍。
AI.conclusion: HiMemVLN为解决开源LLM在视觉-语言导航任务中的瓶颈提供了新思路，缩小了与闭源模型的性能差距，具有较强应用前景。

title: USIS-PGM: Photometric Gaussian Mixtures for Underwater Salient Instance Segmentation
summary: Underwater salient instance segmentation (USIS) is crucial for marine robotic systems, as it enables both underwater salient object detection and instance-level mask prediction for visual scene understanding. Compared with its terrestrial counterpart, USIS is more challenging due to the underwater image degradation. To address this issue, this paper proposes USIS-PGM, a single-stage framework for USIS. Specifically, the encoder enhances boundary cues through a frequency-aware module and performs content-adaptive feature reweighting via a dynamic weighting module. The decoder incorporates a Transformer-based instance activation module to better distinguish salient instances. In addition, USIS-PGM employs multi-scale Gaussian heatmaps generated from ground-truth masks through Photometric Gaussian Mixture (PGM) to supervise intermediate decoder features, thereby improving salient instance localization and producing more structurally coherent mask predictions. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority and practical applicability of the proposed USIS-PGM model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为USIS-PGM的单阶段水下显著实例分割方法，通过改善边界及特征表达能力，有效提升了水下显著实例的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 水下显著实例分割对于海洋机器人视觉感知至关重要，但由于水下图像质量退化，任务难度远高于地面场景。以往方法难以在边界信息保持和实例区分方面取得良好表现，因此亟需有效的新方法提升分割效果。
AI.method: 作者提出USIS-PGM方法：1）使用频域感知模块增强编码器对边界的捕捉能力，2）动态加权模块实现自适应特征重加权，3）解码器内引入基于Transformer的实例激活模块提升实例区分能力，4）利用由真实掩膜生成的多尺度高斯热图对中间特征进行PGM监管，指导模型产出结构更合理的分割结果。
AI.result: 对比实验表明，USIS-PGM在各项分割指标上优于现有方法，同时具备较好的实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了水下显著实例分割精度，对提升水下视觉理解与应用具有指导意义，展示了良好的泛化与实际应用能力。

title: AutoMoT: A Unified Vision-Language-Action Model with Asynchronous Mixture-of-Transformers for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Integrating vision-language models (VLMs) into end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving (AD) systems has shown promise in improving scene understanding. However, existing integration strategies suffer from several limitations: they either struggle to resolve distribution misalignment between reasoning and action spaces, underexploit the general reasoning capabilities of pretrained VLMs, or incur substantial inference latency during action policy generation, which degrades driving performance. To address these challenges, we propose \OURS in this work, an end-to-end AD framework that unifies reasoning and action generation within a single vision-language-action (VLA) model. Our approach leverages a mixture-of-transformer (MoT) architecture with joint attention sharing, which preserves the general reasoning capabilities of pre-trained VLMs while enabling efficient fast-slow inference through asynchronous execution at different task frequencies. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, under both open- and closed-loop settings, demonstrate that \OURS achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. We further investigate the functional boundary of pre-trained VLMs in AD, examining when AD-tailored fine-tuning is necessary. Our results show that pre-trained VLMs can achieve competitive multi-task scene understanding performance through semantic prompting alone, while fine-tuning remains essential for action-level tasks such as decision-making and trajectory planning. We refer to \href{https://automot-website.github.io/}{Project Page} for the demonstration videos and qualitative results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的端到端自动驾驶（AD）框架，将视觉-语言模型（VLM）与动作生成统一为一个视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，通过高效的推理机制提升驾驶性能。
AI.motivation: 现有将视觉-语言模型集成到自动驾驶系统中虽有助于场景理解，但存在推理-动作空间分布不匹配、对VLM泛化推理能力利用不足、推理延迟大等问题，影响实际驾驶表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于联合注意力共享的混合Transformer（MoT）架构，实现了推理与动作生成一体化，同时利用异步执行实现快慢推理，兼顾效率与效果。
AI.result: 在多个公开与闭环基准上，该方法性能与最新方法媲美。实验还探究了VLM泛化边界，发现仅语义提示下VLM在多任务场景理解中表现优异，但决策与路径规划等动作级任务仍需专门微调。
AI.conclusion: 预训练VLM通过语义提示可实现出色场景理解，但实现高效动作决策还需AD领域微调。提出的新架构在性能和效率间取得良好平衡，为自动驾驶VLM集成提供了新思路。

title: VID-AD: A Dataset for Image-Level Logical Anomaly Detection under Vision-Induced Distraction
summary: Logical anomaly detection in industrial inspection remains challenging due to variations in visual appearance (e.g., background clutter, illumination shift, and blur), which often distract vision-centric detectors from identifying rule-level violations. However, existing benchmarks rarely provide controlled settings where logical states are fixed while such nuisance factors vary. To address this gap, we introduce VID-AD, a dataset for logical anomaly detection under vision-induced distraction. It comprises 10 manufacturing scenarios and five capture conditions, totaling 50 one-class tasks and 10,395 images. Each scenario is defined by two logical constraints selected from quantity, length, type, placement, and relation, with anomalies including both single-constraint and combined violations. We further propose a language-based anomaly detection framework that relies solely on text descriptions generated from normal images. Using contrastive learning with positive texts and contradiction-based negative texts synthesized from these descriptions, our method learns embeddings that capture logical attributes rather than low-level features. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over baselines across the evaluated settings. The dataset is available at: https://github.com/nkthiroto/VID-AD.

AI.tldr: 本文针对工业视觉检测中的逻辑异常检测问题，提出了一个新数据集VID-AD，并设计了一种基于语言描述的异常检测方法，实验证明优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有工业视觉检测很难很好地检测逻辑层面的异常，主要受到视觉扰动（如背景杂乱、光照变化、模糊）影响，而且公开数据集缺少只变化视觉条件而固定逻辑状态的情况。
AI.method: 1. 发布VID-AD数据集，覆盖10种制造场景与5种成像条件，定义50个一类任务和超万张图片，每组场景包含由逻辑属性（数量、长度、类型、位置、关系）定义的异常。2. 提出基于语言的异常检测框架：仅用正常样本生成的文本描述，通过对比学习正样本文本与基于矛盾合成的负样本文本，实现识别侧重逻辑属性的特征嵌入，而非仅关注视觉底层特征。
AI.result: 在多种评测设定下，提出方法在VID-AD数据集上相较于主流视觉异常检测方法始终有更优表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了首个关注视觉诱导逻辑异常的数据集VID-AD，并提出语言驱动的逻辑异常检测新范式，为相关研究提供了标准平台和有效方法。

title: Voronoi-based Second-order Descriptor with Whitened Metric in LiDAR Place Recognition
summary: The pooling layer plays a vital role in aggregating local descriptors into the metrizable global descriptor in the LiDAR Place Recognition (LPR). In particular, the second-order pooling is capable of capturing higher-order interactions among local descriptors. However, its existing methods in the LPR adhere to conventional implementations and post-normalization, and incur the descriptor unsuitable for Euclidean distancing. Based on the recent interpretation that associates NetVLAD with the second-order statistics, we propose to integrate second-order pooling with the inductive bias from Voronoi cells. Our novel pooling method aggregates local descriptors to form the second-order matrix and whitens the global descriptor to implicitly measure the Mahalanobis distance while conserving the cluster property from Voronoi cells, addressing its numerical instability during learning with diverse techniques. We demonstrate its performance gains through the experiments conducted on the Oxford Robotcar and Wild-Places benchmarks and analyze the numerical effect of the proposed whitening algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Voronoi单元归纳偏置的二阶池化方法，提升了LiDAR场所识别中的全局描述符表达能力，并解决了二阶池化在欧氏距离下适用性差和数值不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的二阶池化方法在LiDAR场所识别（LPR）中存在全局描述符不适用欧氏距离、数值不稳定等问题。现有方法主要沿用常规实现和归一化步骤，未能很好地解决这些弊端。
AI.method: 受NetVLAD方法二阶统计学新解释的启发，作者将二阶池化与Voronoi单元的归纳偏置相结合，提出新型池化方法。该方法通过构建二阶矩阵并白化处理全局描述符，使其隐式衡量Mahalanobis距离，同时保留Voronoi聚类性质，并采用多种技术改善训练过程的数值稳定性。
AI.result: 在Oxford Robotcar和Wild-Places等公开基准上进行了实验，结果显示所提方法提升了性能。同时对新提出的白化算法的数值效果进行了详细分析。
AI.conclusion: 本方法有效提升了LPR任务中的全局描述符表现力，解决了传统二阶池化方法的数值稳定性和距离度量适用性问题，在多个数据集上取得了优良效果，具有实际应用价值。

title: Leveraging a Statistical Shape Model for Efficient Generation of Annotated Training Data: A Case Study on Liver Landmarks Segmentation
summary: Anatomical landmark segmentation serves as a critical initial step for robust multimodal registration during computer-assisted interventions. Current approaches predominantly rely on deep learning, which often necessitates the extensive manual generation of annotated datasets. In this paper, we present a novel strategy for creating large annotated datasets using a statistical shape model (SSM) based on a mean shape that is manually labeled only once. We demonstrate the method's efficacy through its application to deep-learning-based anatomical landmark segmentation, specifically targeting the detection of the anterior ridge and the falciform ligament in 3D liver shapes. A specialized deep learning network was trained with 8,800 annotated liver shapes generated by the SSM. The network's performance was evaluated on 500 unseen synthetic SSM shapes, yielding a mean Intersection over Union of 91.4% (87.4% for the anterior ridge and 87.6% for the falciform ligament). Subsequently, the network was applied to clinical patient liver shapes, with qualitative evaluation indicating promising results and highlighting the generalizability of the proposed approach. Our findings suggest that the SSM-based data generation approach alleviates the labor-intensive process of manual labeling while enabling the creation of large annotated training datasets for machine learning. Although our study focuses on liver anatomy, the proposed methodology holds potential for a broad range of applications where annotated training datasets play a pivotal role in developing accurate deep-learning models.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出通过基于统计形状模型（SSM）的方法，仅需一次人工标注均值形状，即可自动生成大量带标注的解剖数据，用以训练深度学习模型完成解剖标志分割。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习的解剖标志分割严重依赖大规模的人工标注数据集，而人工标注既费时又成本高。该论文试图通过减轻人工标注负担，提高数据集生成效率。
AI.method: 作者建立了一个基于均值形状单次人工标注的统计形状模型，然后利用该模型生成8800个带注释的3D肝脏形状用于训练深度学习网络。之后，将训练好的网络在500个未见过的SSM形状和实际临床数据上进行了评估。
AI.result: 在500个未见过的SSM形状上，分割网络对前缘和镰状韧带分别取得了87.4%和87.6%的IoU，平均IoU为91.4%。此外，在实际患者数据上的应用和定性评估也表现出较好迁移性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于SSM的数据生成方法有效减少了人工标注负担，可以为深度学习模型提供大量高质量的训练数据。尽管本文聚焦肝脏，但该方法适用于其他依赖注释数据集的医学图像分割应用，具有较广泛的推广前景。

title: Thermal Image Refinement with Depth Estimation using Recurrent Networks for Monocular ORB-SLAM3
summary: Autonomous navigation in GPS-denied and visually degraded environments remains challenging for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). To this end, we investigate the use of a monocular thermal camera as a standalone sensor on a UAV platform for real-time depth estimation and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). To extract depth information from thermal images, we propose a novel pipeline employing a lightweight supervised network with recurrent blocks (RBs) integrated to capture temporal dependencies, enabling more robust predictions. The network combines lightweight convolutional backbones with a thermal refinement network (T-RefNet) to refine raw thermal inputs and enhance feature visibility. The refined thermal images and predicted depth maps are integrated into ORB-SLAM3, enabling thermal-only localization. Unlike previous methods, the network is trained on a custom non-radiometric dataset, obviating the need for high-cost radiometric thermal cameras. Experimental results on datasets and UAV flights demonstrate competitive depth accuracy and robust SLAM performance under low-light conditions. On the radiometric VIVID++ (indoor-dark) dataset, our method achieves an absolute relative error of approximately 0.06, compared to baselines exceeding 0.11. In our non-radiometric indoor set, baseline errors remain above 0.24, whereas our approach remains below 0.10. Thermal-only ORB-SLAM3 maintains a mean trajectory error under 0.4 m.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用单目热成像相机作为无人机（UAV）在无GPS与视觉退化环境下自主导航的唯一传感器，通过创新的神经网络方法实现热像深度估计和热成像SLAM，无需高价辐射型热像仪，实验表现优异。
AI.motivation: 在无GPS支持且可见光差的环境下，无人机的定位和地图构建极为困难。传统视觉SLAM难以工作，热像仪因不受可见光限制成为潜在解决方案，但一般热像数据难以用于高精度深度与定位。本研究旨在突破热像单传感定位与建图的障碍。
AI.method: 设计了一套轻量级卷积网络结合时序递归模块（RBs），专为热像图像特征增强及深度估计设计，并通过T-RefNet网络增强原始热像特征，热像深度与原图共同输入ORB-SLAM3进行定位。训练基于自制非辐射热像数据集，无需昂贵设备。
AI.result: 实验在公开辐射型数据集与自制数据集均取得远好于基线的深度估计与SLAM效果。在VIVID++全天黑环境下，绝对相对误差仅0.06（基线≥0.11），自制数据中方法误差＜0.10（基线＞0.24），SLAM轨迹平均误差小于0.4米。
AI.conclusion: 本文方案在低照明甚至无光环境下实现了基于低成本热像仪的无人机高精度深度估计和定位，为热像SLAM提供可行路径，对极端环境视觉导航具有重要意义。

title: When Visual Privacy Protection Meets Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: The emergence of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and the widespread usage of MLLM cloud services such as GPT-4V raised great concerns about privacy leakage in visual data. As these models are typically deployed in cloud services, users are required to submit their images and videos, posing serious privacy risks. However, how to tackle such privacy concerns is an under-explored problem. Thus, in this paper, we aim to conduct a new investigation to protect visual privacy when enjoying the convenience brought by MLLM services. We address the practical case where the MLLM is a "black box", i.e., we only have access to its input and output without knowing its internal model information. To tackle such a challenging yet demanding problem, we propose a novel framework, in which we carefully design the learning objective with Pareto optimality to seek a better trade-off between visual privacy and MLLM's performance, and propose critical-history enhanced optimization to effectively optimize the framework with the black-box MLLM. Our experiments show that our method is effective on different benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态大模型（如GPT-4V）云服务中视觉数据隐私泄漏问题，提出了在黑盒场景下保护视觉隐私的新方法，并兼顾模型性能。
AI.motivation: 随着MLLMs的普及，用户需上传图片或视频到云端，极易造成隐私泄漏，而目前对视觉隐私保护研究不足。
AI.method: 作者提出一个新框架，构建了基于帕累托最优的学习目标，在提高隐私保护的同时兼顾MLLM性能，并引入关键历史增强优化算法，有效针对只能访问输入输出的黑盒MLLM进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法分别在不同基准测试集上均取得了良好效果，兼顾了隐私保护和模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架可在实际黑盒多模态大模型服务中有效缓解视觉数据隐私泄漏风险，同时维持MLLM的服务性能。

title: Seeing Beyond: Extrapolative Domain Adaptive Panoramic Segmentation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. The code is available at https://github.com/zyfone/EDA-PSeg
summary: Cross-domain panoramic semantic segmentation has attracted growing interest as it enables comprehensive 360° scene understanding for real-world applications. However, it remains particularly challenging due to severe geometric Field of View (FoV) distortions and inconsistent open-set semantics across domains. In this work, we formulate an open-set domain adaptation setting, and propose Extrapolative Domain Adaptive Panoramic Segmentation (EDA-PSeg) framework that trains on local perspective views and tests on full 360° panoramic images, explicitly tackling both geometric FoV shifts across domains and semantic uncertainty arising from previously unseen classes. To this end, we propose the Euler-Margin Attention (EMA), which introduces an angular margin to enhance viewpoint-invariant semantic representation, while performing amplitude and phase modulation to improve generalization toward unseen classes. Additionally, we design the Graph Matching Adapter (GMA), which builds high-order graph relations to align shared semantics across FoV shifts while effectively separating novel categories through structural adaptation. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets under camera-shift, weather-condition, and open-set scenarios demonstrate that EDA-PSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance, robust generalization to diverse viewing geometries, and resilience under varying environmental conditions. The code is available at https://github.com/zyfone/EDA-PSeg.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的跨域全景语义分割方法，能够更好地适应视角畸变和开放集类别不一致问题，并在多个基准数据集上取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中，对360°场景进行全面理解非常重要，但由于视场畸变和开放集类别差异，跨域全景语义分割面临极大挑战。现有方法难以兼顾视角变化和未知类别的泛化。
AI.method: 提出了Extrapolative Domain Adaptive Panoramic Segmentation (EDA-PSeg)框架，在局部视角图像上训练，在全景图像上测试。核心方法包括Euler-Margin Attention (EMA)模块，通过引入角度边界及幅相调制提升表示不变性和对未知类别的泛化能力；Graph Matching Adapter (GMA)模块，通过构建高阶图结构关系，提高语义对齐能力并区分新类别。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，EDA-PSeg在摄像头位置变化、天气条件改变和开放集场景下均取得了最先进的分割性能，表现出更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EDA-PSeg有效解决了全景分割中的跨域泛化和开放集问题，能够为实际360°场景理解和应用提供更强支持。代码已开源，便于后续研究。

title: VAD4Space: Visual Anomaly Detection for Planetary Surface Imagery
summary: Space missions generate massive volumes of high-resolution orbital and surface imagery that far exceed the capacity for manual inspection. Detecting rare phenomena is scientifically critical, yet traditional supervised learning struggles due to scarce labeled examples and closed-world assumptions that prevent discovery of genuinely novel observations. In this work, we investigate Visual Anomaly Detection (VAD) as a framework for automated discovery in planetary exploration. We present the first empirical evaluation of state-of-the-art feature-based VAD methods on real planetary imagery, encompassing both orbital lunar data and Mars rover surface imagery. To support this evaluation, we introduce two benchmarks: (i) a lunar dataset derived from Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Camera Narrow Angle imagery, comprising of fresh and degraded craters as anomalies alongside normal terrain; and (ii) a Mars surface dataset designed to reflect the characteristics of rover-acquired imagery. We evaluate multiple VAD approaches with a focus on computationally efficient, edge-oriented solutions suitable for onboard deployment, applicable to both orbital platforms surveying the lunar surface and surface rovers operating on Mars. Our results demonstrate that feature-based VAD methods can effectively identify rare planetary surface phenomena while remaining feasible for resource-constrained environments. By grounding anomaly detection in planetary science, this work establishes practical benchmarks and highlights the potential of open-world perception systems to support a range of mission-critical applications, including tactical planning, landing site selection, hazard detection, bandwidth-aware data prioritization, and the discovery of unanticipated geological processes.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出并实证评估了视觉异常检测（VAD）在行星探测中的应用，建立了实用基准数据集，证明特征型VAD方法能高效识别稀有的行星地表现象。
AI.motivation: 深空任务产生大量高分辨率影像，人工检查不可行且缺乏稀有现象的标注数据，传统监督学习方法难以发现新颖现象，因此需探索更自动化、适应性强的方法。
