AI.method: 引入了两个公开的行星影像基准数据集：一是基于月球探测器相机影像，含新鲜与风化陨石坑与正常地形；二是模拟火星探测车获取的地表影像。利用多种先进、计算高效的特征型VAD方法，在这两个数据集上进行实证评估，重点关注资源受限设备的部署适应性。
AI.result: 实验证明，特征型VAD方法可以有效识别月球和火星影像中的异常现象，且具有良好的计算效率，适合搭载在航天器与探测车等资源有限平台上实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次为行星影像异常检测建立了标准评测基准，展示了开放世界VAD方法在科学发现、决策规划、着陆点选择、危险探测和优先数据传输等任务中的巨大应用潜力。

title: Kimodo: Scaling Controllable Human Motion Generation
summary: High-quality human motion data is becoming increasingly important for applications in robotics, simulation, and entertainment. Recent generative models offer a potential data source, enabling human motion synthesis through intuitive inputs like text prompts or kinematic constraints on poses. However, the small scale of public mocap datasets has limited the motion quality, control accuracy, and generalization of these models. In this work, we introduce Kimodo, an expressive and controllable kinematic motion diffusion model trained on 700 hours of optical motion capture data. Our model generates high-quality motions while being easily controlled through text and a comprehensive suite of kinematic constraints including full-body keyframes, sparse joint positions/rotations, 2D waypoints, and dense 2D paths. This is enabled through a carefully designed motion representation and two-stage denoiser architecture that decomposes root and body prediction to minimize motion artifacts while allowing for flexible constraint conditioning. Experiments on the large-scale mocap dataset justify key design decisions and analyze how the scaling of dataset size and model size affect performance.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的运动扩散模型Kimodo，凭借700小时大规模光学动作捕捉数据进行训练，能高质量并灵活地产生受控的人体运动。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型因公开动作捕捉数据集规模小，导致生成的人体运动质量不高、控制能力不足、泛化性差。作者希望解决数据稀缺带来的限制，提高运动模型在质量和可控性方面的表现。
AI.method: 作者设计了Kimodo，一个运动扩散模型，基于700小时的大型动作捕捉数据训练。模型采用了新的运动表达形式和两阶段去噪器架构，将躯干与全身运动分开预测，减少伪影，并支持文本、全身关键帧、稀疏/密集关节数据、2D航点等多种运动约束条件。
AI.result: 模型能受控生成高质量的人体运动，实验表明大规模数据集与创新模型结构有效提升了动作质量与控制能力。通过对数据规模和模型规模的实验，分析了二者对性能的影响，并验证了关键设计选择的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 利用丰富动作捕捉数据和巧妙架构，Kimodo大幅提升了运动生成的质量与可控性，为后续基于生成模型的人体运动合成提供了新范例。

title: Human-like Object Grouping in Self-supervised Vision Transformers
summary: Vision foundation models trained with self-supervised objectives achieve strong performance across diverse tasks and exhibit emergent object segmentation properties. However, their alignment with human object perception remains poorly understood. Here, we introduce a behavioral benchmark in which participants make same/different object judgments for dot pairs on naturalistic scenes, scaling up a classical psychophysics paradigm to over 1000 trials. We test a diverse set of vision models using a simple readout from their representations to predict subjects' reaction times. We observe a steady improvement across model generations, with both architecture and training objective contributing to alignment, and transformer-based models trained with the DINO self-supervised objective showing the strongest performance. To investigate the source of this improvement, we propose a novel metric to quantify the object-centric component of representations by measuring patch similarity within and between objects. Across models, stronger object-centric structure predicts human segmentation behavior more accurately. We further show that matching the Gram matrix of supervised transformer models, capturing similarity structure across image patches, with that of a self-supervised model through distillation improves their alignment with human behavior, converging with the prior finding that Gram anchoring improves DINOv3's feature quality. Together, these results demonstrate that self-supervised vision models capture object structure in a behaviorally human-like manner, and that Gram matrix structure plays a role in driving perceptual alignment.

AI.tldr: 研究比较自监督视觉基础模型与人类视觉感知能力的对齐程度，并提出新行为学基准与分析方法，发现以DINO为代表的自监督模型更接近人类分割性能且结构相似性（Gram matrix）对对齐提升有帮助。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督训练的视觉模型在多任务上表现优异，出现了类似人类的目标分割能力，但其与人类视觉感知的一致性尚不明确。因此需要通过行为实验和指标加以量化分析。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个新的行为基准：借鉴心理物理学范式，让人判断两个点是否属于同一物体，覆盖1000多个实验场景。然后用各种视觉模型的特征通过简单读出层预测人类反应时间，并分析模型架构与训练目标的影响。同时，提出新指标，通过图像补丁内外的相似度度量模型的“以目标为中心”结构，并探索通过Gram矩阵蒸馏来提升对齐。
AI.result: 结果显示最新一代模型对齐能力提升，DINO等自监督transformer表现最佳。具备更强以目标为中心结构的模型，对人类分割行为预测更好。进一步，使用Gram矩阵信息进行蒸馏能提升有监督模型的对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督视觉基础模型能够以类似人类的方式捕捉目标结构，Gram矩阵结构有助于提升模型与人类感知的对齐度。

title: Panoramic Affordance Prediction
summary: Affordance prediction serves as a critical bridge between perception and action in embodied AI. However, existing research is confined to pinhole camera models, which suffer from narrow Fields of View (FoV) and fragmented observations, often missing critical holistic environmental context. In this paper, we present the first exploration into Panoramic Affordance Prediction, utilizing 360-degree imagery to capture global spatial relationships and holistic scene understanding. To facilitate this novel task, we first introduce PAP-12K, a large-scale benchmark dataset containing over 1,000 ultra-high-resolution (12k, 11904 x 5952) panoramic images with over 12k carefully annotated QA pairs and affordance masks. Furthermore, we propose PAP, a training-free, coarse-to-fine pipeline inspired by the human foveal visual system to tackle the ultra-high resolution and severe distortion inherent in panoramic images. PAP employs recursive visual routing via grid prompting to progressively locate targets, applies an adaptive gaze mechanism to rectify local geometric distortions, and utilizes a cascaded grounding pipeline to extract precise instance-level masks. Experimental results on PAP-12K reveal that existing affordance prediction methods designed for standard perspective images suffer severe performance degradation and fail due to the unique challenges of panoramic vision. In contrast, PAP framework effectively overcomes these obstacles, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines and highlighting the immense potential of panoramic perception for robust embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本论文首次提出并系统研究了全景（360度）视角下的可供性预测任务，构建了大规模12K超高分辨率全景数据集PAP-12K，并设计了无需训练的PAP方法，有效提升了泛化与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可供性预测方法主要基于小视场针孔相机，无法捕获完整环境信息，限制了智能体对环境的感知与行为决策。因此亟需面向全景视角开展可供性预测，提高感知完整性和智能体智能水平。
AI.method: 1) 构建PAP-12K数据集，包含1000多张12K分辨率的全景图像及1.2万余对QA标注与可供性掩码。2) 提出PAP方法，包含递归网格引导定位、类人类眼注视校正、级联实例掩码抽取等，无需训练，专为全景图像的畸变与高分辨特点设计。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于常规透视图像的可供性预测方法在全景数据上性能严重降低；而PAP方法显著优于当前主流基线，能有效应对全景视角下的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次验证了全景可供性预测的可行性和高价值，为实现更强感知能力的智能体铺平了道路；提出的数据集和方法为后续研究提供了重要基准和范例。

title: PhyGaP: Physically-Grounded Gaussians with Polarization Cues
comment: The paper is accepted by CVPR 2026
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have demonstrated great success in modeling reflective 3D objects and their interaction with the environment via deferred rendering (DR). However, existing methods often struggle with correctly reconstructing physical attributes such as albedo and reflectance, and therefore they do not support high-fidelity relighting. Observing that this limitation stems from the lack of shape and material information in RGB images, we present PhyGaP, a physically-grounded 3DGS method that leverages polarization cues to facilitate precise reflection decomposition and visually consistent relighting of reconstructed objects. Specifically, we design a polarimetric deferred rendering (PolarDR) process to model polarization by reflection, and a self-occlusion-aware environment map building technique (GridMap) to resolve indirect lighting of non-convex objects. We validate on multiple synthetic and real-world scenes, including those featuring only partial polarization cues, that PhyGaP not only excels in reconstructing the appearance and surface normal of reflective 3D objects (~2 dB in PSNR and 45.7% in Cosine Distance better than existing RGB-based methods on average), but also achieves state-of-the-art inverse rendering and relighting capability. Our code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合偏振信息的3D高斯投影方法PhyGaP，显著提升了反射物体的属性重建与高质量重光照能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯投影技术虽然能模拟反射物体，但在物理属性（如反照率和反射率）重建及高保真重光照中表现不佳。主要原因在于RGB图像缺乏必要的形状和材料信息。
AI.method: PhyGaP方法利用偏振线索，辅助精确反射分解及视觉一致性重光照。具体设计了极化延迟渲染（PolarDR）以模拟反射偏振，引入自遮挡感知环境贴图（GridMap）以处理非凸物体的间接光照。
AI.result: 在多个合成及真实场景（包括仅部分偏振数据）进行验证，PhyGaP在反射物体外观和表面法线重建上，相较于RGB方法PSNR提升约2dB，余弦距离提升45.7%；逆向渲染和重光照效果达到最新水平。
AI.conclusion: PhyGaP有效解决了现有3DGS方法在高质量反射属性重建和重光照的不足，为物理真实感3D重建及应用提供了新方案。

title: HSImul3R: Physics-in-the-Loop Reconstruction of Simulation-Ready Human-Scene Interactions
summary: We present HSImul3R, a unified framework for simulation-ready 3D reconstruction of human-scene interactions (HSI) from casual captures, including sparse-view images and monocular videos. Existing methods suffer from a perception-simulation gap: visually plausible reconstructions often violate physical constraints, leading to instability in physics engines and failure in embodied AI applications. To bridge this gap, we introduce a physically-grounded bi-directional optimization pipeline that treats the physics simulator as an active supervisor to jointly refine human dynamics and scene geometry. In the forward direction, we employ Scene-targeted Reinforcement Learning to optimize human motion under dual supervision of motion fidelity and contact stability. In the reverse direction, we propose Direct Simulation Reward Optimization, which leverages simulation feedback on gravitational stability and interaction success to refine scene geometry. We further present HSIBench, a new benchmark with diverse objects and interaction scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HSImul3R produces the first stable, simulation-ready HSI reconstructions and can be directly deployed to real-world humanoid robots.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出HSImul3R框架，实现从普通图像或视频中重建物理仿真可用的人-场景交互三维模型，优化结果更适用于仿真和机器人应用。
AI.motivation: 现有的人-场景交互三维重建方法虽然视觉上合理，但常常违背物理约束，导致在物理仿真或智能体应用中不稳定。需要缩小感知与仿真之间的差距，使重建结果既真实又物理可用。
AI.method: 提出双向优化流程：1）正向通过场景目标强化学习方法，在运动真实性与接触稳定性双重监督下优化人体运动；2）反向利用仿真反馈（如重力稳定性和交互成功率）优化场景几何。同时提出HSIBench新基准，覆盖多样的物体和交互场景。
AI.result: HSImul3R首次实现了可直接用于仿真的人-场景交互三维重建，并在多个实验中表现优异，生成的结果在物理引擎中稳定，可直接应用于实际机器人。
AI.conclusion: HSImul3R有效地将感知与仿真结合，实现了高质量、仿真可用的人-场景交互三维重建，对智能体和机器人有直接促进作用。

title: U-Face: An Efficient and Generalizable Framework for Unsupervised Facial Attribute Editing via Subspace Learning
summary: Latent space-based facial attribute editing methods have gained popularity in applications such as digital entertainment, virtual avatar creation, and human-computer interaction systems due to their potential for efficient and flexible attribute manipulation, particularly for continuous edits. Among these, unsupervised latent space-based methods, which discover effective semantic vectors without relying on labeled data, have attracted considerable attention in the research community. However, existing methods still encounter difficulties in disentanglement, as manipulating a specific facial attribute may unintentionally affect other attributes, complicating fine-grained controllability. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework designed to offer an effective and adaptable solution for unsupervised facial attribute editing, called Unsupervised Facial Attribute Controllable Editing (U-Face). The proposed method frames semantic vector learning as a subspace learning problem, where latent vectors are approximated within a lower-dimensional semantic subspace spanned by a semantic vector matrix. This formulation can also be equivalently interpreted from a projection-reconstruction perspective and further generalized into an autoencoder framework, providing a foundation that can support disentangled representation learning in a flexible manner. To improve disentanglement and controllability, we impose orthogonal non-negative constraints on the semantic vectors and incorporate attribute boundary vectors to reduce entanglement in the learned directions. Although these constraints make the optimization problem challenging, we design an alternating iterative algorithm, called Alternating Iterative Disentanglement and Controllability (AIDC), with closed-form updates and provable convergence under specific conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个新的无监督人脸属性可控制编辑框架U-Face，实现了更好的属性解耦和可控性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于潜空间的人脸属性编辑方法，虽在无监督下有较大潜力，但在属性解耦性和精细可控性方面存在明显不足：编辑某一属性时容易影响其它属性，导致编辑不可控。
AI.method: 本文将语义向量学习建模为子空间学习问题，通过语义向量矩阵在低维子空间近似表示潜向量，并引入正交非负约束及属性边界向量减少属性耦合。提出了交替迭代优化算法AIDC，保证了优化的可行性和收敛性。
AI.result: 所提出方法在属性解耦和编辑可控性上优于现有无监督方法，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: U-Face框架为无监督人脸属性编辑领域提供了一种高效、可扩展、属性解耦性更强的解决方案，有助于推动相关应用和研究发展。

title: Towards Generalizable Robotic Manipulation in Dynamic Environments
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel in static manipulation but struggle in dynamic environments with moving targets. This performance gap primarily stems from a scarcity of dynamic manipulation datasets and the reliance of mainstream VLAs on single-frame observations, restricting their spatiotemporal reasoning capabilities. To address this, we introduce DOMINO, a large-scale dataset and benchmark for generalizable dynamic manipulation, featuring 35 tasks with hierarchical complexities, over 110K expert trajectories, and a multi-dimensional evaluation suite. Through comprehensive experiments, we systematically evaluate existing VLAs on dynamic tasks, explore effective training strategies for dynamic awareness, and validate the generalizability of dynamic data. Furthermore, we propose PUMA, a dynamics-aware VLA architecture. By integrating scene-centric historical optical flow and specialized world queries to implicitly forecast object-centric future states, PUMA couples history-aware perception with short-horizon prediction. Results demonstrate that PUMA achieves state-of-the-art performance, yielding a 6.3% absolute improvement in success rate over baselines. Moreover, we show that training on dynamic data fosters robust spatiotemporal representations that transfer to static tasks. All code and data are available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/DOMINO.

AI.tldr: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在动态场景中表现不佳，本文提出了DOMINO大规模数据集和PUMA新架构，显著提升了动态操控能力。
AI.motivation: VLA模型虽然在静态物体操作中表现优异，但由于缺乏动态数据集且仅用单帧图片，导致它们在处理动态环境（如移动目标）时，时空推理能力有限、表现较差。研究急需更好支持动态操作的新数据集与方法。
AI.method: 1. 构建DOMINO数据集，覆盖35类动态操作任务、超过11万条专家轨迹、多维度评估标准。2. 系统评测现有VLA模型在动态任务中的表现。3. 探索动态感知训练策略，提升模型时空泛化能力。4. 提出PUMA新架构，结合场景历史光流和世界查询预测物体未来状态，实现基于历史-感知和短期预测能力。
AI.result: PUMA在动态操控任务上达到最新最优（SOTA）水平，整体成功率较基线提升6.3%。并且证明在动态数据上训练有助于模型形成更强大的时空表征，进而迁移提升静态任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 为动态操作场景建立了标准数据集和评测基准，提出的PUMA模型能有效利用时空信息，显著提升动态与静态任务表现。研究推动了VLA模型在现实复杂环境下的应用能力。

title: Towards Generalizable Deepfake Detection via Real Distribution Bias Correction
summary: To generalize deepfake detectors to future unseen forgeries, most existing methods attempt to simulate the dynamically evolving forgery types using available source domain data. However, predicting an unbounded set of future manipulations from limited prior examples is infeasible. To overcome this limitation, we propose to exploit the invariance of \textbf{real data} from two complementary perspectives: the fixed population distribution of the entire real class and the inherent Gaussianity of individual real images. Building on these properties, we introduce the Real Distribution Bias Correction (RDBC) framework, which consists of two key components: the Real Population Distribution Estimation module and the Distribution-Sampled Feature Whitening module. The former utilizes the independent and identically distributed (\iid) property of real samples to derive the normal distribution form of their statistics, from which the distribution parameters can be estimated using limited source domain data. Based on the learned population distribution, the latter utilizes the inherent Gaussianity of real data as a discriminative prior and performs a sampling-based whitening operation to amplify the Gaussianity gap between real and fake samples. Through synergistic coupling of the two modules, our model captures the real-world properties of real samples, thereby enhancing its generalizability to unseen target domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RDBC achieves state-of-the-art performance in both in-domain and cross-domain deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 论文提出通过挖掘真实数据的不变性，提升deepfake检测器在面对未知伪造类型时的泛化能力。提出了RDBC框架，在广泛实验中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有deepfake检测方法多依赖已知伪造类型的数据，难以泛化到未来未见过的新型伪造。如何让检测器具备应对未知伪造的能力，是目前领域的痛点。作者认为相比伪造数据的不确定性，真实数据具有统计规律性和分布特征，是提升泛化性的关键。
AI.method: 提出RDBC（Real Distribution Bias Correction）框架，核心包括两个模块：1) 真实总体分布估计模块，利用i.i.d假设估计真实样本的分布参数；2) 基于分布采样的特征白化模块，依据真实样本的高斯性特征，对特征进行采样白化操作，从而放大真实与伪造之间的分布间隙。两个模块协同工作，加强模型对真实数据统计特性的建模。
AI.result: RDBC框架在各类deepfake检测数据集上（包括in-domain和cross-domain场景）进行了详尽对比实验，实验结果显示其性能优于现有主流检测模型，在泛化能力上尤其突出。
AI.conclusion: 利用真实数据分布的不变性及高斯性作为先验，能够显著提升深度伪造检测任务中的跨域与未知伪造识别能力，RDBC为未来深度伪造检测提供了新的泛化思路和强有力的技术支持。

title: Multi-Grained Vision-Language Alignment for Domain Generalized Person Re-Identification
summary: Domain Generalized person Re-identification (DG Re-ID) is a challenging task, where models are trained on source domains but tested on unseen target domains. Although previous pure vision-based models have achieved significant progress, the performance remains further improved. Recently, Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present outstanding generalization capabilities in various visual applications. However, directly adapting a VLM to Re-ID shows limited generalization improvement. This is because the VLM only produces with global features that are insensitive to ID nuances. To tacle this problem, we propose a CLIP-based multi-grained vision-language alignment framework in this work. Specifically, several multi-grained prompts are introduced in language modality to describe different body parts and align with their counterparts in vision modality. To obtain fine-grained visual information, an adaptively masked multi-head self-attention module is employed to precisely extract specific part features. To train the proposed module, an MLLM-based visual grounding expert is employed to automatically generate pseudo labels of body parts for supervision. Extensive experiments conducted on both single- and multi-source generalization protocols demonstrate the superior performance of our approach. The implementation code will be released at https://github.com/RikoLi/MUVA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CLIP的多粒度视觉-语言对齐框架，有效提升了行人重识别在未见域上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉的行人重识别方法在泛化到新域时效果有限，尽管VLM（视觉-语言模型）具备良好的跨域能力，但直接应用于Re-ID时对细粒度身份特征不敏感，提升有限，因此需创新模型结构以捕捉和对齐更丰富的细节特征。
AI.method: 提出多粒度视觉-语言对齐框架：通过在语言模态中引入多粒度提示词，分别描述人体各部位，并与视觉模态中相应部分对齐。采用自适应掩码多头自注意力模块获取更细粒度的视觉特征。训练时利用MLLM视觉定位专家自动生成人体部位伪标签进行监督。
AI.result: 在单源与多源泛化实验协议下进行大量实验，结果表明该方法优于现有方法，在未见域上表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过多粒度视觉-语言特征对齐，有效提升了基于CLIP的模型在行人重识别泛化任务中的表现，方法具有实用和推广价值。代码即将开源。

title: EI-Part: Explode for Completion and Implode for Refinement
summary:
Part-level 3D generation is crucial for various downstream applications, including gaming, film production, and industrial design. However, decomposing a 3D shape into geometrically plausible and meaningful components remains a significant challenge. Previous part-based generation methods often struggle to produce well-constructed parts, exhibiting poor structural coherence, geometric implausibility, inaccuracy, or inefficiency.
  To address these challenges, we introduce EI-Part, a novel framework specifically designed to generate high-quality 3D shapes with components, characterized by strong structural coherence, geometric plausibility, geometric fidelity, and generation efficiency. We propose utilizing distinct representations at different stages: an Explode state for part completion and an Implode state for geometry refinement. This strategy fully leverages spatial resolution, enabling flexible part completion and fine geometric detail generation. To maintain structural coherence between parts, a self-attention mechanism is incorporated in both exploded and imploded states, facilitating effective information perception and feature fusion among components during generation.
  Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that EI-Part efficiently produces semantically meaningful and structurally coherent parts with fine-grained geometric details, achieving state-of-the-art performance in part-level 3D generation.
  Project page: https://cvhadessun.github.io/EI-Part/

AI.tldr: EI-Part提出了一种新颖的3D形状部件级生成框架，通过引入爆炸和收缩状态，并结合自注意力机制，有效提升了形状分解和部件生成的结构一致性与几何细节，达到了SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 当前3D形状的部件级生成在游戏、影视、工业设计等应用中十分关键，但传统方法在几何合理性、结构一致性和生成效率等方面存在明显不足。亟需改进能高质量分解和生成有意义部件的框架。
AI.method: EI-Part框架采用爆炸（Explode）状态实现部件补全，收缩（Implode）状态做几何细化，两阶段各自用适宜的数据表示方法。同时，在这两个阶段都引入自注意力机制，加强部件之间的信息感知与特征融合，从而提升结构和几何表现。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上的实验表明，EI-Part在部件的语义合理性、结构一致性和几何细节等方面均取得了优秀表现，实现了当前最佳水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: EI-Part通过创新的分阶段、两种表示与自注意力机制显著改进了3D部件级生成的质量和效率，为实际下游3D内容创建提供了更优的解决方案。

title: A Hyperbolic Perspective on Hierarchical Structure in Object-Centric Scene Representations
summary: Slot attention has emerged as a powerful framework for unsupervised object-centric learning, decomposing visual scenes into a small set of compact vector representations called \emph{slots}, each capturing a distinct region or object. However, these slots are learned in Euclidean space, which provides no geometric inductive bias for the hierarchical relationships that naturally structure visual scenes. In this work, we propose a simple post-hoc pipeline to project Euclidean slot embeddings onto the Lorentz hyperboloid of hyperbolic space, without modifying the underlying training pipeline. We construct five-level visual hierarchies directly from slot attention masks and analyse whether hyperbolic geometry reveals latent hierarchical structure that remains invisible in Euclidean space. Integrating our pipeline with SPOT (images), VideoSAUR (video), and SlotContrast (video), We find that hyperbolic projection exposes a consistent scene-level to object-level organisation, where coarse slots occupy greater manifold depth than fine slots, which is absent in Euclidean space. We further identify a "curvature--task tradeoff": low curvature ($c{=}0.2$) matches or outperforms Euclidean on parent slot retrieval, while moderate curvature ($c{=}0.5$) achieves better inter-level separation. Together, these findings suggest that slot representations already encode latent hierarchy that hyperbolic geometry reveals, motivating end-to-end hyperbolic training as a natural next step. Code and models are available at \href{https://github.com/NeeluMadan/HHS}{github.com/NeeluMadan/HHS}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单的后处理方法，将 Slot Attention 学到的欧式空间插槽向量投影到双曲空间中，无需更改原有训练流程。实验发现，经过双曲投影后，插槽表达能够揭示视觉场景中原本在欧式空间中不可见的层次结构。
AI.motivation: Slot Attention 在无监督物体抽象表征中有很大优势，但其向量表征在欧式空间中无法体现视觉场景天然的层级关系。如何揭示和利用这种层级结构，是提升表征能力的关键。
AI.method: 作者提出一种后处理管道，把 Slot Attention 输出的欧式空间插槽嵌入，通过投影方式迁移到双曲（Lorentz）空间。无需修改原有训练，直接基于生成的注意力掩码构建五级视觉层级结构，并与相关模型（SPOT、VideoSAUR、SlotContrast）结合分析。
AI.result: 双曲投影后，Slot 表达展现出一致的从场景到目标的组织层级，粗粒度插槽在流形上层次深度更大，细粒度插槽则相反，这在欧式空间中无法观察到。此外发现曲率设置影响表现，低曲率有利于父插槽检索，适中曲率则利于层级区分。
AI.conclusion: Slot 表达本身包含潜在的层级信息，通过双曲投影得以可视化，建议后续研究考虑端到端双曲空间训练以进一步提升性能。

title: High-speed Imaging through Turbulence with Event-based Light Fields
summary: This work introduces and demonstrates the first system capable of imaging fast-moving extended non-rigid objects through strong atmospheric turbulence at high frame rate. Event cameras are a novel sensing architecture capable of estimating high-speed imagery at thousands of frames per second. However, on their own event cameras are unable to disambiguate scene motion from turbulence. In this work, we overcome this limitation using event-based light field cameras: By simultaneously capturing multiple views of a scene, event-based light field cameras and machine learning-based reconstruction algorithms are able to disambiguate motion-induced dynamics, which produce events that are strongly correlated across views, from turbulence-induced dynamics, which produce events that are weakly correlated across view. Tabletop experiments demonstrate event-based light field can overcome strong turbulence while imaging high-speed objects traveling at up to 16,000 pixels per second.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种首次能在强烈大气湍流环境下以高帧率成像快速运动非刚性物体的系统。通过事件光场相机和机器学习方法，实现了对场景运动与湍流影响的区分。
AI.motivation: 当前的事件相机虽能实现高帧率成像，但在大气湍流下难以区分物体自身运动与湍流导致的扰动，因此需要新方法提升成像能力。
AI.method: 结合事件光场相机同时获取场景多视图，利用机器学习重建算法，基于跨视角的事件相关性区分运动引起的事件与湍流引起的事件。
AI.result: 实验表明，事件光场相机能够在强大气湍流下，对速度高达16000像素每秒的高速运动目标实现成像，显著优于传统事件相机。
AI.conclusion: 事件光场成像系统有效提升了在大气湍流环境下对高速目标的成像能力，为动态场景的高质量视觉感知提供了新思路。

title: Intrinsic Tolerance in C-Arm Imaging: How Extrinsic Re-optimization Preserves 3D Reconstruction Accuracy
summary:
\textbf{Purpose:} C-arm fluoroscopy's 3D reconstruction relies on accurate intrinsic calibration, which is often challenging in clinical practice. This study ensures high-precision reconstruction accuracy by re-optimizing the extrinsic parameters to compensate for intrinsic calibration errors.
  \noindent\textbf{Methods:} We conducted both simulation and real-world experiments using five commercial C-arm systems. Intrinsic parameters were perturbed in controlled increments. Focal length was increased by 100 to 700 pixels ($\approx$20 mm to 140 mm) and principal point by 20 to 200 pixels. For each perturbation, we (1) reconstructed 3D points from known phantom geometries, (2) re-estimated extrinsic poses using standard optimization, and (3) measured reconstruction and reprojection errors relative to ground truth.
  \noindent\textbf{Results:} Even with focal length errors up to 500 pixels ($\approx$100 mm, assuming a nominal focal length of $\sim$1000 mm), mean 3D reconstruction error remained under 0.2 mm. Larger focal length deviations (700 pixels) elevated error to only $\approx$0.3 mm. Principal point shifts up to 200 pixels introduced negligible reconstruction error once extrinsic parameters were re-optimized, with reprojection error increases below 0.5 pixels.
  \noindent\textbf{Conclusion:} Moderate errors in intrinsic calibration can be effectively mitigated by extrinsic re-optimization, preserving submillimeter 3D reconstruction accuracy. This intrinsic tolerance suggests a practical pathway to relax calibration precision requirements, thereby simplifying C-arm system setup and reducing clinical workflow burden without compromising performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了C-arm透视中3D重建对内参误差的容忍性，发现通过重优化外参，即使内参校准有较大误差，依然能保持亚毫米级重建精度，从而有望简化临床流程和系统调试。
AI.motivation: C-arm三维重建高度依赖摄像机内参的准确性，但实际临床中精确校准内参较为困难，容易影响重建质量。因此需要探究内参误差对重建准确性的影响，并寻找补救方法。
AI.method: 通过仿真和实际中的5种商用C-arm系统，给定不同幅度的内参扰动（焦距及主点），每次扰动后通过三步：1）用已知实体几何体重建3D点，2）利用标准优化算法重新估计外参，3）将重建误差和重投影误差与真实值比对。
AI.result: 焦距偏差最多可达500像素（约100mm）时，平均3D重建误差仍小于0.2mm，700像素时也仅约0.3mm。主点偏移200像素下，重建误差可忽略，重投影误差增加不超过0.5像素。
AI.conclusion: 只要对外参进行重优化，即使内参有中等程度误差，也能有效保证亚毫米级3D重建精度。这为C-arm系统内参校准提供容错机制，可降低校准精度要求，简化系统部署和临床使用流程。

title: EyeWorld: A Generative World Model of Ocular State and Dynamics
summary: Ophthalmic decision-making depends on subtle lesion-scale cues interpreted across multimodal imaging and over time, yet most medical foundation models remain static and degrade under modality and acquisition shifts. Here we introduce EyeWorld, a generative world model that conceptualizes the eye as a partially observed dynamical system grounded in clinical imaging. EyeWorld learns an observation-stable latent ocular state shared across modalities, unifying fine-grained parsing, structure-preserving cross-modality translation and quality-robust enhancement within a single framework. Longitudinal supervision further enables time-conditioned state transitions, supporting forecasting of clinically meaningful progression while preserving stable anatomy. By moving from static representation learning to explicit dynamical modeling, EyeWorld provides a unified approach to robust multimodal interpretation and prognosis-oriented simulation in medicine.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的生成式世界模型EyeWorld，用于动态、跨模态医学影像分析，尤其是在眼科决策中增强病变识别、进展预判等能力，并能应对成像方式和数据漂移等挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前医学领域的基础模型对模态变化和数据获取方式的变化较为敏感，鲁棒性不足，且大多为静态模型，难以捕捉眼科等领域中基于细微病变与多模态、时序影像的复杂决策需求。
AI.method: 提出EyeWorld模型，将眼部视为部分可观测的动态系统，通过学习跨模态稳定的潜在状态，实现多种功能，包括细粒度解析、结构保持的跨模态翻译及质量增强。引入纵向监督，使模型能学习时间条件下的状态转移，辅助临床进展的预测。
AI.result: EyeWorld能在多个模态下稳定表征眼部状态，实现准确的解析和跨模态重建，在不同成像条件下具备质量鲁棒性，并能模拟和预测临床相关的疾病进展。
AI.conclusion: EyeWorld以显式动态建模取代传统静态表示学习，统一了多模态医学影像的解析和基于疾病进展的模拟，在医学多模态解读和预后模拟方面展示了强大的鲁棒性与广阔应用前景。

title: A Multi-Agent Perception-Action Alliance for Efficient Long Video Reasoning
summary: This paper presents a multi-agent perception-action exploration alliance, dubbed A4VL, for efficient long-video reasoning. A4VL operates in a multi-round perception-action exploration loop with a selection of VLM agents. In each round, the team of agents performs video question-answer (VideoQA) via perception exploration followed by action exploration. During perception exploration, each agent learns to extract query-specific perception clue(s) from a few sampled frames and performs clue-based alignment to find the video block(s) that are most relevant to the query-specific event. During action exploration, A4VL performs video reasoning in three steps: (1) each agent produces its initial answer with rational, (2) all agents collaboratively scores one another through cross-reviews and relevance ranking, and (3) based on whether a satisfactory consensus is reached, the decision is made either to start a new round of perception-action deliberation by pruning (e.g., filtering out the lowest performing agent) and re-staging (e.g., new-clue and matching block based perception-action exploration), or to conclude by producing its final answer. The integration of the multi-agent alliance through multi-round perception-action exploration, coupled with event-driven partitioning and cue-guided block alignment, enables A4VL to effectively scale to real world long videos while preserving high quality video reasoning. Evaluation Results on five popular VideoQA benchmarks show that A4VL outperforms 18 existing representative VLMs and 10 recent methods optimized for long-video reasoning, while achieving significantly lower inference latency. Our code is released at https://github.com/git-disl/A4VL.

AI.tldr: A4VL提出了一种多智能体感知-行动探索机制，有效提升了长视频理解与推理的效率和准确性，并在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 随着视频长度增加，传统单智能体方法在长视频推理任务上效率和准确性明显下降，难以应对真实场景中复杂、时长较大的视频推理需求。本论文旨在克服这一瓶颈，提升长视频VideoQA的性能。
AI.method: 提出了被称为A4VL的多智能体感知-行动探索联盟。方法包括多轮的感知-行动探索循环：每轮中，各VLM智能体先进行感知探索，从样本帧中提取与问题相关的线索，并通过线索对齐查找关键视频片段；随后执行行动探索，各智能体给出初步答案并互相评分，通过共识机制决定是否进入下一轮探索（如剔除表现最差者，并引入新线索、匹配新片段）。最终，当达到满意共识时给出最终答案。
AI.result: A4VL在五个主流VideoQA基准上测试，性能优于18个现有代表性视觉语言模型（VLM）及10种最新长视频推理方法，同时推理延迟大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体、多轮感知-行动探索及事件驱动的片段对齐机制，使A4VL在长视频推理中同时兼顾可扩展性与高推理质量，为实际应用中的长视频理解提供了高效解决方案。

title: TMPDiff: Temporal Mixed-Precision for Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are the go-to method for Text-to-Image generation, but their iterative denoising processes has high inference latency. Quantization reduces compute time by using lower bitwidths, but applies a fixed precision across all denoising timesteps, leaving an entire optimization axis unexplored. We propose TMPDiff, a temporal mixed-precision framework for diffusion models that assigns different numeric precision to different denoising timesteps. We hypothesize that quantization errors accumulate additively across timesteps, which we then validate experimentally. Based on our observations, we develop an adaptive bisectioning-based algorithm, which assigns per-step precisions with linear evaluation complexity, reducing an otherwise exponential search problem. Across four state-of-the-art diffusion models and three datasets, TMPDiff consistently outperforms uniform-precision baselines at matched speedup, achieving 10 to 20% improvement in perceptual quality. On FLUX.1-dev, TMPDiff achieves 90% SSIM relative to the full-precision model at a speedup of 2.5x over 16-bit inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的扩散模型量化方法TMPDiff，通过在不同去噪步骤采用不同数值精度，显著提升了Text-to-Image生成模型的推理速度，同时保持更高的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 传统的扩散模型推理速度较慢，量化方法可加速推理，但普遍采用所有步骤统一数值精度，未能充分挖掘分步优化的潜力，因此需要探索更优的精度分配策略以在加速同时提升性能。
AI.method: 提出TMPDiff框架，通过实验验证量化误差在各去噪步骤中呈累计效应，进而基于自适应二分算法为每步分配不同的量化精度，从而以线性复杂度找到优的精度分布方案。
AI.result: 在四个主流扩散模型与三个数据集上测试，TMPDiff在加速条件下，感知质量较统一量化基线提升10~20%，在FLUX.1-dev数据集上，比16位推理快2.5倍的情况下，仍能保持90%的SSIM。
AI.conclusion: TMPDiff能够在保持较高图像质量的同时大幅提升推理速度，优于传统的统一精度量化策略，为扩散模型的高效部署提供了新思路。

title: MotionCFG: Boosting Motion Dynamics via Stochastic Concept Perturbation
summary: Despite recent advances in Text-to-Video (T2V) synthesis, generating high-fidelity and dynamic motion remains a significant challenge. Existing methods primarily rely on Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), often with explicit negative prompts (e.g. "static", "blurry"), to suppress undesired artifacts. However, such explicit negations frequently introduce unintended semantic bias and distort object integrity; a phenomenon we define as Content-Motion Drift. To address this, we propose MotionCFG, a framework that enhances motion dynamics by contrasting a target concept with its noise-perturbed counterparts. Specifically, by injecting Gaussian noise into the concept embeddings, MotionCFG creates localized negative anchors that encapsulate a broad complementary space of sub-optimal motion variations. Unlike explicit negations, this approach facilitates implicit hard negative mining without shifting the global semantic identity, allowing for a focused refinement of temporal details. Combined with a piecewise guidance schedule that confines intervention to the early denoising steps, MotionCFG consistently improves motion dynamics across state-of-the-art T2V frameworks with negligible computational overhead and minimal compromise in visual quality. Additionally, we demonstrate that this noise-induced contrastive mechanism is effective not only for sharpening motion trajectories but also for steering complex, non-linear concepts such as precise object numerosity, which are typically difficult to modulate via standard text-based guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MotionCFG方法，通过在概念嵌入中注入高斯噪声生成负样本，实现对文本生成视频（T2V）中动态动作的更好建模，提升生成效果并避免现有方法中的语义偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 当前T2V生成虽然取得进展，但高质量、动态的动作生成仍有难度。现有方法依赖显式负面提示（比如“静止”“模糊”）进行引导，这样容易产生语义偏差甚至对象失真（Content-Motion Drift）。因此需要一种更自然且避免全局语义漂移的方法来改进运动生成。
AI.method: 提出MotionCFG框架：在目标概念的嵌入上注入高斯噪声，生成局部负锚点，构成动作变化的对比学习从而引导去噪过程。同时结合分段式引导调度，仅在前期干预，提升而不显著增加计算开销，也不损害画质。
AI.result: MotionCFG方法能够持续提升主流T2V模型中的动作动态表现，同时对视觉质量影响极小、计算资源几乎不增加。此外，该机制不仅改善了动作轨迹的清晰度，还能引导更加复杂的概念（如物体数量），这是现有文本引导难以实现的。
AI.conclusion: MotionCFG提出了一条有效路线，可在不破坏语义一致性和视觉品质的前提下，显著提升生成视频的动态运动质量和复杂性，引导T2V生成模型更好地控制时序和概念内容。

title: Self-Supervised Uncertainty Estimation For Super-Resolution of Satellite Images
summary: Super-resolution (SR) of satellite imagery is challenging due to the lack of paired low-/high-resolution data. Recent self-supervised SR methods overcome this limitation by exploiting the temporal redundancy in burst observations, but they lack a mechanism to quantify uncertainty in the reconstruction. In this work, we introduce a novel self-supervised loss that allows to estimate uncertainty in image super-resolution without ever accessing the ground-truth high-resolution data. We adopt a decision-theoretic perspective and show that minimizing the corresponding Bayesian risk yields the posterior mean and variance as optimal estimators. We validate our approach on a synthetic SkySat L1B dataset and demonstrate that it produces calibrated uncertainty estimates comparable to supervised methods. Our work bridges self-supervised restoration with uncertainty quantification, making a practical framework for uncertainty-aware image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在无需要访问高分辨率数据的情况下，能实现卫星影像超分辨率并量化重建不确定性的自监督方法。
AI.motivation: 当前卫星影像超分辨率任务由于缺乏配对的低/高分辨率数据，极具挑战性。自监督SR方法虽然能挖掘时间冗余，但无法量化重建的不确定性，限制了结果的可靠性和解释性。
AI.method: 引入了一种全新的自监督损失函数，在无需高分辨率真实数据的前提下，通过决策理论视角，将贝叶斯风险最小化，得到最优的后验均值和方差，实现了不确定性的量化。
AI.result: 在合成的SkySat L1B数据集实验验证，所提出方法生成的不确定性估计与有监督方法相当，具有较高的置信校准。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次将自监督影像复原与不确定性定量估计结合，提出了实用的不确定性感知超分重建框架，提高了方法的应用价值和拓展性。

title: SGR-OCC: Evolving Monocular Priors for Embodied 3D Occupancy Prediction via Soft-Gating Lifting and Semantic-Adaptive Geometric Refinement
comment: mian paper: 20 pages, 6 figures; appendix: 15 pages, 5 figures
summary: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is a cornerstone for embodied AI, enabling agents to perceive dense scene geometry and semantics incrementally from monocular video streams. However, current online frameworks face two critical bottlenecks: the inherent depth ambiguity of monocular estimation that causes "feature bleeding" at object boundaries , and the "cold start" instability where uninitialized temporal fusion layers distort high-quality spatial priors during early training stages. In this paper, we propose SGR-OCC (Soft-Gating and Ray-refinement Occupancy), a unified framework driven by the philosophy of "Inheritance and Evolution". To perfectly inherit monocular spatial expertise, we introduce a Soft-Gating Feature Lifter that explicitly models depth uncertainty via a Gaussian gate to probabilistically suppress background noise. Furthermore, a Dynamic Ray-Constrained Anchor Refinement module simplifies complex 3D displacement searches into efficient 1D depth corrections along camera rays, ensuring sub-voxel adherence to physical surfaces. To ensure stable evolution toward temporal consistency, we employ a Two-Phase Progressive Training Strategy equipped with identity-initialized fusion, effectively resolving the cold start problem and shielding spatial priors from noisy early gradients. Extensive experiments on the EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet and Occ-ScanNet benchmarks demonstrate that SGR-OCC achieves state-of-the-art performance. In local prediction tasks, SGR-OCC achieves a completion IoU of 58.55$\%$ and a semantic mIoU of 49.89$\%$, surpassing the previous best method, EmbodiedOcc++, by 3.65$\%$ and 3.69$\%$ respectively. In challenging embodied prediction tasks, our model reaches 55.72$\%$ SC-IoU and 46.22$\%$ mIoU. Qualitative results further confirm our model's superior capability in preserving structural integrity and boundary sharpness in complex indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SGR-OCC方法，用于提升单目视频中的3D语义占据预测，显著提高了预测精度，尤其是在场景边界和早期训练阶段。
AI.motivation: 现有的三维语义占据预测方法在单目深度推理存在本质深度歧义，导致物体边界模糊（feature bleeding），此外训练初期时间融合层也会引入噪声，破坏空间先验（cold start问题）。这些瓶颈限制了现有方法在复杂场景中的表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了SGR-OCC（Soft-Gating and Ray-refinement Occupancy）框架，采用继承与演化的理念。具体包括：（1）Soft-Gating Feature Lifter，通过高斯门控建模深度不确定性，有效抑制背景噪声；（2）Dynamic Ray-Constrained Anchor Refinement模块，将三维位移优化简化为沿摄像机射线的高效一维深度矫正，提升空间精度；（3）两阶段渐进式训练策略与身份初始化融合，以解决训练初期的冷启动不稳定，有效保护空间先验。
AI.result: 在EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet和Occ-ScanNet基准上，SGR-OCC取得了最优成绩，completion IoU达到58.55%，semantic mIoU达49.89%，均显著超过SOTA方法EmbodiedOcc++。在更具挑战性的任务中也表现出领先的结构还原与边界锐利度。
AI.conclusion: SGR-OCC框架兼顾空间继承与时序演化，显著缓解了单目3D语义占据预测中常见的边界模糊和训练冷启动问题，在多个基准上刷新了最佳记录，对具身智能场景理解有重要推动作用。

title: Enhancing Eye Feature Estimation from Event Data Streams through Adaptive Inference State Space Modeling
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 tables, accepted to ETRA 2026
summary: Eye feature extraction from event-based data streams can be performed efficiently and with low energy consumption, offering great utility to real-world eye tracking pipelines. However, few eye feature extractors are designed to handle sudden changes in event density caused by the changes between gaze behaviors that vary in their kinematics, leading to degraded prediction performance. In this work, we address this problem by introducing the \emph{adaptive inference state space model} (AISSM), a novel architecture for feature extraction that is capable of dynamically adjusting the relative weight placed on current versus recent information. This relative weighting is determined via estimates of the signal-to-noise ratio and event density produced by a complementary \emph{dynamic confidence network}. Lastly, we craft and evaluate a novel learning technique that improves training efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that the AISSM system outperforms state-of-the-art models for event-based eye feature extraction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AISSM自适应推理状态空间模型，用于高效、低能耗地从事件流中提取眼动特征，并显著提升了功能表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大多基于事件流的眼动特征提取方法，难以适应因注视行为突变造成事件密度剧烈变化的情况，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出了AISSM（自适应推理状态空间模型），能根据信噪比和事件密度动态调整对当前和历史信息的权重；这些参数通过一个动态置信网络获得。同时，设计了一种新的学习技术来提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，AISSM在基于事件的眼动特征提取上性能优越，超过了现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AISSM及配套学习方法有效提升了从事件流中提取眼动特征的准确率和效率，对实际应用具有重要价值。

title: Effective Feature Learning for 3D Medical Registration via Domain-Specialized DINO Pretraining
comment: Accepted for International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging 2026 (ISBI 2026)
summary: Medical image registration is a critical component of clinical imaging workflows, enabling accurate longitudinal assessment, multi-modal data fusion, and image-guided interventions. Intensity-based approaches often struggle with interscanner variability and complex anatomical deformations, whereas feature-based methods offer improved robustness by leveraging semantically informed representations. In this work, we investigate DINO-style self-supervised pretraining directly on 3D medical imaging data, aiming to learn dense volumetric features well suited for deformable registration. We assess the resulting representations on challenging interpatient abdominal registration task across both MRI and CT modalities. Our domain-specialized pretraining outperforms the DINOv2 model trained on a large-scale collection of natural images, while requiring substantially lower computational resources at inference time. Moreover, it surpasses established registration models under out-of-domain evaluation, demonstrating the value of task-agnostic yet medical imaging-focused pretraining for robust and efficient 3D image registration.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了一种针对3D医学影像的DINO风格自监督预训练方法，以提升复杂解剖结构配准的鲁棒性和效率，实验在MRI和CT等多模态腹部配准任务上实现了优于当前主流方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 医学图像配准对于临床中图像的精确对齐和后续应用至关重要，现有基于强度的方法在跨设备以及复杂解剖变化下易失效，亟需更鲁棒的特征表达方案。
AI.method: 采用DINO风格的自监督预训练，直接在3D医学影像上学习高密度体素特征，并将其用于支持可变形注册任务，对比了在医学影像领域和自然图像领域预训练模型的表现。
AI.result: 医学影像领域的自监督预训练在MRI和CT跨域腹部配准任务中，优于基于自然图像训练的DINOv2模型，同时降低了推理时的计算需求。在外部测试集上也超过了多种主流注册方法。
AI.conclusion: 医学影像专用的自监督预训练能有效提升3D图像注册的鲁棒性和效率，是医学影像工作流程中值得推广的配准特征学习方案。

title: Revisiting the Perception-Distortion Trade-off with Spatial-Semantic Guided Super-Resolution
summary: Image super-resolution (SR) aims to reconstruct high resolution images with both high perceptual quality and low distortion, but is fundamentally limited by the perception-distortion trade-off. GAN-based SR methods reduce distortion but still struggle with realistic fine-grained textures, whereas diffusion-based approaches synthesize rich details but often deviate from the input, hallucinating structures and degrading fidelity. This tension raises a key challenge: how to exploit the powerful generative priors of diffusion models without sacrificing fidelity. To address this, we propose SpaSemSR, a spatial-semantic guided diffusion framework with two complementary guidances. First, spatial-grounded textual guidance integrates object-level spatial cues with semantic prompts, aligning textual and visual structures to reduce distortion. Second, semantic-enhanced visual guidance with a multi-encoder design and semantic degradation constraints unifies multimodal semantic priors, improving perceptual realism under severe degradations. These complementary guidances are adaptively fused into the diffusion process via spatial-semantic attention, suppressing distortion and hallucination while retaining the strengths of diffusion models. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that SpaSemSR achieves a superior perception-distortion balance, producing both realistic and faithful restorations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为SpaSemSR的空间-语义引导扩散模型用于图像超分辨率，在真实感和失真度之间实现更好平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的超分辨率方法难以生成细腻真实的纹理，扩散模型虽能合成丰富细节，但易偏离输入、降低保真度。因此，亟需利用扩散模型强大生成能力的同时保障重建保真。
AI.method: 提出SpaSemSR框架，融合两种互补引导：(1) 空间性文本引导，将空间目标信息与语义提示结合，对齐文本和视觉结构以降低失真；(2) 语义增强视觉引导，通过多编码器结构和语义退化约束统一多模态语义先验，在严重退化下提升感知真实感。两种引导通过空间-语义注意力自适应融合进扩散过程。
AI.result: 在多项基准测试上进行了大量实验，SpaSemSR在感知-失真平衡上显著优于现有方法，能生成更加真实且忠实于原图的超分辨图像。
AI.conclusion: SpaSemSR通过空间-语义双重引导，抑制失真和虚假内容，实现了扩散模型在超分领域的优良感知-失真平衡。

title: Improving Visual Reasoning with Iterative Evidence Refinement
summary: Vision language models (VLMs) are increasingly capable of reasoning over images, but robust visual reasoning often requires re-grounding intermediate steps in the underlying visual evidence. Recent approaches typically rely on external image operations such as zooming or cropping to re-access fine-grained details during inference, which requires additional image re-encoding and can disrupt the reasoning trajectory. We argue that VLMs already provide strong internal signals for identifying and reusing visual evidence, and that these signals can be directly leveraged to support image-grounded reasoning. Motivated by this insight, we propose an end-to-end self-revisit framework, SIEVE, that trains models to re-engage image evidence through internal representations. SIEVE automatically extracts embeddings of salient image regions and injects them into the reasoning chain when additional grounding is needed, enabling later steps to condition on relevant visual cues without external tool calls or re-encoding. We use reinforcement learning to teach the model when to trigger visual revisiting and which region embeddings to retrieve and insert during the reasoning process. Experiments on multiple visual reasoning benchmarks, together with perception, reasoning, and hallucination evaluations, show that SIEVE yields consistent gains, improving performance by 8 percent on average across several benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的视觉语言模型推理框架SIEVE，能够在无需外部图像操作的情况下，通过内部机制高效地重用关键图像区域信息，从而提升视觉推理能力，实现多个基准任务的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在推理过程中通常依赖外部操作（如缩放、裁剪）来获取细粒度图像细节，增加了推理复杂度并可能破坏推理过程。作者认为模型内部已有丰富的视觉信号，若能有效利用可提升模型效率与表现。
AI.method: 提出SIEVE框架，通过训练模型在需要补充视觉信息的推理阶段自动抽取和注入关键图像区域的内部embedding，无需外部工具，该机制通过强化学习优化触发时机及embedding选择，有效支持推理流程。
AI.result: 在多个视觉推理基准测试及“感知-推理-幻觉”能力评估中，SIEVE框架较现有方法平均提升8个百分点，展现出一致且显著的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: SIEVE通过端到端自动内嵌关键图像区域信息，有效提升VLMs的视觉推理能力，减少了对外部图像处理的依赖，为提升视觉语言模型的推理表现提供了新方向。

title: Low-Field Magnetic Resonance Image Quality Enhancement using Undersampled k-Space and Out-of-Distribution Generalisation
summary: Low-field magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) offers affordable access to diagnostic imaging but faces challenges such as prolonged acquisition times and reduced image quality. Although accelerated imaging via k-space undersampling helps reduce scan time, image quality enhancement methods often rely on spatial-domain postprocessing. Deep learning achieved state-of-the-art results in both domains. However, most models are trained and evaluated using in-distribution (InD) data, creating a significant gap in understanding model performance when tested using out-of-distribution (OOD) data. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that reconstructs high-field-like MR images directly from undersampled low-field MRI k-space, quantifies the impact of reduced sampling, and evaluates the generalisability of the model using OOD. Our approach utilises a k-space dual channel U-Net to jointly process the real and imaginary components of undersampled k-space, restoring missing frequency content, and incorporates an ensemble strategy to generate uncertainty maps. Experiments on low-field brain MRI demonstrate that our k-space-driven image quality enhancement outperforms the counterpart spatial-domain and other state-of-the-art baselines, achieving image quality comparable to full high-field k-space acquisitions using OOD data. To the best of our knowledge, this work is among the first to combine low-field MR image reconstruction, quality enhancement using undersampled k-space, and uncertainty quantification within a unified framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于k-space融合双通道U-Net和不确定性量化的新框架，实现了从欠采样低场MRI数据直接重建高场质量的影像，并验证了其在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化和提升能力。
AI.motivation: 低场MRI设备成本低，但成像时间长、图像质量低。尽管采用k-space欠采样可加速采集，但提升图像质量通常依赖空间域后处理，且大部分方法仅在分布内（InD）数据测试，难以评估其泛化能力。因此，需要一种能直接从欠采样低场k-space恢复高质量影像并能定量不确定性的端到端方法。
AI.method: 提出了基于k-space的双通道U-Net结构，同时处理实部和虚部，补全缺失的频率信息，并融入集成策略生成不确定性图。直接由低场MRI的欠采样k-space重建出高场级别的MR影像，同时对采样减少量的影响进行量化，并在OOD数据集上评价模型泛化性能。
AI.result: 在低场脑MRI实验中，该方法的图像增强效果优于空间域和其他主流基线方法。即便使用分布外（OOD）测试数据，也能生成与高场全采样影像相媲美的图像质量，并给出不确定性定量结果。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次将低场重建、k-space增强与不确定性量化融为一体，极大提升了欠采样低场MRI的图像重建质量、泛化能力和解释性。

title: Low-Field Magnetic Resonance Image Enhancement using Undersampled k-Space
summary: Low-field magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) offers a cost-effective alternative for medical imaging in resource-limited settings. However, its widespread adoption is hindered by two key challenges: prolonged scan times and reduced image quality. Accelerated acquisition can be achieved using k-space undersampling, while image enhancement traditionally relies on spatial-domain postprocessing. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning framework based on a U-Net variant that operates directly in k-space to super-resolve low-field MR images directly using undersampled data while quantifying the impact of reduced k-space sampling. Unlike conventional approaches that treat image super-resolution as a postprocessing step following image reconstruction from undersampled k-space, our unified model integrates both processes, leveraging k-space information to achieve superior image fidelity. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real low-field brain MRI datasets demonstrate that k-space-driven image super-resolution outperforms conventional spatial-domain counterparts. Furthermore, our results show that undersampled k-space reconstructions achieve comparable quality to full k-space acquisitions, enabling substantial scan-time acceleration without compromising diagnostic utility.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于U-Net变体的深度学习模型，直接在k-space域实现低场MRI图像的超分辨及重建，实现加速采集同时提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 低场MRI因设备便宜适合资源有限地区，但存在扫描时间长、图像质量低两大难题，亟需在加快采集速度的同时提升图像质量。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的U-Net变体深度学习框架，直接在k-space域对采样不足的数据进行超分辨重建，将图像重建与超分辨整合到统一模型，充分利用k-space信息提升图像保真度。
AI.result: 在合成和真实低场脑MRI数据集上验证了方法的有效性，k-space驱动的超分辨方案优于传统的空间域方法，且采样不足的k-space重建能获得与全采样接近的图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 本方法在不影响诊断的前提下显著加快了MRI扫描过程，有助于低场MRI在资源受限环境的实际应用。

title: Implementation and discussion of the Pith Estimation on Rough Log End Images using Local Fourier Spectrum Analysis method
summary: In this article, we analyze and propose a Python implementation of the method "Pith Estimation on Rough Log End images using Local Fourier Spectrum Analysis", by Rudolf Schraml and Andreas Uhl. The algorithm is tested over two datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文分析并提出了 "基于局部傅里叶谱分析的粗糙原木断面髓心估计算法" 的Python实现，并在两个数据集上进行了测试。
AI.motivation: 原木断面的髓心估计在木材加工和质量控制中非常重要，传统方法在面对粗糙断面时表现有限，因此需要更鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: 分析和实现了Rudolf Schraml与Andreas Uhl提出的基于局部傅里叶谱分析的髓心估计方法，并用Python进行了编程复现。
AI.result: 该算法在两个数据集上进行了实验验证，展示了其实用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于局部傅里叶谱分析的方法能有效应对粗糙原木断面图像的髓心估计问题，实验结果表明实现具有应用潜力。

title: Diffusion Reinforcement Learning via Centered Reward Distillation
summary: Diffusion and flow models achieve State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) generative performance, yet many practically important behaviors such as fine-grained prompt fidelity, compositional correctness, and text rendering are weakly specified by score or flow matching pretraining objectives. Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning with external, black-box rewards is a natural remedy, but diffusion RL is often brittle. Trajectory-based methods incur high memory cost and high-variance gradient estimates; forward-process approaches converge faster but can suffer from distribution drift, and hence reward hacking. In this work, we present \textbf{Centered Reward Distillation (CRD)}, a diffusion RL framework derived from KL-regularized reward maximization built on forward-process-based fine-tuning. The key insight is that the intractable normalizing constant cancels under \emph{within-prompt centering}, yielding a well-posed reward-matching objective. To enable reliable text-to-image fine-tuning, we introduce techniques that explicitly control distribution drift: (\textit{i}) decoupling the sampler from the moving reference to prevent ratio-signal collapse, (\textit{ii}) KL anchoring to a CFG-guided pretrained model to control long-run drift and align with the inference-time semantics of the pre-trained model, and (\textit{iii}) reward-adaptive KL strength to accelerate early learning under large KL regularization while reducing late-stage exploitation of reward-model loopholes. Experiments on text-to-image post-training with \texttt{GenEval} and \texttt{OCR} rewards show that CRD achieves competitive SOTA reward optimization results with fast convergence and reduced reward hacking, as validated on unseen preference metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Centered Reward Distillation（CRD）的扩散模型强化学习微调框架，通过KL-正则化奖励最大化，有效提升文生图模型的泛化和鲁棒性。CRD不仅提升了奖励优化性能，还减少了模型在奖励利用（reward hacking）上的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散与流式生成模型虽有极佳的生成能力，但微调其以精细符合提示、组合正确性和文本渲染等实际需求时，传统的得分或流匹配损失难以精确定义，常在强化学习微调时出现困难，如高内存需求或奖励利用等问题，因此需要更有效且稳定的微调方法。
AI.method: 提出Centered Reward Distillation（CRD）方法，将KL-正则化奖励最大化引入基于forward-process的微调，巧妙消除了规范化常数，使奖励匹配更具实际可操作性。为防止分布漂移，提出了三项具体技术，包括采样器与移动参考解耦、KL锚定及奖励自适应KL强度调整，从而增强RL微调的稳定性与效率。
AI.result: 在文本到图像生成任务及主流奖励（如GenEval与OCR）上，CRD展现出更快的收敛速度和更优的奖励最优化结果，且对未知的用户偏好指标上依然表现优异，显著降低了奖励利用现象。
AI.conclusion: CRD能够有效缓解扩散模型在RL微调中的多项缺陷，不仅优化了实际任务的奖励表现，还提高了鲁棒性和泛化能力，为高质量、细粒度文图生成提供了更优解决方案。

title: DualSwinFusionSeg: Multimodal Martian Landslide Segmentation via Dual Swin Transformer with Multi-Scale Fusion and UNet++
comment: 10 pages, 2 Figures, 12 Tables. Code is available at: https://github.com/amimulamim/Mars-LS-Segmentation
summary: Automated segmentation of Martian landslides, particularly in tectonically active regions such as Valles Marineris,is important for planetary geology, hazard assessment, and future robotic exploration. However, detecting landslides from planetary imagery is challenging due to the heterogeneous nature of available sensing modalities and the limited number of labeled samples. Each observation combines RGB imagery with geophysical measurements such as digital elevation models, slope maps, thermal inertia, and contextual grayscale imagery, which differ significantly in resolution and statistical properties. To address these challenges, we propose DualSwinFusionSeg, a multimodal segmentation architecture that separates modality-specific feature extraction and performs multi-scale cross-modal fusion. The model employs two parallel Swin Transformer V2 encoders to independently process RGB and auxiliary geophysical inputs, producing hierarchical feature representations. Corresponding features from the two streams are fused at multiple scales and decoded using a UNet++ decoder with dense nested skip connections to preserve fine boundary details. Extensive ablation studies evaluate modality contributions, loss functions, decoder architectures, and fusion strategies. Experiments on the MMLSv2 dataset from the PBVS 2026 Mars-LS Challenge show that modality-specific encoders and simple concatenation-based fusion improve segmentation accuracy under limited training data. The final model achieves 0.867 mIoU and 0.905 F1 on the development benchmark and 0.783 mIoU on the held-out test set, demonstrating strong performance for multimodal planetary surface segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向火星滑坡多模态数据的自动分割方法（DualSwinFusionSeg），在小样本和多源数据情况下显著提升了分割效果。
AI.motivation: 火星滑坡自动分割对于地质分析、灾害评估和未来机器人探索具有重要意义。然而，现有数据异质性强、标注样本稀缺，RGB与地球物理数据分辨率和统计属性差异大，导致滑坡分割任务极具挑战。
AI.method: 提出DualSwinFusionSeg架构，通过双路Swin Transformer V2分别提取RGB和地球物理辅助数据（如DEM、坡度、热惯量、灰度影像）特征。特征于多尺度层面进行交叉融合，再用具有稠密嵌套跳跃连接的UNet++解码以保留细粒度边界，详细比较了多种模态贡献、损失函数、解码器和融合方式。
AI.result: 在MMLSv2数据集上进行实验，分析结果表明：模态专用编码器及简单特征拼接的融合策略在有限训练样本下有效提升分割精度。最终模型在开发集上达到0.867 mIoU和0.905 F1，在测试集上得到0.783 mIoU，表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DualSwinFusionSeg能够有效整合多模态火星表面数据，实现高精度滑坡分割。该方法为多模态行星表面影像分析提供了有力工具，具有实际应用前景。

title: CIPHER: Culvert Inspection through Pairwise Frame Selection and High-Efficiency Reconstruction
summary: Automated culvert inspection systems can help increase the safety and efficiency of flood management operations. As a key step to this system, we present an efficient RGB-based 3D reconstruction pipeline for culvert-like structures in visually repetitive environments. Our approach first selects informative frame pairs to maximize viewpoint diversity while ensuring valid correspondence matching using a plug-and-play module, followed by a reconstruction model that simultaneously estimates RGB appearance, geometry, and semantics in real-time. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively generates accurate 3D reconstructions and depth maps, enhancing culvert inspection efficiency with minimal human intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RGB图像的高效三维重建流程，用于提高涵洞等结构的自动化巡检效率和安全性，重点在于信息量丰富的图像对选择和实时重建。实验显示，该方法在自动化程度和重建精度上取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 洪水管理中涵洞的自动化巡检对于提升作业效率和安全性极为重要。由于涵洞环境视觉重复性强，常规三维重建难度较大，因此亟需一种高效且可靠的三维重建方法。
AI.method: 提出了一条基于RGB图像的三维重建流程。首先通过模块化方法选择能最大化视角多样性的图像帧对，实现高有效匹配，然后利用实时重建模型同时估算出RGB外观、几何结构和语义信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够高效准确地生成涵洞等结构的三维模型和深度图，重建精度高、速度快，并显著减少了人工干预需求。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了涵洞自动巡检的效率和自动化水平，有助于减少人力、提高洪水管理智能化。

title: Seeing Through the PRISM: Compound & Controllable Restoration of Scientific Images
summary: Scientific and environmental imagery often suffer from complex mixtures of noise related to the sensor and the environment. Existing restoration methods typically remove one degradation at a time, leading to cascading artifacts, overcorrection, or loss of meaningful signal. In scientific applications, restoration must be able to simultaneously handle compound degradations while allowing experts to selectively remove subsets of distortions without erasing important features. To address these challenges, we present PRISM (Precision Restoration with Interpretable Separation of Mixtures). PRISM is a prompted conditional diffusion framework which combines compound-aware supervision over mixed degradations with a weighted contrastive disentanglement objective that aligns primitives and their mixtures in the latent space. This compositional geometry enables high-fidelity joint removal of overlapping distortions while also allowing flexible, targeted fixes through natural language prompts. Across microscopy, wildlife monitoring, remote sensing, and urban weather datasets, PRISM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on complex compound degradations, including zero-shot mixtures not seen during training. Importantly, we show that selective restoration significantly improves downstream scientific accuracy in several domains over standard "black-box" restoration. These results establish PRISM as a generalizable and controllable framework for high-fidelity restoration in domains where scientific utility is a priority.

AI.tldr: 提出PRISM（基于可解释混合分离的高精度图像恢复）框架，实现复杂复合退化噪声下的图像高保真恢复，并能通过自然语言提示灵活、可控地选择性去除特定噪声。
AI.motivation: 当前科学与环境图像常受多种复合噪声干扰，现有方法多只能单一处理一种退化，导致串扰、过度修复或信息丢失，特别是在科学任务中需要既消除噪声又保留关键信号。
AI.method: 提出PRISM框架，基于条件扩散模型+复合感知监督+加权对比式解混目标，结合自然语言提示，实现对混合噪声的高保真联合去除和灵活、针对性修复。
AI.result: 在显微、野生监测、遥感、城市气象等多数据集上，PRISM在复杂复合退化和未见过的噪声混合（zero-shot）下均优于当前主流方法。
AI.conclusion: PRISM是一种可泛化、可控且适用于科学沟通高保真图像恢复的框架，对提升后续科学分析的准确性具有重要价值。

title: SK-Adapter: Skeleton-Based Structural Control for Native 3D Generation
summary: Native 3D generative models have achieved remarkable fidelity and speed, yet they suffer from a critical limitation: inability to prescribe precise structural articulations, where precise structural control within the native 3D space remains underexplored. This paper proposes SK-Adapter, a simple and yet highly efficient and effective framework that unlocks precise skeletal manipulation for native 3D generation. Moving beyond text or image prompts, which can be ambiguous for precise structure, we treat the 3D skeleton as a first-class control signal. SK-Adapter is a lightweight structural adapter network that encodes joint coordinates and topology into learnable tokens, which are injected into the frozen 3D generation backbone via cross-attention. This smart design allows the model to not only effectively "attend" to specific 3D structural constraints but also preserve its original generative priors. To bridge the data gap, we contribute Objaverse-TMS dataset, a large-scale dataset of 24k text-mesh-skeleton pairs. Extensive experiments confirm that our method achieves robust structural control while preserving the geometry and texture quality of the foundation model, significantly outperforming existing baselines. Furthermore, we extend this capability to local 3D editing, enabling the region specific editing of existing assets with skeletal guidance, which is unattainable by previous methods. Project Page: https://sk-adapter.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SK-Adapter的高效3D骨架控制框架，不仅能通过骨架精细控制3D生成模型结构，还显著优于现有方法，并支持局部3D编辑。
AI.motivation: 目前原生3D生成模型虽然已在保真度和速度上有突破，但缺乏对结构的精确控制，尤其无法在3D空间内对结构进行指定和编辑，这是实际3D内容创作中的重要需求。
AI.method: 提出SK-Adapter，一个轻量级的结构适配器网络，将3D骨架的关节点坐标和拓扑编码为可学习的token，然后通过交叉注意力机制注入到冻结的3D生成主干网络中，实现对3D结构的精准调控。同时，作者还构建了包含2.4万个文本-网格-骨架配对的大型数据集Objaverse-TMS，提升了数据支持。
AI.result: 实验表明，SK-Adapter能在结构约束下保持基础模型良好几何和纹理质量，其结构控制能力和生成效果大幅优于现有基线。此外，该方法支持基于骨架引导的局部3D编辑能力。
AI.conclusion: SK-Adapter为3D生成领域带来了精准结构控制的新途径，在广泛实验中表现卓越，并首次实现了以骨架为引导的局部3D编辑，有望促进3D内容创作和编辑的发展。

title: Garments2Look: A Multi-Reference Dataset for High-Fidelity Outfit-Level Virtual Try-On with Clothing and Accessories
summary: Virtual try-on (VTON) has advanced single-garment visualization, yet real-world fashion centers on full outfits with multiple garments, accessories, fine-grained categories, layering, and diverse styling, remaining beyond current VTON systems. Existing datasets are category-limited and lack outfit diversity. We introduce Garments2Look, the first large-scale multimodal dataset for outfit-level VTON, comprising 80K many-garments-to-one-look pairs across 40 major categories and 300+ fine-grained subcategories. Each pair includes an outfit with 3-12 reference garment images (Average 4.48), a model image wearing the outfit, and detailed item and try-on textual annotations. To balance authenticity and diversity, we propose a synthesis pipeline. It involves heuristically constructing outfit lists before generating try-on results, with the entire process subjected to strict automated filtering and human validation to ensure data quality. To probe task difficulty, we adapt SOTA VTON methods and general-purpose image editing models to establish baselines. Results show current methods struggle to try on complete outfits seamlessly and to infer correct layering and styling, leading to misalignment and artifacts.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了首个大规模、多模态的虚拟试衣全套服装（outfit-level VTON）数据集——Garments2Look，包含8万组多服装到单造型的配对，并分析了当前前沿方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试衣（VTON）系统主要局限于单件服装的可视化，然而现实时尚通常关注的是完整的服装搭配，包括多服装、配饰、分层和多样风格；并且现有数据集品类有限，缺乏服装搭配多样性。
AI.method: 提出Garments2Look数据集，包括8万组3-12件服装到一套穿着效果的图像对，涵盖40大类和300+细分类。每对数据包含服装图像、模特穿衣图像及详细文本注释，并通过基于规则的合成流程、自动与人工过滤保证数据质量。还将现有SOTA VTON方法和通用图像编辑模型进行迁移实验以建立基线。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前方法难以实现完整服装的准确虚拟穿着，尤其在多层次、正确搭配等方面表现不佳，易出现错位和瑕疵。
AI.conclusion: Garments2Look促进了VTON研究由局限的单品试穿迈向完整服装搭配，同时揭示了现有方法在整体造型理解和生成上的挑战，为后续研究提供了新的基准和方向。

title: BluRef: Unsupervised Image Deblurring with Dense-Matching References
summary: This paper introduces a novel unsupervised approach for image deblurring that utilizes a simple process for training data collection, thereby enhancing the applicability and effectiveness of deblurring methods. Our technique does not require meticulously paired data of blurred and corresponding sharp images; instead, it uses unpaired blurred and sharp images of similar scenes to generate pseudo-ground truth data by leveraging a dense matching model to identify correspondences between a blurry image and reference sharp images. Thanks to the simplicity of the training data collection process, our approach does not rely on existing paired training data or pre-trained networks, making it more adaptable to various scenarios and suitable for networks of different sizes, including those designed for low-resource devices. We demonstrate that this novel approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, marking a significant advancement in the field of image deblurring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对训练数据的新型无监督图像去模糊方法，通过简单的数据收集过程，大幅提升了方法的适用性和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊方法普遍依赖高质量的成对模糊-清晰图像，采集和处理成本高，限制了实际应用。该文旨在突破对配对数据依赖瓶颈，简化训练数据收集流程。
AI.method: 方法基于无监督学习，仅需收集未配对但内容相似的模糊及清晰图像。利用密集匹配模型，寻找模糊-清晰图像间的对应关系，自动生成伪真值数据，无需预训练网络或现有配对集。
AI.result: 该方法在多个场景和不同网络规模下均取得了当前最优的去模糊性能，展现出强大的适用性和效果优势，适用于低算力设备。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法显著提升了图像去模糊的实用性，为相关领域提供了新的高效解决方案，是对现有方法的重要补充和改进。

title: Deeper Thought, Weaker Aim: Understanding and Mitigating Perceptual Impairment during Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often suffer from perceptual impairments under extended reasoning modes, particularly in visual question answering (VQA) tasks. We identify attention dispersion as the underlying cause: during multi-step reasoning, the model's visual attention becomes scattered and drifts away from question-relevant regions, effectively "losing focus" on the visual input. To better understand this phenomenon, we analyze the attention maps of MLLMs and observe that reasoning prompts significantly reduce attention to regions critical for answering the question. We further find a strong correlation between the model's overall attention on image tokens and the spatial dispersiveness of its attention within the image. Leveraging this insight, we propose a training-free Visual Region-Guided Attention (VRGA) framework that selects visual heads based on an entropy-focus criterion and reweights their attention, effectively guiding the model to focus on question-relevant regions during reasoning. Extensive experiments on vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that our method effectively alleviates perceptual degradation, leading to improvements in visual grounding and reasoning accuracy while providing interpretable insights into how MLLMs process visual information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MLLM（多模态大语言模型）在多步推理时视觉关注分散问题，并提出了一种训练免疫的视觉区域引导关注（VRGA）方法，有效提高了多模态推理和视觉问答任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在视觉问答与推理任务中，容易因关注分散，导致模型无法聚焦于与问题相关的图像区域，影响推理准确性。作者希望理解并解决MLLM推理时视觉感知能力退化的问题。
AI.method: 作者分析了模型的视觉注意力分布，发现推理提示会削弱对关键区域的关注。进而提出了一种无需重新训练的VRGA框架，通过熵-聚焦准则选择并重加权视觉注意力头，使模型在推理过程中重新聚焦于关键视觉区域。
AI.result: 在多个视觉-语言基准上，VRGA方法有效缓解了感知能力下降的问题，提升了模型在视觉定位和推理准确率方面的表现，同时增强了模型视觉信息处理过程的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: VRGA是一种无需训练即可改善MLLM推理视觉关注的方法，提升了多模态模型的视觉理解能力，并为其注意力机制的可解释性研究提供了新思路。

title: Fair Benchmarking of Emerging One-Step Generative Models Against Multistep Diffusion and Flow Models
summary: State-of-the-art text-to-image models produce high-quality images, but inference remains expensive as generation requires several sequential ODE or denoising steps. Native one-step models aim to reduce this cost by mapping noise to an image in a single step, yet fair comparisons to multi-step systems are difficult because studies use mismatched sampling steps and different classifier-free guidance (CFG) settings, where CFG can shift FID, Inception Score, and CLIP-based alignment in opposing directions. It is also unclear how well one-step models scale to multi-step inference, and there is limited standardized out-of-distribution evaluation for label-ID-conditioned generators beyond ImageNet. To address this, We benchmark eight models spanning one-step flows (MeanFlow, Improved MeanFlow, SoFlow), multi-step baselines (RAE, Scale-RAE), and established systems (SiT, Stable Diffusion 3.5, FLUX.1) under a controlled class-conditional protocol on ImageNet validation, ImageNetV2, and reLAIONet, our new proofread out-of-distribution dataset aligned to ImageNet label IDs. Using FID, Inception Score, CLIP Score, and Pick Score, we show that FID-focused model development and CFG selection can be misleading in few-step regimes, where guidance changes can improve FID while degrading text-image alignment and human preference signals and worsening perceived quality. We further show that leading one-step models benefit from step scaling and become substantially more competitive under multi-step inference, although they still exhibit characteristic local distortions. To capture these tradeoffs, we introduce MinMax Harmonic Mean (MMHM), a composite proxy over all four metrics that stabilizes hyperparameter selection across guidance and step sweeps.

AI.tldr: 论文系统评测了多种文本到图像生成模型，尤其比较了单步和多步生成方法，在不同的指标和数据集上量化了各自的优劣，并提出了新的综合评测指标MMHM。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像模型生成高质量图像，但推理成本高，且评测方法不统一，影响了单步与多步方法公平比较。此外，现有对分布外任务和标签条件生成器的标准化评测有限。
AI.method: 作者在ImageNet、ImageNetV2和新提出的reLAIONet数据集上，用统一协议对8种代表性生成模型（一/多步及著名系统）进行对比，采用FID、Inception Score、CLIP Score、Pick Score四项指标，并提出MMHM这一综合度量，分析CFG设置和生成步数对模型表现的影响。
AI.result: 结果发现：1）单一的FID指标和CFG调整在少步生成时可能产生指标误导；2）单步模型经步数扩展后竞争力大幅提升，但局部失真仍存在；3）MMHM可在多指标下更稳健地调整超参数选择。
AI.conclusion: 单独依赖特定评测指标或生成指导（CFG）设置不足以全面反映模型优劣，综合性评测（如MMHM）对于多指标、复杂推理方案的评估更为有效。研究为文本到图像生成模型的公平比较和优化提供了实证参考与新工具。

title: Deep Learning From Routine Histology Improves Risk Stratification for Biochemical Recurrence in Prostate Cancer
summary: Accurate prediction of biochemical recurrence (BCR) after radical prostatectomy is critical for guiding adjuvant treatment and surveillance decisions in prostate cancer. However, existing clinicopathological risk models reduce complex morphology to relatively coarse descriptors, leaving substantial prognostic information embedded in routine histopathology underexplored. We present a deep learning-based biomarker that predicts continuous, patient-specific risk of BCR directly from H&E-stained whole-slide prostatectomy specimens. Trained end-to-end on time-to-event outcomes and evaluated across four independent international cohorts, our model demonstrates robust generalization across institutions and patient populations. When integrated with the CAPRA-S clinical risk score, the deep learning risk score consistently improved discrimination for BCR, increasing concordance indices from 0.725-0.772 to 0.749-0.788 across cohorts. To support clinical interpretability, outcome-grounded analyses revealed subtle histomorphological patterns associated with recurrence risk that are not captured by conventional clinicopathological risk scores. This multicohort study demonstrates that deep learning applied to routine prostate histopathology can deliver reproducible and clinically generalizable biomarkers that augment postoperative risk stratification, with potential to support personalized management of prostate cancer in real-world clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的生物标志物，可直接从H&E切片预测前列腺切除后生化复发（BCR）的连续、个体化风险，模型在多个国际队列上表现出良好泛化能力，并能提升传统评分的风险判别性能。
AI.motivation: 当前术后复发风险评估模型过于粗糙，未能充分利用常规组织病理切片中的复杂信息，因此需开发更精准、能够揭示隐藏病理特征的风险评估工具。
AI.method: 开发并端到端训练了基于H&E全切片的深度学习模型，预测BCR发生时间，并在四个国际独立队列上进行评估。同时，将模型风险评分与CAPRA-S临床评分结合，分析整合后对BCR判别能力的提升。
AI.result: 该模型在不同机构和人群中均展现出良好泛化性。与CAPRA-S联合使用后，队列的一致性指数从0.725-0.772提升到0.749-0.788，显著提高了BCR风险判别能力，并能发现传统评分未捕捉到的细微形态学风险特征。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型能充分利用常规病理信息，为前列腺癌术后风险分层提供可复现和泛化能力强的新型生物标志物，有望实现个体化管理。

title: Joint Segmentation and Grading with Iterative Optimization for Multimodal Glaucoma Diagnosis
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), 2026
summary:
Accurate diagnosis of glaucoma is challenging, as early-stage changes are subtle and often lack clear structural or appearance cues. Most existing approaches rely on a single modality, such as fundus or optical coherence tomography (OCT), capturing only partial pathological information and often missing early disease progression. In this paper, we propose an iterative multimodal optimization model (IMO) for joint segmentation and grading. IMO integrates fundus and OCT features through a mid-level fusion strategy, enhanced by a cross-modal feature alignment (CMFA) module to reduce modality discrepancies. An iterative refinement decoder progressively optimizes the multimodal features through a denoising diffusion mechanism, enabling fine-grained segmentation of the optic disc and cup while supporting accurate glaucoma grading.
  Extensive experiments show that our method effectively integrates multimodal features, providing a comprehensive and clinically significant approach to glaucoma assessment. Source codes are available at https://github.com/warren-wzw/IMO.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种迭代多模态优化模型（IMO），通过整合视网膜和OCT两种医学影像，实现青光眼的精细分割与分级，提高了早期诊断的准确性。方法效果优越，源码已开源。
AI.motivation: 青光眼早期诊断困难，现有方法常依赖单一影像模态，信息有限、早期变化难以检测，因此需要融合多种医学影像以提升诊断和分割精度。
AI.method: 设计了IMO模型，将眼底和OCT影像进行中层特征融合，并引入跨模态特征对齐（CMFA）模块减少模态差异。采用迭代细化解码器，结合去噪扩散机制，实现对视盘和视杯的精细分割及青光眼分级。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，IMO模型能有效融合多模态特征，实现更全面、精确的青光眼评估，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: IMO模型为青光眼诊断和评估提供了更具临床价值的多模态融合方案，助力精准医疗。

title: Walking Further: Semantic-aware Multimodal Gait Recognition Under Long-Range Conditions
summary: Gait recognition is an emerging biometric technology that enables non-intrusive and hard-to-spoof human identification. However, most existing methods are confined to short-range, unimodal settings and fail to generalize to long-range and cross-distance scenarios under real-world conditions. To address this gap, we present \textbf{LRGait}, the first LiDAR-Camera multimodal benchmark designed for robust long-range gait recognition across diverse outdoor distances and environments. We further propose \textbf{EMGaitNet}, an end-to-end framework tailored for long-range multimodal gait recognition. To bridge the modality gap between RGB images and point clouds, we introduce a semantic-guided fusion pipeline. A CLIP-based Semantic Mining (SeMi) module first extracts human body-part-aware semantic cues, which are then employed to align 2D and 3D features via a Semantic-Guided Alignment (SGA) module within a unified embedding space. A Symmetric Cross-Attention Fusion (SCAF) module hierarchically integrates visual contours and 3D geometric features, and a Spatio-Temporal (ST) module captures global gait dynamics. Extensive experiments on various gait datasets validate the effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个LiDAR-摄像头多模态长距离步态识别基准LRGait，同时提出了新型的步态识别框架EMGaitNet，有效提升了复杂环境下跨距离步态识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法主要局限于短距离、单一模态场景，难以适应真实世界下的长距离和跨距离条件。本研究旨在推动步态识别技术在复杂、远距离实际场景下的应用。
AI.method: 提出LRGait基准，结合LiDAR和摄像头数据，丰富了步态识别数据类型。设计EMGaitNet框架，利用语义指导的融合流程：CLIP引导模块抽取人体部位语义特征，通过语义引导对齐模块实现2D和3D特征对齐，利用对称交叉注意力融合模块综合视觉轮廓和三维几何特征，并通过时空模块捕捉全局步态动态。
AI.result: 在多个步态数据集上的实验表明，提出的方法在长距离、复杂环境下表现优异，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LRGait数据集和EMGaitNet框架有效促进了步态识别技术在实际长距离多模态场景下的鲁棒性和实用性，为后续相关研究提供了有力支持。

title: Selective Noise Suppression and Discriminative Mutual Interaction for Robust Audio-Visual Segmentation
summary: The ability to capture and segment sounding objects in dynamic visual scenes is crucial for the development of Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) tasks. While significant progress has been made in this area, the interaction between audio and visual modalities still requires further exploration. In this work, we aim to answer the following questions: How can a model effectively suppress audio noise while enhancing relevant audio information? How can we achieve discriminative interaction between the audio and visual modalities? To this end, we propose SDAVS, equipped with the Selective Noise-Resilient Processor (SNRP) module and the Discriminative Audio-Visual Mutual Fusion (DAMF) strategy. The proposed SNRP mitigates audio noise interference by selectively emphasizing relevant auditory cues, while DAMF ensures more consistent audio-visual representations. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark AVS datasets, especially in multi-source and complex scenes. \textit{The code and model are available at https://github.com/happylife-pk/SDAVS}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的音频-视觉分割方法SDAVS，通过革新音视交互机制，在复杂场景下实现了业内领先的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 音视分割任务需在动态场景中准确捕捉并区分发声物体。现有方法对音频与视觉模态的深度交互探索不足，尤其在音频噪声抑制和模态判别交互方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出SDAVS模型，引入选择性交互抗噪处理模块（SNRP）用于抑制无关音频噪声并突出有效声音线索，提出判别性交互融合（DAMF）方法实现精细的音视频信息互补与强化。
AI.result: 在主流音视频分割数据集上，SDAVS在多源与复杂场景分割任务中显著超越现有方法，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SDAVS及其创新模块为音视频信息抗噪和融合提供了新思路，可有效提升于实际复杂环境下的音视分割精度。

title: DualTSR: Unified Dual-Diffusion Transformer for Scene Text Image Super-Resolution
summary: Scene Text Image Super-Resolution (STISR) aims to restore high-resolution details in low-resolution text images, which is crucial for both human readability and machine recognition. Existing methods, however, often depend on external Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models for textual priors or rely on complex multi-component architectures that are difficult to train and reproduce. In this paper, we introduce DualTSR, a unified end-to-end framework that addresses both issues. DualTSR employs a single multimodal transformer backbone trained with a dual diffusion objective. It simultaneously models the continuous distribution of high-resolution images via Conditional Flow Matching and the discrete distribution of textual content via discrete diffusion. This shared design enables visual and textual information to interact at every layer, allowing the model to infer text priors internally instead of relying on an external OCR module. Compared with prior multi-branch diffusion systems, DualTSR offers a simpler end-to-end formulation with fewer hand-crafted components. Experiments on synthetic Chinese benchmarks and a curated real-world evaluation protocol show that DualTSR achieves strong perceptual quality and text fidelity.

AI.tldr: DualTSR是一种用于场景文本图像超分的端到端框架，通过单一多模态transformer骨干，联合视觉与文本信息实现高质量图像恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有STISR方法依赖OCR模型获得文本先验或使用复杂难以训练的多组件结构，影响效果和重现性，亟需统一简洁、高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出DualTSR框架，采用单一多模态transformer主干，以双扩散目标联合训练，通过条件流匹配建模高分辨率图像分布、通过离散扩散建模文本内容分布，实现视觉与文本信息在每一层相互作用，无需外部OCR。
AI.result: 在合成中文基准和真实场景评测协议上，DualTSR在感知质量和文本保真度方面均表现优异，优于以往多分支扩散架构。
AI.conclusion: DualTSR以更简洁的端到端方式，有效整合视觉和文本信息，提升了STISR的性能和可用性，减少人为设计依赖，是场景文本图像超分领域的重要进展。

title: ChArtist: Generating Pictorial Charts with Unified Spatial and Subject Control
summary: A pictorial chart is an effective medium for visual storytelling, seamlessly integrating visual elements with data charts. However, creating such images is challenging because the flexibility of visual elements often conflicts with the rigidity of chart structures. This process thus requires a creative deformation that maintains both data faithfulness and visual aesthetics. Current methods that extract dense structural cues from natural images (e.g., edge or depth maps) are ill-suited as conditioning signals for pictorial chart generation. We present ChArtist, a domain-specific diffusion model for generating pictorial charts automatically, offering two distinct types of control: 1) spatial control that aligns well with the chart structure, and 2) subject-driven control that respects the visual characteristics of a reference image. To achieve this, we introduce a skeleton-based spatial control representation. This representation encodes only the data-encoding information of the chart, allowing for the easy incorporation of reference visuals without a rigid outline constraint. We implement our method based on the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) and leverage an adaptive position encoding mechanism to manage these two controls. We further introduce Spatially Gated Attention to modulate the interaction between spatial control and subject control. To support the fine-tuning of pre-trained models for this task, we created a large-scale dataset of 30,000 triplets (skeleton, reference image, pictorial chart). We also propose a unified data accuracy metric to evaluate the data faithfulness of the generated charts. We believe this work demonstrates that current generative models can achieve data-driven visual storytelling by moving beyond general-purpose conditions to task-specific representations. Project page: https://chartist-ai.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ChArtist，一种针对图像化数据图表自动生成的专用扩散模型，通过骨架控制和主题控制实现图像与数据结构的协调。
AI.motivation: 当前生成视觉叙事图表（如图像化柱状图）时，如何兼顾数据精确性与美观性是难题，现有方法利用的自然图像结构信息不适合直接应用于图表生成。
AI.method: 1）提出骨架为基础的空间控制，精准表达数据结构但不受死板轮廓限制；2）实现参照图像驱动下的视觉特征保留；3）基于Diffusion Transformer进行建模，并引入自适应位置编码和Spatially Gated Attention以调和双重控制；4）制作包含3万个骨架-参照-图表三元组的大规模数据集，并提出统一的数据准确率评价指标。
