However, many deep learning models remain sensitive to magnification variability and lack interpretability. To address these challenges, we propose Histo-MExNet, a unified framework designed for scaleinvariant and uncertainty-aware classification. The model integrates DenseNet, ConvNeXt, and EfficientNet backbones within a gated multi-expert architecture, incorporates a prototype learning module for example-driven interpretability, and applies physics-informed regularization to enforce morphology preservation and spatial coherence during feature learning. Monte Carlo Dropout is used to quantify predictive uncertainty. On the BreaKHis dataset, Histo-MExNet achieves 96.97% accuracy under multi-magnification training and demonstrates improved generalization to unseen magnification levels compared to single-expert models, while uncertainty estimation helps identify out-of-distribution samples and reduce overconfident errors, supporting a balanced combination of accuracy, robustness, and interpretability for clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新型深度学习框架Histo-MExNet，在多倍率乳腺癌病理图像分类中实现高准确率（96.97%），并提升了泛化性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统的深度学习模型在乳腺癌病理图像分类上对放大倍率变化敏感且缺乏可解释性，难以直接应用于临床决策。
AI.method: 作者提出Histo-MExNet，将DenseNet、ConvNeXt和EfficientNet三种主流架构通过门控多专家结构整合，引入原型学习模块以提升可解释性，融入物理规律正则化保证形态与空间一致性，并用Monte Carlo Dropout实现预测不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在BreaKHis多倍率数据集上，模型在多倍率训练条件下取得了96.97%的分类准确率，并在未见倍率上的泛化能力优于单一专家模型。同时，通过不确定性估计有效识别分布外样本，降低过度自信的错误。
AI.conclusion: Histo-MExNet在准确率、泛化能力和可解释性上实现平衡，适合作为临床辅助决策支持工具。

title: Deep EM with Hierarchical Latent Label Modelling for Multi-Site Prostate Lesion Segmentation
summary: Label variability is a major challenge for prostate lesion segmentation. In multi-site datasets, annotations often reflect centre-specific contouring protocols, causing segmentation networks to overfit to local styles and generalise poorly to unseen sites in inference. We treat each observed annotation as a noisy observation of an underlying latent 'clean' lesion mask, and propose a hierarchical expectation-maximisation (HierEM) framework that alternates between: (1) inferring a voxel-wise posterior distribution over the latent mask, and (2) training a CNN using this posterior as a soft target and estimate site-specific sensitivity and specificity under a hierarchical prior. This hierarchical prior decomposes label-quality into a global mean with site- and case-level deviations, reducing site-specific bias by penalising the likelihood term contributed only by site deviations. Experiments on three cohorts demonstrate that the proposed hierarchical EM framework enhances cross-site generalisation compared to state-of-the-art methods. For pooled-dataset evaluation, the per-site mean DSC ranges from 29.50% to 39.69%; for leave-one-site-out generalisation, it ranges from 27.91% to 32.67%, yielding statistically significant improvements over comparison methods (p<0.039). The method also produces interpretable per-site latent label-quality estimates (sensitivity alpha ranges from 31.5% to 47.3% at specificity beta approximates 0.99), supporting post-hoc analyses of cross-site annotation variability. These results indicate that explicitly modelling site-dependent annotation can improve cross-site generalisation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层期望最大化（HierEM）框架，用于解决多中心前列腺病灶分割中的标签差异问题。该方法显著提升了跨站点泛化能力，并提供了解释性强的标签质量估计。
AI.motivation: 多中心数据集的标签往往因各医院注释协议不同而存在变异，导致分割网络在不同中心泛化能力差。作者希望通过统计建模方式，减少标签变化带来的偏差，提高模型跨中心表现。
AI.method: 提出了分层期望最大化（HierEM）框架，将每个注释视为潜在"干净"标签的噪声观测。算法在两步之间交替：1）推断潜在标签的体素级后验分布；2）使用该后验作为CNN软目标进行训练，同时在分层先验下估算站点特异性的灵敏度和特异性。分层先验将标签质量分解为全局均值及站点、个体偏差，通过只惩罚站点偏差部分减小站点偏差影响。
AI.result: 在三组数据集上的实验表明，该方法在跨站点泛化和合并数据评估上均显著优于现有技术，平均DSC在合并评估为29.50%-39.69%，在留一站点外测试为27.91%-32.67%，显著优于对比方法（p<0.039）。此外，方法还能输出可解释的标签质量（灵敏度31.5%-47.3%，特异性接近0.99），便于分析注释差异。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模站点相关的注释差异，可以有效提升前列腺病灶分割网络的跨中心泛化能力，并为注释质量分析提供参考。

title: GenState-AI: State-Aware Dataset for Text-to-Video Retrieval on AI-Generated Videos
summary: Existing text-to-video retrieval benchmarks are dominated by real-world footage where much of the semantics can be inferred from a single frame, leaving temporal reasoning and explicit end-state grounding under-evaluated. We introduce GenState-AI, an AI-generated benchmark centered on controlled state transitions, where each query is paired with a main video, a temporal hard negative that differs only in the decisive end-state, and a semantic hard negative with content substitution, enabling fine-grained diagnosis of temporal vs. semantic confusions beyond appearance matching. Using Wan2.2-TI2V-5B, we generate short clips whose meaning depends on precise changes in position, quantity, and object relations, providing controllable evaluation conditions for state-aware retrieval. We evaluate two representative MLLM-based baselines, and observe consistent and interpretable failure patterns: both frequently confuse the main video with the temporal hard negative and over-prefer temporally plausible but end-state-incorrect clips, indicating insufficient grounding to decisive end-state evidence, while being comparatively less sensitive to semantic substitutions. We further introduce triplet-based diagnostic analyses, including relative-order statistics and breakdowns across transition categories, to make temporal vs. semantic failure sources explicit. GenState-AI provides a focused testbed for state-aware, temporally and semantically sensitive text-to-video retrieval, and will be released on huggingface.co.

AI.tldr: GenState-AI是一个新提出的AI生成基准，主要用于评测文本到视频检索中的时间推理和状态变化识别。它能诊断现有模型在区分时间变化和语义变化上的具体弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到视频检索基准多以现实视频为主，很多情况下只需从单帧图片即可推断语义，导致基于时间推理和终态辨识的能力评估不足，需要更精细且受控的状态转变评测集。
AI.method: 提出GenState-AI基准。每个查询配有主视频、时间硬负样本（仅终态不同）、语义硬负样本（内容被替换），以诊断模型在时间和语义混淆上的表现。基于Wan2.2-TI2V-5B模型生成短片，涵盖位置、数量、关系变化。评估主流多模态大模型基线，通过三元组分析等方法细致诊断失误来源。
AI.result: 代表性基线模型常常将主视频与时间硬负样本混淆，倾向于选择时间上合理但终态错误的视频，说明模型对关键终态的感知能力不够，但对语义替换的敏感度略高。可通过三元组分析，明确定位失误类型。
AI.conclusion: GenState-AI为文本到视频检索中的状态感知、时间和语义敏感性评测提供了一个受控和诊断性强的测试平台，有助于推动更精确的模型改进。

title: End-to-End Spatial-Temporal Transformer for Real-time 4D HOI Reconstruction
comment: 23 pages, 7 figures. The project page is available at: https://nianheng.github.io/THO-project/
summary: Monocular 4D human-object interaction (HOI) reconstruction - recovering a moving human and a manipulated object from a single RGB video - remains challenging due to depth ambiguity and frequent occlusions. Existing methods often rely on multi-stage pipelines or iterative optimization, leading to high inference latency, failing to meet real-time requirements, and susceptibility to error accumulation. To address these limitations, we propose THO, an end-to-end Spatial-Temporal Transformer that predicts human motion and coordinated object motion in a forward fashion from the given video and 3D template. THO achieves this by leveraging spatial-temporal HOI tuple priors. Spatial priors exploit contact-region proximity to infer occluded object features from human cues, while temporal priors capture cross-frame kinematic correlations to refine object representations and enforce physical coherence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that THO operates at an inference speed of 31.5 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU, achieving a >600x speedup over prior optimization-based methods while simultaneously improving reconstruction accuracy and temporal consistency. The project page is available at: https://nianheng.github.io/THO-project/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种端到端的空间-时间Transformer（THO），能够从单目RGB视频高效重建4D人-物交互过程，显著提升了速度与精度。
AI.motivation: 目前单目4D人-物交互重建面临深度歧义和遮挡问题。现有方法多为多阶段或迭代优化，推理速度慢，且易出现误差累积，不适合实时应用。作者旨在解决速度和准确性的问题。
AI.method: 提出THO，一种端到端的空间-时间Transformer，通过输入视频和3D模板，利用空间-时间的交互先验直接预测人和物体的运动。空间先验利用人体和物体接触区域的特征推断被遮挡区域，时间先验建模跨帧运动，确保物理一致性。
AI.result: 在单个RTX 4090 GPU上，THO实现了31.5 FPS的推理速度，比基于优化的方法快600多倍，同时提升了重建精度和时序一致性。
AI.conclusion: THO有效解决了单目人-物交互4D重建中的低效与不准确的问题，为实时交互应用提供了可行方案。

title: Uni-MDTrack: Learning Decoupled Memory and Dynamic States for Parameter-Efficient Visual Tracking in All Modality
summary: With the advent of Transformer-based one-stream trackers that possess strong capability in inter-frame relation modeling, recent research has increasingly focused on how to introduce spatio-temporal context. However, most existing methods rely on a limited number of historical frames, which not only leads to insufficient utilization of the context, but also inevitably increases the length of input and incurs prohibitive computational overhead. Methods that query an external memory bank, on the other hand, suffer from inadequate fusion between the retrieved spatio-temporal features and the backbone. Moreover, using discrete historical frames as context overlooks the rich dynamics of the target. To address the issues, we propose Uni-MDTrack, which consists of two core components: Memory-Aware Compression Prompt (MCP) module and Dynamic State Fusion (DSF) module. MCP effectively compresses rich memory features into memory-aware prompt tokens, which deeply interact with the input throughout the entire backbone, significantly enhancing the performance while maintaining a stable computational load. DSF complements the discrete memory by capturing the continuous dynamic, progressively introducing the updated dynamic state features from shallow to deep layers, while also preserving high efficiency. Uni-MDTrack also supports unified tracking across RGB, RGB-D/T/E, and RGB-Language modalities. Experiments show that in Uni-MDTrack, training only the MCP, DSF, and prediction head, keeping the proportion of trainable parameters around 30%, yields substantial performance gains, achieves state-of-the-art results on 10 datasets spanning five modalities. Furthermore, both MCP and DSF exhibit excellent generality, functioning as plug-and-play components that can boost the performance of various baseline trackers, while significantly outperforming existing parameter-efficient training approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的一体化视觉跟踪框架Uni-MDTrack，利用两大模块优化时空上下文融合，可高效提升多模态跟踪性能并做到参数效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的跟踪方法在利用丰富的历史时空上下文方面受限，历史帧数量太少导致上下文利用不足，增加输入长度则计算量大，外部记忆库融合又不充分。此外，传统做法只用离散历史帧，忽视了目标的动态变化。
AI.method: 提出Uni-MDTrack，包含两个核心模块：（1）Memory-Aware Compression Prompt（MCP），将丰富历史记忆特征压缩为提示token，并与主干网络深度交互，提高效率与性能；（2）Dynamic State Fusion（DSF），捕捉目标的连续动态状态并由浅至深渐进融合，提升表达能力且计算高效。该方法可用于多模态跟踪（RGB、RGB-D/T/E、RGB-语言）。
AI.result: 只训练MCP、DSF和预测头，使得可训练参数占比约30%，即可在五大模态、10个数据集上取得SOTA性能。MCP和DSF还可作为即插即用的通用模块，显著提升各类主流跟踪算法，并明显优于现有参数高效训练方法。
AI.conclusion: Uni-MDTrack在保持较低训练参数量的同时，大幅提升多模态视觉跟踪的精度和效率，提出的MCP和DSF模块具有良好的通用性和可扩展性，对学术和工程应用均有重要意义。

title: LongVidSearch: An Agentic Benchmark for Multi-hop Evidence Retrieval Planning in Long Videos
summary: Long video question answering (Long-Video QA) increasingly relies on agentic tool use to retrieve evidence from long videos. In realistic settings, this process often requires multi-hop retrieval, where agents must iteratively gather multiple discontinuous evidence clips. However, existing long-video benchmarks are largely static: they rarely enforce strict multi-hop retrieval and typically lack a standardized evidence-access interface, making it difficult to separate failures in retrieval planning from those in answer generation. To address this gap, we introduce LongVidSearch, a benchmark for evaluating agentic multi-hop evidence retrieval planning in long videos under standardized access constraints. LongVidSearch enforces retrieval necessity: a Hop-k question requires exactly k necessary evidence clips, and removing any single clip renders the question unsolvable. The benchmark contains 3,000 questions over 447 long videos (average length 26 minutes), covering four reasoning categories: State Mutation, Causal Inference, Global Summary, and Visual Tracking, with 2-hop, 3-hop, and 4-hop evidence requirements. To ensure fair and controlled evaluation, all agents interact with LongVidSearch through a unified tool interface, which fixes the retrieval backend and isolates the agent's ability to formulate queries and plan iterative retrieval. In addition to answer accuracy, we measure tool-call cost to analyze the accuracy-efficiency trade-off under identical access conditions. We evaluate VideoAgent-style QA agents with multiple backbone LLMs using three-judge majority voting. GPT-5 achieves the highest accuracy (42.43), outperforming Gemini 3 Pro (30.97) and GPT-4o (19.20), yet remaining below 50 %, highlighting the difficulty of multi-hop retrieval planning. With gold evidence clips, performance becomes near-perfect, confirming retrieval planning as the primary bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了LongVidSearch基准，专注于评测多跳证据检索能力，通过标准化接口及严格约束，分析当前长视频问答中的检索瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频问答数据集鲜有严格多跳检索和标准化证据访问接口，导致难以明确区分检索规划与答案生成中的失败环节，影响对智能体实际检索和推理能力的评估。
AI.method: 提出LongVidSearch基准，要求每个Hop-k问题必须检索到k个不可替代的证据片段，通过统一工具接口控制检索环境，覆盖四类推理任务，并用多种LLM（如GPT-5、Gemini 3 Pro等）在受控环境下评测智能体的检索与解答表现。
AI.result: GPT-5在该基准上表现最佳（答题准确率42.43），但所有模型准确率均低于50%；一旦给定真实证据片段，答题几乎完美，表明多跳检索规划是主要瓶颈。同时，评估了检索调用成本，支持对准确率与效率平衡的分析。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流智能体在复杂多跳检索规划上仍有显著瓶颈，需进一步研究提升检索与规划能力。LongVidSearch为后续研究提供了标准化测试平台，有助于推动长视频QA领域发展。

title: Wi-Spike: A Low-power WiFi Human Multi-action Recognition Model with Spiking Neural Networks
summary: WiFi-based human action recognition (HAR) has gained significant attention due to its non-intrusive and privacy-preserving nature. However, most existing WiFi sensing models predominantly focus on improving recognition accuracy, while issues of power consumption and energy efficiency remain insufficiently discussed. In this work, we present Wi-Spike, a bio-inspired spiking neural network (SNN) framework for efficient and accurate action recognition using WiFi channel state information (CSI) signals. Specifically, leveraging the event-driven and low-power characteristics of SNNs, Wi-Spike introduces spiking convolutional layers for spatio-temporal feature extraction and a novel temporal attention mechanism to enhance discriminative representation. The extracted features are subsequently encoded and classified through spiking fully connected layers and a voting layer. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (NTU-Fi-HAR, NTU-Fi-HumanID, and UT-HAR) demonstrate that Wi-Spike achieves competitive accuracy in single-action recognition and superior performance in multi-action recognition tasks. As for energy consumption, Wi-Spike reduces the energy cost by at least half compared with other methods, while still achieving 95.83% recognition accuracy in human activity recognition. More importantly, Wi-Spike establishes a new state-of-the-art in WiFi-based multi-action HAR, offering a promising solution for real-time, energy-efficient edge sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且准确的WiFi信号人体动作识别新方法—Wi-Spike，兼顾隐私、安全与能耗，取得了新的技术突破。
AI.motivation: 现有基于WiFi的人体动作识别专注于提高准确率，忽视了能耗与能源效率，对实际部署造成障碍。急需兼顾识别准确性和低能耗的创新方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种仿生脉冲神经网络（SNN）框架Wi-Spike，利用SNN的事件驱动和低功耗特性。方法包括脉冲卷积层进行时空特征提取，新型时序注意力机制增强特征判别力，并通过脉冲全连接层和投票层进行编码和分类。
AI.result: 在NTU-Fi-HAR、NTU-Fi-HumanID和UT-HAR三大数据集上，Wi-Spike单动作识别达同类领先，多动作识别显著优于现有方法。能耗降至同类方案一半以内，动作识别准确率达95.83%。
AI.conclusion: Wi-Spike实现了WiFi信号多动作识别的技术突破，在保持高准确率的同时大幅降低能耗，为实时、节能、高效的边缘感知应用提供了有竞争力的解决方案。

title: V-JEPA 2.1: Unlocking Dense Features in Video Self-Supervised Learning
summary:
We present V-JEPA 2.1, a family of self-supervised models that learn dense, high-quality visual representations for both images and videos while retaining strong global scene understanding. The approach combines four key components. First, a dense predictive loss uses a masking-based objective in which both visible and masked tokens contribute to the training signal, encouraging explicit spatial and temporal grounding. Second, deep self-supervision applies the self-supervised objective hierarchically across multiple intermediate encoder layers to improve representation quality. Third, multi-modal tokenizers enable unified training across images and videos. Finally, the model benefits from effective scaling in both model capacity and training data. Together, these design choices produce representations that are spatially structured, semantically coherent, and temporally consistent.
  Empirically, V-JEPA 2.1 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several challenging benchmarks, including 7.71 mAP on Ego4D for short-term object-interaction anticipation and 40.8 Recall@5 on EPIC-KITCHENS for high-level action anticipation, as well as a 20-point improvement in real-robot grasping success rate over V-JEPA-2 AC. The model also demonstrates strong performance in robotic navigation (5.687 ATE on TartanDrive), depth estimation (0.307 RMSE on NYUv2 with a linear probe), and global recognition (77.7 on Something-Something-V2). These results show that V-JEPA 2.1 significantly advances the state of the art in dense visual understanding and world modeling.

AI.tldr: V-JEPA 2.1是一种自监督视觉表征模型，能够在图像和视频任务中取得最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉自监督学习方法存在空间和时间理解不足、泛化不强等问题，特别是在同时处理静态图像和动态视频方面仍有挑战。作者旨在提出一种能兼顾局部细致信息和全局场景理解的统一模型。
AI.method: V-JEPA 2.1方法结合了四大关键：1）基于mask的稠密预测损失，既利用可见token，也利用掩码token，提升时空对齐表达；2）多层次深度自监督，在多个编码器中间层分层训练，提高表征质量；3）多模态tokenizer统一处理图像和视频数据；4）通过增加模型容量和数据规模实现模型能力扩展。
AI.result: 在多个标准评测集上表现优异，如Ego4D上短期目标交互预测7.71 mAP、EPIC-KITCHENS高层动作预测Recall@5达40.8、机器人抓取任务比前作提升20%、在导航、深度估计及全局识别等任务均有最佳表现。
AI.conclusion: V-JEPA 2.1显著提升了稠密视觉理解与世界建模能力，树立了新的自监督视觉模型标杆。

title: Refining 3D Medical Segmentation with Verbal Instruction
summary: Accurate 3D anatomical segmentation is essential for clinical diagnosis and surgical planning. However, automated models frequently generate suboptimal shape predictions due to factors such as limited and imbalanced training data, inadequate labeling quality, and distribution shifts between training and deployment settings. A natural solution is to iteratively refine the predicted shape based on the radiologists' verbal instructions. However, this is hindered by the scarcity of paired data that explicitly links erroneous shapes to corresponding corrective instructions. As an initial step toward addressing this limitation, we introduce CoWTalk, a benchmark comprising 3D arterial anatomies with controllable synthesized anatomical errors and their corresponding repairing instructions. Building on this benchmark, we further propose an iterative refinement model that represents 3D shapes as vector sets and interacts with textual instructions to progressively update the target shape. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves significant improvements over corrupted inputs and competitive baselines, highlighting the feasibility of language-driven clinician-in-the-loop refinement for 3D medical shapes modeling.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合医生语言指令辅助的3D医学形状分割和修正方法，并建立了用于该任务的新基准数据集CoWTalk。
AI.motivation: 虽然3D医学解剖结构的自动分割对于临床诊断和手术规划很重要，但现有模型受限于数据量少、标签质量不高以及训练部署间的分布差异等问题，导致分割结果并不理想。允许放射科医生根据分割结果用语言进行迭代修正是一种自然思路，但缺乏相关配对数据限制了研究进展。
AI.method:
1）提出了包含可控合成错误与相应修正指令的3D动脉解剖CoWTalk基准。
2）设计了一种迭代细化模型，将三维形状表示为向量集，通过与文本修正指令交互、逐步修正目标形状。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出方法在矫正形状上的性能较原始错误输入和主流竞品都取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 语言驱动、“医生-在环”的医疗三维形状建模和修正机制是可行且有效的，未来有望推动医学影像辅助诊断的发展。

title: Mapping Dark-Matter Clusters via Physics-Guided Diffusion Models
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures. Project page available at: https://graphics.unizar.es/projects/DarkMatterMapping
summary: Galaxy clusters are powerful probes of astrophysics and cosmology through gravitational lensing: the clusters' mass, dominated by 85% dark matter, distorts background light. Yet, mass reconstruction lacks the scalability and large-scale benchmarks to process the hundreds of thousands of clusters expected from forthcoming wide-field surveys. We introduce a fully automated method to reconstruct cluster surface mass density from photometry and gravitational lensing observables. Central to our approach is DarkClusters-15k, our new dataset of 15,000 simulated clusters with paired mass and photometry maps, the largest benchmark to date, spanning multiple redshifts and simulation frameworks. We train a plug-and-play diffusion prior on DarkClusters-15k that learns the statistical relationship between mass and light, and draw posterior samples constrained by weak- and strong-lensing observables; this yields principled reconstructions driven by explicit physics, alongside well-calibrated uncertainties. Our approach requires no expert tuning, runs in minutes rather than hours, achieves higher accuracy, and matches expertly-tuned reconstructions of the MACS 1206 cluster. We release our method and DarkClusters-15k to support development and benchmarking for upcoming wide-field cosmological surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全自动化方法，利用光度和引力透镜观测重建星系团表面质量密度。核心是发布了当前最大的数据集DarkClusters-15k，并基于此训练扩散先验模型，能够高效准确地重建团质量分布，并公开相关代码和数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有的星系团质量重建方法难以大规模自动处理未来巡天计划中将发现的数十万星系团，也缺乏足够规模和多样性的数据基准，限制了方法的发展和评测。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含1.5万个模拟星系团的DarkClusters-15k数据集，包含配对的质量和光度图。基于该数据集，训练了可即插即用的扩散先验模型，能够学习团质量和光度之间的统计关系。通过引入弱透镜和强透镜观测数据，采用后验采样实现物理约束下的不确定性良好校准的重建。
AI.result: 该方法无需专家调参，重建时间从小时级缩短到分钟级，准确率高于现有方法，并可匹配专业团队对MACS 1206星系团的重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法和数据集将促进未来大规模巡天中的星系团质量重建研究，提升科学产出和算法对比评测的标准化水平。

title: Unlocking the Latent Canvas: Eliciting and Benchmarking Symbolic Visual Expression in LLMs
summary: Current multimodal approaches predominantly treat visual generation as an external process, relying on pixel rendering or code execution, thereby overlooking the native visual representation capabilities latent within Large Language Models (LLMs). In this work, we unlock this potential through ASCII art, a compact, efficient, and text-native visual format. We introduce SVE-ASCII, a unified framework designed to elicit and benchmark Symbolic Visual Expression directly within the pure text space. To address the scarcity of systematic resources, we construct ASCIIArt-7K, a high-quality dataset synthesized via a novel "Seed-and-Evolve" pipeline that augments human-curated anchors through in-context stylistic editing. We further implement a unified instruction-tuning strategy that jointly optimizes for both Generation (Text-to-ASCII) and Understanding (ASCII-to-Text). Crucially, our experiments reveal a critical phenomenon regarding task duality: while it is established that perception aids generation, we provide compelling evidence that generative training significantly enhances visual comprehension. This confirms a mutually reinforcing cycle in symbolic visual processing, a relationship previously hypothesized but rarely empirically demonstrated in the visual domain. We release our dataset, the ASCIIArt-Bench benchmark, and the SVE-ASCII model, establishing a robust baseline for native text-based visual intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用ASCII艺术来实现LLM原生文本域视觉表达与理解的统一框架SVE-ASCII，并构建了相关高质量数据集和基准，实验揭示了生成与理解任务间的相互促进。
AI.motivation: 目前多模态方法多依赖于外部图像生成过程（如渲染或代码执行），忽略了大语言模型内在的原生视觉表达能力。作者希望挖掘LLM在文本域内表现视觉信息的潜力。
AI.method: 1）提出SVE-ASCII框架，统一实现文本到ASCII艺术生成与ASCII到文本理解；2）构建数据集ASCIIArt-7K，采用"Seed-and-Evolve"管线，通过人工示范+风格编辑自动扩展数据；3）采用统一的指令微调策略优化两个方向任务。
AI.result: 实验显示，生成任务的训练不仅提升了生成效果，也显著增强了模型的视觉理解能力，首次在视觉符号处理领域实证了生成与理解的相互促进。
AI.conclusion: 作者发布了数据集、评测基准和模型，为基于文本的视觉智能奠定了坚实的基线，证明了LLM具备原生视觉表达和理解的潜力及其双向促进关系。

title: Expanding mmWave Datasets for Human Pose Estimation with Unlabeled Data and LiDAR Datasets
summary: Current mmWave datasets for human pose estimation (HPE) are scarce and lack diversity in both point cloud (PC) attributes and human poses, severely hampering the generalization ability of their trained models. On the other hand, unlabeled mmWave HPE data and diverse LiDAR HPE datasets are readily available. We propose EMDUL, a novel approach to expand the volume and diversity of an existing mmWave dataset using unlabeled mmWave data and a LiDAR dataset. EMDUL trains a pseudo-label estimator to annotate the unlabeled mmWave data and is able to convert, or translate, a given annotated LiDAR PC to its mmWave counterpart. Expanded with both LiDAR-converted and pseudo-labeled mmWave PCs, our mmWave dataset significantly boosts the performance and generalization ability of all our HPE models, with substantial 15.1% and 18.9% error reductions for in-domain and out-of-domain settings, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合无标签mmWave数据和LiDAR数据来扩充mmWave人体姿态估计数据集的新方法EMDUL，大幅提升模型泛化与性能。
AI.motivation: mmWave人体姿态估计数据集稀缺且多样性不足，导致训练模型泛化能力差。而无标签mmWave数据和丰富LiDAR数据易获取，如何利用它们成为关键问题。
AI.method: 提出EMDUL方法：1）训练pseudo-label估计器为无标签mmWave数据生成标签；2）将带注释的LiDAR点云转换为mmWave点云。用LiDAR-转换和pseudo-label点云联合扩充mmWave数据集。
AI.result: 扩充后的mmWave数据集显著提升人体姿态估计算法的性能，分别在域内和跨域设置下将误差降低15.1%和18.9%。
AI.conclusion: 结合无标签数据和异源数据集，通过EMDUL创新扩充策略，有效增强了mmWave人体姿态估计模型的泛化能力和精度。

title: LatSearch: Latent Reward-Guided Search for Faster Inference-Time Scaling in Video Diffusion
summary: The recent success of inference-time scaling in large language models has inspired similar explorations in video diffusion. In particular, motivated by the existence of "golden noise" that enhances video quality, prior work has attempted to improve inference by optimising or searching for better initial noise. However, these approaches have notable limitations: they either rely on priors imposed at the beginning of noise sampling or on rewards evaluated only on the denoised and decoded videos. This leads to error accumulation, delayed and sparse reward signals, and prohibitive computational cost, which prevents the use of stronger search algorithms. Crucially, stronger search algorithms are precisely what could unlock substantial gains in controllability, sample efficiency and generation quality for video diffusion, provided their computational cost can be reduced. To fill in this gap, we enable efficient inference-time scaling for video diffusion through latent reward guidance, which provides intermediate, informative and efficient feedback along the denoising trajectory. We introduce a latent reward model that scores partially denoised latents at arbitrary timesteps with respect to visual quality, motion quality, and text alignment. Building on this model, we propose LatSearch, a novel inference-time search mechanism that performs Reward-Guided Resampling and Pruning (RGRP). In the resampling stage, candidates are sampled according to reward-normalised probabilities to reduce over-reliance on the reward model. In the pruning stage, applied at the final scheduled step, only the candidate with the highest cumulative reward is retained, improving both quality and efficiency. We evaluate LatSearch on the VBench-2.0 benchmark and demonstrate that it consistently improves video generation across multiple evaluation dimensions compared to the baseline Wan2.1 model.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为LatSearch的新型推理时搜索机制，通过引入潜在奖励引导，有效提升了视频扩散模型的推理效率和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 此前针对视频扩散的推理时优化多数依赖初始噪声的设定或对最终生成视频评分。这些方式存在误差积累、奖励稀疏且计算量大等问题，限制了更强大的搜索算法的应用。论文旨在解决这些瓶颈，让推理时的搜索算法更高效且强大。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个可在任意去噪步采样阶段评估视觉质量、运动质量和文本一致性的奖励模型。在此基础上，提出LatSearch方法：首先根据奖励归一化概率对候选样本重采样（减少对奖励模型的依赖），最后在计划步的末尾只保留累计奖励最高的候选，从而提升生成效果和效率。
AI.result: 在VBench-2.0基准上，LatSearch在多个评测维度上都显著优于基线模型Wan2.1，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LatSearch通过高效的奖励引导机制，实现了推理时对视频扩散模型的质量和控制能力的提升，为后续研究提供了有价值的借鉴。

title: Distilling Latent Manifolds: Resolution Extrapolation by Variational Autoencoders
summary: Variational Autoencoder (VAE) encoders play a critical role in modern generative models, yet their computational cost often motivates the use of knowledge distillation or quantification to obtain compact alternatives. Existing studies typically believe that the model work better on the samples closed to their training data distribution than unseen data distribution. In this work, we report a counter-intuitive phenomenon in VAE encoder distillation: a compact encoder distilled only at low resolutions exhibits poor reconstruction performance at its native resolution, but achieves dramatically improved results when evaluated at higher, unseen input resolutions. Despite never being trained beyond $256^2$ resolution, the distilled encoder generalizes effectively to $512^2$ resolution inputs, partially inheriting the teacher model's resolution preference.We further analyze latent distributions across resolutions and find that higher-resolution inputs produce latent representations more closely aligned with the teacher's manifold. Through extensive experiments on ImageNet-256, we show that simple resolution remapping-upsampling inputs before encoding and downsampling reconstructions for evaluation-leads to substantial gains across PSNR, MSE, SSIM, LPIPS, and rFID metrics. These findings suggest that VAE encoder distillation learns resolution-consistent latent manifolds rather than resolution-specific pixel mappings. This also means that the high training cost on memory, time and high-resolution datasets are not necessary conditions for distilling a VAE with high-resolution image reconstruction capabilities. On low resolution datasets, the distillation model still could learn the detailed knowledge of the teacher model in high-resolution image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文发现，将VAE编码器在低分辨率下蒸馏虽然在本地分辨率重建效果不佳，但却在更高、未见过的分辨率下取得更好效果，同时继承了教师模型对高分辨率的偏好。
AI.motivation: VAE编码器在生成模型中十分关键，但其高昂计算成本驱动着模型压缩（如知识蒸馏）的研究。以往认为模型对训练分布外的数据效果更差，该工作旨在探究低分辨率蒸馏编码器在高分辨率输入下的表现。
AI.method: 作者通过仅在低分辨率下对VAE编码器进行知识蒸馏，分析不同分辨率输入的潜在分布，并通过分辨率重映射（对输入上采样，对重建下采样）等实验，在ImageNet-256上系统性评测了模型表现。
AI.result: 即使只在256×256分辨率训练，蒸馏得到的紧凑编码器在512×512分辨率输入下表现更好，高分辨率输入的潜在特征更接近教师模型的流形。分辨率重映射方法在PSNR、MSE、SSIM、LPIPS和rFID等指标上获得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 高分辨率数据与昂贵训练并非获得高分辨率VAE编码器的必要条件。低分辨率下的蒸馏模型在高分辨率重建时同样能学习到教师模型的细节知识，并能生成分辨率一致的潜在空间表达。

title: ASAP: Attention-Shift-Aware Pruning for Efficient LVLM Inference
summary: While Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate exceptional multi-modal capabilities, the quadratic computational cost of processing high-resolution visual tokens remains a critical bottleneck. Though recent token reduction strategies attempt to accelerate inference, such methods inadequately exploit attention values and fail to address token redundancy. More critically, they overlook the ``attention shift'' phenomenon inherent in LVLMs, which skews token attention scores. In this work, we propose ASAP, a novel training-free, KV-Cache-compatible pruning recipe that comprehensively addresses these limitations. First, we mitigate the attention shift by utilizing a dynamic bidirectional soft attention mask, ensuring the selection of genuinely informative tokens rather than naive attention-based selection. Second, we posit that high semantic redundancy within the token set degrades performance. We therefore introduce a weighted soft merging component that merges semantically similar tokens, preserving only the most feature-dense visual patches for subsequent layers. ASAP achieves virtually lossless compression of visual context, retaining 99.02% of the original LLaVA-NeXT-7B performance while aggressively slashing computational FLOPs by ~80%.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在处理高分辨率视觉token时，计算量随token数呈二次增长的问题，提出了一种能有效压缩视觉token并兼容KV-Cache的训练无关修剪方法ASAP，既缓解了关注偏移又合并冗余token，在几乎无损性能的前提下大幅降低计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLMs在处理高分辨率视觉token时，因token数多导致计算量极大，影响模型实际部署和推理效率。虽然已有一些token裁剪策略，但它们未能充分利用注意力分数，未有效解决token冗余，更忽视了LVLMs固有的“attention shift”现象，导致选token时不准确，限制了效能提升。
AI.method: ASAP方法包含两大创新：一是利用动态的双向软注意力掩码，减缓“attention shift”，确保选取的信息token更具代表性；二是根据token语义冗余性，提出加权软合并机制，把相似的token合并，仅保留语义信息密集的视觉patch用于后续处理。全部过程无需额外训练，可无缝兼容已有KV-Cache加速方案。
AI.result: ASAP方法在LLaVA-NeXT-7B等主流LVLM上实验，能在计算量（FLOPs）减少约80%的同时，性能几乎无损，保留99.02%的原模型分数，极大提高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: ASAP为LVLM推理提速和高效部署提供了切实可行的新方案，兼顾性能与效率，且方法通用、易于集成，有望推动多模态大模型在实际场景的落地应用。

title: A comprehensive multimodal dataset and benchmark for ulcerative colitis scoring in endoscopy
summary: Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic mucosal inflammatory condition that places patients at increased risk of colorectal cancer. Colonoscopic surveillance remains the gold standard for assessing disease activity, and reporting typically relies on standardised endoscopic scoring metrics. The most widely used is the Mayo Endoscopic Score (MES), with some centres also adopting the Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index of Severity (UCEIS). Both are descriptive assessments of mucosal inflammation (MES: 0 to 3; UCEIS: 0 to 8), where higher values indicate more severe disease. However, computational methods for automatically predicting these scores remain limited, largely due to the lack of publicly available expert-annotated datasets and the absence of robust benchmarking. There is also a significant research gap in generating clinically meaningful descriptions of UC images, despite image captioning being a well-established computer vision task. Variability in endoscopic systems and procedural workflows across centres further highlights the need for multi-centre datasets to ensure algorithmic robustness and generalisability. In this work, we introduce a curated multi-centre, multi-resolution dataset that includes expert-validated MES and UCEIS labels, alongside detailed clinical descriptions. To our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive dataset that combines dual scoring metrics for classification tasks with expert-generated captions describing mucosal appearance and clinically accepted reasoning for image captioning. This resource opens new opportunities for developing clinically meaningful multimodal algorithms. In addition to the dataset, we also provide benchmarking using convolutional neural networks, vision transformers, hybrid models, and widely used multimodal vision-language captioning algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文推出了一个多中心、多分辨率、配有专家标注分数和临床描述的溃疡性结肠炎（UC）内镜图像数据集，并进行了深度学习与多模态算法的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 目前用于UC图像自动评分（MES、UCEIS）的计算方法受限，缺乏公开、专家标注的数据集及健全的基准测试，也缺乏对图像临床意义描述的研究。不同中心采集及操作流程的差异也影响了算法的泛化能力，因此需要多中心、详实标注的数据资源。
AI.method: 作者收集并构建了一个多中心、多分辨率的UC内镜影像数据集，包含专家验证的MES与UCEIS评分和详细临床描述。还对卷积神经网络、视觉Transformer、混合模型和多模态视觉语言字幕算法这些主流模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 建立了全球首个结合MES与UCEIS标签及专家生成说明文字的大型影像数据集。对多种主流视觉与多模态模型进行了算法基准测试，验证了数据集的可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发更具临床意义的UC自动分析与图像解读多模态算法提供了新机会，促进了UC领域人工智能研究的标准化和泛化。

title: Medical Image Spatial Grounding with Semantic Sampling
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, under review at MICCAI 2026
summary: Vision language models (VLMs) have shown significant promise in visual grounding for images as well as videos. In medical imaging research, VLMs represent a bridge between object detection and segmentation, and report understanding and generation. However, spatial grounding of anatomical structures in the three-dimensional space of medical images poses many unique challenges. In this study, we examine image modalities, slice directions, and coordinate systems as differentiating factors for vision components of VLMs, and the use of anatomical, directional, and relational terminology as factors for the language components. We then demonstrate that visual and textual prompting systems such as labels, bounding boxes, and mask overlays have varying effects on the spatial grounding ability of VLMs. To enable measurement and reproducibility, we introduce \textbf{MIS-Ground}, a benchmark that comprehensively tests a VLM for vulnerabilities against specific modes of \textbf{M}edical \textbf{I}mage \textbf{S}patial \textbf{Ground}ing. We release MIS-Ground to the public at \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/mis-ground}{\texttt{anonymous.4open.science/r/mis-ground}}. In addition, we present \textbf{MIS-SemSam}, a low-cost, inference-time, and model-agnostic optimization of VLMs that improve their spatial grounding ability with the use of \textbf{Sem}antic \textbf{Sam}pling. We find that MIS-SemSam improves the accuracy of Qwen3-VL-32B on MIS-Ground by 13.06\%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIS-Ground基准和MIS-SemSam方法，并系统性分析了视觉语言模型（VLMs）在医学影像三维空间中空间定位能力的影响因素及其优化方法。
AI.motivation: 在医学影像中，将解剖结构在三维空间精确定位是一项挑战。视觉语言模型虽有潜力，但现有评测手段和优化途径有限。作者旨在明确影响VLM空间定位能力的因素，并提出可复现、全面的评测基准和优化方法。
AI.method: 作者分析了图像模态、切片方向、坐标系（视觉因素）以及解剖、方向、关系性术语（语言因素）对VLM空间定位的影响。同时，作者提出MIS-Ground基准全面测试VLM在医学影像空间定位任务中的漏洞，并提出了基于语义采样的MIS-SemSam方法，在推理阶段、模型无关地优化VLM空间定位能力。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，不同的视觉和文本提示方式（如标签、边界框、掩膜等）会对空间定位结果产生明显影响。利用MIS-SemSam方法后，Qwen3-VL-32B模型在MIS-Ground基准上的准确率提升了13.06%。
AI.conclusion: MIS-Ground基准为评估VLM在医学影像空间定位提供了标准工具，MIS-SemSam能有效提升VLM在该任务上的表现。两者有助于未来医学影像VLM的研究和实际应用。

title: Texel Splatting: Perspective-Stable 3D Pixel Art
summary: Rendering 3D scenes as pixel art requires that discrete pixels remain stable as the camera moves. Existing methods snap the camera to a grid. Under orthographic projection, this works: every pixel shifts by the same amount, and a single snap corrects all of them. Perspective breaks this. Pixels at different depths drift at different rates, and no single snap corrects all depths. Texel splatting avoids this entirely. Scene geometry is rendered into a cubemap from a fixed point in the world, and each texel is splatted to the screen as a world-space quad. Cubemap indexing gives rotation invariance. Grid-snapping the origin gives translation invariance. The primary limitation is that a fixed origin cannot see all geometry; disocclusion at probe boundaries remains an open tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于3D场景像素艺术渲染的新方法，即texel splatting，有效解决了随摄像机移动时像素稳定性的问题，尤其针对透视投影下像素漂移难题，克服了以往基于相机网格对齐方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前3D像素艺术渲染的主流方法通过将相机吸附到网格点以保持像素稳定性，但这种方式仅在正交投影下有效。存在一个核心问题：在透视投影下，深度不同的像素漂移速率相异，无法通过统一的网格吸附来纠正，因此渲染效果不稳定。为了解决这个在透视投影下影响像素稳定性的难题，提出新方法成为研究动力。
AI.method: 本文提出的texel splatting方法将场景几何从固定世界点渲染到cubemap（立方体贴图），随后每个texel（贴图像素）以世界空间四边形形式splatted（溅射）到屏幕上。通过cubemap索引实现旋转不变性，通过网格吸附立方体原点保证平移不变性。该方法回避了在不同深度粒子漂移速度不同的问题。
AI.result: 通过该方法，可以在摄像机移动时，稳定地显示3D场景的像素艺术效果，尤其在透视投影下有效地避免了原方法的像素漂移和失稳。
AI.conclusion: texel splatting为3D像素艺术渲染提供了更可靠和稳定的像素控制，尤其适用于透视投影场景。其主要限制在于固定原点无法看到所有场景物体，对于立方体映射边界处的物体可能出现遮挡与消隐相关权衡，这一点尚需进一步研究。

title: GroundSet: A Cadastral-Grounded Dataset for Spatial Understanding with Vector Data
summary: Precise spatial understanding in Earth Observation is essential for translating raw aerial imagery into actionable insights for critical applications like urban planning, environmental monitoring and disaster management. However, Multimodal Large Language Models exhibit critical deficiencies in fine-grained spatial understanding within Remote Sensing, primarily due to a reliance on limited or repurposed legacy datasets. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset grounded in verifiable cadastral vector data, comprising 3.8 million annotated objects across 510k high-resolution images with 135 granular semantic categories. We validate this resource through a comprehensive instruction-tuning benchmark spanning seven spatial reasoning tasks. Our evaluation establishes a robust baseline using a standard LLaVA architecture. We show that while current RS-specialized and commercial models (e.g., Gemini) struggle in zero-shot settings, high-fidelity supervision effectively bridges this gap, enabling standard architectures to master fine-grained spatial grounding without complex architectural modifications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个大规模、高质量、基于地籍矢量数据的遥感空间理解数据集，并通过多任务评测验证了其推动多模态大模型空间理解能力提升的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在遥感领域的精细空间理解能力有限，主要因缺乏高质量标注数据。实际场景如城市规划、环境监测、灾害管理等，都急需具备强空间理解力的模型。为推动模型进步，有必要构建更精细、丰富的数据集。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含380万标注对象、51万高分辨率遥感图像、135类精细语义类别的大规模数据集，且标注基于可验证的地籍矢量数据。通过七项空间推理任务展开指令微调基准测试，并在标准LLaVA模型基础上分别与领域特有模型和商用多模态模型对比评估。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，现有遥感领域专用或商用多模态模型（如Gemini）在零样本情况下表现不佳，而高质量监督数据能显著提升标准模型的细粒度空间理解能力，无需复杂的模型结构改动即可达到很高的空间定位精度。
AI.conclusion: 高质量地籍矢量数据和大规模精细标注为多模态大模型在遥感空间理解方面带来了显著进步，为实际应用提供了坚实的数据基础。

title: Make it SING: Analyzing Semantic Invariants in Classifiers
summary: All classifiers, including state-of-the-art vision models, possess invariants, partially rooted in the geometry of their linear mappings. These invariants, which reside in the null-space of the classifier, induce equivalent sets of inputs that map to identical outputs. The semantic content of these invariants remains vague, as existing approaches struggle to provide human-interpretable information. To address this gap, we present Semantic Interpretation of the Null-space Geometry (SING), a method that constructs equivalent images, with respect to the network, and assigns semantic interpretations to the available variations. We use a mapping from network features to multi-modal vision language models. This allows us to obtain natural language descriptions and visual examples of the induced semantic shifts. SING can be applied to a single image, uncovering local invariants, or to sets of images, allowing a breadth of statistical analysis at the class and model levels. For example, our method reveals that ResNet50 leaks relevant semantic attributes to the null space, whereas DinoViT, a ViT pretrained with self-supervised DINO, is superior in maintaining class semantics across the invariant space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SING方法，能够对分类器的零空间不变性进行语义解释，并使用视觉语言模型获取自然语言描述，实现对网络等价输入的可解释性增强。
AI.motivation: 当前分类器（如主流视觉模型）的零空间包含大量‘等价’输入，这些输入在网络输出上等价，但其语义内容不可解释，现有研究难以赋予其人类可读的语义解释。本研究旨在让这些零空间内的等价变换变得可理解。
AI.method: 提出SING方法，将网络特征映射到多模态视觉语言模型（如CLIP），生成与网络不变变换相关的自然语言描述和可视化示例。可分析单张或多张图片的不变性，支持进一步的统计分析。
AI.result: SING揭示了主流模型的零空间中包含的语义内容。例如，ResNet50会将相关语义特征泄漏到零空间，而自监督预训练的DinoViT能更好地保护类别语义不丢失。
AI.conclusion: SING为分析与可解释分类器零空间不变性提供了强大工具，有助于理解模型决策过程，推动视觉模型更强语义可解释性发展。

title: A Heterogeneous Ensemble for Multi-Center COVID-19 Classification from Chest CT Scans
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic exposed critical limitations in diagnostic workflows: RT-PCR tests suffer from slow turnaround times and high false-negative rates, while CT-based screening offers faster complementary diagnosis but requires expert radiological interpretation. Deploying automated CT analysis across multiple hospital centres introduces further challenges, as differences in scanner hardware, acquisition protocols, and patient populations cause substantial domain shift that degrades single-model performance. To address these challenges, we present a heterogeneous ensemble of nine models spanning three inference paradigms: (1) a self-supervised DINOv2 Vision Transformer with slice-level sigmoid aggregation, (2) a RadImageNet-pretrained DenseNet-121 with slice-level sigmoid averaging, and (3) seven Gated Attention Multiple Instance Learning models using EfficientNet-B3, ConvNeXt-Tiny, and EfficientNetV2-S backbones with scan-level softmax classification. Ensemble diversity is further enhanced through random-seed variation and Stochastic Weight Averaging. We address severe overfitting, reducing the validation-to-training loss ratio from 35x to less than 3x, through a combination of Focal Loss, embedding-level Mixup, and domain-aware augmentation. Model outputs are fused via score-weighted probability averaging and calibrated with per-source threshold optimization. The final ensemble achieves an average macro F1 of 0.9280 across four hospital centres, outperforming the best single model (F1=0.8969) by +0.031, demonstrating that heterogeneous architectures combined with source-aware calibration are essential for robust multi-site medical image classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个异构集成模型方法，用于提升CT影像在多医院中心中的COVID-19自动诊断表现，通过创新集成和优化技术有效缓解了域偏移和过拟合问题，取得了优异的综合性能。
AI.motivation: 现有COVID-19诊断方式如RT-PCR存在速度慢、漏诊高的问题，CT自动分析虽快速有效，但因不同医院设备、协议和人群差异导致模型在新环境下性能严重下降。因此，亟需提升CT影像自动分析在多中心环境下的稳定性和准确性。
AI.method: 作者设计了由三类推理范式下的9个模型组成的异构集成：包含基于DINOv2 Vision Transformer的自监督模型、RadImageNet预训练的DenseNet-121以及7个基于Gated Attention及不同骨干网络的多实例学习模型，通过如随机种子、权重平均等多样性策略，并结合诸如Focal Loss、Mixup、来源感知增强等技术有效抑制过拟合，最终输出通过加权概率融合和独立阈值校准优化。
AI.result: 该集成模型在四家医院中心上取得了平均macro F1分数0.9280，较最佳单模型提升了0.031，显著优于单一网络，极大提高了多中心、跨域医疗影像分类的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多样化的异构集成结合源感知校准对于实现稳定、强健的多中心医学影像自动分类至关重要，有效缓解了域迁移和过拟合问题，展示了多医院实际部署的巨大应用前景。

title: Continual Few-shot Adaptation for Synthetic Fingerprint Detection
comment: Accepted in 14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF-2026)
summary: The quality and realism of synthetically generated fingerprint images have increased significantly over the past decade fueled by advancements in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI). This has exacerbated the vulnerability of fingerprint recognition systems to data injection attacks, where synthetic fingerprints are maliciously inserted during enrollment or authentication. Hence, there is an urgent need for methods to detect if a fingerprint image is real or synthetic. While it is straightforward to train deep neural network (DNN) models to classify images as real or synthetic, often such DNN models overfit the training data and fail to generalize well when applied to synthetic fingerprints generated using unseen GenAI models. In this work, we formulate synthetic fingerprint detection as a continual few-shot adaptation problem, where the objective is to rapidly evolve a base detector to identify new types of synthetic data. To enable continual few-shot adaptation, we employ a combination of binary cross-entropy and supervised contrastive (applied to the feature representation) losses and replay a few samples from previously known styles during fine-tuning to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. Experiments based on several DNN backbones (as feature extractors) and a variety of real and synthetic fingerprint datasets indicate that the proposed approach achieves a good trade-off between fast adaptation for detecting unseen synthetic styles and forgetting of known styles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种能快速适应新型合成指纹检测任务的方法，有效权衡了对未知合成风格指纹的检测能力与对已知风格的遗忘。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式人工智能的发展，合成指纹的真实感大大提升，严重威胁指纹识别系统的安全。因此，急需能有效区分真实与合成指纹的新检测方法，尤其要能适应不断出现的新合成指纹类型。
AI.method: 将合成指纹检测问题建模为持续少样本适应问题，通过结合二元交叉熵损失和有监督对比损失进行训练，同时在微调时重放部分已知样本以缓解灾难性遗忘，采用多种DNN骨干网络作为特征提取器。
AI.result: 在多种真实和合成指纹数据集上的实验显示，该方法能在对新型合成指纹实现快速适应的同时，尽量减少对已知合成风格的遗忘，在检测新旧合成指纹风格间取得了良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在针对生成式人工智能改进下的合成指纹伪造检测方面具有很强的通用性和适应性，为指纹识别系统增强安全性提供了可行技术途径。

title: Spectrum Matching: a Unified Perspective for Superior Diffusability in Latent Diffusion
comment: We use NIPS template for readability reason
summary: In this paper, we study the diffusability (learnability) of variational autoencoders (VAE) in latent diffusion. First, we show that pixel-space diffusion trained with an MSE objective is inherently biased toward learning low and mid spatial frequencies, and that the power-law power spectral density (PSD) of natural images makes this bias perceptually beneficial. Motivated by this result, we propose the \emph{Spectrum Matching Hypothesis}: latents with superior diffusability should (i) follow a flattened power-law PSD (\emph{Encoding Spectrum Matching}, ESM) and (ii) preserve frequency-to-frequency semantic correspondence through the decoder (\emph{Decoding Spectrum Matching}, DSM). In practice, we apply ESM by matching the PSD between images and latents, and DSM via shared spectral masking with frequency-aligned reconstruction. Importantly, Spectrum Matching provides a unified view that clarifies prior observations of over-noisy or over-smoothed latents, and interprets several recent methods as special cases (e.g., VA-VAE, EQ-VAE). Experiments suggest that Spectrum Matching yields superior diffusion generation on CelebA and ImageNet datasets, and outperforms prior approaches. Finally, we extend the spectral view to representation alignment (REPA): we show that the directional spectral energy of the target representation is crucial for REPA, and propose a DoG-based method to further improve the performance of REPA. Our code is available https://github.com/forever208/SpectrumMatching.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了变分自编码器（VAE）在潜变量扩散（latent diffusion）中的可扩散性（learnability），提出了“频谱匹配假设”（Spectrum Matching Hypothesis），通过频谱匹配提升扩散生成性能，并解释了一些以往方法的机制和表现。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型与VAE结合时，潜变量如何影响扩散和生成质量一直缺乏统一解释。以往技术如VA-VAE或EQ-VAE屡有“噪声过大”或“过度平滑”的现象，本研究试图揭开这种现象背后的频谱原因，并提出理论支持。
AI.method: 作者首先通过理论和实验证明，用MSE优化训练的像素空间扩散模型偏向学习低中频信号，这一偏差反而与自然图像的频谱特性一致，有助于感知。随后，提出“频谱匹配假设”：理想的潜变量应（1）拥有与原图像近似的平缓幂律频谱（编码端匹配，ESM），（2）在解码端保持频率语义对应（解码端匹配，DSM）。具体做法包括直接在图像和潜变量间匹配频谱以及在重建时共享频谱掩码。
AI.result: 实验表明，“频谱匹配”策略在CelebA和ImageNet数据集上的扩散生成任务中优于传统方法，对VAE类技术的表现提供了统一的频域视角。论文还将此理论拓展到表示对齐（REPA）任务，并提出一种基于差分高斯（DoG）的新方法提升对齐性能。
AI.conclusion: 频谱匹配为理解和改进潜扩散模型提供了统一理论和实用机制，有效提升了生成质量，也解释并连接了以往多个相关方法。

title: TopoCL: Topological Contrastive Learning for Medical Imaging
summary: Contrastive learning (CL) has become a powerful approach for learning representations from unlabeled images. However, existing CL methods focus predominantly on visual appearance features while neglecting topological characteristics (e.g., connectivity patterns, boundary configurations, cavity formations) that provide valuable cues for medical image analysis. To address this limitation, we propose a new topological CL framework (TopoCL) that explicitly exploits topological structures during contrastive learning for medical imaging. Specifically, we first introduce topology-aware augmentations that control topological perturbations using a relative bottleneck distance between persistence diagrams, preserving medically relevant topological properties while enabling controlled structural variations. We then design a Hierarchical Topology Encoder that captures topological features through self-attention and cross-attention mechanisms. Finally, we develop an adaptive mixture-of-experts (MoE) module to dynamically integrate visual and topological representations. TopoCL can be seamlessly integrated with existing CL methods. We evaluate TopoCL on five representative CL methods (SimCLR, MoCo-v3, BYOL, DINO, and Barlow Twins) and five diverse medical image classification datasets. The experimental results show that TopoCL achieves consistent improvements: an average gain of +3.26% in linear probe classification accuracy with strong statistical significance, verifying its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新颖的拓扑对比学习（TopoCL）框架，能够在医学图像领域下提升无监督表征学习的效果，在多个方法和数据集上取得显著的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的对比学习方法主要关注图像的视觉外观特征，忽略了在医学图像分析中极为重要的拓扑特征（如连通性、边界结构和空腔等）。因此，作者希望通过引入拓扑特征提升医学图像中无监督表征学习的效果。
AI.method: 作者提出TopoCL框架：1）设计了基于拓扑的增强方法，利用bottleneck距离度量控制拓扑扰动和结构变化，保证医学相关的拓扑属性不被破坏；2）引入了分层的拓扑编码器，通过自注意力与交互注意力机制提取拓扑特征；3）开发了自适应专家混合模块，动态整合视觉和拓扑特征。TopoCL可与现有的主流对比学习方法无缝结合。
AI.result: TopoCL在五种主流对比学习方法和五个医学图像分类数据集上进行实验证明，平均提升线性探针分类准确率3.26%，且统计学差异显著。
AI.conclusion: TopoCL能够有效融合和利用医学图像的视觉与拓扑特征，提高无监督对比学习的表征和下游任务性能，显示了在医学图像分析领域的重要应用前景。

title: Human-AI Ensembles Improve Deepfake Detection in Low-to-Medium Quality Videos
summary: Deepfake detection is widely framed as a machine learning problem, yet how humans and AI detectors compare under realistic conditions remains poorly understood. We evaluate 200 human participants and 95 state-of-the-art AI detectors across two datasets: DF40, a standard benchmark, and CharadesDF, a novel dataset of videos of everyday activities. CharadesDF was recorded using mobile phones leading to low/moderate quality videos compared to the more professionally captured DF40. Humans outperform AI detectors on both datasets, with the gap widening in the case of CharadesDF where AI accuracy collapses to near chance (0.537) while humans maintain robust performance (0.784). Human and AI errors are complementary: humans miss high-quality deepfakes while AI detectors flag authentic videos as fake, and hybrid human-AI ensembles reduce high-confidence errors. These findings suggest that effective real-world deepfake detection, especially in non-professionally produced videos, requires human-AI collaboration rather than AI algorithms alone.

AI.tldr: 本论文比较了人类与AI在检测深度伪造（deepfake）视频上的表现，结果发现人类在两组数据集上的准确率均优于AI，特别是在真实环境下拍摄的视频中AI检测准确率大幅下降。结合人类与AI可以减少重大误判。
AI.motivation: 目前深度伪造检测主要依赖机器学习技术，但在贴近实际的环境下，人类和AI的表现优劣尚不清楚，尤其是AI在低质、生活化视频场景中的适应性问题未被充分研究。
AI.method: 论文招募了200名人类参与者和使用95个先进AI检测器，在标准DF40和新的CharadesDF（用手机拍摄的日常活动视频，质量较低）两个数据集上进行比较。分析两者检测准确率，并考察彼此犯错类型和混合协作的效果。
AI.result: 人类在两个数据集均优于AI，尤其在CharadesDF数据集上，AI的检测准度接近随机（0.537），但人类依然表现稳定（0.784）；人和AI错误具有互补性。混合人机协作后，高置信度的误判明显减少。
AI.conclusion: 单靠AI算法难以胜任真实世界的深度伪造检测工作，特别是在非专业制作的视频中。未来应当推动人类与AI协作的深度伪造检测方案。

title: VisionCoach: Reinforcing Grounded Video Reasoning via Visual-Perception Prompting
summary: Video reasoning requires models to locate and track question-relevant evidence across frames. While reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards improves accuracy, it still struggles to achieve reliable spatio-temporal grounding during the reasoning process. Moreover, improving grounding typically relies on scaled training data or inference-time perception tools, which increases annotation cost or computational cost. To address this challenge, we propose VisonCoach, an input-adaptive RL framework that improves spatio-temporal grounding through visual prompting as training-time guidance. During RL training, visual prompts are selectively applied to challenging inputs to amplify question-relevant evidence and suppress distractors. The model then internalizes these improvements through self-distillation, enabling grounded reasoning directly on raw videos without visual prompting at inference. VisonCoach consists of two components: (1) Visual Prompt Selector, which predicts appropriate prompt types conditioned on the video and question, and (2) Spatio-Temporal Reasoner, optimized with RL under visual prompt guidance and object-aware grounding rewards that enforce object identity consistency and multi-region bounding-box overlap. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VisonCoach achieves state-of-the-art performance under comparable settings, across diverse video reasoning, video understanding, and temporal grounding benchmarks (V-STAR, VideoMME, World-Sense, VideoMMMU, PerceptionTest, and Charades-STA), while maintaining a single efficient inference pathway without external tools. Our results show that visual prompting during training improves grounded video reasoning, while self-distillation enables the model to internalize this ability without requiring prompts at inference time.

AI.tldr: 提出了VisonCoach框架，通过训练时的视觉提示提升视频推理中的时空定位能力，并在多项基准上取得最优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频推理方法虽然通过强化学习与可验证奖励提升了准确率，但在时空定位方面仍不可靠，并且依赖大量数据或复杂工具，导致标注和计算成本高。
AI.method: VisonCoach采用“输入自适应”的RL框架，通过训练过程中的视觉提示引导模型聚焦与问题相关的证据，抑制干扰区域。其包含两部分：(1)视觉提示选择器，根据输入视频和问题预测提示类型；(2)时空推理器，在视觉提示与基于目标一致性和区域重叠的奖励指导下，通过RL优化，并通过自蒸馏使该能力在推理时可在线独立实现。
AI.result: 在V-STAR、VideoMME、World-Sense、VideoMMMU、PerceptionTest和Charades-STA等多个视频推理与理解基准上，VisonCoach在同类设定下取得了最优表现，并且推理阶段无需外部工具，推理路径高效。
AI.conclusion: 训练时的视觉提示能有效增强模型的时空定位及推理能力，经自蒸馏后模型在推理阶段无需额外辅助依然具备该能力，实现了高效且精确的视频推理。

title: EviATTA: Evidential Active Test-Time Adaptation for Medical Segment Anything Models
summary: Deploying foundational medical Segment Anything Models (SAMs) via test-time adaptation (TTA) is challenging under large distribution shifts, where test-time supervision is often unreliable. While active test-time adaptation (ATTA) introduces limited expert feedback to improve reliability, existing ATTA methods still suffer from unreliable uncertainty estimation and inefficient utilization of sparse annotations. To address these issues, we propose Evidential Active Test-Time Adaptation (EviATTA), which is, to our knowledge, the first ATTA framework tailored for medical SAMs. Specifically, we adopt the Dirichlet-based Evidential Modeling to decompose overall predictive uncertainty into distribution uncertainty and data uncertainty. Building on this decomposition, we design a Hierarchical Evidential Sampling strategy, where image-wise distribution uncertainty is used to select informative shifted samples, while distance-aware data uncertainty guides sparse pixel annotations to resolve data ambiguities. We further introduce Dual Consistency Regularization, which enforces progressive prompt consistency on sparsely labeled samples to better exploit sparse supervision and applies variational feature consistency on unlabeled samples to stabilize adaptation. Extensive experiments on six medical image segmentation datasets demonstrate that EviATTA consistently improves adaptation reliability with minimal expert feedback under both batch-wise and instance-wise test-time adaptation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了针对医学图像分割大模型（SAMs）在测试时自适应（TTA）场景下的新方法（EviATTA），通过更细致的不确定性建模与标注利用，提高在分布大幅变化和监督稀缺时的适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学分割大模型在遇到分布漂移时，测试时自适应性能有限，且测试时监督信息往往是不可靠或稀缺的。虽然主动测试时自适应（ATTA）能引入专家反馈提高适应性，但由于不确定性估计和稀疏标注利用低效，效果依然有限。
AI.method: 作者提出EviATTA框架：基于Dirichlet证据建模，将预测不确定性分解为分布不确定性（反映分布漂移的未知）和数据不确定性（反映具体样本的模糊）。在此基础上，采用层次化证据采样策略，先根据分布不确定性挑选更“有信息量”的样本，再利用数据不确定性指导稀疏像素标注。此外，提出双一致性正则化方法，增强少标注样本的利用和未标注样本的特征稳定。
AI.result: 在6个医学分割数据集上进行大量实验，EviATTA在batch和instance级的测试时自适应设置下，均以极少的专家反馈显著提升了模型的适应性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: EviATTA首次为医学SAMs设计了基于证据的不确定性驱动的ATTA框架，在医学图像领域有效提升了分布漂移下的分割适应能力，优于现有稀疏监督ATTA方法。

title: Comparative Analysis of 3D Convolutional and 2.5D Slice-Conditioned U-Net Architectures for MRI Super-Resolution via Elucidated Diffusion Models
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) super-resolution (SR) methods that computationally enhance low-resolution acquisitions to approximate high-resolution quality offer a compelling alternative to expensive high-field scanners. In this work we investigate an elucidated diffusion model (EDM) framework for brain MRI SR and compare two U-Net backbone architectures: (i) a full 3D convolutional U-Net that processes volumetric patches with 3D convolutions and multi-head self-attention, and (ii) a 2.5D slice-conditioned U-Net that super-resolves each slice independently while conditioning on an adjacent slice for inter-slice context. Both models employ continuous-sigma noise conditioning following Karras et al. and are trained on the NKI cohort of the FOMO60K dataset. On a held-out test set of 5 subjects (6 volumes, 993 slices), the 3D model achieves 37.75 dB PSNR, 0.997 SSIM, and 0.020 LPIPS, improving on the off-the-shelf pretrained EDSR baseline (35.57 dB / 0.024 LPIPS) and the 2.5D variant (35.82 dB) across all three metrics under the same test data and degradation pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并比较了两种基于扩散模型（EDM）的脑MRI超分辨率重建方法：3D U-Net和2.5D切片条件U-Net。实验表明3D模型在多个指标上均优于当前主流方法和2.5D方案。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率MRI扫描依赖昂贵的高场磁共振仪器，而通过超分辨率重建低分辨率MRI以提升其图像质量是更具成本效益的替代方案。本文旨在探索更有效的深度学习方法提升MRI图像分辨率。
AI.method: 研究采用经阐释的扩散模型(EDM)框架，比较全3D卷积U-Net（处理3D体数据并结合多头自注意力）与2.5D切片条件U-Net（独立重建每个切片并辅以相邻切片条件）。两者均采用连续σ噪声条件训练，使用FOMO60K数据集中的NKI队列训练和5个被试持出测试。
AI.result: 3D U-Net模型在测试集上获得了PSNR 37.75 dB、SSIM 0.997和LPIPS 0.020的优异表现，显著优于现有EDSR基线方法（35.57 dB/0.024 LPIPS）及2.5D方案（35.82 dB）并在所有评价指标上领先。
AI.conclusion: 3D U-Net结构配合EDM扩散模型框架能显著提升脑MRI超分辨率重建的质量，优于传统方法和简化的2.5D深度学习结构。

title: E2EGS: Event-to-Edge Gaussian Splatting for Pose-Free 3D Reconstruction
summary: The emergence of neural radiance fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) has advanced novel view synthesis (NVS). These methods, however, require high-quality RGB inputs and accurate corresponding poses, limiting robustness under real-world conditions such as fast camera motion or adverse lighting. Event cameras, which capture brightness changes at each pixel with high temporal resolution and wide dynamic range, enable precise sensing of dynamic scenes and offer a promising solution. However, existing event-based NVS methods either assume known poses or rely on depth estimation models that are bounded by their initial observations, failing to generalize as the camera traverses previously unseen regions. We present E2EGS, a pose-free framework operating solely on event streams. Our key insight is that edge information provides rich structural cues essential for accurate trajectory estimation and high-quality NVS. To extract edges from noisy event streams, we exploit the distinct spatio-temporal characteristics of edges and non-edge regions. The event camera's movement induces consistent events along edges, while non-edge regions produce sparse noise. We leverage this through a patch-based temporal coherence analysis that measures local variance to extract edges while robustly suppressing noise. The extracted edges guide structure-aware Gaussian initialization and enable edge-weighted losses throughout initialization, tracking, and bundle adjustment. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that E2EGS achieves superior reconstruction quality and trajectory accuracy, establishing a fully pose-free paradigm for event-based 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无须已知相机位姿、仅依赖事件相机数据的三维重建方法E2EGS，通过对事件流中的边缘信息进行提取，从而实现高精度的新视角合成与三维重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF与3DGS的新视角合成以及三维重建方法受限于高质量RGB输入和准确位姿信息，难以应对真实环境中照明恶劣或运动迅速等情况。事件相机能够以高时空分辨率感知动态场景，是突破此限制的关键。但现有基于事件的三维重建方法依赖已知位姿或初始深度，对未知区域泛化能力弱，亟需更鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: 提出E2EGS方法，无需已知相机位姿，仅依赖事件流。该方法的核心是：通过时空一致性分析，利用相机运动在边缘上产生密集事件的特性，从噪声中稳健提取边缘，引导高斯点云初始化，并将边缘加权损失贯穿初始化、相机跟踪和优化各阶段。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上的大量实验表明，E2EGS在三维重建质量与相机轨迹估计精度方面均超过现有基于事件的方法。
AI.conclusion: E2EGS首次实现了无需位姿辅助的全新事件相机三维重建范式，大幅提升了在实际场景中的重建准确性与鲁棒性。

title: MVHOI: Bridge Multi-view Condition to Complex Human-Object Interaction Video Reenactment via 3D Foundation Model
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) video reenactment with realistic motion remains a frontier in expressive digital human creation. Existing approaches primarily handle simple image-plane motion (e.g., in-plane translations), struggling with complex non-planar manipulations like out-of-plane reorientation. In this paper, we propose MVHOI, a two-stage HOI video reenactment framework that bridges multi-view reference conditions and video foundation models via a 3D Foundation Model (3DFM). The 3DFM first produces view-consistent object priors conditioned on implicit motion dynamics across novel viewpoints. A controllable video generation model then synthesizes high-fidelity object texture by incorporating multi-view reference images, ensuring appearance consistency via a reasonable retrieval mechanism. By enabling these two stages to mutually reinforce one another during the inference phase, our framework shows superior performance in generating long-duration HOI videos with intricate object manipulations. Extensive experiments show substantial improvements over prior approaches, especially for HOI with complex 3D object manipulations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为MVHOI的人-物体交互（HOI）视频复现框架，能够生成包含复杂3D动作的高质量视频，并在以往方法基础上有明显性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI视频复现方法主要只适用于简单的平面运动，难以应对像物体出平面转动等复杂的三维操作。因此需要新的方法提升复现的真实性和动作复杂度的处理能力。
AI.method: 提出MVHOI两阶段框架：（1）使用3D基础模型（3DFM），根据多视角参考条件生成具有一致性的对象先验，并隐式建模动态；（2）基于多视角参考图像驱动可控视频生成，利用检索机制保持外观一致。推理时两阶段互动提升视频生成效果。
AI.result: 大规模实验表明该方法在包含复杂3D物体操作的长时HOI视频生成上，性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MVHOI有效解决了现有方法难以处理复杂三维人-物交互的问题，为高保真数字人创作提供了更强的技术支持。

title: Robust Building Damage Detection in Cross-Disaster Settings Using Domain Adaptation
summary: Rapid structural damage assessment from remote sensing imagery is essential for timely disaster response. Within human-machine systems (HMS) for disaster management, automated damage detection provides decision-makers with actionable situational awareness. However, models trained on multi-disaster benchmarks often underperform in unseen geographic regions due to domain shift - a distributional mismatch between training and deployment data that undermines human trust in automated assessments. We explore a two-stage ensemble approach using supervised domain adaptation (SDA) for building damage classification across four severity classes. The pipeline adapts the xView2 first-place method to the Ida-BD dataset using SDA and systematically investigates the effect of individual augmentation components on classification performance. Comprehensive ablation experiments on the unseen Ida-BD test split demonstrate that SDA is indispensable: removing it causes damage detection to fail entirely. Our pipeline achieves the most robust performance using SDA with unsharp-enhanced RGB input, attaining a Macro-F1 of 0.5552. These results underscore the critical role of domain adaptation in building trustworthy automated damage assessment modules for HMS-integrated disaster response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于监督域自适应（SDA）的两阶段集成方法，对多灾害遥感图像中建筑损毁等级进行分类，有效提升了跨地域泛化能力，并在新数据集上获得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中的自动化损毁检测，虽然为灾害应急决策提供了重要支持，但模型在面对未见过的新地理区域时，因数据分布变化（域迁移）导致性能大幅下降，影响了实际应用与信任度。
AI.method: 作者提出采用监督域自适应（SDA）的两阶段集成方法，对现有xView2优胜方法进行改进，并将其适配到Ida-BD数据集。同时，通过消融实验系统分析了各增强组件对分类性能的影响。
AI.result: 在Ida-BD未见测试集上，SDA方法表现尤为关键：移除SDA后，损毁检测完全失效。引入锐化增强RGB输入后的SDA管道，获得了Macro-F1为0.5552的最优成绩。
AI.conclusion: 域自适应对于实现可靠的自动化建筑损毁评估不可或缺，为人机协同灾害响应系统构建可信的损毁监测模块提供了有力支撑。

title: AURORA-KITTI: Any-Weather Depth Completion and Denoising in the Wild
summary: Robust depth completion is fundamental to real-world 3D scene understanding, yet existing RGB-LiDAR fusion methods degrade significantly under adverse weather, where both camera images and LiDAR measurements suffer from weather-induced corruption. In this paper, we introduce AURORA-KITTI, the first large-scale multi-modal, multi-weather benchmark for robust depth completion in the wild. We further formulate Depth Completion and Denoising (DCD) as a unified task that jointly reconstructs a dense depth map from corrupted sparse inputs while suppressing weather-induced noise. AURORA-KITTI contains over \textit{82K} weather-consistent RGBL pairs with metric depth ground truth, spanning diverse weather types, three severity levels, day and night scenes, paired clean references, lens occlusion conditions, and textual descriptions. Moreover, we introduce DDCD, an efficient distillation-based baseline that leverages depth foundation models to inject clean structural priors into in-the-wild DCD training. DDCD achieves state-of-the-art performance on AURORA-KITTI and the real-world DENSE dataset while maintaining efficiency. Notably, our results further show that weather-aware, physically consistent data contributes more to robustness than architectural modifications alone. Data and code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AURORA-KITTI，这是首个覆盖多模态、多天气的大规模深度补全基准，并定义了联合深度补全与去噪的新任务。还提出了高效的基线方法DDCD，在多个数据集上达到了SOTA。
AI.motivation: 在实际3D场景理解中，现有RGB-LiDAR融合方法在恶劣天气下表现明显下降，急需能够适应多种天气状况，鲁棒性更强的深度补全技术。
AI.method:
1. 构建AURORA-KITTI大规模、多模态和多天气的数据集，覆盖多种天气、多严重等级、昼夜、遮挡和丰富标注。
2. 将深度补全与去噪（DCD）联合为一个统一任务，以应对天气带来的数据污染。
3. 提出基于蒸馏的DDCD方法，利用基础深度模型注入结构先验，提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: DDCD方法在AURORA-KITTI基准和真实DENSE数据集上取得了最新的SOTA性能，并且保持了计算高效。同时，实验显示多样且物理一致的天气数据比简单改进模型结构更能提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AURORA-KITTI数据集和DCD新任务推动了鲁棒深度补全发展，DDCD方法有效提升了恶劣天气下的补全能力。数据和代码将公开，有望促进后续研究和应用。

title: Fractal Autoregressive Depth Estimation with Continuous Token Diffusion
summary: Monocular depth estimation can benefit from autoregressive (AR) generation, but direct AR modeling is hindered by the modality gap between RGB and depth, inefficient pixel-wise generation, and instability in continuous depth prediction. We propose a Fractal Visual Autoregressive Diffusion framework that reformulates depth estimation as a coarse-to-fine, next-scale autoregressive generation process. A VCFR module fuses multi-scale image features with current depth predictions to improve cross-modal conditioning, while a conditional denoising diffusion loss models depth distributions directly in continuous space and mitigates errors caused by discrete quantization. To improve computational efficiency, we organize the scale-wise generators into a fractal recursive architecture, reusing a base visual AR unit in a self-similar hierarchy. We further introduce an uncertainty-aware robust consensus aggregation scheme for multi-sample inference to improve fusion stability and provide a practical pixel-wise reliability estimate. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate strong performance and validate the effectiveness of the proposed design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种创新的Fractal Visual Autoregressive Diffusion框架，通过分层递归、模态融合和扩散损失，显著提升了单目深度估计的效果和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的自回归（AR）方法虽然能提升单目深度估计，但存在RGB和深度的模态间隙、逐像素生成效率低下以及连续深度预测不稳定等问题，亟需一种新方法克服这些难题。
AI.method: 将深度估计重构为由粗到细、分尺度的自回归生成过程。首先设计了VCFR模块，用于融合多尺度图像特征和当前深度预测，实现更好的跨模态信息条件。采用条件去噪扩散损失，直接在连续空间建模深度分布，避免量化误差。构建分尺度生成器的分形递归结构，复用基础视觉单元，提高计算效率。同时提出基于不确定性的稳健集成推理方法，提升融合稳定性和像素级可靠性估计。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上进行了实验，结果显示该方法取得了较强的性能，验证了方法设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为单目深度估计提供了一种高效、精确且稳定的新方案，特别是在跨模态融合和分形递归结构方面有创新，对实际应用具备价值。

title: AdapterTune: Zero-Initialized Low-Rank Adapters for Frozen Vision Transformers
summary: Frozen-backbone transfer with Vision Transformers faces two under-addressed issues: optimization instability when adapters are naively inserted into a fixed feature extractor, and the absence of principled guidance for setting adapter capacity. We introduce AdapterTune, which augments each transformer block with a residual low-rank bottleneck whose up-projection is zero-initialized, guaranteeing that the adapted network starts exactly at the pretrained function and eliminates early-epoch representation drift. On the analytical side, we formalize adapter rank as a capacity budget for approximating downstream task shifts in feature space. The resulting excess-risk decomposition predicts monotonic but diminishing accuracy gains with increasing rank, an ``elbow'' behavior we confirm through controlled sweeps. We evaluate on 9 datasets and 3 backbone scales with multi-seed reporting throughout. On a core 5 dataset transfer suite, AdapterTune improves top-1 accuracy over head-only transfer by +14.9 points on average while training only 0.92 of the parameters required by full fine-tuning, and outperforms full fine-tuning on 10 of 15 dataset-backbone pairs. Across the full benchmark, AdapterTune improves over head-only transfer on every dataset-backbone pair tested. Ablations on rank, placement, and initialization isolate each design choice. The code is available at: https://github.com/salimkhazem/adaptertune

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为AdapterTune的新方法，通过改进Vision Transformer的迁移学习，解决了Adapter插入后的优化不稳定性和容量设置无指导的问题，显著提升了各数据集下的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 冻结骨干网络（frozen-backbone）时，直接插入adapter会导致优化不稳定，且adapter容量（rank）如何选择缺乏理论基础，这限制了迁移学习方法的表现和可解释性。
AI.method: 在每个transformer block中引入残差低秩瓶颈adapter，并将向上的投影权重初始化为0，确保网络迁移时初始表现等同于预训练模型，消除初期刻画漂移。理论上，把adapter的秩解释为特征空间的容量预算，并用泛化误差分解分析表现随秩的变化趋势。大规模实验证明方法有效。
AI.result: 在9个数据集和3种ViT骨干网络上进行实验，AdapterTune比只微调头（head-only transfer）平均提升top-1准确率14.9%，所需训练参数仅为全量微调的0.92，并在10/15的配置上超越全量微调。所有数据集-骨干组合均优于纯head-only微调。消融研究验证了每个设计的贡献。
AI.conclusion: AdapterTune在提高迁移学习性能的同时，参数效率高，方法稳定且有理论指导，对Vision Transformer冻结骨干迁移任务具有实际应用前景。

title: Enhancing Hands in 3D Whole-Body Pose Estimation with Conditional Hands Modulator
summary: Accurately recovering hand poses within the body context remains a major challenge in 3D whole-body pose estimation. This difficulty arises from a fundamental supervision gap: whole-body pose estimators are trained on full-body datasets with limited hand diversity, while hand-only estimators, trained on hand-centric datasets, excel at detailed finger articulation but lack global body awareness. To address this, we propose Hand4Whole++, a modular framework that leverages the strengths of both pre-trained whole-body and hand pose estimators. We introduce CHAM (Conditional Hands Modulator), a lightweight module that modulates the whole-body feature stream using hand-specific features extracted from a pre-trained hand pose estimator. This modulation enables the whole-body model to predict wrist orientations that are both accurate and coherent with the upper-body kinematic structure, without retraining the full-body model. In parallel, we directly incorporate finger articulations and hand shapes predicted by the hand pose estimator, aligning them to the full-body mesh via differentiable rigid alignment. This design allows Hand4Whole++ to combine globally consistent body reasoning with fine-grained hand detail. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Hand4Whole++ substantially improves hand accuracy and enhances overall full-body pose quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合全身和手部骨骼估计优势的新框架Hand4Whole++，显著提升了3D全身骨骼估计中的手部重建准确性。
AI.motivation: 3D全身姿态估计中，手部姿态的准确恢复非常困难。主要挑战是全身数据集缺乏丰富的手部多样性，而手部数据集又缺乏全身语义、对整体结构把控能力。因此需要一种方法同时兼顾手部细节与全身上下文整体一致性。
AI.method: 提出Hand4Whole++，该方法以模块化方式结合了预训练的全身骨架估计器和手部骨架估计器。核心模块CHAM（Conditional Hands Modulator）能结合手部特征调制全身特征流，从而提升腕部及上肢连贯性。同时通过可微分刚性配准，将手部估计的细节（手型和手指关节）与全身模型对齐，无需重新训练全身模型。
AI.result: 在多个实验上，Hand4Whole++在无须重新训练全身模型的条件下，显著提高了手部姿态恢复的准确性，同时增强了整体全身姿态估计的质量。
AI.conclusion: Hand4Whole++能充分结合全身上下文与手部细粒度细节，在不增加全身模型训练负担的条件下，有效弥补全身姿态估计中手部表现的短板，具有实际应用价值。

title: Automated Diabetic Screening via Anterior Segment Ocular Imaging: A Deep Learning and Explainable AI Approach
summary: Diabetic retinopathy screening traditionally relies on fundus photography, requiring specialized equipment and expertise often unavailable in primary care and resource limited settings. We developed and validated a deep learning (DL) system for automated diabetic classification using anterior segment ocular imaging a readily accessible alternative utilizing standard photography equipment. The system leverages visible biomarkers in the iris, sclera, and conjunctiva that correlate with systemic diabetic status. We systematically evaluated five contemporary architectures (EfficientNet-V2-S with self-supervised learning (SSL), Vision Transformer, Swin Transformer, ConvNeXt-Base, and ResNet-50) on 2,640 clinically annotated anterior segment images spanning Normal, Controlled Diabetic, and Uncontrolled Diabetic categories. A tailored preprocessing pipeline combining specular reflection mitigation and contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization (CLAHE) was implemented to enhance subtle vascular and textural patterns critical for classification. SSL using SimCLR on domain specific ocular images substantially improved model performance.EfficientNet-V2-S with SSL achieved optimal performance with an F1-score of 98.21%, precision of 97.90%, and recall of 98.55% a substantial improvement over ImageNet only initialization (94.63% F1). Notably, the model attained near perfect precision (100%) for Normal classification, critical for minimizing unnecessary clinical referrals.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了一种基于深度学习的前节眼部图像自动糖尿病分级系统，显著提高了筛查的可及性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前糖尿病视网膜病变筛查依赖于眼底照相，需专业设备与技术，难以在基层及资源有限地区普及。因此，亟需一种更易获取、无需专门设备的筛查方式。
AI.method: 作者提出用常规摄影设备获取的前节眼部（虹膜、巩膜、结膜）图像，通过特征预处理（如反光消除、CLAHE增强），然后比较五种现代深度学习架构（如EfficientNet-V2-S+自监督学习）用于三分级糖尿病分类，并使用大量带注释的图像集进行训练和评估。
AI.result: EfficientNet-V2-S结合领域自监督学习效果最佳，F1分数高达98.21%，正常分类精确率100%，显著优于传统ImageNet初始化，能够有效区分正常、控制良好及控制不良的糖尿病人群。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用前节眼部图像和先进深度学习方法，实现了糖尿病分类的高性能自动化，为基层及资源受限地区的糖尿病早期筛查提供了切实可行的新途径。

title: A Skill-augmented Agentic Framework and Benchmark for Multi-Video Understanding
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models have achieved strong performance in single-video understanding, yet their ability to reason across multiple videos remains limited. Existing approaches typically concatenate multiple videos into a single input and perform direct inference, which introduces training-inference mismatch, information loss from frame compression, and a lack of explicit cross-video coordination. Meanwhile, current multi-video benchmarks primarily emphasize event-level comparison, leaving identity-level matching, fine-grained discrimination, and structured multi-step reasoning underexplored. To address these gaps, we introduce MVX-Bench, a Multi-Video Cross-Dimension Benchmark that reformulates 11 classical computer vision tasks into a unified multi-video question-answering framework, comprising 1,442 questions over 4,255 videos from diverse real-world datasets. We further propose SAMA, a Skill-Augmented Agentic Framework for Multi-Video Understanding, which integrates visual tools, task-specific skills, and a conflict-aware verification mechanism to enable iterative and structured reasoning. Experimental results show that SAMA outperforms strong open-source baselines and GPT on MVX-Bench, and ablations validate the effectiveness of skill design and conflict resolution.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出MVX-Bench多视频跨维度基准，并设计SAMA框架，显著提升多视频理解能力。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在单视频理解表现良好，但在多视频之间推理有限，现有方法普遍存在训练-推理不匹配、信息损失与缺乏跨视频协调等问题，多视频基准测试也过于简单，未能覆盖身份匹配、细粒度区分和多步推理。
AI.method: 作者提出MVX-Bench，将11项经典视觉任务改编为多视频问答框架，基于4255个真实视频和1442个问题，提升多视频评测难度。同时提出SAMA（Skill-Augmented Agentic Framework），整合视觉工具、任务技能和冲突检测机制，实现结构化、可迭代推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAMA在MVX-Bench上超越了开源强基线和GPT模型，消融实验验证了技能设计和冲突解决机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SAMA显著改善了多视频推理和理解能力，MVX-Bench为多视频任务提供了更具挑战性的评测平台，可推动该领域发展。

title: TrajMamba: An Ego-Motion-Guided Mamba Model for Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction from an Egocentric Perspective
summary: Future trajectory prediction of a tracked pedestrian from an egocentric perspective is a key task in areas such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. The challenge of this task lies in the complex dynamic relative motion between the ego-camera and the tracked pedestrian. To address this challenge, we propose an ego-motion-guided trajectory prediction network based on the Mamba model. Firstly, two Mamba models are used as encoders to extract pedestrian motion and ego-motion features from pedestrian movement and ego-vehicle movement, respectively. Then, an ego-motion guided Mamba decoder that explicitly models the relative motion between the pedestrian and the vehicle by integrating pedestrian motion features as historical context with ego-motion features as guiding cues to capture decoded features. Finally, the future trajectory is generated from the decoded features corresponding to the future timestamps. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PIE and JAAD datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Mamba模型的视角自适应行人轨迹预测网络，在PIE和JAAD数据集上取得了最优结果。
AI.motivation: 当前针对第一人称视角下的行人轨迹预测挑战主要在于相机与行人之间复杂的动态相对运动关系，现有方法难以有效处理这种相对运动。
AI.method: 采用两个Mamba模型分别编码行人和自车的运动特征，再通过将行人运动特征作为历史上下文、车体运动特征作为引导的方式，利用Mamba解码器显式地建模二者的相对运动，最终生成未来轨迹。
AI.result: 本文模型在PIE和JAAD两个主流数据集上进行了大量实验，结果显示本方法性能领先于现有同类方法，达到了最新最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 基于Mamba的自运动引导轨迹预测方法有效提升了第一人称视角下行人未来轨迹预测的准确性，具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: PHAC: Promptable Human Amodal Completion
summary: Conditional image generation methods are increasingly used in human-centric applications, yet existing human amodal completion (HAC) models offer users limited control over the completed content. Given an occluded person image, they hallucinate invisible regions while preserving visible ones, but cannot reliably incorporate user-specified constraints such as a desired pose or spatial extent. As a result, users often resort to repeatedly sampling the model until they obtain a satisfactory output. Pose-guided person image synthesis (PGPIS) methods allow explicit pose conditioning, but frequently fail to preserve the instance-specific visible appearance and tend to be biased toward the training distribution, even when built on strong diffusion model priors. To address these limitations, we introduce promptable human amodal completion (PHAC), a new task that completes occluded human images while satisfying both visible appearance constraints and multiple user prompts. Users provide simple point-based prompts, such as additional joints for the target pose or bounding boxes for desired regions; these prompts are encoded using ControlNet modules specialized for each prompt type. These modules inject the prompt signals into a pre-trained diffusion model, and we fine-tune only the cross-attention blocks to obtain strong prompt alignment without degrading the underlying generative prior. To further preserve visible content, we propose an inpainting-based refinement module that starts from a slightly noised coarse completion, faithfully preserves the visible regions, and ensures seamless blending at occlusion boundaries. Extensive experiments on the HAC and PGPIS benchmarks show that our approach yields more physically plausible and higher-quality completions, while significantly improving prompt alignment compared with existing amodal completion and pose-guided synthesis methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可以根据用户提示完善被遮挡人物图像的生成方法（PHAC），实现了对人物外观和姿势的更好控制，生成效果比以往方法更高质量且更贴合用户需求。
AI.motivation: 现有的人物遮挡补全方法难以让用户控制生成内容（如姿势、区域），且姿势引导方法往往不能保留可见部分的细节或容易产生偏置，用户需多次尝试才能获得满意结果，造成使用体验不佳。
AI.method: 提出新的人物遮挡补全任务Promptable Human Amodal Completion（PHAC）。用户可通过简单的点提示（如关键点/关节、边界框等）指定补全需求，这些提示通过ControlNet模块分别编码并融入预训练扩散模型，只微调交叉注意力结构以实现有效提示对齐。并引入基于修复填充的细化模块，从轻度噪声的初步结果中修正内容，确保可见区域保持一致且边界自然过渡。
AI.result: 在HAC和PGPIS等基准数据集上，PHAC方法生成的补全图像在物理合理性、质量和与用户提示的对齐性上均优于现有的遮挡补全及姿势引导生成方法。
AI.conclusion: PHAC方法有效提升了人物遮挡补全过程中的用户可控性，生成质量和可见区域保持，兼具灵活性和准确性，有望提升实际人像生成与编辑场景的体验和结果。

title: Face-Guided Sentiment Boundary Enhancement for Weakly-Supervised Temporal Sentiment Localization
