summary: Point-level weakly-supervised temporal sentiment localization (P-WTSL) aims to detect sentiment-relevant segments in untrimmed multimodal videos using timestamp sentiment annotations, which greatly reduces the costly frame-level labeling. To further tackle the challenges of imprecise sentiment boundaries in P-WTSL, we propose the Face-guided Sentiment Boundary Enhancement Network (\textbf{FSENet}), a unified framework that leverages fine-grained facial features to guide sentiment localization. Specifically, our approach \textit{first} introduces the Face-guided Sentiment Discovery (FSD) module, which integrates facial features into multimodal interaction via dual-branch modeling for effective sentiment stimuli clues; We \textit{then} propose the Point-aware Sentiment Semantics Contrast (PSSC) strategy to discriminate sentiment semantics of candidate points (frame-level) near annotation points via contrastive learning, thereby enhancing the model's ability to recognize sentiment boundaries. At \textit{last}, we design the Boundary-aware Sentiment Pseudo-label Generation (BSPG) approach to convert sparse point annotations into temporally smooth supervisory pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments and visualizations on the benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance under full supervision, video-level, and point-level weak supervision, thereby showcasing the strong generalization ability of our FSENet across different annotation settings.

AI.tldr: FSENet利用面部特征提升对未裁剪视频中情感片段的弱监督定位，显著提升了边界检测能力，并在不同标注条件下取得了SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 针对点级弱监督情感定位任务（P-WTSL），现有方法依赖费时费力的逐帧标注，且难以精确检测情感边界。提升定位准确性、减少标注成本成为主要挑战。
AI.method: 提出了FSENet，包含三大模块：（1）FSD模块引入面部特征并通过双分支多模态交互抽取细粒度情感线索；（2）PSSC策略基于对比学习提升临近标注点候选帧的情感边界辨析能力；（3）BSPG方法将稀疏的点级标注转化为时间连续的伪标签，增强监督信号。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上，FSENet分别于全监督、视频级弱监督和点级弱监督三种注释设定下取得了最优（SOTA）性能。丰富实验和可视化结果体现了其强泛化性和边界检测优势。
AI.conclusion: FSENet有效利用面部信息提升了弱监督情感定位与边界检测能力，适用于多种标注粒度，推动了多模态视频情感分析的进展。

title: Topology-Preserving Data Augmentation for Ring-Type Polygon Annotations
summary: Geometric data augmentation is widely used in segmentation pipelines and typically assumes that polygon annotations represent simply connected regions. However, in structured domains such as architectural floorplan analysis, ring-type regions are often encoded as a single cyclic polygon chain connecting outer and inner boundaries. During augmentation, clipping operations may remove intermediate vertices and disrupt this cyclic connectivity, breaking the structural relationship between the boundaries. In this work, we introduce an order-preserving polygon augmentation strategy that performs transformations in mask space and then projects surviving vertices back into index-space to restore adjacency relations. This repair maintains the original traversal order of the polygon and preserves topological consistency with minimal computational overhead. Experiments demonstrate that the approach reliably restores connectivity, achieving near-perfect Cyclic Adjacency Preservation (CAP) across both single and compound augmentations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种保持顺序的多边形增强方法，解决了几何数据增强过程中多边形环结构被破坏的问题，并通过实验验证了该方法在结构一致性方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统几何数据增强方法在对多边形标注结构较为复杂的建筑平面图等领域时，会破坏其环状拓扑结构，导致增强后的多边形丢失边界关系、结构不连通。因此需有兼容复杂结构的多边形增强新方法。
AI.method: 新方法先在掩码(mask)空间对多边形做增强，增强后再把存活顶点投影回多边形索引空间，通过修复操作并恢复其遍历顺序，从而最大限度保留拓扑结构。
AI.result: 实验显示，该方法能在单次和复合增强操作下有效修复多边形的连接关系，在Cyclic Adjacency Preservation(CAP)指标上获得近乎完美的表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅高效而且有效地解决了复杂多边形结构在增强时的拓扑一致性问题，对结构化图像分割任务具有较高实用价值。

title: SSR: A Training-Free Approach for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
summary: Streaming 3D reconstruction demands long-horizon state updates under strict latency constraints, yet stateful recurrent models often suffer from geometric drift as errors accumulate over time. We revisit this problem from a Grassmannian manifold perspective: the latent persistent state can be viewed as a subspace representation, i.e., a point evolving on a Grassmannian manifold, where temporal coherence implies the state trajectory should remain on (or near) this manifold.Based on this view, we propose Self-expressive Sequence Regularization (SSR), a plug-and-play, training-free operator that enforces Grassmannian sequence regularity during inference.Given a window of historical states, SSR computes an analytical affinity matrix via the self-expressive property and uses it to regularize the current update, effectively pulling noisy predictions back toward the manifold-consistent trajectory with minimal overhead. Experiments on long-sequence benchmarks demonstrate that SSR consistently reduces drift and improves reconstruction quality across multiple streaming 3D reconstruction tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的推理阶段正则化方法SSR，有效减缓了长序列3D重建中的漂移问题，提升了重建质量。
AI.motivation: 实时流式3D重建需要在低延迟下不断更新状态，但随时间推移，递归模型易出现几何漂移，影响重建准确性，因此需要降低这样的误差积累。
AI.method: 作者提出从Grassmann流形的角度看待隐藏状态，将其视为子空间随时间在流形上演化，提出了自表达序列正则化（SSR）方法。在推理过程中，用历史状态窗口的自表达关系矩阵，对最新状态更新进行正则，引导其保持在流形一致轨迹上。此方法无需额外训练，可直接插入现有流程。
AI.result: 在多个长序列3D重建基准任务上，SSR均显著减缓了漂移现象，并提升了最终重建精度，表明其适用性强且效果稳定。
AI.conclusion: SSR是一种高效、泛用的流式3D重建状态正则工具，可无缝应用于现有模型，在无须改动训练过程的情况下获得更优的长期重建表现。

title: AnyPhoto: Multi-Person Identity Preserving Image Generation with ID Adaptive Modulation on Location Canvas
summary: Multi-person identity-preserving generation requires binding multiple reference faces to specified locations under a text prompt. Strong identity/layout conditions often trigger copy-paste shortcuts and weaken prompt-driven controllability. We present AnyPhoto, a diffusion-transformer finetuning framework with (i) a RoPE-aligned location canvas plus location-aligned token pruning for spatial grounding, (ii) AdaLN-style identity-adaptive modulation from face-recognition embeddings for persistent identity injection, and (iii) identity-isolated attention to prevent cross-identity interference. Training combines conditional flow matching with an embedding-space face similarity loss, together with reference-face replacement and location-canvas degradations to discourage shortcuts. On MultiID-Bench, AnyPhoto improves identity similarity while reducing copy-paste tendency, with gains increasing as the number of identities grows. AnyPhoto also supports prompt-driven stylization with accurate placement, showing great potential application value.

AI.tldr: AnyPhoto是一种多人人脸身份保持的生成框架，通过引入空间布局和身份条件，有效减少了“复制粘贴”问题，提高了在复杂场景下根据文本描述精确生成不同人脸的能力。
AI.motivation: 多人人脸生成任务面临身份保持和精确布局的双重挑战。当用户希望在一张图中绑定多个指定人脸并依照文本描述生成内容时，现有方法容易出现“复制粘贴”式的快捷处理，削弱生成结果的多样性和控制能力。因而亟需一种新方法提升身份与布局的同步表达能力。
AI.method: 提出AnyPhoto框架，结合扩散模型与变换器微调：1）使用RoPE对齐的空间canvas和基于位置的token筛选加强空间定位；2）借助面部识别特征实现AdaLN风格的身份自适应调制，稳定注入身份信息；3）设计身份隔离注意力防止不同身份间的相互干扰。训练中结合条件流匹配和空间特征相似性损失，并通过替换参考人脸和位置降级操作减缓“复制粘贴”现象。
AI.result: 在MultiID-Bench数据集上，AnyPhoto显著提升了身份相似度，明显降低了“复制粘贴”现象，且优势随身份数量的增加愈发突出。同时支持高精度的风格化和人脸准确布局。
AI.conclusion: AnyPhoto有效结合文本控制与多身份保持，显著推动了多人人脸生成技术的发展，具备应用于多身份图像生成和精细化风格化场景的潜力。

title: Zero-Shot Reconstruction of Animatable 3D Avatars with Cloth Dynamics from a Single Image
summary: Existing single-image 3D human avatar methods primarily rely on rigid joint transformations, limiting their ability to model realistic cloth dynamics. We present DynaAvatar, a zero-shot framework that reconstructs animatable 3D human avatars with motion-dependent cloth dynamics from a single image. Trained on large-scale multi-person motion datasets, DynaAvatar employs a Transformer-based feed-forward architecture that directly predicts dynamic 3D Gaussian deformations without subject-specific optimization. To overcome the scarcity of dynamic captures, we introduce a static-to-dynamic knowledge transfer strategy: a Transformer pretrained on large-scale static captures provides strong geometric and appearance priors, which are efficiently adapted to motion-dependent deformations through lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on dynamic captures. We further propose the DynaFlow loss, an optical flow-guided objective that provides reliable motion-direction geometric cues for cloth dynamics in rendered space. Finally, we reannotate the missing or noisy SMPL-X fittings in existing dynamic capture datasets, as most public dynamic capture datasets contain incomplete or unreliable fittings that are unsuitable for training high-quality 3D avatar reconstruction models. Experiments demonstrate that DynaAvatar produces visually rich and generalizable animations, outperforming prior methods.

AI.tldr: DynaAvatar是一种能从单张图片重建带有动态衣物效果的3D人体角色的零样本方法，利用Transformer结构和新型损失函数，突破了现有方法无法逼真模拟衣物动态的局限，并在多个实验中超越了现有工作。
AI.motivation: 当前基于单张图像的3D人体重建方法大多依赖刚性关节变换，难以真实模拟衣物的动态变化，导致生成的3D人偶缺乏逼真的动态服饰表现。
AI.method: 提出的DynaAvatar框架首先在大量多人物运动数据上训练，采用基于Transformer的前馈网络，直接预测运动相关的3D高斯变形，无需针对个体再优化。为解决动态数据稀缺的问题，采用静态到动态的知识转移策略：先在大规模静态数据上预训练Transformer，再用轻量的LoRA微调适应动态变化。此外，引入DynaFlow损失，利用光流引导，为衣物动态提供稳健的几何线索。还对现有动态数据集中的SMPL-X拟合进行了重新标注，提升数据质量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DynaAvatar所生成的3D人偶具有丰富的视觉动态效果和很强的泛化能力，在动画质量上明显优于已有方法。
AI.conclusion: DynaAvatar有效突破了单图3D人体重建在衣物动态上的难题，提出的创新策略和新型损失提升了动画效果和模型泛化性，为高质量3D数字人偶提供了新方案。

title: High-Fidelity 3D Facial Avatar Synthesis with Controllable Fine-Grained Expressions
summary: Facial expression editing methods can be mainly categorized into two types based on their architectures: 2D-based and 3D-based methods. The former lacks 3D face modeling capabilities, making it difficult to edit 3D factors effectively. The latter has demonstrated superior performance in generating high-quality and view-consistent renderings using single-view 2D face images. Although these methods have successfully used animatable models to control facial expressions, they still have limitations in achieving precise control over fine-grained expressions. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a novel approach by simultaneously refining both the latent code of a pretrained 3D-Aware GAN model for texture editing and the expression code of the driven 3DMM model for mesh editing. Specifically, we introduce a Dual Mappers module, comprising Texture Mapper and Emotion Mapper, to learn the transformations of the given latent code for textures and the expression code for meshes, respectively. To optimize the Dual Mappers, we propose a Text-Guided Optimization method, leveraging a CLIP-based objective function with expression text prompts as targets, while integrating a SubSpace Projection mechanism to project the text embedding to the expression subspace such that we can have more precise control over fine-grained expressions. Extensive experiments and comparative analyses demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新方法，通过联合优化3D-Aware GAN的隐空间和3DMM模型的表情编码，实现对人脸表情细粒度精准编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸表情编辑方法分为2D和3D架构。2D方法难以编辑3D因素，3D方法虽然质量高但在细粒度表情控制上有限。因此需要一种能更精细控制表情的先进方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了Dual Mappers模块，包括Texture Mapper（纹理映射器）和Emotion Mapper（表情映射器），分别用于优化预训练3D GAN模型的纹理和3DMM模型的表情网格。同时，结合了基于CLIP的文本引导优化方法，用表情文本作为目标，通过子空间投影机制，将文本嵌入表达映射到特定表情子空间，实现更精细的表情控制。
AI.result: 大量实验和对比分析验证了双映射与文本引导优化方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能实现高质量、人脸角度一致、对细粒度表情精准控制的人脸编辑，优于现有方法。

title: Mind-of-Director: Multi-modal Agent-Driven Film Previsualization via Collaborative Decision-Making
summary: We present Mind-of-Director, a multi-modal agent-driven framework for film previz that models the collaborative decision-making process of a film production team. Given a creative idea, Mind-of-Director orchestrates multiple specialized agents to produce previz sequences within the game engine. The framework consists of four cooperative modules: Script Development, where agents draft and refine the screenplay iteratively; Virtual Scene Design, which transforms text into semantically aligned 3D environments; Character Behaviour Control, which determines character blocking and motion; and Camera Planning, which optimizes framing, movement, and composition for cinematic camera effects. A real-time visual editing system built in the game engine further enables interactive inspection and synchronized timeline adjustment across scenes, behaviours, and cameras. Extensive experiments and human evaluations show that Mind-of-Director generates high-quality, semantically grounded previz sequences in approximately 25 minutes per idea, demonstrating the effectiveness of agent collaboration for both automated prototyping and human-in-the-loop filmmaking.

AI.tldr: Mind-of-Director提出一个多智能体主导的电影预演系统，利用四大模块实现从文本想法到3D电影预演的自动化和可编辑化。
AI.motivation: 现有电影预演流程高度依赖人工、效率低，难以实现团队间协作式、自动化制作高质量3D预演。作者旨在通过AI多智能体协同，提升电影团队从创意到预演成片的自动化和交互编辑能力。
AI.method: 系统分为四个模块：脚本开发（多智能体协作生成和润色剧本）、虚拟场景设计（文本到3D环境）、角色行为控制（设计角色走位和动作）、镜头规划（优化构图、运动和效果），并集成实时可视化编辑和多维同步调整能力。
AI.result: 在游戏引擎中实验和人类评估显示，该系统每个创意想法约25分钟可产出高质量、语义一致的预演片段，充分验证了智能体协同对自动化原型和用户交互电影制片的有效提升。
AI.conclusion: Mind-of-Director系统能够高效、自动化生成高质量电影预演，为协同与交互式电影制作带来新方案，推动人工与智能体混合工作的电影工业发展。

title: Face-to-Face: A Video Dataset for Multi-Person Interaction Modeling
summary: Modeling the reactive tempo of human conversation remains difficult because most audio-visual datasets portray isolated speakers delivering short monologues. We introduce \textbf{Face-to-Face with Jimmy Fallon (F2F-JF)}, a 70-hour, 14k-clip dataset of two-person talk-show exchanges that preserves the sequential dependency between a guest turn and the host's response. A semi-automatic pipeline combines multi-person tracking, speech diarization, and lightweight human verification to extract temporally aligned host/guest tracks with tight crops and metadata that are ready for downstream modeling. We showcase the dataset with a reactive, speech-driven digital avatar task in which the host video during $[t_1,t_2]$ is generated from their audio plus the guest's preceding video during $[t_0,t_1]$. Conditioning a MultiTalk-style diffusion model on this cross-person visual context yields small but consistent Emotion-FID and FVD gains while preserving lip-sync quality relative to an audio-only baseline. The dataset, preprocessing recipe, and baseline together provide an end-to-end blueprint for studying dyadic, sequential behavior, which we expand upon throughout the paper. Dataset and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了F2F-JF数据集和相应处理流程，支持对人类会话中响应性时序行为的建模，并基于此展示了多模态数字虚拟人生成实验。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数音视频数据集以独白或单人短句为主，缺乏真实对话中基于双方语境的时序依赖建模，导致难以捕捉人类会话的自然反应。
AI.method: 构建了F2F-JF数据集：收录了Jimmy Fallon脱口秀中的双人对话，总计70小时、1.4万个片段，保留了嘉宾发言和主持人反应的时序联系。使用多人人物追踪、语音分离和人工校对自动化提取并对齐发言人与听众的面部视频，再结合音频和元数据，做成可下游建模的数据集。并将其应用于“反应式语音驱动数字虚拟人”生成实验，即用嘉宾视频+主持人音频预测主持人反应视频。
AI.result: 基于该数据集，用MultiTalk风格扩散模型进行条件生成实验，发现加入跨人物视觉上下文，相较于纯音频条件，能在Emotion-FID和FVD指标上取得小幅但稳定提升，同时保持较好的唇形同步表现。
AI.conclusion: 所发布的数据集、处理流程和基线模型形成了一套端到端的研究蓝图，有助于未来深入探索双人会话、时序依赖等行为机制。数据和代码也将开源，为社区贡献新资源。

title: M2IR: Proactive All-in-One Image Restoration via Mamba-style Modulation and Mixture-of-Experts
summary: While Transformer-based architectures have dominated recent advances in all-in-one image restoration, they remain fundamentally reactive: propagating degradations rather than proactively suppressing them. In the absence of explicit suppression mechanisms, degraded signals interfere with feature learning, compelling the decoder to balance artifact removal and detail preservation, thereby increasing model complexity and limiting adaptability. To address these challenges, we propose M2IR, a novel restoration framework that proactively regulates degradation propagation during the encoding stage and efficiently eliminates residual degradations during decoding. Specifically, the Mamba-Style Transformer (MST) block performs pixel-wise selective state modulation to mitigate degradations while preserving structural integrity. In parallel, the Adaptive Degradation Expert Collaboration (ADEC) module utilizes degradation-specific experts guided by a DA-CLIP-driven router and complemented by a shared expert to eliminate residual degradations through targeted and cooperative restoration. By integrating the MST block and ADEC module, M2IR transitions from passive reaction to active degradation control, effectively harnessing learned representations to achieve superior generalization, enhanced adaptability, and refined recovery of fine-grained details across diverse all-in-one image restoration benchmarks. Our source codes are available at https://github.com/Im34v/M2IR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新的图像复原框架M2IR，通过主动抑制编码阶段的退化传播和高效消除解码阶段的残留退化，实现了更优的图像修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像复原方法主要是被动地处理图像退化，缺乏有效的退化抑制机制，导致模型复杂性高、适应性差，并限制了细节恢复能力。
AI.method: 1）提出了Mamba-Style Transformer（MST）模块，在编码阶段通过像素级的状态调节主动削弱退化信号，同时保留结构信息；2）提出了自适应退化专家协作（ADEC）模块，利用DA-CLIP引导的路由器按退化类型分配专家协作修复，同时引入共享专家整体提升，多路并行地消除残留退化。
AI.result: M2IR在多个全能型图像复原基准上表现优异，具有更强的泛化能力、适应性和细粒度细节恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: 主动控制退化在编码、解码阶段的传播，能够增强模型性能和泛化性，为图像复原领域带来更精细的还原效果。

title: RAZOR: Ratio-Aware Layer Editing for Targeted Unlearning in Vision Transformers and Diffusion Models
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables, accepted to the CVPR 2026 and to appear in the Findings Track Proceedings of IEEE/CVF Conference
summary: Transformer based diffusion and vision-language models have achieved remarkable success; yet, efficiently removing undesirable or sensitive information without retraining remains a central challenge for model safety and compliance. We introduce Ratio-Aware Zero/One-step Optimized Retentive unlearning (RAZOR), a lightweight, model-agnostic unlearning framework that generalizes forgetting updates to coordinated multi-layer and multi-head edits within transformer backbones. RAZOR identifies the most important layers and attention heads by measuring how much they contribute to forgetting the target data while preserving useful knowledge. Then, it updates these parts of the model using a carefully regularized rule to avoid harming overall performance. The set of edited components grows gradually, ensuring precise unlearning without over-editing or damaging unrelated capabilities. We evaluate RAZOR on CLIP, Stable Diffusion, and vision-language models (VLMs) using widely adopted unlearning benchmarks covering identity, style, and object erasure tasks. Our results show that RAZOR achieves highly accurate and stable forgetting, even under quantization. This approach offers stronger retention and better efficiency than prior methods. Notably, it also operates significant faster than conventional techniques. These results demonstrate that RAZOR is a practical and scalable solution for safe, adaptive unlearning in transformer-based vision models.

AI.tldr: RAZOR是一种针对Transformer模型的高效去遗忘框架，可在不重新训练的情况下安全地删除敏感或不良信息，并在多种任务和模型上表现出优异效果。
AI.motivation: 随着Transformer类扩散模型和视觉-语言模型的广泛应用，模型中难以高效、安全地移除敏感或违法信息（即完成unlearning），尤其是在不重新训练全模型的前提下。这对模型的安全性与法规遵从性带来挑战，因此急需一种高效、实用的unlearning方法。
AI.method: RAZOR框架能够自动识别Transformer模型中对特定敏感数据影响最大的层和多头注意力单元，并通过正则化更新这些组件，从而完成遗忘目标内容的编辑，同时保留有用能力。该方法逐步扩大编辑范围，避免过度修改和能力损失。RAZOR是轻量的、与模型无关的，并支持单步快速应用。
AI.result: RAZOR在CLIP、Stable Diffusion等多个主流视觉模型和VLM上，以及身份、风格和物体擦除等多种unlearning任务上，都展现了高准确性与稳定性。即使在量化条件下，RAZOR依然能有效忘除目标，且效率优于以往方法，实现显著更快的运行速度。
AI.conclusion: RAZOR是Transformer视觉模型安全自适应去遗忘的实用且可扩展解决方案，在性能、保留能力与运行效率上优于现有技术，可广泛应用于模型安全与合规领域。

title: RadarXFormer: Robust Object Detection via Cross-Dimension Fusion of 4D Radar Spectra and Images for Autonomous Driving
summary: Reliable perception is essential for autonomous driving systems to operate safely under diverse real-world traffic conditions. However, camera- and LiDAR-based perception systems suffer from performance degradation under adverse weather and lighting conditions, limiting their robustness and large-scale deployment in intelligent transportation systems. Radar-vision fusion provides a promising alternative by combining the environmental robustness and cost efficiency of millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar with the rich semantic information captured by cameras. Nevertheless, conventional 3D radar measurements lack height resolution and remain highly sparse, while emerging 4D mmWave radar introduces elevation information but also brings challenges such as signal noise and large data volume. To address these issues, this paper proposes RadarXFormer, a 3D object detection framework that enables efficient cross-modal fusion between 4D radar spectra and RGB images. Instead of relying on sparse radar point clouds, RadarXFormer directly leverages raw radar spectra and constructs an efficient 3D representation that reduces data volume while preserving complete 3D spatial information. The "X" highlights the proposed cross-dimension (3D-2D) fusion mechanism, in which multi-scale 3D spherical radar feature cubes are fused with complementary 2D image feature maps. Experiments on the K-Radar dataset demonstrate improved detection accuracy and robustness under challenging conditions while maintaining real-time inference capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RadarXFormer，一种新颖的雷达-视觉融合3D目标检测框架，直接利用原始4D毫米波雷达数据与RGB图像进行高效、鲁棒的融合，显著提升了恶劣环境下的检测表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的摄像头和激光雷达感知在恶劣天气和低光环境下性能下降，影响自动驾驶系统的可靠性和大规模应用。毫米波雷达因其环境适应性被重视，但存在数据稀疏、缺乏立体信息等短板。4D毫米波雷达虽然提供了高度信息，但带来噪声和数据量大等新挑战。
AI.method: RadarXFormer创新性地绕开了传统稀疏的点云数据，直接利用4D雷达原始数据，构建高效的3D空间特征表达，并结合RGB图像特征。其核心是提出的跨维度融合机制，将不同尺度的三维雷达球形特征块与二维图像特征进行多尺度融合。
AI.result: 基于K-Radar数据集，RadarXFormer在复杂环境下展现出更高的检测准确性和鲁棒性，同时保证了模型的实时推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 直接基于原始4D雷达频谱与视觉信息融合，RadarXFormer为智能交通领域带来了更为鲁棒、高效的3D目标检测新范式，可有效提升自动驾驶系统在真实复杂场景下的安全性和可靠性。

title: Two Birds, One Projection: Harmonizing Safety and Utility in LVLMs via Inference-time Feature Projection
summary: Existing jailbreak defence frameworks for Large Vision-Language Models often suffer from a safety utility tradeoff, where strengthening safety inadvertently degrades performance on general visual-grounded reasoning tasks. In this work, we investigate whether safety and utility are inherently antagonistic objectives. We focus on a modality induced bias direction consistently observed across datasets, which arises from suboptimal coupling between the Large Language Model backbone and visual encoders. We further demonstrate that this direction undermines performance on both tasks. Leveraging this insight, we propose Two Birds, One Projection, an efficient inference time jailbreak defence that projects cross-modal features onto the null space of the identified bias direction to remove the corresponding components. Requiring only a single forward pass, our method effectively breaks the conventional tradeoff, simultaneously improving both safety and utility across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的大视觉-语言模型防越狱方法，通过特定特征投影，同时提升了模型的安全性与通用性能，突破了以往安全与效用的权衡难题。
AI.motivation: 现有防越狱模型各易导致安全性提升但效能降低，两者难以兼得，需要探索是否二者天然对立。
AI.method: 作者发现大模型常受模态诱导的偏置方向影响，导致视觉和语言联动效果欠佳。基于此，提出在推断时，将跨模态特征投影到该偏置方向的零空间，从而移除有害分量。“Two Birds, One Projection”仅需一次前向传播即可完成。
AI.result: 方法在多个基准测试中，同时达成更高安全性与维持或提升了通用性能（效用），有效突破了以往的安全-效用权衡瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 针对大视觉-语言模型，安全与效用目标并非必然矛盾。通过巧妙去除模态偏置分量，能够实现兼顾安全与效用的新型高效防御。

title: SemanticFace: Semantic Facial Action Estimation via Semantic Distillation in Interpretable Space
summary: Facial action estimation from a single image is often formulated as predicting or fitting parameters in compact expression spaces, which lack explicit semantic interpretability. However, many practical applications, such as avatar control and human-computer interaction, require interpretable facial actions that correspond to meaningful muscle movements. In this work, we propose \textbf{SemanticFace}, a framework for facial action estimation in the interpretable ARKit blendshape space that reformulates coefficient prediction as structured semantic reasoning. SemanticFace adopts a two-stage semantic distillation paradigm: it first derives structured semantic supervision from ground-truth ARKit coefficients and then distills this knowledge into a multimodal large language model to predict interpretable facial action coefficients from images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that language-aligned semantic supervision improves both coefficient accuracy and perceptual consistency, while enabling strong cross-identity generalization and robustness to large domain shifts, including cartoon faces.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SemanticFace框架，通过结构化语义推理，使单张图像的人脸表情估计在具有可解释性的ARKit blendshape空间中进行。该方法利用语义蒸馏提高了系数预测的准确性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 以往的人脸表情估计预测的参数空间紧凑但缺乏明确的语义可解释性，难以满足实际应用（比如头像驱动和人机交互）对“肌肉动作可理解”的需求。作者致力于提高面部动作估计的语义可解释性。
AI.method: 提出SemanticFace框架，将系数预测重新表述为结构化语义推理，并通过两阶段的语义蒸馏策略：首先从真实ARKit系数中获得结构化语义监督，然后将知识蒸馏到多模态大语言模型，实现从图像到可解释的人脸动作系数的预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，语义对齐的监督不仅提升了预测系数的准确性和感知一致性，还显著提高了跨身份泛化和对领域大幅度变化（如卡通脸）的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在提升表情系数可解释性的同时，也增强了实用性和适应性，有助于实际应用中的虚拟形象驱动和跨域人脸动作估计。

title: Halfway to 3D: Ensembling 2.5D and 3D Models for Robust COVID-19 CT Diagnosis
summary: We propose a deep learning framework for COVID-19 detection and disease classification from chest CT scans that integrates both 2.5D and 3D representations to capture complementary slice-level and volumetric information. The 2.5D branch processes multi-view CT slices (axial, coronal, sagittal) using a DINOv3 vision transformer to extract robust visual features, while the 3D branch employs a ResNet-18 architecture to model volumetric context and is pretrained with Variance Risk Extrapolation (VREx) followed by supervised contrastive learning to improve cross-source robustness. Predictions from both branches are combined through logit-level ensemble inference. Experiments on the PHAROS-AIF-MIH benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach: for binary COVID-19 detection, the ensemble achieves 94.48% accuracy and a 0.9426 Macro F1-score, outperforming both individual models, while for multi-class disease classification the 2.5D DINOv3 model achieves the best performance with 79.35% accuracy and a 0.7497 Macro F1-score. These results highlight the benefit of combining pretrained slice-based representations with volumetric modeling for robust multi-source medical imaging analysis. Code is available at https://github.com/HySonLab/PHAROS-AIF-MIH

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合2.5D与3D表示的深度学习方法，有效提升了胸部CT COVID-19检测与疾病分级的准确性，尤其在跨源数据分析中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情期间，基于医学影像的自动化检测需求大增，既要准确识别病灶，又要考虑不同数据源机器的差异，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了2.5D与3D并行分支架构：2.5D分支用DINOv3视觉Transformer对多视角切片提取特征，3D分支采用ResNet-18并通过VREx和对比学习增强跨源鲁棒性；最终通过logit级融合推理整合两者结果。
AI.result: 在PHAROS-AIF-MIH基准测试集上，COVID-19二分类准确率达94.48%，Macro F1为0.9426，多分类DINOv3分支准确率为79.35%，Macro F1为0.7497，两者均超越单一模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 融合2.5D预训练切片特征与3D体积信息可实现高泛化、高准确度的多源医学影像分析，对医学AI自动诊断具有重要意义。

title: DamageArbiter: A CLIP-Enhanced Multimodal Arbitration Framework for Hurricane Damage Assessment from Street-View Imagery
summary: Analyzing street-view imagery with computer vision models for rapid, hyperlocal damage assessment is becoming popular and valuable in emergency response and recovery, but traditional models often act like black boxes, lacking interpretability and reliability. This study proposes a multimodal disagreement-driven Arbitration framework powered by Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models, DamageArbiter, to improve the accuracy, interpretability, and robustness of damage estimation from street-view imagery. DamageArbiter leverages the complementary strengths of unimodal and multimodal models, employing a lightweight logistic regression meta-classifier to arbitrate cases of disagreement. Using 2,556 post-disaster street-view images, paired with both manually generated and large language model (LLM)-generated text descriptions, we systematically compared the performance of unimodal models (including image-only and text-only models), multimodal CLIP-based models, and DamageArbiter. Notably, DamageArbiter improved the accuracy from 74.33% (ViT-B/32, image-only) to 82.79%, surpassing the 80% accuracy threshold and achieving an absolute improvement of 8.46% compared to the strongest baseline model. Beyond improvements in overall accuracy, compared to visual models relying solely on images, DamageArbiter, through arbitration of discrepancies between unimodal and multimodal predictions, mitigates common overconfidence errors in visual models, especially in situations where disaster visual cues are ambiguous or subject to interference, reducing overconfidence but incorrect predictions. We further mapped and analyzed geo-referenced predictions and misclassifications to compare model performance across locations. Overall, this work advances street-view-based disaster assessment from coarse severity classification toward a more reliable and interpretable framework.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于CLIP的多模态判决框架（DamageArbiter），显著提升了街景图像灾害损失评估的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统街景图像灾害评估的计算机视觉模型缺乏可解释性和可靠性，经常表现为黑箱，影响了应急响应与恢复的实际应用价值。
AI.method: 作者提出了DamageArbiter方法，结合了单模态（图像/文本）与多模态（CLIP）模型，通过轻量级逻辑回归元分类器在模型存在分歧时进行裁决，利用真实灾害街景图像及对应的人工和LLM生成文本进行系统对比。
AI.result: 在2,556张真实灾后街景数据上，DamageArbiter模型将准确率从传统图像模型的74.33%提升至82.79%，超越80%主流基线，并有效减少了灾害线索模糊或干扰情况下的过度自信误判。
AI.conclusion: DamageArbiter不仅提升了灾害评估的总体表现，还增强了模型推理的解释性与鲁棒性，推动了基于街景的灾害评估从粗粒度向更可靠、可解释的方向发展。

title: Personalized Federated Learning with Residual Fisher Information for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Federated learning enables multiple clients (institutions) to collaboratively train machine learning models without sharing their private data. To address the challenge of data heterogeneity across clients, personalized federated learning (pFL) aims to learn customized models for each client. In this work, we propose pFL-ResFIM, a novel pFL framework that achieves client-adaptive personalization at the parameter level. Specifically, we introduce a new metric, Residual Fisher Information Matrix (ResFIM), to quantify the sensitivity of model parameters to domain discrepancies. To estimate ResFIM for each client model under privacy constraints, we employ a spectral transfer strategy that generates simulated data reflecting the domain styles of different clients. Based on the estimated ResFIM, we partition model parameters into domain-sensitive and domain-invariant components. A personalized model for each client is then constructed by aggregating only the domain-invariant parameters on the server. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that pFL-ResFIM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, validating its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的个性化联邦学习（pFL）框架pFL-ResFIM来实现参数级别的客户自适应个性化，显著提升了跨域数据分布下的模型效果。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习允许多方协作训练模型，但客户间的数据异质性会影响模型泛化和个性化表现，因此需要更细粒度的方法提升每个客户的个性化性能。
AI.method: 作者设计了新的指标：残差Fisher信息矩阵（ResFIM），用以度量模型参数对域变化的敏感性。通过谱迁移策略模拟不同客户的域风格，在隐私约束下估算各客户模型的ResFIM。依据ResFIM将模型参数分为域敏感和域不变两类，服务器端仅聚合域不变参数用于个性化。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上实验，pFL-ResFIM在性能上持续超越当前最优方法，表明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: pFL-ResFIM通过参数级自适应和域敏感性建模，有效提升了联邦学习个性化效果，为异构数据场景下的客户定制模型提供了新思路。

title: From Artefact to Insight: Efficient Low-Rank Adaptation of BrushNet for Scanning Probe Microscopy Image Restoration
summary: Scanning Probe Microscopy or SPM offers nanoscale resolution but is frequently marred by structured artefacts such as line scan dropout, gain induced noise, tip convolution, and phase hops. While most available methods treat SPM artefact removal as isolated denoising or interpolation tasks, the generative inpainting perspective remains largely unexplored. In this work, we introduce a diffusion based inpainting framework tailored to scientific grayscale imagery. By fine tuning less than 0.2 percent of BrushNet weights with rank constrained low rank adaptation (LoRA), we adapt a pretrained diffusion model using only 7390 artefact, clean pairs distilled from 739 experimental scans. On our forthcoming public SPM InpBench benchmark, the LoRA enhanced model lifts the Peak Signal to Noise Ratio or PSNR by 6.61 dB and halves the Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity or LPIPS relative to zero-shot inference, while matching or slightly surpassing the accuracy of full retraining, trainable on a single GPU instead of four high-memory cards. The approach generalizes across various SPM image channels including height, amplitude and phase, faithfully restores subtle structural details, and suppresses hallucination artefacts inherited from natural image priors. This lightweight framework enables efficient, scalable recovery of irreplaceable SPM images and paves the way for a broader diffusion model adoption in nanoscopic imaging analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的扫描探针显微镜（SPM）图像修复方法，显著提升了伪影去除效果，且训练资源需求较低。
AI.motivation: SPM图像常受系统性伪影干扰，现有方法多仅限于去噪或插值，未充分利用生成式修复思路；且需要高算力和大数据集。
AI.method: 采用扩散模型inpainting框架，针对科学灰度图像，利用低秩LoRA精调，仅微调原模型不到0.2%的参数，以7390对伪影/清晰图像（由739次实验扫描提取）进行训练。
AI.result: LoRA增强模型在新提出的SPM InpBench基准上，将PSNR提高6.61 dB，将LPIPS降低一半，效果接近甚至略超全量训练方案，并大幅降低设备需求（一块GPU即可）。
AI.conclusion: 该轻量级扩散模型微调方法能高效还原SPM图像结构细节，避免过度拟合自然图像先验的幻觉伪影，有望推动扩散模型在纳米级成像中的应用。

title: From Horizontal to Rotated: Cross-View Object Geo-Localization with Orientation Awareness
summary: Cross-View object geo-localization (CVOGL) aims to precisely determine the geographic coordinates of a query object from a ground or drone perspective by referencing a satellite map. Segmentation-based approaches offer high precision but require prohibitively expensive pixel-level annotations, whereas more economical detection-based methods suffer from lower accuracy. This performance disparity in detection is primarily caused by two factors: the poor geometric fit of Horizontal Bounding Boxes (HBoxes) for oriented objects and the degradation in precision due to feature map scaling. Motivated by these, we propose leveraging Rotated Bounding Boxes (RBoxes) as a natural extension of the detection-based paradigm. RBoxes provide a much tighter geometric fit to oriented objects. Building on this, we introduce OSGeo, a novel geo-localization framework, meticulously designed with a multi-scale perception module and an orientation-sensitive head to accurately regress RBoxes. To support this scheme, we also construct and release CVOGL-R, the first dataset with precise RBox annotations for CVOGL. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our OSGeo achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently matching or even surpassing the accuracy of leading segmentation-based methods but with an annotation cost that is over an order of magnitude lower.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于旋转框（RBox）的跨视角目标地理定位方法OSGeo，有效提升了检测精度，成本显著低于分割方法，达到或超过现有最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 检测法注释成本较低，但由于水平框对目标几何拟合差和特征缩放导致的精度下降，性能不如高成本分割方法。作者希望在仅用检测级注释的条件下，弥补检测法与分割法的性能差距。
AI.method: 提出利用旋转框（RBox）对检测目标几何形态进行更紧密拟合，实现了更高精度的定位。在此基础上设计了多尺度感知模块和方向敏感头部，用于精准回归RBox。同时，构建并公开了第一个带RBox精标注的CVOGL-R数据集。
AI.result: 通过大规模实验，OSGeo模型性能达到甚至超过了主流分割方法，且注释成本比分割方法低一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: OSGeo框架在更低人力标注成本下，为CVOGL任务提供了媲美甚至超越分割法的全新检测方案，对实际应用具有很高价值。

title: Video Detector: A Dual-Phase Vision-Based System for Real-Time Traffic Intersection Control and Intelligent Transportation Analysis
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables, preprint, the dataset is openly available
summary: Urban traffic management increasingly requires intelligent sensing systems capable of adapting to dynamic traffic conditions without costly infrastructure modifications. Vision-based vehicle detection has therefore become a key technology for modern intelligent transportation systems. This study presents Video Detector (VD), a dual-phase vision-based traffic intersection management system designed as a flexible and cost-effective alternative to traditional inductive loop detectors. The framework integrates a real-time module (VD-RT) for intersection control with an offline analytical module (VD-Offline) for detailed traffic behavior analysis. Three system configurations were implemented using SSD Inception v2, Faster R-CNN Inception v2, and CenterNet ResNet-50 V1 FPN, trained on datasets totaling 108,000 annotated images across 6-10 vehicle classes. Experimental results show detection performance of up to 90% test accuracy and 29.5 mAP@0.5, while maintaining real-time throughput of 37 FPS on HD video streams. Field deployments conducted in collaboration with Istanbul IT and Smart City Technologies Inc. (ISBAK) demonstrate stable operation under diverse environmental conditions. The system supports virtual loop detection, vehicle counting, multi-object tracking, queue estimation, speed analysis, and multiclass vehicle classification, enabling comprehensive intersection monitoring without the need for embedded road sensors. The annotated dataset and training pipeline are publicly released to support reproducibility. These results indicate that the proposed framework provides a scalable and deployable vision-based solution for intelligent transportation systems and smart-city traffic management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的视频检测系统（VD），能够替代传统地感线圈，实现城市交叉口的智能交通管理。系统兼具实时控制与离线分析功能，精度高，可直接部署在现有交通环境中。
AI.motivation: 随着城市交通需求复杂化，现有交通感应基础设施改造成本高，需更灵活、低成本的智能系统。基于视觉的方法有望减少物理改造，同时提升交通管理智能化水平。
AI.method: VD系统包括实时视频模块和离线分析模块，采用SSD Inception v2、Faster R-CNN Inception v2和CenterNet ResNet-50 V1 FPN三种模型，基于包含10.8万标注图像的数据集训练，实现多类别车辆检测与行为分析。
AI.result: 系统在HD视频流下达到了最高90%的测试精度和29.5的mAP@0.5，实时处理速度为37帧/秒。实地部署表明，系统能在各种环境下稳定运行，支持虚拟线圈、车辆计数、多目标追踪等多种功能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为智能交通与智慧城市提供了一种可扩展、易部署的视觉感知解决方案，减少了对传统埋地传感器的依赖，推进了交通管理的数字化、智能化进程。

title: RealVLG-R1: A Large-Scale Real-World Visual-Language Grounding Benchmark for Robotic Perception and Manipulation
summary: Visual-language grounding aims to establish semantic correspondences between natural language and visual entities, enabling models to accurately identify and localize target objects based on textual instructions. Existing VLG approaches focus on coarse-grained, object-level localization, while traditional robotic grasping methods rely predominantly on geometric cues and lack language guidance, which limits their applicability in language-driven manipulation scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose the RealVLG framework, which integrates the RealVLG-11B dataset and the RealVLG-R1 model to unify real-world visual-language grounding and grasping tasks. RealVLG-11B dataset provides multi-granularity annotations including bounding boxes, segmentation masks, grasp poses, contact points, and human-verified fine-grained language descriptions, covering approximately 165,000 images, over 800 object instances, 1.3 million segmentation, detection, and language annotations, and roughly 11 billion grasping examples. Building on this dataset, RealVLG-R1 employs Reinforcement Fine-tuning on pretrained large-scale vision-language models to predict bounding boxes, segmentation masks, grasp poses, and contact points in a unified manner given natural language instructions. Experimental results demonstrate that RealVLG supports zero-shot perception and manipulation in real-world unseen environments, establishing a unified semantic-visual multimodal benchmark that provides a comprehensive data and evaluation platform for language-driven robotic perception and grasping policy learning. All data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/lif314/RealVLG-R1.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RealVLG框架，通过结合大规模真实世界数据集RealVLG-11B和模型RealVLG-R1，实现了视觉-语言定位和机器人抓取任务的统一，并支持零样本环境中的语言驱动操作。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言定位方法多定位到对象层级，缺乏对更细粒度目标的精准感知和操作。同时，传统机器人抓取算法往往仅基于几何信息，不能满足基于自然语言指令的多样化和复杂抓取需求。因此，迫切需要一个结合语言、视觉和操作动作的统一框架和大规模数据集，推动机器人在实际场景下的感知与操作能力提升。
AI.method: 构建包含细粒度多模信息（标注框、分割掩码、抓取位姿、接触点和经人工验证的描述）的RealVLG-11B数据集（约1.1亿抓取样本，覆盖16.5万张图片、800余种实例、130万注释），并提出基于大规模视觉-语言预训练模型的RealVLG-R1，利用强化微调技术，在接收语言指令的基础上协同预测视觉和操作多任务结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，RealVLG框架能支持现实世界中未知环境下的零样本感知和操作，并作为统一的多模基准，显著提升了基于语言引导的机器人目标定位与抓取性能。
AI.conclusion: RealVLG为基于自然语言的机器人视觉感知和抓取策略的联合学习与评估提供了丰富的数据和开源平台，为多模态机器人系统的研究和应用奠定了基础。

title: LLMind: Bio-inspired Training-free Adaptive Visual Representations for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) typically assume a uniform spatial fidelity across the entire field of view of visual inputs, dedicating equal precision to even the uninformative regions. By contrast, human vision is neither uniform nor static; it is adaptive, selective, and resource-efficient. In light of this, we present the first systematic analysis of bio-inspired visual representation methods, providing insights for more efficient and adaptive VLMs. We propose LLMind (Looking Like the Mind), a novel training-free framework that mimics foveated encoding and cortical magnification in human vision to achieve adaptive, efficient representations for VLMs under tight pixel budgets. Our key idea is to explore a Bio-inspired Adaptive Sampling Strategy (BASS), enabling a Mobius-parameterized module that performs non-uniform sampling while preserving global scene structure. On top of BASS, we introduce closed-loop semantic feedback (CSF) via test-time adaptation to align perceptual saliency with textual information from the frozen VLM. We evaluate LLMind against uniform and other sampling baselines across diverse scene-level and region-guided visual question answering benchmarks. The results show dramatic gains, with average improvements of +20% on VQAv2, +38% on Seed-Bench, and +37% on A-OKVQA compared to uniform sampling under tight pixel budgets. More surprisingly, LLMind retains up to 82%, 92%, and 97% of the full-resolution performance using only 1%, 3%, and 5% of the pixels, respectively. Moreover, LLMind is lightweight, plug-and-play, and compatible with existing VLMs without requiring architectural changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受人类视觉启发的视觉-语言表示方法LLMind，通过模仿人眼中心凹编码和皮层放大机制，实现了在像素预算紧张时自适应、高效的视觉-语言模型输入采样。该方法极大提升了在视觉问答等任务下低像素输入时的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型对全图采用均匀采样策略，未能像人类视觉那样区分重要和不重要的区域，导致资源利用低效。研究旨在借鉴人类视觉系统的高效与选择性，以提升VLM在受限资源下的表现。
AI.method: 提出了LLMind框架，通过Bio-inspired Adaptive Sampling Strategy（BASS，生物启发自适应采样策略）进行非均匀采样，基于Mobius参数化模块确保保留全局场景结构。此外，引入了闭环语义反馈（CSF），通过测试时自适应机制，将感知显著性与VLM中的文本信息对齐。整个方法无需训练，轻量且无需改变VLM架构。
AI.result: 在多个VQA数据集和基线比较下，LLMind在像素预算极低的情况下，相比于传统均匀采样获得大幅提升，例如VQAv2提升20%、Seed-Bench提升38%、A-OKVQA提升37%。即使只用1%、3%、5%的像素，也可分别保留全分辨率性能的82%、92%、97%。
AI.conclusion: LLMind证明了生物启发的自适应采样与反馈机制可极大提升VLM低资源条件下的高效性，且方法轻量、易于集成，为未来高效和智能的VLM设计提供了新思路。

title: SpiralDiff: Spiral Diffusion with LoRA for RGB-to-RAW Conversion Across Cameras
summary: RAW images preserve superior fidelity and rich scene information compared to RGB, making them essential for tasks in challenging imaging conditions. To alleviate the high cost of data collection, recent RGB-to-RAW conversion methods aim to synthesize RAW images from RGB. However, they overlook two key challenges: (i) the reconstruction difficulty varies with pixel intensity, and (ii) multi-camera conversion requires camera-specific adaptation. To address these issues, we propose SpiralDiff, a diffusion-based framework tailored for RGB-to-RAW conversion with a signal-dependent noise weighting strategy that adapts reconstruction fidelity across intensity levels. In addition, we introduce CamLoRA, a camera-aware lightweight adaptation module that enables a unified model to adapt to different camera-specific ISP characteristics. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of SpiralDiff in RGB-to-RAW conversion quality and its downstream benefits in RAW-based object detection. Our code and model are available at https://github.com/Chuancy-TJU/SpiralDiff.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SpiralDiff的扩散模型框架，有效提升了RGB到RAW的图像转换质量，并具有跨相机适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB转RAW模拟方法忽略了不同像素强度带来的重建难度以及多摄像头时对不同相机特性适应的问题。高质量的RAW模拟对复杂成像任务和下游视觉任务极为重要。
AI.method: 提出扩散模型SpiralDiff，具备基于信号强度加权的噪声策略，增强了对不同像素强度下的还原能力。同时设计了轻量级的相机适应模块CamLoRA，使模型可统一适配多种相机的影像特性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上进行大量实验，SpiralDiff在RGB到RAW的转换质量上超越现有方法，并且提升了RAW图像为基础的目标检测任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: SpiralDiff不仅提升了RGB转RAW的转换质量，还具备强大的跨相机适应性，为后续RAW为基础的视觉任务提供了有力支持。

title: PASTE: Physics-Aware Scattering Topology Embedding Framework for SAR Object Detection
summary: Current deep learning-based object detection for Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery mainly adopts optical image methods, treating targets as texture patches while ignoring inherent electromagnetic scattering mechanisms. Though scattering points have been studied to boost detection performance, most methods still rely on amplitude-based statistical models. Some approaches introduce frequency-domain information for scattering center extraction, but they suffer from high computation cost and poor compatibility with diverse datasets. Thus, effectively embedding scattering topological information into modern detection frameworks remains challenging. To solve these problems, this paper proposes the Physics-Aware Scattering Topology Embedding Framework (PASTE), a novel closed-loop architecture for comprehensive scattering prior integration. By building the full pipeline from topology generation, injection to joint supervision, PASTE elegantly integrates scattering physics into modern SAR detectors. Specifically, it designs a scattering keypoint generation and automatic annotation scheme based on the Attributed Scattering Center (ASC) model to produce scalable and physically consistent priors. A scattering topology injection module guides multi-scale feature learning, and a scattering prior supervision strategy constrains network optimization by aligning predictions with scattering center distributions. Experiments on real datasets show that PASTE is compatible with various detectors and brings relative mAP gains of 2.9% to 11.3% over baselines with acceptable computation overhead. Visualization of scattering maps verifies that PASTE successfully embeds scattering topological priors into feature space, clearly distinguishing target and background scattering regions, thus providing strong interpretability for results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理感知的散射拓扑嵌入框架（PASTE），将目标的电磁散射物理先验有效注入到SAR图像目标检测中，提升检测精度并增强物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有SAR图像目标检测主要借用光学图像方法，忽略了SAR电磁散射机制；部分方法引入散射点提升检测，但依赖于幅值统计模型或计算复杂的频域信息，难以与现代检测框架兼容。因此，亟需一种高效、可扩展、物理一致的方法，将散射拓扑信息融入检测模型。
AI.method: PASTE 框架通过三个主要步骤实现：1）利用ASC模型设计自动散射关键点生成与标注方案，生成具物理一致性的可扩展先验；2）开发散射拓扑注入模块，引导多尺度特征学习；3）设计散射先验监督机制，通过约束预测与真实散射分布对齐优化网络。形成拓扑信息从生成、注入到联合监督的闭环架构。
AI.result: 实验证明，PASTE兼容多种主流SAR目标检测器，可实现mAP提升2.9%~11.3%，计算开销可接受；散射特征可视化显示其显著改善目标与背景区分能力，并提供良好可解释性。
AI.conclusion: PASTE能够有效将散射拓扑物理先验嵌入现代SAR检测框架，显著提升检测性能与物理可解释性，对相关实际任务具有推广应用潜力。

title: Balancing Saliency and Coverage: Semantic Prominence-Aware Budgeting for Visual Token Compression in VLMs
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong multimodal understanding capabilities by leveraging high-resolution visual inputs, but the resulting large number of visual tokens creates a major computational bottleneck. Recent work mitigates this issue through visual token compression, typically compressing tokens based on saliency, diversity, or a fixed combination of both. We observe that the distribution of semantic prominence varies substantially across samples, leading to different optimal trade-offs between local saliency preservation and global coverage. This observation suggests that applying a static compression strategy across all samples can be suboptimal. Motivated by this insight, we propose PromPrune, a sample-adaptive visual token selection framework composed of semantic prominence-aware budget allocation and a two-stage selection pipeline. Our method adaptively balances local saliency preservation and global coverage according to the semantic prominence distribution of each sample. By allocating token budgets between locally salient regions and globally diverse regions, our method maintains strong performance even under high compression ratios. On LLaVA-NeXT-7B, our approach reduces FLOPs by 88% and prefill latency by 22% while preserving 97.5% of the original accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大规模视觉-语言模型（VLMs）高分辨率视觉输入带来的计算瓶颈问题，提出了一种自适应视觉token压缩方法PromPrune，在大幅提升推理速度及降低计算量的同时，有效保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在处理高分辨率图像时生成大量视觉token，极大增加了计算负担。以往的token压缩方法往往静态处理saliency和diversity，未能针对每个样本的语义分布自适应地分配资源，因而存在性能损失。作者基于发现不同样本中语义显著分布差异大，认为静态策略无法取得最优，亟需更灵活的token压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出PromPrune方法，包括：(1) 基于语义显著性的自适应预算分配机制，根据当前样本分配token到局部显著和全局多样区域；(2) 两阶段选择流程，分别针对局部saliency和全局coverage选择token，实现压缩和特征覆盖的动态平衡。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-NeXT-7B上实验显示，PromPrune在高压缩率条件下，减少了88%的FLOPs和22%的prefill时延，同时仍保持97.5%的原始准确率。
AI.conclusion: PromPrune能够根据样本特性智能分配token预算，有效平衡计算效率和信息保留，在降低VLM推理计算与延迟的同时，最大程度保证性能，优于静态压缩方法。

title: TopoVST: Toward Topology-fidelitous Vessel Skeleton Tracking
summary: Automatic extraction of vessel skeletons is crucial for many clinical applications. However, achieving topologically faithful delineation of thin vessel skeletons remains highly challenging, primarily due to frequent discontinuities and the presence of spurious skeleton segments. To address these difficulties, we propose TopoVST, a topology-fidelitious vessel skeleton tracker. TopoVST constructs multi-scale sphere graphs to sample the input image and employs graph neural networks to jointly estimate tracking directions and vessel radii. The utilization of multi-scale representations is enhanced through a gating-based feature fusion mechanism, while the issue of class imbalance during training is mitigated by embedding a geometry-aware weighting scheme into the directional loss. In addition, we design a wave-propagation-based skeleton tracking algorithm that explicitly mitigates the generation of spurious skeletons through space-occupancy filtering. We evaluate TopoVST on two vessel datasets with different geometries. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art baselines demonstrate that TopoVST achieves competitive performance in both overlapping and topological metrics. Our source code is available at: https://github.com/EndoluminalSurgicalVision-IMR/TopoVST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的血管骨架自动提取方法TopoVST，在保障骨架结构的连通性和拓扑一致性的基础上，有效解决了细小血管骨架断裂和噪声骨架段的问题。
AI.motivation: 血管骨架提取对临床很多应用至关重要，但现有方法易出现骨架不连贯和伪骨架段，对细血管刻画不准，影响应用效果。
AI.method: TopoVST构建多尺度球形图对图像进行采样，使用图神经网络联合预测追踪方向和血管半径；通过门控特征融合机制利用多尺度特征，并在训练时通过几何感知加权策略缓解类别不平衡问题；此外，还设计了基于波传播的骨架追踪算法，利用空间占据过滤减少伪骨架生成。
AI.result: TopoVST在两种不同血管结构的数据集上进行了实验，对比多种主流方法，在骨架重叠度和拓扑一致性评估指标上均有较强的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TopoVST在血管骨架提取任务中实现了高拓扑一致性和连贯性，为未来相关医学影像分析提供了有效工具，具备实际应用潜力。

title: ILV: Iterative Latent Volumes for Fast and Accurate Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
summary: A long-term goal in CT imaging is to achieve fast and accurate 3D reconstruction from sparse-view projections, thereby reducing radiation exposure, lowering system cost, and enabling timely imaging in clinical workflows. Recent feed-forward approaches have shown strong potential toward this overarching goal, yet their results still suffer from artifacts and loss of fine details. In this work, we introduce Iterative Latent Volumes (ILV), a feed-forward framework that integrates data-driven priors with classical iterative reconstruction principles to overcome key limitations of prior feed-forward models in sparse-view CBCT reconstruction. At its core, ILV constructs an explicit 3D latent volume that is repeatedly updated by conditioning on multi-view X-ray features and the learned anatomical prior, enabling the recovery of fine structural details beyond the reach of prior feed-forward models. In addition, we develop and incorporate several key architectural components, including an X-ray feature volume, group cross-attention, efficient self-attention, and view-wise feature aggregation, that efficiently realize its core latent volume refinement concept. Extensive experiments on a large-scale dataset of approximately 14,000 CT volumes demonstrate that ILV significantly outperforms existing feed-forward and optimization-based methods in both reconstruction quality and speed. These results show that ILV enables fast and accurate sparse-view CBCT reconstruction suitable for clinical use. The project page is available at: https://sngryonglee.github.io/ILV/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合数据驱动先验与经典迭代重建思想的新型前馈3D重建框架（ILV），显著提升了稀疏角CBCT重建的质量和速度。
AI.motivation: 当前CT图像重建面临速度与质量的权衡，尤其是在稀疏角投影条件下，为了减少辐射、降低成本并适应临床流程，亟需提升稀疏采样下的3D重建效果。然而现有前馈方法仍存在伪影和细节损失问题。
AI.method: ILV框架通过构建可显式表达的3D潜在体素，每次迭代结合多视角X射线特征与学习得到的人体结构先验不断更新。其架构包含X射线特征体、组内交叉注意力、高效自注意力及按视角特征聚合等模块，实现高效的潜在体素细化。
AI.result: 在包含约14,000个CT体积的超大数据集实验中，ILV在重建质量和速度上均显著优于现有前馈及优化方法。
AI.conclusion: ILV实现了快速且高精度的稀疏角CBCT重建，可有效应用于临床场景。

title: EditHF-1M: A Million-Scale Rich Human Preference Feedback for Image Editing
summary: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have achieved remarkable progress, while many edited images still suffer from issues such as artifacts, unexpected editings, unaesthetic contents. Although some benchmarks and methods have been proposed for evaluating edited images, scalable evaluation models are still lacking, which limits the development of human feedback reward models for image editing. To address the challenges, we first introduce \textbf{EditHF-1M}, a million-scale image editing dataset with over 29M human preference pairs and 148K human mean opinion ratings, both evaluated from three dimensions, \textit{i.e.}, visual quality, instruction alignment, and attribute preservation. Based on EditHF-1M, we propose \textbf{EditHF}, a multimodal large language model (MLLM) based evaluation model, to provide human-aligned feedback from image editing. Finally, we introduce \textbf{EditHF-Reward}, which utilizes EditHF as the reward signal to optimize the text-guided image editing models through reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that EditHF achieves superior alignment with human preferences and demonstrates strong generalization on other datasets. Furthermore, we fine-tune the Qwen-Image-Edit using EditHF-Reward, achieving significant performance improvements, which demonstrates the ability of EditHF to serve as a reward model to scale-up the image editing. Both the dataset and code will be released in our GitHub repository: https://github.com/IntMeGroup/EditHF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大规模图像编辑评测数据集EditHF-1M和基于多模态大语言模型的自动评测系统EditHF，并通过EditHF-Reward实现图像编辑模型的强化学习优化，在主观和客观指标上均显著提升了编辑结果质量。
AI.motivation: 目前文本引导的图像编辑虽有较快进展，但编辑结果仍常见伪影、失真和审美不佳等问题。现有评估方法难以扩展，限制了基于人类反馈的奖励模型发展，因此亟需大规模、人类偏好对齐的评测资源以推进图像编辑领域。
AI.method: 1) 构建EditHF-1M数据集，含百万级编辑样本、超2900万人类偏好对比及14.8万主观评分，涵盖视觉质量、指令对齐和属性保持三维度；2) 基于该数据集训练多模态大语言模型EditHF用于自动模拟人类偏好打分；3) 以EditHF得分作为奖励信号，提出EditHF-Reward，对图像编辑模型实施强化学习优化。
AI.result: EditHF作为评测模型显著提升了与人类偏好结果的一致性，并具备良好跨数据集泛化能力。采用EditHF-Reward微调Qwen-Image-Edit模型后性能大幅提升，编辑效果更优。
AI.conclusion: EditHF-1M和EditHF为图像编辑模型可扩展评测及奖励提供坚实基础，有效促进编辑模型与人类预期的一致性，并能够通过奖励机制持续提升模型性能。

title: $\text{F}^2\text{HDR}$: Two-Stage HDR Video Reconstruction via Flow Adapter and Physical Motion Modeling
summary: Reconstructing High Dynamic Range (HDR) videos from sequences of alternating-exposure Low Dynamic Range (LDR) frames remains highly challenging, especially under dynamic scenes where cross-exposure inconsistencies and complex motion make inter-frame alignment difficult, leading to ghosting and detail loss. Existing methods often suffer from inaccurate alignment, suboptimal feature aggregation, and degraded reconstruction quality in motion-dominated regions. To address these challenges, we propose $\text{F}^2\text{HDR}$, a two-stage HDR video reconstruction framework that robustly perceives inter-frame motion and restores fine details in complex dynamic scenarios. The proposed framework integrates a flow adapter that adapts generic optical flow for robust cross-exposure alignment, a physical motion modeling to identify salient motion regions, and a motion-aware refinement network that aggregates complementary information while removing ghosting and noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that $\text{F}^2\text{HDR}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on real-world HDR video benchmarks, producing ghost-free and high-fidelity results under large motion and exposure variations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了F^2HDR框架，有效解决了动态场景下交替曝光LDR序列重建HDR视频时的配准和细节丢失等问题，实现了高质量的无鬼影重建。
AI.motivation: 在动态场景中，从交替曝光的LDR序列重建HDR视频面临着跨曝光校准困难和运动导致的细节丢失（如鬼影现象）。现有方法在运动区域配准不准、特征聚合不佳，重建质量下降，急需更鲁棒的处理方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了F^2HDR两阶段重建框架，包含：（1）流适配器，将通用光流适配于跨曝光配准，提升鲁棒性；（2）基于物理建模获取关键运动区域；（3）运动感知细化网络聚合互补信息，有效去除鬼影与噪声。
AI.result: 大量实验证明，F^2HDR在真实HDR视频基准上达到了最先进的效果，特别是在大幅运动与曝光变化条件下能生成无鬼影、高保真的HDR视频。
AI.conclusion: F^2HDR框架可提升动态场景下HDR视频重建质量，显著优于现有方法，为实际应用中的高动态视频处理提供了有力工具。

title: Workflow-Aware Structured Layer Decomposition for Illustration Production
summary: Recent generative image editing methods adopt layered representations to mitigate the entangled nature of raster images and improve controllability, typically relying on object-based segmentation. However, such strategies may fail to capture the structural and stylized properties of human-created images, such as anime illustrations. To solve this issue, we propose a workflow-aware structured layer decomposition framework tailored to the illustration production of anime artwork. Inspired by the creation pipeline of anime production, our method decomposes the illustration into semantically meaningful production layers, including line art, flat color, shadow, and highlight. To decouple all these layers, we introduce lightweight layer semantic embeddings to provide specific task guidance for each layer. Furthermore, a set of layer-wise losses is incorporated to supervise the training process of individual layers. To overcome the lack of ground-truth layered data, we construct a high-quality illustration dataset that simulated the standard anime production workflow. Experiments demonstrate that the accurate and visually coherent layer decompositions were achieved by using our method. We believe that the resulting layered representation further enables downstream tasks such as recoloring and embedding texture, supporting content creation, and illustration editing. Code is available at: https://github.com/zty0304/Anime-layer-decomposition

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向动漫插画生产流程的结构化分层分解框架，实现了对插画的分层高质量分解。
AI.motivation: 以往生成式图像编辑多采用分层表示提升可控性，但传统基于分割的方式难以还原动漫插画中富含结构与风格的特性。为适应动漫制作的流程需求，需要更贴合语义的重要生产层分解方法。
AI.method: 方法仿照动漫制作流程，将插画分解为线稿、纯色、阴影和高光等语义生产层，并引入轻量级层语义嵌入用于分别指导每一层。同时采用逐层Loss监督训练流程，对缺乏真实分层数据的问题，作者还构建了高质量模拟动漫生产流程的数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够实现插画的准确、视觉连贯的分层分解，分层效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于插画的后续任务如重着色与纹理嵌入，能够有效支持动漫内容创作与编辑，具有较强的应用价值。

title: Video-CoE: Reinforcing Video Event Prediction via Chain of Events
summary: Despite advances in the application of MLLMs for various video tasks, video event prediction (VEP) remains relatively underexplored. VEP requires the model to perform fine-grained temporal modeling of videos and establish logical relationships between videos and future events, which current MLLMs still struggle with. In this work, we first present a comprehensive evaluation of current leading MLLMs on the VEP task, revealing the reasons behind their inaccurate predictions, including lack of logical reasoning ability for future events prediction and insufficient utilization of visual information. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{C}hain \textbf{o}f \textbf{E}vents (\textbf{CoE}) paradigm, which constructs temporal event chains to implicitly enforce MLLM focusing on the visual content and the logical connections between videos and future events, incentivizing model's reasoning capability with multiple training protocols. Experimental results on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms both leading open-source and commercial MLLMs, establishing a new state-of-the-art on the VEP task. Codes and models will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 现有多模态大模型（MLLMs）在视频事件预测（VEP）任务上表现有限，本文提出了事件链(CoE)范式，系统提升了预测效果并刷新了任务新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 视频事件预测要求模型对视频的时间维度进行细致建模，并推断视频与未来事件的逻辑关系。然而当前MLLMs在此任务上的推断能力和信息利用率还有明显不足，因此亟需改进。
AI.method: 1. 首先，系统评测了现有主流MLLMs在VEP任务上的表现，分析其不足之处。2. 提出CoE（事件链）范式，通过构建时序事件链，引导模型关注视频内容与未来事件间的时序及逻辑关系。3. 采用多种训练协议来激发模型的推理能力和信息整合能力。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上，本文方法在准确性等指标上均显著优于现有主流开源和商业MLLMs，刷新了VEP任务的最新最优性能（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入事件链（CoE）范式，有效增强了MLLMs在视频事件预测中的逻辑推理和视觉信息利用能力，为视频理解和推测未来事件提供了新思路。代码与模型即将开源，便于后续拓展与应用。

title: Relevance Feedback in Text-to-Image Diffusion: A Training-Free And Model-Agnostic Interactive Framework
summary: Text-to-image generation using diffusion models has achieved remarkable success. However, users often possess clear visual intents but struggle to express them precisely in language, resulting in ambiguous prompts and misaligned images. Existing methods struggle to bridge this gap, typically relying on high-load textual dialogues, opaque black-box inferences, or expensive fine-tuning. They fail to simultaneously achieve low cognitive load, interpretable preference inference, and remain training-free and model-agnostic. To address this, we propose RFD, an interactive framework that adapts the relevance feedback mechanism from information retrieval to diffusion models. In RFD, users replace explicit textual dialogue with implicit, multi-select visual feedback to minimize cognitive load, easily expressing complex, multi-dimensional preferences. To translate feedback into precise generative guidance, we construct an expert-curated feature repository and introduce an information-theoretic weighted cumulative preference analysis. This white-box method calculates preferences from current-round feedback and incrementally accumulates them, avoiding the concatenation of historical interactions and preventing inference degradation caused by lengthy contexts. Furthermore, RFD employs a probabilistic sampling mechanism for prompt reconstruction to balance exploitation and exploration, preventing output homogenization. Crucially, RFD operates entirely within the external text space, making it strictly training-free and model-agnostic as a universal plug-and-play solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RFD effectively captures the user's true visual intent, significantly outperforming baselines in preference alignment.

AI.tldr: RFD提出了一种训练无关、模型无关、低负担且可解释的交互式框架，以多选视觉反馈引导扩散模型生成更符合用户视觉意图的图像，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图扩散模型虽然强大，但用户难以用准确语言表达视觉意图，导致生成结果与真实意图不符。解决这种语言与视觉表达之间的鸿沟，且避免高负担的文本对话或昂贵的模型微调，是亟需研究的问题。
AI.method: RFD框架借鉴信息检索中的相关反馈机制，让用户通过多选视觉样例反馈而非文字对话表达偏好，结合专家特征库及信息论加权累积分析，逐轮解析和累积用户偏好，利用概率采样机制重建提示词，达到探索与利用的平衡，并保证方案无需模型微调且对任意扩散模型通用。
AI.result: RFD在多项实验中，准确捕捉用户真实视觉意图，在用户偏好对齐效果上显著优于传统基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RFD为文生图扩散模型提供了一种高效、准确、可插拔的用户偏好对齐机制，具备无培训、无模型依赖和低认知负担的优势，对相关生成领域应用具备广泛推广价值。

title: FAR-Drive: Frame-AutoRegressive Video Generation in Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving
summary: Despite rapid progress in autonomous driving, reliable training and evaluation of driving systems remain fundamentally constrained by the lack of scalable and interactive simulation environments. Recent generative video models achieve remarkable visual fidelity, yet most operate in open-loop settings and fail to support fine-grained frame-level interaction between agent actions and environment evolution. Building a learning-based closed-loop simulator for autonomous driving poses three major challenges: maintaining long-horizon temporal and cross-view consistency, mitigating autoregressive degradation under iterative self-conditioning, and satisfying low-latency inference constraints. In this work, we propose FAR-Drive, a frame-level autoregressive video generation framework for autonomous driving. We introduce a multi-view diffusion transformer with fine-grained structured control, enabling geometrically consistent multi-camera generation. To address long-horizon consistency and iterative degradation, we design a two-stage training strategy consisting of adaptive reference horizon conditioning and blend-forcing autoregressive training, which progressively improves consistency and robustness under self-conditioning. To meet low-latency interaction requirements, we further integrate system-level efficiency optimizations for inference acceleration. Experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among existing closed-loop autonomous driving simulation approaches, while maintaining sub-second latency on a single GPU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAR-Drive，一个用于自动驾驶的帧级自回归视频生成仿真器，能够实现多摄像头几何一致的高效交互式仿真，在nuScenes数据集上实现最优性能且延迟低。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶系统训练和评估受限于缺乏可扩展、可交互的仿真环境。现有生成式视频模型大多只提供开放环路仿真，无法满足细粒度的帧级互动需求，难以反映真实驾驶决策对环境的动态影响，因此亟需更高现实度的闭环仿真解决方案。
AI.method: 提出FAR-Drive框架，引入多视角扩散Transformer，并通过精细结构化控制，实现多摄像头的几何一致视频生成。采用两阶段训练：自适应参考时域调节与blend-forcing自回归训练，提升长时域一致性和抗退化能力。同时集成系统级优化，实现推理加速，满足低延迟互动。
AI.result: 在nuScenes公开数据集上，该方法在现有闭环自动驾驶仿真方法中，达到了最新的综合性能表现，且在单GPU上推理延迟低于1秒。
AI.conclusion: FAR-Drive有效地解决了长时域一致性、抗自回归退化和低延迟三大难题，为自动驾驶训练和评估提供了更高效、可靠的闭环仿真环境。

title: Bridging Scene Generation and Planning: Driving with World Model via Unifying Vision and Motion Representation
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. The code is available at https://github.com/TabGuigui/WorldDrive
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving aims to generate safe and plausible planning policies from raw sensor input. Driving world models have shown great potential in learning rich representations by predicting the future evolution of a driving scene. However, existing driving world models primarily focus on visual scene representation, and motion representation is not explicitly designed to be planner-shared and inheritable, leaving a schism between the optimization of visual scene generation and the requirements of precise motion planning. We present WorldDrive, a holistic framework that couples scene generation and real-time planning via unifying vision and motion representation. We first introduce a Trajectory-aware Driving World Model, which conditions on a trajectory vocabulary to enforce consistency between visual dynamics and motion intentions, enabling the generation of diverse and plausible future scenes conditioned on a specific trajectory. We transfer the vision and motion encoders to a downstream Multi-modal Planner, ensuring the driving policy operates on mature representations pre-optimized by scene generation. A simple interaction between motion representation, visual representation, and ego status can generate high-quality, multi-modal trajectories. Furthermore, to exploit the world model's foresight, we propose a Future-aware Rewarder, which distills future latent representation from the frozen world model to evaluate and select optimal trajectories in real-time. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM, NAVSIM-v2, and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that WorldDrive achieves leading planning performance among vision-only methods while maintaining high-fidelity action-controlled video generation capabilities, providing strong evidence for the effectiveness of unifying vision and motion representation for robust autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为WorldDrive的端到端自动驾驶新框架，通过统一视觉和运动表征实现场景生成与实时规划的结合，显著提升了自动驾驶规划的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶世界模型主要侧重于视觉场景表征，忽略了可被规划器继承和共享的运动表征，导致视觉场景生成与精确运动规划之间存在脱节。该研究旨在弥合这一鸿沟，提升自动驾驶的规划与生成能力。
AI.method: 1）提出轨迹感知的驾驶世界模型，通过轨迹词汇对视觉动态和运动意图进行一致性约束；2）将视觉和运动编码器迁移至多模态规划器，利用场景生成预优化的特征进行驾驶决策；3）设计Future-aware Rewarder，通过冻结的世界模型潜变量为轨迹优选提供评价。方法支持高质量、多模态的轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM、NAVSIM-v2和nuScenes等多个自动驾驶基准测试中，WorldDrive在视觉端到端方法中实现了领先的规划性能，并成功保持了高保真的视频生成能力。
AI.conclusion: WorldDrive通过统一视觉与运动表征，实现了鲁棒自动驾驶中的场景生成与规划的深度融合，为提升端到端自动驾驶系统的表现提供了有力证据和实用方法。

title: GT-PCQA: Geometry-Texture Decoupled Point Cloud Quality Assessment with MLLM
summary: With the rapid advancement of Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs), MLLM-based Image Quality Assessment (IQA) methods have shown promising generalization. However, directly extending these MLLM-based IQA methods to PCQA remains challenging. On the one hand, existing PCQA datasets are limited in scale, which hinders stable and effective instruction tuning of MLLMs. On the other hand, due to large-scale image-text pretraining, MLLMs tend to rely on texture-dominant reasoning and are insufficiently sensitive to geometric structural degradations that are critical for PCQA. To address these gaps, we propose a novel MLLM-based no-reference PCQA framework, termed GT-PCQA, which is built upon two key strategies. First, to enable stable and effective instruction tuning under scarce PCQA supervision, a 2D-3D joint training strategy is proposed. This strategy formulates PCQA as a relative quality comparison problem to unify large-scale IQA datasets with limited PCQA datasets. It incorporates a parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) scheme to support instruction tuning. Second, a geometry-texture decoupling strategy is presented, which integrates a dual-prompt mechanism with an alternating optimization scheme to mitigate the inherent texture-dominant bias of pre-trained MLLMs, while enhancing sensitivity to geometric structural degradations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GT-PCQA achieves competitive performance and exhibits strong generalization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了GT-PCQA，一个面向无参考点云质量评价（PCQA）的多模态大模型框架，系统解决了数据规模小和对几何结构退化敏感性差的问题，取得了良好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在图像质量评价（IQA）中表现出色，但直接用于PCQA面临两个挑战：一是PCQA数据集规模有限，难以稳定有效地微调；二是预训练模型对纹理信息更敏感，而对PCQA中关键的几何结构退化缺乏敏感度。
AI.method: 构建了GT-PCQA框架，核心包括：1）提出2D-3D联合训练策略，将PCQA视为相对质量比较问题，结合大规模IQA和有限PCQA数据集，并采用参数高效的LoRA适配微调；2）提出几何-纹理解耦策略，通过双提示机制和交替优化，缓解模型的纹理偏好，提高其对几何退化的感知能力。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，GT-PCQA方法在PCQA任务上具有竞争力，并且表现出较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出的方法有效解决了MLLM在PCQA任务中遇到的数据和结构敏感性挑战，能更好地实现点云质量评价，在实际应用中具有广阔前景。

title: Pansharpening for Thin-Cloud Contaminated Remote Sensing Images: A Unified Framework and Benchmark Dataset
summary: Pansharpening under thin cloudy conditions is a practically significant yet rarely addressed task, challenged by simultaneous spatial resolution degradation and cloud-induced spectral distortions. Existing methods often address cloud removal and pansharpening sequentially, leading to cumulative errors and suboptimal performance due to the lack of joint degradation modeling. To address these challenges, we propose a Unified Pansharpening Model with Thin Cloud Removal (Pan-TCR), an end-to-end framework that integrates physical priors. Motivated by theoretical analysis in the frequency domain, we design a frequency-decoupled restoration (FDR) block that disentangles the restoration of multispectral image (MSI) features into amplitude and phase components, each guided by complementary degradation-robust prompts: the near-infrared (NIR) band amplitude for cloud-resilient restoration, and the panchromatic (PAN) phase for high-resolution structural enhancement. To ensure coherence between the two components, we further introduce an interactive inter-frequency consistency (IFC) module, enabling cross-modal refinement that enforces consistency and robustness across frequency cues. Furthermore, we introduce the first real-world thin-cloud contaminated pansharpening dataset (PanTCR-GF2), comprising paired clean and cloudy PAN-MSI images, to enable robust benchmarking under realistic conditions. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate the superiority and robustness of Pan-TCR, establishing a new benchmark for pansharpening under realistic atmospheric degradations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的端到端遥感图像融合方法Pan-TCR，可在薄云干扰条件下同时实现云去除和高分辨率图像的获取。
AI.motivation: 目前遥感全色锐化（pansharpening）在薄云条件下会存在空间分辨率下降和由云引起的光谱畸变，且现有方法通常将去云和融合分开处理，导致误差累积和性能不足。急需一种能联合建模空间和光谱退化的新方法。
AI.method: 方法提出了统一的Pan-TCR模型，结合物理先验，基于频域理论设计了'频率解耦恢复块'(FDR)。FDR块将多光谱特征恢复解耦为幅值和相位：幅值利用近红外(NIR)引导实现抗云恢复，相位利用全色(PAN)引导提升空间结构。一致性通过交互式频间一致(IFC)模块来强化。此外，作者首次公布了真实薄云污染的pansharpening数据集PanTCR-GF2，用于模型评测。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验表明，Pan-TCR在图像清晰度、色彩还原和云去除方面相比现有方法均取得优异且稳健的表现，成为薄云条件下的全色锐化新基准。
AI.conclusion: Pan-TCR模型高效整合了空间与光谱信息，实现了薄云条件下的高性能全色遥感图像融合，为实际复杂大气退化场景下的遥感应用提供了新工具。

title: Learning Question-Aware Keyframe Selection with Synthetic Supervision for Video Question Answering
summary: Large multimodal models (LMMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable performance in video question answering (VideoQA), yet reasoning over video remains challenging due to high inference cost and diluted information. Keyframe selection offers efficiency and sharper reasoning but suffers from sparse supervision and redundant frame choices when relying only on image-text similarity. We present a question-aware keyframe selection framework with two components: pseudo keyframe labels derived from LMMs that provide informative supervision and a coverage regularization that promotes diverse, complementary evidence across time. Experiments on NExT-QA show that our method significantly improves accuracy, especially for temporal and causal question types, establishing keyframe selection as an effective and learnable module for VideoQA.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的面向问题的视频关键帧选择方法，以提升视频问答（VideoQA）的推理效果和效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型多模态模型（LMMs）在视频问答上表现优异，但高推理成本和信息冗余/稀释依然制约实际应用。单纯选取图像-文本相似帧会导致监督稀疏和帧冗余，如何高效、有效地选择关键信息帧成为重要问题。
AI.method: 提出了带有问题感知能力的关键帧选择框架，包括：1）利用LMMs自动生成伪关键帧标签，形成更丰富的监督信号；2）引入覆盖率正则项，鼓励在时间上选择多样且互补的证据帧。
AI.result: 在NExT-QA数据集实验表明，该方法显著提升了VideoQA的准确率，特别是在时间推理和因果推理类问题上。
AI.conclusion: 关键帧选择作为一个可学习模块，有助于提升视频问答系统效率和推理能力，方法有效并具有通用性。

title: CyCLeGen: Cycle-Consistent Layout Prediction and Image Generation in Vision Foundation Models
summary: We present CyCLeGen, a unified vision-language foundation model capable of both image understanding and image generation within a single autoregressive framework. Unlike existing vision models that depend on separate modules for perception and synthesis, CyCLeGen adopts a fully integrated architecture that enforces cycle-consistent learning through image->layout->image and layout->image->layout generation loops. This unified formulation introduces two key advantages: introspection, enabling the model to reason about its own generations, and data efficiency, allowing self-improvement via synthetic supervision under a reinforcement learning objective guided by cycle consistency. Extensive experiments show that CyCLeGen achieves significant gains across diverse image understanding and generation benchmarks, highlighting the potential of unified vision-language foundation models.

AI.tldr: CyCLeGen是一种统一的视觉-语言基础模型，能在同一自回归框架下实现图片理解和生成，在多个基准上都有优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型通常将感知（理解）和生成（合成）分割为两个独立模块，缺乏统一且高效的整合方式，难以充分利用模型自身的生成能力。
AI.method: 提出了CyCLeGen模型，采用自回归统一架构，在image->layout->image和layout->image->layout的循环中，利用循环一致性进行联合训练，并通过强化学习与合成监督实现自我改进。
AI.result: 实验表明，CyCLeGen在多项视觉理解和生成任务基准上都取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 统一的视觉-语言基础模型具有巨大的应用潜力，既提升了数据利用效率，又增强了模型的自反与推理能力。

title: GeoNVS: Geometry Grounded Video Diffusion for Novel View Synthesis
comment: The code will be available at https://sites.google.com/view/minjun-kang/geonvs-arxiv26
summary: Novel view synthesis requires strong 3D geometric consistency and the ability to generate visually coherent images across diverse viewpoints. While recent camera-controlled video diffusion models show promising results, they often suffer from geometric distortions and limited camera controllability. To overcome these challenges, we introduce GeoNVS, a geometry-grounded novel-view synthesizer that enhances both geometric fidelity and camera controllability through explicit 3D geometric guidance. Our key innovation is the Gaussian Splat Feature Adapter (GS-Adapter), which lifts input-view diffusion features into 3D Gaussian representations, renders geometry-constrained novel-view features, and adaptively fuses them with diffusion features to correct geometrically inconsistent representations. Unlike prior methods that inject geometry at the input level, GS-Adapter operates in feature space, avoiding view-dependent color noise that degrades structural consistency. Its plug-and-play design enables zero-shot compatibility with diverse feed-forward geometry models without additional training, and can be adapted to other video diffusion backbones. Experiments across 9 scenes and 18 settings demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 11.3% and 14.9% improvements over SEVA and CameraCtrl, with up to 2x reduction in translation error and 7x in Chamfer Distance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoNVS，一种结合显式3D几何信息的新型视角合成方法，能有效提升几何保真度和摄像头可控性，并显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的新颖视角合成方法存在几何失真和摄像头控制不灵活的问题，限制了合成结果的质量和应用范围。
AI.method: 作者提出了GeoNVS方法，其核心组件GS-Adapter可将输入视角的扩散特征提升为3D高斯表示，进行几何约束特征渲染，并与原扩散特征融合以修正几何不一致。不同于以往仅在输入层次引入几何信息的方法，GS-Adapter在特征空间操作，避免了视角相关的颜色噪声，并且可即插即用，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在9个场景和18个实验设置中，GeoNVS在合成质量和三维结构一致性方面，比SEVA和CameraCtrl分别提升了11.3%和14.9%，平移误差减少了2倍，Chamfer距离减少了7倍，表现为最新水平。
AI.conclusion: GeoNVS通过显式3D几何引导，提升了新颖视角生成的几何保真度和可控性，具备更好的兼容性和普适性，在实验中实现了显著优于现有方法的表现。

title: MMSpec: Benchmarking Speculative Decoding for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on multimodal tasks but suffer from high inference latency due to large model sizes and long multimodal contexts. Speculative decoding has recently emerged as an effective acceleration technique, yet its behavior in VLMs remains insufficiently understood. We introduce MMSpec, the first benchmark for evaluating speculative decoding in vision-language models. MMSpec contains 600 multimodal samples across six task categories and integrates ten representative speculative decoding algorithms under a unified evaluation framework. Our study reveals three key findings: (1) methods designed for text-only LLMs degrade in multimodal scenarios, (2) vision awareness becomes increasingly important at larger batch sizes, and (3) throughput speedup alone does not reliably reflect latency performance. Motivated by these findings, we propose ViSkip, a plug-and-play speculative decoding method that dynamically adapts speculation to vision tokens and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MMSpec —— 首个用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）推测解码的基准，并提出了ViSkip新方法，大幅提升推测解码在多模态任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多模态任务上表现优异，但由于模型巨大且输入环境复杂，推理延迟很高。当前热门的推测解码加速方法虽然有效，但其在VLM中的表现和特点尚不清楚，因此需要专门的评测工具和新技术。
AI.method: 构建了MMSpec基准，包括600个多模态样本和六类任务类别，统一集成了十种典型的推测解码算法，分析了它们在VLM下的表现。同时，根据分析发现，提出了ViSkip方法：动态适应视觉token以提升加速效果，且无需修改主干模型，可即插即用。
AI.result: 实验证明：(1)许多为文本大模型设计的推测解码方法在多模态场景下性能下降；(2)批量推理下模型对视觉信息的感知变得更加重要；(3)仅关注吞吐加速并不总能代表实际延迟表现。ViSkip在各项指标上均达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: MMSpec提供了系统、标准的评测工具，推动了多模态推测解码的研究。ViSkip证明了插件化、视觉感知推测解码方法的潜力，显著提升VLM推理效率，对实现低延迟多模态应用有实际意义。

title: Edit2Interp: Adapting Image Foundation Models from Spatial Editing to Video Frame Interpolation with Few-Shot Learning
summary: Pre-trained image editing models exhibit strong spatial reasoning and object-aware transformation capabilities acquired from billions of image-text pairs, yet they possess no explicit temporal modeling. This paper demonstrates that these spatial priors can be repurposed to unlock temporal synthesis capabilities through minimal adaptation - without introducing any video-specific architecture or motion estimation modules. We show that a large image editing model (Qwen-Image-Edit), originally designed solely for static instruction-based edits, can be adapted for Video Frame Interpolation (VFI) using only 64-256 training samples via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Our core contribution is revealing that the model's inherent understanding of "how objects transform" in static scenes contains latent temporal reasoning that can be activated through few-shot fine-tuning. While the baseline model completely fails at producing coherent intermediate frames, our parameter-efficient adaptation successfully unlocks its interpolation capability. Rather than competing with task-specific VFI methods trained from scratch on massive datasets, our work establishes that foundation image editing models possess untapped potential for temporal tasks, offering a data-efficient pathway for video synthesis in resource-constrained scenarios. This bridges the gap between image manipulation and video understanding, suggesting that spatial and temporal reasoning may be more intertwined in foundation models than previously recognized

AI.tldr: 本论文发现，通过极小的微调（仅用64-256个样本和LoRA低秩适配），大型图像编辑模型（如Qwen-Image-Edit）可以被赋予视频帧插值（VFI）能力，无需针对视频设计新架构或运动估计模块，其静态空间理解被成功转化为时序推理能力，实现了参数高效、数据高效的视频合成。
AI.motivation: 当前的预训练图像编辑模型虽然拥有强大的空间推理和对象变换能力，但对时序建模几乎无涉及。研究动因在于探索能否无需专门针对视频设计网络，仅基于已有图像模型进行微调，从而实现视频相关任务，降低对大规模视频数据和专业架构的需求。
AI.method: 采用大型图像编辑模型Qwen-Image-Edit作为基础，对其以LoRA低秩适配方式进行轻量微调，仅用少量（64-256）帧插值样本训练，无需增加视频专属模块或运动估计，实现模型的快速转向视频帧插值任务。
AI.result: 实验显示，原始模型在插值帧任务上表现极差，而微调后的模型能够较好地生成时序连贯的中间帧，充分激活了模型中蕴含的时序推理能力。尽管理论上不追求超越专门为VFI设计的模型，但实现了高效、参数友好、数据节省的可用性能。
AI.conclusion: 大规模图像基础模型中蕴含有可被激活的跨空间-时序推理能力。通过少量适配即可拓展至视频相关任务，为资源受限场景中的视频合成提供了新路径，也启示了未来基础模型在跨模态、跨任务泛化能力上的潜力。

title: Clue Matters: Leveraging Latent Visual Clues to Empower Video Reasoning
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced video reasoning, yet Video Question Answering (VideoQA) remains challenging due to its demand for temporal causal reasoning and evidence-grounded answer generation.
